Matthew1:1 Tsamba yokubarwa kwaJesu Kristu, mukororo waDhavhidha, mukororo waAbrahama." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahama wakabara Isaka, naIsaka wakabara Jakobe, naJakobe wakabara Judha nevanun'una vake;" 
Matthew1:3 naJudha wakabara Farezi naZara ndiTamari, naFarezi wakabara Hezironi, naHezironi wakabara Aramu," 
Matthew1:4 naAramu wakabara Aminadhabhi, naAminadhabhi wakabara Nasoni, naNasoni wakabara Sarimoni" 
Matthew1:5 naSarimoni wakabara Bhoazi ndiRahabhi, naBhoazi wakabara Obhedhi ndiRute, naObhedhi wakabara Jesi," 
Matthew1:6 naJesi wakabara Dhavhidha uwo waiya mambo. NaDhavhidha mambo wakabara Soromoni ngomukadzi uwo waiya waUria," 
Matthew1:7 naSoromoni wakabara Rehobhoamu, naRehobhoamu wakabara Abhia, naAbhia wakabara Asa," 
Matthew1:8 naAsa wakabara Jehoshafati, naJehoshafati wakabara Joramu, naJoramu wakabara Uzia," 
Matthew1:9 naUzia wakabara Jotamu, naJotamu wakabara Ahazi, naAhazi wakabara Hezekia," 
Matthew1:10 naHezekia wakabara Manase, naManase wakabara Amoni, naAmoni wakabara Josia," 
Matthew1:11 naJosia wakabara Jekonia nevanun'una vake, ngomukuwo wokutorwa kuenda Bhabhuroni." 
Matthew1:12 Ngesure kwokutorwa kuenda Bhabhuroni, Jekonia wakabara Saratieri, naSaratieri wakabara Zerubhabheri," 
Matthew1:13 naZerubhabheri wakabara Abhiudhi, naAbhiudhi wakabara Eriakimu, naEriakimu wakabara Azo," 
Matthew1:14 naAzo wakabara Zadhoki, naZadhoki wakabara Akimu, naAkimu wakabara Eriudhi," 
Matthew1:15 naEriudhi wakabara Eriazari, naEriazari wakabara Matani, naMatani wakabara Jakobe," 
Matthew1:16 naJakobe wakabara Josefa, mwamuna waMaria, uwo wakabara Jesu unozwi Kristu." 
Matthew1:17 Ndizvo mibarirwana yeshe kubva kunaAbrahama kuguma kuna Dhavhidha iri gumi namirongomuna, kubvira kunaDhavhidha kuguma pakutorwa kuenda Bhabhuroni mibarirwana iri gumi namirongomuna, nokubvira pakutorwa kuenda Bhabhuroni metsa kuguma kunaKristu mibarirwana gumi namirongomuna." 
Matthew1:18 Zvino kubarwa kwaJesu Kristu kwaiya kwakadai; apo Maria mai ake aiya aemeserwa Josefa, vasati vashongana, iye wakaoneka aanemimba yoMweya Wakachena." 
Matthew1:19 NaJosefa mwamuna wake, ngokuti waiya munhu wakarurama, asikadi kumutsverudzisa, waida kuti amurambe ngokufishika." 
Matthew1:20 Kwakati achakarakadza ndizvo, penya, ngirosi yaMambo yakaoneka kwaari ngokurota yechiti, “Josefa, iwewe Mukororo waDhavhidha, usatya kutora Maria mukadzi wako; ngokuti mimba iyo yaanayo ngeyoMweya Wakachena." 
Matthew1:21 Unozobara mukororo; newe unozodudza zina rake kuti Jesu ngokuti ndiye unozoponesa vanhu vake kubva kuzvishaishi zvavo.” 
Matthew1:22 Zveshe izvi zvakaitika kuti zvizadzisike izvo zvakaereketwa ndiMambo kubudikidza ngomuprofeti echiti," 
Matthew1:23 “Penya, mhandara inozoita mimba, ibereke mukororo, navo vanozodudza zina rake kuti Emanueri” ukwo ngokukumuchwa kunoti, “Mwari unesu.”" 
Matthew1:24 NaJosefa amuka muhope wakaita kudai ngokuronza kwengirosi yaMambo, wakatora mukadzi wake." 
Matthew1:25 Naye aazi kushongana naye metsa wakabara mukororo; naye wakadudza zina rake kuti JESU. 
Matthew2:1 Kwakati apo Jesu abarwa muBhetherehema reJudhia ngemazuva aHerodhi mambo, penya, kwakauya vazii vaidzidza ngezvenyeredzi vechibva kumabvazuva vakaguma Jerusarema" 
Matthew2:2 vechiti, “Uri pari uwo wakabarwa Mambo wavaJudha? Ngokuti takaona nyeredzi yake kumabvazuva, nesu tauya kuti timudire.”" 
Matthew2:3 Kwakati Herodhi mambo azwa, wakatambudzika neveJerusarema veshe naye." 
Matthew2:4 Naapo aunganidza pamwepo vapristi vakuru veshe nevanyori vevanhu, wakavabvunza kuti, “Unozobarwa pari Kristu?”" 
Matthew2:5 Navo vakati kwaari, “MuBhetherehema reJudhia; ngokuti kwakanyorwa ngomuprofeti kudai:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Iwewe Bhetherehema, nyika yaJudha, auri mudoko akadi mukati mwevatongi vaJudha; ngokuti kwouri kunozobuda mutungamiriri uwo ndiye unozoita muushi wevanhu vangu vaIsuraeri.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Naapo Herodhi adaidza vazii vaidzidza ngezvenyeredzi ngokufishika, wakanasa kubvunzisisa kwavari mukuwo weyakaoneka nyeredzi." 
Matthew2:8 Naye wakavatuma Bhetherehema, akati, “Endai munase kutsvakisisa uwo mwana mudoko; kuti mwamuona mundiunzire izwi, kuti neniwo ndiende ndimudire.”" 
Matthew2:9 Navo, apo vazwa mambo, vakaenda, penya, nyeredzi iyo yevakaona kumabvazuva yakavatungamirira metsa yakaguma pandau apo paiya nemwana mudoko." 
Matthew2:10 Naapo vaona nyeredzi vakadakara ngokudakara kukurutu. 
Matthew2:11 Vapotera mumhatso, vakaona mwana mudoko naMaria mai ake; navo vakawa pashi, vakamudira; kwakati vabeura pfuma yavo vakamupa zvipo, mukore, makha nemhura." 
Matthew2:12 Navo vechipangwa mukurota kuti vasachahwirira kunaHerodhi, vakaenda ngenjira imweni kunyika yavo." 
Matthew2:13 Naapo vaenda, penya, ngirosi yaMambo yakaoneka kunaJosefa mukurota yechiti, “Miruka, utore mwana mudoko namai ake, utizire Egipite, ugare apo metsa ndikuronzere, ngokuti Herodhi unozotsvaka mwana mudoko kumuuraya.”" 
Matthew2:14 Naye wakamiruka, akatora mwana mudoko namai ake usiku, wakaenda Egipite," 
Matthew2:15 naye wakagareyo metsa kufa kwaHerodhi, kuti zvidzadzisike izvo zvakaereketwa ndiMambo kubudikidza ngomuprofeti echiti, “Ndakadaidza mukororo wangu kuti abude Egipite.”" 
Matthew2:16 Naapo Herodhi aona kuti wakaitirwa jee ngevazii vaidzidza ngezvenyeredzi, wakatseneka kakurutu, wakatuma, akauraya vadoko veshe vevakomana vaiya vari muBhetherehema nenharaunda yaro yeshe, avo vaiya vaane makore mairi nevaiya pashi paawo, kudai ngomukuwo uwo waaiya akanasa kubvunzisisa vazii vaidzidza ngezvenyeredzi." 
Matthew2:17 Zvakazadzisika izvo zvakaereketwa kubudikidza ndiJeremia muprofeti echiti," 
Matthew2:18 “Izwi rakazwika muRama, kuchema nokutsumba kukurutu, Racheri echichemera vana vake, asikatendi kuembedzerwa, ngokuti vaiya vasisipo.”" 
Matthew2:19 Asi apo Herodhi afa, penya, ngirosi yaMambo yakaoneka mukurota kunaJosefa ari muEgipite yechiti," 
Matthew2:20 “Miruka, utore mwana mudoko namai ake, uende munyika yeIsuraeri; ngokuti avo vaitsvaka kuuraya mwana mudoko vakafa.”" 
Matthew2:21 Naye wakamiruka, akatora mwana mudoko namai ake, akauya munyika yeIsuraeri." 
Matthew2:22 Asi azwa kuti Akirausi waiya mambo weJudhia pandau yababa ake Herodhi, wakatya kuendayo; echinyowedzwa mukurota, wakapaukira kunyika yeGarire," 
Matthew2:23 wakauya akagara muguta rinozwi Nazaretha; kuti rizadzisike izwi rakaereketwa ngevaprofeti kuti, “Unozozwi muNazaretha.”" 
Matthew3:1 Ngaawo mazuva wakauya Johani muBhabhatidzi echichumaira mushango mweJudhia 
Matthew3:2 echiti, “Tenderukai; ngokuti umambo hwomudenga hwaa pasinde.”" 
Matthew3:3 Ngokuti uyu ndiye waakareketa ndiye Isaya muprofeti echiti, izwi rounodaidzira mushango: “Nasirirai njira yaMambo, ruramisai makwara ake.”" 
Matthew3:4 Uyu Johani waisimira chipfeko chakanasirwa ngemamviri ekamera, nebhande redoo muchiunu chake; nokudya kwake kwaiya ndongwe neuchi womushango." 
Matthew3:5 Kwakauya kwaari veJerusarema neveshe veJudhia nevenharaunda yeshe yeJorodhani," 
Matthew3:6 navo vakabhabhatidzwa ndiye murwizi rweJorodhani, vechitenda zvishaishi zvavo." 
Matthew3:7 Asi echiona vazhinji vevaFarisi nevaSadhusi vechiuya kurubhabhatidzo rwake, wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi vana vemabuura, ndiani wakamunyowedza kuti mutize ushungu hunouya?" 
Matthew3:8 Ndizvo mwechipangidzira michero inoonisa kutenderuka. 
Matthew3:9 Musapinimidza mwechiti mukati mwenyu, ‘Tina Abrahama baba edu.’ Ngokuti ndinoti kwomuri Mwari unesimba ngaaya mapuwe kumusira vana kunaAbrahama." 
Matthew3:10 Nazvinopano sanho raiswa panzinde dzemiti, ndizvo muti weshe usikabereki michero yakanaka unotemerwa pashi, ukandirwe mumwoto." 
Matthew3:11 Inini ngegwinyiso ndinomubhabhatidza mumvura, kuita chioniso chokutenderuka, asi iye unouya sure kwangu unesimba kupinda inini, anditosisiri nokutwara magwada ake; uyu ndiye unozomubhabhatidza ngoMweya Wakachena nemwoto." 
Matthew3:12 Uwo rutsero rwake ruri munyara yake, naye unozonasa kutsvaira mbuwa yake nokuunganidza koroni yake mudura, asi unozopisha makoto ngomwoto usikadzimi.”" 
Matthew3:13 Naapo Jesu wakauya Jorodhani kunaJohani echibva Garire, koobhabhatidzwa ndiye." 
Matthew3:14 Asi Johani wakada kumurambira echiti, “Inini ndinosisira kuti ndibhabhatidzwe ndiwe, newe wouya kwendiri here?”" 
Matthew3:15 Asi Jesu wakapingura akati kwaari, “Wechitenda zvino; ngokuti ngokudaro kunodikanwa kuti tizadzise kururama kweshe.” Naapo wakamutendera." 
Matthew3:16 Naapo Jesu abhabhatidzwa, paripo wakabva mumvura, penya, denga rakabeuka kwaari, naye wakaona Mweya waMwari wechidzaka kudai ngenjia, wechiuya padera pake." 
Matthew3:17 Penya, izwi rechibva mudenga rakati, “Uyu ndiye Mukororo wangu, unodikanwa, wendinonasa kudakara ndiye.”" 
Matthew4:1 Naapo Jesu wakakweiwa ndiMweya kuenda mushango kuti aedzwe ndiDhiabhorosi. 
Matthew4:2 Wakati aera kudya mazuva makumi marongomuna masikati nousiku waiya nenzara. 
Matthew4:3 Muedzi wakauya kwaari akati, “Kuti iwewe uri Mukororo waMwari, chironzera aya mapuwe aite zvingwa.”" 
Matthew4:4 Asi iye wakamupingura akati, “Kwakanyorwa kuti munhu aazorarami ngechingwa chega, asi ngemazwi eshe anobuda mumuromo waMwari.”" 
Matthew4:5 Naapo Dhiabhorosi wakamutora kuenda naye kudhorobha rakachena, wakamuisa padera pechachungu cheTemperi," 
Matthew4:6 akati kwaari, “Kuti iwewe uri Mukororo waMwari, dzikandire pashi, ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Unozoronzera ngirosi dzake ngendaa yako, nadzo dzinozokubata ngenyara dzadzo, kuti kunyazwi ngouri mukuwo usazopumhunwa tsoka yako pabuwe.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Kwakanyorwazve kuti, ‘Usazoedza Mambo Mwari wako.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Zve, Dhiabhorosi wakamutora kuenda pamutunhu wakanyanya kureba, wakamupangidzira umambo hweshe hwenyika noutende hwahwo." 
Matthew4:9 Naye wakati kwaari, “Izvi zveshe ndinozokupa, kudai wechizogwadama pashi nokundidira.”" 
Matthew4:10 Naapo Jesu wakati kwaari, “Ibva Sathani, ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Unozodira Mambo Mwari wako nokumushandira iye ega.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Naapo Dhiabhorosi wakamusiya, penya, ngirosi dzakauya kwaari, dzikamushandira." 
Matthew4:12 Naapo azwa kuti Johani wakasungwa, wakahwirirazve Garire." 
Matthew4:13 Echibva Nazaretha, wakauya akagara muKhapernaume, riri pasinde peruandhle, munharaunda dzeZebhuruni neNafitari," 
Matthew4:14 kuti rizadzisike izwi iro rakaereketwa ndiIsaya muprofeti echiti," 
Matthew4:15 “Nyika yeZebhuruni nenyika yeNafitari, panjira inoenda kuruandhle, ruseri rweJorodhani, Garire revanhu vemadzinza." 
Matthew4:16 Vanhu avo vaiya vakagara muchidima vakaona kujeka kukurutu; naavo vaiya vakagara munyika nomubvute rokufa, kujeka kwakavabudira.”" 
Matthew4:17 Kubvira ngouwo mukuwo Jesu wakatanga kuchumaira echiti, “Tenderukai; ngokuti umambo hwomudenga hwaa pasinde.”" 
Matthew4:18 Echihamba pasinde peruandhle rweGarire, wakaona vakoma vairi, Simoni unozwi Petro, naAndreu munun'una wake, vechikandira nhaa yavo muruandhle; ngokuti vasiya vabati vehove." 
Matthew4:19 Wakati kwavari, “Teerai sure kwangu, neni ndinozomuita vabati vevanhu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Paripo vakasia nhaa dzavo vakamuteera. 
Matthew4:21 Echibva apo wakaona vakoma vamweni vairi, Jakobe mukororo waZebhedhi nomunun'una wake Johani, vari mungarava pamwepo nababa avo Zebhedhi vechinasira nhaa dzavo; naye wakavadaidza." 
Matthew4:22 Paripo vakasiya ngarava nababa avo, vakamuteera." 
Matthew4:23 NaJesu wakahamba-hamba muGarire mweshe, echidzidzisa mumhatso dzavo dzokudira nokuchumaira vhangeri roumambo, nokurapa mbeu dzeshe dzokurwara nembeu dzeshe dzenhenda mukati mwevanhu." 
Matthew4:24 Nembiri yake yakateketeswa munyika yeshe yeSiria, navo vakaunza kwaari veshe vairwara avo vaiya nenhenda dzakaparadzana, nevaiya nezvinorwadza, naavo vaiya vane madhimoni, navo vaiya nenhutu, naavo vaiya vakaoma muiri, naye wakavaponesa." 
Matthew4:25 Yakamuteera mbungano huru yevanhu vechibva Garire, Dhekaporisi, Jerusarema, Judhia noruseri rweJorodhani." 
Matthew5:1 Naye echiona mbungano zhinji, wakakwira mutunhu, naapo agara pashi, vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari;" 
Matthew5:2 wakashama muromo wake, wakavadzidzisa echiti." 
Matthew5:3 “Vanomuchena varombo vomweya, ngokuti ngehwavo umambo hwomudenga." 
Matthew5:4 Vanomuchena vanotsumba, ngokuti vanozoembedzerwa." 
Matthew5:5 Vanomuchena vakapfaa, ngokuti vanozogara nhaka yomunyika." 
Matthew5:6 Vanomuchena avo vane nzara nenyota ngokuda kururama, ngokuti vanozogutiswa." 
Matthew5:7 Vanomuchena avo vanenyasha, ngokuti vanozoitirwa nyasha." 
Matthew5:8 Vanomuchena avo vanemwoyo wakachena, ngokuti vanozoona Mwari." 
Matthew5:9 Vanomuchena vaiyanisi, ngokuti vanozozwi vana Mwari." 
Matthew5:10 Vanomuchena avo vanotambudzwa ngendaa yokururama, ngokuti umambo hwomudenga ngehwavo." 
Matthew5:11 “Munomuchena apo mwootukwa, mwootambudzwa, mwooreiwa mazwi eshe akashata okunyepa ngepamusoro pangu." 
Matthew5:12 Dakarai, mwechidakara kakurutu; ngokuti musharo wenyu mukuru mudenga; ngokuti ngokudaro vakatambudza vaprofeti avo vaiya pamberi penyu." 
Matthew5:13 “Imwimwi muri munyu wenyika, asi kuti munyu warasha kunaka kwawo, ungachazorungwa ngenyi? Sure kweizvi auchanakiri chiro, kwega kurashwa kubanze nokutsikwa-tsikwa ngevanhu." 
Matthew5:14 Imwimwi muri kujeka kwenyika. Guta rakaakwa padera pomutunhu aringafishiki. 
Matthew5:15 Nechibani avabasiri vechichiisa pashi pechitundu, asi pachigadzikiro pacho, nacho chinojekisa veshe vari mumhatso." 
Matthew5:16 Ngokudaro ngakujeke kujeka kwenyu pamberi pevanhu, kuti vaone mishando yenyu yakanaka, vairikidze Baba enyu ari mudenga." 
Matthew5:17 “Musapinimidza kuti ndakauya kuparadza Mipango nokuti zvidzidziso zvevaprofeti. Andizi kuuya kuparadza, asi kuzvizadzisa." 
Matthew5:18 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, metsa denga nenyika zvipinde, apana chiro chidoko nokuti chidonhwe chimwe achitongozopindi kubva muMipango metsa zveshe zvaitika." 
Matthew5:19 Ndizvo kunyazwi ndiani unozogura chimwe chidoko cheiyi mipango, echidzidzisa vanhu kuita kudaro, iye unozoita mudoko wokugumisira muumambo hwomudenga. Asi iye unozozviita nokuzvidzidzisa, iye unozozwi mukuru muumambo hwomudenga." 
Matthew5:20 Ngokuti ndinoti kwomuri, kudai kururama kwenyu kusikapindi kururama kwevanyori nekwevaFarisi, amutongozopindi muumambo hwomudenga." 
Matthew5:21 “Mwakazwa kuti kwakaronzwa kwavari vekaretu kuti, ‘Usazouraya.’ Neuwo unozouraya unozoa nendaa yokutongwa." 
Matthew5:22 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri munhu weshe uwo unomutsenekera munun'una wake unozoa nendaa yokutongwa, nouwo unozotuka munun'una wake kuti, ‘Munhu usinashwiro’, unozoa nendaa yokutongwa ngemakota, nouwo unozoti, ‘Iwewe benzi’, unozoa nendaa yokurashwa muGehena remwoto." 
Matthew5:23 Ndizvo kudai woohina chipo chako paarita, naapo ukakarakadza kuti munun'una wako unekhururu newe," 
Matthew5:24 siyapo chipo chako pamberi pearita, uende; utange kuiyana nomunun'una wako, naapo unozouya kuhina chipo chako." 
Matthew5:25 Tenderana negaa rako ngokukasira, uchiri munjira naro, kuti kunyazwi ngouri mukuwo gaa rako risazokuhina kumutongi, nomutongi akuhine kunejoni, newe uiswe mutirongo." 
Matthew5:26 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwouri, ‘Autongozobudimwo metsa waripa nekamare kokupedzisira.’" 
Matthew5:27 “Mwakazwa kuti kwakaronzwa kuti, ‘Usazoomba.’" 
Matthew5:28 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, kunyazwi ndiani unomuringira mukadzi ngokuemura, watoomba naye mumwoyo mwake." 
Matthew5:29 Asi kudai dziso rako rokumudyo rechikupumhunisa, ribvite, urirashe kubva kwouri; ngokuti kwakapinda kunaka kwouri kuti chimwe chenhengo dzemuiri wako chife, kunekuti muiri wako weshe ukandirwe muGehena." 
Matthew5:30 Kuti nyara yako yokumudyo yechikupumhunisa, iteme, uirashe kubva kwouri; ngokuti kwakapinda kunaka kwouri kuti chimwe chenhengo dzemuiri wako chife, kunekuti muiri wako weshe urashwe muGehena." 
Matthew5:31 “Kwakaronzwa kuti, ‘Uwo unoramba mukadzi wake, ngaamupe tsamba yokuparadzana.’" 
Matthew5:32 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, iye unoramba mukadzi wake asina ndaa yokuomba, unomuitisa muombi, nouwo unomuroora uwo wakarambwa unoomba." 
Matthew5:33 “Zve, mwakazwa kuti kwakaronzwa kwavari vekaretu kuti, ‘Usazopika wechinyepa, asi unozoita kunaMambo mhiko dzako.’" 
Matthew5:34 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, musazopika nakamwe, kunyazwi ngomudenga, ngokuti riri dendemaro raMwari;" 
Matthew5:35 kunyazwi ngenyika, ngokuti iri chitambarariro chetsoka dzake; kunyazwi ngeJerusarema, ngokuti riri dhorobha raMambo mukuru;" 
Matthew5:36 kunyazwi ngesoro rako, ngokuti aungakoni kuita kuti rubvudzi rumwe ruchene nokuti rusvipe." 
Matthew5:37 Asi kuereketa kwenyu ngakuite, ‘Eya, eya,’ nokuti, ‘Haiwa, haiwa;’ ngokuti zveshe izvo zvinopinda izvi zvinobva kuneuwo wakashata." 
Matthew5:38 “Mwakazwa kuti kwakaronzwa kuti, ‘Dziso ngendaa yedziso, nezino ngendaa yezino.’" 
Matthew5:39 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, usarwisana nouwo wakashata. Asi iye unozokurova padama rako rokumudyo, wechipindurira kwaari rimwenizve." 
Matthew5:40 Kuti aripo unozokumangarira nokutora hembe yako, ipa kwaarizve nejazi rako." 
Matthew5:41 Nouwo unozokuangiridza kuenda naye khiromitha rimwe, enda naye makhiromitha mairi." 
Matthew5:42 Ipa kwaari uwo unokumbira kwouri, nouwo unoda kukwereta kwouri, usamurambira." 
Matthew5:43 “Mwakazwa kuti kwakaronzwa kuti, ‘Unozomuda muakirwana wako, unyenye gaa rako.’" 
Matthew5:44 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, idai magaa enyu, muvakumbirire avo vanomutambudza," 
Matthew5:45 kuti muite vana vaBaba enyu ari mudenga; ngokuti iye unoita kuti zuva rake ribude padera pevakashata nevakanaka, nokunaisa mvura padera pevakarurama nevasikazi kururama." 
Matthew5:46 Ngokuti kudai mwechida avo vanomuda imwimwi, munozoashira musharo wenyi? Andizvopi here zvevanoita vabharisi?" 
Matthew5:47 Kudai mwechichingamidza hama dzenyu dzega, munopinda vamweni ngokuitawani? Avadaropi nevemadzinza here?" 
Matthew5:48 Ndizvo imwimwi itai vakaperera, kudai ndiBaba enyu ari mudenga vakaperera. Chumairo Inoendemberi." 
Matthew6:1 “Wonai kuti musaita kururama kwenyu pamberi pevanhu, kuti vamuone; kuti mwechizodaro, amuzooni musharo kunaBaba enyu ari mudenga." 
Matthew6:2 “Ndizvo apo woopa zvipo zvako kuvarombo, usaridza gwama pamberi pako, kudai ngezvevanoita vadziitisi mumhatso dzokudira nomumapato, kuti vairikidzwe ngevanhu. Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, vatoashira musharo wavo." 
Matthew6:3 Asi apo iwewe woopa zvipo zvako kuvarombo, usatendera kuti nyara yako yokumuoshwe izie chinoitwa ngenyara yako yokumudyo," 
Matthew6:4 kuti zvipo zvako zvipuwe ngokufishika; naBaba ako vanoona mukufishika vanozokupawo. 
Matthew6:5 “Naapo mwookumbira, musazodai ngevadziitisi; ngokuti vanoda kukumbira vechiema mumhatso dzokudira nepamhararano mumapato, kuti vaoneke ngevanhu. Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, vatoashira musharo wavo." 
Matthew6:6 Asi iwewe, apo wookumbira, potera mukamera rako repakati, naapo konya musiwo, kumbira kunaBaba ako vari mukufishika, naBaba ako vanoona mukufishika vanozokupawo." 
Matthew6:7 Asi mukukumbira kwenyu musazotera kuhwirinzira mazwi asina shwiro, kudai ngezvevanoita vemadzinza; ngokuti ivo vanokarakadza kuti vanozozwika ngokuwanda kwemazwi avo." 
Matthew6:8 Ndizvo musazodai ndivo, ngokuti Baba enyu unozia izvo zvomunotama musati mwakumbira kwaari." 
Matthew6:9 Ndizvo kumbirai ngeiyi njira: “Baba edu ari mudenga, ngariremeredzwe zina renyu." 
Matthew6:10 Umambo hwenyu ngahuuye. Kuda kwenyu ngakuitwe munyika kudai ngomudenga. 
Matthew6:11 Tipei ngeiri zuva kudya kwedu kunotamika nyamashi. 
Matthew6:12 Tirekererei ndaa dzedu kudai tisu takarekerera avo vane ndaa kwetiri. 
Matthew6:13 Musatipinza mukuedzwa, asi tinunurei kubva kuneuwo wakashata." 
Matthew6:14 “Ngokuti kudai imwimwi mwechirekerera vanhu zvipaukwa zvavo, Baba enyu ari mudenga vanozomurekererawo nemwi." 
Matthew6:15 Asi kudai musikarekereri vanhu zvipauka zvavo, naBaba enyu avazomurekereriwo imwimwi zvipaukwa zvenyu." 
Matthew6:16 “Zve mwoera kudya, musasununika hope dzenyu kudai ngevadziitisi; ngokuti vanodzishaisha hope dzavo kuti vari vaoneke ngevanhu kuti kuera kudya. Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, vatoashira musharo wavo." 
Matthew6:17 Asi iwewe, apo woera kudya, dzodza soro rako, ushambe muhope mwako," 
Matthew6:18 kuti usazooneka ngevanhu kuti uri kuera kudya, asi ndiBaba ako vari pakafishika; naBaba ako avo vanoona mukufishika, vanozokupawo." 
Matthew6:19 “Musadziunganidzira upfumi munyika, apo unundu nengura zvinozvishaishira, naapo mbavha dzinopwanya dzibe." 
Matthew6:20 Asi dziunganidzirei upfumi mudenga, apo unundu nokuti ngura zvisikazvishaishiri, naapo mbavha pedzisikapwanyi dzibe." 
Matthew6:21 Ngokuti apo pane upfumi hwako, ndipozve panozoa nemwoyo wako." 
Matthew6:22 “Chibani chomuiri idziso, ndizvo kudai dziso rako riri dziso kwaro, muiri wako weshe unozozara ngokujeka." 
Matthew6:23 Asi kuti dziso rako rakashata, muiri wako weshe unozozara ngechidima. Ndizvo kudai kujeka kuri mukati mwako kuri chidima, kukuranyi kwechidima icho!" 
Matthew6:24 “Akuna munhu ungakona kushandira madzimambo mairi; ngokuti unozonyenyeredza umwe, ade umweni, nokuti unozoshoora umwe abatirire kunoumweni. Amungashandiri Mwari nemare." 
Matthew6:25 “Ngendaa yeichi ndinoti kwomuri, musadembatemba mundaramo yenyu, kuti munozodyenyi nokuti munozomwenyi nokuti ngendaa yomuiri wenyu, kuti munozopfekenyi. Kurarama akupindi kudya here, nomuiri aupindi zvokupfeka here?" 
Matthew6:26 Ringirai shiri dzomudenga kuti adzikushi, adzivhunizve, nokuti kuunganidza mumatura; asi Baba enyu ari mudenga unodzipa zvokudya. Imwimwi amuna mutengo mukuru kupinda idzo here?" 
Matthew6:27 Ndiani kwomuri ngokudembatemba ungakona kututsira zuva rimwe rokupona kwake. 
Matthew6:28 Nemwi munodembatemba ngenyi ngezvokufuka? Pinimidzai ngeminyimbiri yomushango kumera kwayo; aishandi, airukizve," 
Matthew6:29 asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, naSoromoni muuthende hwake hweshe aazikupfekeswa kudai ngoumwe wayo." 
Matthew6:30 Asi kudai Mwari echipfekesa kudaro mwenje womushango, uwo uripo nyamashi, mangwani unokandirwa muchoto, aazopindi here kakurutu kumupfekesa, imwimwi muno kutenda kudoodoko?" 
Matthew6:31 Ndizvo musadembatemba mwechiti, ‘Tinozodyenyi?’ nokuti, ‘Tinozomwenyi?’ nokuti, ‘Tinozosimirenyi?’" 
Matthew6:32 Ngokuti vemadzinza vanotsvaka izvi zveshe; ngokuti Baba enyu vari mudenga vanozia kuti munozvitama izvi zveshe. 
Matthew6:33 Asi tsvakai kutanga umambo hwake nokururama kwake, neizvi zveshe zvinozotutsirwa kwomuri." 
Matthew6:34 Ndizvo musazodembera mangwani, ngokuti mangwani unozodzidembera. Kutambudzika kwezuva kunokwana zuvaro." 
Matthew7:1 “Musatonga, kuti musazotongwawo." 
Matthew7:2 Ngokuti ngokutonga kwomunotonga ndikwo, munozotongwawo; neicho chipimo chomunopima ndicho, ndicho chomunozopimirwawo ndicho." 
Matthew7:3 Unopenyerenyi chitsepedzo chiri mudziso romukoma wako, asi auoni danda riri mudziso mwako?" 
Matthew7:4 Nokuti ungaita maereketerenyi kunemukoma wako kuti, ‘Rekera, ndiduse chitsepedzo chiri mudziso rako,’ naapo ringira, danda riri mudziso rako." 
Matthew7:5 Iwewe mudziitisi, tanga kudusa danda riri mudziso rako, naapo unozonasa kukona kudusa chitsepedzo chiri mudziso romukoma wako." 
Matthew7:6 “Musapa izvo zvakachena kunembwa, zve, musakandira mapherere enyu pamberi penguruve, kuti dzisazoatsika-tsika pashi petsoka dzadzo, dzikunukuke dzimurume." 
Matthew7:7 “Kumbirai, munozopuwa; tsvakai, munozoona; kuhudzai, munozobeurirwa." 
Matthew7:8 Ngokuti weshe unokumbira, unoashira; naye unotsvaka, unoona; nokwaari unokuhudza, unozobeurirwa." 
Matthew7:9 Ngokuti ndiani munhu kwomuri, unoti mukororo wake echimukumbira chingwa, amupe buwe?" 
Matthew7:10 Nokuti echikumbira hove, amupe nyoka?" 
Matthew7:11 Ndizvo kudai imwimwi mutori vakashata mwechizia kupa zvipo zvakanaka kuvana venyu, kunozopinda kwakaitawani Baba enyu vari mudenga kuvapa zvakanaka avo vanokumbira kwaari?" 
Matthew7:12 “Ndizvo izvo zveshe zvomunoda kuti vanhu vaite kwomuri, itaiwo kudaro kwavari, ngokuti ichi chiri kuzadzisika kweMipango nezvidzidziso zvevaprofeti." 
Matthew7:13 “Pindai ngepamusiwo wakamanikana; ngokuti musiwo wakapamhama nenjira yakapamhama inoenda mukuparadzwa, navo vanopinda ndiyo vazhinji." 
Matthew7:14 Ngokuti musiwo wakamanikana nenjira yakatsonga, iyo inoenda mukurarama, navo vanoiona vashomani." 
Matthew7:15 “Ngwarirai vaprofeti vokunyepa, avo vanouya kwomuri vakapfeka makushe emakwai, asi ngomukati vari mathika anokara." 
Matthew7:16 Muchavazia ngemichero yavo. Vanhu vangakaya here michero yomuvhini paminzwa nokuti maonde parukato? 
Matthew7:17 Ngokudaro miti yeshe yakanaka inobereka michero yakanaka; asi muti wakashata unobereka michero yakashata. 
Matthew7:18 Muti wakanaka aungakoni kubereka michero yakashata, nomuti wakashata aungakoni kubereka michero yakanaka." 
Matthew7:19 Muti weshe usikabereki michero yakanaka unotemerwa pashi ukandirwe mumwoto. 
Matthew7:20 Ndizvo munozovazia ngemichero yavo. 
Matthew7:21 “Andivopi veshe vanoti kwendiri, ‘Mambo, Mambo’, vanozopinda muumambo hwomudenga, asi iye unoita kuda kwaBaba angu vari mudenga." 
Matthew7:22 Vazhinji vanozoti kwendiri ngeiro zuva, ‘Mambo, Mambo, atizi kuprofeta here ngezina rako, ngezina rako atizi kurasha madhimoni here, ngezina rako atizi kuita mishando yakawanda ine simba here?’" 
Matthew7:23 Naapo ndinozovaronzera kuti, ‘Andizi kumuzia akadi. Ibvai kwendiri, imwimwi munoshanda zvakashata.’" 
Matthew7:24 “Ndizvo kunyazwi ndiani unozwa mazwi angu aya nokuaita, unoedzaniswa nomunhu wakangwara, uwo wakaaka mhatso yake padera poruware." 
Matthew7:25 Nemvura yakanaya nendambi yakauya nomubvumo wakavhuvhuta, wakarova padera peiyo mhatso, nayo aizi kuwa, ngokuti yaiya yakaakwa paruware." 
Matthew7:26 Kunyazwi ndiani uwo unozwa mazwi angu aya, asikaaiti, unoedzaniswa nomunhu uri benzi, wakaaka mhatso yake pajecha." 
Matthew7:27 Nemvura yakanaya nendambi yakauya nomubvumo wakavhuvhuta, wakarova padera peiyo mhatso, nayo yakawa, nokuwa kwayo kwayia kukurutu.”" 
Matthew7:28 Kwakaitika apo Jesu apedza mazwi aya, mbungano yakashamiswa ngokudzidzisa kwake." 
Matthew7:29 Ngokuti wakavadzidzisa kudai ngounesimba, asikaiti kudai ngevanyori vavo." 
Matthew8:1 Naapo Jesu adzaka kubva pamutunhu, mbungano huru yakamuteera." 
Matthew8:2 Penya munhu waiya nemapere wakauya kwaari, akamugwadamira echiti, “Mambo, dai wechida ungandimhodyosa.”" 
Matthew8:3 Naye wakatambanudza nyara yake, akamugwama akati, “Ndinoda, chimhodyoka.” Paripo mapere ake akamhodyoswa." 
Matthew8:4 NaJesu wakati kwaari, “Ngwara kuti usazoronzera munhu; asi enda, udzipangidzire kumupristi, nokupa chipo icho chaakaronza Mosi kuti chiite chapupu kwavari.”" 
Matthew8:5 Naapo apotera muKhapernaume, kwakauya kwaari nduna yezana yechimukumbira," 
Matthew8:6 yechiti, “Mambo, muranda wangu wakaata mumhatso echirwara ngokuoma muiri, echirwadziwa kakurutu.”" 
Matthew8:7 Wakati kweiri, “Inini ndinozouya, ndimuponese.”" 
Matthew8:8 Asi nduna yezana yakapingura, ikati, “Haiwa, Mambo, hazvisisiri kuti iwewe upotere pashi pedenga rangu, asi ronza ngeizwi rega nomuranda wangu unozoponeswa." 
Matthew8:9 Ngokuti ininiwo ndiri munhu unotongwa, ndine majoni ari pashi pangu; neni ndinoti kuneuyu, ‘Enda,’ naye unoenda; nokuneumweni, ‘Uya,’ naye unouya; nokumuranda wangu, ‘Ita ichi,’ naye unochiita.”" 
Matthew8:10 Naapo Jesu azwa ichi, wakashama, akati kwavari vaimuteera, “Ngegwinyiso andizi kumboona kutenda kukurutu kwakadai, haiwa kunyazwi kuvaIsuraeri." 
Matthew8:11 Neni ndinoti kwomuri kuti vazhinji vanozouya kubva kumabvazuva nokumabirirazuva, vanozogara pashi padhiri naAbrahama naIsaka naJakobe muumambo hwomudenga." 
Matthew8:12 Asi vana voumambo vanozokandirwa muchidima chiri kubanze; kunozoiteyo kuboorera nokukwetsana kwemazino.” 
Matthew8:13 NaJesu wakati kunduna yezana, “Enda, ngakuitwe kwouri kudai ngokutenda kwako.” Nomuranda wakaponeswa ngeiro awa." 
Matthew8:14 Naapo Jesu apotera mumhatso yaPetro, wakaona vambuya vake vakaata vechirwara ngomutsarara." 
Matthew8:15 Naye wakabata nyara yake, nomutsarara wakavasiya; navo vakamiruka, vakamushandira." 
Matthew8:16 Kwaita madeekoni, vakaunza kwaari vazhinji vaiya nemadhimoni, naye wakaabudisa akaadzinga ngeizwi rake, wakaponesa veshe vairwara," 
Matthew8:17 kuti kuzadzisike ukwo kwakaereketwa ndiIsaya muprofeti echiti, “Iye emene wakatora nhenda dzedu, akatwara kurwara kwedu.”" 
Matthew8:18 Zvinopano Jesu echiona mbungano huru yechimutendenedza, wakapanga kuti vaambuke ruseri." 
Matthew8:19 Kwakauya kwaari munyori, akati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, ndinozokuteera apo pounoenda.”" 
Matthew8:20 NaJesu wakati kwaari, “Hava dzine mirindi neshiri dzemudenga dzine zvisaki; asi Mukororo woMunhu aana nepokutsamira soro rake.”" 
Matthew8:21 Umwe wevadzidzi wakati kwaari, “Mambo, kutanga nditendere kuti ndiende nditsire baba angu.”" 
Matthew8:22 Asi Jesu wakati kwaari, “Nditeere, urekere vakafa kuti vatsire vakafa vavo.”" 
Matthew8:23 Naapo apotera mungarava, vadzidzi vake vakamuteera." 
Matthew8:24 Penya, kwakabuda mubvumo mukurutu muruandhle, ngokudaro ngarava yakadumaidzwa ngemafungo; asi iye waiya akaata." 
Matthew8:25 Vakauya kwaari, vakamumusa vechiti, “Mambo, tiponese; tofa.”" 
Matthew8:26 Naye wakati kwavari, “Munombotya ngenyi, imwimwi munokutenda kudoodoko?” Naapo wakamiruka, akakaraidza mubvumo noruandhle; kwakaapo kuterama kukurutu." 
Matthew8:27 Nevanhu vakashama vechiti, “Uyu munhu uri wakaitawani, kuti mubvumo noruandhle zvinomupurutana?”" 
Matthew8:28 Naapo aguma ruseri munyika yavaGadhareni, kwakashongana naye vanhu vairi vaiya nemadhimoni vechibva mumaiba, vane ushungu hunotyisa, ngokudaro kwaiya kusina nomunhu waichahamba ngeiyo njira." 
Matthew8:29 Ringirai, vakadaidzira vakati, “Tinenyi newe, iwewe Mukororo waMwari? Wauya panapa kutishwinyisa usati waguma mukuwo here?”" 
Matthew8:30 Zvino kwaiyapo danga renguruve zhinji dzechifura kanharauko kubva kwaari. 
Matthew8:31 Nemadhimoni akamukumbira akati, “Kudai wechitibudisa, titumei tipotere mudanga renguruve.”" 
Matthew8:32 Naye wakati kwaari, “Endai.” Nawo abuda, akapotera munguruve. Penya, danga reshe rakadzaka ngepamakaha muruandhle, rakafa mumvura." 
Matthew8:33 Avo vaiusha vakatiza, vakaenda mudhorobha, vakaronza zveshe izvo zvaiya zvaitwa kuneavo vaiya nemadhimoni." 
Matthew8:34 Penya, vedhorobha reshe vakabuda kooshongana naJesu. Kwakati vechimuona, vakamunyengerera kuti abve mumigano yavo." 
Matthew9:1 Echipotera mungarava, wakaambuka ruseri, akaguma kuguta rekwake." 
Matthew9:2 Penya, vakaunza kwaari munhu wairwara ngenhenda yokuoma muiri, akaata pamanhi. NaJesu aona kutenda kwavo, wakati kuneuwo waiya nenhenda yokuoma muiri, “Mukororo, shinga; zvishaishi zvako zvarekererwa.”" 
Matthew9:3 Penya, vamweni vevanyori vakati pakati pavo, “Munhu uyu unotuka.”" 
Matthew9:4 NaJesu echizia kupinimidza kwavo wakati, “Munopinimidzirenyi zvakashata mumwoyo yenyu?" 
Matthew9:5 Ngokuti ngechiri chinopinda kureruka, kuronza kuti, ‘Zvishaishi zvako zvarekererwa,’ nokuti kuronza kuti, ‘Miruka uhambe?’" 
Matthew9:6 Asi kuti muzie kuti Mukororo woMunhu unesimba munyika rokurekerera zvishaishi,” (naapo wakati kuneuwo waiya nenhenda yokuoma muiri,) “Miruka, tora manhi ako uende kumhatso yako.”" 
Matthew9:7 Naye wakamiruka, akaenda kumhatso yake." 
Matthew9:8 Naapo mbungano yazviona, yakatya, yakakudza Mwari, uwo waiya akahina simba rakadai kuvanhu." 
Matthew9:9 NaJesu echipinda mberi, wakaona munhu unozwi Mateu, echigara pandau yokubharisa chibharo; naye wakati kwaari, “Nditeere.” Naye wakamiruka, akamuteera." 
Matthew9:10 Kwakaitika achatseama panokudya mumhatso, ringirai, vabharisi nevashaishi vazhinji vakauya vakagara pashi naJesu navadzidzi vake." 
Matthew9:11 VaFarisi vechiona, vakati kunevadzidzi vake, “Ngenyi Mudzidzisi wenyu echidya nevabharisi nevashaishi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Asi iye echizwa wakati, “Avo vakamhodyoka avatami n'anga, asi avo vanorwara." 
Matthew9:13 Asi endai mwoodzidza kuti zvinoronzenyi izvi, ‘Ndinoda nyasha, haiwa kuhinwa mubairo.’ Ngokuti andizi kuuya kudaidza vakarurama, asi vashaishi.”" 
Matthew9:14 Naapo vakaguma kwaari vadzidzi vaJohani vechiti, “Isusu nevaFarisi tinogara techiera kudya ngenyi, asi vadzidzi vako avaeri kudya?”" 
Matthew9:15 NaJesu wakati kwavari, “Vemhatso yanyamuroorwa vangatsumba here apo mukwambo achinavo? Asi mazuva anozouya apo mukwambo unozoduswa kwavari, naapo vanozoera kudya." 
Matthew9:16 Apana munhu unoisa chitembwe chitsva pajira rakatsakara, ngokuti icho chinoiswa kuinamira, chinobaurisa kubva kweiri, neburi rinozopinda kukura." 
Matthew9:17 Zve, avaisi vhini idzva mumbudu dzakatsakara; ngokuti mbudu dzinozoputiswa nevhini rinozodururika nembudu dzinozoparadzwa. Asi vanoisa vhini idzva mumbudu itsva, nazvo zveshe zvinozongwaririka.”" 
Matthew9:18 Achaereketa izvi kwavari, penya, wakauya mutongi wakatikuti, wakamugwadamira, akati kwaari, “Mwana wangu womusikana watofa, asi chiuya uise nyara yako padera pake, naye unozorarama.”" 
Matthew9:19 NaJesu wakamiruka, akaenda naye, nevadzidzi vake." 
Matthew9:20 Penya, mukadzi waiya nenhenda yokubuda ngazi makore gumi namairi, wakauya ngesure kwake, akabata mupendero wegauni rake." 
Matthew9:21 Ngokuti iye wakati mukati mwake, “Kudai ndingabata kwega gauni rake, ndinozoponeswa.”" 
Matthew9:22 Asi Jesu echikunukuka, amuona, wakati, “Mukunda, shinga. Kutenda kwako kwakuponesa.” Nedzimai iro rakaponeswa kubvira ngeawa iro." 
Matthew9:23 Naapo Jesu aguma mumhatso yomutongi, wakaona varidzi veminanzi nembungano yechiita hohoho." 
Matthew9:24 Wakati, “Taraukai, ngokuti mwanasikana uyu aazi kufa akadi, asi wakaata.” Navo vakamusheka." 
Matthew9:25 Naapo abudisa mbungano kubanze, wakapotera mukati, wakamubata ngenyara nemwanasikana wakamiruka." 
Matthew9:26 Nembiri yacho yakateketeswa munyikamwo mweshe. 
Matthew9:27 Naapo Jesu achapinda kuenda mberi kubva apo, mapofu mairi akamuteera, echidaidzira echiti, “Iwewe Mukororo waDhavhidha, tiitire nyasha.”" 
Matthew9:28 Apotera mumhatso, mapofu akauya kwaari, naJesu wakati kwaari, “Munotenda here kuti ndine simba rokuita ichi?” Akati, “Eya, Mambo.”" 
Matthew9:29 Naapo wakagwama madziso awo, akati, “Ngakuitwe kwomuri kudai ngokutenda kwenyu.”" 
Matthew9:30 Nemadziso awo akapembenudzwa; naJesu wakaapanga echiti, “Ngwarai kuti zvisazoziikanwa ngomunhu.”" 
Matthew9:31 Asi vabvapo, vakateketesa mbiri yake munyikamwo mweshe." 
Matthew9:32 Vachabuda kubvapo, penya, kwakaunzwa kwaari chimbungumbungu chaiya nedhimoni." 
Matthew9:33 Naapo dhimoni rakarashwa kubva kwechiri, chimbungumbungu chakaereketa; nembungano yakashamiswa yechiti, “Akuzi kutongombooneka zvakadai muIsuraeri.”" 
Matthew9:34 Asi vaFarisi vaiti, “Iye unorasha madhimoni ndimambo wemadhimoni.”" 
Matthew9:35 NaJesu wakahambahamba mumadhorobha eshe nomumaguta eshe, echidzidzisa mumhatso dzavo dzokudira, echichumaira vhangeri roumambo, echirapa mbeu dzeshe dzenhenda nokurwara kweshe." 
Matthew9:36 Asi aona mbungano, wakavazwira urombo ngokuti vaidezwaira nokupepesheka kudai ngemakwai asina muushi." 
Matthew9:37 Naapo wakati kuvadzidzi vake, “Ngegwinyiso kukukura kwakawanda asi vashandi vashomani." 
Matthew9:38 Ndizvo kumbirai kunaMambo wokukukura kuti atumire vashandi mukukukura kwake.” 
Matthew10:1 Naapo adaidza kwaari vadzidzi vake gumi navairi, wakavapa simba padera pemweya ine tsvina kuti vaidzinge nokurapa nhenda dzeshe nokurwara kweshe." 
Matthew10:2 Aya ndiwo mazina evapostori gumi navairi: uwo wokutanga ndiSimoni waizwi Petro, naAndreu munun'una wake; naJakobe mukororo waZebhedhi, naJohani munun'una wake," 
Matthew10:3 Firipi, Bhathoromeu; Thomasi naMateu mubharisi; Jakobe mukororo waArifeusi, naThadheusi;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni muKhenani naJudhasi Isikarioti uwo wakamupira. 
Matthew10:5 Ava gumi navairi Jesu wakavatuma, akavapanga echiti, “Musaenda munjira yevemadzinza, musapotera muguta kunyazwi ngeriri revaSamaria." 
Matthew10:6 Asi endai kumakwai akarashika emhatso yaIsuraeri. 
Matthew10:7 Muchaenda mwechichumaira, mwechiti, ‘Umambo hwomudenga hwakwedzera.’" 
Matthew10:8 Mwechirapa vanorwara, mwechimusa vakafa, mwechimhodyosa vanemapere, mwechidzinga madhimoni; mwakaashira ngenyasha, mwechipawo ngenyasha." 
Matthew10:9 Musatora mukore nokuti sirivha nokuti thusi muzvikwama zvenyu; 
Matthew10:10 zve, nokuti munzaa werwendo rwenyu, musina mabhachi mairi nokuti magwada nokuti ndonga; ngokuti mushandi unosisira kupuwa kudya kwake." 
Matthew10:11 Kunyazwi ngomuri mudhorobha nokuti muguta mwemunozopinda, bvunzai kuti ndiani uri mukati mwaro unosisira; apo ndipo pomunozogara metsa mubvemwo." 
Matthew10:12 Mwoopotera mumhatso muichingamidze. 
Matthew10:13 Nokudai mhatso iyo yechisisira, kunyarara kwenyu ngakuuye padera payo; asi kuti isikasisiri ngakuhwirire kwomuri." 
Matthew10:14 Kunyazwi ndiani usikazomuashiri nokuti kupurutana mazwi enyu, mwechibudamwo mumhatso iyo nokuti dhorobha iro, guwai bukuta kubva patsoka dzenyu." 
Matthew10:15 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kunozopinda kureruka kunenyika yeSodhoma neyeGomora ngezuva rokutongwa kuneiro dhorobha." 
Matthew10:16 “Ringirai, ndinomutuma kudai ngemakwai mukati mwemathika. Ndizvo mwechingwara kudai ngenyoka, mwakapfaa kudai ngenjia." 
Matthew10:17 Asi ngwarai vanhu, ngokuti vanozomuhina kubangano revatongi, navo vanozomurova mumhatso dzavo dzokudira." 
Matthew10:18 Nemwi munozounzwa pamberi pemakota nepemadzimambo ngepamusoro pangu, kuita chapupu kwavari nokumadzinza." 
Matthew10:19 Asi apo voomuhina, musazodembatemba kuti munozoereketenyi nokuti munozoronza chiinyi; ngokuti kunozohinwa kwomuri ngeawaro chomunozoereketa." 
Matthew10:20 Ngokuti andimwipi munoereketa, asi Mweya waBaba enyu unoereketa uri mukati mwenyu." 
Matthew10:21 Nomukoma unozohina munun'una kuti afe, ngokudaro baba mwana wavo, nevana vanozomukira vabari nokuvauraya." 
Matthew10:22 Nemwi munozonyenywa ndivo veshe ngendaa yezina rangu. Asi uwo unoshingirira metsa kumagumo, ndiye unozoponeswa." 
Matthew10:23 Naapo vanozomutambudza muguta rimwe, mwechitizira kune rimweni; ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, amuzopedzi kuhamba madhorobha eshe aIsuraeri, asati auya Mukororo woMunhu." 
Matthew10:24 “Mudzidzi aari padera pomudzidzisi wake akadi, nomuranda aari padera pamambo wake." 
Matthew10:25 Kwakanaka kuti mudzidzi adai ngomudzidzisi wake, nomuranda kuti adai ndimambo wake. Kudai vakadudza munewemhatso kuti Bheerizebhuri, vanozopinda kwakaitawani kuvadudza kudaro avo vari vemhatso yake!" 
Matthew10:26 “Ndizvo musavatya; ngokuti apana chiro chakafishika chisikazooneki; nokuti chakafishiridzwa chisikazoziikanwi. 
Matthew10:27 Icho chendinomuronzera muchidima, mwechichiteketesa mukujeka, neicho chomunozwa ngevherevhere, mwechichichumaira muri padera pechachungu chemhatso." 
Matthew10:28 Musatya avo vanouraya muiri, asi vasina simba rokuuraya mweya. Asi mutye uwo unesimba rokuparadza zveshe mweya nomuiri muGehena." 
Matthew10:29 Zviwanzaburi zviiri azvitengiswi ngesendi here? Nechimwe chazvo achizowi pashi pamavhu kusatenderwa ndiBaba enyu. 
Matthew10:30 Asi nebvudzi resoro renyu rakaerengwa reshe. 
Matthew10:31 Ndizvo musatya, muri vanopinda kudikanwa kunezviwanzaburi zvakawanda." 
Matthew10:32 “Ndizvo weshe uwo unozonditenda pamberi pevanhu, neniwo ndinozomutenda pamberi paBaba angu vari mudenga." 
Matthew10:33 Kunyazwi ndiani unozondiramba pamberi pevanhu, neniwo ndinozomuramba pamberi paBaba angu vari mudenga." 
Matthew10:34 “Musapinimidza kuti ndakauya kuunza kunyarara padera penyika. Andizi kuuya kuunza kunyarara, asi shoti." 
Matthew10:35 Ngokuti ndakauya kuparadzanisa munhu nababa ake, nemwanasikana namai ake, nomunyamwana namazvarira ake." 
Matthew10:36 Nemagaa omunhu anozoita avo vari vemhatso yake. 
Matthew10:37 Iye unopinda kuda baba kunyazwi mai kuneinini, aazi kundisisira. Naye unopinda kuda mukororo kunyazwi mwanasikana kuneinini, aazi kundisisira." 
Matthew10:38 Neuwo usikatori muchinjiko wake, ateere sure kwangu, aazi kundisisira." 
Matthew10:39 Iye unoona kurarama kwake unozokurasha, nouwo unozorasha kurarama kwake ngepamusoro pangu unozokuona." 
Matthew10:40 “Iye unomuashira imwimwi unondiashira inini, nouwo unondiashira, unoashirawo uwo wakandituma." 
Matthew10:41 Iye unoashira muprofeti ngezina romuprofeti, unozoashira musharo womuprofeti; nouwo unoashira munhu wakarurama ngezina romunhu wakarurama, unozoashira musharo womunhu wakarurama." 
Matthew10:42 Nouwo unozopa umwe wevadoko ava tsani yemvura inotonhora yega ngezina romudzidzi, ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, aatongozorashikirwi ngomusharo wake.”" 
Matthew11:1 Kwakaitika apo Jesu apedza kupanga vadzidzi vake gumi navairi, wakamiruka kubvapo, akaenda koodzidzisa nokuchumaira mumadhorobha avo." 
Matthew11:2 Zvinopano apo Johani azwa ari mutirongo mishando yaKristu, wakatumira izwi ngevadzidzi vake." 
Matthew11:3 Navo vakati kwaari, “Ndiwe here uwo unouya, nokuti tichagarira umweni?”" 
Matthew11:4 NaJesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Endai, muronzere Johani izvo zvomunozwa nezvomunoona." 
Matthew11:5 Mapofu anoona, nezvirema zvinohamba, nevanemapere vanomhodyoswa, nemadziiranzee vanozwa, nevakafa vanomuswa, nevarombo vane vhangeri rinochumairwa kwavari." 
Matthew11:6 Unomuchena uwo usikapumhunwi ndini.” 
Matthew11:7 Naapo vachaenda, Jesu wakatanga kuereketa kumbungano ngendaa yaJohani, wakati, “Mwakaenda mushango koonenyi? Rutsanga rwakazungunyiswa ngedutu here?" 
Matthew11:8 Asi mwakaenda koonenyi? Munhu wakapfekeswa ngemachira akapfaa here? Penya, avo vanopfeka machira akapfaa vari mumhatso dzemadzimambo." 
Matthew11:9 Asi mwakaendeyo koonenyi? Muprofeti here? Eya, ndinoti kwomuri, nouwo unonyanya kupinda muprofeti." 
Matthew11:10 Uyu ndiye wevakanyora ndiye kuti, ‘Penya, ndinotuma munyai wangu pamberi pehope yako, uwo unozonasira njira yako pamberi pako.’" 
Matthew11:11 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, ‘Pakati peavo vakaberekwa ngevakadzi, akuzi kutongobva mukuru kupinda Johani Mubhabhatidzi. Asi iye uri mudoko muumambo hwomudenga uri mukuru kwaari.’" 
Matthew11:12 Kubvira kumazuva aJohani Mubhabhatidzi metsa zvinopano umambo hwomudenga hunopambwa ngezvigebengwa zvinohutora ngesimba. 
Matthew11:13 Ngokuti vaprofeti veshe neMipango zvakaprofeta metsa orooguma Johani. 
Matthew11:14 Kudai mwechitenda kuchiashira, ‘Uyu ndiye Erija, uwo wakaemeswa kuuya.’" 
Matthew11:15 Uwo unenzee dzekuzwa ngaazwe. 
Matthew11:16 Asi ndouedzanisa nenyi uyu mubarirwana? Wakadai ngevana vanogara pandau dzomusika, vechidaidzira kunevangani vavo" 
Matthew11:17 vechiti, ‘Takaridza minanzi kwomuri, nemwi amuzikuzvina; takaita chiriro, nemwi amuzikubonda.’" 
Matthew11:18 Ngokuti Johani wakauya asikadyi nokuti kumwa, navo vakati, ‘Unedhimoni.’" 
Matthew11:19 Mukororo woMunhu wakauya echidya nokumwa, navo vakati, ‘Penyai mubhoki nomumwisi wevhini, shamwari yevabharisi neyevashaishi!’ Asi kungwara kwakapembedzwa ngemishando yakwo.”" 
Matthew11:20 Naapo wakatanga kuganyira madhorobha umwo mwaiya mwaitwa mishando mizhinji yake inesimba, ngokuti avazi kutenderuka." 
Matthew11:21 “Ihehe kwouri, Khorazini! Ihehe kwouri, Bhethisaidha! Ngokuti kudai mishando inesimba yaiya yakaitwa muThire neSidhoni, iyo yakaitwa mukati mwenyu, vaidai vakatotenderuka karetu, vane masaka nemarota." 
Matthew11:22 Kani hai, ndinoti kwomuri, ‘Kunozopinda kureruka kuneThire neSidhoni ngezuva rokutongwa kunekwomuri.’" 
Matthew11:23 Newe Khapernaume, unozokuriswa mudenga here? Unozodzaswa pashi kuHaidhesi. Ngokuti kudai mishando inesimba yaiya yakaitwa muSodhoma, iyo yakaitwa mukati mwako, raidai riripo nanyamashi." 
Matthew11:24 Kani hai, ndinoti kwomuri kuti kunozopinda kureruka kunyika yeSodhoma ngezuva rokutongwa kuneiwewe.”" 
Matthew11:25 Ngouwo mukuwo Jesu wakapingura, akati, “Ndinokutenda, Baba, Mambo womudenga newenyika, ngokuti iwewe wakazvifisha izvi kune vakangwara nevanekuzia, wakazvipangidzira kuchiya." 
Matthew11:26 Eya, Baba, ngokuti chaiya chinodakadza mukuona kwako." 
Matthew11:27 Zviro zveshe zvakahinwa kwendiri ndiBaba angu. Akuna unozia Mukororo, ndiBaba ega. Akunazve unozia Baba, asi Mukororo ega, nouwo waanoda kumupangidzira Mukororo." 
Matthew11:28 Uyai kwendiri imwimwi mweshe munoremba, munodzimbirwa ngomutwaro, neni ndinozomuzorodza." 
Matthew11:29 Mwechitora joka rangu padera penyu, mudzidze kwendiri, ngokuti inini ndakapfaa mumwoyo, nemwi munozoona kuzorora kumweya yenyu." 
Matthew11:30 Ngokuti joka rangu rakanaka nomutwaro wangu unoreruka.” 
Matthew12:1 Ngouwo mukuwo Jesu wakahamba ngomuminda yekoroni ngezuva reSabatha. Nevadzidzi vake vaiya vafukama, vakatanga kupurura mitsonzoti yekoroni vechidya." 
Matthew12:2 Asi apo vaFarisi vaona ichi, vakati kwaari, “Ringira, vadzidzi vako vanoita icho chisikatenderwi ngeMipango kuti chiitwe ngeSabatha.”" 
Matthew12:3 Asi wakati kwevari, “Amuzikudzidza here icho chaakaita Dhavhidha, apo aiya afukama, naavo vaiya naye," 
Matthew12:4 kuti wakapotera mumhatso yaMwari, akadya zvingwa izvo zvaipangidzirwa, zvaiya zvisikatenderwi kuti iye azvidye, nokuti avo vaiya naye, asi kwega vapristi?" 
Matthew12:5 Zve amuzikudzidza here muMipango kuti ngezuva reSabatha vapristi vari muTemperi vanogura Sabatha vasina ndaa? 
Matthew12:6 Asi ndinoti kwomuri chiri panapa chiro chinopinda Temperi kukura. 
Matthew12:7 Asi dai mwaizia kuti kunotinyi uku, ‘Ndinoda nyasha, haiwa kuhinwa mibairo,’ mwaizodai musikazi kuvaitira ndaa avo vasina ndaa." 
Matthew12:8 Ngokuti Mukororo woMunhu ndiye Mambo weSabatha.” 
Matthew12:9 Naye echibvapo wakapotera mumhatso yavo yokudira. 
Matthew12:10 Ringira, kwaiyapo munhu unenyara yake yakaonyana. Navo vakamubvunza kuti, “Kunotenderwa here kuponesa ngezuva reSabatha?” kuti vamuparise ndaa." 
Matthew12:11 Naye wakati kwavari, “Ndiani munhu kwomuri anegwai rimwe, kuti iro rikazowira mudzara ngezuva reSabatha, aazoribati here kuribudisa?" 
Matthew12:12 Ndizvo munhu unopinda gwai kudikanwa kwakaitawani? Ndizvo kunotenderwa ngeMipango kuita zvakanaka ngezuva reSabatha.” 
Matthew12:13 Naapo wakati kunemunhu uwo, “Tambanudza nyara yako.” Naye wakaitambanudza, nayo yakaponeswa kudai ngeimweni." 
Matthew12:14 NevaFarisi vakabuda, vakaita bangano ndiye, kuti vangamuita maurairenyi." 
Matthew12:15 Asi Jesu echizia wakabvapo nembungano huru yakamuteera, naye wakavaponesa veshe." 
Matthew12:16 Wakapanga kuti vasazoita kuti aziikanwe," 
Matthew12:17 kuti rizadzisike izwi rakaereketwa ndiIsaya muprofeti echiti," 
Matthew12:18 “Ringirai muranda wangu wendakatsanangura, mudikani wangu, uwo mweya wangu unodakara ndiye. Ndinozoisa mweya wangu padera pake, naye unozoteketesa kutonga kwakarurama kumadzinza." 
Matthew12:19 Aazorwi nokuti kudaidzira, zve akuna unozozwa izwi rake mumapato." 
Matthew12:20 Aazoruvhuni rutsanga rwakakopfama, netonje rinopwititika aazoridzimi, metsa atume kutonga kwakwo kuti kunyise;" 
Matthew12:21 vemadzinza vanozogonda kunezina rake.” 
Matthew12:22 Naapo kwakaunzwa kwaari umwe waiya nedhimoni, ari bofu nechimbungumbungu. Naye wakamuponesa, ngokudaro chimbungumbungu chakaereketa nokuona." 
Matthew12:23 Nevanhu vazhinji veshe vakashamiswa, vakati, “Uyu andiyepi here Mukororo waDhavhidha?”" 
Matthew12:24 Asi vaFarisi vazwa vakati, “Uyu munhu unodzinga madhimoni ngesimba raBheerizebhuri, mambo wemadhimoni.”" 
Matthew12:25 NaJesu echizia mikarakadzo yavo, wakati kwavari, “Umambo hweshe hunodziparadza hunozopera; nemadhorobha eshe nokuti mhatso zvinodziparadza azvizoemi akadi." 
Matthew12:26 Nokudai Sathani echidzinga Sathani, iye wadziparadza. Ndizvo umambo hwake hungazoita maemerenyi?" 
Matthew12:27 Kudai inini ndechidzinga madhimoni ngesimba raBheerizebhuri, ndizvo vakororo venyu vanoadzinga ndiani? Ndizvo vachaita vatongi venyu." 
Matthew12:28 Asi kuti inini ngoMweya waMwari ndechidzinga madhimoni, ndizvo umambo hwaMwari hwauya kwomuri." 
Matthew12:29 Munhu ungaita mapotererenyi mumhatso youwo unesimba, aparadze nhumbi dzake, kuti asati asunga uwo unesimba? Naapo unozoparadza mhatso yake." 
Matthew12:30 Iye usipo neni unorwa neni; nouwo usikaunganidzi neni unotatanisa. 
Matthew12:31 Ndizvo ndinoti kwomuri, ‘Kushaisha kweshe nezvituko zveshe zvinozorekererwa kuvanhu, asi kutukwa kwoMweya akurekererwi.’" 
Matthew12:32 Nouwo unoereketa izwi rokurwa noMukororo woMunhu, unozorekererwa; asi iye unoereketa kurwa noMweya Wakachena, aazorekererwi munyika muno nokuti munyika inouya." 
Matthew12:33 “Mwechiita kuti muti unake nemichero yawo inake. Nokuti muite kuti muti ushate nemichero yawo ishate. Ngokuti muti unoziikanwa ngemichero yawo. 
Matthew12:34 Imwimwi vana vemabuura, mungaita maereketerenyi zvakanaka, muri vakashata? Ngokuti muromo unoereketa kubva kunezvakawanda zviri mumwoyo." 
Matthew12:35 Munhu wakanaka kubva kuupfumi hwakanaka hwomwoyo wake wakanaka unobudisa zvakanaka. Nomunhu wakashata kubva kuupfumi hwakashata unobudisa zvakashata. 
Matthew12:36 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, mazwi eshe asina shwiro anozoereketwa ngevanhu, vanozobvunzisiswa ndiwo ngezuva rokutongwa." 
Matthew12:37 Ngokuti ngemazwi ako unozopembedzwa, zve ngemazwi ako unozopariswa ndaa.”" 
Matthew12:38 Naapo vamweni vevanyori nevaFarisi vakamupingura vechiti, “Mudzidzisi, tinoda kuona chioniso chinoitwa ndiwe.”" 
Matthew12:39 Asi iye wakapingura akati kwavari, “Mubarirwana wakashata nounoomba unotsvaka chioniso; asi akuna chioniso chinozooniswa kwouri, kwega chioniso chaJona muprofeti." 
Matthew12:40 Ngokuti kudai ndiJona wakapedza mazuva matatu nousiku hutatu mundani yehove huru, ngokudaro Mukororo woMunhu unozogara mazuva matatu neusiku hutatu ari mumwoyo wenyika." 
Matthew12:41 Vanhu veNinevhe vanozomiruka ngezuva rokutongwa pamwepo nouyu mubarirwana nokuuitira ndaa, ngokuti ivo vakatenderuka ngokuchumaira kwaJona. Ringirai, chiri panapa chiro chikuru chinopinda Jona." 
Matthew12:42 Mambokadzi wokubani unozomiruka ngezuva rokutongwa pamwepo nomubarirwana uyu nokuuitira ndaa. Ngokuti iye wakabva ari kumagumo enyika kuuya koozwa ngokungwara kwaSoromoni. Ringirai, chiri panapa chiro chikuru chinopinda Soromoni." 
Matthew12:43 “Asi apo mweya unetsvina wabuda kumunhu, unoparura kuhamba ndau dzisina mvura, wechitsvaka kuzorora, usikakuoni." 
Matthew12:44 Naapo unoti, ‘Ndinozohwirirayo kumhatso yangu apo pendakabva. Naapo wauya unoiona isina chiro, yakatsvairwa nokurongedzwa.’" 
Matthew12:45 Naapo unoenda worowotorazve mweya imweni minomwe, inoupinda ngokushata, nayo inopoteramwo yechigara apo. Nokupedzisira kwouwo munhu kunozopinda kushata kunekugara kwokutanga. Kunozodarowo nokuneuyu mubarirwana wakashata.”" 
Matthew12:46 Apo achaereketa kumbungano, ringira, mai ake nevanun'una vake vakaema ngokubanze, vechitsvaka kuti vaerekete naye." 
Matthew12:47 Noumweni wakati kwaari, “Ringirai, mai ako nevanun'una vako vakaema kubanze vechitsvaka kuereketa newe.”" 
Matthew12:48 Asi iye wakapingura akati kuneuwo wakamuronzera, “Ndiani mai angu, ndianizve vanun'una vangu?”" 
Matthew12:49 Naye wakatambanudzira nyara yake kunevadzidzi vake akati, “Ringirai, mai angu nevanun'una vangu!" 
Matthew12:50 Ngokuti uwo unozoita kuda kwaBaba angu vari mudenga, ndiye munun'una wangu, hanzvadzi namai.”" 
Matthew13:1 Ngeiro zuva Jesu wakabuda mumhatso, akagara ngeparuandhle." 
Matthew13:2 Kwakaungana kwaari mbungano zhinji, ndizvo wakapotera mungarava, akagara nembungano yeshe yakaema ngepamhiri." 
Matthew13:3 Naye wakaereketa kwavari zviro zvakawanda ngemiedzaniso, akati, “Ringirai, kwakabuda mukushi kookusha." 
Matthew13:4 Kwakati mukukusha kwake mbeu dzimweni dzakawira munjira, neshiri dzakauya dzikadzidya." 
Matthew13:5 Nedzimweni dzakawira paruware apo pedzaiya dzisina mavhu mazhinji, nadzo dzakamera ngokukasira, ngokuti dzaiya dzisina mavhu akadzama." 
Matthew13:6 Naapo zuva rakwira dzakapishwa, ngokuti dzaiya dzisina nzinde, dzakazeketera." 
Matthew13:7 Dzimweni dzakawira pane minzwa; neminzwa yakakura yakadzizingizira. 
Matthew13:8 Nedzimweni dzakawira mumavhu akanaka, nadzo dzakabereka tsangu, dzimweni zana rakapetwa, dzimweni makumi matanhatu akapetwa nedzimweni makumi matatu akapetwa." 
Matthew13:9 Uwo unenzee dzokuzwa, ngaazwe.”" 
Matthew13:10 Nevadzidzi vakauya kwaari, vakati, “Unoereketa kwavari ngenyi ngemiedzaniso?”" 
Matthew13:11 Naye wakapingura akati kwavari, “Ngokuti kunopuwa kwomuri kuzia zvakafishika zvoumambo hwomudenga, asi kwavari avo akuzi kupuwa." 
Matthew13:12 Ngokuti kwaari unacho kunozopuwazve, naye unozoa nezvakawanda. Asi uwo usina, neicho chaanacho chinozoduswa kwaari." 
Matthew13:13 Ngeiyi ndaa ndinoereketa kwavari ngemiedzaniso, ngokuti vechinyaona avaoni, vechinyazwa avazwi, zve avazwisisi." 
Matthew13:14 Kwavari kwakazadzisika kuprofeta kwaIsaya, ukwo kunoti, ‘Ngokuzwa munozozwa, nemwi musikazwisisi, mwechinyaona munozoona, musikaonisisi." 
Matthew13:15 Ngokuti mwoyo yaavo vanhu yakaita gwizhimbira, nenzee dzavo dziri madziiranzee, nemadziso avo akatswatira, kuti pamweni vangazoona ngemadziso avo, vazwe ngenzee dzavo nokuzwisisa ngemwoyo yavo, vatenderuke, neni ndivaponese.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Asi anomuchena madziso enyu, ngokuti anoona, nenzee dzenyu, ngokuti dzinozwa." 
Matthew13:17 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, vaprofeti vazhinji nevanhu vakarurama vakadisisa kuona zvomunoona imwimwi, navo avazi kuzviona, nokuzwa zvomunozwa navo avazi kuzvizwa." 
Matthew13:18 “Ndizvo zvinopano izwai muedzaniso womukushi. 
Matthew13:19 Apo munhu kunyazwi ngouri arizwa izwi roumambo, asikarizwisisi, naapo unouya uwo wakashata unovhomora izvo zvakakushwa mumwoyo mwake; uyu ndiye wakakushwa panjira." 
Matthew13:20 Nouwo wakakushwa paruware, uyu ndiye unorizwa izwi, ngokukasira unoriashira ngokudakara." 
Matthew13:21 Asi aana kuita nzinde mukati mwake, asi unogara kamukuwo; naapo kunouya kutambudzwa ngendaa yeizwi, ngokukasira unopumhunwa." 
Matthew13:22 Iye wakakushwa muminzwa uyu ndiye unorizwa izwi, asi kudembatemba ngezvenyika nokuchengedzerwa kwoupfumi kunodzipa izwi, naro aribereki." 
Matthew13:23 Asi iye wakakushwa pamavhu akanaka, uyu ndiye unorizwa izwi, naye unorizwisisa; zve unobereka michero ngegwinyiso, vamweni zana rakapetwa, vamweni makumi matanhatu akapetwa, vamweni makumi matatu akapetwa.”" 
Matthew13:24 Muedzaniso umweni waakaronza kwavari echiti, “Umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa nomunhu wakakusha mbeu dzakanaka mumunda wake." 
Matthew13:25 Asi apo vanhu vachaata, gaa rake rakauya, rakakushawo senga mukati mwezviyo, rakaenda." 
Matthew13:26 Asi apo miningwi yoomera, yechitumbuka, naapo senga rakaonekawo naro." 
Matthew13:27 Naapo varanda vomune wemhatso vakauya, vakati kwaari, ‘Mambo, auzi kukusha mbeu dzakanaka mumunda wako here? Ndizvo senga rinobva pari?’" 
Matthew13:28 Asi iye wakati kwavari, ‘Munhu uri gaa wakaita izvi.’ Ndizvo varanda vakati kwaari, ‘Ungada here kuti tiende tiribvite?’" 
Matthew13:29 Asi wakati, ‘Haiwa, ngekuti apo mwechibvita senga mungabvita nekoroni nayo." 
Matthew13:30 Chirekerai zveshe zvikure pamwepo metsa mukuwo wokukukura. Ngomukuwo wokukukura ndinozoti kuvacheki, mwechiunganidza senga kutanga, murisunge kuita mwanda kuti ripishwe. Asi mwechiunganidza koroni mutsapi yangu.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Muedzaniso umweni waakaronza kwavari echiti, “Umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa kudai ngetsangu yomustadhi, iyo yaakatora munhu, akaisima mumunda wake." 
Matthew13:32 Iyo ngegwinyiso idoko kunetsangu dzeshe, asi apo yakura inopinda mapfiba eshe kukura, inoita muti, kuti shiri dzomudenga dziuye, dzimate nokuaka zvisaki munhai dzawo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Muedzaniso umweni waakaronza kwavari echiti, “Umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa nomumera uwo waakatora mudzimai, akauisa mukati mwemitani mitatu youfu metsa hweshe hwakafema.”" 
Matthew13:34 Izvi zveshe Jesu wakazviereketa kunembungano ngemiedzaniso; naye aazikuereketa kwavari nachimwe ngepabanze pemiedzaniso," 
Matthew13:35 kuti kuzadzisike izwi iro rakaereketwa ngomuprofeti echiti, “Ndinozobeura muromo wangu kuereketa miedzaniso, ndinozoonisa zvakafishika kubvira pakusikwa kwenyika.”" 
Matthew13:36 Naapo wakaendisa mbungano, wakapotera mumhatso. Nevadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari, vakati, “Tidudzire muedzaniso wesenga romumunda.”" 
Matthew13:37 Naye wakapingura akati kwavari, “Iye unokusha mbeu dzakanaka ndiye Mukororo woMunhu." 
Matthew13:38 Munda inyika. Mbeu dzakanaka vana voumambo, senga vana vouwo wakashata." 
Matthew13:39 Gaa iro rakarikusha ndiDhiabhorosi. Nokukukura kuri kupera kwenyika, nevacheki ingirosi." 
Matthew13:40 Ndizvo kudai ngesenga rinounganidzwa pamwepo rechipishwa ngemwoto; ndizvo zvinozoitwa mukupera kwenyika. 
Matthew13:41 Mukororo woMunhu unozotuma ngirosi dzake, nadzo dzinozounganidza kubva muumambo hwake zveshe zvinopumhunisa, naavo veshe vanoita zvinonyangadza." 
Matthew13:42 Nadzo dzinozovakandira muchoto chomwoto. Kunozoiteyo kuboorera nokukwetsana kwemazino. 
Matthew13:43 Naapo vakarurama vanozojeka kudai ngezuva muumambo hwaBaba avo. Uwo unenzee ngaazwe. 
Matthew13:44 “Zve, umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa noupfumi hwakafishwa mumunda; uhwo hwaakaona munhu akahufishazve, ngokudakara kwake unoenda nokutengesa zveshe zvaanazvo, echitenga uwo munda." 
Matthew13:45 “Zve, umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa nomunhu mutengisi unotsvaka mapuwe akanaka." 
Matthew13:46 Uwo apo aona buwe rimwe rinomutengo mukuru, wakaenda, akatengesa zveshe zvaaiya nazvo, akaritenga." 
Matthew13:47 “Zve, umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa nechitaa chakakandirwa muruandhle, nacho chakaunganidza mbeu dzeshe dzehove." 
Matthew13:48 Icho apo chazara vakachikweera kuhumbikumbi, vakagara pashi, vakaunganidza dzakanaka muzvidziyo, asi dzakashata vakadzirasha." 
Matthew13:49 Ndizvo zvinozoitika mukupera kwenyika; ngirosi dzinozobuda dziparadzanise vakashata kubva mukati mwevakarurama," 
Matthew13:50 dzivakandire muchoto chomwoto. Kunozoiteyo kuboorera nokukwetsana kwemazino. 
Matthew13:51 “Mwanasa kuzwa izvi zveshe here?” Navo vakati kwaari, “Eya.”" 
Matthew13:52 Wakati kwavari, “Ndizvo munyori weshe uwo wakadzidziswa ngezvoumambo hwomudenga, wakadai ngomunhu uri munewemhatso, uwo unobudisa kubva kwoupfumi hwake zviro zvitsva nezvekaretu.”" 
Matthew13:53 Kwakaitika apo Jesu apedza iyi miedzaniso, wakabvapo." 
Matthew13:54 Naapo auya kunyika yake, wakavadzidzisa mumhatso yavo yokudira, zvakaita kuti vashamiswe, vakati, “Kunobva kuri uku kungwara kwouyu munhu neiyi mishando yesimba?" 
Matthew13:55 Uyu andiyepi here mukororo womutsetsi? Mai ake avadaidzwi kuti Maria here? Nevanun'una vake ndiJakobe, Josefa, Simoni naJudhasi here?" 
Matthew13:56 Nehanzvadzi dzake dziri panapa nesu dzeshe here? Ndizvo iye wakazviona pari izvi zveshe?” 
Matthew13:57 Navo vakapumhuniswa ndiye. Asi Jesu wakati kwavari, “Muprofeti aarekeri kuremeredzwa kwega munyika mwake nomumhatso yake.”" 
Matthew13:58 Naye aazi kuita apo mishando ine simba yakawanda ngendaa yokusikatenda kwavo. 
Matthew14:1 Ngouwo mukuwo Herodhi mutongi wematunhu marongomuna wakazwa mbiri yaJesu. 
Matthew14:2 Naye wakati kuvaranda vake, “Uyu ndiJohani Mubhabhatidzi; wamuka kwevakafa. Ndizvo mishando iyi ine simba inoitwa ndiye.”" 
Matthew14:3 Ngokuti Herodhi waiya akamubata Johani, akamusunga, akamuisa mutirongo ngendaa yaHerodhiasi mukadzi womunun'una wake Firipi." 
Matthew14:4 Ngokuti Johani waiya akati kwaari, “Autenderwi ngezvironzo kuti umuroore.”" 
Matthew14:5 Naapo aida kumuuraya, wakatya mbungano ngokuti vaiti muprofeti." 
Matthew14:6 Asi apo zuva rokuberekwa kwaHerodhi raguma, mwanasikana waHerodhiasi wakazvina pakati pavo, naye wakadakadza Herodhi." 
Matthew14:7 Ndizvo iye wakagondisa ngokupika mhiko kuti unozomupa kunyazwi chiinyi chaaizokumbira. 
Matthew14:8 Naye echiangiridzwa ndimai ake, wakati, “Ndipe panapa muchidziyo soro raJohani Mubhabhatidzi.”" 
Matthew14:9 Namambo wakakurudzwa; asi ngendaa yokupika kwake, nendaa yaavo vaigara naye panokudya, wakapanga kuti rihinwe kwaari." 
Matthew14:10 Naye wakatuma kuti Johani agurwe soro mutirongo. 
Matthew14:11 Nesoro rakaunzwa riri muchidziyo rikapuwa kumusikana, naye wakariunza kunamai ake." 
Matthew14:12 Nevadzidzi vake vakauya vakatora muiri wake, vakauika, navo vakaenda vakaronzera Jesu." 
Matthew14:13 Zvinopano Jesu azwa izwi wakabvapo ngengarava kuenda kundau iri yega ari ega. Naapo mbungano yazwa ndizvo, yakamuteera ngetsoka, yechibva kumadhorobha." 
Matthew14:14 Naye wakabuda akaona mbungano huru, wakavazwira urombo naye wakaponesa vairwara vavo." 
Matthew14:15 Kwakati aamadeekoni vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari vechiti, “Panapa muri pandau iri yega nomukuwo watopera zvinopano. Ndizvo chiparadza mbungano kuti vaende mumaguta vadzitengere zvokudya.”" 
Matthew14:16 Asi Jesu wakati kwavari, “Avasisiri kuenda; vapei imwimwi zvokudya.”" 
Matthew14:17 Navo vakati kwaari, “Panapa tine zvingwa zvishanu zvega nehove mbiri.”" 
Matthew14:18 Naye wakati, “Zviunzenyi panapa pendiri.”" 
Matthew14:19 Naye wakapanga mbungano kuti igare pashi pamwenje, atora zvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri, wakaringira mudenga, akazvibonga, akazvigura, akazvihina kunevadzidzi, nevadzidzi vakahina kune mbungano." 
Matthew14:20 Navo veshe vakadya, vakaguta, navo vakatonhera matsekeneswa ezvaiwarakatika vakazadza zvitundu gumi nazviiri." 
Matthew14:21 Naavo vakadya vaiya vanoda kuita mazana makumi mashanu evamuna, ngepabanze pevakadzi nevana." 
Matthew14:22 Paripo iye wakaronzera vadzidzi vake kuti vapotere mungarava, vatungamire kuambuka ruseri, achiendesa mbungano." 
Matthew14:23 Naapo aendesa mbungano, wakakwira pamutunhu ari ega kookumbira. Kwoita madeekoni waiya aripo ega." 
Matthew14:24 Asi zvinopano ngarava yaiya yaane mastadhia akawanda kubva kuhumbikumbi, yechikandirwa apo naapo ngemafungu, ngokuti dutu raipesana navo." 
Matthew14:25 Panguva yokurinda yechirongomuna yousiku iye wakauya kwavari, echihamba padera peruandhle." 
Matthew14:26 Asi vadzidzi vechimuona echihamba padera poruandhle vakatyiswa vechiti, “Idzimudzangara.” Navo vakadaidzira ngokutya." 
Matthew14:27 Asi paripo Jesu wakaereketa kwavari echiti, “Shingai, ndini hangu, musatya.”" 
Matthew14:28 NaPetro wakamupingura echiti, “Mambo, kuti uriwe, ronza kuti ndiuye kwouri padera pemvura.”" 
Matthew14:29 Naye wakati, “Uya.” Naapo Petro adzaka kubva mungarava, wakahamba padera pemvura kuuya kunaJesu." 
Matthew14:30 Asi echiona dutu rine simba rechipesana naye, wakatya; naye echitanga kudzemera, wakadaidzira echiti, “Mambo, ndiponese.”" 
Matthew14:31 Asi paripo Jesu wakatambanudza nyara yake, akamubata, akati kwaari, “Iwewe unokutenda kudoodoko, wagononda ngenyi?”" 
Matthew14:32 Kwakati apo vakwira mungarava, dutu rakaterama." 
Matthew14:33 Naavo vaiya mungarava vakamudira, vakati, “Ngegwinyiso iwewe uri Mukororo waMwari.”" 
Matthew14:34 Naapo vakaambuka ruseri vakaguma munyika yeGenesareta. 
Matthew14:35 Naapo vanhu vomunyikamwo vamuzia, vakaziisa munyika mweshe, vakaunza kwaari veshe avo vaiya nenhenda." 
Matthew14:36 Navo vakamupota kuti ava vatenderwe kwega kubata mupendero wegauni rake. Naavo veshe vakaubata vakaponeswa yaamho. 
Matthew15:1 Zvinopano kwakauya kunaJesu vaFarisi nevanyori vechibva Jerusarema vechiti," 
Matthew15:2 “Ngenyi vadzidzi vako vechigura tsika dzevakuru, ngokuti avashambi nyara dzavo apo vechidya chingwa?”" 
Matthew15:3 Asi iye wakavapingura, akati kwavari, “Imwimwi nemwi munogura ngenyi mupango waMwari ngetsika dzenyu?" 
Matthew15:4 Ngokuti Mwari wakati, ‘Remeredza baba ako namai ako, nouwo unotuka baba nokuti mai, ngaafe.’" 
Matthew15:5 Asi imwimwi munoti, iye unozoti kunababa ake nokuti kunamai ake, ‘Chiro chiri nechiri icho chemwaida kudetserwa ndicho ndini chaachipo kunaMwari,’" 
Matthew15:6 aachatamiki kuremeredza baba ake nokuti mai ake. Ndizvo ngokudaro munoita kuti izwi raMwari riite risina shwiro ngetsika dzenyu. 
Matthew15:7 Imwimwi vadziitisi, Isaya wakanasa kuprofeta ndimwi echiti," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Vanhu ava vanondiremeredza ngemiromo yavo, asi mwoyo yavo iri kuretu kwendiri.’" 
Matthew15:9 Asi vanotera kundidira, vechidzidzisa kuita zvidzidziso mipango yevanhu.”" 
Matthew15:10 Naye echidaidza pamwepo mbungano, wakati kwavari, “Izwai muzwisise." 
Matthew15:11 Andichopi akadi chinopotera mumuromo chinosvipisa munhu, asi icho chinobuda mumuromo, ndicho chinosvipisa munhu.”" 
Matthew15:12 Naapo vakauya vadzidzi vake, vakati kwaari, “Auzii here kuti vaFarisi vapumhuniswa ngokuzwa izwi iri?”" 
Matthew15:13 Asi iye wakapingura, akati, “Chisimwa cheshe chisikazi kusimwa ndiBaba angu vari mudenga chinozobvitwa." 
Matthew15:14 Varekerenyi, vari mapofu anokweya mapofu. Nokudai bofu rechikweya bofu, eshe anozowira mukati mwerindi.”" 
Matthew15:15 NaPetro wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Tidudzire muedzaniso uyu.”" 
Matthew15:16 Asi wakati, “Imwimwi nemwi hamusati mwanasa kuzia here?" 
Matthew15:17 Amuzwisisi here kuti icho chinopotera ngepamuromo chinoenda mundani, chinorashwa mushango?" 
Matthew15:18 Asi izvo zvinobuda kumuromo zvinobva mumwoyo. Izvi zvinomusvipisa munhu. 
Matthew15:19 Ngokuti mumwoyo munobva mirangariro yakashata, kuuraya, kuomba, kuhura, umbavha, uchapupu hwokunyepa, kutuka." 
Matthew15:20 Izvi ndizvo zvinomusvipisa munhu. Asi kudya ngenyara dzisikazi kushambwa akusvipisi munhu akadi.” 
Matthew15:21 Naapo Jesu wakabvapo, wakaenda munyika yeThire neyeSidhoni." 
Matthew15:22 Penya dzimai reKhenani rakabva kundau iyo, rakadaidzira rechiti, “Ndiitire nyasha, Mambo, Mukororo waDhavhidha. Mwanasikana wangu unotambudzwa kakurutu ngedhimoni.”" 
Matthew15:23 Asi iye aazi kuripingura neizwi. Nevadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari, vakamupota vechiti, “Wechimuendesa, ngokuti unodaidzira sure kwedu.”" 
Matthew15:24 Asi wakapingura, akati, “Ndakatumirwa kwega kumakwai akarashika emhatso yaIsuraeri.”" 
Matthew15:25 Asi uwo wakauya akagwadama, akati, “Mambo, ndidetsere.”" 
Matthew15:26 Asi wakapingura, akati, “Akuzi kunaka kutora chingwa chevana nokuchikandira kuzvimbwa.”" 
Matthew15:27 Asi uwo wakati, “Eya, Mambo, kunyazwi zvituhwa zvembwa zvinodya matsekeneswa anowarakatika patafura ramambo wazvo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Naapo Jesu wakapingura, akati kweriri, “A dzimai, kutenda kwako kwakakura! Ngakuitike kwouri kudai ngezvounoda.” Nemwanasikana waro wakaponeswa kubvira ngeawa iro." 
Matthew15:29 NaJesu wakabvapo, wakauya pasinde peruandhle rweGarire; wakakwira pamutunhu, akagara apo." 
Matthew15:30 Nembungano huru yakauya kwaari, inazvo zvirema nemapofu nevakakuvara nezvimbungumbungu, nevamweni vazhinji, vakavaisa pashi kutsoka dzake, naye wakavaponesa." 
Matthew15:31 Ngokudaro mbungano yakashamiswa apo yaona zvimbungumbungu zvichiereketa nevakakuvara vechiponeswa nezvirema zvechihamba nemapofu echiona. Navo vakakudza Mwari waIsuraeri. 
Matthew15:32 Naapo Jesu wakadaidza vadzidzi vake kwaari, akati, “Mwoyo wangu unovazwira urombo, ngokuti vaiya neni mazuva matatu vasina zvokudya. Neni andizovaendesi vasikazi kudya, ngokuti vangazodemera munjira.”" 
Matthew15:33 Nevadzidzi vake vakati kwaari, “Ngepari petingaona zvingwa zvakawanda murubaya muno zvinokwanisa kugutisa vanhu vazhinji vakadai?”" 
Matthew15:34 NaJesu wakati kwavari, “Munezvingwa zvinganai?” Navo vakati, “Zvinomwe nezvihove zvishomani.”" 
Matthew15:35 Naye wakaronzera mbungano kuti igare pashi. 
Matthew15:36 Naye wakatora zvingwa zvinomwe nehove, akazvibonga, akazvigura, akahina kunevadzidzi, nevadzidzi vakazvihina kune mbungano." 
Matthew15:37 Navo vakadya veshe, vakaguta. Navo vakatonhera matsekeneswa akasara, zvitundu zvinomwe zvakazara." 
Matthew15:38 Naavo vakadya vaiya vamuna mazana makumi marongomuna, ngepabanze pevakadzi nevana." 
Matthew15:39 Naye wakaendesa mbunganu, wakapotera mungarava, akauya kumigano yeMagadhana." 
Matthew16:1 VaFarisi nevaSadhusi vakauya vechimuedza, vakakumbira kuti avaitire chioniso chinobva mudenga." 
Matthew16:2 Asi iye wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Kwooita madeekoni munoti, ‘Kubanze kunozoara, ngokuti mudenga mwakatsvuka.’" 
Matthew16:3 Nomumangwanani munoti, ‘Kunozonaya nyamashi, ngokuti mudenga mwakatsvuka muneruseto.’ Munozia kududzira hope yomudenga, asi amukoni here kududzira zvioniso zvemikuwo?" 
Matthew16:4 Mubarirwana wakashata nounoomba unotsvaka chioniso, akuna chioniso chinozoitwa kwouri, asi kwega chioniso chaJona.” Naye wakavasiya akaenda." 
Matthew16:5 Naapo vadzidzi vake vaguma ruseri vaiya variyarwa kutora zvingwa. 
Matthew16:6 NaJesu wakati kwavari, “Wonai mungware mumera wevaFarisi newevaSadhusi.”" 
Matthew16:7 Navo vakapangana pakati pavo, vakati, “Unodaro ngokuti atizi kutora zvingwa.”" 
Matthew16:8 NaJesu echizia izvo, wakati, “Munopangana ngenyi pakati penyu, imwimwi munokutenda kudoodoko, ngokuti amuna chingwa?" 
Matthew16:9 Amuzii nazvinopano here nokuti kukarakadza ngezvingwa zvishanu zvakapuwa vanhu makumi emazana mashanu, nezvitundu zvinganai zvemwakatonhera matsekeneswa?" 
Matthew16:10 Zve, nokuti zvingwa zvinomwe zvevanhu vaiya makumi emazana marongomuna, nezvitundu zvinganai zvemwakatonhera matsekeneswa?" 
Matthew16:11 Amuzi kuzwisisa ngenyi kuti andizi kuereketa kwomuri ngezvingwa? Asi mungware mumera wevaFarisi newevaSadhusi.” 
Matthew16:12 Naapo vakanasa kuzwisisa kuti aasaivapanga kuti vangware ngomumera wezvingwa, asi kuti vangware kudzidzisa kwevaFarisi nekwevaSadhusi." 
Matthew16:13 Zvino Jesu auya munyika yeSizaria Firipi, wakabvunza vadzidzi vake echiti, “Vanhu vanoti Mukororo woMunhu ndiani?”" 
Matthew16:14 Navo vakati, “Vamweni vanoti ndiJohani Mubhabhatidzi, nevamweni vanoti ndiErija, nevamweni vanoti ndiJeremia nokuti umwe wevaprofeti.”" 
Matthew16:15 Iye wakati kwavari, “Asi imwimwi munoti ndiri anani?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petro wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Iwewe uri Kristu, Mukororo waMwari Unopona.”" 
Matthew16:17 NaJesu wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Unomuchena iwewe Simoni, mukororo waJona, ngokuti nyama nengazi azvizi kuonisa ichi kwouri, asi Baba angu vari mudenga." 
Matthew16:18 Neni ndinoti kwouri, ‘Iwewe uri Petro, nepadera peiri buwe ndinozoaka chiara changu; nezvimana zveHaidhesi azvizochinyisi.’" 
Matthew16:19 Neni ndinokupa makii oumambo hwomudenga; neicho chounozosunga munyika, chinozosungwa mudenga. Neicho chounozosunhura munyika, chinozosunhurwa mudenga.”" 
Matthew16:20 Naapo wakapanga vadzidzi vake kuti vasazoronzera munhu naumwe kuti ndiye Kristu. 
Matthew16:21 Kubvira ngouwo mukuwo Jesu wakatanga kuonisa kuvadzidzi vake kuti kunosisira kuti aende Jerusarema, atambudzike ngezvakawanda ngevakuru nevapristi vakuru nevanyori, aurawe nezuva rechitatu amuswe." 
Matthew16:22 Naapo Petro wakamutora dumba, akatanga kumupanga echiti, “Mwari ngaaite kuti chisaitika icho kwouri, Mambo. Ichi achizoitiki kwouri nariini.”" 
Matthew16:23 Asi iye wakakunukuka, akati kunaPetro, “Ibva sure kwangu, Sathani. Uri mupumhunisi kwendiri; ngokuti aunyeri ngeizvo zvaMwari, asi ngeizvo zvevanhu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Naapo Jesu wakati kuvadzidzi vake, “Kunyazwi ndiani unoda kuuya sure kwangu, ngaadzirambe atore muchinjiko wake, anditeere." 
Matthew16:25 Ngokuti iye unoda kuuyirwa ngendaramo yake, unozorashikirwa ndiyo; nouwo unozorasha ndaramo yake ngepamusoro pangu, unozoiona." 
Matthew16:26 Munhu unozouyirwa ngenyi kudai echiona nyika yeshe, akarashikirwa ngendaramo yake? Nokuti munhu unozoita mutenganisonyi nendaramo yake?" 
Matthew16:27 Ngokuti Mukororo woMunhu unozouya muutende hwaBaba ake pamwepo nengirosi dzake; naapo unozopa munhu weshe kudai ngemishando yake. 
Matthew16:28 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, varipo vamweni venyu vanoema panapa, avo vasikazozwi kufa metsa vaona Mukororo woMunhu echiuya muumambo hwake.”" 
Matthew17:1 Ngesure kwemazuva matanhatu Jesu wakatora Petro, Jakobe naJohani, munun'una wake, wakavatungamira akakwira navo padera pomutunhu wakareba, vari vega." 
Matthew17:2 Naye wakatsandudzwa pamberi pavo, nehope yake yakajeka kudai ngezuva, nezvokufuka zvake zvakachena kudai ngokujeka." 
Matthew17:3 Penya, kwakaoneka kwaari Mosi naErija, vechiereketa naye." 
Matthew17:4 NaPetro wakati kunaJesu, “Mambo, kwakanaka kwetiri ngokuti tiri panapa. Kudai wechida, ndinozoaka pano zvitumba zvitatu, chimwe chako, chimweni chaMosi nechimweni chaErija.”" 
Matthew17:5 Apo achaereketa, penya gore rinon'anikira rakavatibikira, penya izwi rakabva mugore rechiti, “Uyu ndiye Mukororo wangu, wendinoda, wendinonasa kudakara ndiye; mwechimuzwa.”" 
Matthew17:6 Naapo vadzidzi vazwa izvi, vakadzikandira pashi vakatsikitsira hope dzavo pamavhu, vakatya kakurutu." 
Matthew17:7 NaJesu wakauya, akavabata, akati, “Mirukai, musatya.”" 
Matthew17:8 Naapo vamirudza madziso avo, avazi kuona munhu, kwega Jesu." 
Matthew17:9 Vachadzaka kubva padera pomutunhu, Jesu wakavapanga echiti, “Musazoronzera munhu naumwe ngendaa yechioniso metsa Mukororo woMunhu amuka kwavakafa.”" 
Matthew17:10 Nevadzidzi vake vakamubvunza vechiti, “Ndizvo, ngenyi vanyori vanoti, ‘Kunosisira kuti Erija atange kuuya?’ ”" 
Matthew17:11 Naye wakapingura echiti, “Ngegwinyiso Erija unouya aunzidzire zveshe." 
Matthew17:12 Asi ndinoti kwomuri, Erija wakatouya hake, navo avazi kumuzia, asi vakaita kwaari zveshe izvo zvevakada. Ngokudaro Mukororo woMunhu naye unozotambudzwa ndivo.”" 
Matthew17:13 Naapo vadzidzi vakazwisisa kuti wakaereketa kwavari ndiJohani Mubhabhatidzi. 
Matthew17:14 Vaguma kunembungano kwakauya kwaari munhu, akamugwadamira pashi echiti," 
Matthew17:15 “Mambo, wechimuitira nyasha mwana wangu; ngokuti unenhutu, unotambudzika kakurutu. Ngokuti kazhinji unowa mumwoto nekazhinjizve mumvura." 
Matthew17:16 Neni ndamuunza kunevadzidzi vako, navo vakorera kumuponesa.”" 
Matthew17:17 Jesu wakapingura, akati, “A! Mubarirwana usikatendi nounopauka, ndinozogara nemwi mukuwo wakaitawani? Ndinozomusengerera mukuwo wakaitawani? Wechimuunza pano kwendiri.”" 
Matthew17:18 NaJesu wakakaraidza iro dhimoni; naro rakabuda kubva kwaari. Nomurumbwana wakaponeswa kubvira ngeawa iro. 
Matthew17:19 Naapo vadzidzi vakauya kunaJesu, ari ega, navo vakati, “Ngenyi isusu takorera kuridzinga?”" 
Matthew17:20 Naye wakati kwavari, “Ngendaa yokutenda kwenyu kudoko, ngokuti ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kudai munokutenda kudai ngetsangu yomustadhi, mungaronza kuneuyu mutunhu kuti, ‘Ibva panapa, uende apo;’ nawo unozobva apo; kusina chiro chisikazoitwi ndimwi.” [" 
Matthew17:21 Asi iyi mbeu aibudi kwega ngokukumbira nangokuera kudya.] 
Matthew17:22 Navo vachaungana pamwepo muGarire, Jesu wakati kwavari, “Mukororo woMunhu unozohinwa munyara dzevanhu." 
Matthew17:23 Navo vanozomuuraya, naye ngezuva rechitatu unozomukazve.” Navo vakatambudzika kakurutu." 
Matthew17:24 Naapo vauya muKhapernaume, avo vaiashira chibharo vakauya kuna Petro, vakati, “Mudzidzisi wenyu aadusi chibharo chemare chinozwi dhidhirakama here?”" 
Matthew17:25 Wakati, “Eya.” Kwakati apotera mumhatso Jesu wakatanga kuereketa kwaari echiti, “Unopinimidzenyi, Simoni? Madzimambo enyika vanoashira kunaani murimwa nokuti chibharo? Kunevakororo vavo nokuti kuvapara here?”" 
Matthew17:26 Petro wakati kwaari, “Kuvapara.” Naapo Jesu wakati kwaari, “Ngokudaro vakororo vavo vari vakasunungurwa." 
Matthew17:27 Asi kuti tisazovapumhunisa, enda iwewe kuruandhle, ukandire chitebo, utore hove iyo inotanga kubatwa. Naapo wabeura muromo wayo, unozoona chigurwa chemare yesirivha chinozwi sitatera; icho unozochitora uhine kwavari ngepamusoro pangu nepako.”" 
Matthew18:1 Panguva iyo vadzidzi vakauya kunaJesu, vakati, “Ndiani wakakurisisa muumambo hwomudenga?”" 
Matthew18:2 NaJesu wakadaidza kwaari mwana mudoko, wakamuisa pakati pavo." 
Matthew18:3 Akati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, musikatenderuki, muite kudai ngevana vadoko, amutongozopindi muumambo hwomudenga." 
Matthew18:4 Ndizvo iye unozodzipfaisa kudai ngouyu mwana mudoko, iye ndiye wakakurisisa muumambo hwomudenga." 
Matthew18:5 Nouwo unozoashira umwe mwana mudoko wakadai ngouyu ngezina rangu, unondiashira inini." 
Matthew18:6 “Asi kunyazwi ndiani unozoita kuti umwe wevadoko vakadai vanonditenda vashaishe, kunopinda kumunakira iye kuti guyo gurutu risungirwe muhuro mwake, kuti anzvaidzwe muudzamu rworuandhle." 
Matthew18:7 Ihehe kunyika ngendaa yezvipumhuniso! Ngokuti kunotamika kuti zvipumhuniso zviuye; asi ihehe kwaari munhuwo unoita kuti vanhu vashaishe! 
Matthew18:8 Kuti nyara yako dangani rutsoka rwako rwechikuita kuti ushaishe, ruteme, ururashe kubva kwouri. Kunopinda kunaka kwouri kuti upotere mukurarama uri chirema nokuti wechikumhina, kunekuti unenyara mbiri dangani tsoka mbiri ukandirwe mumuriro usikadzimi." 
Matthew18:9 Nokudai dziso rako rechikuita kuti ushaishe, ribvite, urirashe kubva kwouri. Kunopinda kunaka kwouri kuti upotere mukurarama uri jochotore kunekuti unemadziso mairi ukandirwe mumuriro weGehena." 
Matthew18:10 “Ngwarai kuti musazoshoora umwe weava vadoko. Ngokuti ndinoti kwomuri, mudenga ngirosi dzavo dzinogara dzechiona hope yaBaba angu vari mudenga. [" 
Matthew18:11 Ngokuti Mukororo woMunhu wakauya kuponesa avo vakarashika.] 
Matthew18:12 Munopinimidzenyi? Kuti munhu anezana remakwai nerimwe rawo rarashika, aasii here arimakumi mapfumbamwe nepfumbamwe, aende mumitunhu kutsvaka iro rakarashika?" 
Matthew18:13 Kudai kwechiitika kuti unoriona, ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, unopinda kudakara ngeiro kunemakumi mapfumbamwe nepfumbamwe asikazi kurashika." 
Matthew18:14 Ngokudaro andikwopi kuda kwaBaba enyu vari mudenga kuti umwe weava vadoko arove. 
Matthew18:15 “Kudai munun'una wako echizokushaishira, enda umuonise ndaa yake pakati penyu muri mwega. Kudai iye echizopurutana, wauyirwa ngomunun'una wako." 
Matthew18:16 Asi kuti asikazopurutani, tora umwe dangani vairi kuenda newe, kuti ngemiromo yevairi dangani yevatatu vanoita chapupu, mazwi eshe angagwinyiswa." 
Matthew18:17 Asi kuti iye echizoramba kuvapurutana, wechironzera vechiara. Asi kudai echizoramba kupurutana kunyazwi kunevechiara, ngaaite kwouri kudai ngewevemadzinza nokudai ngomubharisi." 
Matthew18:18 “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, ‘Kunyazwi chiinyi chomunozosunga munyika, chinozosungwawo mudenga. Neicho chomunosunhura munyika, chinozosunhurwawo mudenga.’" 
Matthew18:19 Zve ndinoti kwomuri, kudai vairi venyu vanozotenderana panyika ngechiro chevanozokumbirira, chinozoitwa kwavari ndiBaba angu vari mudenga." 
Matthew18:20 Ngokuti apo vairi nokuti vatatu vechiungana pamwepo ngezina rangu, ndiripo pakati pavo.”" 
Matthew18:21 Naapo Petro wakauya echiti kwaari, “Mambo, munun'una wangu unozondishaishira kanganai ndechimurekerera? Metsa mikuwo minomwe here?”" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Andironzi kwouri kuti, metsa mikuwo minomwe akadi; asi metsa mikuwo iri makumi manomwe akapetwa kanomwe." 
Matthew18:23 Ndizvo umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa nomunhu uri mambo, uwo waida kuerengerana nevaranda vake chikwereti." 
Matthew18:24 Naapo atanga kuerenga, umwe wakaunzwa kwaari anechikwereti chematarenda makumi emazana gumi." 
Matthew18:25 Asi ngokuti iye waiya asina chokuripira ndicho, mambo wake wakapanga kuti atengeswe nomukadzi wake nevana vake nazvo zveshe zvaaiya nazvo, kuti chikwereti chiripwe." 
Matthew18:26 Ndizvo muranda uwo wakawa pashi ngemabvi, akamupota echiti, ‘Wechindikungurira, neni ndinozokuripira zveshe.’" 
Matthew18:27 Naapo mambo wouwo muranda wakamukungurira, akamusunhura, akamurekerera chikwereti." 
Matthew18:28 Asi uwo muranda wakabuda, akaona umwe wevaranda mungani wake, uwo waakakweretwa ndiye zana remadhinari; naye wakamubata ngenyara, akamudzipa pahuro echiti, ‘Ripa kwendiri chikwereti chako.’" 
Matthew18:29 Ndizvo muranda uwo mungani wake wakawa pashi, akamupota echiti, ‘Wechindikungurira, neni ndinozokuripira.’" 
Matthew18:30 Asi aazi kutenda. Asi wakaenda akamuisa mutirongo, metsa aripa icho chikwereti." 
Matthew18:31 Ndizvo varanda vangani vake, vechiona icho chakaitika, vakasvipa mwoyo kakurutu, vakauya, vakaronzera mambo wavo izvo zveshe zvakaitika." 
Matthew18:32 Naapo mambo wake amudaidza, wakati kwaari, ‘Iwewe muranda wakashata, ndakakukungurira chikwereti icho cheshe, apo wandipota." 
Matthew18:33 Usaisisa newe here kuti ukungurire muranda uwo mungani wako, kudai ndini ndakakukungurira iwewe?’" 
Matthew18:34 Namambo wake wakatseneka, akamuhina kuvashwinyisi metsa aripa izvo zveshe zvaaiya nechikwereti kwaari ndizvo." 
Matthew18:35 Ngokudaro Baba angu vari mudenga vanozoita kwomuri, kuti imwimwi musikakunguriri munun'una wenyu ngomumwoyo mwenyu.”" 
Matthew19:1 Kwakatika apo Jesu apedza kuereketa aya mazwi, wakabuda muGarire, wakauya kumigano yeJudhia, ruseri rweJorodhani." 
Matthew19:2 Mbungano huru yakamuteera, naye wakavaponesa apo." 
Matthew19:3 NevaFarisi vakauya kwaari, vechimuedza vechiti, “Kunotenderwa here ngezvironzo kuti munhu arambe mukadzi wake ngendaa kunyazwi ngeiri?”" 
Matthew19:4 Naye wakapingura, akati, “Amuzikudzidza here kuti uwo wakavasika pakutanga, wakavasika mwamuna nomukadzi." 
Matthew19:5 Akati, ‘Ngeiyi ndaa munhu unozosiya baba ake namai, unozonamatira kumukadzi wake neava vairi vanozoita nyama imwe.’" 
Matthew19:6 Ndizvo avachaiti vairi, asi nyama imwe. Ndizvo icho chaakasunganidza Mwari, munhu asasunhura.”" 
Matthew19:7 Vakati kwaari, “Ndizvo ngenyi Mosi akapanga kuhina tsamba yokuparadzana nokumuramba?”"
