Matthew19:8 Wakati kwavari, “Mosi ngendaa yokukonza kwomwoyo yenyu wakamutendera kuti murambe vakadzi venyu. Asi kubvira pakutanga zvaiya zvisikazi kudaro." 
Matthew19:9 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, kunyazwi ndiani uwo unoramba mukadzi wake isiri ndaa yokuomba, aroore umweni, unoomba.”" 
Matthew19:10 Vadzidzi vakati kwaari, “Kuti yakadaro ndaa yomunhu nomukadzi wake, akuzi kunaka kuroora.”" 
Matthew19:11 Asi wakati kwavari, “Veshe avangaashiri izwi iri, asi kwega kwavari avo vakaripuwa." 
Matthew19:12 Ngokuti varipo vari ngomwa kubva mundani dzemadzimai avo; varipozve mitenwa avo vakatenwa ngevanhu, varipozve vakadziitisa ngomwa ngepamusoro poumambo hwomudenga. Iye unesimba rokuashira, ngaariashire.”" 
Matthew19:13 Naapo vakaunza kwaari vana vadoko, kuti aise nyara dzake padera pavo, avakumbirire. Asi vadzidzi vakavarambidza." 
Matthew19:14 Asi Jesu wakati, “Tenderai vana vadoko kuti vauye kwendiri, musavarambidza, ngokuti umambo hwomudenga ngehwevakadaro.”" 
Matthew19:15 Naye wakaisa nyara dzake padera pavo, akabva apo." 
Matthew19:16 Penya, umwe wakauya kwaari, akati, “Mudzidzisi, chiinyi icho chakanaka chendingaita kuti ndizoona kupona kusikaperi?”" 
Matthew19:17 Naye wakati kwaari, “Unondibvunza ngenyi ngendaa yechakanaka? Uripo umwe wakanaka, asi kudai wechida kupotera mukupona wechingwarira mipango.”" 
Matthew19:18 Wakati kwaari, “Mipango iri?” NaJesu wakati, “Usazouraya, usazoomba, usazoba, usazoita chapupu chokunyepa," 
Matthew19:19 remeredza baba ako namai, unozoda muakirwana wako kudai ngokudzida iwewe.”" 
Matthew19:20 Jaha rakati kwaari, “Ndakazvingwarira izvi zveshe. Chiinyi chasara kuti ndiite?”" 
Matthew19:21 Jesu wakati kweriri, “Kuti wechida kuita wakaperera, enda utengese zveshe zvounazvo, uhine kuvarombo, newe unozoona upfumi mudenga, uuye unditeere.”" 
Matthew19:22 Asi apo jaha razwa izwi iro rakaenda rechitambudzika; ngokuti raiya noupfumi hwakawanda. 
Matthew19:23 Naapo Jesu wakati kuvadzidzi vake, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kwakakonza kunegurudza kuti ripotere muumambo hwomudenga." 
Matthew19:24 Zve ndinoti kwomuri, kwakapinda kuita nyore kuti kamera ripotere ngepauri renaiti, kunekuti gurudza ripotere muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Matthew19:25 Apo vadzidzi vazwa izvi, vakashamiswa kakurutu, vakati, “Kuti zvakadaro, ndiani ungaponeswa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Asi Jesu echivaringira, wakati kwavari, “Kunevanhu ichi achiitiki; asi kunaMwari zveshe zvinoitika.”" 
Matthew19:27 Naapo Petro wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Ringira, isusu takasiya zveshe, tikakuteera; ndizvo tinozoonenyi?”" 
Matthew19:28 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, munyika itsva, apo Mukororo woMunhu paanozogara padera pedendemaro routhende hwake, imwimwiwo mwakanditeera munozogarawo padera pemadendemaro gumi namairi, mwechitonga madzinza gumi namairi aIsuraeri." 
Matthew19:29 Nemunhu weshe wakasiya mhatso, nokuti vanun'una, nokuti hanzvadzi, nokuti baba, nokuti mai, nokuti vana, nokuti minda, ngepamusoro pezina rangu, unozoashira zvakapetwa kuita zana, naye unozogara nhaka yokupona kusikaperi." 
Matthew19:30 Asi vazhinji avo vari vepamberi vanozoita vesure; naavo vari vesure vanozoita vepamberi. 
Matthew20:1 “Ngokuti umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa nomunhu uri mune wemhatso, uwo wakafumira mangwanani maishi kootora vashandi vomunda wake vemivhini." 
Matthew20:2 Naapo atenderana nevashandi ngechigurwa chesirivha ngezuva, wakavatuma kumunda wemivhini." 
Matthew20:3 Naye wakabudazve rooda kuita awa rechitatu, akaona vamweni vakaema pandau yomusika, vasikashandi." 
Matthew20:4 Wakati kwavari, ‘Mwechiendawo mumunda wemivhini, neicho chinomusisira ndinozomupa.’ Navo vakaenda." 
Matthew20:5 Wakabudazve rooda kuita awa rechitanhatu nerechipfumbamwe, wakaitazve kudaro." 
Matthew20:6 Rooda kuita awa rechigumi narimwe wakabuda, akaona vamweni vakaema, akati kwavari, ‘Munoema panapa ngenyi zuva reshe musina chomunoshanda?’" 
Matthew20:7 Vakati kwaari, ‘Ngokuti apana munhu watitora.’ Wakati kwavari, ‘Mwechiendawo mumunda wemivhini.’" 
Matthew20:8 Kwaita madeekoni mambo womunda wemivhini wakati kunenhunge yake, ‘Daidza vashandi, uvape misharo yavo, utange ngouwo wokugumisira metsa kuguma kunouwo wokutanga.’" 
Matthew20:9 Kwakati vechiuya avo vakatorwa ngeawa rechigumi narimwe vakaashira chigurwa chesirivha. 
Matthew20:10 Kwakati avo vokutanga voouya vakapinimidza kuti vangatutsirwa; navo ngokudaro vakaashira munhu weshe chigurwa chesirivha. 
Matthew20:11 Naapo vaashira, vakavhuruvhutira munewemhatso" 
Matthew20:12 vechiti, ‘Ava vokupedzisira vashanda awa rimwe rega, newe waita kuti vaedzane nesu, isusu takatwara mutwaro nokupisha kwezuva.’" 
Matthew20:13 Asi iye wakapingura, akati kunoumwe wavo, ‘Mungani, andizi kukuitira chakashata. Auzi kutenderana neni here ngechigurwa chesirivha?" 
Matthew20:14 Tora icho chiri chako uende. Ndinoda kumupawo uyu wokupedzisira kudai ndiwe. 
Matthew20:15 Akutenderwi here kwendiri kuti ndiite icho chendinoda ngezviri zvangu? Nokuti dziso rako raita godo ngokuti inini ndakanaka here?’ 
Matthew20:16 Ndizvo avo vesure vanozoita vepamberi, nevepamberi vanozoita vesure.”" 
Matthew20:17 Apo Jesu akwira Jerusarema, wakatora vadzidzi gumi navairi vari vega munjira, naye wakati kwavari," 
Matthew20:18 “Penyai, tinokwira Jerusarema; noMukororo woMunhu unozohinwa kuvapristi vakuru nevanyori, navo vanozomutongera rufu." 
Matthew20:19 Navo vanozomuhina kunevemadzinza kuti aitirwe jee nokuchaiwa nokukohomerwa, ngezuva rechitatu unozomuka.”" 
Matthew20:20 Naapo kwakauya kwaari mai evakororo vaZebhedhi, pamwepo nevakororo vake, akagwadama, echikumbira kwaari chiro." 
Matthew20:21 Naye wakati kwaari, “Chiinyi chomunoda?” Wakati kwaari, “Ronza kuti ava vakororo vangu vairi vagare umwe ngokumudyo kwako noumweni ngokumuoshwe kwako muumambo hwako.”" 
Matthew20:22 Asi Jesu wakapingura, akati “Amuzii chomunokumbira. Munokona here kumwa kutsani yendichamwa inini?” Vakati kwaari, “Tinokona.”" 
Matthew20:23 Iye wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso munozomwa kutsani yangu; asi kugara ngokumudyo kwangu nokuti ngokumuoshwe kwangu, andikwopi kwangu kuhina, asi ngekwaavo vakakunasirirwa ndiBaba angu.”" 
Matthew20:24 Naapo varigumi vazwa, vakatsenekera avo vakoma vairi." 
Matthew20:25 Asi Jesu wakavadaidza kwaari, akati, “Munozia kuti vatongi vemadzinza vanotonga padera pavo, nevakuru vavo vanesimba padera pavo." 
Matthew20:26 Asi akuzodaropi pakati penyu; asi iye unoda kuti aite mukuru pakati penyu ngaaite mushandiri wenyu. 
Matthew20:27 Nouwo unoda kuita wokutanga pakati penyu ngaaite muranda wenyu. 
Matthew20:28 Kudai ngoMukororo woMunhu aazi kuuya kushandirwa, asi kushandira nokuhina kupona kwake kuita muripo wevazhinji.”" 
Matthew20:29 Navo vachabuda kubva muJerikho mbungano huru yakamuteera. 
Matthew20:30 Penya, mapofu mairi akagara panjira, apo akazwa kuti Jesu waizopindapo, akadaidzira echiti, “Mambo, Mukororo waDhavhidha, tiitire nyasha.”" 
Matthew20:31 Nembungano yakaakaraidza kuti anyarare. Asi akapinda kudaidzisa echiti, “Mambo, Mukororo waDhavhidha, tiitire nyasha.”" 
Matthew20:32 NaJesu wakaema, akaadaidza, akati, “Munoda kuti ndimuitirenyi?”" 
Matthew20:33 Akati kwaari, “Mambo, kuti madziso edu apembenudzwe.”" 
Matthew20:34 Ndizvo Jesu wakaazwira urombo, akagwama madziso awo; paripo madziso awo akapembenudzwa, nawo akamuteera." 
Matthew21:1 Naapo vakwedzera pasinde peJerusarema, vaguma Bhethifaje, kuMutunhu wemaOrivhi, Jesu wakatuma vairi vevadzidzi vake." 
Matthew21:2 Wakati kwavari, “Endai kuguta iro remwakaringirana naro, paripo munozoona mbongoro yakasungwa netsiru pamwepo nayo; mwechidzisunhura, mudziunze kwendiri." 
Matthew21:3 Kuti aripo unozoereketa chiro kwomuri, munozoti, ‘Mambo unodzitama,’ chiriporipo unozodzitumira.”" 
Matthew21:4 Ichi chakaitika kuti kuzadzisike ukwo kwakaereketwa ngomuprofeti echiti," 
Matthew21:5 “Ronzerai mwanasikana weZioni. Penya, Mambo wako unouya kwouri, ari wakapfaa, echigadha padera pembongoro nepadera petsiru rechifuyo chemitwaro.”" 
Matthew21:6 Nevadzidzi vakaenda, vakaita kudai ngezvaakavapanga Jesu." 
Matthew21:7 Navo vakaunza mbongoro netsiru rayo, vakaisa zvokufuka zvavo padera padzo, vakamugadzika padera payo." 
Matthew21:8 Norupande ruzhinji rwembungano rwakachinga zvokufuka zvavo munjira; nevamweni vakatema matai emiti, vakaawara munjira." 
Matthew21:9 Nembungano yaihamba pamberi pake, neiyo yaiteera ngesure, yakadaidzira yechiti, “Hosana kuMukororo waDhavhidha! Unomuchena uwo unouya ngezina raMambo! Hosana mudengadenga!”" 
Matthew21:10 Naapo apotera muJerusarema, vedhorobha reshe vakaita nyongano vechiti, “Ndiani uyu?”" 
Matthew21:11 Nembungano yakati, “Uyu muprofeti Jesu, unobva Nazaretha reGarire.”" 
Matthew21:12 NaJesu wakapotera muTemperi, wakabudisa avo veshe vaitengesa naavo vaitenga muTemperi, naye wakapinduridza matafura eavo vaitenganisana mare nezvigaro zvaavo vaitengesa njia." 
Matthew21:13 Wakati kwavari, “Kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Mhatso yangu inozozwi imhatso yokudira; asi imwimwi mwaiita bako rembavha.’ ”" 
Matthew21:14 Mapofu nezvirema zvakauya kwaari muTemperi, naye wakavaponesa." 
Matthew21:15 Asi apo vapristi vakuru nevanyori vaona izvo zvinoshamisa zvaakaita, nevana vaidaidzira muTemperi vechiti, “Hosana kuMukororo waDhavhidha,” vakatseneswa," 
Matthew21:16 navo vakati kwaari, “Unozwa here icho chevanoereketa ava?” NaJesu wakati kwavari, “Eya. Amuzi kutongodzidza here, kuti kubva kumiromo yendumure neyevanoamwa unoashira kukudzwa kwakaperera?”" 
Matthew21:17 Naye wakavasiya, akabuda mudhorobha, akaenda Bhethani, naye wakaata apo." 
Matthew21:18 Mangwanani apo echihwirira kudhorobha waiya nenzara. 
Matthew21:19 Naapo aona muonde pasinde penjira, wakaguma kwouri, akaona usina chiro, asi mashakani ega, naye wakati kwouri, “Michero isachazoberekwa kwouri kunoti mhera nariini.” Paripo muonde wakazeketera." 
Matthew21:20 Kwakati vadzidzi vaona, vakashamiswa vechiti, “Muonde wazeketera ngokukasira ngenyi?”" 
Matthew21:21 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kudai munokutenda musikagonondi, amungazoiti chega icho chakaitwa kunemuonde, asi kunyazwi mwechizoti kunouyu mutunhu, ‘Ibva panapa, ukandirwe muruandhle,’ chinozoitika." 
Matthew21:22 Nazvo zveshe zvomunozokumbirira mumikumbiro ngokugonda, munozozviashira.”" 
Matthew21:23 Naapo apotera muTemperi, vapristi vakuru nevakuru vevanhu vakauya kwaari achadzidzisa, vakati, “Ngesimba raani rounoita izvi ndiro? Ndiani wakakupa simbaro?”" 
Matthew21:24 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Inini ndinozomubvunzawo chiro chimwe, kuti mukandironzera, ndinozomuronzerawo kuti isimba raani rendinoita izvi ndiro." 
Matthew21:25 Rubhabhatidzo rwaJohani rwakabva kuri? Rwakabva mudenga here, nokuti rwakabva kuvanhu?” Navo vakapangana pakati pavo vechiti, “Kuti tikaronza kuti, ‘Rwakabva mudenga,’ unozoti kwetiri, ‘Ndizvo amuzikumutenda ngenyi?’" 
Matthew21:26 Asi kuti tikaronza kuti, ‘Rwakabva kuvanhu,’ tinotya vanhu; ngokuti veshe vanoti kuti Johani waiya muprofeti.”" 
Matthew21:27 Navo vakapingura kunaJesu vakati, “Atizii.” Naye wakati kwavari, “Ininiwo andimuronzeri kuti ndinoita izvi ngesimba raani." 
Matthew21:28 “Asi munopinimidzenyi? Munhu waiya nevakororo vairi; naye wakaenda kunewokutanga, akati, ‘Mwana, enda nyamashi ushande mumunda wemivhini.’" 
Matthew21:29 Naye wakapingura, akati, ‘Andidi’, asi ngesure wakatenderuka, akaenda." 
Matthew21:30 Naye wakaenda kunewechipiri, wakaereketa ndizvo ndizvo. Iye wakapingura, akati, ‘Ndinoenda, baba’, asi ngesure aazi kuenda." 
Matthew21:31 Ndiani pavairi wakaita kuda kwababa ake?” Vakati, “Uwo wokutanga.” Jesu wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, vabharisi nemhombo vanomutangira kupotera muumambo hwaMwari." 
Matthew21:32 Ngokuti Johani wakauya kwomuri munjira yokururama, nemwi amuzi kumutenda; asi vabharisi nemhombo vakamutenda; nemwi apo mwaona izvo amuzi kutenderuka ngesureni, kuti mugonde kwaari." 
Matthew21:33 “Izwai muedzaniso umweni. Kwaiyapo munewemhatso wakatikuti, wakasima munda wemivhini, wakaushoshera ngerusvingo, wakatsvaka pokukamurira vhini mukati mwawo, naye wakaaka chitumba akauhina kuti ungwarirwe ngevarimi, akaenda kunyika imweni." 
Matthew21:34 Naapo nguva yokuibva kwemichero yakwedzera, wakatuma varanda vake kuvarimi avo, kuti vaashire chikoaniswa chake chemichero." 
Matthew21:35 Nevarimi avo vakatora varanda vake, vakachaya umwe, vakauraya umweni, vakaponda umweni ngemapuwe." 
Matthew21:36 Wakatumazve varanda vamweni vakapinda kuwanda kuneavo vokutanga, navo vakaita kwavari ndizvo ndizvo." 
Matthew21:37 Asi pakupedzisira wakatuma kwavari mukororo wake echiti, ‘Vanozoremeredza mukororo wangu.’" 
Matthew21:38 Asi apo varimi vaona mukororo uwo, vakati pachavo, ‘Uyu ndiye unogara nhaka. Uyai ngatimuuraye, titore nhaka yake.’" 
Matthew21:39 Navo vakamubata, vakamubudisa kubanze kwomunda wemivhini, vakamuuraya." 
Matthew21:40 Ndizvo apo mambo womunda wemivhini ouya, unozoitenyi kuneavo varimi?”" 
Matthew21:41 Vakati kwaari, “Unozouraya vanhu vakashata ngokuuraya kwakashata, naye unozohina munda uwo wemivhini kuvarimi vamweni, avo vanozohina kwaari michero ngemikuwo yayo.”" 
Matthew21:42 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Amuzi kutongodzidza here muzvinyorwa kuti, ‘Buwe iro rakarambwa ngevaaki, ndiro rakaitwa soro repakona; ichi chakabva kunaMambo, nacho chinoshamisa mukuona kwedu?’" 
Matthew21:43 “Ndizvo ndinoti kwomuri kuti, umambo hwaMwari hunozoduswa kwomuri, nahwo hunozohinwa kudzinza iro rinobereka michero yahwo. [" 
Matthew21:44 Naye uwo unozowa padera pebuwe iri, unozoputika; asi iye werinowa padera pake, rinozomukuya kuita bukuta.”]" 
Matthew21:45 Naapo vapristi vakuru nevaFarisi vazwa miedzaniso yake, vakazia kuti unoereketa ndivo." 
Matthew21:46 Naapo vakatsvaka kuti vamubate, vakatya mbungano ngokuti iyi yaigonda kuti muprofeti." 
Matthew22:1 NaJesu wakapingura, akaereketazve kwavari ngemiedzaniso echiti," 
Matthew22:2 “Umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa nomunhu uri mambo, wakaitira mukororo wake dhiri romuchadho." 
Matthew22:3 Naye wakatuma varanda vake kudaidza avo vakakokwa kudhiri romuchadho, navo avazi kuda kuuya." 
Matthew22:4 Wakatumazve varanda vamweni echiti, ‘Ronzerai avo vakakokwa kuti, penyai ndanasirira kudya kwangu; n'ombe dzangu nedzakanuna dzangu dzaurawa, nazvo zveshe zvanasirirwa; uyai kudhiri romuchadho.’" 
Matthew22:5 Asi avo vakazvirerusa, vakaenda, umwe kumunda wake noumweni kootengesa kwake," 
Matthew22:6 navo vakasara vakabata varanda vake, vakavashononesa, vakavauraya." 
Matthew22:7 Naapo mambo azwa izvi wakatseneka, naye wakatuma hondo dzake, akavauraya avo vaurayi, akapisha dhorobha ravo." 
Matthew22:8 Naapo wakati kuvaranda vake, ‘Dhiri romuchadho ranasirirwa, asi avo vakakokwa vaiya vasikasisiri." 
Matthew22:9 Ndizvo endai pamhararano dzenjira, navo veshe vomunozoona, mwechivakoka kuti vauye kudhiri romuchadho.’" 
Matthew22:10 Naavo varanda vakabuda, vakaenda munjira, vakaunganidza veshe avo vevakandoona, veshe vakashata nevakanaka; mhatso yedhiri romuchadho yakazara ngevaeni." 
Matthew22:11 Asi apo mambo apotera kuringira vaeni, wakaona munhu waiya asikazi kupfeka bhachi romuchadho." 
Matthew22:12 Naye wakati kwaari, ‘Hama, waita mapoterenyi muno usina bhachi romuchadho?’ Asi iye wakanyarara." 
Matthew22:13 Naapo mambo wakati kuvaranda vake, ‘Mwechimusunga tsoka nenyara, mwechimukandira muchidima chiri kubanze; kunozoiteyo kuboorera nokukwetsana kwemazino.’" 
Matthew22:14 Ngokuti vazhinji vanodaidzwa, asi vashomani vanotsanangurwa.”" 
Matthew22:15 Naapo vaFarisi vakaenda, vakaita bangano rokuti vamuteye mukuereketa kwake." 
Matthew22:16 Navo vakatumira kwaari vadzidzi vavo pamwepo nevaHerodhi vechiti, “Mudzidzisi, tinozia kuti iwewe uri wegwinyiso, unodzidzisa njira yaMwari ngegwinyiso, autunhumadzi munhu; ngokuti aupenyi hope yomunhu." 
Matthew22:17 Tironzere zvinopano unopinimidzenyi. Ndizvo here kuti tibhadhare chibharo kunaSiza nokuti tisabhadhara?” 
Matthew22:18 Asi Jesu, echizia kushata kwavo, wakati, “Munondiedza ngenyi, imwimwi vadziitisi?" 
Matthew22:19 Ndipangidzirenyi mare yechibharo.” Navo vakaunza kwaari chigurwa chemare chinozwi dhinariusi. 
Matthew22:20 Naye wakati kwavari, “Ngowaani uyu mutodzaniso nouku kunyorwa?”" 
Matthew22:21 Vakati, “NgezvaSiza.” Naapo wakati kwavari, “Ndizvo mwechihina kunaSiza zvaSiza, nokunaMwari izvo zviri zvaMwari.”" 
Matthew22:22 Naapo vazwa, vakashamiswa, vakamusiya vakaenda." 
Matthew22:23 Ngezuva ndiro ndiro, vaSadhusi avo vanoti akuna kumuka kwevakafa, vakauya kwaari, vakamubvunza" 
Matthew22:24 vechiti, “Mudzidzisi, Mosi wakati, ‘Kuti munhu akafa, asina vana, munun'una wake unozoroora mukadzi wake aberekere mukoma wake vana.’" 
Matthew22:25 Ndizvo kwaiyapo nesu vakoma vanomwe; nouwo wokutanga wakaroora, wakafa asina vana, wakasiya mukadzi wake kune munun'una wake." 
Matthew22:26 Ngokudarozve newechipiri newechitatu, metsa kupedzisira ngowechinomwe." 
Matthew22:27 Napakugumisira kwavo veshe mukadzi wakazofawo. 
Matthew22:28 Ndizvo mukumuka kwevakafa, unozoita mukadzi waani kwavari vanomwe? Ngokuti veshe vakamuroora.”" 
Matthew22:29 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Munokangaidzwa ngokusikazia zvinyorwa nokuti simba raMwari." 
Matthew22:30 Ngokuti mukumuka kwavakafa, avaroori, zve avaroorwi, asi vari vakadai ngengirosi dziri mudenga." 
Matthew22:31 Asi ngendaa yokumuka kwevakafa, amuzi kutongodzidza here icho chakaereketwa kwomuri ndiMwari echiti," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Inini ndiri Mwari waAbrahama naMwari waIsaka naMwari waJakobe?’ Mwari aasiri Mwari wevakafa akadi, asi wevanopona.”" 
Matthew22:33 Naapo mbungano yazwa izvi, yakashamiswa ngokudzidzisa kwake." 
Matthew22:34 Asi apo vaFarisi vazwa kuti waiya anyararisa vaSadhusi, vakaungana pamwepo." 
Matthew22:35 Umwe wavo waiya gweta, wakamubvunza mubvunzo, echimuedza echiti," 
Matthew22:36 “Mudzidzisi, ngouri mupango mukuru muMipango?”" 
Matthew22:37 Naye wakati kwaari, “Unozomuda Mambo Mwari wako ngomwoyo wako weshe, ngomweya wako weshe nemirangariro yako yeshe.”" 
Matthew22:38 Ichi chiri mupango mukuru nowokutanga. 
Matthew22:39 Newechipiri wakadai ngouyu, “Unozomuda muakirwana wako kudai ngokudzida iwewe." 
Matthew22:40 Kuneiyi mipango miiri ndipo pasingwisingwi yeMipango yeshe nevaprofeti.” 
Matthew22:41 Zvinopano vaFarisi vachaungana, Jesu wakavabvunza" 
Matthew22:42 echiti, “Munopinimidzenyi ndiKristu? Mwana waani?” Vakati kwaari, “Mukororo waDhavhidha.”" 
Matthew22:43 Wakati kwavari, “Ndizvo ngenyi Dhavhidha, ari muMweya, unomudaidza kuti Mambo echiti," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Mambo wakati kunaMambo wangu, gara ngokumudyo kwangu, metsa ndiite magaa ako chitambarariro chetsoka dzako?’" 
Matthew22:45 Ndizvo, kuti Dhavhidha akamudaidza kuti Mambo, zvino uri mukororo wake ngokuitawani?”" 
Matthew22:46 Kwaiya kusina munhu waikona kumupingura neizwi, zve, kwaiya kusina munhu kubvira ngezuva iro waishinga kuchamubvunza mibvunzo." 
Matthew23:1 Naapo Jesu wakaereketa kumbungano nokuvadzidzi vake 
Matthew23:2 echiti, “Vanyori nevaFarisi vanogara pachigaro chaMosi." 
Matthew23:3 Ndizvo zviro zveshe zvevanomupanga, zviitei muzvingwarire; asi musaita kudai ngemishando yavo; ngokuti vanotera kuereketa vasikazviiti." 
Matthew23:4 Ngokuti vanosunga mitwaro inorema, inokonza kutwara nokuiisa pamapfudzi evanhu, asi ivo vemene avatendi kumirudza chinwe chavo kuvadetsera kutwara mitwaro iyo." 
Matthew23:5 Asi mishando yavo yeshe vanoiita kuti vaoneke ngevanhu; vanosungira zvibhokisi zvikuru zvine mavhesi pahuma dzavo, vechikurisa mipendero yemagauni avo." 
Matthew23:6 Vanoda zvigaro zvepamberi mumishongano yokudya nezvigaro zvepamberi mumhatso dzokudira," 
Matthew23:7 nokuchingamidzwa pandau dzemisika, nokudaidzwa ngevanhu kuti ‘Rabhi.’" 
Matthew23:8 Asi imwimwi musatenda kudaidzwa kuti ‘Rabhi;’ ngokuti umwe uri Mudzidzisi wenyu neimwimwi mweshe muri hama. 
Matthew23:9 Musadaidza munhu kunyazwi ngouri munyika kuti ‘Baba,’ ngokuti umwe uri Baba enyu, vari mudenga." 
Matthew23:10 Zve musadaidzwa kuti ‘Matenzi,’ ngokuti Tenzi wenyu umwe ndiKristu." 
Matthew23:11 Asi iye uri mukuru pakati penyu unozoita muranda wenyu. 
Matthew23:12 Kunyazwi ndiani unozodzikurisa iye unozopfaiswa; nouwo unozodzipfaisa unozokuriswa. 
Matthew23:13 “Asi ihehe kwomuri vanyori nevaFarisi, vadziitisi! Ngokuti munokonyera umambo hwomudenga kuvanhu ngokuti amupoteri imwimwi, zve amutenderi avo vanoda kupotera kuti vapotere. [" 
Matthew23:14 Ihehe kwomuri vanyori nevaFarisi, vadziitisi, ngokuti munopedza mhatso dzeshirikadzi, ngokudziitisa munoita mikumbiro yakareba, ndizvo munozoashira kutongwa kwakapinda kukura.]" 
Matthew23:15 “Ihehe kwomuri vanyori nevaFarisi, vadziitisi! Ngokuti munoambuka ruandhle nenyika kutsvaka mudzidzi umwe, naapo atenderuka, munomuita kakapetwa kairi kuita mukororo weGehena kupinda imwimwi." 
Matthew23:16 “Ihehe kwomuri imwimwi vatungamiriri mapofu, imwimwi munoti, ‘Kunyazwi ndiani unopika ngeTemperi, aanandaa; asi uwo unopika ngomukore womuTemperi, ndiye unendaa yemhiko yake.’" 
Matthew23:17 Imwimwi mapenzi mapofu; ngechiri chakapinda kukura, mukore nokuti Temperi, iro rinochenesa mukore?" 
Matthew23:18 Zve munoti, ‘Kunyazwi ndiani unopika ngearita, aanandaa; asi kunyazwi ndiani unopika ngechipo chiri padera paro, unendaa.’" 
Matthew23:19 Imwimwi mapofu; ngechiri chakapinda kukura, chipo nokuti arita iro rinochenesa chipo?" 
Matthew23:20 Ndizvo uwo unopika ngearita, unopika ndizvo zveshe zviri padera paro." 
Matthew23:21 Nouwo unopika ngeTemperi, unopika ndiro nouwo unogara mukati mwaro." 
Matthew23:22 Nouwo unopika ngedenga, unopika ngedendemaro raMwari nouwo unogara padera paro." 
Matthew23:23 “Ihehe kwomuri vanyori nevaFarisi, vadziitisi! Munohina chimwe chegumi cheminte neanise nokumini, nemwi mwarekera kuita zvakakura zveMipango, kutonga kwakwo nenyasha nokugondeka; kwaisisira kuti muzviite izvi, musikasii zvimweni zvisikazi kuitwa." 
Matthew23:24 Imwimwi vatungamiriri mapofu, munohluza nhunzi mwechitangurira kamera." 
Matthew23:25 “Ihehe kwomuri vanyori nevaFarisi, vadziitisi! Ngokuti munosuka kubanze kwetsani nekwendiro, asi mukati mwakazara ngokukara nokudzida." 
Matthew23:26 Iwewe muFarisi uri bofu, suka kutanga mukati mwetsani nemwendiro kuti kubanze kwadzo kuchenewo." 
Matthew23:27 “Ihehe kwomuri vanyori nevaFarisi, vadziitisi! Ngokuti mwakadai ngemaiba akacheneswa, awo ngegwinyiso anooneka akanaka ngokubanze, asi ngomukati akazara ngemagodo evakafa nezveshe zvinetsvina." 
Matthew23:28 Ngokudaro nemwi kubanze munooneka muri vakarurama kunevanhu, asi ngomukati mwakazara ngokudziitisa nokushata." 
Matthew23:29 “Ihehe kwomuri vanyori nevaFarisi, vadziitisi! Ngokuti imwimwi munoaka maiba evaprofeti nokunemesa maiba evakarurama." 
Matthew23:30 Nemwi munoti, ‘Kudai taiyapo ngemazuva emadzibaba edu, tingadai tisikazi kutenderana navo mukuparadza ngazi yevaprofeti.’" 
Matthew23:31 Ndizvo munodzipupurira kuti imwimwi muri vakororo vaavo vakauraya vaprofeti. 
Matthew23:32 Zadzisai imwimwi chipimo chemadzibaba enyu. 
Matthew23:33 Imwimwi nyoka, imwimwi vana vemabuura, mungaita mapokonyokerenyi kubva mukutongwa nokukandirwa muGehena?" 
Matthew23:34 Ndizvo, ringirai ndinotuma kwomuri vaprofeti nevakangwara nevanyori; vamweni vavo munozovauraya nokuvakohomera; nevamweni vavo munozovarova mumhatso dzenyu dzokudira nokuvatambudza kubva kudhorobha rimwe kuenda kunerimweni," 
Matthew23:35 kuti padera penyu iuye ngazi yeshe yevakarurama yakaparadzwa munyika, kubvira kungazi yaAbheri wakarurama, metsa kuguma kungazi yaZekharia, mukororo waBharakia, uwo wemwakauraya pakati peruwanze nearita." 
Matthew23:36 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, izvi zveshe zvinozoitika kunouyu mubarirwana." 
Matthew23:37 “Jerusarema, Jerusarema, iwewe unouraya vaprofeti, wechivaponda ngemapuwe avo vanotumwa kwouri, kuwandanyi kwemikuwo yendakada kuunganidza vana vako pamwepo, kudai ngemhambo inounganidza zvitiyo zvayo pashi pemaphaphiro ayo, nemwi amuzikutenda!" 
Matthew23:38 Penyai, mhatso yenyu yasiiwa kwomuri iri dongo." 
Matthew23:39 Ngokuti ndinoti kwomuri, amuchatongozondioni metsa munozoti, ‘Unomuchena uwo unouya ngezina raMambo.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Jesu wakabuda muTemperi; oenda vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari kuti vamupangidzire mhatso dzeTemperi. 
Matthew24:2 Naye wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Amuoni izvi zveshe here? Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, arizosiiwi panapa buwe padera pebuwe rimweni risikazoputsirwi pashi.”" 
Matthew24:3 Achagara paMutunhu wemaOrivhi, vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari ari ega vechiti, “Tironzere, izvi zvinozoitika riini? Zve chiinyi chinozoita chioniso chokuuya kwako nechokuguma kwenyika.”" 
Matthew24:4 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Ngwarai kuti musazopaukiswa ngomunhu." 
Matthew24:5 Ngokuti vazhinji vanozouya ngezina rangu vechiti, ‘Inini ndiri Kristu’, vanozorashikisa vazhinji." 
Matthew24:6 Nemwi munozozwa ngokuambana nemawirira okuambana; ngwarai kuti musazotambudzika; ngokuti kunosisira kuti zveshe zviitike, asi magumo aasati aguma." 
Matthew24:7 Ngokuti dzinza rinozomukirana nedzinza, noumambo hunozomukirana noumambo; kunozoapo nzara nokuzungunyika kwenyika kundau dzakaparadzana." 
Matthew24:8 Izvi zveshe zviri zvokuamba kwemadambudziko. 
Matthew24:9 Naapo vanozomuhina mukutambudzwa, navo vanozomuuraya; nemwi munozonyenywa ngemadzinza eshe ngepamusoro pezina rangu." 
Matthew24:10 Naapo vazhinji vanozopumhunwa, vanozohinana umwe noumweni nokunyenyana." 
Matthew24:11 Nevaprofeti vokunyepa vazhinji vanozoapo, navo vanozorashikisa vazhinji." 
Matthew24:12 Ngokuti kushaisha kunozowanda, rudo rwevazhinji runozopora." 
Matthew24:13 Asi iye unozoshingirira metsa kumagumo unozoponeswa. 
Matthew24:14 Neiri vhangeri roumambo rinozochumairwa munyika dzeshe kuita chapupu kumadzinza eshe; naapo kupera kunozoguma. 
Matthew24:15 “Ndizvo apo mwozoona chinyangadzo chokuparadza chaakaereketa ndicho Dhanieri muprofeti chechiema mundau yakachena, (uwo unodzidza ngaazwisise)" 
Matthew24:16 naapo avo vari muJudhia ngavatizire kumitunhu. 
Matthew24:17 Naye uri padera pechachungu chemhatso, asadzaka kutora zviro zviri mumhatso yake." 
Matthew24:18 Naye uri mumunda asahwirira sure kootora bhachi rake. 
Matthew24:19 Asi ihehe kwavari avo vaanemimba naavo vanoamwisa ngaao mazuva! 
Matthew24:20 Kumbirai kuti kutiza kwenyu kusazoitika ngenguva yechando nokuti ngezuva reSabatha. 
Matthew24:21 Ngokuti kunozoapo kutambudzika kukurutu, ukwo kusikazi kumboitika kwakadaro kubvira mukuamba kwenyika metsa kuguma zvinopano, zve, akuchatongozoitiki zvakadaro." 
Matthew24:22 Kudai mazuva awo asikazofupiswi, akuna nomunhu unozoponeswa; asi ngepamusoro pevakatsanangurwa, awo mazuva anozofupiswa." 
Matthew24:23 Ngouwo mukuwo kuti aripo munhu unozoti kwomuri, ‘Penyai, Kristu uri panapa’, nokuti ‘Apo’, musazozvitenda." 
Matthew24:24 Ngokuti vanozoapo vaKristu vokunyepa nevaprofeti vokunyepa, navo vanozoita zvioniso zvikuru nemishamiso, kupaukisa, kudai zvechiitika, eya nevakatsanangurwa." 
Matthew24:25 Penyai, ndamuronzera izvi ngepamberi." 
Matthew24:26 Ndizvo kuti vechizoti kwomuri, ‘Penyai, uri mushango,’ musaendeyo. ‘Penyai, uri mukamera romukati,’ musazotenda." 
Matthew24:27 Ngokuti kudai ngemheni inobva kumabvazuva, inojekisa metsa kuguma kumabirirazuva; kunozodaro nokuuya kwoMukororo woMunhu." 
Matthew24:28 Ngokuti apo panemiiri yakafa, ndipo pedzinoungana ngwanga." 
Matthew24:29 “Ngokukasira ngesure kwokutambudzika kwemazuva awo, zuva rinozoita chidima, nemwedzi auzojeki, nenyeredzi dzinozowa kubva mudenga, nesimba reshe romudenga rinozozungunyiswa." 
Matthew24:30 Naapo kunozooneka chioniso choMukororo woMunhu mudenga, nemadzinza eshe enyika anozobonda, nawo anozomuona Mukororo woMunhu echiuya padera pemakore omudenga, anesimba nouthende hukuru." 
Matthew24:31 Naye unozotuma ngirosi dzake ngokuridzwa kukurutu kwegwama, nadzo dzinozounganidza vakatsanangurwa vake kubva kumadutu marongomuna, kubva kumagumo amwe omudenga metsa kuguma kumagumo amweni." 
Matthew24:32 “Zvinopano dzidzai muedzaniso kumuti womuonde; apo dai rawo riri mbishi, rechiburikira mashakani, imwimwi munozia kuti zienza raapasinde." 
Matthew24:33 Ngokudaro imwimwiwo, apo mwoona izvi zveshe, munozia kuti uri pasinde pamisiwo." 
Matthew24:34 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri kuti uyu mubarirwana auzopindi metsa izvi zveshe zviitike. 
Matthew24:35 Denga nenyika zvinozopinda, asi mazwi angu aatongozopindi akadi." 
Matthew24:36 “Asi ngendaa yezuva iro neawa iro akuna naumwe unozia, kunyazwi ngirosi dzomudenga nokuti Mukororo, kwega Baba." 
Matthew24:37 Ngokuti kudai ngemazuva aNoa, kunozodarozve kuuya kwoMukororo woMunhu." 
Matthew24:38 Ngokuti ngemazuva awo ngepamberi pendambi, vakadya, vechimwa nokuroora nokuroodza, metsa rakaguma zuva iro raakapotera ndiro Noa mungarava." 
Matthew24:39 Navo avazikuzia metsa ndambi yakaguma, yakavatora veshe, kunozodarowo kuuya kwoMukororo woMunhu." 
Matthew24:40 Naapo vanhu vairi vanozoapo mumunda, umwe unozotorwa noumweni unozosiiwa." 
Matthew24:41 Vakadzi vairi vechikuya paguyo, umwe unozotorwa noumweni unozosiiwa." 
Matthew24:42 Ndizvo rindai; ngokuti amurizii zuva raanozouya Mambo wenyu. 
Matthew24:43 Asi mwechizia ichi, kuti kudai munewemhatso aizia mukuwo weinouya ndiwo mbavha iye waizorinda, asikatendi kuti mhatso yake ipwanyiwe." 
Matthew24:44 Ndizvo itai vakanasirirwa; ngokuti ngeawa romusikapinimidzi Mukororo woMunhu unouya. 
Matthew24:45 “Ndizvo ndiani uri muranda unogondeka newakangwara, uwo mambo wake wakamuemesa kuita mutongi padera pemhatso yake, kuti avape kudya kwavo ngenguva kwayo?" 
Matthew24:46 Unomuchena muranda uwo apo mambo wake ouya unozomuona echiita kudaro. 
Matthew24:47 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, unozomuemesa kuti aite mutongi padera peizvo zveshe zvaanazvo." 
Matthew24:48 Asi kuti uwo muranda wakashata unozoti mumwoyo mwake, ‘Mambo wangu unononoka kuuya;’" 
Matthew24:49 naye atange kurova varanda avo vari vangani vake, adye echimwa pamwepo nezviradza," 
Matthew24:50 mambo wouwo muranda unozouya ngezuva raasikakariri neawa raasikazii. 
Matthew24:51 Naye unozomutema kuita zvigurwa, aemese kwaari chikoaniswa chake pakati pevadziitisi. Unozoiteyo kuboorera nokukwetsana kwemazino." 
Matthew25:1 “Zvinopano umambo hwomudenga hunoedzaniswa nevasikana varigumi, avo vakatora zvibani zvavo, vakabuda kooshongana nomukwambo." 
Matthew25:2 Vashanu vavo vaiya mapenzi nevashanu vaiya vakangwara. 
Matthew25:3 Ngokuti avo vaiya mapenzi vakatora zvibani zvavo, avazikutora mafuta navo." 
Matthew25:4 Asi vakangwara vakatora mafuta mukati mwezvidziyo zvavo, pamwepo nezvibani zvavo." 
Matthew25:5 Apo mukwambo achanonoka, vakakutsira veshe vakaata." 
Matthew25:6 Asi pakati pousiku kwakadaidzirwa kuti, ‘Penyai, mukwambo! Budai kooshongana naye.’" 
Matthew25:7 Naapo vasikana veshe vakamiruka, vakanasirira zvibani zvavo." 
Matthew25:8 Namapenzi akati kunevakangwara, ‘Tipenyiwo mafuta enyu; ngokuti zvibani zvedu zvinodzima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Asi vakangwara vakapingura, ‘Azvingadaropi, ngokuti aazokwani isusu nemwi. Asi mwechienda kuneavo vanotengesa, mudzitengere.’" 
Matthew25:10 Asi vachaenda kootenga, mukwambo wakauya; naavo vaiya vakanasirira vakapotera naye mumuchadho, noruvhi rwakakonywa." 
Matthew25:11 Ngesureni kwakauyawo vasikana vamweni vechiti, ‘Mambo, Mambo, tibeurire.’" 
Matthew25:12 Asi iye wakapingura echiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, anditongomuzii.’" 
Matthew25:13 Ndizvo rindai imwimwi ngokuti amuzii zuva nokuti awa. 
Matthew25:14 “Ngokuti zvakadai ngomunhu wakatikuti echida kuenda kunyika imweni, wakadaidza varanda vake, akahina kwavari zviro zvake." 
Matthew25:15 Nokuneumwe wakahina matarenda ari mashanu, nokuneumweni wakahina mairi, nokuneumweni rimwe; kuneumwe ngaumwe wavo wakahinwa kudai ngokukona kwake kushandisa, wakaenda rwendo rwake." 
Matthew25:16 Paripo uwo wakaashira matarenda mashanu wakaenda akaaberekesa, wakauyirwa ngemashanu amweni." 
Matthew25:17 Ngokudarozve uwo wakaashira mairi, wakauyirwazve ngemairi." 
Matthew25:18 Asi iye wakaashira rimwe, wakaenda, akatsira mumavhu, akafisha mare yamambo wake." 
Matthew25:19 Ngesure kwomukuwo wakareba mambo wevaranda avo wakauya, akaerengerana navo." 
Matthew25:20 Nouwo wakaashira matarenda mashanu wakauya, wakaunza matarenda amweni mashanu echiti, ‘Mambo, wakahina kwendiri matarenda aiya mashanu, penya, ndakauyirwa ngeamweni matarenda mashanu.’" 
Matthew25:21 Namambo wake wakati kwaari, ‘Wakashuma, iwewe muranda wakanaka nounogondeka; wakagondeka padera pezvishomani, ndinozokuemesa padera pezvakawanda; pinda mukudakara kwamambo wako.’" 
Matthew25:22 Wakauyawo uwo wakaashira matarenda mairi, akati, ‘Mambo, wakahina kwendiri matarenda mairi; penya, ndakauyirwa ngematarenda amweni mairi.’" 
Matthew25:23 Mambo wake wakati kwaari, ‘Wakashuma, muranda wakanaka nounogondeka; iwewe wakagondeka ngezvishomani, ndinozokuemesa padera pezvakawanda, pinda mukudakara kwamambo wako.’" 
Matthew25:24 Wakauyawo uwo wakaashira tarenda rimwe, akati, ‘Mambo, ndakakuzia iwewe kuti uri munhu wakakonza, unokukura pousikazi kukusha nokuunganidza pousikazi kuparadzira." 
Matthew25:25 Neni ndakatya, ndakaenda, ndikafisha tarenda rako mumavhu. Penya, iri riri rako.’" 
Matthew25:26 Asi mambo wake wakapingura, akati kwaari, ‘Iwewe muranda wakashata nounenungo! Waizia here kuti ndinokukura pendisikazi kukusha nokuunganidza pendisikazi kuparadzira?" 
Matthew25:27 Ndizvo kwaisisira kuti uise mare yangu kwavari vebhange, kuti mukuuya kwangu ndaizoashirazve yangu nokuuyirwa kwayo." 
Matthew25:28 Ndizvo torai kwaari tarenda, muhine kwaari unematarenda gumi." 
Matthew25:29 Ngokuti kwaari weshe unacho unozohinwa, naye unozoa nezvakawanda. Asi kunouwo usina, eya, neicho chaanacho chinozobviswa kwaari." 
Matthew25:30 Mwechirasha muranda uwo usikadetseri chiro muchidima chiri kubanze. Kunozoiteyo kuboorera nokukwetsana kwemazino.’ 
Matthew25:31 “Asi apo Mukororo woMunhu oouya muuthende hwake nengirosi dzeshe naye, naapo unozogara padera pedendemaro routhende hwake." 
Matthew25:32 Nepamberi pake anozounganidzwa madzinza eshe, naye unozovaparadzanisa umwe kuneumweni kudai ngomuushi unoparadzanisa makwai kubva kunembudzi." 
Matthew25:33 Naye unozoisa makwai ngokumudyo kwake, asi mbudzi ngokumuoshwe kwake." 
Matthew25:34 Naapo Mambo unozoti kwavari vari ngokumudyo kwake, ‘Uyai, imwimwi mwakadakadziswa ndiBaba angu, mugare nhaka youmambo hwakanasirirwa imwimwi kubvira pakusikwa kwenyika." 
Matthew25:35 Ngokuti ndaiya ndinenzara nemwi mwakandipa kudya, ndaiya ndinenyota nemwi mwakandipa chokumwa, ndaiya ndiri mupfumba nemwi mwakandiashira," 
Matthew25:36 ndaiya ndiri mutitinini nemwi mwakandifukidza, ndairwara nemwi mwakandihambira, ndaiya mutirongo nemwi mwakauya kwendiri.’" 
Matthew25:37 Naapo vanozomupingura vakarurama vechiti, ‘Mambo, takakuona riini unenzara tikakupa kudya? Nokuti unenyota tikakupa chokumwa?" 
Matthew25:38 Takakuona riini uri mupfumba, tikakuashira? Nokuti uri mutitinini tikakufukidza?" 
Matthew25:39 Takakuona riini wechirwara nokuti uri mutirongo tikauya kwouri?’ 
Matthew25:40 NaMambo unozopingura echiti kwavari, ‘Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kudai ngezvemwakaita kuneumwe weava vadoko vanun'una vangu, mwakachiita kwendiri.’" 
Matthew25:41 Naapo unozoti kwavari vari ngokumuoshwe kwake, ‘Ibvai kwendiri, imwimwi mwakatukwa, muende mumwoto usikaperi, uwo wakanasirirwa Dhiabhorosi nengirosi dzake." 
Matthew25:42 Ngokuti ndaiya nenzara amuzi kundipa kudya, ndaiya ndine nyota amuzi kundipa chokumwa," 
Matthew25:43 ndaiya ndiri mupfumba amuzikundiashira, ndaiya ndiri mutitinini amuzikundifukidza, ndairwara, ndaiya mutirongo amuzi kundihambira.’" 
Matthew25:44 Naapozve avo navo vanozomupingura vechiti, ‘Mambo, takakuona riini unenzara, nokuti unenyota, nokuti uri mupfumba, nokuti uri mutitinini, nokuti wechirwara, nokuti uri mutirongo, nesu atizikukushandira?’" 
Matthew25:45 Naapo iye unozovapingura echiti, ‘Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kudai ngezvemusikazi kuitira kuneumwe weava vadoko vanun'una vangu, amuzi kuchiitira kwendiri.’" 
Matthew25:46 Naavo vanozoenda mukuororwa kusikaperi, asi vakarurama mukupona kusikaperi.”" 
Matthew26:1 Naapo Jesu aiya apedza eshe mazwi aya, wakati kuvadzidzi vake," 
Matthew26:2 “Munozia kuti ngesure kwemazuva mairi Phasika rinozoapo, noMukororo woMunhu unozopirwa kuti akohomerwe.”" 
Matthew26:3 Naapo vakaungana vapristi vakuru nevakuru vevanhu kungome yomupristi mukuru, uwo waidaidzwa kuti Kaiafasi." 
Matthew26:4 Navo vakaita bangano rokuti vabate Jesu ngourimbwi, vamuuraye." 
Matthew26:5 Asi vakati, “Haiwa ngemazuva omushongano wokudya, kuti isazoapo hohoho pakati pevanhu.”" 
Matthew26:6 Naapo Jesu ari muBhethani mumhatso yaSimoni uwo waiya nemapere," 
Matthew26:7 kwakauya kwaari dzimai raiya nenhera yearibhasitera yemakha anomutengo mukuru, naro rakaadurura musoro mwake, achatseama pakudya." 
Matthew26:8 Asi apo vadzidzi vake vaona, vakarurumwiswa vechiti, “Kurashanyi uku?" 
Matthew26:9 Ngokuti aya aizotengeswa ngomutengo mukuru uhinwe kuvarombo.” 
Matthew26:10 Asi Jesu echizia, wakati kwavari, “Munoritambudzirenyi dzimai? Ngokuti naro rashanda mushando wakanaka kwendiri." 
Matthew26:11 Ngokuti munavo varombo nguva dzeshe, asi inini amuneni akadi nguva dzeshe." 
Matthew26:12 Ngokuti radurura makha aya padera pomuiri wangu, raita kunasirira muiri wangu kuikwa." 
Matthew26:13 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kunyazwi ngepari perinozochumairwa vhangeri munyika dzeshe, ichiwo cheraita dzimai iri chinozoereketwa ndicho, kuita chicherechedziso kweriri.”" 
Matthew26:14 Naapo umwe wegumi navairi, unozwi Judhasi Isikarioti, wakaenda kuvapristi vakuru." 
Matthew26:15 Naye wakati kwavari, “Chiinyi chomunozondipa kuti ndikazomuhina kwomuri?” Navo vakamuerengera zvigurwa zvesirivha makumi matatu." 
Matthew26:16 Kubvira ngouwo mukuwo iye wakatsvaka nguva yokuti amupire. 
Matthew26:17 Zvinopano ngezuva rokutanga rokudya zvingwa zvisina mumera, vadzidzi vakauya kunaJesu vechiti, “Unoda kuti tikunasirire pari pokudyira Phasika?”" 
Matthew26:18 Naye wakati kwavari, “Endai muguta kunemunhu wakatikuti, mwechiti kwaari, ‘Mudzidzisi unoti nguva yangu yaapedo; ndinozodyira Phasika kumhatso yako nevadzidzi vangu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Nevadzidzi vakaita kudai ngezvaakavapanga Jesu, navo vakanasirira Phasika." 
Matthew26:20 Zvinopano apo kwaita madeekoni, wakatseama pakudya nevadzidzi varigumi navairi." 
Matthew26:21 Kwakati vachadya, wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, umwe wenyu unozondipira.”" 
Matthew26:22 Navo vakatambudzika kakurutu, vakatanga kuronza kwaari umwe ngaumwe kuti, “Ndini here, Mambo?”" 
Matthew26:23 Naye wakapingura, akati, “Uwo washeya ngenyara yake muchidziyo neni, ndiye unozondipira." 
Matthew26:24 Mukororo woMunhu unoenda kudai ngezvakanyorwa ndiye. Asi ihehe kuneuwo munhu waanozopirwa ndiye Mukororo woMunhu! Kwaizopinda kunaka kunouwo munhu dai asakabarwa.” 
Matthew26:25 NaJudhasi uwo wakamupira wakapingura, akati, “Rabhi, ndini here?” Iye wakati kwaari, “Watoronza.”" 
Matthew26:26 Vachadya, Jesu wakatora chingwa, akachibonga, akachigura; naye wakachihina kwavari echiti, “Torai, mudye; ichi chiri muiri wangu.”" 
Matthew26:27 Wakatora tsani, akaibonga, akahina kwavari echiti, “Imwai mweshe kweiri." 
Matthew26:28 Ngokuti iyi iri ngazi yangu yechitenderano, inoparadzirwa ngepamusoro pevazhinji kuita kurekererwa kwezvishaishi." 
Matthew26:29 Asi ndinoti kwomuri andichazomwi ngesure kwouku kumichero iyi yomuvhini metsa zuva rendinozorimwazve idzva muumambo hwaBaba angu.” 
Matthew26:30 Naapo vaiya vaemba ruyo, vakabuda kuenda kuMutunhu wemaOrivhi." 
Matthew26:31 Naapo Jesu wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi mweshe munozopumhuniswa ndini usiku huno; ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Ndinozorova muushi nemakwai edanga anozopararira.’" 
Matthew26:32 Asi ngesure kwokumuka kwangu ndinozoenda pamberi penyu muGarire.” 
Matthew26:33 Asi Petro wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Kunyazwi veshe vanozopumhuniswa ndiwe, inini anditongozopumhuniswi.”" 
Matthew26:34 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwouri, usiku huno, risati rarira jongwe, iwewe unozondiramba katatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Petro wakati kwaari, “Kunyazwi ndechizofa newe, anditongozokurambi.” Nevadzidzi veshe vakaronza kudaro." 
Matthew26:36 Naapo Jesu wakauya navo kundau inozwi Getsemani, akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Garai panapa imwimwi ndichaendapo kookumbira.”" 
Matthew26:37 Naye wakatora navo Petro navakororo vairi vaZebhedhi, naye wakatanga kusururika nokutambudzika kakurutu." 
Matthew26:38 Zvino wakati kwavari, “Mweya wangu unotambudzika kakurutu metsa kufa. Garai panapa, murinde neni.”" 
Matthew26:39 Naye wakaenda mberi kadodoko, akawa ngehope yake, akakumbira echiti, “Baba angu, kudai kungaitika, tsani iyi ngaibve kwendiri; asi haiwa kudai ngokuda kwangu, asi kudai ngokuda kwako.”" 
Matthew26:40 Naye wakauya kunevadzidzi vake, akavaona vakaata, akati kuna Petro, “Ndizvo mwakorera kurinda neni awa rimwe here?" 
Matthew26:41 Rindai, mwechikumbira, kuitira kuti musapinda mukuedzwa; mweya ngegwinyiso unotenda, asi nyama aina simba.”" 
Matthew26:42 Zve ngokwechipiri wakaenda echiti, “Baba angu, kudai iyi isikapindi ngokubanze kwokuti ndiimwe inini, kuda kwako ngakuitike.”" 
Matthew26:43 Wakauyazve akavaona vakaata, ngokuti madziso avo aiya echiremerwa." 
Matthew26:44 Naye wakavasiyazve, akaenda, akakumbira ngokwechitatu, echironza mazwi ndiwo ndiwo." 
Matthew26:45 Naapo wakauya kuvadzidzi, akati kwavari, “Muchakaata here zvinopano, mwechizorora? Penyai mukuwo waapasinde, noMukororo woMunhu unohinwa munyara dzevashaishi." 
Matthew26:46 Mirukai, tiende; penyai, waa pasinde uwo unondipira.”" 
Matthew26:47 Achaereketa, penya, Judhasi, umwe wevanegumi navairi, wakauya, nayo mbungano huru vaneshoti nenduku, vechibva kuvapristi vakuru nevakuru vevanhu." 
Matthew26:48 Zvinopano uwo wakamupira, waiya avapa chioniso echiti, “Uwo wendinozochingamidza ngomuromo ndiye; mwechimubata.”" 
Matthew26:49 Paripo wakauya kunaJesu, akati, “Mwauya, Rabhi”; naye wakamuchingamidza ngomuromo." 
Matthew26:50 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Hama, ita icho chewahambira kuita.” Naapo vakauya, vakamubata Jesu ngenyara dzavo, vakamutora." 
Matthew26:51 Penya umwe weavo vaiya naJesu wakatambanudza nyara yake, akashwamura shoti yake, wakatema muranda womupristi mukuru, akagura nzee yake." 
Matthew26:52 Naapo Jesu wakati kwaari, “Hwirinza shoti yako mundau mwayo; ngokuti avo veshe vanotora shoti vanozopera ngeshoti." 
Matthew26:53 Aupinimidzi here kuti ndingakumbira kunaBaba angu, naye ungatuma zvinopano ngirosi dzinopinda hondo dzirigumi nambiri ngokuwanda?" 
Matthew26:54 Asi kuti zvakadaro zvinyorwa zvingazoita mazadzisikirenyi, zvinoti kunosisira kuti zviitike kudaro?”" 
Matthew26:55 Ngeawa ririro Jesu wakati kumbungano, “Mwabuda here muneshoti nenduku kuti mundibate kudai ngevanorwa negandanga? Ndakagara nemwi mazuva eshe ndechimudzidzisa muTemperi, nemwi amuzi kundibata." 
Matthew26:56 Asi izvi zveshe zvakaitika kuti kuzadzisike izvo zvakanyorwa ngevaprofeti.” Naapo vadzidzi vake veshe vakamusiya, vakatiza." 
Matthew26:57 Naavo vaiya vamubata Jesu vakamukweya kuenda kunaKaiafasi mupristi mukuru, apo pevaiya vakaungana vanyori nevakuru." 
Matthew26:58 Asi Petro wakamuteera ari kuretu, metsa kuguma kungome yomupristi mukuru, naye wakapotera mukati, akagara pashi nevadzimbabwe kuti aone magumo azvo." 
Matthew26:59 Nevapristi vakuru nemakurukota eshe vakatsvaka chapupu chokunyepa kumuitira ndaa Jesu kuti aurawe. 
Matthew26:60 Asi avazi kuiona; kunyazwi zvizhinji zvapupu zvokunyepa zvakauya, asi avazi kuiona. Pakugumisira kwakauya zviiri zvapupu zvokunyepa." 
Matthew26:61 Avo vakati, “Uyu wakati, ‘Ndinesimba rokuputsa Temperi raMwari, nangemazuva matatu ndinozoriakazve.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Nomupristi mukuru wakamiruka, akati kwaari, “Aupinguri chiro here? Chiinyi chevanopupura ava kukuitira ndaa?”" 
Matthew26:63 Asi Jesu wakanyarara. Nomupristi mukuru wakati kwaari, “Ndinokuphikisa ndiMwari Unopona, kuti utironzere kuti uri Kristu here, Mukororo waMwari?”" 
Matthew26:64 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Watoronza; kani hai ndinoti kwomuri, ngesure kweizvi munozoona Mukororo woMunhu echigara pashi ngokumudyo kwoUnesimba, echiuya ari padera pemakore omudenga.”" 
Matthew26:65 Naapo mupristi mukuru wakabaura zvokufuka zvake echiti, “Waereketa kutuka. Tichatama ngenyi zvimweni zvapupu? Penyai zvinopano mwazwa kutuka kwake." 
Matthew26:66 Munopinimidzenyi imwimwi?” Navo vakapingura, vakati, “Unosisira kufa.”" 
Matthew26:67 Naapo vakamupfirira muhope mwake, vakamupamhadza, vakamurova ngendonga" 
Matthew26:68 vechiti, “Profeta kwetiri, iwewe Kristu, kuti ndiani wakurova?”" 
Matthew26:69 NaPetro waiya akagara pashi kubanze paruwanze; nomusikana wakauya kwaari echiti, “Iwewewo waiya naJesu weGarire.”" 
Matthew26:70 Asi iye wakaramba pamberi pavo veshe echiti, “Andizii chounoreketa.”" 
Matthew26:71 Naapo abuda kuenda muberere, musikana umweni wakamuona, akati kuneavo vaiyapo, “Uyu naye waiya naJesu weNazaretha.”" 
Matthew26:72 Zve wakaramba ngokupika mhiko kuti, “Andimuzii munhuwo.”" 
Matthew26:73 Ngesure kwekamukuwo vakauya avo vaiema apo, navo vakati kuna Petro, “Ngegwinyiso iwewe newe uri umwe wavo, ngokuti kuereketa kwako kunopangidzira kudaro.”" 
Matthew26:74 Naapo wakatanga kutuka nokupika kuti, “Anditongomuzii munhuwo.” Paripo jongwe rakarira." 
Matthew26:75 NaPetro wakakarakadza izwi raJesu, iro raakaereketa kuti, “Risati rarira jongwe, iwewe unozondiramba katatu.” Naye wakabuda kubanze, akachema kakurutu." 
Matthew27:1 Kwaedza vapristi vakuru veshe nevakuru vevanhu vakaita bangano ndiJesu kuti vamuuraye. 
Matthew27:2 Naapo vaiya vamusunga, vakamukweya kuenda naye kunaPiratu mutongi." 
Matthew27:3 Naapo Judhasi, uwo wakamupira, aona kuti Jesu wakaitirwa ndaa, wakatenderuka, akaunzazve zvigurwa zvesirivha makumi matatu kuvapristi vakuru nevakuru" 
Matthew27:4 echiti, “Ndakashaisha ngokupira ngazi isina ndaa.” Asi vakati, “Chinenyi icho kwetiri? Wechidzionera wemene.”" 
Matthew27:5 Naye wakakandira zvigurwa zvesirivha muTemperi, akaenda akadzisungira." 
Matthew27:6 Nevapristi vakuru vakatora zvigurwa zvesirivha, vakati, “Akutenderwi kuti tizviise mubhokisi remare yezvipo, kwechioneka kuti imare yengazi.”" 
Matthew27:7 Vakaita bangano, vakatenga ndizvo munda womuumbi wehari, kuti vaikemwo vapara." 
Matthew27:8 Ndizvo uwo munda unodaidzwa metsa nanyamashi kuti, Munda weNgazi." 
Matthew27:9 Naapo rakazadzisika izwi iro rakaereketwa ndiJeremia muprofeti echiti, “Navo vakatora zvigurwa zvesirivha makumi matatu, mutengo wakatenderwana ngevamweni vevana vaIsuraeri kuti vamutenge ndiwo." 
Matthew27:10 Navo vakazvipa kutenga munda womuumbi wehari, kudai ngezvaakandipanga Mambo.”" 
Matthew27:11 NaJesu wakaema pamberi pomutongi. Nomutongi wakamubvunza echiti, “Iwewe uri Mambo wevaJudha here?” Jesu wakati, “Watoronza kudaro.”" 
Matthew27:12 Naapo aitirwa ndaa ngevapristi vakuru nevakuru, aazikupingura chiro." 
Matthew27:13 Zvino Piratu wakati kwaari, “Auzvizwi here izvo zvakawanda zvevanokuitira ndaa ndizvo?”" 
Matthew27:14 Naye aazi kupingura neizwi, ngokudaro mutongi wakashamiswa kakurutu." 
Matthew27:15 Zvinopano pamushongano wokudya, mutongi waindosunhurira vanhu bhanditi rimwe, iro revaida." 
Matthew27:16 Ngouwo mukuwo vaiya nebhanditi raiya nembirikira, raizwi ndiBharabhasi." 
Matthew27:17 Ndizvo apo vakaungana pamwepo, Piratu wakati kwavari, “Munoda kuti ndimusunhurire anani, Bharabhasi nokuti Jesu unozwi Kristu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Ngokuti iye waizia kuti yaiya ndaa yendurumwa yavakamupira ndiyo. 
Matthew27:19 Apo agara pashi padendemaro rokutonga, mukadzi wake wakatumira kwaari echiti, “Usaa nechiro chounoita kunouno munhu wakarurama; ngokuti ndatambudzwa ngezvakawanda nyamashi mukurota ngendaa yake.”" 
Matthew27:20 Asi vapristi vakuru nevakuru vevanhu vakanyengerera mbungano kuti ikumbire Bharabhasi nokuuraya Jesu. 
Matthew27:21 Mutongi wakati kwavari, “Ndiani pakati paavo vairi womunoda kuti ndimusunhurire?” Navo vakati, “Bharabhasi.”" 
Matthew27:22 Piratu wakati kwavari, “Ndizvo ndinozoitenyi ndiJesu, uwo unozwi Kristu?” Veshe vakati, “Ngaakohomerwe.”" 
Matthew27:23 Naye wakati, “Ngenyi? Kushatanyi kwaakaita?” Asi avo vakapinda kudaidzira kuti, “Ngaakohomerwe.”" 
Matthew27:24 Naapo Piratu aona kuti asaikona kudetsera chiro, asi kwega kuti hohoho yaimuswa, wakatora mvura, akashamba nyara dzake pamberi pembungano echiti, “Inini andina ndaa yengazi youyu munhu. Dzionerenyi pachenyu imwimwi.”" 
Matthew27:25 Nevanhu veshe vakapingura, vakati, “Ngazi yake ngaiuye padera pedu nepadera pevana vedu.”" 
Matthew27:26 Naapo wakavasunhurira Bharabhasi. Naapo aiya ashwapura Jesu yaamho, wakamuhina kuti akohomerwe." 
Matthew27:27 Naapo majoni omutongi akatora Jesu kuenda naye mumhatso yokutongera, akaunganidza pamberi pake chikwata cheshe chemajoni." 
Matthew27:28 Nawo akamukumura, akamupfekedza gauni rakatsvukuruka." 
Matthew27:29 Naapo varuka dzungudza reminzwa, vakariisa musoro mwake, norutsanga munyara yake yokumudyo; navo vakagwadama pashi pamberi pake, vakamuitira jee vechiti, “Mwauya, Mambo wevaJudha!”" 
Matthew27:30 Navo vakamupfira mata, vakatora rutsanga vakamurova musoro." 
Matthew27:31 Naapo vaiya vamuitira jee, vakakumura gauni, vakamupfekedza zvokufuka zvake, navo vakamukweya koomukohomera." 
Matthew27:32 Naapo vachabuda kubanze vakaona munhu weKureni, zina rake raizwi Simoni; uwo wavakaangiridza kuti atware muchinjiko wake." 
Matthew27:33 Naapo vaguma kundau inozwi Gorogotha, ukwo kunoti, Ndau yeDehenya," 
Matthew27:34 vakamupa vhini rakakumanidzwa nezvinozhazha kuti arimwe. Kwakati araira, wakaramba kurimwa." 
Matthew27:35 Naapo vaiya vamukohomera, vakakoanisana zvokufuka zvake, vechiita mabhigidha." 
Matthew27:36 Navo vakagara pashi, vechimurindapo." 
Matthew27:37 Navo vakaisa padera pesoro rake mazwi endaa yake, yakanyorwa kuti, “UYU NDIJESU, MAMBO WEVAJUDHA.”" 
Matthew27:38 Naapo kwakakohomerwa naye magandanga mairi, rimwe ngokumudyo nerimweni ngokumuoshwe." 
Matthew27:39 Navo vaipinda ndipo vakamutuka, vechigudwaira masoro avo" 
Matthew27:40 vechiti, “Iwewe unoputsa Temperi nokuriaka ngamazuva matatu, dziponese. Kuti uri Mukororo waMwari, dzaka pamuchinjikopo.”" 
Matthew27:41 Ngokudarowo vapristi vakuru vakamuitira jee, pamwepo nevanyori nevakuru vevanhu vechiti," 
Matthew27:42 “Iye wakaponesa vamweni, asi aakoni kudziponesa. NdiMambo waIsuraeri, ngaadzake pashi zvinopano kubva pamuchinjiko, nesu tinozomutenda." 
Matthew27:43 Iye wakagonda kunaMwari; ngaachimununura zvinopano, kuti echimuda; ngokuti wakati, ‘Inini ndiri Mukororo waMwari.’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Nemagandanga awo akakohomerwa naye akamutukawo zvimwezvo. 
Matthew27:45 Zvinopano kubvira ngeawa rechitanhatu chaiyapo chidima padera penyika yeshe metsa kuguma awa rechipfumbamwe. 
Matthew27:46 Rooita awa rechipfumbamwe Jesu wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru echiti, “Eloi, Eloi, Lama Sabakathani?” Uko kunoti, “Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, wandisiya ngenyi?”" 
Matthew27:47 Vamweni avo vaiema apo vazwa, vakati, “Uyu unodaidza Erija.”" 
Matthew27:48 Paripo umwe wavo wakarumba wakatora siponji, wakainyika muvhini rinorungura, wakariisa parutsanga, akamuita kuti amwe." 
Matthew27:49 Asi vamweni vakati, “Murekerei, ngatione kuti Erija unouya here koomuponesa.”" 
Matthew27:50 Naapo Jesu adaidzirave ngeizwi guru, wakafa." 
Matthew27:51 Penya, jira reTemperi rakabaurwa kuita mairi, kubvira ngedera metsa kuguma pashi; nenyika yakazungunyika nemapuwe akamweka;" 
Matthew27:52 nemaiba akabeurwa nemiiri mizhinji yevakafa vakarurama yakamuswa. 
Matthew27:53 Navo vakabuda mumaiba ngesure kwekumuka kwake, vakapotera mudhorobha rakachena, vakaoneka ngevazhinji." 
Matthew27:54 Zvinopano apo nduna yezana, naavo vaiya nayo, vechirinda Jesu, vaona kuzungunyika kwenyika neizvo zvakaitika, vakatya kakurutu vechiti, “Ngegwinyiso uyu waiya Mukororo waMwari!”" 
Matthew27:55 Kwaiyapo madzimai mazhinji vairingira vari kuretu, avo vaiya vakamuteera Jesu kubva Garire, vechimushandira." 
Matthew27:56 Pakati pavo kwaiyapo Maria Magadhareni, Maria mai aJakobe naJosefa, namai evana vaZebhedhi." 
Matthew27:57 Kwooita madeekoni kwakauya gurudza reArimathia, zina raro raizwi Josefa, iro naro raiya mudzidzi waJesu." 
Matthew27:58 Iro rakaenda kunaPiratu, rikapota kupuwa muiri waJesu. Naapo Piratu wakapanga kuti riupuwe." 
Matthew27:59 Naapo Josefa aiya atora muiri uwo, wakauputira ngejira rakachena." 
Matthew27:60 Naye wakamuisa muiba idzva raiya rake, iro raiya akatsa pabuwe; naye wakamburumbudzira buwe guru pamuromo weiba akaenda." 
Matthew27:61 Kwaiyapo Maria Magadhareni naMaria umweni vakagara ngepamberi peiba. 
Matthew27:62 Nechimangwani ngesure kwezuva rokunasirira Phasika, vapristi vakuru nevaFarisi vakaungana kunaPiratu" 
Matthew27:63 vechiti, “Changamire, tinokarakadza kuti uwo muchengedzi wakati achapona, ‘Ngesure kwemazuva matatu ndinozomukazve.’" 
Matthew27:64 Ndizvo panga kuti iba rigwinyisiswe metsa kuguma zuva rechitatu, kuti vasazouya vadzidzi vake usiku, vamube nokuronza kune vanhu kuti, ‘Wakamuka kwevakafa.’ Nokuchengedza kwokugumisira kungapinda kushata kunoukwo kwokutanga.”" 
Matthew27:65 Piratu wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi munavo varindi. Endai mwechirigwinyisisa kudai ngezvomunokona.”" 
Matthew27:66 Ndizvo vakaenda, vakagwinyisisa iba, vechinamira namo pabuwe, varindi varipo navo." 
Matthew28:1 Ngesure kweSabatha, mumambakwedza ngezuva rokutanga revhiki, kwakauya Maria Magadhareni noumweni Maria koona iba." 
Matthew28:2 Penya, kwaiya kuriyo kuzungunyika kukurutu kwenyika; ngokuti ngirosi yaMambo yakadzaka kubva mudenga, yakauya yakamburumbudza ikabusa buwe, nayo yakagara padera paro." 
Matthew28:3 Kuoneka kwayo kwaiya kwakadai ngemheni, nezvokufuka zvayo zvaiya zvakachena kudai ngechando." 
Matthew28:4 Ngokuitya varindi vakahuta, vakaita kudai ngevakafa." 
Matthew28:5 Nengirosi yakati kumadzimai, “Musatya imwimwi; ngokuti ndinozia kuti munotsvaka Jesu uwo wakakohomerwa." 
Matthew28:6 Apachina panapa akadi; ngokuti wamuka, kudai ngezvaakaronza. Uyai muone pandau apo paaiya akaata." 
Matthew28:7 Kasirai muende muronzere vadzidzi vake kuti, ‘Wamuka kwevakafa, penyai, unomutangira kuenda Garire; naapo munozomuonapo! Ringirai, ndamuronzera.’ ”" 
Matthew28:8 Navo vakaenda ngokukasira vechibva paiba, vanokutya nokudakara kukurutu; vakarumba kooronzera vadzidzi vake." 
Matthew28:9 Penya, Jesu wakashongana navo, akati, “Mwauya.” Navo vakauya vakabata tsoka dzake, vakamudira." 
Matthew28:10 Naapo Jesu wakati kwavari, “Musatya; endai mwooronzera vanun'una vangu kuti vaende Garire, vanozondionapo.”" 
Matthew28:11 Naapo vachaenda, penya vamweni vevarindi vakauya kudhorobha, vakaronzera vapristi vakuru zveshe izvo zvakaitika." 
Matthew28:12 Naapo vakaungana pamwepo nevakuru vevanhu, apo vaiya vapangana, vakahina mare yakawanda kumajoni" 
Matthew28:13 vechiti, “Ronzai imwimwi kuti vadzidzi vake vakauya nousiku, vakamuba takaata." 
Matthew28:14 Kudai izvi zvikanyazwika ngomutongi, tinozonasirisa kuti musaa nendaa.”" 
Matthew28:15 Navo vakatora mare iyo, vakaita kudai ngezvevakapangwa, neizwi iri rakashumirwa pakati pevaJudha metsa nanyamashi." 
Matthew28:16 Nevadzidzi gumi naumwe vakaenda muGarire, pamutunhu apo paakavaronzera Jesu." 
Matthew28:17 Naapo vamuona vakamudira. Asi vamweni vakagononda. 
Matthew28:18 NaJesu wakauya kwavari, akaereketa kwavari echiti, “Simba reshe rakapuwa kwendiri mudenga nomunyika." 
Matthew28:19 Ndizvo endai, mwechiita vadzidzi kumadzinza eshe, mwechivabhabhatidza ngezina raBaba neroMukororo neroMweya Wakachena," 
Matthew28:20 mwechivadzidzisa kungwarira zviro zveshe zvendakamupanga; penyai, ndinemwi mazuva eshe metsa kuguma kwenyika.”" 
Mark1:1 Kutanga kwevhangeri raJesu Kristu, Mukororo waMwari." 
Mark1:2 Kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa munaIsaya muprofeti, “Ringirai, ndinotuma munyai wangu pamberi pehope yako, uwo unozonasirira njira yako." 
Mark1:3 Izwi rounodaidzira mushango kuti, ‘Nasirirai njira yaMambo, ruramisai makwara ake.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Wakauya Johani uwo waibhabhatidza mushango, echichumaira rubhabhatidzo rwokutenderuka kwokurekererwa zvishaishi." 
Mark1:5 Vakabuda kuenda kwaari venyika yeshe yeJudhia, navo veshe veJerusarema; navo vakabhabhatidzwa ndiye murwizi rweJorodhani, vechitenda zvishaishi zvavo." 
Mark1:6 NaJohani waiya akafuka jira remamviri engamera anebhande redoo muchiunu chake, naye wakadya ndongwe neuchi womushango." 
Mark1:7 Naye wakachumaira echiti, “Iye unouya sure kwangu unesimba kupinda inini, andisisiri kuti nditsikitsire ndisunhure rusinga rwemagwada ake." 
Mark1:8 Inini ndakamubhabhatidza mumvura; asi iye unozomubhabhatidza ndiMweya Wakachena.” 
Mark1:9 Ngemazuva awo, Jesu wakabva Nazaretha reGarire, akabhabhatidzwa ndiJohani muJorodhani." 
Mark1:10 Paripo achabuda kubva mumvura wakaona denga rechibeurwa, noMweya wechidzaka padera pake kudai ngenjia" 
Mark1:11 neizwi rechibva mudenga rechiti, “Iwewe ndiwe Mukororo wangu unodikanwa, uwo wendinonasa kudakara ndiye.”" 
Mark1:12 Paripo Mweya wakamusundira mushango. 
Mark1:13 Waiyamwo mushango mazuva makumi marongomuna, echiedzwa ndiSathani, naye waiya pamwepo nezvikara zvomushango, nengirosi dzakamushandira." 
Mark1:14 Ngesure kwokusungwa kwaJohani, Jesu wakauya muGarire echichumaira vhangeri raMwari" 
Mark1:15 echiti, “Nguva yasvika noumambo hwaMwari hwaapasinde; tenderukai, mutende vhangeri.”" 
Mark1:16 Echipinda ngepasinde peruandhle rweGarire, wakaona Simoni naAndreu munun'una waSimoni vechikandira nhaa muruandhle; ngokuti vaiya vabati vehove." 
Mark1:17 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Nditeerei neni ndinozomuita vabati vevanhu.”" 
Mark1:18 Paripo vakasiya nhaa dzavo vakamuteera. 
Mark1:19 Echipinda mberi pafupi, wakaona Jakobe mukororo waZebhedhi naJohani munun'una wake, vaiya mungarava vechinasirisa nhaa dzavo." 
Mark1:20 Paripo wakavadaidza; vakasiya baba avo Zebhedhi nevaranda vari mungarava, navo vakamuteera." 
Mark1:21 Vakahamba kuenda muKhapernaume, paripo ngezuva reSabatha wakapotera mumhatso yokudira akadzidzisa." 
Mark1:22 Vakashamiswa ngokudzidzisa kwake, ngokuti wakavadzidzisa kudai ngounesimba asikaiti kudai ngevanyori." 
Mark1:23 Paripo waiyapo munhu mumhatso yavo yokudira, waiya nomweya une tsvina," 
Mark1:24 naye wakadaidzira echiti, “Tinenyi isusu newe, Jesu weNazaretha? Wauya kutiparadza here? Ndinokuzia kuti urianani, uri Wakachena waMwari.”" 
Mark1:25 Jesu wakamukaraidza echiti, “Nyarara, buda kubva kwaari.”" 
Mark1:26 Nomweya unetsvina wakamusukumidza, ukaboorera ngeizwi guru, ukabuda kubva mwaari." 
Mark1:27 Navo veshe vakashamiswa, ngokudaro vakabvunzisana vechiti, “Chiinyi ichi? Kudzidzisa kutsva kunesimba! Unopanga kunyazwi mweya inetsvina, nayo inomupurutana.”" 
Mark1:28 Paripo mbiri yake yakapararira kunyika dzeshe dzakatendenedza Garire. 
Mark1:29 Paripo abuda kubva mumhatso yokudira, wakapotera mumhatso yaSimoni naAndreu, pamwepo naJakobe naJohani." 
Mark1:30 Ambuya vaSimoni vaiya vakaata vechirwara ngemutsarara, paripo vakamuronzera ndivo." 
Mark1:31 Naye wakauya kwavari, akavabata ngenyara, akavamirudza; nemutsarara wakavasiya, navo vakavashandira." 
Mark1:32 Madeekoni zuva rabira vakaunza kwaari veshe vairwara nevaiya nemadhimoni. 
Mark1:33 Nevedhorobha reshe vakaungana pamusiwo. 
Mark1:34 Naye wakaponesa vazhinji vairwara ngenhenda dzakaparadzana, akadzinga madhimoni mazhinji, asikatenderi kuti madhimoni aerekete, ngokuti aimuzia." 
Mark1:35 Mumangwanani maishi wakamiruka, akabuda akaenda pandau iri yega, akakumbira aripo." 
Mark1:36 Simoni naavo vaiya naye vakateera vechimutsvaka yaamho. 
Mark1:37 Vakamuona, vakati kwaari, “Veshe vanokutsvaka.”" 
Mark1:38 Wakati kwavari, “Ngatiende kumaguta amweni, kuti ndimbochumairazve iyoyo, ngokuti ngezvandakauyira.”" 
Mark1:39 Wakahamba echichumaira mumhatso dzavo dzokudira muGarire mweshe, echidzinga madhimoni." 
Mark1:40 Wakauya kwaari munhu waiya nemapere, akamugwadamira, echimupota echiti kwaari, “Kudai wechida ungandimhodyosa.”" 
Mark1:41 Naye wakamuzwira urombo, wakatambanudza nyara yake, akamubata akati kwaari, “Ndinoda, mhodyoswa.”" 
Mark1:42 Paripo mapere akabva kwaari, naye wakamhodyoswa." 
Mark1:43 Wakamupangirisa, akamuendesa paripo," 
Mark1:44 akati kwaari, “Ngwara kuti usazoronzera munhu ngeizvi; asi enda, udzipangidzire kunemupristi, uhine ngendaa yokumhodyoswa kwako izvo zvaakaemesa Mosi, kuita chapupu kwavari.”" 
Mark1:45 Asi iye wakabuda, akatanga kuchumaira kakurutu nokuereketa ngeizvi, ngokudaro Jesu waiya asikachakoni kupotera mudhorobha pamhene, asi waiya kubanze pandau iri yega; navo vakauya kwaari kubva kumarutii eshe." 
Mark2:1 Naapo aiya apoterazve muKhapernaume ngesure kwemazuva akatikuti, kwakashumwa kuti uri mumhatso." 
Mark2:2 Vazhinji vakaungana pamwepo, ngokudaro pakatamika nendau kunyazwi nepamusiwo; naye wakachumaira izwi kwevari." 
Mark2:3 Navo vakaguma kwaari, vakaunza kwaari munhu wakaoma muiri, akatwarwa ngevarongomuna." 
Mark2:4 Vechikorera kukwedzera kwaari ngendaa yembungano, vakabweshura denga ngepaaiyapo; naapo vabeura, vakadzasa musengere apo paiata uwo wairwara ngokuoma muiri." 
Mark2:5 Jesu echiona kutenda kwavo, wakati kuneuwo wakaoma muiri, “Mukororo, zvishaishi zvako zvarekererwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Asi vaiyapo vanyori vamweni vakagara, vechidzibvunza mumwoyo yavo vechiti," 
Mark2:7 “Uyu unoereketa kudai ngenyi? Unotuka Mwari! Ndiani unokona kurekerera munhu zvishaishi asi Mwari ega?” 
Mark2:8 Paripo Jesu, echizia mumweya wake kuti vaidzibvunza zvakadaro mukati mwavo, wakati kwavari, “Munodzibvunza ngenyi ngeizvi mumwoyo yenyu?" 
Mark2:9 Chiinyi chakapinda kureruka, kuronza kunouwo unorwara ngokuoma muiri kuti, ‘Zvishaishi zvako zvarekererwa,’ nokuti kuronza kuti, ‘Miruka, utore manhi ako, uhambe?’" 
Mark2:10 Asi kuti muzie kuti Mukororo woMunhu unesimba munyika rokurekerera zvishaishi,” wakati kuneuwo unorwara ngokuoma muiri," 
Mark2:11 “Ndinoti kwouri, miruka, utore manhi ako, uende kumhatso yako.”" 
Mark2:12 Naye wakamiruka, paripo akatora manhi ake, akabuda kubanze pamberi pavo veshe; ngokudaro veshe vakashamiswa kakurutu, vakamuirikidza Mwari vechiti, “Atisati taona zvakadai!”" 
Mark2:13 Naye wakabuda kuendazve kuruandhle; yeshe mbungano yakauya kwaari, naye wakaidzidzisa." 
Mark2:14 Echipinda wakaona Revhi mukororo waArifeusi akagara panothererwa chibharo naye wakati kwaari, “Nditeere.” Naye wakamiruka, akamuteera." 
Mark2:15 Kwakaitika kuti apo akagara pakudya mumhatso mwake, vatheresi vazhinji nevashaishi vakagara pashi naJesu nevadzidzi vake; ngokuti vaiya vazhinji vaimuteera." 
Mark2:16 Vanyori vevaFarisi, vechiona kuti waidya nevashaishi nevatheresi, vakati kunevadzidzi vake, “Ngenyi echidya nevatheresi nevashaishi?”" 
Mark2:17 Naapo Jesu azwa, wakati kwavari, “Avatami n'anga avo vakagwinya, asi avo vanorwara; andizi kuuya kudaidza vanhu vakarurama, asi vashaishi.”" 
Mark2:18 Vadzidzi vaJohani nevaFarisi vaiya vechiera kudya; navo vakauya vakati kwaari, “Ngenyi vadzidzi vaJohani nevadzidzi vevaFarisi vechiera kudya, asi vadzidzi vako avaeri?”" 
Mark2:19 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Vanaye nyamuroora vanoera here kudya mukwambo achinavo? Mukuwo wevanaye mukwambo, avazokoni kuera kudya." 
Mark2:20 Asi mazuva anozouya, apo mukwambo unozoduswa kubva kwavari, naapo vanozoera kudya ngeiro zuva." 
Mark2:21 Apana munhu unotungira chitembwe chitsva padera pejira rakatsakara; kuti zvakadaro, ichi chitsva chakatungirwa apo chinozobaurisa jira rakatsakara, nokubauka kwakapinda kushata kunozoitika." 
Mark2:22 Akuna munhu unoisa vhini idzva munyede dzevhini dzakatsakara; kuti zvakadaro, vhini rinozoputisa nyede, nevhini rinozorashika pamwepo nenyede; asi vhini idzva rinoiswa munyede itsva.”" 
Mark2:23 Ngezuva reSabatha rimweni, echihamba ngepakati peminda yekoroni, vadzidzi vake vakatanga kupurura mitsonzoti yekoroni vechihamba." 
Mark2:24 VaFarisi vakati kwaari, “Ringira, vanoita ngenyi ngezuva reSabatha icho chisikatenderwi?”" 
Mark2:25 Wakati kwavari, “Amuzi kumbodzidza here icho chaakaita Dhavhidha, apo aitama, afukama, iye naavo vaiya naye;" 
Mark2:26 kuti wakapotera mumhatso yaMwari ngemazuva aAbhiathari mupristi mukuru, akadya zvingwa zvikapirwa, izvo zvisikatenderwi kudyiwa, asi ngevapristi vega, akahinazve kwavari avo vaiya naye?”" 
Mark2:27 Wakati kwavari, “Sabatha rakaitirwa vanhu, vanhu avazi kuitirwa Sabatha." 
Mark2:28 Ndizvo Mukororo woMunhu ndiMambo weSabatha.” 
Mark3:1 Wakapoterazve mumhatso yokudira, kwaiyapo munhu waiya nenyara yakaputa." 
Mark3:2 Navo vakamuringisisa, kuona kuti unozomuponesa here ngezuva reSabatha, kuti vamuparise ndaa." 
Mark3:3 Naye wakati kunemunhu uwo waiya nenyara yakaputa, “Uyai pano.”" 
Mark3:4 Wakati kwavari, “Chiinyi chinotenderwa ngeSabatha, kuita zvakanaka nokuti zvakashata, kuponesa munhu nokuti kuuraya?” Asi vakanyarara." 
Mark3:5 Naapo aiya avaringisisa ngoushungu, echisvipa mwoyo ngokukonza kwomwoyo yavo, wakati kumunhuwo, “Tambanudza nyara yako.” Naye wakaitambanudza. Nenyara yake yakaponeswa." 
Mark3:6 VaFarisi vakabuda, paripo vakapangana nevekwaHerodhi, kuti vangamuita maurairenyi." 
Mark3:7 Jesu wakabvapo nevadzidzi vake, akaenda kuruandhle, nembungano huru yakabva Garire yakamuteera; neyaibvawo Judhia," 
Mark3:8 Jerusarema, Idhumia, neyaibva ruseri rweJorodhani, nevanotendenedza Thire neSidhoni, mbungano huru yechizwa ngezviro zvikuru zvaakaita, yakauya kwaari." 
Mark3:9 Naye wakaronza kuvadzidzi vake kuti ngarava doko ngaimugarire ngendaa yembungano, kuti isazomutsikirira;" 
Mark3:10 ngokuti waiya akarapa vazhinji, veshe avo vaiya nenhenda vakamutsikirira kuti vamubate." 
Mark3:11 Nomweya inetsvina apo yamuona, yakawa pamberi pake, ikaboorera yechiti, “Iwewe uri Mukororo waMwari.”" 
Mark3:12 Naye wakaikaraidza kakurutu kuti isazoita kuti aziikanwe. 
Mark3:13 Wakakwira mumutunhu, akadaidza kwaari avo vaaida, navo vakauya kwaari." 
Mark3:14 Wakaemesa vanegumi navairi kuti vagare naye nokuvatuma koochumaira 
Mark3:15 nokuvapa simba rokudzinga madhimoni. 
Mark3:16 Wakadudza Simoni kuti Petro; 
Mark3:17 wakadudza Jakobe naJohani munun'una wake vakororo vaZebhedhi kuti Bhoanegesi, kuronza kuti, Vakororo voKutinhira;" 
Mark3:18 Andreu, Firipi, Bhatoromeu, Mateu, Thomasi, Jakobe, mukororo waArifeusi, Thadheusi, Simoni muKhenani" 
Mark3:19 naJudhasi Isikarioti, uwo wakamupira." 
Mark3:20 Zvino wakapotera mumhatso; nembungano yakaunganazve, ngokudaro vakakorera nokudya chingwa." 
Mark3:21 Naapo hama dzake dzazwa, dzakabuda kuuya koomubata, ngokuti vakati, “Unohahamuka.”" 
Mark3:22 Nevanyori avo vakadzaka kubva Jerusarema vakati, “Una Bheerizebhuri, naye ngesimba romuzvare wemadhimoni unodzinga madhimoni.”" 
Mark3:23 Naye wakavadaidza kwaari, akaereketa kwavari ngemiedzaniso akati, “Sathani ungaita marashirenyi Sathani?" 
Mark3:24 Kudai umambo hwechidziparadza ngekwawo, uwo umambo ahungakoni kuema." 
Mark3:25 Nokudai mhatso ikadziparadza ngekwayo, iyo mhatso aingakoni kuema." 
Mark3:26 Kudai Sathani echidzimukira, echidziparadza, aangakoni kuema, asi unozogumirwa." 
Mark3:27 Asi apana munhu ungakona kupotera mumhatso youwo unesimba, nokuparadza nhumbi dzake, kuti asikazi kutanga kusunga uwo unesimba; naapo unozoparadza mhatso yake." 
Mark3:28 “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, zvishaishi zveshe nokutuka kweshe kwevanozotuka ndikwo zvinozorekererwa kuvakororo vevanhu." 
Mark3:29 Asi kunyazwi ndiani unozotuka Mweya Wakachena, aazorekererwi, asi unendaa yechishaishi chemhera nariini.”" 
Mark3:30 Ngokuti ivo vakati, “Une mweya unetsvina.”" 
Mark3:31 Kwakauya mai ake nevanun'una vake, vechiema ngokubanze, vakatumira kwaari kumudaidza." 
Mark3:32 Nembungano yaiya yakagara naye, yakati kwaari, “Ringira, mai ako nevanun'una vako vari kubanze vanokutsvaka.”" 
Mark3:33 Naye wakavapingura akati, “Ndiani mai angu nevanun'una vangu?”" 
Mark3:34 Echiringira kuneavo vaiya vakagara vakamutendenedza, wakati, “Ringirai mai angu nevanun'una vangu!" 
Mark3:35 Kunyazwi ndiani unozoita kuda kwaMwari uwo ndiye munun'una wangu, mukunda namai.”" 
Mark4:1 Wakatanga kudzidzisazve ari pahumbikumbi yoruandhle. Nembungano hurutu yaamho yakaungana kwaari, ngokudaro wakapotera mungarava, akagara muruandhle; mbungano yeshe yaiya pahumbikumbi pasinde poruandhle." 
Mark4:2 Wakavadzidzisa zvakawanda ngemiedzaniso, mukudzidzisa kwake wakati kwavari," 
Mark4:3 “Purutanai! Mukushi wakabuda kookusha. 
Mark4:4 Kwakaitika mukukusha kwake, kuti dzimweni mbeu dzakawa panjira, neshiri dzakauya dzakadzidya." 
Mark4:5 Nedzimweni dzakawa pandau inetsanza, apo paiya pasina mavhu akawanda, paripo dzakamera, ngokuti paiya pasina mavhu akadzama." 
Mark4:6 Kwakati zuva rabuda, dzakatsva ngokuti dzaiya dzisina nzinde, dzakaputa." 
Mark4:7 Nedzimweni dzakawa pakati peminzwa, neminzwa yakakura, yakadzidzipa, nadzo adzizi kubereka michero." 
Mark4:8 Nedzimweni dzakawa pamavhu akanaka, dzakabereka michero dzechikura, dzechiwanda, dzakabereka dzimweni makumi matatu, dzimweni makumi matanhatu, dzimweni zana.”" 
Mark4:9 Naye wakati, “Iye unenzee dzokuzwa ngaazwe.”" 
Mark4:10 Naapo ari ega, avo vaiya naye nevanegumi navairi vakamubvunza ngendaa yemiedzaniso." 
Mark4:11 Wakati kwavari, “Kwakapuwa kwomuri kuzwisisa zvakafishika zvoumambo hwaMwari, asi kwavari avo vari kubanze zveshe zvinoitwa ngemiedzaniso," 
Mark4:12 kuti vechiona vangaona vasikaonesesi, vechizwa vangazwa vasikazwisisi, kuti pamweni vangatenderuka, nokushaisha kurekererwe kwavari.”" 
Mark4:13 Wakati kwavari, “Amuzii uyu muedzaniso here? Munozoita maziirenyi miedzaniso yeshe?" 
Mark4:14 Mukushi unokusha izwi. 
Mark4:15 Ava ndivo vakawa munjira, apo panokushwa izwi; naapo vazwa, paripo unouya Sathani nokudusa izwi iro rakushwa mukati mwavo." 
Mark4:16 Ava ngokudaro ndivo vakakushwa mutsanza, apo vazwa izwi, paripo vanoriashira ngokudakara," 
Mark4:17 navo avana nzinde mukati mwavo, asi vanoangirira kwenguva doko; asi apo kwaguma kutambudzwa nokuti kushononeswa ngendaa yeizwi, paripo vanopumhunwa." 
Mark4:18 Naavo vakakushwa pakati peminzwa, ndivo vanozwa izwi," 
Mark4:19 nokudembatemba kuri munyika, nokuchengedzerwa ngoupfumi, nokuemura kwezviro zvinhani, zvechipotera zvinodzipa izwi, naro aribereki michero." 
Mark4:20 Naavo vakakushwa pamavhu akanaka ndivo vanorizwa izwi, vanoriashira, vanobereka michero, vamweni makumi matatu, vamweni makumi matanhatu nevamweni zana.”" 
Mark4:21 Naye wakati kwavari, “Chibani chinounzwa here kuti chiiswe pashi pechitundu nokuti pashi pomubhedhi, chisikaiswi pachigadzikiro pacho?" 
Mark4:22 Ngokuti apana chiro chakafishika, chisikazooneswi pamhene; apanazve chiro chakahwara, chisikazobudiswi pakujeka." 
Mark4:23 Uwo unenzee dzokuzwa ngaazwe.” 
Mark4:24 Naye wakati kwavari, “Ngwarai izvo zvomunozwa; chipimo chomunopima ndicho vamweni nemwi muchapimwawo ndicho, nakwo kunozotutsirwa kwomuri kwakapinda kukura." 
Mark4:25 Ngokuti kwaari unacho, kunozopuwa kwaari, nokwaari usina, nechaatori nacho chinozobviswa kwaari.”" 
Mark4:26 Naye wakati, “Umambo hwaMwari hwakadai ngomunhu unokusha mbeu mumavhu," 
Mark4:27 naye unoata nokumuka usiku namasikati, nembeu dzinomera, dzechikura iye asikazii njira yedzinomera ndiyo." 
Mark4:28 Mavhu anoita ngekwawo, kuti mbeu dzikure kutanga muningwi, kwoteera mutsonzoti, zvino zviyo zvaibva pamutsonzoti." 
Mark4:29 Naapo zviyo zvaibva paripo unotuma vane sikeyo, ngokuti kukukura kwaguma.”" 
Mark4:30 Wakati, “Tinozouedzanisa nenyi umambo hwaMwari? Nokuti ngouri muedzaniso wetingauendzanisa ndiwo?" 
Mark4:31 Hwakadai ngetsangu yomustadhi iyo apo yakushwa mumavhu iri doko kunadzo dzeshe mbeu dzakasimwa munyika; 
Mark4:32 asi apo yakushwa inomera yechiita huru kupinda mapfiba eshe, inobudisa matai makuru, ngokudaro shiri dzomudenga dzinoaka zvisaki zvadzo mukati mwemumvuri wematai awo.”" 
Mark4:33 Ngemiedzaniso yakawanda kudaro wakaereketa izwi kwavari, kudai ngezvevaikona kurizwa;" 
Mark4:34 azi kuereketa kwavari pasina muedzaniso, asi ari ega nevadzidzi vake wakavadudzira zveshe." 
Mark4:35 Ngeiro zuva, apo kwaita madeekoni, wakati kwavari, “Ngatiambuke ruseri.”" 
Mark4:36 Vechisiya mbungano, vakaenda naye mungarava. Nengarava dzimweni dzaiyapo dzakaendawo naye." 
Mark4:37 Kwakaguma mubvumo mukuru wedutu, nemafungu akachaya kupotera mungarava, ngokudaro aiya ooda kuzadza ngarava." 
Mark4:38 Asi iye waiya ngesure mungarava, akaata akaisa soro rake pamutsamiro; navo vakamumusa, vakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, aubatiki tisu here, tofa?”" 
Mark4:39 Naye wakamuka akakaraidza dutu, akati kuneruandhle, “Terama kuti chowee.” Nedutu rakaterama, kwaiyapo kunyarara kukurutu." 
Mark4:40 Wakati kwavari, “Munotya ngenyi? Amusati mwagonda here?”" 
Mark4:41 Navo vakatya kakurutu, vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ndizvo uyu ndiani, kuti dutu noruandhle zvinomupurutana?”" 
Mark5:1 Vakaguma ruseri rworuandhle, munyika yeGerasa." 
Mark5:2 Apo echibuda kubva mungarava, paripo munhu unemweya wakashata wakashongana naye, echibva mumaiba." 
Mark5:3 Uwo waigara mumaiba; kwaiya kusina munhu waikona kuchamusunga, kunyazwi ngemaketani;" 
Mark5:4 ngokuti kazhinji waisungwa ngemanguri nemaketani, asi waidambura maketani nokugura manguri. Kwaiya kusina munhu waikona kumunyisa." 
Mark5:5 Nguva dzeshe masikati nousiku waigara mumaiba nomumitunhu echiiboorera, echidzicheka ngemapuwe." 
Mark5:6 Naye aona Jesu achikuretu, wakarumba kwaari akamugwadamira;" 
Mark5:7 naye echiboorera ngeizwi guru wakati, “Ndinenyi newe, Jesu, Mukororo waMwari Uripadera pazveshe? Ndinokuphikisa ndiMwari, kuti usanditambudza.”" 
Mark5:8 Ngokuti iye waiya ati kwaari, “Buda kubva kumunhuwo, iwewe mweya wakashata.”" 
Mark5:9 Jesu wakamubvunza kuti, “Zina rako ndiani?” Nawo wakapingura ukati kwaari, “Ndini Hondo zina rangu, ngokuti tiri vazhinji.”" 
Mark5:10 Nawo wakamupota kakurutu kuti asazoiendesa kubva kuneiyo nyika. 
Mark5:11 Zvinopano kwaiyapo pamutunhu mutanga mukuru wenguruve dzechifura; 
Mark5:12 nayo yakamupota yechiti, “Titumirei munguruve; kuti tipotere kwedziri.”" 
Mark5:13 Naye wakaitendera. Nomweya yakashata yakabuda ikapotera munguruve, nomutanga weshe wakarumba kudzaka ngepamakaha, kupotera muruandhle, dzaida kuguma makumi emazana mairi, nadzo dzakanzvaira muruandhle." 
Mark5:14 Vaushi vadzo vakatiza, vakazvironzera mudhorobha nomunharaunda. Nevanhu vakauya koona kuti chiinyi chakaitika." 
Mark5:15 Vakauya kunaJesu, vakaona uwo waiya nemadhimoni akagara, asimira, aamunhu kwaye, iye uwo waiya nehondo, navo vakatya." 
Mark5:16 Naapo vakazviona, vakatsanangura izvo zvakaitika kwaari uwo waiya nemadhimoni nendaa yenguruve." 
Mark5:17 Vakatanga kumupota kuti abve mumigano yavo. 
Mark5:18 Naapo achapinda mungarava, uwo waiya nemadhimoni wakamupota kuti aende naye." 
Mark5:19 Asi aazi kumutendera, wakati kwaari, “Enda kanyi kwako kuhama dzako, uvaronzere kukura kwezvaakakuitira Mambo, nenjira yaakakuitira nyasha ndiyo.”" 
Mark5:20 Naye wakaenda, akatanga kuchumaira muDhekaporisi ngokukura kwezvaakaitirwa ndiJesu; veshe vakashamiswa." 
Mark5:21 Naapo Jesu aambukazve ruseri ngengarava, mbungano huru yakaungana kwaari, naye waiya pasinde poruandhle." 
Mark5:22 Naapo pakauya umwe wevatongi vemhatso yokudira zina rake raizwi Jairosi, amuona, wakadzikandira patsoka dzake," 
Mark5:23 akamupota kakurutu echiti, “Mwanasikana wangu mudoko waapasinde pokufa. Ndinokupota kuti uuye, uise nyara dzako padera pake, kuti aponeswe ararame.”" 
Mark5:24 Iye wakaenda naye. Nembungano huru yakamuteera, nayo yakamutsikirira." 
Mark5:25 Nedzimai raibuda ngazi makore gumi namairi," 
Mark5:26 rakatambudzika ngenjira dzakawanda ngen'anga zhinji, naro rakapedza zveshe zveraiya nazvo, naro arizi kudetserwa ngechiro, asi rakaangira yaamho kurwara." 
Mark5:27 Iro rechizwa ngendaa yaJesu, rakaguma pakati pembungano ngesure kwake naro rakabata gauni rake." 
Mark5:28 Ngokuti rakati, “Kudai ndikabata kunyazwi gauni rake ndinozoponeswa.”" 
Mark5:29 Paripo ngazi yaro yakaema kubuda; naro rakazwa mumuiri mwaro kuti raponeswa nhenda yaro. 
Mark5:30 Paripo Jesu, echizia mukati mwake kuti simba raiya rabuda kubva kwaari, wakakunukukira pakati pembungano, akati, “Ndiani wabata gauni rangu?”" 
Mark5:31 Vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari, “Unoona kuti mbungano inokutsikirira, newe unoti, ‘Ndiani wandibata?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Naye wakaringaringa kuti aone uwo waiya aita ichi. 
Mark5:33 Asi dzimai rechitya nokuhuta, rechizia icho chaiya chaitika kweriri, rakauya, rikawa pashi pamberi pake, naro rakamuronzera gwinyiso reshe." 
Mark5:34 Wakati kweriri, “Mukunda, kutenda kwako kwakuponesa, enda ngokunyarara, uponeswe nhenda yako.”" 
Mark5:35 Achaereketa, vakaguma vaibva kumhatso yomutongi vechiti, “Mwanasikana wako watofa. Uchamuneserenyi Mudzidzisi?”" 
Mark5:36 Asi asikavapurutani Jesu azwa izwi iro rakaereketwa, wakati kune mutongi wemhatso yokudira, “Usatya, gonda kwega.”" 
Mark5:37 Naye aazi kutendera munhu naumwe kuti amuteere kwega Petro, Jakobe naJohani, munun'una waJakobe." 
Mark5:38 Naapo aguma mumhatso yomutongi wemhatso yokudira, wakaona nyongano, nevaichema nokubonda kakurutu." 
Mark5:39 Apotera, wakati kwavari, “Munoita nyongano nokuchema ngenyi? Mwana aazi kufa akadi, asi wakaata.”" 
Mark5:40 Navo vakamusheka. Asi iye wakavabudisa veshe kubanze, wakatora baba vemwana namai, naavo vaiya naye, akapotera pandau paiya nemwana." 
Mark5:41 Echibata nyara yemwana wakati kwaari, “Tarita Kumi,” ukwo kunoti, “Chisikana, ndinoti kwouri, Muka.”" 
Mark5:42 Paripo chisikana chakamuka, chakahamba; ngokuti chaiya chaane makore gumi namairi. Paripo vakashamiswa kakurutu." 
Mark5:43 Naye wakavapangisisa kuti zvisazoziikanwa ngomunhu naumwe. Naye wakavaronzera kuti vachipe zvokudya. 
Mark6:1 Wakabuda kubvapo, akaguma munyika yekwake, nevadzidzi vake vakamuteera." 
Mark6:2 Naapo Sabatha raguma wakatanga kudzidzisa mumhatso yokudira, nevazhinji vechimuzwa vakashamiswa. Vakati, “Munhu uyu wakazviona pari zveshe izvi? Kungwaranyi kwakapuwa kuneuyu munhu? Mishamiso yakakura yakadai inoitwa ngenyara dzake!" 
Mark6:3 Uyu andiyepi here mutsetsi, mukororo waMaria, mukoma waJakobe, Josesi, Judha naSimoni? Nevakunda vake avari pano nesu here?” Navo vakapumhunwa ndiye." 
Mark6:4 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Muprofeti aarekerwi kuremeredzwa, asi kwega munyika yake nokuhama dzake nomumhatso yake.”" 
Mark6:5 Naye aazi kukona kuitapo mishando ine simba, asi wakaisa nyara dzake padera pevanhu vashomani vairwara, akavaponesa." 
Mark6:6 Wakashamiswa ngokusikatenda kwavo. Naye wakahamba pakati pemaguta avo echidzidzisa. 
Mark6:7 Wakadaidza kwaari vane gumi nevairi, akatanga kuvatuma vairi vairi, naye wakavapa simba rokukurira mweya yakashata." 
Mark6:8 Akavapanga kuti vasazotora chiro parwendo rwavo, asi mudondoro wega; vasatora chingwa nokuti nyede nokuti mare muzvikwama zvavo;" 
Mark6:9 asi kuti vapfeke magwada, vasazopfekazve mabhachi mairi." 
Mark6:10 Wakati kwavari, “Kunyazwi ngepari pomunopotera mumhatso, garaipo metsa mubvepo." 
Mark6:11 Kunyazwi ngeiri ndau yomusikazoashirwi nokuti kupurutanwa, mwoobvapo zuwai bukuta pashi petsoka dzenyu kuti riite chapupu kwavari.”" 
Mark6:12 Vakabuda, vakachumaira kuti vanhu vatenderuke." 
Mark6:13 Vakadusa madhimoni mazhinji, vakadzodza mafuta vazhinji vairwara, vakavaponesa." 
Mark6:14 Mambo Herodhi wakazvizwa, ngokuti zina raJesu raiya rateketeswa. Vaiti, “Johani Mubhabhatidzi wamuka kwevakafa, ndizvo mishando iyi ine simba inoshandwa ndiye.”" 
Mark6:15 Asi vamweni vakati, “NdiErija.” Nevamweni vakati, “Muprofeti wakadai ngoumwe wevaprofeti vekaretu.”" 
Mark6:16 Asi Herodhi azwa wakati, “NdiJohani, uwo wendakagura soro inini, wamukazve.”" 
Mark6:17 Ngokuti uyu Herodhi waiya akatuma kumubata Johani nokumusunga mutirongo, ngepamusoro paHerodhiasi mukadzi waFiripu munun'una wake, ngokuti iye waiya amutora." 
Mark6:18 Ngokuti Johani waiya akati kunaHerodhi, “Akutenderwi kwouri kuti utore mukadzi womunun'una wako.”" 
Mark6:19 NaHerodhiasi waiya akamuzonda, akadisisa kumuuraya, asi wakakorera." 
Mark6:20 Herodhi waimutya Johani, echizia kuti waiya munhu wakarurama, wakacheneswa, wakamungwarira. Apo amuzwa, wakatambudzika kakurutu, asi wakamuzwa ngokudakara." 
Mark6:21 Asi raguma zuva rakanaka, apo Herodhi ngezuva rokubarwa kwake wakaitira dhiri nhunge dzake nenduna dzake nevakuru veGarire." 
Mark6:22 Mwanasikana waHerodhiasi wakapotera akazvina, akamudakadza yaamho Herodhi naavo vaitseama naye pakudya; namambo wakati kunemusikana, “Kumbira kwendiri kunyazwi chiinyi chounoda, neni ndinozokupa.”" 
Mark6:23 Naye wakapika kwaari kuti, “Kunyazwi chiinyi chounozokumbira kwendiri ndinozochipa kwouri, kunyazwi rupande rwoumambo hwangu.”" 
Mark6:24 Wakabuda, akati kunamai ake, “Ndokumbirenyi?” Naye wakati, “Soro raJohani Mubhabhatidzi.”" 
Mark6:25 Paripo wakapotera kunamambo ngokukasira, akarikumbira akati, “Ndinoda kuti mundipe zvinopano mundiro soro raJohani Mubhabhatidzi.”" 
Mark6:26 Namambo wakasvipa mwoyo kakurutu; asi ngendaa yemhiko dzake nendaa yeavo vaitseama naye pakudya, aazi kuda kumurambira."
