Mark6:27 Paripo mambo wakatuma umwe wevarindi vake, akapanga kuti riunzwe soro raJohani. Naye wakaenda akagura soro rake ari mutirongo," 
Mark6:28 wakaunza soro rake riri mundiro, akapa musikana, nomusikana wakaripa kunamai ake." 
Mark6:29 Naapo vazwa vadzidzi vake vakauya, vakatora muiri wake, vakauisa muiba." 
Mark6:30 Navapostori vakaungana kunaJesu, vakashuma kwaari zveshe zvevakaita nezvevaiya vadzidzisa." 
Mark6:31 Naye wakati kwavari, “Uyai imwimwi muri mwega pandau iri yega, mumbozorora padoko.” Ngokuti vazhinji vaiuya nokuenda, navo vaiya vasina nenguva yokudya." 
Mark6:32 Navo vakaenda ngengarava kundau iri yega vari vega. 
Mark6:33 Nevanhu vazhinji vakavaona vechienda, vakavazia, vakarumba ngetsoka vechibva kumadhorobha eshe, navo vakavatangira kuguma." 
Mark6:34 Abuda wakaona mbungano huru, wakakurudzwa ngepamusoro payo, ngokuti yaiya yakadai ngemakwai asina muushi; naye wakatanga kuidzidzisa zviro zvizhinji." 
Mark6:35 Naapo zuva rooda kubira, vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari vechiti, “Panapa indau iri yega nezuva rotoda kubira." 
Mark6:36 Vaendese munharaunda nomumizi, vadzitengere zvokudya.”" 
Mark6:37 Asi iye wakavapingura akati kwavari, “Vapei imwimwi vadye.” Navo vakati kwaari, “Tinozoenda here isusu tivatengere zvingwa zvezvigurwa zvesirivha mazana mairi, tivape kuti vadye?”" 
Mark6:38 Asi iye wakati kwavari, “Munezvingwa zvinganai? Endai muone.” Naapo vazvizia vakati, “Zvishanu nehove mbiri.”" 
Mark6:39 Wakavapanga kuti veshe vagare pashi ngezvikwata zvikwata padera pemwenje muishi. 
Mark6:40 Navo vakagara pashi ngezvikwata zvemazana nezvemakumi mashanu. 
Mark6:41 Echitora zvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri, wakaringira mudenga, akazvibonga. Wakagura zvingwa, akazvipa kuvadzidzi kuti vaise pamberi pavo; nehove mbiri akadzikoanisira veshe." 
Mark6:42 Navo veshe vakadya, vakaguta." 
Mark6:43 Vakatonhera matsekeneswa akazara zvitundu gumi nazviiri ezvingwa nehove. 
Mark6:44 Avo vakadya zvingwa vaiya vamuna makumi emazana mashanu. 
Mark6:45 Paripo wakaangiridza vadzidzi vake kuti vapotere mungarava nokutungamira kuenda ruseri rweBhethisaidha, iye emene echiendesa mbungano." 
Mark6:46 Naapo avavhaisa wakaenda pamutunhu kookumbira. 
Mark6:47 Kwoita madeekoni, ngarava yaiya pakati poruandhle, naye waiya ega panyika." 
Mark6:48 Echivaona vechitambudzika ngokuhluza ngarava, ngokuti dutu raiya rechipesana navo, kwaa kuda kuita murindo wechina wousiku, iye wakaguma kwavari echihamba padera poruandhle. Waida kuvapinda," 
Mark6:49 asi apo vechimuona echihamba ngepadera poruandhle, vakakarakadza kuti raiya dzimudzangara, navo vakaboorera;" 
Mark6:50 ngokuti vakamuona veshe, vakatyiswa. Asi paripo iye wakaereketa kwavari echiti, “Shingai, ndini, musatya.”" 
Mark6:51 Naye wakakwira kwavari mungarava nedutu rakaterama. Navo vakashamiswa kakurutu mukati mwavo," 
Mark6:52 ngokuti avazi kuzwisisa ngendaa yezvingwa, ngokuti mwoyo yavo yaiya yakakonziswa." 
Mark6:53 Apo vaambuka ruseri vakaguma kunyika yeGenesareta, navo vakasungira ngarava pahumbikumbi." 
Mark6:54 Naapo vabuda kubva mungarava, paripo vanhu veyo vakamuzia," 
Mark6:55 navo vakarumba nharaunda yeshe, vakatanga kutwara ngemisengere avo vairwara, kuvaisa apo pevakazwa kuti ndipo paari." 
Mark6:56 Kunyazwi ngepari paakapotera mumizi nokuti mumadhorobha nokuti munyika, vakavaradzika vairwara pamusika, vakamupota kuti vabate kunyazwi mupendero wegauni rake; naavo veshe vakamubata vakaponeswa." 
Mark7:1 VaFarisi nevamweni vevanyori vakabva Jerusarema vakaungana kwaari. 
Mark7:2 Vakaona kuti vamweni vevadzidzi vake vaidya chingwa ngenyara dzine tsvina, ukwo kunoti dzisikazi kushambwa." 
Mark7:3 (Ngokuti vaFarisi nevaJudha veshe avadyi vasikazi kunasa kushamba kakurutu nyara dzavo, vechibatirira mitoo yemadzibabamukuru;" 
Mark7:4 naapo vabva kumusika, avadyi vasikazikushamba; neimweni mitoo mizhinji iripo yevakaashira kuingwarira, kudai ngokusuka tsani nehari nendiro dzethusi.)" 
Mark7:5 VaFarisi nevanyori vakamubvunza vechiti, “Vadzidzi vako avateeri ngenyi mitoo yemadzibabamukuru, asi vanodya chingwa ngenyara dzine tsvina?”" 
Mark7:6 Wakati kwavari, “Isaya wakanasa kuprofeta ndimwi, imwimwi vadziitisi, kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa kuti, “ ‘Ava vanhu vanondiremeredza ngemiromo yavo, asi mwoyo yavo iri kuretu neni;" 
Mark7:7 asi vanotera kundidira, vechidzidzisa tsika dzevanhu kudai ngezvidzidzo kwazvo.’" 
Mark7:8 “Munorekera mipango yaMwari, mwechibatirira mitoo yevanhu.”" 
Mark7:9 Wakati kwavari, “Munoramba yaamho mipango yaMwari, kuti mubatirire tsika dzenyu!" 
Mark7:10 Ngokuti Mosi wakati, ‘Remeredza baba ako namai ako,’ zve, ‘Naye unotuka baba kunyazwi mai ngegwinyiso ngaafe mukufa.’" 
Mark7:11 Asi imwimwi munoti, ‘Kudai munhu echiti kunababa ake nokuti kunamai ake, icho chewaida kuuyirwa ndicho kwendiri chiri Korbhani,’ (ukwo kunoti, ‘Chakapirwa kunaMwari.’)" 
Mark7:12 Ngokudaro amuchamutenderi kuti aitire chiro kunababa nokuti mai. 
Mark7:13 Ngokudaro munoita kuti izwi raMwari riite risina shwiro ngendaa yemitoo yenyu yemwakaashidzana. Nezvimweni zvizhinji zvakadaro zvomunoita.” 
Mark7:14 Wakadaidzazve mbungano kwaari akati kweiri, “Ndizwenyi, imwimwi mweshe, muzwisise;" 
Mark7:15 apana chiro chinobva ngokubanze kwomunhu chechipotera mukati mwake chingamusvipisa, asi izvo zviro zvinobva mukati mwomunhu ndizvo zvinomusvipisa.” [" 
Mark7:16 “Iye unenzee dzokuzwa ngaazwe.”] 
Mark7:17 Apo apotera mumhatso, abva kunembungano, vadzidzi vake vakamubvunza ngomuedzaniso uyu." 
Mark7:18 Naye wakati kwavari, “Nemwiwo amuna kuzwisisa here? Amuoni here kuti kunyazwi chiinyi chinobva ngokubanze chechipotera mumunhu achingakoni kumusvipisa," 
Mark7:19 ngokuti achipoteri mumwoyo mwake, asi mundani mwake, chechibudiswa mushango?” (Ngokudaro kunocheneswa kudya kweshe.)" 
Mark7:20 Wakati, “Icho chinobuda kubva kumunhu ndicho chinomusvipisa." 
Mark7:21 Ngokuti mukati mumwoyo yevanhu kunobuda mikarakadzo yakashata, kuhura, kuba, kuuraya," 
Mark7:22 kuomba, mbau, matsambo, kuchengedzera, kuemura, kutuka, kudzikudza, upenzi." 
Mark7:23 Zveshe izvi zviro zvakashata zvinobuda kubva ngomukati, ndizvo zvinosvipisa munhu.”" 
Mark7:24 Wakamiruka kubvapo, akaenda kumigano yeThire neSidhoni. Wakapotera mumhatso, asaida kuti aziikanwe ngomunhu; asi aazi kukona kuti afishike." 
Mark7:25 Paripo dzimai raiya nemwanasikana waro mudoko waiya nomweya wakashata, razwa ndiye, rakaguma rikawira patsoka dzake." 
Mark7:26 Asi dzimai iro raiya muGiriki, ngokubarwa raiya muSurofoenikia. Naro rakamupota kuti aduse dhimoni kubva kumwanasikana waro." 
Mark7:27 Iye wakati kweriri, “Vana ngavagutiswe kutanga, ngokuti akuzi kunaka kutora chingwa chevana kuchikandira kumatuhwa embwa.”" 
Mark7:28 Asi rakapingura, rikati kwaari, “Eya, Mambo; matuhwa embwa anodya pashi petafura matsekeneswa evana.”" 
Mark7:29 Wakati kweriri, “Ngendaa yeizwi iri, enda; dhimoni rabuda kubva kumwanasikana wako.”" 
Mark7:30 Rakaenda kumhatso yaro, rakaona mwana akaradzikwa pamubhedhu, nedhimoni raiya rabuda kubva kwaari." 
Mark7:31 Jesu wakabudazve kubva kumigano yeThire, wakahamba ngepakati peSidhoni metsa kuguma kuruandhle rweGarire, kupotya pakati pemiganu yeDhekaporisi." 
Mark7:32 Vakaunza kwaari umwe waiya dziiranzee raiya mbeveve, navo vakamupota kuti aise nyara yake padera paro." 
Mark7:33 Wakaritora riri rega kubva pakati pembungano, wakaisa zvinwe zvake munzee dzaro, wakapfira mata, akagwama rurumi rwaro." 
Mark7:34 Echiringira mudenga, wakaita mahwema, akati kweriri, “Efata,” ukwo kunoti, “Beuka.”" 
Mark7:35 Apapo nenzee dzaro dzakabeurwa, nemusungo worurumi rwaro wakasunhuka, naro rakaereketa zvinozwika." 
Mark7:36 Iye wakavapanga kuti vasazoronzera munhu; asi echinyanya kuvapanga, vakanyanyisawo kuzviteketesa." 
Mark7:37 Navo vakashamiswa kunopinda binzo vechiti, “Iye wakaita zveshe kuti zvinake; unoita kuti nedziiranzee rizwe nechimbungumbungu kuti chierekete.”" 
Mark8:1 Ngemazuva awo kwaiyapozve mbungano huru, yaiya isina chokudya; iye wakadaidza vadzidzi akati kwavari," 
Mark8:2 “Ndinosvipa mwoyo ngendaa yembungano, ngokuti yakagara neni zvinopano mazuva matatu, isina chokudya." 
Mark8:3 Kuti ndikavaendesa kumakanyi kwavo vasati vadya, vanozofukama munjira, nevamweni vavo vanobva kuretu.”" 
Mark8:4 Nevadzidzi vake vakamupingura vakati, “Munhu ungazviona pari zvingwa kuti agutse ava vanhu muno mushango?”" 
Mark8:5 Naye wakavabvunza akati, “Munezvingwa zvinganai?” Vakati, “Zvinomwe.”" 
Mark8:6 Wakapanga mbungano kuti igare pashi; akatora zvingwa zvinomwe, akabonga, akazvigura akazvipa kuvadzidzi vake kuti vazviise pamberi pevanhu, navo vakazvipa kumbungano." 
Mark8:7 Navo vaiya nehove doko shomani; abonga wakapanga kuti dziiswewo pamberi pavo. 
Mark8:8 Navo vakadya, vakaguta; navo vakatonhera matsekeneswa ezvakasara akaita zvitundu zvinomwe." 
Mark8:9 Vaiya vaida kukwana makumi marongomuna emazana. Naye wakavaendesa. 
Mark8:10 Paripo wakapotera mungarava nevadzidzi vake, wakaenda kunharaunda yeDharamanuta." 
Mark8:11 VaFarisi vakauya kunaJesu, vakatanga kuphikisana naye, vechitsvaka kwaari chioniso chinobva mudenga, vechimuedza." 
Mark8:12 Naye wakaita mahwema makuru mumweya wake, akati, “Uyu mubarirwana unotsvaka ngenyi chioniso? Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, mubarirwana uyu auzopuwi chioniso.”" 
Mark8:13 Wakavasiya, akapoterazve mungarava, akaambuka ruseri." 
Mark8:14 Vadzidzi vaiya variarwa kutora zvingwa, vaiya nechingwa chimwe chega mungarava." 
Mark8:15 Naye wakavapanga echiti, “Penyai, ngwarai mumera wevaFarisi nomumera waHerodhi.”" 
Mark8:16 Vakapangana pakati pavo vechiti, “Ngokuti atina zvingwa.”" 
Mark8:17 Jesu echizia wakati kwavari, “Munopangana ngenyi, ngokuti amuna zvingwa? Amusati mwazia nokuti kuzwisisa here? Mwoyo yenyu ichakandokonza here?" 
Mark8:18 Munemadziso musikaoni here, munenzee musikazwi here? Amucherechedzi here?" 
Mark8:19 Naapo zvendakagurira vanhu makumi emazana mashanu zvingwa zvishanu, mwakazadza zvitundu zvinganai ngematsekeneswa?” Vakati kwaari, “Gumi nezviiri.”" 
Mark8:20 “Naapo zvingwa zvinomwe zvakagurirwa kuvanhu makumi emazana marongomuna, mwakazadza zvitundu zvinganai ngematsekeneswa?” Vakati kwaari, “Zvinomwe.”" 
Mark8:21 Naye wakati kwavari, “Amusati mwazwisisa here?”" 
Mark8:22 Vakaguma muBhethisaidha. Vakaunza kwaari bofu, navo vakamupota kuti aribate." 
Mark8:23 Naye wakaribata ngenyara, akaribudisa kubanze kwedhorobha; naapo apfira mata mumadziso aro, wakaisa nyara dzake padera paro, akaribvunza kuti, “Unoona chiro here?”" 
Mark8:24 Naro rakaringira rikati, “Ndinoona vanhu, asi ndinovaona vechihamba vakadai ngemiti.”" 
Mark8:25 Wakaisazve nyara dzake padera pemadziso aro; naro rakaringisisa, rakapembenudzwa, rikaona zviro zveshe pamhene." 
Mark8:26 Wakariendesa kanyi kwaro echiti, “Usapoterazve mumizi.”" 
Mark8:27 Jesu nevadzidzi vake vakaenda vakapotera mumizi yeSizaria Firipi; vachimunjira wakabvunza vadzidzi vake echiti kwavari, “Vanhu vanoti, inini ndirianani?”" 
Mark8:28 Navo vakamuronzera vechiti, “Johani Mubhabhatidzi, nevamweni vanoti, Erija, nevamweni vanoti, Uri umwe wevaprofeti.”" 
Mark8:29 Naye wakavabvunza, “Imwimwi munoti ndirianani?” Petro wakapingura akati kwaari, “Iwewe uri Kristu.”" 
Mark8:30 Naye wakavapangisisa kuti vasaronzera munhu ndiye. 
Mark8:31 Wakatanga kuvadzidzisa echiti, “Kunosisira kuti Mukororo woMunhu atambudzike ngezvakawanda nokurambwa ngevakuru nevapristi vakuru nevanyori, aurawe, ngesure kwemazuva matatu amukezve.”" 
Mark8:32 Wakaereketa izwi iri pamhene, Petro wakamutora, akatanga kumurambidza." 
Mark8:33 Asi iye echikunukuka, echiona vadzidzi vake, wakakaraidza Petro akati, “Ibva uende sure kwangu, Sathani. Ngokuti aunyeri ngezvaMwari, asi ngeizvo zvevanhu.”" 
Mark8:34 Naapo adaidzira kwaari mbungano pamwepo nevadzidzi vake, wakati kwavari, “Kunyazwi ndiani unoda kuuya sure kwangu, ngaadzirambe atore muchinjiko wake, anditeere." 
Mark8:35 Ngokuti kunyazwi ndiani unoda kuponesa ndaramo yake unozorashikirwa ndiyo, nouwo unozorashikirwa ngendaramo yake ngendaa yangu neyevhangeri, unozoiponesa." 
Mark8:36 Ngokuti munhu unozouyirwa ngenyi, kudai echiuyirwa ngenyika yeshe, arashe ndaramo yake?" 
Mark8:37 Ngokuti munhu ungaita mutenganiso wenyi nendaramo yake? 
Mark8:38 Ngokuti kunyazwi ndiani unozotsveruka ndini nemazwi angu kuneuyu mubarirwana unoomba nounoshaisha, Mukororo woMunhu unozotsverukawo ndiye apo oozouya muuthende hwaBaba ake, pamwepo nengirosi dzake dzakachena.”" 
Mark9:1 Wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, varipo vamweni veavo vanoema panapa, vasikazozwi kufa metsa vaone umambo hwaMwari hwechiuya unesimba.”" 
Mark9:2 Ngesure kwemazuva matanhatu Jesu wakatora Petro, Jakobe naJohani, akakwira navo padera pomutunhu wakareba, vari vega. Naye wakatsandudzwa pamberi pavo," 
Mark9:3 nezvokufuka zvake zvakan'anikira zvikachena kuti mbeembee, ngokudaro akuna musuki munyika ungaita kuti zvichene kudaro." 
Mark9:4 Kwakaoneka kwavari Erija naMosi, vechiereketa naJesu." 
Mark9:5 NaPetro wakati kunaJesu, “Rabhi, zvakanaka kuti tindoapanapa; ngatitoita zvitumba zvitatu, chimwe chako, chimweni chaMosi nechimweni chaErija.”" 
Mark9:6 Ngokuti iye waiya asikachazii kuti ungaereketenyi, ngokuti vakakarudzwa nokutyiswa kakurutu." 
Mark9:7 Kwakauya gore rikavathibikira, izwi rakazwika rechibva mugore rechiti, “Uyu ndiye Mukororo wangu unodikanwa; muzwenyi.”" 
Mark9:8 Paripo vechiringaringa avazi kuona munhu, kwega Jesu navo." 
Mark9:9 Vachadzaka kubva pamutunhu, wakavapangirisisa kuti vasazoronzera munhu izvo zvevaiya vaona, metsa Mukororo woMunhu azomukazve kubva kwevakafa." 
Mark9:10 Navo vakaringwarira izwi iro, veibvunzisana pakati pavo kuti chiinyi kumuka kwevakafa." 
Mark9:11 Vakamubvunza vechiti, “Ngenyi vanyori vanoti kunosisira kuti Erija atange kuuya?”" 
Mark9:12 Wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso Erija unotanga kuuya, kuti amusidzire zveshe. Asi ngenyi zvakanyorwa zvichiti, ‘Mukororo woMunhu unosisira kuti atambudzike ngezviro zvakawanda nokurambwa?’" 
Mark9:13 Asi inini ndinoti kwomuri, Erija wakatouya, navo vakaita kwaari zvevakada, kudai ngezvakanyorwa ngendaa yake.”" 
Mark9:14 Naapo vaguma kunevadzidzi, vakaona mbungano huru yechivaunganira nevanyori vechivabvunza." 
Mark9:15 Paripo mbungano yeshe yamuona yakashamiswa kakurutu, yakarumba kuuya kwaari, ikamuchingamidza." 
Mark9:16 Wakavabvunza kuti, “Chiinyi chomunobvunza kwavari?”" 
Mark9:17 Umwe wembungano wakamupingura akati, “Mudzidzisi, ndaunza mwana wangu kwouri, unemweya wakashata naye aakoni kuereketa." 
Mark9:18 Naapo wamubata, unomuposhera pashi; naye unobudisa mafuro, mazino echikwetsana, echioma muiri; neni ndakumbira vadzidzi vako kuti vaudzinge, asi avazi kukona.”" 
Mark9:19 Naye wakapingura, akati kwavari, “A! Mubarirwana usikatendi, ndinozogara nemwi nguva yakadini? Ndinozotsengerera mukuwo wakaitawani? Muunzenyi kwendiri.”" 
Mark9:20 Vakamuunza kwaari; naapo mweya wakashata waona Jesu, paripo mweya wakasukumidza murumbwana kakurutu, naye wakawa pashi pamavhu, akaburukuta echibudisa mafuro." 
Mark9:21 Wakabvunza baba ake kuti, “Mukuwo wakaitawani wechiita kudai kwaari?” Navo vakati, “Kubvira pauhwana hwake." 
Mark9:22 Nemikuwo mizhinji wakamukandira mumuriro nomumvura kuti umuuraye; asi kudai unesimba rokuita chiro, tiitire nyasha, utidetsere.”" 
Mark9:23 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Kudai unesimba! Zviro zveshe zvingaitika kwaari unotenda.”" 
Mark9:24 Paripo baba vemwana vakadaidzira vakati, “Ndinotenda; detsera kusikatendi kwangu!”" 
Mark9:25 Jesu aona kuti mbungano yairumba kuuya pamwepo, wakakaraidza mweya wakashata echiti kwouri, “Iwewe mweya wembeveve newedziiranzee, ndinokupanga kuti ubude kubva mwaari, usachazopoterazve mwaari.”" 
Mark9:26 Nawo wechiboorera, wakamukandira pashi ngesimba gurutu, wakabuda kubva mwaari. Nomurumbwana uwo wakaita kudai ngewatofa, ngokudaro vazhinji vavo vakati, “Watofa.”" 
Mark9:27 Asi Jesu wakamubata ngenyara, akamumirudza, naye wakamiruka." 
Mark9:28 Naapo apotera mumhatso, vadzidzi vake vakamubvunza vari vega vechiti, “Isusu atizi kukona ngenyi kuudzinga?”" 
Mark9:29 Wakati kwavari, “Urwu rudzi arungabudi ngechiro chimweni kwega asi ngokukumbira.”" 
Mark9:30 Vakabvapo vakahamba ngemuGarire, iye aazi kuda kuti munhu azie ichi." 
Mark9:31 Ngokuti waidzidzisa vadzidzi vake, echiti kwevari, “Mukororo woMunhu unozohinwa munyara dzavanhu, navo vanozomuuraya; naapo aurawa, ngesure kwemazuva matatu unozomuka.”" 
Mark9:32 Asi avazi kuzwisisa izwi iro, vakatya nokumubvunza." 
Mark9:33 Vakaguma Khapernaume; apo aamumhatso wakavabvunza kuti, “Chiinyi chemwaiphikisana ndicho munjira?”" 
Mark9:34 Navo vakanyarara, ngokuti vaiya vechiphikisana munjira kuti ndiani mukuru." 
Mark9:35 Naapo agara pashi, wakadaidza kwaari vanegumi navairi, akati kwavari, “Kunyazwi ndiani unoda kuita wokutanga ngaaite chigumisirwa kwavari veshe nomuranda wavo veshe.”" 
Mark9:36 Naye wakatora mwana mudoko, akamuemesa pakati pavo; amutengura munyara dzake, wakati kwavari," 
Mark9:37 “Kunyazwi ndiani unozoashira umwe weava vadoko wakadai ngezina rangu, unondiashira inini; nouwo unondiashira inini, aandiashiri inini asi uwo wakandituma.”" 
Mark9:38 Johani wakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, takaona umwe echirasha madhimoni ngezina rako, nesu takamurambidza ngokuti waiya asikatiteeri.”" 
Mark9:39 Asi Jesu wakati, “Musamurambidza; ngokuti akuna munhu ungaita mushando mukuru ngezina rangu, ungakona paripo kuereketa zvakashata ndini." 
Mark9:40 Ngokuti uwo usikarwi nesu unotirwira isusu. 
Mark9:41 Kunyazwi ndiani unozomupa tsani yemvura yokumwa, ngepamusoro pokuti muri vaKristu, ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri aazorashikirwi ngomusharo wake." 
Mark9:42 “Kunyazwi ndiani unozoita kuti umwe weava vadoko vanonditenda ashaishe, kunopinda kunaka kwaari kuti guyo guru risungirwe muhuro mwake aposherwe muruandhle." 
Mark9:43 Kudai nyara yako yechikupumhunisa, igure, ngokuti kwakapinda kunaka kwouri kuti upotere mukupona uri chirema, kunekuti unenyara mbiri upotere muGehena, mumuriro usikadzimi, [" 
Mark9:44 apo peisikafi honye yavo, nepasikadzimi muriro.]" 
Mark9:45 Kudai tsoka yako yechikupumhunisa, igure; ngokuti kwakapinda kunaka kwouri kuti upotere mukupona wechikumhina kunekuti unetsoka mbiri ukandirwe muGehena, [" 
Mark9:46 apo peisikafi honye yavo, pasikadzimi muriro.]" 
Mark9:47 Kudai dziso rako rechikupumhunisa, ribvite; ngokuti kwakapinda kunaka kwouri kuti upotere muumambo hwaMwari unedziso rimwe, kunekuti unemadziso mairi ukandirwe muGehena," 
Mark9:48 apo peisikafi honye yavo, pasikadzimi muriro." 
Mark9:49 Ngokuti munhu weshe unozorungwa ngomuriro. 
Mark9:50 Munyu wakanaka; asi kuti munyu warasha kunaka kwawo, unozorungwa ngenyi? Garai munemunyu mukati mwenyu, mugarisane zvakanaka umwe noumweni.”" 
Mark10:1 Wakabvapo akaenda kunyika yeJudhia noruseri rweJorodhani. Mbungano yakaunganazve kwaari; kudai ngokuita kwake, wakavadzidzisazve." 
Mark10:2 VaFarisi vakauya kwaari, vakamubvunza vechimuedza vechiti, “Kunotenderwa here kuti mwamuna arashe mukadzi wake?”" 
Mark10:3 Wakapingura akati kwavari, “Chiinyi chaakapanga Mosi kwomuri?”" 
Mark10:4 Navo vakati, “Mosi wakatenda kuti kunyorwe tsamba yokumuramba nokuparadzana naye.”" 
Mark10:5 Asi Jesu wakati kwavari, “Ngendaa yokukonza kwomwoyo yenyu iye wakamunyorera uyu mupango." 
Mark10:6 Asi kubvira pakutanga kwokusikwa, ‘Mwari wakavasika mwamuna nomukadzi.’" 
Mark10:7 ‘Ngeiyi ndaa mwamuna unozosiya baba ake namai, abatirire kumukadzi wake," 
Mark10:8 navo vairi vanozoita nyama imwe.’ Ngokudaro avachaiti vairi, asi nyama imwe." 
Mark10:9 Ndizvo chaakasunganidza Mwari, munhu asazosunhura.”" 
Mark10:10 Vaa mumhatso vadzidzi vake vakamubvunzazve ngeiyi ndaa. 
Mark10:11 Wakati kwavari, “Iye unozorasha mukadzi wake, aroore umweni, unoomba echishaishira mukadzi wake." 
Mark10:12 Kunyazwi mukadzi naye akarasha mwamuna wake, akaroorwa ngoumweni, unoomba.”" 
Mark10:13 Vaiunza vana vadoko kwaari kuti avabate; asi vadzidzi vakavarambidza. 
Mark10:14 Asi Jesu echiona wakashishwa akati kwavari, “Tenderai vana vadoko vauye kwendiri, musavarambidza; ngokuti umambo hwaMwari ngehwevakadai ngeava." 
Mark10:15 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, iye usikaashiri umambo hwaMwari kudai ngemwana mudoko aatongozopoteri mwouri.”" 
Mark10:16 Naye wakavatengura, akavafumisa, echiisa nyara dzake padera pavo." 
Mark10:17 Naapo Jesu echitanga rwendo rwake, kwakarumba umwe echiuya kwaari, akamugwadamira, akamubvunza kuti, “Mudzidzisi wakanaka, chiinyi chendingaita kuti ndigare nhaka yokupona kusikaperi?”" 
Mark10:18 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Unondidaidza ngenyi kuti, Wakanaka? Akuna wakanaka, asi umwe ega Mwari." 
Mark10:19 Unozia mipango inoti: ‘Usauraya, usaomba, usaba, usaita chapupu chokunyepa, usachengedzera munhu, remeredza baba ako namai ako.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Wakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, izvi zveshe ndakazvingwarira kubvira muudoko hwangu.”" 
Mark10:21 Jesu echimuringira wakamuda, akati kwaari, “Chiro chimwe chinotamika kwouri; enda utengese zvounazvo, upe kuvarombo, newe unozoa nepfuma kudenga; uuye, unditeere.”" 
Mark10:22 Iye wakatambudzika ngeizwi iro, akaenda echisvipa mwoyo, ngokuti waiya nepfuma zhinji." 
Mark10:23 Jesu aringaringa wakati kuvadzidzi vake, “A, kukonzanyi kwavari avo vanoupfumi kupotera muumambo hwaMwari!”" 
Mark10:24 Vadzidzi vakashamiswa ngemazwi ake. Asi Jesu wakapingurazve, akati kwavari, “Vana, kwakakonza kupotera muumambo hwaMwari!" 
Mark10:25 Kwakapinda kureruka kuti ngamera ripotere ngepauri renaiti kune kuti mupfumi apotere muumambo hwaMwari.” 
Mark10:26 Vakashamiswa kupinda binzo, vechiti pakati pavo, “Ndiani zvinopano ungaponeswa?”" 
Mark10:27 NaJesu echivaringira wakati, “Kuvanhu azvingaitiki, asi haiwa kunaMwari, ngokuti zviro zveshe zvinoitika kunaMwari.”" 
Mark10:28 Petro wakatanga kuti kwaari, “Penya, isusu takasiya zveshe tikakuteera.”" 
Mark10:29 Jesu wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, akuna munhu wakasiya mhatso nokuti vanun'una nokuti vakunda nekuti mai nokuti baba nokuti vana nokuti minda ngepamusoro pangu nepevhangeri," 
Mark10:30 usikazoashiri zana rakapetwa zvinopano ngenguva iyi, mhatso, vanun'una, vakunda, madzimai, vana neminda, pamwepo nokushononeswa, nepanguva inozouya unozoashira kurarama kusikaperi." 
Mark10:31 Asi vazhinji vokutanga vanozoita vokugumisira, naapo vokugumisira vanozoita vokutanga.”" 
Mark10:32 Vaiya munjira, vechikwira kuenda Jerusarema, naJesu waihamba pamberi pavo; vakashamiswa, naavo vakamuteera vakatya. Naye wakatorazve vanegumi navairi, wakatanga kuvaronzera zvinozomugumira" 
Mark10:33 echiti, “Penyai, tinokwira Jerusarema, noMukororo woMunhu unozopirwa kuvapristi vakuru nevanyori, navo vanozomutongera rufu, vanozomupira kunevemadzinza;" 
Mark10:34 navo vanozomuitira jee nokumupfira nokumurova nokumuuraya; ngesure kwemazuva matatu unozomukazve.” 
Mark10:35 Jakobe naJohani, vakororo vaZebhedhi, vakakwedzera kwaari vechiti kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, tinoda kuti utiitire kunyazwi chiinyi chetinozokumbira.”" 
Mark10:36 Wakati kwavari, “Munoda kuti ndimuitirenyi?”" 
Mark10:37 Navo vakati kwaari, “Titendere isusu kuti tigare umwe ngokumudyo kwako noumweni ngokumuoshwe kwako muuthende hwako.”" 
Mark10:38 Asi Jesu wakati kwavari, “Amuzii chomunokumbira. Munesimba here rokumwa tsani yendinomwa nokuti kubhabhatidzwa ngorubhabhatidzo rwendinobhabhatidzwa ndirwo?”" 
Mark10:39 Navo vakati kwaari, “Tinokona.” NaJesu wakati kwavari, “Tsani yendinomwa munozoimwawo, norubhabhatidzo rwendinobhabhatidzwa ndirwo munozobhabhatidzwa ndirwo;" 
Mark10:40 asi kugara ngokumudyo kwangu nokumuoshwe kwangu andinipi ndinopa, asi ngekwaavo vakakunasirirwa.”" 
Mark10:41 Naapo vanegumi vazwa, vakatanga kushishirwa Jakobe naJohani." 
Mark10:42 Naapo Jesu avadaidza kwaari wakati kwavari, “Munozia kuti avo vanosisira kutonga vemadzinza vanesimba padera pavo. Nevakuru vavo vanesimba padera pavo." 
Mark10:43 Asi akuzodaropi kwomuri; asi kunyazwi ndiani uwo unoda kuita mukuru kwomuri ngaaite mushandiri wenyu," 
Mark10:44 nouwo unoda kudziita wokutanga pakati penyu ngaaite hloko yavo veshe. 
Mark10:45 Ngokuti noMukororo woMunhu aazi kuuya kushandirwa, asi kushandira, nokupa kupona kwake kuti kuite muripo wevazhinji.”" 
Mark10:46 Vakaguma muJerikho; naapo echibva muJerikho nevadzidzi vake nembungano huru, Bhathimeusi, mukororo waThimeusi, bofu, mupemhi, waiya akagara ngepamhiri penjira." 
Mark10:47 Echizwa kuti ndiJesu weNazaretha, wakatanga kuboorera echiti, “Jesu Mukororo waDhavhidha, ndiitire nyasha!”" 
Mark10:48 Vazhinji vakamukaraidza kuti anyarare, asi iye wakapindisisa kuboorera kakurutu echiti, “Mukororo waDhavhidha, ndiitire nyasha!”" 
Mark10:49 Naapo Jesu wakaema akati, “Mudaidzenyi.” Vakadaidza bofu, vechiti kweriri “Tsunga; miruka, unokudaidza.”" 
Mark10:50 Naro rechirasha jira raro rakatomukira mudenga, rakaguma kunaJesu." 
Mark10:51 Jesu wakaribvunza, akati, “Chiinyi chounoda kuti ndikuitire?” Nebofu rakati kwaari, “Rabhoni, kuti ndione.”" 
Mark10:52 Jesu wakati kweriri, “Enda; kutenda kwako kwakuponesa.” Paripo rakaona rakamuteera munjira." 
Mark11:1 Naapo vakwedzera Jerusarema, kuBhethifaje nokuBhethani, paMutunhu wemaOrivhi, wakatuma vairi vevadzidzi vake," 
Mark11:2 wakati kwavari, “Endai muguta remwakaringirana naro, naapo muchapotera kweriri, paripo munozoona tsiru rembongoro rakasungwa, iro risikazi kumbogadhwa ngomunhu; risunhurenyi muuye naro." 
Mark11:3 Kudai munhu echizoti kwomuri, ‘Munorisunhurirenyi?’ Munozoti, ‘Mambo unorida, paripo unozoripetudzazve panapa.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Navo vakaenda, vakaona tsiru rembongoro rakasungwa pasinde pomusiwo ngokubanze mupato, navo vakarisunhura." 
Mark11:5 Vamweni vaiya vakaema apo vakati kwavari, “Munoitenyi, mwechisunhura tsiru rembongoro?”" 
Mark11:6 Vakaronza kwavari kudai ngezvaakaronza Jesu; navo vakavatendera. 
Mark11:7 Vakaunza tsiru rembongoro kunaJesu, vakakandira machira avo padera paro, naye wakagara padera paro." 
Mark11:8 Vanhu vazhinji vakachinga machira avo munjira, nevamweni matai evakatema mushango." 
Mark11:9 Avo vaihamba ngepamberi naavo vaiteera ngesure vakadaidzira vechiti, “Hosana! Unomuchena uwo unouya ngezina raMambo!" 
Mark11:10 Unomuchena umambo uwo unouya waBaba edu Dhavhidha! Hosana mudengadenga!” 
Mark11:11 Naapo Jesu wakapotera muJerusarema, akapinda muTemperi; naapo aringaringa zviro zveshe, zuva rabira wakabuda kuenda muBhethani pamwepo nevanegumi navairi." 
Mark11:12 Nechimangwani voobva Bhethani, iye wakazwa nzara." 
Mark11:13 Echiona muonde kuretu unemashakani, wakenda kwouri kuti pamweni ungaona michero kwouri. Naapo aguma kwouri aazi kuona michero, kwega mashakani, ngokuti yaiya isati yaanguva yemaonde." 
Mark11:14 Jesu, wakati kumuonde, “Apana munhu uchazodya michero kubva kwouri mhera nariini.” Nevadzidzi vake vakazvizwa." 
Mark11:15 Vakaguma muJerusarema. Apotera muTemperi wakatanga kudzinga avo vaitengesa nevaitenga muTemperi, naye wakapinduridza matafura eavo vaitenganisana mare nezvigaro zveavo vaitengesa njia;" 
Mark11:16 naye aazi kutendera naumwe kutwara chidziyo kunyazwi ngechiri muTemperi. 
Mark11:17 Wakavadzidzisa, akati kwavari, “Akuzi kunyorwa here kuti, “Mhatso yangu inozozwi imhatso yokudira yemadzinza eshe? Asi imwimwi mwaiita bako remadzongoni.”" 
Mark11:18 Vapristi vakuru nevanyori vakazvizwa, navo vakatsvaka kuti vangamuita maurairenyi; ngokuti vaimutya, ngokuti mbungano yeshe yakashamiswa ngokudzidzisa kwake." 
Mark11:19 Naapo zuva rabira vakabuda kubva mudhorobha. 
Mark11:20 Mangwanani maishi vechipinda ndipo, vakaona muonde wazeketera metsa kunzinde." 
Mark11:21 Petro echikarakadza wakati kwaari, “Rabhi, penya! Muonde wewakatuka wazeketera.”" 
Mark11:22 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Gondai munaMwari." 
Mark11:23 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kunyazwi ndiani unozoti kuneiri dunhu, ‘Bvitwa, uposherwe muruandhle,’ asikagonondi mumwoyo mwake, asi echigonda kuti icho chaaronza chinozoitika, chinozoitika kwaari." 
Mark11:24 Ndizvo ndinoti kwomuri, zveshe zvomunokumbira nezvomunokumbirira, gondai kuti mwaashira, munozoa nazvo." 
Mark11:25 Naapo mwaema mwechikumbira, rekererai, kunyazwi ndiani unendaa kwomuri; kuti Baba enyu arimudenga amurekererewo zvishaishi zvenyu. [" 
Mark11:26 Asi kudai musikarekereri, naBaba enyu arimudenga aazomurekereri zvishaishi zvenyu.”]" 
Mark11:27 Vakauyazve Jerusarema. Naapo echihamba muTemperi, vakauya kwaari vapristi vakuru nevanyori nevakuru vavo" 
Mark11:28 navo vakati kwaari, “Unoita izvi zviro ngesimba raani? Nokuti ndiani wakakupa iri simba rokuita izvi zviro?”" 
Mark11:29 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Neniwo ndinozomubvunza mubvunzo umwe; kudai mwechizondipingura, ndinozomuronzera kuti ngesimbaraani rendinoita ndiro izvi zviro." 
Mark11:30 Rubhabhatidzo rwaJohani rwakabva mudenga here nokuti kuvanhu? Ndipingurenyi.” 
Mark11:31 Navo vakapangana pakati pavo vechiti, “Kuti tikati, ‘Rwakabva mudenga,’ iye unozoti, ‘Ndizvo amuzi kumutenda ngenyi?’" 
Mark11:32 Asi tikati, ‘Rwakabva kuvanhu,’ ” vaitya mbungano ngokuti veshe vaitenda kuti Johani waiya muprofeti wegwinyiso." 
Mark11:33 Ndizvo vakapingura Jesu vakati, “Atizii.” NaJesu wakati kwavari, “Neni andizomuronzeri kuti isimbaraani rendinoita ndiro izvi zviro.”" 
Mark12:1 Zvino wakatanga kuereketa kwavari ngemiedzaniso echiti, “Munhu wakasima munda wemivhini, wakaushoshera ngorushosha kutendenedza, wakatsa rindi rokukamurira vhini, akaaka chitumba, wakaupa kuvarimi kuti vaushandise, akaenda kunyika imweni." 
Mark12:2 Naapo nguva yokuibva kwemichero yaguma, wakatuma muranda kuvarimi kuti aashire michero imweni yemivhini kubva kunevarimi." 
Mark12:3 Navo vakamubata, vakamurova, vakamupetudza asina chiro." 
Mark12:4 Wakatumazve kwavari muranda umweni, nouwo naye vakamuremadza soro rake, vakamutsverudza." 
Mark12:5 Naye wakatuma umweni, nouwo vakamuuraya. Nevamweni vazhinji ngokudaro, vakarova vamweni nevamweni vakavauraya." 
Mark12:6 Wakasara naumwe, mukororo unodikanwa; wakamutuma kwavari pakugumisira echiti, ‘Vanozoremeredza mukororo wangu.’" 
Mark12:7 Asi avo varimi vakati pakati pavo, ‘Uyu ndiye unogara nhaka; uyai, ngatimuuraye, nenhaka inozoita yedu.’" 
Mark12:8 Vakamubata, vakamuuraya, vakamurasha kubanze kwomunda wemivhini." 
Mark12:9 Mambo womunda wemivhini unozoitenyi? Unozouya, auraye varimi, unozopa munda wemivhini kunevamweni." 
Mark12:10 Amuzi kudzidza here ichi chinyorwa chinoti: “ ‘Buwe iro rakarambwa ngevaaki ndiro rakaitwa soro repakhona; 
Mark12:11 ichi chakaitwa ndiMambo Mwari, chinoshamisa mukuona kwemadziso edu?’ ”" 
Mark12:12 Navo vakatsvaka kuti vamubate, asi vakatya mbungano, ngokuti vakazia kuti waiereketa muedzaniso uwo ndivo. Ndizvo vakamusiya, vakaenda." 
Mark12:13 Vakatuma kwaari vamweni vevaFarisi nevaHerodhi, kuti vamuparise ndaa mukuereketa kwake." 
Mark12:14 Vaguma vakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, tinozia kuti iwewe uri wegwinyiso, aubatiki ngoukuru hwomunhu; ngokuti auringiri hope yomunhu, asi ngegwinyiso unodzidzisa njira yaMwari. ‘Kunotenderwa here kubhadhara chibharo kunaSiza nokuti haiwa?" 
Mark12:15 Tinozobhadhara here nokuti tisabhadhara?’ ” Asi iye echizia kudziitisa kwavo, wakati kwavari, “Munondiedzerenyi? Unzai kwendiri chigurwa chesirivha ndichione.”" 
Mark12:16 Vakachiunza. Naye wakati kwavari, “Uyu muedzaniso nouku kunyorwa ngekwaani?” Navo vakati kwaari, “NgezvaSiza.”" 
Mark12:17 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Bhadharai Siza zviro zvaSiza nokuti Mwari zviro zvaMwari.” Navo vakashamiswa kakurutu ndiye." 
Mark12:18 Vakauya kwaari vaSadhusi, avo vanoti akuna kumuka kwevakafa, navo vakamubvunza mubvunzo vechiti," 
Mark12:19 “Mudzidzisi, Mosi wakatinyorera kuti, ‘Kudai mukoma womunhu echifa, echisiya mukadzi, asi asina mwana, munun'una wake ngaamutore mukadzi, abarire mukoma wake vana.’" 
Mark12:20 Vaiyapo vakoma vanomwe; wokutanga wakaroora mukadzi asi wakafa asikazi kusiya vana. 
Mark12:21 Nowechipiri wakamutora, naye wakafa asikazi kusiya vana; nowechitatu ngokudarowo." 
Mark12:22 Vanomwe veshe avazi kusiya vana. Ngesure kwavo veshe mukadzi wakazofawo. 
Mark12:23 Mukumuka kwevakafa, apo voozomuka, unozoita mukadzi waani kwavari? Ngokuti vanomwe vakamuita mukadzi.”" 
Mark12:24 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Andikwopi kupauka kwenyu here, ngokuti amuzii zvakanyorwa nokuti simba raMwari?" 
Mark12:25 Ngokuti apo voomuka kubva kwevakafa, avazoroori nokuti kuroodzwa, asi vanozodai ngengirosi dziri mudenga." 
Mark12:26 Asi ngendaa yevakafa kuti vanomuswa, amuzi kudzidza here mubhuku raMosi, pandau inoronza ngepfiba, ngenjira iyo Mwari yaakaereketa kwaari echiti, ‘Inini ndini Mwari waAbrahama, Mwari waIsaka naMwari waJakobe?’" 
Mark12:27 Iye aasiri Mwari wevakafa akadi, asi ndiMwari wevanopona; mwapauka kakurutu.”" 
Mark12:28 Kwakaguma umwe wevanyori, wakavazwa vechibvunzisana pamwepo, naye echiona kuti wakanasa kuvapingura wakamubvunza, akati, “Ngouri mupango wokutanga kweiri yeshe?”" 
Mark12:29 Jesu wakapingura akati, “Wokutanga unoti, ‘Izwai, A Isuraeri! Mambo Mwari, Mwari wedu ndiMambo Mwari umwe;" 
Mark12:30 newe unozomuda Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako, ngomwoyo wako weshe, ngomweya wako weshe, ngomupinimidzo wako weshe nesimba rako reshe.’" 
Mark12:31 Nowechipiri ngouyu, ‘Unozomuda muakirwana wako kudai ngokudzida kwako iwewe pachako.’ Akuna mupango umweni wakapinda kukura kuneiyi.”" 
Mark12:32 Nomunyori wakati kwaari, “Wanasa, Mudzidzisi; waereketa gwinyiso kuti uripo Mwari umwe, akuna umwenizve ngepabanze pake;" 
Mark12:33 nokumuda ngomwoyo weshe, ngokuzwisisa kweshe, ngesimba reshe, nokumuda muakirwana wako kudai ngokudzida kwako iwewe pachako, kunopinda kakurutu midiro yokupisha nemibairo yeshe.”" 
Mark12:34 Naapo Jesu aona kuti wapingura ngokungwara, wakati kwaari, “Iwewe auri kuretupi akadi kubva kuneumambo hwaMwari.” Sure kweizvi apana waishinga kuchamubvunza chiro." 
Mark12:35 Jesu achadzidzisa muTemperi wakati, “Vanyori vanoronza ngenyi kuti Kristu mukororo waDhavhidha?" 
Mark12:36 Dhavhidha emene ari muMweya Wakachena wakati, ‘Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMambo wangu, gara ngokumudyo kwangu, metsa ndiite magaa ako chitambarariro chetsoka dzako.’" 
Mark12:37 Dhavhidha emene unomudaidza kuti Mambo; ndizvo uri mukororo wake ngenjiranyi?” Nouzhinji hwevanhu vakamuzwa ngokudakara. 
Mark12:38 Mukudzidzisa kwake wakati, “Ngwarai vanyori, avo vanodisisa kuhamba vakapfeka machira akareba, nokuchingamidzwa mundau dzemisika," 
Mark12:39 nezvigaro zvepamberi mumhatso dzokudira nendau dzepamberi mumadhiri. 
Mark12:40 Avo vanochakata mhatso dzeshirikadzi, vachidzionisa kudai ngevanhu vakanaka ngokurebesa mikumbiro. Vanozoashira kurashwa kwakanyanyisa kukura.”" 
Mark12:41 Jesu wakagara pashi pasinde pebhokisi rezvipo, wakaringira mapire embungano mare mubhokisi rezvipo. Nevazhinji vaiya nepfuma vaipamwo yakawanda." 
Mark12:42 Kwakaguma shirikadzi yaiya murombo, yakapa zvigurwa zviiri zvemare, zvinoita sendi." 
Mark12:43 Wakadaidza kwaari vadzidzi vake, akati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, iyi shirikadzi murombo yapa kupinda avo veshe vapa mubhokisi rezvipo." 
Mark12:44 Ngokuti avo veshe vapa ngouwandu hwepfuma yavo; asi iyo mukutama kwayo yapa zveshe zveyaiya nazvo, zveshe zveinopona ndizvo.”" 
Mark13:1 Achabuda kubva muTemperi, umwe wevadzidzi vake wakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, ringirai, kunaka kwemapuwe aya nokunaka kwemhatso dzakadai!”" 
Mark13:2 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Unoona here idzi mhatso dzakakura? Akuzosari buwe narimwe padera pebuwe rimweni, risikazorigwi pashi.”" 
Mark13:3 Achakagara paMutunhu wemaOrivhi akaringirana neTemperi, Petro, Jakobe, Johani naAndreu vakamubvunza vari vega, vakati," 
Mark13:4 “Tironzerei, kuti izvi zvinozoitika riini nokuti chionisonyi chinozoonisa kuti izvi zviro zvoda kuitika?”" 
Mark13:5 Jesu wakatanga kuvaronzera echiti, “Ngwarai kuti musazopaukiswa ngomunhu kunyazwi ngouri." 
Mark13:6 Vazhinji vanozouya ngezina rangu vechiti, ‘Ndini Kristu,’ navo vanozopaukisa vazhinji." 
Mark13:7 Naapo mwoozwa ngokurwa nemawirira okurwa, musazotambudzika; izvi zvinosisira kuti zviitike, asi magumo aasati aguma." 
Mark13:8 Ngokuti dzinza rinozomukirana nedzinza, noumambo unozomukirana noumambo; kunozoapo kuzungunyika kwenyika kundau dzakaparadzana, kunozoapo nzara. Izvi zviri kutanga kwemadambudziko." 
Mark13:9 “Asi dzingwarirenyi imwimwi pachenyu; ngekuti vanozomupira kumakota; nemwi munozorohwa mumhatso dzavo dzokudira; munozoema pamberi pevatongi nemadzimambo ngepamusoro pangu, kuita chapupu pamberi pavo." 
Mark13:10 Nevhangeri rinosisira kutanga kuchumairwa kumadzinza eshe. 
Mark13:11 Naapo vanozomukweya vechimupira mukutongwa, musazodembatemba ngepamberi kuti munozoereketenyi; asi ereketai kunyazwi ngechiri chemwapuwa ngeawa iro, ngokuti andimwipi munozoereketa, asi ndiMweya Wakachena." 
Mark13:12 Mukoma unozopira munun'una kuti aurawe, nababa unozopira mwana wavo, nevana vanozomukira vabari nokuvauraisa." 
Mark13:13 Nemwi munozonyenywa ndivo veshe ngendaa yezina rangu. Asi iye unozoshingirira metsa kumagumo unozoponeswa. 
Mark13:14 “Naapo mwoona chinyangadzo chinoparadza chechiema apo pechisikasisiri (uwo unodzidza ngaazwisise,) zvino avo vari muJudhia ngavatizire kumitunhu;" 
Mark13:15 nouwo uri padera pemhatso asazodzaka nokuti kupotera kutora chiro kunyazwi ngechiri mumhatso mwake; 
Mark13:16 nouwo uri mumunda asazopetuka sure kootora jira rake. 
Mark13:17 Asi ihehe kwavari vane mimba naavo vanoamwisa ngaawo mazuva! 
Mark13:18 Nemwi kumbirai kuti zvisazoitika ngomukuwo wechando. 
Mark13:19 Ngokuti ngaawo mazuva kunozoapo kutambudzika kukuru, ukwo kusikazi kumboapo kwakadaro kubvira pakutanga kwokusikwa kwaakasika Mwari metsa zvinopano, akuchatongozoitikizve kwakadaro." 
Mark13:20 Kudai Mambo asikazi kufupisa mazuva, akuna naumwe waizoponeswa; asi ngepamusoro paavo vakatsanangurwa, avo vakatsanangura, mazuva akafupiswa." 
Mark13:21 Naapo kudai aripo munhu unozoti kwomuri, ‘Ringira, Kristu uri panapa!’ Nokuti, ‘Ringira, uri apo!’ Musazozvitenda." 
Mark13:22 Ngokuti vanozoapo vaKristu vokunyepa nevaprofeti vokunyepa, navo vanozoita zvioniso nezvishamiso, kupaukisa vakatsanangurwa, kudai zvechibvira." 
Mark13:23 Asi ngwarai; ndamuronzera zviro zveshe nguva isati yaguma. 
Mark13:24 “Asi ngaawo mazuva, ngesure kwokutambudzika ukwo, zuva rinozoita chidima nomwedzi auzojeki;" 
Mark13:25 nenyeredzi dzinozowa kubva mudenga nemasimba omudenga anozozungunyiswa. 
Mark13:26 Naapo vanozoona Mukororo woMunhu echiuya mumakore anesimba guru nouthende. 
Mark13:27 Naapo unozotuma ngirosi nokuunganidza vakatsanangurwa vake kubva kumhepo marongomuna, kubvira kumagumo enyika metsa kuguma kumagumo edenga." 
Mark13:28 “Dzidzai muedzaniso kubva pamuonde; apo dai rawo rakanyorova rooburikira mashakani aro, munozia kuti zienza raa pasinde." 
Mark13:29 Nemwiwo ngokudaro, apo mwoona izvi zvechiitika, munozozia kuti iye uri pasinde, eya pamisiwo." 
Mark13:30 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, uyu mubarirwana auzopindi izvi zveshe zvisati zvaitika." 
Mark13:31 Denga nenyika zvinozopinda, asi mazwi angu aatongozopindi." 
Mark13:32 “Asi ngendaa yezuva iro neawa iro, apana naumwe unozvizia, kunyazwi ngirosi dzomudenga nokuti Mukororo, asi ndiBaba ega." 
Mark13:33 Ngwarai, murinde; ngokuti imwimwi amuzii nguva iyo kuti inoguma riini." 
Mark13:34 Kwakadai ngomunhu echihamba rwendo kuenda kunyika imweni, iye wakasiya mhatso yake, wakapa varanda vake simba, umwe ngaumwe mushando wake, akapangazve murindi wepamusiwo kuti arinde." 
Mark13:35 Ndizvo rindai, ngokuti amuzii imwimwi kuti munewemhatso unoguma riini, dangani zuva rabira, nokuti pakati pousiku, nokuti ngokurira kwejongwe, nokuti mangwanani." 
Mark13:36 Kuti pamweni echiguma ngokukasira iye asamuona mwakaata; 
Mark13:37 neicho chendinoronza kwomuri, ndinoronza kwavari veshe: Rindai.”" 
Mark14:1 Kwaiya kwasara mazuva mairi kuti zuva rePhasika nomushongano wokudya Zvingwa zvisina Mumera rigume. Nevapristi vakuru nevanyori vakatsvaka kuti vangamuita mabatirenyi ngourimbwi, vamuuraye;" 
Mark14:2 ngokuti vaiti, “Haiwa ngepakati pomushongano wokudya, ngokuti pamweni kungazoita bope pakati pevanhu.”" 
Mark14:3 Naapo achiri muBhethani mumhatso yaSimoni waiya nemapere, akagara patafura, dzimai rakauya nenhera yearibhasita yemafuta enadhi, anodhura kakurutu, rakaiputsa nhera, rikaadururira musoro mwaJesu." 
Mark14:4 Asi kwaiyapo vamweni vakatsamwa vechiti, “Kwaitirwenyi uku kurashwa kwemafuta?" 
Mark14:5 Ngokuti aya mafuta aizotengeswa ngemare inopinda zvigurwa zvesirivha mazana matatu, ikapuwa varombo.” Vakavhuruvhutira dzimairo." 
Mark14:6 Asi Jesu wakati, “Rirekerenyi; munoritambudzirenyi? Raita mushando wakanaka kwendiri." 
Mark14:7 Ngokuti munavo varombo nguva dzeshe, naapo mwechida mungaita zvakanaka kwavari; asi inini amuzoanenipi nguva dzeshe akadi." 
Mark14:8 Raita icho cheraikona; radzodza muiri wangu usati watsirwa. 
Mark14:9 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kunyazwi ngepari apo perinozochumairwa vhangeri munyika dzeshe, neichi cheraita iri dzimai chinozoteketeswa kuita chicheredziso chake.”" 
Mark14:10 Zvino Judhasi Isikarioti, umwe wevanegumi navairi, wakaenda kuvapristi vakuru kuti amupire kwavari." 
Mark14:11 Navo apo vazwa vakadakara, vakagondisa kumupa mare. Naye wakatsvaka nguva kwayo yokuti amupire." 
Mark14:12 Ngezuva rokutanga redhiri reZvingwa zvisina Mumera, zuva reibaiwa makwai ePhasika, vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari, “Unoda kuti tiende kuri koonasirira kuti udye Phasika?”" 
Mark14:13 Naye wakatuma vairi vevadzidzi vake, akati kwavari, “Endai mudhorobha, unozoshongana nemwi mwamuna akatwara hari yemvura; muteerenyi," 
Mark14:14 kunyazwi ngepari paanozopotera munozoti kumuna wemhatso, ‘Mudzidzisi unoti, Riripari kamera rangu revaeni, apo pendinozodya Phasika nevadzidzi vangu?’" 
Mark14:15 Naye unozomupangidzira kamera guru romuturika rakanasirirwa ndizvo zveshe. Naapo munozotinasirira zvokudya zvePhasika.” 
Mark14:16 Nevadzidzi avo vakabuda kuenda, vakaguma mudhorobha, vakaona kudai ngezvaakaronza kwavari, navo vakanasirira Phasika." 
Mark14:17 Naapo aamadeekoni wakaguma nevanegumi navairi. 
Mark14:18 Vari patafura vechidya, Jesu wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, umwe wenyu unozondipira, umwe uwo unodya neni.”" 
Mark14:19 Navo vakatanga kutambudzika, vechiti kwaari umwe ngaumwe, “Ndini here?”" 
Mark14:20 Wakati kwavari, “Ngoumwe wevanegumi navairi, uwo unosheya chingwa neni mundiro imweyo." 
Mark14:21 Ngokuti Mukororo woMunhu unoenda kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa ngendaa yake, asi ihehe kwaari munhuwo Mukororo woMunhu waanozopirwa ndiye! Kwaiya kwakapinda kunaka kwaari munhuwo kudai asakabarwa.”" 
Mark14:22 Vachadya, Jesu wakatora chingwa, akabonga, wakachigura, akavapa, akati, “Torai; ichi ndiwo muiri wangu.”" 
Mark14:23 Wakatora tsani, naapo abonga wakaipa kwavari, navo vakamwa veshe kweiri." 
Mark14:24 Naye wakati kwavari, “Iyi ingazi yangu yechitenderano, iyo inoparadzirwa vazhinji." 
Mark14:25 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, andichazomwizve michero yemivhini metsa kuzuva iro rendinozomwa idzva muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Mark14:26 Naapo vaemba ngoma vakabuda kuenda kuMutunhu wemaOrivhi. 
Mark14:27 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi mweshe munozopumhuniswa, ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Ndinozorova muushi nemakwai anozoparadzwa.’" 
Mark14:28 Asi ngesure kwokumuswa kwangu, ndinozoenda pamberi penyu muGarire.”" 
Mark14:29 Asi Petro wakati kwaari, “Kunyazwi veshe vanozopumhuniswa, asi haiwa inini.”" 
Mark14:30 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwouri, iwewe nyamashi, usiku uno jongwe risati rarira kairi, unozondiramba katatu.”" 
Mark14:31 Asi iye wakaereketa ngesimba yaamho echiti, “Kunyazwi ndechizofa newe, andizokurambi akadi.” Navo veshe vakadarowo." 
Mark14:32 Vakaguma kundau inozwi Getsemani; naye wakati kuvadzidzi vake, “Garai panapa inini ndechikumbira.”" 
Mark14:33 Wakatora naye Petro, Jakobe naJohani, wakatanga kukaruka nokutambudzika kakurutu." 
Mark14:34 Wakati kwavari, “Mweya wangu unotambudzika kakurutu metsa mukufa. Garai panapa, murinde.”" 
Mark14:35 Naye wakaendamberi padoko, akawa pashi pamavhu, akakumbira kuti, dai zvechiitika kuti awa iri ripinde kubva kwaari." 
Mark14:36 Naye wakati, “Aba, Baba, zviro zveshe zvinoitika kwouri; dusa iyi tsani kubva kwendiri. Asi kusaita kuda kwangu, asi kuda kwako.”" 
Mark14:37 Wakauya, akavaona vakaata, akati kunaPetro, “Simoni, waata here? Wakorera here kurinda awa rimwe?" 
Mark14:38 Rindai mukumbire kuti musapotera mukuedzwa; mweya unotenda asi nyama aina simba.” 
Mark14:39 Wakahwirirazve, akakumbira, echiereketa mazwi ndiwo ndiwo." 
Mark14:40 Wakapetukazve akaona vakaata, ngokuti madziso avo aiya echirema; navo avazi kuzia chokumupingura." 
Mark14:41 Wakauya ngekwechitatu, akati kwavari, “Muchakandoata here, mwechizorora? Zvakwana! Awa raguma; penyai, Mukororo woMunhu unopirwa munyara dzevashaishi." 
Mark14:42 Mirukai, tiende. Wonai uwo unondipira waa pasinde.”" 
Mark14:43 Paripo, achaereketa, Judhasi wakaguma, umwe wevanegumi navairi, anembungano ine shoti nenduku, vechibva kuvapristi vakuru nevanyori nevakuru vevanhu." 
Mark14:44 Zvinopano iye waiya akavapa chioniso echiti, “Uwo wendinozochingamidza ngomuromo ndiye; mubatenyi mumukweye ngokungwaririka.”" 
Mark14:45 Naapo aguma, paripo wakauya kwaari akati, “Rabhi!” Naye wakamuchingamidza ngomuromo." 
Mark14:46 Navo vakamubata ngenyara dzavo vakamutora. 
Mark14:47 Asi umwe weavo vaiema apo wakashwamura shoti yake, wakatema hloko yomupristi mukuru, akagura nzee yayo." 
Mark14:48 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Mwabuda kundibata here kudai ngevanoambana negandanga, muneshoti nenduku?" 
Mark14:49 Ndaiya ndinemwi mazuva eshe muTemperi ndechidzidzisa, nemwi amuzi kundibata. Asi izvi zvinoitika kuti zvakanyorwa zvidzadzisike.”" 
Mark14:50 Navo veshe vakamusiya, vakatiza." 
Mark14:51 Jaha rakamuteera, raiya nejira rakachena rakariti kupekupe pamuiri waro risina chimweni chokusimira. Navo vakaribata," 
Mark14:52 asi iro rakasiya jira rakachena, rikatiza riri mupunu." 
Mark14:53 Navo vakakweya Jesu kuenda naye kumupristi mukuru. Kwakaungana pamwepo vapristi vakuru veshe nevakuru vevanhu nevanyori. 
Mark14:54 Petro waiya echimuteera ngokuretu, metsa wakaguma mukati muruwanze rwomupristi mukuru; naye wakagara nevarindi vomupristi mukuru nokugota muriro." 
Mark14:55 Zvinopano vapristi vakuru nevatongi veshe vakatsvaka chapupu ndiJesu kuti vamuuraye, asi avazi kuchiona." 
Mark14:56 Ngokuti vazhinji vakaereketa chapupu chokunyepa ndiye, nouchapupu hwavo ahuzi kutenderana." 
Mark14:57 Kwakamiruka vamweni vanhu vakaita chapupu chokunyepa ndiye vechiti," 
Mark14:58 “Takamuzwa echiti, ‘Ndinozoputsa iri Temperi rakaakiwa ngenyara, ngemazuva matatu ndinozoaka rimweni, risikaakwi ngenyara.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Ndizvozve ngokudaro uchapupu hwavo ahuzi kutenderana. 
Mark14:60 Nomupristi mukuru wakaema pakati pavo, akabvunza Jesu echiti, “Aupinguri chiro here? Chiinyi ichi chevanopupura ava ndiwe?”" 
Mark14:61 Asi iye wakanyarara, aazi kupingura chiro. Mupristi mukuru wakamubvunzazve echiti kwaari, “Iwewe uri Kristu here, Mukororo woUwo Unomuchena?”" 
Mark14:62 Jesu wakati, “Ndini; nemwi munozoona Mukororo woMunhu akagara ngokumudyo kwoUnesimba, echiuya mumakore omudenga.”" 
Mark14:63 Nomupristi mukuru wakabaura machira ake echiti, “Tichatamirenyi zvapupu?" 
Mark14:64 Mwazwa kutuka kwake. Munotinyi?” Navo veshe vakagura kuti unosisira kufa. 
Mark14:65 Vamweni vakatanga kumupfira mata nokufukidza hope yake nokumupamhadza nokuronza kwaari kuti, “Profeta!” Nevarindi vomupristi mukuru vakamuashira ngokumupamhadza ngenyara." 
Mark14:66 Naapo Petro ari paruwanze, kwakauya kwaari umwe wevasikana vomupristi mukuru." 
Mark14:67 Naye echiona Petro echigota muriro, wakamuringira, akati, “Iwewewo waiya naJesu weNazaretha.”" 
Mark14:68 Asi iye wakaramba echiti, “Andizii, andizwisisi kuti unotinyi.” Naye wakabuda akaenda paruwanze pamusiwo, nejongwe rakarira." 
Mark14:69 Nomusikana uwo wakamuona, wakatangazve kuronzera avo vaiemapo echiti, “Uyu ndiye umwe wavo.”" 
Mark14:70 Asi iye wakarambazve. Ngesure kwenguva doko avo vaiemapo vakatizve kunaPetro, “Ngegwinyiso iwewe uri umwe wavo, ngokuti uri muGarire.”" 
Mark14:71 Asi iye wakatanga kutuka nokupika echiti, “Andimuzii uyu munhu womunoereketa ndiye.”" 
Mark14:72 Apapo ngokukasira jongwe rakarira kwechipiri. NaPetro wakakarakadza izwi raakaereketa Jesu kwaari rokuti, “Jongwe risati rarira kairi unozondiramba katatu.” Naapo akarakadza ngeizvo, wakachema." 
Mark15:1 Mangwanani maishi vapristi vakuru, pamwepo nevakuru vevanhu, vanyori nevatongi veshe vakapangana; vakasunga Jesu, vakamutora, vakamupira kunaPiratu." 
Mark15:2 Piratu wakamubvunza echiti, “Iwewe ndiwe mambo wevaJudha here?” Asi iye wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Watoronza.”" 
Mark15:3 Nevapristi vakuru vakamuitira ndaa dzakawanda. 
Mark15:4 Piratu wakamubvunzazve echiti, “Aupinguri chiro here? Ringira kuwanda kwendaa dzevanokuitira.”" 
Mark15:5 Asi Jesu aazi kuchazomupingurazve, ndizvo Piratu wakashamiswa." 
Mark15:6 Zvinopano kumushongano wokudya waisivasunhurira mubhanditi umwe uwo wevaizokumbira. 
Mark15:7 Pakati pemabhanditi aiya mutirongo paiya naumwe waizwi Bharabhasi, uwo wakasungwa pamwepo naavo vaiya vakamukira, avo mukumukira kwavo vakauraya munhu." 
Mark15:8 Nembungano yechikwirayo, yakatanga kukumbira Piratu kuti avaitire kudai ngomutoo wake kwavari." 
Mark15:9 Piratu wakapingura kwavari echiti, “Munoda here kuti ndimusunhurire mambo wevaJudha?”" 
Mark15:10 Ngokuti wakazia kuti vapristi vakuru vaiya vamupira ngendaa yendurumwa. 
Mark15:11 Asi vapristi vakuru vakavherudza mbungano kuti zvirinane kuti avasunhurire Bharabhasi. 
Mark15:12 Piratu wakapingurazve, akati kwavari, “Ndizvo ndinozoitenyi kwaari uwo womunoti ndimambo wevaJudha?”" 
Mark15:13 Navo vakaboorerazve vechiti, “Mukohomere.”" 
Mark15:14 Piratu wakati kwavari, “Ngenyi? Chiinyi chakashata chaakaita?” Asi vakaboorera kakurutu vechiti, “Mukohomere.”" 
Mark15:15 NaPiratu echida kudakadza mbungano wakavasunhururira Bharabhasi, akavapa Jesu, ambomupamhadza, kuti akohomerwe." 
Mark15:16 Masoja akamukweya kuenda mukati mungome, akakoka pamwepo chikwata cheshe chemasoja." 
Mark15:17 Nawo akamupfekesa jira rakatsvukuruka, akapomba dzungudza reminzwa, akariisa musoro mwake." 
Mark15:18 Akatanga kumuchingamidza echiti, “Makosi, mambo wevaJudha!”" 
Mark15:19 Akamurova musoro ngorutsanga, akamupfira mata, akagwadama ngemabvi awo, akamudira." 
Mark15:20 Naapo vamuitira jee, vakamukhumura jira rakatsvukuruka, vakamupfekesa zvokusimira zvake. Navo vakamukweya kuenda naye kubanze koomukohomera." 
Mark15:21 Navo vakaangiridza umwe waipindapo, Simoni weKurene, echibva munharaundayo, baba waArekizanda naRufusi, kuti atware muchinjiko wake." 
Mark15:22 Vakamuunza kundau inozwi Gorogotha, (iyo inozwi ngokukumuchwa, Ndau yeDenhenya.)" 
Mark15:23 Navo vakamupa vhini rakakumanidzwa nemhura; asi iye aazi kuriashira. 
Mark15:24 Vakamukohomera, vakapaurirana zvokufuka zvake pakati pavo, vechiita mabhigidha okuona kuti umwe ngaumwe ungatorenyi." 
Mark15:25 Raiya awa rechitatu revakamukohomera. 
Mark15:26 Nechinyorwa chendaa yake chaiti “MAMBO WEVAJUDHA.” 
Mark15:27 Jesu wakakohomerwa pamwepo nemagandanga mairi, rimwe ngokumudyo nerimweni ngokumuoshwe kwake. [" 
Mark15:28 Nezvinyorwa zvakadzadzisika izvo zvinoti, “Wakaerengwa pamwepo nevashaishi.”]" 
Mark15:29 Naavo vaipinda ngaapo vakamutuka, vechigudwaira masoro avo vechiti, “Ehee! Iwewe unoparadza Temperi nokuriaka ngamazuva matatu," 
Mark15:30 dziponese, udzake kubva pamuchinjiko!”" 
Mark15:31 Vakadarowo vapristi vakuru vechimuitire jee pakati pavo, nevanyori vechiti, “Wakaponesa vamweni, aangakoni kudziponesa." 
Mark15:32 Ngaadzake kubva pamuchinjiko Kristu, Mambo wavaIsuraeri, kuti tione, titende.” Naavo vakakohomerwa naye vakamutukawo." 
Mark15:33 Kubvira ngeawa rechitanhatu kwaiyapo chidima padera penyika yeshe metsa awa rechipfumbamwe. 
Mark15:34 Ngeawa rechipfumbamwe Jesu wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru echiti, “Eloi, Eloi, Lama Sabakathani?” Ukwo kunoti ngokukumuchwa, “Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, wandisiya ngenyi?”" 
Mark15:35 Vamweni veavo vaiemapo vechizwa, vakati, “Izwai, unodaidza Erija.”" 
Mark15:36 Umwe wakarumba, akazadza siponji ngevhini rinorungura, wakariisa padera perutsanga, akamupa kuti amwe echiti, “Rekerai, tione kuti Erija unouya here koomudzasa pashi.”" 
Mark15:37 Jesu wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru, wakafa." 
Mark15:38 Nejira romuTemperi rakabaurwa ngepakati, kubvira ngedera metsa kuguma pashi." 
Mark15:39 Naapo nduna yezana, iyo yaiema yakaringisana naye, yaona kuti wafa ngokudaro, yakati, “Ngegwinyiso munhu uyu waiya Mukororo waMwari!”" 
Mark15:40 Vaiyapo madzimai vairingira vari kuretu, pakati pavo kwaiyapo Maria Magadhareni, Maria mai aJakobe mudoko, Josesi naSarome." 
Mark15:41 Avo vakamuteera achiri muGarire, vechimushandira; nemadzimai amweni akawanda avo vakakwira naye Jerusarema." 
Mark15:42 Naapo kwaita madeekoni, ngokuti raiya zuva rokunasirira, ukwo kunoti raiya zuva rinotangira Sabatha." 
Mark15:43 Kwakauya Josefa weArimathea, gota rairemeredzwa, uwo naye pachake waigarira umambo hwaMwari, wakapotera kunaPiratu ngokutsunga, akakumbira kupuwa muiri waJesu." 
Mark15:44 Piratu wakashamiswa kuti waiya afa; echidaidza kwaari nduna yezana, wakaibvunza kuti watofa here?" 
Mark15:45 Naapo azwa ngenduna yezana kuti wafa, wakapa muiri waJesu kuna Josefa." 
Mark15:46 Naye wakatenga jira rakachena, akamudzasa pashi, akamuputira mujira rakachena, akamuradzika muguwa rakatsetswa pabuwe, akamburumbudzira buwe pamusiwo weguwa." 
Mark15:47 Maria Magadhareni naMaria mai aJosesi vakaona apo paakaradzikwa. 
Mark16:1 Naapo Sabatha rapinda, Maria Magadhareni, Maria mai aJakobe naSarome, vakatenga mutombo unonuhwira, kuti vaende vamudzodze." 
Mark16:2 Mangwanani maishi ngezuva rokutanga revhiki vakaguma kuiba zuva roobuda. 
Mark16:3 Navo vaiti pakati pavo, “Ndiani unozotimburumbudzira buwe kubva pamusiwo weiba?”" 
Mark16:4 Navo vechiringira, vakaona kuti buwe raiya ramburumbudzwa, ngokuti raiya gurutu yaamho." 
Mark16:5 Naapo vapotera muiba, vakaona murumbwana akagara ngokumudyo, akapfeka gauni rakachena; navo vakashamiswa." 
Mark16:6 Naye wakati kwavari, “Musashamiswa; munotsvaka Jesu weNazaretha, uwo wakakohomerwa. Wamuka, amuna muno. Ringirai pevakamuradzika." 
Mark16:7 Asi endai, muronzere vadzidzi vake naPetro kuti, ‘Unomutangira kuenda Garire; munozomuonayo kudai ngezvaakaronza kwomuri.’ ”" 
Mark16:8 Navo vakabuda, vakatiza kubva paiba, ngokuti vakagumirwa ngokuhuta nokushamiswa; navo avazi kuronza chiro kumunhu, ngokuti vaitya. [" 
Mark16:9 Naapo amuka mangwanani maishi ngezuva rokutanga revhiki, wakaoneka kutanga kunaMaria Magadhareni, uwo waiya akaduswa madhimoni manomwe." 
Mark16:10 Wakaenda akaronzera avo vaiya vanaye, vaitsumba nokuchema." 
Mark16:11 Asi apo vazwa kuti unopona nokuti waiya aoneka ndiye, avazi kutenda." 
Mark16:12 Ngesure kweizvi wakaoneka kunevairi vavo, anechiemo chimweni, vaihamba munharaunda." 
Mark16:13 Navo vakapetuka, vakaronzera vamweni veshe. Asi avazi kuvatenda." 
Mark16:14 Ngesure kweizvo wakaoneka kunevanegumi naumwe vakagara patafura; naye wakavaganyira ngokusikatenda kwavo nokukonza kwomwoyo yavo, ngokuti avazi kutenda avo vaiya vamuona ngesure kwokumuka kwake kubva kwevakafa." 
Mark16:15 Naye wakati kwavari, “Endai munyika dzeshe, muchumaire vhangeri kunezvisikwa zveshe." 
Mark16:16 Iye unotenda abhabhatidzwe unozoponeswa; asi uwo usikatendi unozorashwa. 
Mark16:17 Neiyi mioniso inozoa naavo vanotenda; ngezina rangu vanozodzinga madhimoni; vanozoereketa ngendimi itsva; 
Mark16:18 vanozobata nyoka, kunyazwi vakamwa chinouraya, achitongozovaremadzi; vanozoisa nyara dzavo padera pevanorwara navo vanozotambiswa.”" 
Mark16:19 Ndizvo zvino Mambo Jesu, apedza kuereketa navo, wakaashirwa mudenga, akagara ngokumudyo kwaMwari." 
Mark16:20 Navo vakaenda, vakachumaira kundau dzeshe, Mambo echishanda pamwepo navo, echigwinyisa izwi ngemioniso yaiya navo.]" 
Luke1:1 Ngokuti vanhu vazhinji vakaedza kurongedza tsamba ngendaa yezviro zvakaitika pakati pedu," 
Luke1:2 kudai ngezvezvakapuwa kwetiri ngaavo kubvira pakutanga vaiya zvapupu zvakaona ngemadziso nevashandi veizwi," 
Luke1:3 kwakandinakira ininiwo, apo ndaiya ndanasa kuringisisa ngokwakaperera zviro zveshe kubvira pakutanga, kuti ndinyore ngokuteererana kwomuri, imwimwi makosi Theofirusi," 
Luke1:4 kuti muzie gwinyiso remazwi awo emwakadzidziswa. 
Luke1:5 Ngamazuva aHerodhi, mambo weJudhia, waiyapo mupristi waizwi ndiZekharia, webingo raAbhia, waiya nomukadzi wake waiya mukunda weverudzi rwaAroni, nezina rake raiya Erizabhethi." 
Luke1:6 Navo veshe vaiya vakarurama pamberi paMwari, vechingwarira mipango nezviemeso zveshe zvaMambo Mwari vasina ndaa." 
Luke1:7 Navo vaiya vasina mwana, ngokuti Erizabhethi waiya ngomwa, navo vaiya vakura yaamho veshe." 
Luke1:8 Zvino achaita mushando woupristi pamberi paMwari ngokuteererana kwebingo rake," 
Luke1:9 kudai ngomushuma woupristi, bingo rake raiya rokupotera muTemperi raMambo Mwari nokupisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka." 
Luke1:10 Nembungano yeshe yevanhu yaikumbira kubanze ngeawa rokupisha mutombo unegwema rakanaka. 
Luke1:11 Kwakaoneka kwaari ngirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaema ngokumudyo wearita rokupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka. 
Luke1:12 Zekharia wakatambudzika ngokuiona, nokutya kwakamugumira." 
Luke1:13 Asi ngirosi yakati kwaari, “Usatya, Zekharia, ngokuti kukumbira kwako kwakazwika, nomukadzi wako Erizabhethi unozokubarira mukororo, newe unozodudza zina rake kuti Johani." 
Luke1:14 Newe unozodakara nokudakadzwa, navazhinji vanozodakara ngokubarwa kwake;" 
Luke1:15 ngokuti iye unozoita mukuru mukuona kwaMambo Mwari, naye aazomwi vhini nokuti zvinoradzisa, naye unozozadzwa ngoMweya Wakachena, eya kubvira mundani yamai ake." 
Luke1:16 Naye unozotenderudzira vazhinji vevana vaIsuraeri kunaMambo Mwari wavo," 
Luke1:17 naye unozohamba pamberi pehope yake ngomweya nesimba raErija, kutenderudzira mwoyo yemadzibaba kunevana, nevasikapurutani kuti vahambe mukungwara kwevakarurama, kunasirira vanhu kuti vaite vakanasirirwa Mambo Mwari.”" 
Luke1:18 NaZekharia wakati kunengirosi, “Ndinozozia ngenyi ichi? Ngokuti ndakura yaamho nomukadzi wangu wakura yaamho.”" 
Luke1:19 Nengirosi yakamupingura yechiti kwaari, “Ndiri Gabhurieri, uwo unoema pamberi paMwari, neni ndatumwa kuti ndierekete kwouri nokukuunzira aya mashoko akanaka." 
Luke1:20 Penya, unozoita chimbungumbungu usikakoni kuereketa metsa rigume zuva iro rezvinozoitika izvi, ngokuti auzi kugonda mazwi angu, awo anozoitika ngenguva yawo.”" 
Luke1:21 Nevanhu vechigarira Zekharia vakashamiswa ngokunonoka kwake muTemperi. 
Luke1:22 Naapo abuda, waiya asikachakoni kuereketa kwavari, navo vakazia kuti iye waiya aona chioniso ari muTemperi; naye wakaereketa kwavari ngenyara, akagara ari chimbungumbungu." 
Luke1:23 Naapo mazuva okushanda kwake apera, wakaenda kanyi kwake." 
Luke1:24 Ngesure kwemazuva awo mukadzi wake Erizabhethi wakaita mimba, naye wakadzifisha mwedzi mishanu echiti," 
Luke1:25 “Ndizvo Mambo Mwari wakaita ichi kwendiri ngamazuva awo aakandiringira ndiwo, kuti aduse chimene changu pakati pevanhu.”" 
Luke1:26 Ngomwedzi wechitanhatu ngirosi Gabhurieri yakatumwa kubva kunaMwari kuenda kudhorobha reGarire raizwi Nazaretha," 
Luke1:27 kumhandara yaiya yakaemeserwa munhu zina rake raizwi ndiJosefa, worudzi rwaDhavhidha, nezina remhandara iyo raizwi Maria." 
Luke1:28 Nayo yakapotera kwaari ikati, “Mwauya, iwewe waona nyasha, Mambo Mwari unewe!”" 
Luke1:29 Asi iye wakatambudzika kakurutu ngokuereketa kwayo, akapinimidza kuti uku kuchingamidza kunoronzenyi." 
Luke1:30 Nengirosi yakati kwaari, “Usatya, Maria, ngokuti iwewe waona nyasha kunaMwari." 
Luke1:31 Penya, unozoita mimba newe unozobara mukororo, unozodudza zina rake kuti Jesu." 
Luke1:32 Naye unozoita mukuru, unozozwi Mukororo woUwo Uripadera pazveshe; naMambo Mwari unozomupa dendemaro rababa ake Dhavhidha," 
Luke1:33 naye unozotonga padera pemhatso yaJakobe mhera nariini; noumambo hwake ahutongozoa nemagumo.” 
Luke1:34 Maria wakati kunengirosi, “Ichi chingaita maitikirenyi ndisina mwamuna?”" 
Luke1:35 Ngirosi yakapingura, ikati kwaari, “Mweya Wakachena unozouya padera pako, ndizvo uwo unozobarwa unozozwi wakachena, Mukororo waMwari." 
Luke1:36 Penya, Erizabhethi hama yako unemimba yomukororo, akura yaamho; nouyu waamwedzi wechitanhatu kwaari uwo waizwi ingomwa." 
Luke1:37 Ngokuti kunaMwari apana chinokorereka.” 
Luke1:38 NaMaria wakati, “Penya, ndiri murandakadzi waMambo Mwari; ngakuitike kwendiri kudai ngeizwi rako.” Nengirosi yakabva kwaari." 
Luke1:39 NaMaria wakamiruka ngaawo mazuva, wakaenda ngokukasira kunyika yezvimitunhu, kuguta reJudhia," 
Luke1:40 naye wakapotera mumhatso yaZekharia, akachingamidza Erizabhethi." 
Luke1:41 Kwakaitika apo Erizabhethi azwa kuchingamidza kwaMaria, mwana wakanyanduka mundani mwake; naErizabhethi wakazadzwa ndiMweya Wakachena," 
Luke1:42 naye wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru echiti, “Unomuchena iwewe pakati pevakadzi. Unomuchena uwo unozobarwa mundani mwako!" 
Luke1:43 Chaitika ngenyi ichi kwendiri, kuti mai aMambo wangu auye kwendiri?" 
Luke1:44 Ngokuti penya, apo izwi rokuchingamidza kwako razwika munzee dzangu, mwana wakanyanduka mundani mwangu ngokudakara." 
Luke1:45 Unomuchena uwo wakatenda kuti kunozoapo kuitika kweizvo zvakaereketwa kwaari zvechibva kunaMambo Mwari.” 
Luke1:46 Maria wakati, “Mweya wangu unokurisa Mambo," 
Luke1:47 nomweya wangu unodakara kukurutu kuna Mwari, Muponesi wangu," 
Luke1:48 ngokuti iye wakaringira upashi hwomurandakadzi wake. Ngokuti ringira, kubvira zvinopano yeshe mibarirwana inozondierenga kuti ndinomuchena;" 
Luke1:49 ngokuti uwo unesimba wakaita zvikuru kwendiri, nezina rake riri rakachena." 
Luke1:50 Nenyasha dzake dziri padera pavo vanomutya kubvira kumubarirwana kuenda kumubarirwana. 
Luke1:51 Iye wakaonisa simba rake ngomuoko wake, wakaparadza avo vanodzikudza ngokupinimidza kwomwoyo yavo." 
Luke1:52 Wakadzasa pashi vane simba kubva pamadendemaro avo, akakurisa avo varipashi;" 
Luke1:53 wakagutisa avo vanenzara ngezvakanaka, akaendesa makurudza asina chiro." 
Luke1:54 Wakadetsera muranda wake Isuraeri, kuti akarakadze nyasha dzake," 
Luke1:55 kudai ngezvaakaereketa kunemadzibaba edu, kunaAbrahama nokurudzi rwake mhera nariini.”" 
Luke1:56 NaMaria wakagara naye kwaida kuita mwedzi mitatu, naye wakapetuka kanyi kwake." 
Luke1:57 Zvinopano mukuwo waErizabhethi wakasvika wokuti abare, naye wakabara mukororo." 
Luke1:58 Nevaakirwana vake nehama dzake vakazwa kuti Mambo Mwari waiya akurisa nyasha dzake kwaari, navo vakadakara pamwepo naye." 
Luke1:59 Kwakaitika ngezuva rechisere kuti vakauya kuzocheka mwana, navo vaida kumududza zina rake kuti ndiZekharia, kudai ngezina rababa ake." 
Luke1:60 Asi mai ake vakapingura vakati, “Haiwa; asi unozodudzwa kuti Johani.”" 
Luke1:61 Navo vakati kwaari, “Apana naumwe wehama dzenyu wakambodudzwa ngeiro zina.”" 
Luke1:62 Navo vakakopera kunababa ake, kuti vazwe kuti ungada kuti adudzwe kutinyi." 
Luke1:63 Naye wakakumbira pokunyorerapo, wakanyora kuti, “Zina rake ndiJohani.” Navo veshe vakashamiswa." 
Luke1:64 Paripo muromo wake wakabeurwa norurimi rwake rwakasunhurwa, naye wakaereketa, echikudza Mwari." 
Luke1:65 Nokutya kwakagumira avo veshe vaigara pasinde pavo. Nemashoko eizvi akashumirwa munyika yeshe yezvimitunhu zveJudhia; 
Luke1:66 navo veshe vakazvizwa vakazvingwarira mumwoyo yavo vechiti, “Uyu unozoita mwana wakaitawani?” Ngokuti nyara yaMambo Mwari yaiya naye." 
Luke1:67 Nababa ake Zekharia wakazadzwa ndiMweya Wakachena, naye wakaprofeta echiti," 
Luke1:68 “Unomuchena Mambo Mwari waIsuraeri, ngokuti iye wakahambira nokuripira vanhu vake," 
Luke1:69 naye wakatimirudzira runyanga rworuponeso mumhatso yomuranda wake Dhavhidha," 
Luke1:70 kudai ngezvaakaereketa ngomuromo wevaprofeti vakacheneswa vake vekaretu," 
Luke1:71 kuponeswa kubva kumagaa edu nokubva kunyara yaavo veshe vanotinyenya; 
Luke1:72 kuonisa nyasha kunemadzibaba edu, nokukarakadza chitenderano chake chakachena," 
Luke1:73 mhiko iyo yaakapika kunababa edu Abrahama," 
Luke1:74 yokuti isusu, techinunurwa kubva munyara yemagaa edu, timushandire tisina chokutya," 
Luke1:75 mukucheneswa nomukururama pamberi pake mazuva eshe okurarama kwedu. 
Luke1:76 Iwewe, mwana, unozozwi muprofeti woUwo Uripadera pazveshe; ngokuti iwewe unozohamba pamberi pehope yaMambo Mwari kunasirira njira dzake," 
Luke1:77 kupa ruziyo rworuponeso kuvanhu vake ngokurekererwa kwezvishaishi zvavo," 
Luke1:78 ngendaa yokupfaa kwenyasha dzaMwari wedu, naapo kuedza kwezuva kunobva mudenga kunozotihambira," 
Luke1:79 kujeka padera paavo vanogara muchidima nomubvute rokufa, kutungamirira tsoka dzedu munjira yokunyarara.”" 
Luke1:80 Mwana wakakura, wakagwinya mumweya, waiya mushango metsa rorooguma zuva rokuoniswa kwake kunevaIsuraeri." 
Luke2:1 Ngaawo mazuva chakabuda chironzo chechibva kunaSiza Agustusi kuti nyika yeshe inyorwe mazina. 
Luke2:2 Nouku kunyorwa kwaiya kwokutanga kwakaitika apo Kureniusi ari mutongi weSiria. 
Luke2:3 Navo veshe vakaenda koonyorwa, munhu weshe kudhorobha raakabarirwa." 
Luke2:4 NaJosefawo wakakwira echibva Garire, mudhorobha reNazaretha, akaenda Judhia, kudhorobha raDhavhidha raizwi Bhetherehema, ngokuti iye waiya wemhuri norudzi rwaDhavhidha," 
Luke2:5 kuti anyorwe pamwepo naMaria, uwo waiya chigango chake, akurirwa ngemimba." 
Luke2:6 Naapo vachipo, mazuva akakwana okuti abare." 
Luke2:7 Naye wakabara dangwe rake romukororo, naye wakamuputira ngejira, akamuradzika muchidziyo chen'ombe, ngokuti kwaiya kusina ndau yavo mumhatso yevaeni." 
Luke2:8 Kwaiya nevaushi munyikeyo, vaigara mushango vechingwarira mutanga wavo usiku." 
Luke2:9 Nengirosi yaMambo Mwari yakaoneka kwavari, nouthende hwaMambo Mwari hwakajeka kuvatendenedza, navo vakatya kakurutu." 
Luke2:10 Nengirosi yakati kwavari, “Musatya; ngokuti penyai, ndinomuunzira mashoko akanaka, anodakadza kakurutu awo ari evanhu veshe;" 
Luke2:11 ngokuti mwaberekerwa nyamashi mudhorobha raDhavhidha Muponesi, ndiye Kristu Mambo." 
Luke2:12 Neichi chinozoita chioniso kwomuri; kuti munozoona mwana akaputirwa ngejira akaradzikwa muchidziyo chen'ombe.” 
Luke2:13 Paripo yaiyapo nengirosi mbungano huru yehondo yomudenga yechikudza Mwari yechiti," 
Luke2:14 “Ngaakudzwe Mwari mudengadenga, nokunyarara munyika pakati pevanhu, avo vaanonasa kudakara ndivo!”" 
Luke2:15 Naapo ngirosi dzaenda mudenga kubva kwavari, vaushi vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ngatiende Bhetherehema, toona ichi chaitika, chaaziisa Mambo kwetiri.”" 
Luke2:16 Navo vakaenda ngokukasira, vakavaona veshe Maria naJosefa, nomwana akaradzikwa muchidziyo chen'ombe." 
Luke2:17 Naapo vechimuona vakaziisa mashoko awo akaronzwa kwavari ngendaa yemwana uyu; 
Luke2:18 navo veshe vakazwa vakashamiswa ngeizvo zvevakaronzerwa ngavaushi. 
Luke2:19 Asi Maria wakangwarira izvi zveshe, echizvitsengesesa mumwoyo mwake." 
Luke2:20 Nevaushi vakahwirira, vechikurisa nokukudza Mwari ngeizvo zveshe zvevakazwa nezvevakaona, kudai ngezvezvakaronzwa kwavari." 
Luke2:21 Naapo mazuva masere apera okuti achekwe, vakadudza zina rake kuti Jesu, iro rakadudzwa ngengirosi isati yaapo mimba yake." 
Luke2:22 Naapo apera mazuva okucheneswa kwavo, kudai ngeMipango yaMosi, vakakwira naye Jerusarema kuti vamupire kunaMambo Mwari" 
Luke2:23 (kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa muMipango yaMambo Mwari kuti, “Vakororo veshe varimatangwe vanozozwi vakachena kunaMambo Mwari,”)" 
Luke2:24 nokupira mudiro kudai ngezvezvakaronzwa muMipango yaMambo Mwari, “Wemagora mairi nokuti mabwipwi mairi enjia.”" 
Luke2:25 Penya, kwaiyapo munhu muJerusarema zina rake raizwi ndiSimeoni, nomunhu uyu waiya akarurama nowaidira Mwari, echigarira kuembedzerwa kwaIsuraeri, noMweya Wakachena waiya padera pake." 
Luke2:26 Nakwo kwakaoniswa kwaari ngoMweya Wakachena kuti aatongozofi asati aona Kristu waMambo Mwari. 
Luke2:27 Echikweiwa ndiMweya wakauya muTemperi; naapo vabari vaunza mwana Jesu, kuti vaite kwaari kudai ngomushuma weMipango," 
Luke2:28 naye wakamubata mumaoko ake, akakudza Mwari echiti," 
Luke2:29 “Mambo Mwari, zvinopano tendera kuti muranda wako aende ngokunyarara, kudai ngeizwi rako;" 
Luke2:30 ngokuti madziso angu aona ruponeso rwako," 
Luke2:31 urwo rwewakanasirira pamberi pehope yevanhu veshe," 
Luke2:32 kujeka ukwo kunovhenekera vemadzinza, kuri uthendezve kuvanhu vako Isuraeri.”" 
Luke2:33 Baba ake namai ake vakashamiswa ngeizvo zvakaereketwa ngepamusoro pake. 
Luke2:34 NaSimeoni wakavafumisa, akati kunamai ake Maria, “Penya, mwana uyu wakaemeserwa kuwa nokumuka kwevazhinji muIsuraeri, nokuitazve chioniso chinozorambwa," 
Luke2:35 (eya neshoti inozobayawo mweya wako) kuti mipinimidzo yomwoyo mizhinji ioniswe.” 
Luke2:36 Kwaiyapozve Ana muprofeti womukadzi, mwanasikana waFanueri wedzinza raAsha. Waiya aamusharuka, iye waiya akagara nemwamuna wake makore manomwe sure kwousikana hwake." 
Luke2:37 Naye wakaita shirikadzi makore makumi masere namarongomuna. Aazi kutongobuda kubva muTemperi, echidira nokuera kudya nokukumbira usiku nemasikati." 
Luke2:38 Naye echiuya ngeiro awa wakabonga Mwari, wakaereketa ndiye kwavari veshe vaigarira kuripirwa kweJerusarema." 
Luke2:39 Naapo vaiya vaita zviro zveshe kudai ngezvaidiwa ngeMipango yaMambo Mwari, vakahwirira Garire, kudhorobha ravo Nazaretha." 
Luke2:40 Nomwana wakakura, akagwinya, aneungwaru; nenyasha dzaMwari dzaiya padera pake." 
Luke2:41 Nevabari vake vakagara vechindoenda makore nemakore Jerusarema kumushongano wokudya wePhasika. 
Luke2:42 Naapo Jesu aanemakore gumi namairi, vakakwira kudai ngomushuma wokuenda kumushongano wokudya." 
Luke2:43 Naapo vapedza mazuva awo voopetuka, murumbwana Jesu wakasara sure muJerusarema. Nevabari vake avazi kuzvizia." 
Luke2:44 Asi vechipinimidza kuti uri mukati mwembungano, vakahamba muhambo wezuva rimwe, navo vakamutsvaka mukati mwehama dzavo neshamwari dzavo." 
Luke2:45 Naapo vasikamuoni, vakahwirira Jerusarema vechimutsvaka." 
Luke2:46 Ngesure kwemazuva matatu vakamuona ari muTemperi, akagara mukati mwevadzidzisi, echivazwa nokuvabvunza mibvunzo." 
Luke2:47 Navo veshe vakamuzwa vakashamiswa ngokuzia kwake nokupingura kwake. 
Luke2:48 Naapo vakati vechimuona vakahahairwa; namai ake vakati kwaari, “Mwana, watiitira zvakadai ngenyi? Penya, baba ako neni taikutsvaka techitambudzika.”" 
Luke2:49 Naye wakati kwavari, “Mwainditsvaka ngenyi? Musaizia here kuti kunosisira kuti ndiwe mumhatso yaBaba angu?”" 
Luke2:50 Navo avazi kuzwisisa izwi iro raakaereketa kwavari. 
Luke2:51 Naye wakadzaka navo, akaguma Nazaretha, wakavapurutana. Namai ake vakangwarira mazwi eshe aya mumwoyo mwavo." 
Luke2:52 NaJesu wakakura muungwaru nomuiri, nomukudiwa ndiMwari nevanhu." 
Luke3:1 Ngegore regumi namashanu rokutonga kwaThibheriusi Siza, Phontiusi Piratu mutongi weJudhia, naHerodhi sadunhu weGarire, nomunun'una wake Firipu sadunhu wenyika yeIturia neyeTrakhonitisi, naRusaniasi sadunhu weAbhirene," 
Luke3:2 Anasi naKaiafasi, vari vapristi vakuru, izwi raMwari rakauya kuna Johani mukororo waZekharia ari mushango;" 
Luke3:3 naye wakauya kunyika yeshe inotendenedza Jorodhani, echichumaira rubhabhatidzo rwokutenderuka kwokurekererwa kwezvishaishi." 
Luke3:4 Kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa mubhuku remazwi aIsaya muprofeti kuti, “Izwi rounodaidzira mushango kuti: Nasirirai njira yaMambo Mwari, ruramisai makwara ake." 
Luke3:5 Mapani eshe anozozadzwa, nemitunhu yeshe nezvimitunhu zvinozodzaswa pashi, nezvakashongoroka zvinozoruramiswa, nenjira dzakaita marindi dzinozoserereswa;" 
Luke3:6 nevanhu veshe vanozoona ruponeso rwaMwari.” 
Luke3:7 Ndizvo wakati kuvazhinji avo vakabuda kuuya kuzobhabhatidzwa ndiye, “Imwimwi vana vemabuura! Ndiani wakamunyowedza kuti mutize ushungu hunouya?" 
Luke3:8 Ndizvo mwechibara michero inoonisa kutenderuka, musatanga kukarakadza mukati mwenyu kuti, tina Abrahama baba edu, ngokuti ndinoti kwomuri, Mwari unesimba kumusira vana kunaAbrahama ngaaya mapuwe." 
Luke3:9 Kunyazwi zvinopano sanho ratoiswa panzinde dzemiti; ndizvo muti weshe usikabari michero yakanaka unotemerwa pashi nokukandirwa mumwoto.” 
Luke3:10 Nembungano yakamubvunza yechiti, “Ndizvo tinozoitenyi?”" 
Luke3:11 Naye wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Uwo unemabhachi mairi, ngaakowane nousina; nouwo unezvokudya ngaaitewo kudaro.”" 
Luke3:12 Nevabharisi vechibharo vakauyawo kuti vazobhabhatidzwa, vakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, isusu tinozoitenyi?”" 
Luke3:13 Wakati kwavari, “Musapamba zviro zvinopinda izvo zvakaemeserwa kwomuri.”" 
Luke3:14 Majoni nawo akamubvunzawo, akati, “Nesuwo tinozoitenyi?” Naye wakati kwavari, “Musazotorera munhu chiro ngesimba nokuti musazoitira munhu ndaa yokunyepa, asi mwechigutiswa ngemisharo yenyu.”" 
Luke3:15 Naapo vanhu vachakarira, navo veshe vaidzibvunza mumwoyo ngendaa yaJohani, kuti pamweni ndiye Kristu," 
Luke3:16 Johani wakapingura echiti kwavari veshe, “Inini ndinomubhabhatidza ngemvura, asi unouya uwo unondipinda ngesimba, uwo wendisikasisiri nokusunhura rusinga rwemagwada ake. Unozomubhabhatidza ndiMweya Wakachena nemwoto." 
Luke3:17 Aye unerutsero rwake munyara yake, kuti anase kutsvaira mbuwa yake nokuunganidza koroni mudura rake; asi makoto unozoapisha ngomwoto usikadzimi.”" 
Luke3:18 Ndizvo wakachumaira mashoko akanaka nezviro zvimweni zvakawanda kuvanhu echivapanga. 
Luke3:19 Asi Herodhi sadunhu, arambidzwa ndiye ngendaa yaHerodhiasi, mukadzi womunun'una wake, zve ngendaa yezveshe zvakashata zvaaiya akaita Herodhi," 
Luke3:20 wakatutsira ichi chiro padera pazvo zveshe, kuti wakakonyera Johani mutirongo." 
Luke3:21 Naapo vanhu veshe vakabhabhatidzwa, naapo Jesu wakabhabhatidzwawo, achakumbira, denga rakabeurwa," 
Luke3:22 noMweya Wakachena, wairingirika wakadai ngenjia, wakadzaka padera pake, neizwi rakauya rechibva mudenga rechiti, “Iwewe uri Mukororo wangu, unodikanwa, ndinonasa kudakara ndiwe.”" 
Luke3:23 Jesu wakaamba kudzidzisa anemakore anoda kuita makumi matatu, ari mukororo waJosefa, mukuona kwevanhu, uwo waiya mukororo waHeri," 
Luke3:24 mukororo waMathati, mukororo waRevhi, mukororo waMereki, mukororo waJanai, mukororo waJosefa" 
Luke3:25 mukororo waMatatiasi, mukororo waAmosi, mukororo waNahumi, mukororo waEsiri, mukororo waNagai," 
Luke3:26 mukororo waMaathi, mukororo waMatathiasi, mukororo waSemeini, mukororo waJoseki, mukororo waJodha," 
Luke3:27 mukororo waJohanani, mukororo waResa, mukororo waZerubhabheri, mukororo weShearatieri, mukororo waNeri," 
Luke3:28 mukororo waMereki, mukororo waAdhi, mukororo waKhosami, mukororo waEramadhamu, mukororo waEri," 
Luke3:29 mukororo waJoshua, mukororo waErieza, mukororo waJorimu, mukororo waMathati, mukororo waRevhi," 
Luke3:30 mukororo waSimeoni, mukororo waJudha, mukororo waJosefa, mukororo waJonamu, mukororo waEriakimu," 
Luke3:31 mukororo waMerea, mukororo waMena, mukororo waMatatha, mukororo waNathani, mukororo waDhavhidha," 
Luke3:32 mukororo waJesi, mukororo waObhedhi, mukororo waBhoazi, mukororo waSara, mukororo waNashoni," 
Luke3:33 mukororo waAminadhabhi, mukororo waAdhimini, mukororo waArni, mukororo waHezironi, mukororo waPerezi, mukororo waJudha," 
Luke3:34 mukororo waJakobe, mukororo waIsaka, mukororo waAbrahama, mukororo waThera, mukororo waNahori," 
Luke3:35 mukororo waSerugi, mukororo waReu, mukororo waPheregi, mukororo waEbha, mukororo waShera," 
Luke3:36 mukororo waKhenani, mukororo waArifakisadhi, mukororo waShemu, mukororo waNoa, mukororo waRameki," 
Luke3:37 mukororo waMethusera, mukororo waEnokhi, mukororo waJaredhi, mukororo waMaharareri, mukororo waKhenani," 
Luke3:38 mukororo waEnosi, mukororo waSethi, mukororo waAdhamu, mukororo waMwari." 
Luke4:1 NaJesu, azadzwa ndiMweya Wakachena, wakahwirira kubva Jorodhani, wakasundwa ndiMweya kuenda kushango." 
Luke4:2 Wakapedza mazuva makumi marongomuna mushango echiedzwa ndiDhiabhorosi. Naye aazi kudya chiro ngaawo mazuva; naapo apera, wakafukama." 
Luke4:3 Dhiabhorosi wakati kwaari, “Kudai uri Mukororo waMwari, panga buwe iri kuti riite chingwa.”" 
Luke4:4 Jesu wakamupingura akati, “Kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Munhu aazoponi ngechingwa chega.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Dhiabhorosi wakamukwidza pamutunhu, akamupangidzira umambo hweshe ngekamukuwo kadoko," 
Luke4:6 naye wakati kwaari, “Ndinozopa kwouri iri simba reshe nouthende hwazvo, ngokuti rakapuwa kwendiri, kunyazwi ngouri wendinoda ndinozomupa." 
Luke4:7 Ndizvo kudai iwewe wechizondidira zveshe zvinozoita zvako.” 
Luke4:8 NaJesu wakamupingura akati kwaari, “Kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Unozodira Mambo Mwari wako, umushandire iye ega.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Naye wakamutungamirira kuenda Jerusarema, akamuisa padera pechachungu cheTemperi, akati kwaari, “Kudai uri Mukororo waMwari, dzikandire pashi kubva panapa," 
Luke4:10 ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Iye unozopanga ngirosi dzake ngepamusoro pako, kuti dzikungwarire," 
Luke4:11 nomunyara dzadzo dzinozokubata, kuti kunyazwi ngouri mukuwo usapumhunwa tsoka yako pabuwe.’ ”" 
Luke4:12 NaJesu wakapingura akati kwaari, “Kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Usazoedza Mambo Mwari, Mwari wako.’ ”" 
Luke4:13 Naapo Dhiabhorosi aiya apedza zviedzo zveshe, wakabva kwaari kwekamukuwo." 
Luke4:14 Jesu wakahwirira Garire ari musimba roMweya, nembiri yakateketeswa ngendaa yake munyika dzeshe dzinotendenedza." 
Luke4:15 Naye wakadzidzisa mumhatso dzavo dzokudira, echikudzwa ngevanhu veshe." 
Luke4:16 Naye wakauya Nazaretha, apo paakakurira; naye wakaenda mumhatso yokudira, kudai ngomushuma wake ngezuva reSabatha, akaema kudzidza." 
Luke4:17 Kwakapuwa kwaari bhuku romuprofeti Isaya. Naye wakabeura bhuku, akaona apo pakanyorwa kuti," 
Luke4:18 “Mweya waMambo Mwari uri padera pangu, ngokuti iye wakandidzodza kuchumaira vhangeri kuvarombo. Wakandituma kuteketesa kusunhurwa kumabhanditi nokusvinurwa madziso emapofu, kusunhura avo vakatsikirirwa," 
Luke4:19 kuteketesa gore rinoashirika raMambo Mwari.” 
Luke4:20 Naye wakakonya bhuku, akarihwirinza kunemuranda, akagara pashi. Nemadziso eavo veshe vaiya mumhatso yokudira akamuringira." 
Luke4:21 Naye wakatanga kuereketa kwavari kuti, “Nyamashi ichi chinyorwa chazadzisika munzee dzenyu.”" 
Luke4:22 Veshe vakamupupurira zvakanaka, vakashamiswa ngemazwi enyasha akabva kumuromo wake; navo vakati, “Uyu andiyepi here mukororo waJosefa?”" 
Luke4:23 Naye wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso munozoti kwendiri ngeichi chisana kuti ‘N'anga dziponese iwewe. Izvo zvetakazwa kuti wakazviita muKhapernaume, chizviitazve panapa munyika yekwako.’ ”" 
Luke4:24 Wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, akuna muprofeti unoashirika munyika yake." 
Luke4:25 Asi ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, vaiya vazhinji vaiya shirikadzi muIsuraeri ngemazuva aErija, apo denga rakakonywa makore matatu nemwedzi mitanhatu, kwakaita nzara huru padera penyika yeshe;" 
Luke4:26 asi Erija aazi kutumwa kunoumwe wavo, asi kwega kuZarefathi, munyika yeSidhoni, kunedzimai raiya shirikadzi." 
Luke4:27 Vaiyapo vazhinji vaiya namapere muIsuraeri ngomukuwo waErisha muprofeti; kwaiya kusina naumwe wavo wakamhodyoswa, asi Naamani ega muSiria.”" 
Luke4:28 Navo vakazara veshe ngoushungu vaiya mumhatso yokudira, apo vazwa izvi zviro." 
Luke4:29 Navo vakamiruka, vakamubudisa kubanze kwedhorobha, vakamukweyera kuruwere rwomutunhu apo paiya pakaakiwa dhorobha ravo, kuti vamukandire pashi ngetsukupinya." 
Luke4:30 Asi iye wakahamba ngepakati pavo akaenda. 
Luke4:31 Naye wakadzaka Khapernaume, dhorobha reGarire. Waivadzidzisa ngezuva reSabatha." 
Luke4:32 Navo vakashamiswa ngokudzidzisa kwake, ngokuti mazwi ake aiya nesimba." 
Luke4:33 Mumhatso yokudira kwaiyapo munhu unemweya wedhimoni unetsvina; naye wakazhambarara ngeizwi guru," 
Luke4:34 akati, “Iya! Tinenyi isusu newe, iwewe Jesu weNazaretha? Wauya here kutiuraya? Ndinokuzia kuti urianani, ndiwe Wakachena waMwari.”" 
Luke4:35 Asi Jesu wakaukaraidza akati, “Nyarara, buda kubva kwaari!” Naapo dhimoni rakamukandira pashi pakati pavo, rakabuda kwaari, risikazi kumuremadza." 
Luke4:36 Vakashamiswa veshe navo vakaereketa umwe noumweni vechiti, “Izwi iri rinoronzenyi? Ngokuti unopanga mweya ine tsvina ngesimba, nayo inobuda.”" 
Luke4:37 Mbiri yake yakateketeswa munyika dzeshe dzakatendenedza. 
Luke4:38 Naye wakamiruka kubuda mumhatso yokudira, akapotera mumhatso yaSimoni. Ambuya vaSimoni vaiya nomutsarara mukuru, navo vakamupota ngepamusoro pavo." 
Luke4:39 Naye wakaema ngedera kwavo, akakaraidza mutsarara, nomutsarara wakavasiya. Paripo vakamiruka, vakavashandira." 
Luke4:40 Naapo zuva roopota, avo veshe vaiya nevanorwara ngenhenda dzakaparadzana, vakavaunza kwaari; naye wakaisa nyara dzake padera poumwe ngaumwe wavo, akavaponesa." 
Luke4:41 Nemadhimoni akabudawo kubva kuvazhinji, echizhambarara echiti, “Iwewe uri Mukororo waMwari!” Asi wakaakaraidza, aazi kuatendera kuti aerekete, ngokuti aimuzia kuti ndiKristu." 
Luke4:42 Naapo kwaedza iye wakabuda, akaenda murubaya musina vanhu. Vanhu vakamutsvaka, vakauya kwaari vechida kumubatiridza kuti asabva kwavari;" 
Luke4:43 asi wakati kwavari, “Kunosisira kuti ndichumaire vhangeri roumambo hwaMwari mumadhorobha amweniwo, ngokuti icho ndicho chendakatumirwa.”" 
Luke4:44 Naye waichumaira mumhatso dzokudira dzeJudhia.
