Luke18:36 rechizwa mbungano yechipinda, rakabvunza kuti, “Chiinyi ichi chiri kuitika?”" 
Luke18:37 Navo vakarironzera kuti, “Jesu weNazaretha unopinda ngepanapa.”" 
Luke18:38 Naro rakadaidzira rikati, “Jesu, mukororo waDhavhidha, ndiitire nyasha!”" 
Luke18:39 Naavo vaiya pamberi vakarikaraidza, kuti rinyarare; asi rakapinda kudaidzira kakurutu rechiti, “Mukororo waDhavhidha, ndiitire nyasha!”" 
Luke18:40 NaJesu wakaema, akapanga kuti riunzwe kwaari; naapo rakakwedzera pasinde, wakaribvunza kuti," 
Luke18:41 “Unoda kuti ndikuitirenyi?” Naro rakati, “Mambo, kuti ndione.”" 
Luke18:42 Jesu wakati kweriri, “Chiona; kugonda kwako kwakuponesa.”" 
Luke18:43 Paripo rakaona, rakamuteera rechikudza Mwari; nembungano yechizviona, yakairikidza Mwari." 
Luke19:1 Wakapotera muJerikho echipinda ndimwo. 
Luke19:2 Penya, munhu waizwi Zakheusi; iye waiya mukuru wevabharisi, waiya gurudza." 
Luke19:3 Naye wakatsvaka kuona Jesu kuti ndiani, asi waiya asikakoni ngendaa yembungano, ngokuti waiya mufupi." 
Luke19:4 Ndizvo wakarumba kuenda mberi, akakwira mumuonde kuti amuone, ngokuti waipinda ngeiyo njira." 
Luke19:5 Naapo Jesu agumapo wakaringira mudenga, akati kwaari, “Zakheusi, kasira kudzaka pashi; ngokuti kunosisira kuti ndigare mumhatso yako nyamashi.”" 
Luke19:6 Ndizvo wakakasira kudzaka pashi, akamuashira ngokudara." 
Luke19:7 Naapo vazviona vakavhuruvhuta veshe vechiti, “Wapotera kuita mueni womunhu mushaishi.”" 
Luke19:8 NaZakheusi wakaema, akati kunaMambo, “Ringira, Mambo, ndinopa hafu youpfumi hwangu kuvarombo; kudai ndakatora chiro kumunhu ngourimbwi, ndinomuhwirinzira zvakapetwa karongomuna.”" 
Luke19:9 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Nyamashi ruponeso rwaguma kuneiyi mhatso, ngokuti nayewo mukororo waAbrahama." 
Luke19:10 Ngokuti Mukororo woMunhu wakauya kootsvaka nokuponesa izvo zvakarashika.” 
Luke19:11 Naapo vachazwa izvi zviro, wakaangira kuvaronzera muedzaniso, ngokuti waiya pasinde neJerusarema, ngokutizve ivo vaikarira kuti umambo hwaMwari hwaizokasira kuoneka apapo." 
Luke19:12 Ndizvo wakati, “Munhu mukuru wakaenda kunyika yaiya kuretu kuti andoashira umambo nokupetukazve." 
Luke19:13 Wakadaidza varanda vake gumi, akavapa umwe ngaumwe chigurwa chomukore, wakati kwavari, ‘Barisai metsa ndiuye.’" 
Luke19:14 Asi vanhu vomunyika yake vakamunyenya, vakatuma vatumwa sure kwake vechiti, ‘Atidi kuti munhu uyu atonge padera pedu.’" 
Luke19:15 Naapo oopetuka, aashira umambo, wakapanga kuti avo varanda, vaaiya akapa zvigurwa zvemukore, vadaidzwe kwaari, kuti azie zvevakauyirwa ngokuibarisa." 
Luke19:16 Uwo wokutanga wakauya pamberi pake, akati, ‘Mambo, chigurwa chako chomukore chakauyirwa ngezvigurwa zvimweni gumi.’" 
Luke19:17 Naye wakati kwaari, ‘Wakanasa, iwewe muranda wakanaka! Ngokuti wakagondeka ngezvishomani, wechitonga padera pemadhorobha gumi.’" 
Luke19:18 Newechipiri wakauya akati, ‘Mambo, chigurwa chako chomukore chakauyirwa ngezvigurwa zvimweni zvishanu.’" 
Luke19:19 Naye wakati kwaarizve, ‘Wechitonga padera pemadhorobha mashanu.’" 
Luke19:20 Naapo umweni wakauya, akati, ‘Mambo, penya, chigurwa chako chomukore, icho chendakangwarira chiri mudhuku," 
Luke19:21 ngokuti ndakakutya, ngokuti uri munhu usikakonwi; unotonhera icho chousikazi kuisa pashi, newe unocheka icho chousikazi kusima.’" 
Luke19:22 Wakati kwaari, ‘Ngezvinobuda kubva pamuromo pako ndinozokutonga, iwewe muranda wakashata! Iwewe waitozia kuti ndiri munhu usikakonwi, ndechitonhera icho chendisikazi kuisa pashi, nokucheka icho chendisikazi kusima." 
Luke19:23 Ndizvo wakarekera ngenyi kuisa chigurwa changu kwavari mubhange, neni mukuuya kwangu ndaizowona icho nokuuyirwa kwacho?’" 
Luke19:24 Naye wakati kuneavo vaiema pasinde, ‘Mutorerenyi kubva kwaari icho chigurwa chomukore, mupe kwaari uwo unegumi rezvigurwa zvomukore.’" 
Luke19:25 Navo vakati kwaari, ‘Mambo, uwo unegumi rezvigura zvomukore!’" 
Luke19:26 Ndinoti kwomuri, ‘Kunemunhu weshe unacho unozopuwa, nokwaari usina, neicho chaanacho chinozotorwa kubva kwaari." 
Luke19:27 Asi ao magaa angu, aiya asikatendi kuti nditonge padera pao, aunzenyi panapa muauraye pamberi pangu.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Naapo aronza izvi, wakatungamira pamberi pavo kukwira Jerusarema." 
Luke19:29 Naapo akwedzera pasinde peBhethifaje neBhethani, ngepaMutunhu unozwi wemaOrivhi, wakatumira mberi vairi vevadzidzi vake" 
Luke19:30 echiti, “Endai muguta iro remwakaringirana naro, umwo mwopindamwo munozoona tsiru rembongoro rakasungwa, iro risikazi kumbogadhwa ngomunhu. Risunhurenyi muuye naro." 
Luke19:31 Kudai aripo unozomubvunza kuti, ‘Munorisunhurirenyi?’ Munozoronza kuti, ‘Mambo unorida.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Ndizvo avo vakatumwa vakaenda, vakaona kudai ngezvaakaronza kwavari." 
Luke19:33 Naapo vachasunhura tsiru, vanikazi varo vakati kwavari, “Munorisunhurirenyi tsiru?”" 
Luke19:34 Navo vakati, “Mambo unorida.”" 
Luke19:35 Navo vakariunza kunaJesu, vakaisa zvokufuka zvavo padera petsiru, vakakwidza Jesu padera paro." 
Luke19:36 Naapo agadha tsiru, vakachinga zvokufuka zvavo munjira." 
Luke19:37 Naapo echikwedzera pasinde pokudzaka Mutunhu wemaOrivhi, mbungano yeshe yevadzidzi vakatanga kudakara nokukudza Mwari ngeizwi guru ngendaa yemishando yeshe ine simba yevaiya vaona" 
Luke19:38 vechiti, “Unomuchena Mambo uwo unouya ngezina raMambo Mwari! Kunyarara mudenga nouthende mudengadenga!”" 
Luke19:39 Vamweni vevaFarisi mukati mwembungano vakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, rambidza vadzidzi vako.”" 
Luke19:40 Naye wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Ndinomuronzera kuti, kudai ava vaizonyarara, mapuwe emene anozodaidzira.”" 
Luke19:41 Naapo akwedzera pasinde wakaona dhorobha, wakarichemera" 
Luke19:42 echiti, “Dai waizia ngezuva iri izvo zviro zvingakupa kunyarara kwako! Asi zvinopano zvakafishika kumadziso ako." 
Luke19:43 Ngokuti mazuva anozokugumira, apo magaa ako anozokushoshera rushosha nokukutendenedza, akukonyere mukati kumarutii eshe." 
Luke19:44 Anozokupwanyira pashi, nevana vako vari mukati mwako, navo avazosii mukati mwako nebuwe rimwe rakagadzikwa padera perimweni; ngokuti iwewe auzi kuzia mukuwo wokuhambirwa kwako.”" 
Luke19:45 Naye wakapotera muTemperi, akatanga kuvadzingira kubanze avo vaitengesa" 
Luke19:46 echiti kwavari, “Kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Mhatso yangu inozozwi imhatso yomukumbiro;’ asi imwimwi mwaiita bako rembavha.”" 
Luke19:47 Naye waidzidzisa mazuva eshe muTemperi. Vapristi vakuru nevanyori nevakuru vevanhu vakatsvaka kumuuraya; 
Luke19:48 asi avazi kuona chiro chevangaita, ngokuti vanhu veshe vakabatirira kwaari vechipurutana mazwi ake." 
Luke20:1 Ngezuva rimweni, echidzidzisa vanhu muTemperi nokuchumaira vhangeri, vapristi vakuru nevanyori nevakuru vevanhu vakauya kwaari vechiti," 
Luke20:2 “Tironzere kuti unoita izvi ngesimba raani? Nokuti ndiani wakakupa iri simba?” 
Luke20:3 Naye wakavapingura, akati kwavari, “Ininiwo ndinozomubvunza mubvunzo umwe, nemwi ndironzerei zvinopano:" 
Luke20:4 Rubhabhatidzo rwaJohani rwakabva mudenga here nokuti rwakabva kuvanhu?” 
Luke20:5 Navo vakapangana pakati pavo vechiti, “Kuti tikati, ‘Rwakabva mudenga,’ iye unozoti, ‘Amuzi kumutenda ngenyi?’" 
Luke20:6 Asi tikati, ‘Rwakabva kuvanhu,’ vanhu veshe vanozotiponda ngemapuwe; ngokuti vanotenda kuti Johani waiya muprofeti.”" 
Luke20:7 Navo vakapingura kuti avazi kuzia kuti rwakabva kuri. 
Luke20:8 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Neniwo andimuronzeri kuti ndinoita izvi zviro ngesimba raani.”" 
Luke20:9 Naye wakatanga kuronzera vanhu muedzaniso uyu: “Munhu wakasima munda wemivhini, akaupa kuvarimi, akaenda kunyika imweni koogareyo mukuwo wakareba." 
Luke20:10 Naapo nguva yaguma, wakatuma muranda kuvarimi, kuti vamupe imweni yemichero yomumunda wemivhini; asi varimi vakamurova, vakamupetudza asina chiro." 
Luke20:11 Naye wakatumazve muranda umweni; nouwozve vakamurova, vakamubata ngenjira yaitsverudza, vakamupetudza asina chiro." 
Luke20:12 Wakatumazve wechitatu, nayewo vakamukuwadza, vakamurasha kubanze." 
Luke20:13 Naapo mambo womunda wemivhini wakati, ‘Ndinozoitenyi? Ndinozotuma mukororo wangu unodikanwa; pamweni vanozomuremeredza.’" 
Luke20:14 Asi apo varimi vamuona, vakapangana pachavo vechiti, ‘Uyu ndiye unogara nhaka; ngatimuuraye, kuti nhaka iite yedu.’" 
Luke20:15 Vakamubudisa kubanze kwomunda wemivhini, vakamuuraya. Ndizvo mambo womunda wemivhini unozoitenyi kwavari?" 
Luke20:16 Unozouya avauraye avo varimi, unozopa munda wemivhini kune vamweni.” Naapo vechizwa izvi vakati, “Mwari, musatendera kudaro!”" 
Luke20:17 Asi wakavaringira, akati, “Ndizvo chiinyi ichi chakanyorwa chinoti, ‘Buwe iro rakarambwa ngevaaki, ndiro rakaita soro repakona?’" 
Luke20:18 Munhu weshe uwo unowira padera pebuwe iro unozoputika kuita zvigurwa; asi iye kwaari werinozowira padera pake rinozomukuya kuita bukuta.” 
Luke20:19 Vanyori nevapristi vakuru vakaedza kumubata ngeawa iro, asi vakatya vanhu; ngokuti vakazwisisa kuti wakaronza uyu muedzaniso ndivo." 
Luke20:20 Ndizvo vakamurinda, vakatuma vadongoreri, avo vakadziitisa kudai ngevanhu vakarurama, ngokudaro vakamuteya ngemazwi ake, kuti vazomupira kusimba romutongi woumambo." 
Luke20:21 Vakamubvunza vakati, “Mudzidzisi, tinozia kuti izvo zvounoronza nokudzidzisa zvakanaka, auketi munhu, asi ngegwinyiso unodzidzisa ngenjira yaMwari." 
Luke20:22 Kunotenderwa here kwetiri kuti tipe chibharo kunaSiza nokuti akutenderwi?” 
Luke20:23 Asi iye echizia urimbwi hwavo wakati kwavari," 
Luke20:24 “Ndipangidzirei chigurwa chemare. Chine muedzaniso wehope norunyoro rwaani?” Navo vakati, “Ngezva-Siza.”" 
Luke20:25 Naye wakati kwavari, “Ndizvo mwechipa kunaSiza izvo zviri zvaSiza nokuna Mwari izvo zviri zvaMwari.”" 
Luke20:26 Navo vakakorera kumubata ngemazwi okuereketa kwake pamberi pevanhu; navo vechishamiswa ngokupingura kwake vakanyarara. 
Luke20:27 Kwakaguma kwaari vamweni vevaSadhusi, avo vanoti akuna kumuswa kwevakafa, navo vakamubvunza" 
Luke20:28 vechiti, “Mudzidzisi, Mosi wakatinyorera echiti kuti mukoma womunhu afa, anemukadzi asina vana, munun'una wake unozotora mukadzi abarire mukoma wake vana." 
Luke20:29 Ndizvo vaiyapo vakoma vanomwe; uwo wedangwe wakaroora mukadzi, akafa asina vana;" 
Luke20:30 nouwo wechipiri wakamutora," 
Luke20:31 newechitatu wakamutora, ngokudaro veshe vanomwe vakafa avazi kusiya vana." 
Luke20:32 Ngesure kweizvi mukadzi naye wakafawo. 
Luke20:33 Ndizvo pakumuka kwevakafa, unozoita mukadzi waani kwavari? Ngokuti veshe vanomwe vakamutora kuita mukadzi.”" 
Luke20:34 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Vanhu vomunyika muno vanoroora nokuroodzwa;" 
Luke20:35 asi avo vanoerengwa kuti vanosisira nyika iyo nokumuka kubva kwevakafa avaroori, avaroodzwizve." 
Luke20:36 Ngokuti avachazofizve, ngokuti vanozodai ngengirosi vaa vana vaMwari, vaa vana vokumuka kwevakafa." 
Luke20:37 Asi kuti vakafa vanomuswa, Mosi emene wakapangidzira kudaro, ngeizwi rinoronza ngendaa yepfiba, apo paakadaidza Mambo Mwari kuti ndiMwari waAbrahama, Isaka naJakobe." 
Luke20:38 Zvinopano andiyepi Mwari wevakafa, asi Mwari wevanopona; ngokuti veshe vanoponera kwaari.”" 
Luke20:39 Vamweni vevanyori vakapingura, vakati, “Mudzidzisi, wanasa kuronza.”" 
Luke20:40 Ngokuti avazi kuchazoshingazve kumubvunza mubvunzo. 
Luke20:41 Asi wakati kwavari, “Vanoronza ngenyi kuti Kristu mukororo waDhavhidha?" 
Luke20:42 Ngokuti Dhavhidha emene mubhuku reNduyo wakaronza kuti, ‘Mambo wakati kunaMambo wangu, gara ngokumudyo kwangu," 
Luke20:43 metsa ndiite magaa ako chitambarariro chetsoka dzako.’ 
Luke20:44 Ndizvo kuti Dhavhidha echimudaidza kuti Mambo, ungaita mukororo wake ngokuitawani?”" 
Luke20:45 Wakati kuvadzidzi vake mukuzwa kwevanhu veshe," 
Luke20:46 “Ngwarai vanyori, avo vanodisisa kuhamba vakapfeka zvokusimira zvakareba, vanoda kuchingamidzwa pandau dzemisika nezvigaro zvepamberi mumhatso dzokudira nendau dzepamberi mumishongano yokudya," 
Luke20:47 avo vanoparadza mhatso dzeshirikadzi nangokudziitisa vanoita mikumbiro yakareba. Vanozoashira kurashwa kwakanyanyisisa.” 
Luke21:1 Wakaringira, akaona makurudza vechiisa zvipo zvavo mundau yezvipo;" 
Luke21:2 naye wakaona shirikadzi yaiya murombo yechiisamwowo zvigurwa zvethusi zviiri. 
Luke21:3 Naye wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinomuronzera, kuti iyi shirikadzi murombo yaisamwo mare yakapinda kuwanda kupinda vamweni veshe;" 
Luke21:4 ngokuti avo veshe vaisamwo muzvipo kubva pauwandu wepfuma yavo, asi iye kubva muurombo hwake waisamwo zveshe zvaanopona ndizvo.”" 
Luke21:5 Naapo vamweni vachaereketa ngendaa yeTemperi, kuti rakanemeswa ngemapuwe akawanda nezvipo, iye wakati," 
Luke21:6 “Ngendaa yeizvi zvomunoona, mazuva anozouya naapo arizosiiwi buwe rimwe rakaturikidzwa padera perimweni risikazowiswi pashi.”" 
Luke21:7 Navo vakamubvunza vechiti, “Mudzidzisi, izvi zvinozoitika riini? Chiinyi chinozoita chioniso apo zvooda kuitika?”" 
Luke21:8 Naye wakati, “Ngwarai kuti musazopaukiswa; ngokuti vazhinji vanozouya ngezina rangu vechiti, ‘Ndini aye!’ Nokuti, ‘Mukuwo wakwedzera!’ Musavateera." 
Luke21:9 Naapo mwoozwa ngehondo nokumukirana, musazotyiswa; ngokuti kunosisira kuti izvi zviitike kutanga, asi magumo aasati aapasinde.”" 
Luke21:10 Naapo wakati kwavari, “Dzinza rinozomukira dzinza noumambo hunozomukira umambo;" 
Luke21:11 kunozoapo kuzungunyika kukurutu kwenyika, nokundau dzakaparadzana nzara nenhenda, nezvinotyisa kakurutu nezvioniso zvakakura zvinobva mudenga." 
Luke21:12 Asi izvi zveshe zvisati zvaitika vanozomubata, navo vanozomutambudza, vechimupira kumhatso dzokudira nomumatirongo, vechimuunza pamberi pemadzimambo nepevatongi ngendaa yezina rangu." 
Luke21:13 Iyi inozoita nguva yenyu yokuita uchapupu. 
Luke21:14 Ndizvo nasirirai mipinimidzo yenyu, kuti musazodembatemba ngepamberi kuti chiinyi chomunozopingura;" 
Luke21:15 ngokuti ndinozomupa mazwi nokungwara, akuna naumwe wemagaa enyu ungakona kurwisana nakwo nokuti kuzviemera." 
Luke21:16 Munozopirwa kuvatongi kunyazwi ngevabereki, vakoma, hama neshamwari, navo vanozoita kuti vamweni venyu vaurawe." 
Luke21:17 Nemwi munozonyenywa ndivo veshe ngendaa yezina rangu. 
Luke21:18 Asi akuna nekabvudzi nakamwe kesoro renyu kanozorashika. 
Luke21:19 Mukusengerera kwenyu munozoponesa ndaramo dzenyu. 
Luke21:20 “Asi apo mwoona Jerusarema rechitendenedzwa ngehondo, zvino ziai kuti kuparadzwa kwaro kwaapasinde." 
Luke21:21 Naapo vari muJudhia ngavatizire kumitunhu, naavo vari mukati mwaro ngavabudemwo, naavo vari kubanze munharaunda vasazopoteramwo;" 
Luke21:22 ngokuti aya ari mazuva okuunzidzirwa, kuti zveshe izvo zvakanyorwa zvizadzisike." 
Luke21:23 Hezvo kwavari vane mimba naavo vanoamwisa ngaawo mazuva! Ngokuti kutambudzika kukurutu kuchaapo padera penyika noushungu padera pevanhu ava; 
Luke21:24 vanozowa ngokupinza kweshoti, vanozokweiwa kuita hloko kumadzinza eshe; neJerusarema rinozotsikwatsikwa pashi ngevemadzinza, metsa nguva yevemadzinza yazadzisika." 
Luke21:25 “Nezvioniso zvinozoitika pazuva, pamwedzi, panyeredzi, nepadera penyika kunozoapo kupera simba nokutyiswa ngendaa yokutinhira kworuandhle nemafungu." 
Luke21:26 Vanhu vachapera simba ngokutyiswa apo vakaringira izvo zvinouya padera penyika; ngokuti masimba omudenga anozozungunyiswa. 
Luke21:27 Naapo vanozoona Mukororo woMunhu echiuya mumakore anesimba nouthende hukurutu. 
Luke21:28 Naapo izvi zviro zvootanga kuitika, ringirai mudenga mumirudze masoro enyu, ngokuti kuripirwa kwenyu kwakwedzera pasinde.”" 
Luke21:29 Naye wakavaronzera muedzaniso echiti, “Ringirai muonde nemiti yeshe;" 
Luke21:30 kuti yaburikira mashakani, munodzionera pachenyu, nemwi munozia mwemene kuti zienza zvinopano raapasinde." 
Luke21:31 Ndizvozve, apo mwoona izvi zvechiitika, mwechizia kuti umambo hwaMwari hwaapasinde." 
Luke21:32 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, uyu mubarirwana auzopindi akadi zvisati zvaitika izvi zveshe." 
Luke21:33 Denga nenyika zvinozopinda, asi mazwi angu aatongozopindi akadi." 
Luke21:34 “Asi mwechidzingwarira imwimwi kuti pamweni mwoyo yenyu ingazozvimbirwa ngokudyisa nokuraradza nokudembatemba ngezvendaramo iyi, nezuva iro rimugumire ngokukasira kudai ngechirimbana." 
Luke21:35 Ngokuti rinozogumira padera pavo veshe avo vanogara padera penyika yeshe. 
Luke21:36 Asi rindai nguva dzeshe, kumbirai kuti muwe nesimba rokupokonyoka kubva kuneizvi zveshe zvinozoitika, nokuema pamberi poMukororo woMunhu.”" 
Luke21:37 Masikati eshe waidzidzisa muTemperi, asi usiku waibuda kuenda kooata muDunhu remaOrivhi." 
Luke21:38 Vanhu veshe vaifumira kuuya kwaari muTemperi koomuzwa. 
Luke22:1 Zvinopano mushongano wokudya chingwa chisina mumera wakakwedzera, unozwi Phasika." 
Luke22:2 Nevapristi vakuru nevanyori vaitsvaka njira yokumuuraya ndiyo, ngokuti vaitya vanhu." 
Luke22:3 Zvino Sathani wakapotera munaJudhasi uwo waizwi Isikarioti, umwe wevari gumi navairi;" 
Luke22:4 wakaenda kooshongana nevapristi vakuru nevangwariri veTemperi kuti waizomuita mapirenyi kwavari. 
Luke22:5 Navo vakadakara, vakaita chitenderano kuti vamupe mare." 
Luke22:6 Ndizvo wakatenda, akatsvaka mukuwo wokumupira kwavari pasina mbungano." 
Luke22:7 Zvino zuva rechingwa chisina mumera rakaguma, iro raibaiwa gwai rePhasika." 
Luke22:8 Jesu wakatuma Petro naJohani echiti, “Endai mutinasirire Phasika kuti tiridye.”" 
Luke22:9 Vakati kwaari, “Unoda kuti tirinasirire pari?”" 
Luke22:10 Wakati kwavari, “Penyai, apo mwoopotera mudhorobha, unozoshongana nemwi mwamuna wakatwara hari mwechimuteera kumhatso yaanopotera," 
Luke22:11 nemwi munozoti kumuna wemhatso, ‘Mudzidzisi unoti kwouri, Riripari kamera revaeni, apo pendinozodya Pasika nevadzidzi vangu?’" 
Luke22:12 Naye unozomupangidzira kamera guru romuturika rakanasirirwa ndizvo zveshe; tinasirirei apo.” 
Luke22:13 Navo vakaenda, vakaona kudai ngezvaakaronza kwavari; navo vakanasirira Pasika." 
Luke22:14 Naapo awa raguma, wakagara patafura nevapostori." 
Luke22:15 Naye wakati kwavari, “Ngokudisisa ndaida kudya iri Phasika nemwi ndisati ndatambudzika;" 
Luke22:16 ngokuti ndinomuronzera kuti andichazoridyizve, metsa razadzisika muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Luke22:17 Naye wakatora tsani, naapo abonga wakati, “Torai ichi, mukoanisirane pakati penyu;" 
Luke22:18 ngokuti ndinomuronzera kuti andichazomwi kumichero yomuvhini metsa hugume umambo hwaMwari.” 
Luke22:19 Wakatora chingwa, naapo abonga wakachigura, akachipa kwavari, akati, “Ichi chiri muiri wangu, unopirwa ngepamusoro penyu. Mwechiita ichi kundikarakadza inini.”" 
Luke22:20 Netsani ngokudaro ngesure kwokudya, echiti, “Tsani iyi inodururirwa imwimwi chitenderano chitsva mungazi yangu." 
Luke22:21 Asi ringirai, nyara youwo unondipira ineni patafura." 
Luke22:22 Ngokuti Mukororo woMunhu unoenda kudai ngezvezvakaemeswa; asi hezvo kuneuwo munhu waanozopirwa ndiye!” 
Luke22:23 Navo vakatanga kubvunzana pakati pavo kuti ndiani kwavari waizoita ichi chiro. 
Luke22:24 Kwakabudazve hasha pakati pavo yokuti ndiani kwavari unozoita mukuru. 
Luke22:25 Naye wakati kwavari, “Madzimambo emadzinza anotonga padera pavo; vanodaidzwa kuti vadetseri vevanhu." 
Luke22:26 Asi imwimwi amuzodaro akadi; asi uwo wakakurisisa pakati penyu ngaadai ngewakatsongesesa, nouwo uri mutongi ngaadai ngomuranda." 
Luke22:27 Ngokuti ndiani wakapinda kukura, uwo unogara panekudya nokuti uwo unoshandira? Andiyepi here uwo unogara panekudya? Asi inini ndiri pakati penyu ndakadai ngouwo unoshandira." 
Luke22:28 “Asi imwimwi muri avo vakagara neni mukuedzwa kwangu; 
Luke22:29 neni ndinomuemesera umambo kudai ndiBaba anguzve vakandiemesera inini," 
Luke22:30 kuti mudye mwechimwa patafura rangu muumambo hwangu, nemwi munozogara pamadendemaro mwechitonga madzinza gumi namairi aIsuraeri." 
Luke22:31 “Simoni, Simoni, ringira, Sathani wakatenderwa kuti amupuwe, kuti amutsere kudai ngekoroni," 
Luke22:32 asi inini ndakakukumbirira kuti kugonda kwako kusazopera; newe apo watenderukazve, ugwinyise vakoma vako.”" 
Luke22:33 Naye wakati kwaari, “Mambo, inini ndakanasirira kutoenda newe mutirongo nomukufa.”" 
Luke22:34 Naye wakati, “Ndinokuronzera iwewe Petro, jongwe arizoriri nyamashi, usati waramba katatu kuti aundizii.”" 
Luke22:35 Naye wakati kwavari, “Apo zvandakamutuma musina chikwama nenyede nemagwada, mwakatama chiro here?” Navo vakati, “Atina chetakatama.”" 
Luke22:36 Naye wakati kwavari, “Asi zvinopano, uwo unechikwama ngaachitore nounenyede ngokudaro. Nouwo usina shoti ngaatengise bhachi rake atenge shoti." 
Luke22:37 Ngokuti ndinomuronzera kuti ichi chinyorwa chinosisira kuti chizadzisike ndini kuti, ‘Naye wakaerengwa pamwepo nevashaishi;’ ngokuti izvo zvakanyorwa ngendaa yangu zvinozoitika.”" 
Luke22:38 Navo vakati, “Mambo, ringirai, shoti mbiri dziri panapa.” Naye wakati kwavari, “Zvakwana.”" 
Luke22:39 Naye wakabuda kubanze, wakaenda kudai ngomushuma wake kuMutunhu wemaOrivhi; nevadzidzi vakamuteera." 
Luke22:40 Naapo aguma pandau iyo wakati kwavari, “Kumbirai kuti musapinda mukuedzwa.”" 
Luke22:41 Naye wakasiyana navo nharauko inoda kudai ngeekuposhera buwe, wakagwadama pashi, akakumbira" 
Luke22:42 echiti, “Baba, dai mwechida, bvisai tsani iyi kwendiri; asi, kusaita kuda kwangu, asi kuda kwenyu ngakuitike.” [" 
Luke22:43 Yakaoneka kwaari ngirosi yechibva mudenga yechimugwinyisa. 
Luke22:44 Asi mukurwadziwa kakurutu, wakagwinyisira kukumbira; nezia rake raiya rakadai ngemadonhwe makuru engazi echibomhera pashi pamavhu.]" 
Luke22:45 Naapo amiruka kubva pamukumbiro, wakauya kuvadzidzi vake, akavaona vakaata hope ngendaa yokusvipa mwoyo," 
Luke22:46 naye wakati kwavari, “Munoatirenyi? Mukai, mukumbire kuti musapinda mukuedzwa.”" 
Luke22:47 Naapo achaereketa, kwakauya mbungano nouwo waizwi Judhasi, umwe wevari gumi navairi, echivatungamirira. Wakakwedzera kunaJesu kuti amuchingamidze ngomuromo." 
Luke22:48 Asi Jesu wakati kwaari, “Judhasi, wopira here Mukororo woMunhu ngokuchingamidza ngomuromo?”" 
Luke22:49 Naapo avo vaimutendenedza vaona izvo zvaizoitika, vakati, “Mambo, tobaya here ngeshoti?”" 
Luke22:50 Umwe wavo wakatema hloko yomupristi mukuru, akagura nzee yake yokumudyo." 
Luke22:51 Asi Jesu wakati, “Zvakwana izvi!” Naye wakabata nzee yake, akamuponesa." 
Luke22:52 Jesu wakati kunevapristi vakuru nevangwariri veTemperi nevakuru vevanhu, avo vakauya kurwisana naye, “Ngenyi mwabuda nokuuya kudai ngevanorwa nembavha, muneshoti nenduku?" 
Luke22:53 Naapo ndaiya nemwi mazuva eshe muTemperi, amuzi kundibata. Asi iri riri awa renyu neresimba rechidima.”" 
Luke22:54 Naapo vakamubata, vakamukweya kuenda naye, vakamuunza mumhatso yomupristi mukuru. Asi Petro wakateera ari kuretu." 
Luke22:55 Naapo vabasa muriro pakati poruwanze, vakagara pashi pamwepo, Petro wakagara pashi pakati pavo." 
Luke22:56 Naapo musikana, echimuona akagara mukujeka kwomuriro, echimuringisisa wakati, “Munhu uyu waiya naye.”" 
Luke22:57 Asi iye wakaramba echiti, “Dzimai, andimuzii.”" 
Luke22:58 Ngesure kwekamukuwo, umweni wakamuona akati, “Iwewe newe uri umwe wavo.” Asi Petro wakati, “Mwamunewe, inini andiri umwe wavo akadi.”" 
Luke22:59 Ngesure kwomukuwo waida kuita awa, umwenizve wakagwinyisira kuronza echiti, “Ngegwinyiso munhu uyu waiya naye, ngokuti muGarire.”" 
Luke22:60 Asi Petro wakati, “Mwamunewe, andichizii chounoronza.” Paripo achaereketa, jongwe rakarira." 
Luke22:61 NaMambo wakakunukuka, akaringira kunaPetro, naPetro wakakarakadza izwi raMambo, ngenjira yaakaronza kwaari kuti, “Jongwe risati rarira nyamashi, unozondiramba katatu.”" 
Luke22:62 Naye wakabuda kubanze, akachema kakurutu." 
Luke22:63 Nevamuna avo vakabata Jesu vakamuitira jee, vakamurova;" 
Luke22:64 vakamufukidza muhope, vakamubvunza vechiti, “Profeta! Ndiani uwo wakurova?”" 
Luke22:65 Vakaereketa zviro zvimweni zvakawanda ndiye vechimutsambura. 
Luke22:66 Naapo kwaedza, vakaunganidza pamwepo vakuru vevanhu nevapristi vakuru nevanyori, navo vakamukweya kuenda naye kubangano ravo vechiti," 
Luke22:67 “Kuti uri Kristu, tironzere.” Asi iye wakati kwavari, “Kudai ndanyamuronzera, amuzotendi;" 
Luke22:68 kunyazwi ndikanyamubvunza, imwimwi amuzopinguri." 
Luke22:69 Asi kubvira zvinopano Mukororo woMunhu unozogara ngokumudyo kwesimba raMwari.” 
Luke22:70 Navo veshe vakati, “Iwewe zvino uri Mukororo waMwari here?” Naye wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi mwatoronza kuti ndini inini.”" 
Luke22:71 Navo vakati, “Tichatama chapupu chimweni ngenyi? Ngokuti isusu temene tazwa kubva pamuromo wake.”" 
Luke23:1 Naapo mushongano weshe wavo wakamiruka, vakamuunza pamberi paPiratu." 
Luke23:2 Navo vakatanga kumuitira ndaa vechiti, “Takamuona uyu munhu echipaukisa dzinza redu, echirambidza kuti chibharo chisabhadharwa kunaSiza, echironza kuti iye emene ndiKristu, mambo.”" 
Luke23:3 NaPiratu wakamubvunza echiti, “Iwewe uri mambo wevaJudha here?” Naye wakamupingura, akati, “Ndizvo zvewaronza.”" 
Luke23:4 NaPiratu wakati kuvapristi vakuru nokumbungano, “Andioni ndaa kumunhu uyu.”" 
Luke23:5 Asi vakapinda kutsamwirira vechiti, “Unovherudza vanhu, echidzidzisa muJudhia mweshe, kutanga ngomuGarire metsa kuguma pandau iyi.”" 
Luke23:6 Naapo Piratu azwa izvi wakabvunza kuti, “Munhu uyu muGarire here?”" 
Luke23:7 Naapo azia kuti waiya woumambo hwaHerodhi, wakamutumira kunaHerodhi, uwo naye waiya muJerusarema ngaawo mazuva." 
Luke23:8 Naapo Herodhi aona Jesu wakadakara kakurutu, ngokuti iye waiya nechidisiso chokuda kumuona kubvira mukuwo wakareba, ngokuti iye waiya azwa ndiye, naye waida kuona chioniso chinoitwa ndiye." 
Luke23:9 Ndizvo wakamubvunza ngemazwi akawanda, asi aazi kupingura chiro." 
Luke23:10 Vapristi vakuru nevanyori vakaema vechitsamwirira kumuitira ndaa. 
Luke23:11 NaHerodhi pamwepo namajoni ake vakamubata ngenjira inotsverudza, akamuitira jee, vakamupfekisa zvokusimira zvinon'anikira, akamutumirazve kunaPiratu." 
Luke23:12 Herodhi naPiratu vakaiyaniswa ngeiro zuva, ngokuti ngepasure vaiya magaa." 
Luke23:13 Piratu wakadaidza pamwepo vapristi vakuru, vatongi nevanhu." 
Luke23:14 Wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi mwaunza uyu munhu kwendiri mwechiti unopaukisa vanhu. Penyai, inini ndamubvunzisisa pamberi penyu; penya, andizi kuona ndaa kuneuyu munhu ngeizvo zvomunomuitira ndaa ndizvo." 
Luke23:15 Kunyazwi Herodhiwo, ngokuti wamupetudza kwetiri; ringirai, akuna chiro chakaitwa ndiye chaangatongerwa kuti afe." 
Luke23:16 Ndizvo ndichamurova ndimusunhure.” [ 
Luke23:17 Zvinopano waisisira kuti avasunhurire mubhanditi umwe pamushongano wokudya.] 
Luke23:18 Asi vakadaidzira veshe pamwepo, “Bvisa uyu munhu, utisunhurire Bharabhasi.”" 
Luke23:19 Uwo wakakonyerwa mutirongo ngendaa youdzongoni hwaakaita mudhorobha nendaa yokuuraya. 
Luke23:20 Piratu wakaereketazve kwavari, echida kusunhura Jesu." 
Luke23:21 Asi vakadaidzira vechiti, “Mukohomere, mukohomere!”" 
Luke23:22 Naye wakati kwavari ngokwechitatu, “Ngenyi, wakashaishenyi munhu uyu? Andizi kuona kwaari ndaa yaangatongerwa kuti afe. Ndizvo ndichamurova ndimusunhure.”" 
Luke23:23 Asi paripo vakatsamwirira ngemazwi makuru, vechikumbira kuti akohomerwe. Nemazwi avo akanyisa." 
Luke23:24 NaPiratu wakagura kuti izvo zvevakakumbira zviitike. 
Luke23:25 Naye wakavasunhurira uwo waiya akakonyerwa mutirongo ngendaa youdzongoni nokuuraya, uwo wevakakumbira; asi wakavapa Jesu kuti vaite kuda kwavo ndiye." 
Luke23:26 Naapo vechimukweya kuenda naye, vakabata munhu waizwi ndiSimoni weKurene, echibva munharaunda, vakaisa padera pake muchinjiko kuti autware ngesure kwaJesu." 
Luke23:27 Yakamuteera mbungano huru yevanhu, nevakadzi avo vaimuchema nokumutsumba." 
Luke23:28 Asi Jesu echikunukukira kwavari wakati, “Vakunda veJerusarema, musandichemera inini, asi mwechidzichemera imwimwi nevana venyu." 
Luke23:29 Ngokuti ringirai, mazuva achauya evanozoti, ‘Dzinomuchena ngomwa nendani dzisikazi kumbobereka nemazamo asikazi kumboamwisa!’" 
Luke23:30 Naapo vanozotanga kuronza kumitunhu kuti, ‘Tiwirenyi padera pedu,’ nokuzvimitunhu kuti, ‘Tidumaidzenyi.’" 
Luke23:31 Ngokuti kudai vechiita izvi kumuti muishi, chiinyi chinozoitwa kunewakaoma.”" 
Luke23:32 Vairi vamweni, madzongoni, vakakweiwa pamwepo naye koourawa." 
Luke23:33 Naapo vaguma pandau inozwi Denhenya, vakamukohomerapo nevashaishi, umwe ngokumudyo noumweni ngokumuoshwe." 
Luke23:34 Jesu wakati, “Baba, varekererei; ngokuti avachizii chevanoita.” Navo vechikoanisirana zvokufuka zvake pakati pavo, vakaita mabhigidha." 
Luke23:35 Nevanhu vakaema vechiringira; asi vatongi vakamuitira jee vechiti, “Iye wakaponesa vamweni, ngaadziponese, kuti ari Kristu waMwari, wakatsanangurwa wake!”" 
Luke23:36 Majoni nawo akamuitira jee, vechiuya kwaari nokumupa vhini rinorungura" 
Luke23:37 vechiti, “Kuti iwewe uri Mambo wevaJudha, dziponese!”" 
Luke23:38 Rwaiyapo runyoro ngepadera pake rwaiti, “UYU NDIMAMBO WEVAJUDHA.”" 
Luke23:39 Umwe wevashaishi avo vakakohomerwa naye wakamutsambura echiti, “Andiwe here Kristu? Chidziponesa iwewe neisusu.”" 
Luke23:40 Asi umweni wakapingura echimurambidza, akati, “Aumutyi here Mwari, wechiona kuti uri mukurashwa kumwekwo naye?" 
Luke23:41 Nesu ngegwinyiso tinosisira kurashwa, ngokuti tinoashira zvinosisira zviito zvedu. Asi uyu munhu aazi kuita zvakashata.”" 
Luke23:42 Naye wakati, “Jesu, ndicherechedzewo apo woopotera muumambo hwako.”" 
Luke23:43 Naye wakati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinokuronzera, kuti nyamashi unozoapo neni muPharadhaisi.”" 
Luke23:44 Panguva yaida kuita awa rechitanhatu, nechidima chakafukidza nyika yeshe metsa kuguma awa rechipfumbamwe." 
Luke23:45 Naapo kujeka kwezuva kwakapera, nejira romuTemperi rakabaurwa ngepakati." 
Luke23:46 Apapo Jesu wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru, wakati, “Baba, ndinoisa mweya wangu munyara dzako!” Naapo aronza kudaro, mweya wake wakabuda." 
Luke23:47 Naapo nduna yezana yaona zvakaitika, yakakudza Mwari yechiti, “Ngegwinyiso uyu waiya munhu wakarurama!”" 
Luke23:48 Nembungano yeshe iyo yakaungana pamwepo yechiringira, apo yaona zvakaitika, vakahwirira kanyi vechirova maditi avo." 
Luke23:49 Naavo veshe vaiziyana naye nemadzimai awo akamuteera echibva Garire vakaema vari kuretu, vechiona zviro izvi." 
Luke23:50 Zvinopano waiyapo munhu waizwi ndiJosefa, waibva mudhorobha reJudhia reArimathia. Waiya umwe wenhengo yevatongi, munhu wakanaka newakarurama." 
Luke23:51 Waiya asikazi kutenderana nebangano nokuita kwavo, akandogarira umambo hwaMwari." 
Luke23:52 Munhu uyu wakaenda kunaPiratu, akakumbira muiri waJesu." 
Luke23:53 Naye wakaudzasa pashi, akauputira ngejira rakachena, akauika muiba rakatsiwa pabuwe, umwo musikazi kumboikwa munhu." 
Luke23:54 Naro raiya zuva rokunasirira Phasika, neSabatha rooda kutanga." 
Luke23:55 Nemadzimai avo vaiya vakabva naye Garire vakateera ngesure, vakaona iba nokuikwa kwomuiri wake." 
Luke23:56 Navo vakahwirira, vakanasirira mitombo inegwema rakanaka nemakha. Vakazorora ngezuva reSabatha, kudai ngezvinoronza mupango." 
Luke24:1 Asi ngezuva rokutanga revhiki, mangwanani maishi, vakauya kuiba, vechiunza mitombo inegwema rakanaka yevaiya vanasirira." 
Luke24:2 Navo vakaona buwe ramburumbudzwa kubva paiba. 
Luke24:3 Asi naapo vapotera mukati avazi kuona muiri waMambo Jesu. 
Luke24:4 Naapo vachakangaidzwa ndizvo, penya, vamuna vairi vakaema pasinde pavo, vakapfeka zvinon'anikira;" 
Luke24:5 naapo vechityiswa, vakatsikitsira pashi hope dzavo, vamuna vakati kwavari, “Munotsvaka vanopona ngenyi pakati pevakafa?" 
Luke24:6 Amuna muno, wamuka. Cherechedzai zvaakamuronzera apo achiri muGarire" 
Luke24:7 echiti, ‘Kunosisira kuti Mukororo woMunhu apirwe munyara dzevanhu vakashata, akohomerwe, naye ngezuva rechitatu amuke.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Navo vakakarakadza mazwi ake," 
Luke24:9 vechipetuka kubva kuiba, vakaronza izvi zveshe kunevarigumi naumwe nokunevamweni veshe." 
Luke24:10 Zvinopano vaiya Maria Magadhareni, Joana, Maria mai aJakobe, pamwepo nemadzimai amweni, vakaronza izvi kunevapostori." 
Luke24:11 Asi mazwi aya akaoneka kwavari ari asina shwiro, navo avazi kuatenda." 
Luke24:12 Asi Petro wakamiruka, akarumba kuenda kuiba, akaguma, wakakotama, akaringira mukati, akaona machira akachena andori ega; naye wakaenda kanyi kwake, echishamiswa ngeicho chakaitika." 
Luke24:13 Pazuva iro vairi vavo vaihamba kuenda kuguta rinozwi Emausi, raida kuita makhiromitha gumi narimwe kubva Jerusarema." 
Luke24:14 Navo vaiereketa umwe kunoumweni ngeizvo zveshe zvakaitika. 
Luke24:15 Naapo vachaereketa vechibvunzisana, Jesu emene wakakwedzera kwavari, akahamba navo." 
Luke24:16 Asi madziso avo akaitiswa rubuma kuti vasamuzia. 
Luke24:17 Wakati kwavari, “Ngerenyi shoko iri romunoereketa umwe kunoumweni mwechihamba?” Vakaema vakanyarara, vane hope dzinotambudzika." 
Luke24:18 Naapo umwe wavo, unozwi Kreopasi, wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Unogara uri wega here muJerusarema usikazii izvo zvakaitikamwo ngaaya mazuva?”" 
Luke24:19 Naye wakati kwavari, “Zviro zvenyi?” Vakati kwaari, “Izvo zvaJesu weNazaretha, uwo waiya muprofeti anesimba ngezviito namazwi pamberi paMwari nepamberi pevanhu veshe," 
Luke24:20 nenjira yevakamupira ndiyo vapristi vakuru nevatongi vedu nokugura kuti aurawe ngokumukohomera. 
Luke24:21 Asi isusu taigonda kuti ndiye waizoripira Isuraeri. Eya, nepadera peizvi zveshe, nyamashi ratoa zuva rechitatu kubvira panguva yezvakaitika izvi." 
Luke24:22 Uyezve, vamweni vemadzimai vechiunga chedu vatishamisa. Vafumira kuenda kuiba," 
Luke24:23 naapo vasikaoni muiri wake, vakauya vechiti vaona chioniso chengirosi, idzo dzati kwavari unopona." 
Luke24:24 Nevamweni veavo vaiya nesu vakaendawo kuiba, vakaona kudai ngezvevakaronza madzimai; asi iye avazi kumuona.”" 
Luke24:25 Iye wakati kwavari, “A! Mapenzi nevanononoka kutenda ngomwoyo izvo zveshe zvakaereketwa ngevaprofeti!" 
Luke24:26 Kwaiya kusikasisiri here kuti Kristu atambudzwe ngeizvi zviro zveshe nokupotera muuthende hwake?” 
Luke24:27 Naye echibva ngezvaMosi nezvevaprofeti veshe wakapangidzira kwavari muzvinyorwa zveshe izvo zvakanyorwa ngendaa yake. 
Luke24:28 Ndizvo vakakwedzera kuguta apo pevaienda. Iye wakaita kudai ngounopinda kuenda mberi," 
Luke24:29 asi vakamukoka vechiti, “Gara nesu, ngokuti rotengama nezuva rooda kubira.” Naye wakapotera koogara navo." 
Luke24:30 Naapo agara navo pakudya, wakatora chingwa, akachibonga, akachigura, akachipa kwavari." 
Luke24:31 Nemadziso avo akapembenuka navo vakamuzia; naye wakanyangarika kubva mukuona kwavo. 
Luke24:32 Navo vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Mwoyo yedu aizi kupisha here mukati mwedu apo achaereketa kwetiri munjira nokupangidzira kwetiri zvakanyorwa?”" 
Luke24:33 Navo vakamiruka ngeiro awa, vakahwirira Jerusarema; vakaona varigumi naumwe vakaungana pamwepo nevamweni avo vaiya navo" 
Luke24:34 vechiti, “Mambo wamuka ngegwinyiso, naye waoneka kunaSimoni!”" 
Luke24:35 Zvino vakaronza izvo zvakaitika vari munjira, nokuziikanwa kwaakaita ndivo ngokugura chingwa." 
Luke24:36 Naapo vacharonza izvi, Jesu emene wakaema pakati pavo, akati kwavari, “Kunyarara ngakugare kwomuri.”" 
Luke24:37 Asi vakakaruka, vakatyiswa kakurutu, vakapinimidza kuti vaona dzangaradzimu." 
Luke24:38 Naye wakati kwavari, “Munotambudzika ngenyi? Inobuda ngenyi mibvunzo iyi mumwoyo yenyu?" 
Luke24:39 Ringirai nyara dzangu netsoka dzangu, ndini ndemene. Ndibatei muone; ngokuti dzangaradzimu arina nyama nemagodo kudai ngezvomunoona kuti inini ndinazvo.”" 
Luke24:40 Naapo aereketa kudaro, wakavapangidzira nyara dzake netsoka dzake." 
Luke24:41 Naapo vasikagondi ngendaa yokudakara nokushamiswa, wakati kwavari, “Munazvo here panapa zvokudya?”" 
Luke24:42 Vakamupa chigurwa chehove chakasasikwa," 
Luke24:43 naye wakachitora, akadya pamberi pavo." 
Luke24:44 Naapo wakati kwavari, “Aya ndiwo mazwi endakaereketa kwomuri ndichiri nemwi, kuti kunosisira kuti zveshe zvizadzisike izvo zvakanyorwa muMipango yaMosi nezvevaprofeti nezveNduyo ndini.”" 
Luke24:45 Naapo wakajekisa mipinimidzo yavo kuti vazwisise zvinyorwa," 
Luke24:46 naye wakati kwavari, “Kwakanyorwa kudai, Kristu unozotambudzwa nokumukazve kubva kwevakafa ngezuva rechitatu," 
Luke24:47 nokutizve kutenderuka nokurekererwa kwezvishaishi kunosisira kuchumairwa ngezina rake kunemadzinza eshe, kutanga muJerusarema." 
Luke24:48 Nemwi muri zvapupu zveizvi zviro. 
Luke24:49 Penyai, ndinotuma chigondiso chaBaba angu padera penyu; asi garai mudhorobha, metsa mupfekeswe ngesimba rinobva mudenga.”" 
Luke24:50 Naapo wakavatungamirira kubuda mudhorobha metsa vaguma Bhethani, naye echimirudza nyara dzake wakavafumisa." 
Luke24:51 Naapo achavafumisa, wakaparadzana navo, akakwidzwa mudenga." 
Luke24:52 Navo vakamudira, vakahwirira kuenda Jerusarema ngokudakara kukurutu," 
Luke24:53 navo vakatsamwirira kugara muTemperi vechikudza Mwari. 
John1:1 Pakutanga waiyapo Izwi, neIzwi waiya naMwari, neIzwi waiya Mwari." 
John1:2 Waiyapo pakutanga naMwari. 
John1:3 Zviro zveshe zvakasikwa kubudikidza ndiye, ngepabanze pake paiya pasina chiro nachimwe chakasikwa cheizvo zvakasikwa." 
John1:4 Mwaari kwaiyamwo kupona nokupona kwaiya kujeka kwavanhu. 
John1:5 Kujeka kunojeka muchidima nechidima achizi kukudzima. 
John1:6 Kwaiyapo munhu wakatumwa ndiMwari, zina rake raiya Johani." 
John1:7 Wakauya kuita chapupu, kuti apupure ngokujeka, kuti vanhu veshe vatende kubudikidza ndiye." 
John1:8 Iye waiya asiriye kujeka, asi wakauya kuti apupure ngokujeka." 
John1:9 Kujeka ukwo kwaiya kujeka kwegwinyiso, ukwo kunojekisa vanhu veshe vanobarwa munyika." 
John1:10 Waiya munyika, nenyika yakasikwa kubudikidza ndiye, asi nyika aizi kumuzia." 
John1:11 Wakauya munezvake, nevanhu vake avazi kumuashira." 
John1:12 Asi kwavari veshe vakamuashira, avo vakatenda muzina rake, wakavapa simba rokuti vaite vana vaMwari;" 
John1:13 avo vasikazi kubarwa ngengazi nokuti ngokuemura kwenyama nokuti ngokuemura kwomunhu, asi vakabarwa ndiMwari." 
John1:14 NeIzwi wakaita munhu, wakagara pakati pedu, nesu takaringira uthende hwake, uthende huri hwouwo wakabarwa ega ndiBaba, akazara ngenyasha negwinyiso." 
John1:15 (Johani wakaita chapupu ndiye, akadaidzira echiti, “Uyu ndiye wendakaereketa ndiye kuti, ‘Uwo unouya sure kwangu mukuru kupinda inini ngokuti waiyapo ndisati ndaapo.’ ”)" 
John1:16 Kubva mukuzara kwake isusu teshe takaashira, nyasha padera penyasha." 
John1:17 Ngokuti mipango yakapuwa kubudikidza ndiMosi; asi nyasha negwinyiso zvakaapo kubudikidza ndiJesu Kristu. 
John1:18 Akuna naumwe wakamboona Mwari; Mukororo ega, uwo unogara paditi raBaba, ndiye wakamuita kuti aziikanwe." 
John1:19 Neichi ndicho chapupu chaJohani, apo vaJudha vakatuma kwaari vapristi nevaRevhi kubva Jerusarema koomubvunza kuti, “Urianani iwewe?”" 
John1:20 Naye wakatenda, aazi kuramba, asi wakatenda echiti, “Inini andinipi Kristu akadi.”" 
John1:21 Navo vakamubvunza vechiti, “Wati kudini? Uri Erija here?” Naye wakapingura echiti, “Andiriyepi.” “Uri muprofeti here?” Naye wakapingura echiti, “Haiwa.”" 
John1:22 Ndizvo vakati kwaari zvino, “Urianani? Tipingure kuti tione chokoopingura avo vakatituma. Unotinyi iwewe pachako?”" 
John1:23 Wakati, “Inini ndini izwi rounodaidzira mushango echiti, ‘Ruramisai njira yaMambo,’ kudai ngezvaakaronza Isaya muprofeti.”" 
John1:24 Zvino vaiya vakatumwa kubva kuvaFarisi. 
John1:25 Navo vakamubvunza, vakati kwaari, “Zvino ngenyi wechibhabhatidza, kuti usiri Kristu nokuti Erija nokuti uwo muprofeti?”" 
John1:26 Johani wakavapingura echiti, “Inini ndinobhabhatidza ngemvura; asi pakati penyu panoema uwo womusikazii," 
John1:27 ndiye uwo unouya sure kwangu, wendisikasisiri inini kuti ndisunungure rusinga rwegwada rake.”" 
John1:28 Izvi zvakaitika muBhethani seri kweJorodhani, apo paaibhabhatidza Johani." 
John1:29 Nechimangwani aona Jesu echiuya kwaari, wakati, “Ringirai, Kagwai kaMwari kanodusa kushaisha kwenyika!" 
John1:30 Uyu ndiye wendakaereketa ndiye kuti, ‘Sure kwangu kunouya munhu uri mukuru kupinda inini, ngokuti waiyapo ndisati ndaapo.’" 
John1:31 Inini pachangu ndaiya ndisikamuzii; asi ngendaa iyi ndakauya ndechibhabhatidza ngemvura kuti apangidzirwe kuvaIsuraeri.” 
John1:32 NaJohani wakaita chapupu echiti, “Ndakaona Mweya wechidzaka kubva mudenga wakadai ngenjia, ukagara padera pake." 
John1:33 Inini pachangu ndaiya ndisikamuzii; asi iye wakandituma kuti ndibhabhatidze ngemvura wakati kwendiri, ‘Uwo wounozoona Mweya wechidzaka nokugara padera pake, uyu ndiye unobhabhatidza ndiMweya Wakachena.’" 
John1:34 Neni ndakaona, ndakapupura kuti uyu ndiye Mukororo waMwari.”" 
John1:35 Nechimangwanizve Johani waiya akaema nevairi vevadzidzi vake; 
John1:36 naye aona Jesu echihamba, wakati, “Ringirai, Kagwai kaMwari!”" 
John1:37 Vadzidzi vairi vakamuzwa echiereketa izvi, vakateera Jesu." 
John1:38 Jesu wakakunukuka, akavaona vechimuteera, akati kwavari, “Munotsvakenyi?” Vakati kwaari, “Rabhi (ukwo kunoti ngokukumuchwa, Mudzidzisi,) unogara pari?”" 
John1:39 Wakati kwavari, “Uyai muone.” Ndizvo vakauya vakaona apo paaigara, navo vakagara naye zuvaro. Raiya rooda kuita awa rechigumi." 
John1:40 Umwe wevairi avo vakazwa Johani echiereketa, akamuteera, waiya Andreu, munun'una waSimoni Petro." 
John1:41 Iye wakatanga kutsvaka mukoma wake Simoni, akati kwaari, “Tamuona Mesia” (ukwo kunoti ngokukumuchwa, Kristu.)" 
John1:42 Naye wakamuunza kunaJesu. Naapo Jesu amuringira wakati, “Iwewe ndiwe Simoni mukororo waJohani. Unozodaidzwa kuti Khefasi” (ukwo kunoti ngokukumuchwa, Petro.)" 
John1:43 Nechimangwani wakada kuenda Garire, wakaona Firipu. NaJesu wakati kwaari, “Nditeere.”" 
John1:44 Zvino Firipu waibva Bhethisaidha, dhorobha revaigara Andreu naPetro." 
John1:45 Firipu wakaona Nathanaeri, akati kwaari, “Tamuona uwo waakanyora ndiye Mosi muMipango nevaprofeti, Jesu weNazaretha, mukororo waJosefa.”" 
John1:46 Nathanaeri wakati kwaari, “Kungabvawo chakanaka muNazaretha here?” Firipu wakati kwaari, “Uya uone.”" 
John1:47 Jesu wakaona Nathanaeri echiuya kwaari, akati ndiye, “Ringirai muIsuraeri wegwinyiso, usina kuchengedza mukati mwake!”" 
John1:48 Nathanaeri wakati kwaari, “Wandiziira pari?” Jesu wakapingura akati kwaari, “Firipu asati akudaidza, uri pashi pomuonde, ndakakuona.”" 
John1:49 Nathanaeri wakapingura akati, “Rabhi, iwewe uri Mukororo waMwari! Uri Mambo waIsuraeri!”" 
John1:50 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Ngokuti ndati kwouri, ndakakuona uripashi pomuonde, unotenda here? Unozoona zviro zvikuru kupinda izvi.”" 
John1:51 Wakati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, munozoona denga rakabeuka nengirosi dzaMwari dzechikwira nokudzaka padera poMukororo woMunhu.”" 
John2:1 Ngezuva rechitatu kwaiyapo muchadho muKhana reGarire, namai aJesu vaiyapo." 
John2:2 Jesu wakakokwawo nevadzidzi vake kumuchadho. 
John2:3 Naapo vhini rapera, mai aJesu vakati kwaari, “Avachina vhini.”" 
John2:4 NaJesu wakati kwaari, “Chinenyi ichi kwendiri nokwouri, mai? Awa rangu arisati raguma.”" 
John2:5 Mai ake vakati kuvashandi, “Kunyazwi chiinyi chaanoronza kwomuri, itai.”" 
John2:6 Zvino aiyapo mabiya emapuwe matanhatu emvura kudai ngomuitiro wavaJudha wokushamba, rimwe ngarimwe raipinda nhuvi mbiri nokuti nhatu." 
John2:7 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Zadzai mabiya ngemvura.” Navo vakaazadza kuti penu." 
John2:8 Naye wakati kwavari, “Cherai zvino, muende nayo kunenhunge yomuchadho.” Navo vakatora vakaenda nayo." 
John2:9 Naapo nhunge yomuchadho yaraira mvura iyo yakapindudzwa kuita vhini, isikazi kuzia kuti rabva kuri (asi vashandi avo vakachera mvura vaizia), nhunge yomuchadho yakadaidza mukwambo" 
John2:10 nayo yakati kwaari, “Munhu weshe unobudisa kutanga vhini rakanaka; naapo vanhu vamwa kakurutu, unobudisa iro risikazi kunasa kunaka; asi iwewe wakangwarira vhini rakanasa kunaka metsa zvino.”" 
John2:11 Jesu wakaita uyu, mushamiso wake wokutanga, muKhana reGarire, wakapangidzira uthende hwake; nevadzidzi vake vakatenda kwaari." 
John2:12 Ngesure kweizvi wakadzaka kuenda Khapernaume, iye namai ake nevanun'una vake nevadzidzi vake; navo vakagarapo mazuva asikazi kuwanda." 
John2:13 NePhasika revaJudha raiya raapasinde, naJesu wakakwira kuenda Jerusarema." 
John2:14 Naye wakaona muTemperi avo vaitengesa n'ombe, makwai nenjia, nevaitenganisana mare vakagaramwo." 
John2:15 Naapo aiya aita swepu, wakavadzinga veshe kubva muTemperi, zveshe makwai nen'ombe. Wakadurura pashi mare yavaitenganisana, akapinduridza matafura avo." 
John2:16 Naye wakati kuneavo vaitengesa njia, “Dusai izvi zviro kubva pano! Musaita mhatso yaBaba angu mhatso yokutengesira!”" 
John2:17 Nevadzidzi vake vakakarakadza kuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Kutsamwirira ngendaa yemhatso yako kuchandipedza.”" 
John2:18 Ndizvo vaJudha vakamupingura, vakati kwaari, “Muoniso wenyi woungaita kutionisa kuti unesimba rokuita izvi zviro?”" 
John2:19 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Putsai iri Temperi, ndinozorimirudzazve ngemazuva matatu.”" 
John2:20 Ndizvo vaJudha vakati, “Temperi iri rakaakwa ngemakore makumi marongomuna namatanhatu, newe ungarimirudza here ngemazuva matatu?”" 
John2:21 Asi iye wakaereketa ngendaa yetemperi romuiri wake. 
John2:22 Ndizvo apo amuswa kubva kwevakafa, vadzidzi vake vakakarakadza kuti waiya akaereketa ngeichi; navo vakatenda zvakanyorwa neizwi iro raakaereketa Jesu." 
John2:23 Zvino apo aiya muJerusarema padhiri rePhasika, vazhinji vakatenda zina rake apo vaona mishamiso yaakaita." 
John2:24 Asi Jesu aazi kudzipira kwavari, ngokuti iye waizia vanhu veshe," 
John2:25 waiya asikatami naumwe kuti apupurire kwaari ngendaa yomunhu; ngokuti iye waizia emene izvo zviri mukati mwomunhu. 
John3:1 Zvino kwaiyapo munhu wevaFarisi, zina rake ndiNikodhemusi, mutongi wevaJudha." 
John3:2 Uyu munhu wakauya kunaJesu usiku wakati kwaari, “Rabhi, tinozia kuti iwewe uri mudzidzisi wakabva kunaMwari; ngokuti akuna naumwe ungakona kuita iyi mioniso younoita, kwega kuti Mwari anaye.”" 
John3:3 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwouri, kudai munhu asabarwa ngokwomudenga, aakoni kuona umambo hwaMwari.”" 
John3:4 Nikodhemusi wakati kwaari, “Munhu ungaita mabarirwenyizve apo aamusharuka? Ungakona here kuti apotere ngokwechipiri mundani yamai ake, abarwezve?”" 
John3:5 Jesu wakapingura echiti, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwouri, kuti munhu asabarwa ngemvura noMweya, aangakoni kupotera muumambo hwaMwari." 
John3:6 Munhu unobarwa ngokwenyama inyama, unobarwa ngokwoMweya mweya." 
John3:7 Usashama ngokuti ndati kwouri, ‘Kunosisira kuti ubarwe ngokwomudenga.’" 
John3:8 Dutu rinovhuvhuta perinoda, newe unozwa chaungira charo, asi auzii perinobva neperinoenda. Zvakadaro kwavari veshe vanobarwa ngokwoMweya.”" 
John3:9 Nikodhemusi wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Izvi zvingaita maitikirenyi?”" 
John3:10 Jesu wakapingura akati kwaari, “Iwewe uri mudzidzisi waIsuraeri, auzwisisi izvi here?" 
John3:11 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwouri, tinoereketa chetinozia, nesu tinopupura ngeicho chetakaona; nemwi amuashiri uchapupu hwedu." 
John3:12 Kudai ndamuronzera zviro zvomunyika nemwi amuzi kuzvitenda, hino munozoita matenderenyi kudai ndechimuronzera ngezviro zvomudenga?" 
John3:13 Akuna naumwe wakambokwira mudenga, asi uwo wakadzaka kubva mudenga, Mukororo woMunhu." 
John3:14 Kudai ndiMosi wakamirudza nyoka mushango, ngokudaro kunosisira kuti Mukororo woMunhu amirudzwe," 
John3:15 kuti kunyazwi ndiani unomutenda aone kupona kusikaperi.” 
John3:16 Ngokuti Mwari wakaida nyika kudai, wakahina Mukororo wake wakabarwa ari ega, kuti veshe vanomutenda vasafa asi vaone kupona kusikaperi." 
John3:17 Ngokuti Mwari aazi kutuma Mukororo wake munyika kuti atonge nyika, asi kuti nyika iponeswe kubudikidza ndiye." 
John3:18 Uwo unotenda kwaari aatongwi; asi uwo usikatendi watotongwa nazvino, ngokuti aazi kutenda zina rouwo wakabarwa ari ega Mukororo waMwari." 
John3:19 Uku ndikwo kutongwa, kuti kujeka kwakaguma munyika, nevanhu vakada chidima kakurutu kupinda kujeka, ngokuti mishando yavo yaiya yakashata." 
John3:20 Ngokuti weshe unoita zvakashata unozonda kujeka naye aauyi mukujeka, ngokuti mishando yake inozooneka pamhene." 
John3:21 Asi uwo unoita zvinegwinyiso unouya mukujeka, kuti mishando yake inase kuoneka kuti yakaitwa munaMwari." 
John3:22 Ngesure kweizvi Jesu nevadzidzi vake vakaenda munyika yeJudhia; naye wakagaramwo navo echibhabhatidza. 
John3:23 NaJohani waibhabhatidza muAenoni pasinde peSarimu, ngokuti yaiyapo mvura yakawanda; vanhu vakauya vakabhabhatidzwa." 
John3:24 (Ngokuti Johani waiya asati aiswa mutirongo.) 
John3:25 Zvino kwakaapo kuphikisana pakati pevadzidzi vaJohani nomuJudha ngendaa yokucheneswa. 
John3:26 Navo vakauya kunaJohani, vakati kwaari, “Rabhi, uwo waiya newe seri kweJorodhani, uwo wowakaita chapupu ndiye, uyu uri pano, unobhabhatidza, navo veshe vanoenda kwaari.”" 
John3:27 Johani wakapingura, akati, “Munhu aakoni kuashira chiro kunyazwi ngechiri kuti asikazi kuchipuwa kubva mudenga." 
John3:28 Imwimwi mwemene mwakaita chapupu ndini kuti ndakati, ‘Inini andiriyepi Kristu, asi ndakatumwa pamberi pake.’" 
John3:29 Uwo unanyamuroorwa ndiye mukwambo; asi shamwari yomukwambo, iyo inoema yechimuzwa, inodakara ngendaa yeizwi romukwambo; ndizvo uku kudakara kwangu kwazadkisika." 
John3:30 Kunosisira kuti iye akuriswe, asi inini ndinosisira kuti nditsonge.”" 
John3:31 Uwo unouya echibva mudenga uri padera pazvo zveshe; uwo unobva munyika ngowenyika, naye unoereketa zvomunyika. Uwo unobva mudenga uri padera pazvo zveshe." 
John3:32 Naye unopupura ngeizvo zvaakaona nezvaakazwa, asi akuna munhu unoashira chapupu chake." 
John3:33 Uwo wakaashira chapupu chake, wakagwinyisa kuti Mwari igwinyiso." 
John3:34 Ngokuti uwo waatuma Mwari unoereketa mazwi aMwari, ngokuti iye aapi kwaari Mweya ngechipimo." 
John3:35 Baba vanoda Mukororo, navo vakapa zviro zveshe munyara dzake." 
John3:36 Uwo unotenda Mukororo waane kupona kusikaperi; nouwo usikatendi Mukororo aazooni kupona, asi ushungu hwaMwari hunondogara padera pake." 
John4:1 Ndizvo apo Mambo azia kuti vaFarisi vaiya vazwa kuti Jesu waiita nokubhabhatidza vadzidzi vakawanda kupinda Johani," 
John4:2 (kunyazwi Jesu emene aazi kubhabhatidza, asi vadzidzi vake)," 
John4:3 wakabva Judhia, akaendazve Garire." 
John4:4 Waisisira kuti ahambe ngomuSamaria. 
John4:5 Ndizvo wakaguma muguta revaSamaria rinozwi Sikha, pasinde pomunda uwo waakapa Jakobe kuno mukororo wake Josefa." 
John4:6 Chinyuka chaJakobe chaiyapo, ndizvo Jesu aremba ngomuhambo wake, wakagara pashi parutii rwechinyuka. Rooda kuita awa rechitanhatu." 
John4:7 Kwakagumapo dzimai reSamaria koochera mvura. Jesu wakati kweriri, “Ndipewo mvura ndimwe.”" 
John4:8 Ngokuti vadzidzi vake vaiya vaenda muguta kootenga zvokudya. 
John4:9 Ndizvo dzimai reSamaria rakati kwaari, “Ngenjiranyi kuti iwewe, uri muJudha, ukumbire mvura yokumwa kwendiri inini, dzimai reSamaria?” (Ngokuti vaJudha avaiyani nevaSamaria.)" 
John4:10 Jesu wakapingura, akati kweriri, “Kudai waizia iwewe chipo chaMwari, nokuti ndiani uwo unokumbira kwouri kuti, ‘Ndipewo mvura, ndimwe’, iwewe waizokumbira kwaari, naye waizokupa mvura yokupona.”" 
John4:11 Dzimai rakati kwaari, “Mambo, auna chidziyo chokuchera ndicho, nechinyuka chakadzama. Ndizvo mvura yokupona unoiona pari?" 
John4:12 Uri mukuru here iwewe kupinda baba edu Jakobe, uwo wakatipa ichi chinyuka, naye wakamwa kwechiri emene, nevakororo vake nezvifuyo zvake?”" 
John4:13 Jesu wakapingura akati kweriri, “Kunyazwi ndiani unomwa kuneiyi mvura unozozwazve nyota," 
John4:14 asi kunyazwi ndiani unomwa mvura yendinozomupa inini, aachazozwizve nyota mhera nariini. Mvura iyo yendinozomupa inozoita chinyuka chemvura mukati mwake, chechivherukira kupona kusikaperi.”" 
John4:15 Dzimai rakati kwaari, “Mambo, ndipe mvurayo, kuti ndisachazozwa nyota nokuti ndisachazouya panozve koochera mvura.”" 
John4:16 Wakati kweriri, “Enda, woodaidza mwamuna wako, muuye pano.”" 
John4:17 Dzimai rakapingura rikati kwaari, “Andina mwamuna.” Jesu wakati kweriri, “Wanasa kupingura zvakanaka zvewati, ‘Andina mwamuna;’" 
John4:18 ngokuti waimboiya nevamuna vashanu, nouwo woutori naye zvino aasiri mwamuna wakopi; ngeizvi waereketa gwinyiso.”" 
John4:19 Dzimai rakati kwaari, “Mambo, ndinoona kuti imwimwi muri muprofeti." 
John4:20 Madzibaba edu akadira kuneiri dunhu; nemwi munoti muJerusarema ndiyo ndau inosisira kudiriramwo.” 
John4:21 Jesu wakati kweriri, “Dzimai, nditende, nguva ichauya apo pemusikachazodiriri Baba kuneiri dunhu kunyazwi muJerusarema." 
John4:22 Imwimwi munodira chomusikazii; isusu tinodira chetinozia, ngokuti ruponeso runobva kuvaJudha." 
John4:23 Asi awa rinouya, nazvino raapano, apo vadiri vegwinyiso vanozodira Baba muMweya nomugwinyiso, ngokuti Baba vanotsvaka vakadaro kumudira." 
John4:24 Mwari ndiMweya, naavo vanomudira vanosisira kuti vamudire muMweya nomugwinyiso.”" 
John4:25 Dzimai rakati kwaari, “Ndinozia kuti Mesia unouya,” (uwo unozwi Kristu). “Naapo oouya, unozotironzera zviro zveshe.”" 
John4:26 Jesu wakati kweriri, “Inini unoereketa newe ndini ndemene.”" 
John4:27 Panguvayo vadzidzi vake vakauya. Vakashamiswa ngokuti waiereketa nedzimai, asi apana naumwe wakati kwaari, “Unotsvakenyi?” nokuti, “Unoereketa naro ngenyi?”" 
John4:28 Ndizvo dzimai rakasiya nhuvi yaro yemvura, rakahwirira kuguta, rikati kuvanhu," 
John4:29 “Uyai, muone munhu uwo wandironzera zveshe zvendakaita. Uyu ungaita Kristu here?”" 
John4:30 Vakabuda kubva muguta vechiuya kwaari. 
John4:31 Panguva iyo vadzidzi vake vakamunyengerera vechiti, “Rabhi, idyai.”" 
John4:32 Asi wakati kwavari, “Inini ndinakwo kudya kwomusikazii imwimwi.”" 
John4:33 Ndizvo vadzidzi vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Uripo here munhu wamuunzira chokudya?”" 
John4:34 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Kudya kwangu ndikwo kuita kuda kwouwo wakandituma nokupedza mushando wake." 
John4:35 Amuronzi here kuti, ‘Kwasara mwedzi mirongomuna, naapo kukukura kwaguma?’ Ndinomuronzera, mirudzai madziso enyu, muringire muminda, ngokuti yachena zvino yoda kukukurwa." 
John4:36 Uwo unokukura unoashira misharo, naye unounganidza michero yokupona kusikaperi, ndizvo uwo unosima naye unokukura vadakare veshe pamwepo." 
John4:37 Ngokudaro chisana ichi chinegwinyiso chinoti, ‘Umwe unokusha noumweni unokukura.’" 
John4:38 Ndakamutuma kuti mukukure izvo zvomusikazi kushanda; vamweni vakashanda yaamho, nemwi mwapotera mumushando wavo.”" 
John4:39 Vanhu vazhinji vemuguta revaSamaria vakamutenda ngendaa yeizwi redzimai, rerakapupura rechiti, “Wandironzera zveshe zvendakaita.”" 
John4:40 Ndizvo apo vaSamaria vaguma kwaari, vakamunyengerera kuti agare navo; naye wakagarapo mazuva mairi." 
John4:41 Nevazhinji vamweni vakamutenda ngendaa yeizwi rake. 
John4:42 Navo vakati kunedzimai, “Zvino tinotenda, haiwa ngendaa yemazwi ako, asi ngokuti tadzizwira temene, nesu tinozia kuti uyu ngegwinyiso ndiye Muponesi wenyika.”" 
John4:43 Ngesure kwemazuva mairi wakabvapo, akaenda muGarire." 
John4:44 (Ngokuti Jesu emene wakapupura kuti muprofeti aaremeredzwi munyika yake.) 
John4:45 Ndizvo apo aguma muGarire, vaGarire vakamuashira, ngokuti veshe vaiya vakaona zveshe zvaakaita muJerusarema padhiri, ngokuti navowo vakaenda kudhiri." 
John4:46 Ndizvo Jesu wakauyazve muKhana reGarire, apo paakapindudza mvura kuita vhini. Kwaiyapo nduna yaiya nomukororo wayo wairwara muKhapernaume." 
John4:47 Naapo nduna iyi yazwa kuti Jesu waiya abva Judhia aguma muGarire, yakaenda kwaari, yakamunyengerera kuti adzake aponese mukororo wayo, ngokuti waiya ooda kufa." 
John4:48 Ndizvo Jesu wakati kweiri, “Kuti musikaoni mioniso nemishamiso amuzotendi.”" 
John4:49 Nduna yakati kwaari, “Mambo, dzaka mwana wangu asati afa.”" 
John4:50 Jesu wakati kweiri, “Enda; mukororo wako unozopona.” Munhuwo wakagonda izwi rakaereketwa kwaari ndiJesu naye wakaenda." 
John4:51 Naapo achadzaka, varanda vake vakashongana naye, vakamuronzera kuti mwana wake wapona." 
John4:52 Ndizvo wakabvunza awa iro raakatanga kuitanane ndiro, navo vakati kwaari, “Zuro ngeawa rechinomwe mutsarara wakamusiya.”" 
John4:53 Ndizvo baba akazia kuti ndiro awa raakaereketa Jesu kwaari kuti, “Mukororo wako unozopona.” Naye pachake wakatenda nevemhatso yake yeshe." 
John4:54 Uyu ndiwo muoniso wechipiri waakaita Jesu, abva Judhia apo aguma Garire." 
John5:1 Sure kweizvi kwaiyapo dhiri revaJudha, naJesu wakakwira Jerusarema." 
John5:2 Zvino riripo muJerusarema gandwa ngepamusiwo wemakwai, unodaidzwa ngechiHebheru kuti Bhethisaidha, rinemaberere mashanu." 
John5:3 Mukati mwawo mwaiata vazhinji vairwara, vaiya mapofu nezvirema, nevakaputa, [vechigarira kuvhundurwa kwemvura." 
John5:4 Ngokuti ngomukuwo wakatikuti, ngirosi yaidzaka mugandwa nokuvhundura mvura. Ndizvo kunyazwi ndiani waitanga kupoteramwo apo mvura yavhundurwa waiponeswa kunyazwi waiya nenhenda yakaitawani.]" 
John5:5 Kwaiyapo munhu umwe waiya nenhenda yake makore makumi matatu namasere. 
John5:6 Naapo Jesu amuona akaata, wakazia kuti waiya aripo kwomukuwo wakareba, wakati kwaari, “Unoda kuponeswa here?”" 
John5:7 Munhu wairwara wakapingura kwaari echiti, “Mambo, andina munhu wokundidzasa mugandwa apo mvura yoovhundurwa. Asi mukuenda kwangu, umweni unodzaka kunditangira.”" 
John5:8 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Miruka, utore manhi ako uhambe.”" 
John5:9 Paripo munhuwo wakaponeswa, wakatora manhi ake akahamba. Ngezuva iro raiya Sabatha." 
John5:10 Ndizvo vaJudha vakati kwaari uwo wakaponeswa, “Isabatha, autenderwi kuti utware manhi ako.”" 
John5:11 Asi wakavapingura kuti, “Uwo wakaita kuti ndiponeswe ndiye wakati kwendiri, ‘Tora manhi ako, uhambe.’ ”" 
John5:12 Vakamubvunza vechiti, “Ndiani munhu uwo wakati kwouri, ‘Tora manhi ako, uhambe?’ ”" 
John5:13 Asi uwo wakaponeswa aazi kuzia kuti ndiani, ngokuti Jesu waiya angarangaka mumbungano huru yaiyapo pandau iyo." 
John5:14 Ngesure kweizvi, Jesu wakamuona ari muTemperi, naye wakati kwaari, “Ringira, wakaponeswa! Usachashaishazve, kuti chiro chakapinda kushata kuneicho chisazokugumira.”" 
John5:15 Munhu akaenda, akaronzera vaJudha kuti ndiJesu wakamuponesa." 
John5:16 Ngendaa iyi vaJudha vaitambudza Jesu, ngokuti wakaita izvi ngeSabatha." 
John5:17 Asi Jesu wakavapingura echiti, “Baba angu vanondoshanda metsa nazvino, neni ndinoshanda.”" 
John5:18 Ndizvo ngendaa iyi vaJudha vakapindisisa kutsvaka kumuuraya, ngokuti iye aazi kugura Sabatha kwega, asi wakaronzazve kuti Mwari waiya Baba ake vemene, echidziita pachake unoedzana naMwari." 
John5:19 Ndizvo Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, Mukororo aakoni kuita chiro ngokwake, asi icho chega chaanoona Baba vechiita; ngokuti kunyazwi ngechiri chaanoita Baba, Mukororo unoitawo ngokudaro." 
John5:20 Ngokuti Baba vanomuda Mukororo, vanomupangidzira zveshe zvavanoita vemene; vanozomupangidzira mishando mikuru inopinda iyi, kuti mushamiswe." 
John5:21 Ngokuti kudai ndiBaba vanomusa avo vakafa nokuvapa kupona, ngokudarozve Mukororo unopa kupona kuneavo vaanoda." 
John5:22 Ngokuti Baba avatongi munhu naumwe, asi vakapa kutonga kweshe kuno Mukororo," 
John5:23 kuti veshe varemeredze Mukororo, kudai ngezvevanoremeredza Baba. Uwo usikaremeredzi Mukororo aaremeredzi Baba uwo wakamutuma." 
John5:24 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, uwo unozwa izwi rangu, atende uwo wakandituma, waanakwo kupona kusikaperi; aachapindi mukutongwa, asi wadarika kubva mukufa kupotera mukupona." 
John5:25 “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, awa rinouya, nazvino raapano, apo vakafa vanozorizwa izwi roMukororo waMwari, naavo vanozorizwa vanozopona." 
John5:26 Ngokuti kudai ndiBaba unokupona mukati mwake, ndizvo wakapawo Mukororo kuti aanokupona mukati mwake;" 
John5:27 naye wakamupa simba rokutonga ndaa, ngokuti iye Mukororo woMunhu." 
John5:28 Musashama ngeichi; ngokuti awa rinozouya apo veshe vari mumaiba vanozorizwa izwi rake," 
John5:29 navo vanozobudamwo, avo vakaita zvakanaka mukumuka kwokupona, naavo vakaita zvakashata mukumuka kwokutongwa." 
John5:30 “Inini andikoni kuita chiro ngesimba rangu. Kudai ngezvendinozwa, ndinotonga; nokutonga kwangu kwakarurama, ngokuti anditsvaki kuda kwangu asi kuda kwouwo wakandituma." 
John5:31 Kudai inini ndechidzipupurira pachangu, chapupu changu achina gwinyiso." 
John5:32 Uripo umwe unoita chapupu ndini, neni ndinozia kuti chapupu chaanopupura ndini chinegwinyiso." 
John5:33 Imwimwi mwakatuma kunaJohani, naye wakapupurira gwinyiso." 
John5:34 Inini andiashiri chapupu chinobva kumunhu, asi ndinoronza izvi kuti imwimwi muponeswe." 
John5:35 Iye waiya chibani chinobaka chinojekisa, nemwi mwakatenda kuti mudakare kwenguva doko mukujeka kwake." 
John5:36 Asi inini ndinechapupu chinopinda kugwinya kunechaJohani; ngokuti mishando iyo yaakandipa Baba kuti ndiipedze, iyo mishando yendinoita, inopupura ndini kuti Baba vakandituma." 
John5:37 NaBaba uwo wakandituma wakaita chapupu pachake ndini. Amuzi kumbozwa izwi rake nakamwe nokuti kumboona muemo wake," 
John5:38 nemwi amuna izwi rake rinogara mukati mwenyu, ngokuti imwimwi amuzi kutenda uwo waakatuma." 
John5:39 Munotsvakisisa zvinyorwa, ngokuti imwimwi munopinimidza kuti mukati mwazvo munokupona kusikaperi; neizvo ndizvo zvinopupura ndini." 
John5:40 Asi nemwi amutendi kuuya kwendiri kuti muone kupona. 
John5:41 Andiashiri kukudzwa kunobva kuvanhu. 
John5:42 Asi ndinomuzia kuti amuna rudo rwaMwari mukati mwenyu. 
John5:43 Inini ndakauya ngezina raBaba angu, nemwi amuzi kundiashira; kudai umweni echizouya ngezina rake remene, uwo munozomuashira." 
John5:44 Mungaita matenderenyi, imwimwi munoashira kuirikidzwa kubva kuno umwe nokuno umweni, musikatsvaki kukudzwa ukwo kunobva kunaMwari ega?" 
John5:45 Musapinimidza kuti inini ndinozomuitira ndaa kunaBaba; ndiMosi unomuitira ndaa, uwo wemwakagonda imwimwi." 
John5:46 Ngokuti dai mwakatenda Mosi, mwaizodai mwakatendawo inini, ngokuti wakanyora ngendaa yangu." 
John5:47 Asi kuti musikatendi zvakanyorwa zvake, mungazoita matenderenyi mazwi angu?”" 
John6:1 Ngesure kweizvi Jesu wakaambuka ruseri rwoRuandhle rweGarire, urwo ndirwo Ruandhle rweThibheriasi." 
John6:2 Nembungano huru yakamuteera, ngokuti yaiya yaona mishamiso yaakaita kwavari vairwara." 
John6:3 Jesu wakakwira mudunhu, akagara pashi nevadzidzi vake." 
John6:4 Zvino Phasika, dhiri revaJudha, rakakwedzera." 
John6:5 Ndizvo Jesu amirudza madziso ake, aona kuti mbungano huru yaiya yechiuya kwaari, wakati kunaFiripu, “Tinozotenga pari zvingwa kuti ava vadye?”" 
John6:6 Asi wakaereketa izvi kumuedza, ngokuti iye waizia chaanozoita." 
John6:7 Firipu wakamupingura echiti, “Zvingwa zvemazana mairi ezvigurwa zvesirivha azvivakwani kuti umwe ngaumwe atore kadoodoko.”" 
John6:8 Umwe wevadzidzi vake, Andreu, munun'una waSimoni Petro, wakati kwaari," 
John6:9 “Uri pano murumbwana unezvingwa zvebhare zvishanu nezvihove zviiri; asi izvi zvingadetserenyi kuvanhu vazhinji vakadai?” 
John6:10 Jesu wakati, “Garisai vanhu pashi.” Kwaiyapo pandau iyo mwenje wakawanda; ndizvo vanhu vakagara pashi, vaida kuita makumi emazana mashanu kuwanda." 
John6:11 Ndizvo Jesu wakatora zvingwa, naapo abonga, wakakoanisa kunaavo vaiya vakagara pashi; wakaitazve kudaro nezvihove, veshe vakadya kudai ngezvevaikona." 
John6:12 Naapo vaguta wakati kuvadzidzi vake, “Unganidzai matsekeneswa asara, kuti kusarashwa chiro.”" 
John6:13 Ndizvo vakaunganidza, vakazadza zvitundu gumi nazviiri ngematsekeneswa ezvingwa zvebhare zvishanu akasara kuneavo vaiya vadya." 
John6:14 Ndizvo vanhu avo vaona uyu mushamiso waakaita, vakati, “Ngegwinyiso uyu ndiye muprofeti uwo unouya munyika!”" 
John6:15 Ndizvo apo Jesu echizia kuti vodo kuuya kuti vamutore ngesimba kuti vamuite mambo, wakabvapozve akaenda kumutunhu ari ega." 
John6:16 Naapo zuva rabira, vadzidzi vake vakadzaka kuruandhle," 
John6:17 vakakwira mungarava, vakatanga kuambuka ruandhle kuenda Khapernaume. Kwaiya kwasvipa, naJesu waiya asati aguma kwavari." 
John6:18 Nemafungu oruandhle akakwira ngendaa yedutu guru raivhuvhuta. 
John6:19 Naapo vaiya vahamba paida kuita makhiromitha mashanu nokuti matanhatu, vakaona Jesu echihamba padera peruandhle, echikwedzera kungarava, navo vakatyiswa." 
John6:20 Asi wakati kwavari, “Ndini hangu; musatya.”" 
John6:21 Naapo vakadakara kumutora mungarava, paripo ngarava yakaguma kunyika kwavaienda." 
John6:22 Nechimangwani mbungano iyo yaiya yakasara ruseri rworuandhle yakaona kuti paiya pasina ngarava imweni, yega imwe iyo yevaiya vapotera kweiri vadzidzi vake, nokuti Jesu aazi kukwira pamwepo nevadzidzi vake mungarava, asi kuti vadzidzi vake vaiya vaenda vari vega." 
John6:23 Kwakauya ngarava dzimweni dzakabva Thibheriasi dzikaguma pasinde pendau apo pavakadya zvingwa ngesure Mambo azvibonga. 
John6:24 Ndizvo apo mbungano yaona kuti Jesu paiya pasina apapo nokuti vadzidzi vake, yakakwirawo mungarava yakauya muKhapernaume yechitsvaka Jesu." 
John6:25 Naapo yaiya yamuona ruseri rworuandhle, yakati kwaari, “Rabhi, waguma pano riini?”" 
John6:26 Jesu wakaipingura, akati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, amunditsvaki ngokuti mwakaona mishamiso, asi ngokuti mwakadya zvingwa mukaguta." 
John6:27 Musashandira kudya ukwo kunopera, asi kudya ukwo kunogara mhera nariini, kwaanozomupa Mukororo woMunhu; ngokuti padera pake Baba Mwari wakaisa chioniso chake.”" 
John6:28 Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Tingaitenyi kuti tishande mishando yaMwari?”" 
John6:29 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Uyu ndiwo mushando waMwari kuti mutende uwo waakatuma.”" 
John6:30 Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Iwewe unoita muoniso wenyi kuti tione, titende kwouri? Unoshandenyi?" 
John6:31 Madzibaba edu akadya mana mushango; kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa, ‘Wakavapa chingwa chakabva mudenga kuti vadye.’ ”" 
John6:32 Naapo Jesu wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, andiyepi Mosi wakamupa chingwa chakabva mudenga, asi Baba angu ndivo vanomupa chingwa chegwinyiso chinobva mudenga." 
John6:33 Ngokuti chingwa chaMwari chiri uwo wakadzaka kubva mudenga nokupa kupona kunyika.” 
John6:34 Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Mambo, tipei ichi chingwa nguva dzeshe.”" 
John6:35 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Inini ndiri chingwa chokupona; iye unouya kwendiri aatongozwi nzara, nouwo unotenda kwendiri aatongozwi nyota." 
John6:36 Asi ndakati kwomuri mwakandiona asi amuzi kunditenda. 
John6:37 Zveshe zvaanondipa Baba zvinozouya kwendiri; nouwo unouya kwendiri andizomurashi akadi. 
John6:38 Ngokuti andizi kudzaka kubva mudenga kuti ndiite kuda kwangu, asi kuda kwouwo wakandituma;" 
John6:39 uku ndikwo kuda kwowakandituma, kuti andisisiri kurashikirwa nachimwe chazvo zveshe zvaakandipa, asi kuti ndichimuse ngezuva rokupera." 
John6:40 Ngokuti uku ndikwo kuda kwaBaba angu, kuti munhu weshe unoringira Mukororo nokutenda kwaari unowanokupona kusikaperi; neni ndinozomumusa ngezuva rokupera.”" 
John6:41 Ndizvo vaJudha vakavhuruvhuta ndiye, ngokuti wakati, “Inini ndiri chingwa chakadzaka kubva mudenga.”" 
John6:42 Vakati, “Uyu andiyepi here Jesu, mukororo waJosefa, baba namai ake vetinozia? Zvino unoita maereketerenyi kuti, ‘Ndakadzaka kubva mudenga?’ ”" 
John6:43 Jesu wakapingura akati kwavari, “Musavhuruvhuta pakati penyu." 
John6:44 Akuna naumwe unokona kuuya kwendiri, kudai Baba wakandituma asamukweya; neni ndinozomumusa ngezuva rokupera." 
John6:45 Kwakanyorwa muvaprofeti kuti, ‘Veshe vanozodzidziswa ndiMwari.’ Ndizvo munhu weshe wakazwa, akadzidza kubva kunaBaba, unouya kwendiri." 
John6:46 Andironzi kuti uripo wakaona Baba, kwega iye wakabva kunaMwari; ndiye wakamuona Baba." 
John6:47 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, iye unotenda waanokupona kusikaperi." 
John6:48 Inini ndiri chingwa chokupona. 
John6:49 Madzibaba enyu vakadya mana mushango, navo vakafa." 
John6:50 Ichi ndicho chingwa chinodzaka kubva mudenga, kuti kunyazwi ndiani kwomuri unochidya, aachafi." 
John6:51 Inini ndiri chingwa chokupona chakadzaka kubva mudenga; kuti kunyazwi ndiani unodya ichi chingwa unozopona kusikaperi; nechingwa chendinozomupa chiri nyama yangu, yendinozopa kuita kupona kwenyika.”" 
John6:52 Ndizvo vaJudha vakaitirana hasha pakati pavo vechiti, “Munhu uyu ungaita mapirenyi nyama yake kwetiri kuti tidye?”" 
John6:53 Ndizvo Jesu wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kuti musikadyi nyama yoMukororo woMunhu, musikamwi ngazi yake, amuna kupona mukati mwenyu." 
John6:54 Uwo unodya nyama yangu nounomwa ngazi yangu waanokupona kusikaperi, neni ndinozomumusa ngezuva rokupera." 
John6:55 Ngokuti nyama yangu kudya yaamho nengazi yangu kumwa yaamho. 
John6:56 Uwo unodya nyama yangu nounomwa ngazi yangu, unogara mukati mwangu neni ndinogara mukati mwake." 
John6:57 Kudai ndiBaba vanopona vakandituma, neni ndinopona ndiBaba, ngokudaro uwo unondidya, ndiye unozopona ndini." 
John6:58 Ichi ndicho chingwa chakadzaka kubva mudenga, chisikazi kudai ngechakadya madzibaba vakafa. Uwo unodya chingwa ichi unozopona mhera nariini.”" 
John6:59 Wakaereketa izvi echidzidzisa mumhatso yokudira muKhapernaume. 
John6:60 Ndizvo vazhinji vevadzidzi vake, apo vazwa, vakati, “Iri izwi rakakonza, ndiani unokona kurizwa?”" 
John6:61 Asi Jesu, echizia mukati mwake kuti vadzidzi vake vakavhuruvhuta ngeizwi iro, wakati kwavari, “Ichi chinomupumhunisa here?" 
John6:62 Mungaitenyi kudai mwechiona Mukororo woMunhu echikwira apo paaiya pakutanga? 
John6:63 NdiMweya unopa kupona, nyama ainyuri chiro. Mazwi endakaereketa inini kwomuri ari mweya nokupona." 
John6:64 Asi varipo vamweni pakati penyu vasikatendi.” Ngokuti kubvira pakutanga, Jesu waindozia kuti ndiani avo vasikatendi nokuti ndiani unozomupira." 
John6:65 Naye wakati, “Ngeiyi ndaa ndakaereketa kwomuri ndechiti, apana unokona kuuya kwendiri kuti asikazi kutenderwa ndiBaba.”" 
John6:66 Ngesure kweizvi vazhinji vevadzidzi vake vakahwirira sure, avazi kuchazohamba naye." 
John6:67 Ndizvo Jesu wakati kunegumi navairi, “Imwimwi munoda kuendawo here?”" 
John6:68 Simoni Petro wakamupingura akati, “Mambo, tingaenda kunani? Ndimwi munemazwi okupona kusikaperi;" 
John6:69 nesu takatenda, tikazia kuti iwewe uri Wakachena waMwari.”" 
John6:70 Jesu wakavapingura, akati, “Inini andizi kumutsanangura here murigumi navairi, noumwe wenyu uri dhiabhorosi?”" 
John6:71 Wakaereketa ndiJudhasi, mukororo waSimoni Isikarioti, ngokuti Judhasi ndiye waizomupira, ari umwe wegumi navairi." 
John7:1 Ngesure kweizvi Jesu waihamba muGarire; ngokuti waiya asikachadi kuhamba muJudhia, ngokuti vaJudha vaitsvaka kumuuraya." 
John7:2 Zvino dhiri revaJudha rematumba raiya pasinde. 
John7:3 Ndizvo vanun'una vake vakati kwaari, “Ibva pano uende Judhia, kuti vadzidzi vako vaone mishando younoita." 
John7:4 Ngokuti akuna munhu unoshanda ngokufishika echitsvaka kuti aziikanwe pamhene. Kudai wechiita izvi zviro, dzipangidzire kunyika.”" 
John7:5 (Ngokuti vanun'una vake vaiya vasati vatenda kwaari.) 
John7:6 Ndizvo Jesu wakati kwavari, “Nguva yangu aisati yaguma, asi nguva yenyu yakanaka mukuwo weshe." 
John7:7 Nyika aikoni kumuzonda imwimwi, asi inondizonda inini ngokuti ndinopupura ndiyo kuti mishando yayo yakashata." 
John7:8 Imwimwi endai kudhiri. Inini andiendiyo zvino kudhiri iri, ngokuti nguva yangu aisati yaguma.”" 
John7:9 Naapo aereketa izvi, wakagara muGarire." 
John7:10 Asi apo vanun'una vake vaiya vaenda kudhiri, wakaendawo, haiwa pamhene, asi ngokufishika." 
John7:11 Ndizvo vaJudha vaimutsvaka padhiri vaiti, “Umboripari?”" 
John7:12 Kwakaapo kugunun'una kukurutu pakati pevanhu ngendaa yake. Vamweni vakati, “Munhu wakanaka,” vamweni vakati, “Haiwa, asi unopaukisa mbungano.”" 
John7:13 Asi ngendaa yokutya vaJudha apana naumwe wakaereketa ndiye pamhene. 
John7:14 Asi apo dhiri raapakati Jesu wakakwira muTemperi, akatanga kudzidzisa." 
John7:15 Ndizvo vaJudha vakashamiswa vechiti, “Uyu unoita maziirenyi zvinyorwa, asikazi kudzidza?”" 
John7:16 Ndizvo Jesu wakavapingura, akati, “Kudzidzisa kwangu angokwangupi, asi ngokwouwo wakandituma;" 
John7:17 kunyazwi ndiani unoda kuita kuda kwaMwari, unozozia kuti chidzidziso chinobva kunaMwari here nokuti ndinodziereketera pachangu." 
John7:18 Uwo unodziereketera unotsvaka kuirikidzwa kwake; asi uwo unotsvaka kuirikidza uwo wakamutuma, ndiye unogondeka, amuna kuchengedzera mukati mwake." 
John7:19 Mosi aazi kumupa Mipango here? Asi apana pakati penyu unongwarira Mipango. Munotsvakirenyi kundiuraya?” 
John7:20 Mbungano yakapingura ikati, “Unedhimoni! Ndiani unotsvaka kukuuraya?”" 
John7:21 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Ndakaita mushando umwe nemwi mweshe mwakashamiswa." 
John7:22 Ngeiyi ndaa Mosi wakamupanga kuti muchekwe (asi akuzi kubva kunaMosi akadi, asi kwakabva kumadzibaba,) nemwi ngezuva reSabatha munocheka munhu." 
John7:23 Kudai munhu echiashira kuchekwa ngezuva reSabatha, kuti Mupango waMosi usagurwa, hino munonditsenekera ngenyi ngokuti ndakaponesa munhu ngeSabatha?" 
John7:24 Musatonga ngokuoneka kwokubanze, asi tongai ngokutonga kwakarurama.”" 
John7:25 Ndizvo vamweni vevanhu veJerusarema vakati, “Uyu andiyepi here munhu wevanotsvaka kuuraya?" 
John7:26 Ringirai, unoereketa pamhene navo avaereketi chiro kwaari! Vatongi avazii here ngegwinyiso kuti uyu ndiye Kristu?" 
John7:27 Asi tinozia paanobva munhu uyu. Naapo Kristu paanozooneka, apana naumwe unozia kuti unobva pari.”" 
John7:28 Ndizvo Jesu wakadaidzira, ari muTemperi echidzidzisa, akati, “Munondizia, munoziazve pendinobva. Andizi kuuya ngokwangu, asi uwo wakandituma unegwinyiso, nemwi amumuzii." 
John7:29 Inini ndinomuzia, ngokuti ndinobva kwaari, naye wakandituma.”" 
John7:30 Ndizvo vakatsvaka kumubata; asi apana naumwe wakaisa nyara padera pake, ngokuti awa rake raiya risati raguma." 
John7:31 Asi vazhinji vembungano vakatenda kwaari; vakati, “Naapo Kristu ouya unozokona here kuita mishamiso inopinda iyi yakaitwa ngouyu munhu?”" 
John7:32 VaFarisi vakazwa mbungano yechiita vherevhere ndiye; vapristi vakuru nevaFarisi vakatuma varindi veTemperi kuti vamubate. 
John7:33 Ndizvo Jesu wakati, “Ndichiri nemwi mukuwo mudoko, neni ndinozoenda kuneuwo wakandituma;" 
John7:34 munozonditsvaka, asi amuzondioni; nependiri inini, amungakoni kugumapo.”" 
John7:35 Ndizvo vaJudha vakati pakati pavo, “Unozoenda kuri munhu uyu kwetisikazomuoni isusu? Unozoenda here kunevakapararira pakati pevaGiriki nokudzidzisa vaGiriki?" 
John7:36 Rinotinyi izwi iri raakaereketa kuti, ‘Munozonditsvaka, asi amuzondioni,’ zve, ‘Pendiri amungakoni kugumapo?’ ”" 
John7:37 Ngezuva rokupedzisira redhiri, zuva guru, Jesu wakamiruka, akadaidzira echiti, “Kunyazwi ndiani unenyota ngaauye kwendiri, amwe." 
John7:38 Uwo unotenda kwendiri, kudai ngokuronza kwezvinyorwa, ‘Ndwizi dzemvura yokupona dzinozopopoma kubva mwaari.’ ”" 
John7:39 Asi wakaereketa izvi ngendaa yoMweya wavanozoashira avo vanotenda kwaari; ngokuti Mweya waiya usati wapuwa, ngokuti Jesu waiya asati airikidzwa." 
John7:40 Naapo vazwa mazwi aya, vamweni vembungano vakati, “Uyu Muprofeti emene.”" 
John7:41 Vamweni vakati, “Uyu ndiKristu.” Asi vamweni vakati, “Kristu ungabva Garire here?" 
John7:42 Zvinyorwa azvizi kuronza here kuti Kristu unozobva kudzinza raDhavhidha nokubva Bhetherehema, muguta mwaaigara Dhavhidha?”" 
John7:43 Ndizvo kwaiyapo kuparadzana pakati pembungano ngendaa yake. 
John7:44 Vamweni vavo vakada kumubata, asi apana naumwe wakaisa nyara padera pake." 
John7:45 Ndizvo varindi vakapetuka kuvapristi vakuru nokuvaFarisi, avo vakati kwavari, “Mwarekera kuuya naye ngenyi?”" 
John7:46 Nevarindi vakapingura, vakati, “Akuna munhu wakamboereketa kudai ngouyu munhu!”" 
John7:47 Ndizvo vaFarisi vakavapingura vechiti, “Nemwiwo mwachengedzerwa here?" 
John7:48 Uripo here wevatongi nokuti wevaFarisi wakamutenda? 
John7:49 Asi iyi mbungano isikazii Mipango yakatukwa.” 
John7:50 Nikodhemusi, uwo wakaguma kwaari pakutanga, uwo waiya umwe wavo, wakati kwavari," 
John7:51 “Mipango yedu inotonga here munhu isati yamuzwa nokuzia chaanoita?” 
John7:52 Vakapingura, vakati kwaari, “Newe unobva Garire here? Tsvakisisa uone, ngokuti akuna muprofeti unozobuda kubva Garire.” [" 
John7:53 Munhu weshe wakaenda kumhatso yake. 
John8:1 Asi Jesu wakaenda kuMutunhu wemaOrivhi. 
John8:2 Mangwanani maishi wakauyazve muTemperi; vanhu veshe vakauya kwaari, naye wakagara pashi, akavadzidzisa." 
John8:3 Vanyori nevaFarisi vakaunza kwaari dzimai rakabatwa rechiomba; naapo vaiya vaita kuti rieme pakati pavo," 
John8:4 vakati kunaJesu, “Mudzidzisi, iri dzimai rabatwa rechiomba yaamho." 
John8:5 Zvino Mosi wakatipanga muMipango kuti madzimai akadaro apondwe ngamapuwe. Ndizvo iwewe unotinyi?” 
John8:6 Vakaereketa izvi vechimuedza, kuti vaone chokumuparisa ndaa ndicho. Asi Jesu wakakotama pashi, akanyora ngechinwe pamavhu." 
John8:7 Naapo vaangira kumubvunzisisa, wakatwasuka, akati kwavari, “Iye usina kushaisha pakati penyu, ngaatange kukandira buwe kumuponda.”" 
John8:8 Wakakotamazve pashi, akanyora pamavhu." 
John8:9 Naapo vazvizwa, vakaenda umwe ngaumwe, kutanga ngevakurutu, metsa Jesu asara ari ega nedzimai rakaema pamberi pake." 
John8:10 Naapo Jesu wakatwasuka akati kweriri, “Dzimai, vari pari avo vakakuitira ndaa? Apana here wasara echikuitira ndaa?”" 
John8:11 Rakati, “Haiwa, apana naumwe, Mambowoe.” Jesu wakati kweriri, “Neni andikuitiri ndaa; enda usachazoshaishazve.”]" 
John8:12 Ndizvo Jesu wakaereketazve kwavari echiti, “Inini ndiri kujeka kwenyika; uwo unonditeera aazohambi muchidima, asi unozoa nokujeka kwokupona.”" 
John8:13 Ndizvo vaFarisi vakati kwaari, “Unodzipupurira; chapupu chako achina gwinyiso.”" 
John8:14 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Kunyazwi ndechidzipupurira pachangu, chapupu changu chinegwinyiso, ngokuti ndinozia pendakabva nependinoenda, asi imwimwi amuzii pendakabva nependinoenda." 
John8:15 Imwimwi munotonga ngokwenyama, inini anditongi naumwe." 
John8:16 Asi kunyazwi ndechinyatonga, kutonga kwangu kunegwinyiso, ngokuti andinipi ndega ndinotonga, asi inini naBaba vakandituma." 
John8:17 Kwakanyorwa muMipango yenyu kuti chapupu chavanhu vairi chinegwinyiso; 
John8:18 inini ndini ndinodzipupurira pachangu, naBaba avo vakandituma vanopupura ndini.”" 
John8:19 Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Vari pari Baba ako?” Jesu wakapingura, akati, “Imwimwi amundizii nokuti Baba angu; dai mwaindizia, mwaizoziazve Baba angu.”" 
John8:20 Jesu wakaereketa aya mazwi ari pasinde pebhokisi rinopirwa zvipo, echidzidzisa ari muTemperi; asi apana wakamubata, ngokuti awa rake raiya risati raguma." 
John8:21 Ndizvo wakatizve kwavari, “Inini ndinoenda, nemwi munozonditsvaka, nemwi munozofira muzvishaishi zvenyu. Pendinoenda, amukoni kuuyapo.”" 
John8:22 Ndizvo vaJudha vakati, “Unozodziuraya here, ngokuti unoti, ‘Pendinoenda, imwimwi amukoni kuuyapo?’ ”" 
John8:23 Wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi muri vepashi, inini ndinobva mudenga; imwimwi muri venyika iyi, inini andisiri wenyika iyi akadi." 
John8:24 Ndakamuronzera kuti munozofira muzvishaishi zvenyu, ngokuti kudai musikatendi kuti ndini aye, munozofira muzvishaishi zvenyu.”" 
John8:25 Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Urianani iwewe?” Jesu wakati kwavari, “Ndini uwo wendakamuronzera pakutanga." 
John8:26 Ndine zvakawanda zvokuereketa ndimwi nokutonga; asi uwo wakandituma uri gwinyiso, neni ndinoereketa kunyika izvo zvandakazwa kubva kwaari.”" 
John8:27 Avazi kuzwisisa kuti waiereketa kwavari ndiBaba. 
John8:28 Ndizvo Jesu wakati kwavari, “Naapo mwazomirudza Mukororo woMunhu, naapo munozozia kuti inini ndini aye nokuti andiiti chiro ngesimba rangu remene, asi ndinoereketa kudai ngezvendakadzidziswa ndiBaba." 
John8:29 Nouwo wakandituma undori neni; aazi kundisiya ndega, ngokuti ndinoita zvinomudakadza mukuwo weshe.”" 
John8:30 Achaereketa izvi, vazhinji vakatenda kwaari." 
John8:31 Ndizvo Jesu wakati kuneavo vaJudha vakatenda kwaari, “Kudai mwechigara mumazwi angu, ngegwinyiso muri vadzidzi vangu," 
John8:32 nemwi munozozia gwinyiso negwinyiso rinozomusunhura.” 
John8:33 Vakamupingura vechiti, “Isusu tiri mibarirwana yaAbrahama, atizi kumboitwa varanda ngomunhu naumwe. Unodaro ngenyi kuti, ‘Munozosunhurwa?’ ”" 
John8:34 Jesu wakavapingura echiti, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kunyazwi ndiani unoita chishaishi, muranda wokushaisha." 
John8:35 Muranda aagari mumhatso mhera nariini; mukororo unogaramwo mhera nariini. 
John8:36 Ndizvo kudai Mukororo echizomusunhura, munozosunhurwa yaamho." 
John8:37 Ndinozia kuti imwimwi muri mibarirwana yaAbrahama; asi munotsvaka kundiuraya, ngokuti izwi rangu arizi kuona ndau mukati mwenyu." 
John8:38 Inini ndinoereketa izvo zvendakaona kunaBaba angu, nemwiwo munoita zvemwakazwa kubva kunababa enyu.”" 
John8:39 Vakamupingura, vakati kwaari, “Abrahama ndibaba edu.” Jesu wakati kwavari, “Kudai mwaiya vana vaAbrahama, mwaizoita mishando yaAbrahama," 
John8:40 asi zvino munotsvaka kundiuraya, munhu wamuronzera gwinyiso, iro rendakazwa kubva kunaMwari; Abrahama aazi kuita zvakadai." 
John8:41 Imwimwi munoita mishando yababa enyu.” Vakati kwaari, “Isusu atizi kubarwa ngokuomba; tinaBaba umwe, ndiMwari.”" 
John8:42 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Kudai Mwari aiya Baba enyu, mwaizondida, ngokuti ndakabuda ndechibva kunaMwari; andizi kuuya ngokuda kwangu, asi iye wakandituma." 
John8:43 Amuzwisisi ngenyi zvendinoronza? Ngokuti amukoni kuzwisisa izwi rangu. 
John8:44 Imwimwi muri vababa enyu Dhiabhorosi, nokudisisa kwenyu kuita kuda kwababa enyu. Uwo waiya muurayi kubvira pakutanga, naye aazi kuema mugwinyiso, ngokuti gwinyiso amuna mukati mwake. Naapo echinyepa, unoereketa kudai ngechibarirwe chake, ngokuti iye uri munyepi nababa emanyepo." 
John8:45 Asi ngokuti inini ndinoronza gwinyiso, amunditendi." 
John8:46 Ndiani kwomuri ungandionisa ndaa yendakashaisha? Kudai ndechironza gwinyiso, amunditendi ngenyi?" 
John8:47 Uwo uri waMwari unozwa mazwi aMwari; ngeiyi ndaa imwimwi amundizwi, ngokuti amuri vaMwari akadi.”"
