John8:48 VaJudha vakapingura, vakati kwaari, “Atinasi kuronza here kuti uri muSamaria newe unedhimoni?”" 
John8:49 Jesu wakapingura echiti, “Inini andina dhimoni; asi ndinoremeredza Baba angu, nemwi amundiremeredzi." 
John8:50 Asi inini anditsvaki kuirikidzwa kwangu; uripo umwe unokutsvaka, naye unoita mutongi." 
John8:51 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kunyazwi ndiani unongwarira izwi rangu, aatongozooni rufu.”" 
John8:52 VaJudha vakati kwaari, “Zvino tinozia kuti unedhimoni. Abrahama wakafa nevaprofeti ngokudaro; newe unoti, ‘Kunyazwi ndiani unongwarira izwi rangu, aatongozozwi rufu.’" 
John8:53 Iwewe uri mukuru here kupinda baba edu Abrahama, vakafa? Nevaprofeti vakafa. Unodziita anani?”" 
John8:54 Jesu wakapingura echiti, “Kudai ndechidziremeredza pachangu, kudziremeredza kwangu akuna shwiro; ndiBaba angu vanondiremeredza, vomunoti ndivo Mwari wenyu." 
John8:55 Asi amuzi kuvazia; inini ndinovazia. Kudai ndechiti, andivazii, ndaita munyepi kudai ndimwi. Asi ndinovazia neni ndinongwarira izwi ravo." 
John8:56 Abrahama baba enyu vakadakara ngokuti vaizoriona zuva rangu, navo vakariona, vakadakara.”" 
John8:57 Ndizvo vaJudha vakati kwaari, “Ausati waguma makore makumi mashanu, newe wakaona Abrahama here?”" 
John8:58 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, Abrahama asati aapo, ndaiyapo.”" 
John8:59 Ndizvo vakatora mapuwe kuti vamuponde; asi Jesu wakadzifisha pachake, akabuda kubva muTemperi." 
John9:1 Naapo echipinda, wakaona munhu waiya bofu kubvira pakubarwa kwake." 
John9:2 Nevadzidzi vake vakamubvunza vechiti, “Rabhi, ndiani wakashaisha, uyu munhu nokuti vabari vake, kuti abarwe ari bofu?”" 
John9:3 Jesu wakapingura akati, “Uyu munhu aazi kushaisha nokuti vabari vake, asi kuti mishando yaMwari ioniswe mwaari." 
John9:4 Kunosisira kuti tishande mishando youwo wakandituma achimasikati; ngokuti usiku hunouya, naapo apana ungakona kushanda." 
John9:5 Naapo ndichindorimwo munyika, ndiri kujeka kwenyika.”" 
John9:6 Naapo aereketa izvi, wakapfira mata pamavhu, wakakanya matope ngemata, wakadzodza madziso aro ngedope." 
John9:7 Wakati kweriri, “Enda, ushambe muGandwa reSiroamu.” (Ngokukumuchwa kunoti Wakatumwa.) Ndizvo wakaenda, akashamba, wakauya oona." 
John9:8 Ndizvo vaakirwana vake naavo vaimuona kare, ari mupemhi, vakati, “Uyu andiyepi here munhu uwo waigara pashi echipemha?”" 
John9:9 Vamweni vakati, “Ndiye.” Vamweni vakati, “Haiwa, asi unotodzana naye.” Naye wakati, “Ndini.”" 
John9:10 Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Madziso ako akaita mapembenudzirwenyi?”" 
John9:11 Wakapingura, akati, “Munhu unozwi Jesu wakaita matope, akadzodza madziso angu, akati kwendiri, ‘Enda Siroamu ushambe.’ Ndizvo ndakaenda ndikashamba, ndikaona.”" 
John9:12 Navo vakati kwaari, “Uri pari munhuwo?” Wakati, “Andizii.”" 
John9:13 Vakaunza kuvaFarisi munhu uwo waiya bofu. 
John9:14 Raiya zuva reSabatha apo Jesu paakaita matope akapembenudza madziso aro. 
John9:15 Ndizvo vaFarisi vakamubvunzazve kuti wakaita mapembenudzirwenyi. Naye wakati kwavari, “Wakaisa matope pamadziso angu; ndakashamba, neni ndinoona.”" 
John9:16 Ndizvo vamweni vevaFarisi vakati, “Uyu munhu aabvi kunaMwari, ngokuti aangwariri Sabatha.” Asi vamweni vakati, “Munhu mushaishi ungaita maitirenyi iyi mioniso?” Kwakaapo kuparadzana pakati pavo." 
John9:17 Ndizvo vakatizve kunebofu, “Unotinyi ndiye iwewe, ngendaa yokuti wakapembenudza madziso ako?” Naye wakati, “Muprofeti.”" 
John9:18 Ndizvo vaJudha avazi kutenda kuti ndiye waiya bofu nokuti wakapembenudzwa, metsa vakadaidza vabari vouwo wakapembenudzwa," 
John9:19 navo vakavabvunza vechiti, “Uyu mukororo wenyu here, uwo womunoti, wakabarwa ari bofu? Ndizvo zvino unoita maonerenyi?”" 
John9:20 Ndizvo vabari vake vakapingura vakati, “Chetinozia ngechokuti uyu mukororo wedu nokuti wakabarwa andori bofu;" 
John9:21 asi kuti unoita maonerenyi atizii, nokuti ndiani wakapembenudza madziso ake, atizii. Mubvunzenyi; wabva muzero, unozodziereketera pachake.”" 
John9:22 Vabari vake vakaronza izvi ngokuti vaitya vaJudha, ngokuti vaJudha vaiya vakatenderana kuti kunyazwi ndiani unozomutenda kuti iye ndiKristu, unozodzingwa kubva mumhatso yokudira." 
John9:23 Ngeiyi ndaa vabari vake vakati, “Wabva muzero, mubvunzenyi.”" 
John9:24 Ndizvo vakamudaidza ngekwechipiri uwo waiya bofu, vakati kwaari, “Irikidza Mwari iwewe, isusu tinozia kuti uyu munhu mushaishi.”" 
John9:25 Ndizvo iye wakapingura, akati, “Kunyazwi mushaishi, andizii. Chiro chimwe chega chendinozia, ngechokuti inini ndaiya bofu, zvino ndinoona.”" 
John9:26 Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Wakaitenyi kwouri? Wakaita mapembenudzirenyi madziso ako?”" 
John9:27 Wakavapingura echiti, “Ndatomuronzera nemwi amuzi kupurutana. Ngenyi mwechida kuzwazve? Nemwiwo munoda kuita vadzidzi vake here?”" 
John9:28 Vakamutuka vechiti, “Iwewe uri mudzidzi wake, asi isusu tiri vadzidzi vaMosi." 
John9:29 Tinozia kuti Mwari wakaereketa kunaMosi, asi uyu munhu, atizii paanobva.”" 
John9:30 Munhu wakapingura, akati kwavari, “Iri igumo! Kuti amuzii paanobva, asi wakapembenudza madziso angu." 
John9:31 Tinozia kuti Mwari aapurutani vashaishi. Asi kunyazwi ndiani unomuremeredza nokuita kuda kwake, Mwari unomupurutana." 
John9:32 Kubvira pakutanga akuzi kumbozwika kuti munhu wakambopembenudza madziso owakabarwa ari bofu. 
John9:33 Kudai uyu munhu asikabvi kunaMwari, aangakoni kuita chiro.”" 
John9:34 Vakamupingura vakati kwaari, “Iwewe wakabarirwa mukushaisha yaamho, newe wotidzidzisa here?” Vakamudzingira kubanze." 
John9:35 Jesu wakazwa kuti vaiya vamudzingira kubanze, amuona wakati, “Iwewe unotenda Mukororo woMunhu here?”" 
John9:36 Naye wakapingura akati, “Ndiani, Mambo, kuti nditende kwaari?”" 
John9:37 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Wamuona, ndiyezve unoereketa newe.”" 
John9:38 Wakati, “Mambo, ndinotenda.” Naye wakamudira." 
John9:39 Jesu wakati, “Inini ndakauyira kutonga munyika muno, kuti vasikaoni vaone nevanoona vaitwe mapofu.”" 
John9:40 Vamweni vevaFarisi avo vaiya pasinde naye vakazwa izvi, vakati kwaari, “Nesuwo tiri mapofu here?”" 
John9:41 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Kudai mwaiya mapofu, mwaizodai musina kushaisha. Asi zvino munoti, ‘Tinoona,’ kushaisha kwenyu kunondogara kuripo." 
John10:1 “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, uwo usikapindi ngepamusiwo mudanga remakwai, asi echipinda ngeimweni njira, iye uri mbavha nedzongoni." 
John10:2 Asi uwo unopinda ngepamusiwo ndiye muushi wemakwai. 
John10:3 Kwaari murindi womusiwo unobeurira muushi, nemakwai anozwa izwi rake, unodaidza makwai ake ngemazina awo nokuatungamirira kubanze." 
John10:4 Naapo abudisa ake eshe, unoatungamirira, nemakwai anomuteera, ngokuti anozia izwi rake." 
John10:5 Aazoteeri mupara, asi anozotiza kubva kwaari, ngokuti aazii izwi romupara.”" 
John10:6 Jesu wakaereketa uyu muedzaniso kwavari, asi avazi kuzwisisa izvo zvaakaereketa kwavari." 
John10:7 Ndizvo Jesu wakaereketazve kwavari echiti, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, inini ndiri musiwo wemakwai." 
John10:8 Veshe vakatanga pamberi pangu imbavha nemadzongoni; asi makwai aazi kuvapurutana. 
John10:9 Inini ndiri musiwo; kunyazwi ndiani unopinda ndini, unozoponeswa, unozopotera nokubuda, aone kudya." 
John10:10 Mbavha inouya kwega kuba nokuuraya nokuparadza; inini ndakauya kuti vaone kupona, vakuone kakurutu." 
John10:11 “Inini ndiri muushi wakanaka. Muushi wakanaka unoisira pashi kupona kwake ngepamusoro pemakwai. 
John10:12 Asi uwo unoshanda kuti aone muthuso, asiri muushi akadi, uwo makwai aasiri ake akadi, unoona thika rechiuya, unosiya makwai, unotiza; nethika rinoruma nokuaparadza." 
John10:13 Unotiza ngokuti unoshandira muthuso, aana ndaa nemakwai." 
John10:14 Inini ndiri muushi wakanaka, neni ndinoazia angu, naanguwo anondizia." 
John10:15 Kudai ngezvaanondizia Baba, neniwo ndinovazia Baba, neni ndinoisira kupona kwangu pashi ngendaa yemakwai." 
John10:16 Ndinawo amweni makwai, asiri eiri danga; nawozve ndinosisira kuti ndiaunze, nawo anozopurutana izwi rangu. Nawo anozoita danga rimwe nomuushi umwe." 
John10:17 Ngeiyi ndaa Baba vanondida, ngokuti ndinoisira pashi kupona kwangu, kuti ndikutorezve." 
John10:18 Apana munhu unokutora kubva kwendiri, asi ndinokuisa pashi ngokuda kwangu. Ndine simba rokukuisa pashi, ndine simba rokukutorazve; uyu mupango ndakaupuwa ndiBaba angu.”" 
John10:19 Kwaiyapozve kuparadzana pakati pevaJudha ngendaa yemazwi aya. 
John10:20 Vazhinji vavo vakati, “Une dhimoni, naye waakupenga. Ngenyi mwechimupurutana?”" 
John10:21 Vamweni vakati, “Aya mazwi andiopi anoereketwa ngounomuka nedhimoni. Dhimoni ringapembenudza madziso ebofu here?”" 
John10:22 Waiya mukuwo wedhiri rokupira Temperi muJerusarema; paiya pachando," 
John10:23 naJesu wakahamba muTemperi, muBerere raSoromoni." 
John10:24 Ndizvo vaJudha vakamuunganira, vakati kwaari, “Unotiita gariremwo metsa riini? Kuti uri Kristu, tironzere pamhene.”" 
John10:25 Jesu wakavapingura echiti, “Ndakamuronzera, nemwi amutendi. Mishando yendinoita ngezina raBaba angu, inopupura ndini;" 
John10:26 asi imwimwi amutendi ngokuti amusiri vemakwai angu. 
John10:27 Makwai angu anozwa izwi rangu, neni ndinoazia, nawo anonditeera;" 
John10:28 ndinoapa kupona kusikaperi, nawo aazofi nariini, zve akuna unoabvuka kubva munyara yangu." 
John10:29 Baba angu, uwo wakaapa kwendiri, mukuru kwavari veshe, apana naumwe unokona kuabvuka kubva munyara yaBaba." 
John10:30 Inini naBaba tiriumwe.” 
John10:31 VaJudha vakatonherazve mapuwe kuti vamuponde. 
John10:32 Jesu wakavapingura echiti, “Ndakamuonisa mishando mizhinji yakanaka inobva kunaBaba. Ngouri kweiyo mishando womunondipondera ngemapuwe?”" 
John10:33 VaJudha vakamupingura vechiti, “Atikupondi ngendaa yomushando wakanaka, asi ngendaa yokutuka Mwari; ngokuti iwewe, uri munhu, unodziita Mwari.”" 
John10:34 Jesu wakavapingura echiti, “Akuzi kunyorwa here muMipango yenyu kuti, ‘Ndakati, muri zvimwari?’" 
John10:35 Kudai akavadaidza kuti zvimwari, kwavari avo kwarakaguma izwi raMwari, (nezvinyorwa azvingadarikwi)," 
John10:36 munoereketa ngenyi ndiye, uwo waakaemesa Baba nokumutuma munyika kuti, ‘Unotuka Mwari,’ ngokuti ndakaronza kuti, ‘Inini ndiri Mukororo waMwari?’" 
John10:37 Kudai ndisikaiti mishando yaBaba angu, musanditenda;" 
John10:38 asi kuti ndechiiita, kunyazwi musikanditendi, tendai mishando, kuti muzie nokuzwisisa kuti Baba vari mukati mwangu neni ndiri mukati mwaBaba.”" 
John10:39 Ndizvo vakatsvakazve kumubata, asi iye wakapokonyoka kubva munyara dzavo." 
John10:40 Naye wakaendazve ruseri rweJorodhani kundau iyo yaaibhabhatidzira Johani pakutanga, wakagarapo." 
John10:41 Vanhu vazhinji vakauya kwaari; navo vakati, “Johani aazi kuita mioniso, asi zveshe zvaakaronza Johani ngendaa youyu munhu zvine gwinyiso.”" 
John10:42 Vazhinji vakatenda mwaari apapo. 
John11:1 Zvino munhu umweni wairwara, waizwi Razarusi weBhethani, guta raMaria nataita ake Maritha." 
John11:2 Ndiye uyu Maria wakadzodza Mambo ngemafuta, akapukuta tsoka dzake ngebvudzi rake, mukoma wake Razarusi wairwara." 
John11:3 Ndizvo hanzvadzi dzake dzakatumira kwaari dzechiti, “Mambo, penya, uwo wounoda unorwara.”" 
John11:4 Asi apo Jesu azvizwa wakati, “Uku kurwara andikwopi kworufu; asi ngokwokukurisa Mwari, kuti Mukororo waMwari akuriswe ndikwo.”" 
John11:5 Zvino Jesu wakada Maritha nomunun'una wake naRazarusi. 
John11:6 Ndizvo apo azwa kuti wairwara, wakagara mazuva mairi pandau paaiyapo." 
John11:7 Ngesure kweizvi wakati kuvadzidzi vake, “Ngatihwirirezve Judhia.”" 
John11:8 Vadzidzi vakati kwaari, “Rabhi, vaJudha vaitotsvaka kukuponda ngemapuwe, wohwirireyozve here?”" 
John11:9 Jesu wakapingura akati, “Amuna maawa gumi namairi muzuva here? Kudai munhu echihamba masikati aapumhunwi, ngokuti unoona kujeka kwomunyika muno." 
John11:10 Asi kudai munhu echihamba usiku unopumhunwa, ngokuti kujeka amuna mukati mwake.”" 
John11:11 Wakaereketa izvi, naapo wakati kwavari, “Razarusi shamwari yedu waata, asi inini ndinoenda koomumusa.”" 
John11:12 Ndizvo vadzidzi vakati kwaari, “Mambo, kuti akaata, unozoitanane.”" 
John11:13 Zvino Jesu waiya aereketa ngorufu rwake, asi ivo vaikarakadza kuti waiereketa ngokuzorora mukuata." 
John11:14 Naapo Jesu wakanasa kuvaronzera pamhene kuti, “Razarusi wafa;" 
John11:15 neni ndinodakara ngepamusoro penyu ngokuti ndaiya ndisiriyo, kuti mutende. Asi ngatiende kwaari.”" 
John11:16 Ndizvo Thomasi, uwo unozwi Munyambiri, wakati kuvadzidzi vangani vake, “Nesu ngatiendewo, kuti tife naye.”" 
John11:17 Naapo Jesu aguma, wakaona kuti Razarusi waiya aanemazuva marongomuna muiba." 
John11:18 Bhethani raiya pasinde peJerusarema, pasikagumi makhiromitha matatu," 
John11:19 nevazhinji vevaJudha vaiya vaguma kunaMaritha naMaria, kuti vavaembedzere ngendaa yokufa kwomukoma wavo." 
John11:20 Naapo Maritha, azwa kuti Jesu uri kuuya, wakaenda kooshongana naye, asi Maria wakasara akagara mumhatso." 
John11:21 Ndizvo Maritha wakati kunaJesu, “Mambo, kudai waiya pano, mukoma wangu waidai asikazi kufa." 
John11:22 Nazvino ndinozia kuti izvo zvounozokumbira kunaMwari, Mwari unozokupa.”" 
John11:23 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Mukoma wako unozomukazve.”" 
John11:24 Maritha wakati kwaari, “Ndinozia kuti unozomuka mukumuka kwezuva rokupera.”" 
John11:25 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Inini ndiri kumuka nokupona; uwo unonditenda kunyazwi afa, unozoponazve," 
John11:26 nouwo unopona echinditenda, aatongozofi. Unotenda ichi here?”" 
John11:27 Wakati kwaari, “Eya, Mambo; inini ndinotenda kuti iwewe ndiwe Kristu, Mukororo waMwari, uwo unouya munyika.”" 
John11:28 Naapo aronza izvi, wakaenda, akadaidza Maria munun'una wake ngokufishika, akati, “Mudzidzisi waapano, unokudaidza.”" 
John11:29 Naye azwa, wakakasira kumiruka, akaenda kwaari." 
John11:30 Zvino Jesu waiya asati aguma muguta, asi waiya achipo paakashongana naMaritha." 
John11:31 Naapo vaJudha avo vaiya naye mumhatso vechimuembedzera, vaona kuti Maria wamiruka ngokukasira, akabuda kubanze, vakamuteera, vechikarakadza kuti unoenda kuiba koochemerapo." 
John11:32 Apo Maria aguma paiya naJesu, amuona wakawa pashi patsoka dzake, akati kwaari, “Mambo, kudai waiya pano, mukoma wangu waidai asikazi kufa.”" 
John11:33 Naapo Jesu amuona echichema, nevaJudha vechichema, avo vakauya naye, wakaita mahwema mumweya mwake nokutambudzika;" 
John11:34 naye wakati, “Mwakamuradzika pari?” Vakati kwaari, “Mambo, uyai muone.”" 
John11:35 Jesu wakachema masodzi. 
John11:36 Ndizvo vaJudha vakati, “Wonai, kumudisisa kwake!”" 
John11:37 Asi vamweni vavo vakati, “Uyu munhu, wakasvinura madziso owaiya bofu, waiya asikakoni here kuita kuti uyu munhu asafa?”" 
John11:38 Naapo Jesu, echitambudzika kakurutu mukati mwake, wakaguma kuiba; raiya bako nebuwe raiya rakadumaidza padera paro." 
John11:39 Jesu wakati, “Dusai buwe.” Maritha, hanzvadzi youwo wakafa, wakati kwaari, “Mambo, zvino wotonuhwa, ngokuti waane mazuva marongomuna afa.”" 
John11:40 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Andizi kukuronzera here kuti dai wechitenda ungazoona uthende hwaMwari?”" 
John11:41 Ndizvo vakadusa buwe. NaJesu wakaringira mudenga akati, “Baba, ndinomubonga ngokuti mwakandizwa." 
John11:42 Neni ndinozia kuti unondizwa ngenguva dzeshe. Asi ngepamusoro pembungano yakaema pasinde ndaronza kudaro, kuti itende kuti ndiwe wakandituma.”" 
John11:43 Naapo aronza izvi, wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru echiti, “Razarusi, buda.”" 
John11:44 Uwo waiya akafa wakabuda, akasungwa tsoka nenyara ngemachira okuikwa nawo, nehope yake yakasungwa ngejira doko. Jesu wakati kwavari, “Musunhurenyi, mumurekere aende.”" 
John11:45 Ndizvo vazhinji vevaJudha avo vakauya kunaMaria, vechiona izvo zvaakaita Jesu, vakatenda;" 
John11:46 asi vamweni vavo vakaenda kuvaFarisi, vakavaronzera zvaaiya aita Jesu." 
John11:47 Ndizvo vapristi vakuru nevaFarisi vakaungana pamwepo nevatongi kuita bangano, vakati, “Tinozoitenyi? Ngokuti uyu munhu unoita mioniso yakawanda." 
John11:48 Kudai techimurekera echiangira kudaro, vanhu veshe vanozotenda kwaari, nevaRoma vanozouya vaparadze zveshe ndau yedu yakachena nedzinza redu.”" 
John11:49 Asi umwe wavo, Kaiafasi, uwo waiya mupristi mukuru ngegorero, wakati kwavari, “Amuzii chiro nachimwe." 
John11:50 Amuzwisisi kuti zvirinane kwomuri kuti munhu umwe unosisira kufira vanhu vazhinji pane kuti dzinza reshe ripere.” 
John11:51 Aazi kuronza izvi ngokuda kwake, asi ngokuti waiya mupristi mukuru ngegorero, wakaprofeta kuti Jesu unozofira dzinzaro," 
John11:52 asi haiwa kufira dzinzaro kwega, asi kuti aunganidzewo pamwepo vana vaMwari avo vakapararira kunyika dzeshe, kuti vaite umwe." 
John11:53 Ndizvo kubvira ngezuva iro vakaita bangano pamwepo kuti vamuuraye. 
John11:54 Ndizvo Jesu aazi kuchahambazve pamhene pakati pevaJudha, asi kubva apo wakaenda kunyika iri pasinde norubaya, kudhorobha rinozwi Efuremu; naapo wakagara nevadzidzi vake." 
John11:55 Zvino Phasika revaJudha raiya pasinde, vazhinji vakakwira Jerusarema vechibva munyika, Phasika risati raguma, kuti vadzichenese." 
John11:56 Ndizvo vakatsvaka Jesu, vakaema muTemperi vechiti umwe kune umweni, “Munotinyi? Kuti aazouyi here kudhiri?”" 
John11:57 Ndizvo vapristi vakuru nevaFarisi vaiya vakaita mupango kuti kunyazwi ndiani unozia paari, ngaaronze, kuti vamubate." 
John12:1 Ndizvo mazuva matanhatu Phasika risati raguma, Jesu wakaguma Bhethani, apo paiya naRazarusi, uwo waakamusa kwavakafa." 
John12:2 Naapo vakamunasirira kudya kwemadeekoni; Maritha wakavaburira, naRazarusi waiya umwe weavo vaigara naye pakudya." 
John12:3 Naapo Maria wakatora mafuta anoda kukwana litha okuzora enarde aidhura naye wakadzodza tsoka dzaJesu, akapukuta tsoka dzake ngebvudzi rake; nemhatso yakazara ngegwema rakanaka remafuta." 
John12:4 Asi Judhasi Isikarioti, umwe wevadzidzi vake, (uwo waizomupira) wakati," 
John12:5 “Ngenyi asikazi kutengeswa mafuta aya ngemadhora mazana matatu, apuwe varombo?”" 
John12:6 Izvi wakazvironza, haiwa ngokuti waivada varombo, asi ngokuti waiya mbavha, waingwarira nyede naye waitora zvaiiswamwo." 
John12:7 Ndizvo Jesu wakati, “Murekerei ari ega. Ngaangwaririre zuva rokuikwa kwangu." 
John12:8 Ngokuti varombo munavo nguva dzeshe, asi amunenipi nguva dzeshe.”" 
John12:9 Naapo vazhinji vembungano yevaJudha vakazia kuti waiyapo, vakauya, haiwa kuti vaone Jesu kwega, asi kuti vaonezve Razarusi, uwo waakamusa kubva kwavakafa." 
John12:10 Ndizvo vapristi vakuru vakapangana kuti vauraye naRazarusiwo," 
John12:11 ngokuti ngepamusoro pake vazhinji vevaJudha vaienda vechitenda kunaJesu. 
John12:12 Nechimangwani mbungano huru iyo yakauya kudhiri, yakazwa kuti Jesu unouya Jerusarema." 
John12:13 Yakatora matai emichindwi, yakabuda kooshongana naye, vakadaidzira vechiti, “Hosana! Unomuchena uwo unouya ngezina raMambo, Mambo waIsuraeri!”" 
John12:14 NaJesu wakaona mwana wembongoro, naye wakagadha padera payo, kudai ngezvezvakanyorwa," 
John12:15 “Usatya, iwewe mukunda weZioni. Ringira, mambo wako unouya, akagadha padera pemwana wembongoro!”" 
John12:16 Vadzidzi vake avazi kuzvizwisisa izvi pakutanga, asi apo Jesu airikidzwa, naapo vakachizokarakadza kuti izvi zvaiya zvakanyorwa ngendaa yake nokuti vakamuitira izvi." 
John12:17 Nembungano iyo yaiya naye apo paakadaidza Razarusi kubva muiba akamumusa kwavakafa yakaita chapupu. 
John12:18 Ngeiyi ndaa mbungano yakaenda kooshongana nayezve, ngokuti yaiya yazwa kuti wakaita mushamiso." 
John12:19 Ndizvo vaFarisi vakati pakati pavo umwe kunoumweni, “Munoona, amungaiti chiro; ringirai, nyika yeshe inomuteera.”" 
John12:20 Zvino vaiyapo vaGiriki vamweni pakati peavo vakakwira koodira kudhiri. 
John12:21 Ndizvo ava vakauya kunaFiripu, uwo waibva Bhethisaidha reGarire, vakakumbira kwaari vechiti, “Mambo, tinoda kuona Jesu.”" 
John12:22 Firipu wakaenda, akaronzera Andreu; Andreu wakaenda naFiripu, vakaronzera Jesu." 
John12:23 NaJesu wakavapingura echiti, “Awa raguma rokuti Mukororo woMunhu akudzwe." 
John12:24 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kudai tsangu yekoroni isikawi mumavhu nokufa, inondogara iriyo yega; asi kuti ikafa, inozobereka tsangu dzakawanda." 
John12:25 Uwo unoda kupona kwake unozokurasha, nouwo unozonda kupona kwake munyika muno, unozokungwarira kupona kusikaperi." 
John12:26 Kudai munhu echindishandira, ngaanditeere, kuti pendiri naye muranda wangu unozoapowo; kuti munhu echindishandira, Baba vanozomuremeredza." 
John12:27 “Zvino mweya wangu unotambudzika. Neni ndinozotinyi, ‘Baba, ndiponese kubva kuneiri awa here?’ Haiwa, ndiyo ndaa yendakauyira awa iri." 
John12:28 Baba, ngarikudzwe zina renyu.” Apapo rakauya izwi rechibva mudenga rechiti, “Ndakarikudza, neni ndinozorikudzazve.”" 
John12:29 Nembungano yaiya yakaema apo yakarizwa, yakati, “Kwatinhira.” Vamweni vakati, “Ingirosi yaereketa naye.”" 
John12:30 Jesu wakapingura akati, “Iri izwi arizi kuuya ngendaa yangu, asi ngendaa yenyu." 
John12:31 Zvino kwaapano kutongwa kwenyika iyi, zvino mutongi wenyika iyi unozorashwa kubanze." 
John12:32 Neni, naapo ndamirudzwa kubva panyika, ndinozokweera vanhu veshe kwendiri.”" 
John12:33 Wakaronza izvi echionisa njira yokufa kwaaizofa ndikwo. 
John12:34 Ndizvo mbungano yakamupingura yechiti, “Takazwa muMipango kuti Kristu unozogara mhera nariini. Zvino unoronzenyi wechiti, ‘Mukororo woMunhu unosisira kuti amirudzwe?’ Ndiani uyu Mukororo woMunhu?”" 
John12:35 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Inguva doko kujeka kuchipo pakati penyu. Hambai muchinokujeka, kuti chidima chisamubata; nouwo unohamba muchidima aatongozii paanoenda." 
John12:36 Muchinokujeka, tendai kujeka, kuti muite vana vokujeka.” Naapo Jesu aronza izvi, wakabvapo akadzifisha kubva kwavari." 
John12:37 Kunyazwi aiya aita mioniso mizhinji pamberi pavo, asi avazi kumutenda." 
John12:38 Uku kwaiya kuzadzisa izwi raIsaya muprofeti raakaereketa, iro rinoti, “Mambo, ndiani wakatenda izwi redu, nomuoko waMambo Mwari wakaoniswa kunaani?”" 
John12:39 Ndizvo vaiya vasikakoni kutenda, ngokuti Isaya unotizve," 
John12:40 “Uwo wakapofomadza madziso avo, wakakonzisa mwoyo yavo, kuti vasazoona ngemadziso avo, vazwisise ngomwoyo yavo, vatenderuke neni ndivaponese.”" 
John12:41 Isaya wakaronza izvi ngokuti wakaona uthende hwake, akaereketa ndiye." 
John12:42 Kunyazwi zvakanyadaro vazhinji vemadzimambo vakamutenda, asi ngendaa yokutya vaFarisi avazi kumutenda ngomuromo, kuti vasadzingwa kubva mumhatso yokudira." 
John12:43 Ngokuti vaipinda kuda kukudzwa ngevanhu kunokukudzwa ndiMwari. 
John12:44 Jesu wakadaidzira akati, “Uwo unonditenda, aatendi inini akadi, asi unotenda uwo wakandituma." 
John12:45 Nouwo unondiona unoonawo wakandituma. 
John12:46 Inini ndakauya ndiri kujeka munyika, kuti kunyazwi ndiani unotenda kwendiri asachagara muchidima." 
John12:47 Kunyazwi ndiani unozwa mazwi angu asikaangwariri, andimutongi inini; ngokuti andizi kuuya kootonga nyika, asi kooponesa nyika." 
John12:48 Iye unondiramba asikaashiri mazwi angu unaye unomutonga; izwi iro rendakaereketa ndiro rinozomutonga ngezuva rokupera. 
John12:49 Ngokuti andizi kutera kudziereketera ngesimba rangu; asi Baba uwo wakandituma iye pachake wakandipanga chendinozoronza nechendinozoereketa. 
John12:50 Neni ndinozia kuti mupango wake uri kupona kusikaperi. Ndizvo izvo zvendinoereketa, ndinozviereketa kudai ngezvandakaronzerwa ndiBaba.”" 
John13:1 Zvino nguva yeDhiri rePhasika isati yaguma, apo Jesu echizia kuti nguva yake yaguma kuti abve munyika muno aende kunaBaba, avada vake avo vaiya munyika, wakavada metsa kumagumo." 
John13:2 Vachadya kudya kwemadeekoni, Sathani waiya atopinda mumwoyo mwaJudhasi, mukororo waSimoni Isikarioti, kuti amupire." 
John13:3 Jesu, echizia kuti Baba vaiya vamupa zveshe munyara dzake nokuti wakabva kunaMwari nokuti unoenda kunaMwari," 
John13:4 wakamiruka kubva pakudya kwemadeekoni, wakakhumura zvokupfeka zvepadera zvake, wakatora jira rokupukuta ndiro, akasungira muchiunu chake." 
John13:5 Naapo wakadurura mvura muchidziyo chokushambira, akatanga kushamba tsoka dzevadzidzi nokudzipukuta ngejira raaiya akasungira muchiunu." 
John13:6 Ndizvo wakaguma panaSimoni Petro; Petro wakati kwaari, “Mambo, iwewe unoshamba tsoka dzangu here?”" 
John13:7 Jesu wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Icho chendinoita inini, iwewe auchizii zvino, asi unozochizwisisa ngesure kweizvi.”" 
John13:8 Petro wakati kwaari, “Auzoshambi tsoka dzangu nariini.” Jesu wakamupingura, akati, “Dai ndisikakushambi, auna chikoaniswa neni.”" 
John13:9 Simoni Petro wakati kwaari, “Mambo, kusachaita tsoka dzangu dzega asi nadzo nyara dzangu nesoro rangu!”" 
John13:10 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Iye washambwa muiri weshe aachatami chiro chimweni kwega kushambwa tsoka dzake, asi wacheneswa yaamho. Nemwi mwacheneswa, asi haiwa mweshe.”" 
John13:11 Ngokuti waimuzia uwo waizomupira; ndizvo wakati, “Amuzi kucheneswa mweshe.”" 
John13:12 Naapo Jesu aiya ashamba tsoka dzavo nokutora zvokupfeka zvake nokugara pandau yake, wakati kwavari, “Munozwisisa here chendaita?" 
John13:13 Munondidaidza kuti Mudzidzisi nokuti Mambo; nemwi munonasa kuronza, ngokuti ndini." 
John13:14 Zvino kudai inini, Mambo noMudzidzisi wenyu, ndashamba tsoka dzenyu, nemwiwo kunosisira kuti mushambane tsoka dzenyu." 
John13:15 Ngokuti ndamupa chionero, kuti nemwi muite kudai ngezvandaita kwomuri." 
John13:16 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, muranda aasimukuru kupinda mambo wake, nokuti wakatumwa aakuri kupinda uwo wakamutuma." 
John13:17 Kudai mwechizia izvi zviro, munomuchena kudai mwechizviita." 
John13:18 Andiereketi ndimwi mweshe akadi; ndinovazia avo vendakatsanangura; asi kuti chinyorwa chizadzisike chinoti, ‘Uwo unodya chingwa changu, wakandimirudzira chisisinho chake kurwisana neni.’" 
John13:19 Zvino ndinomuronzera izvi zvisati zvaitika, kuti apo zvaitika mutende kuti ndini." 
John13:20 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, iye unoashira uwo wendinotuma unoashira inini; nouwo unondiashira unoashira uwo wakandituma.”" 
John13:21 Naapo Jesu aiya aereketa izvi, wakatambudzika mumweya wake, wakapupura akati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, umwe wenyu unozondipira.”" 
John13:22 Vadzidzi vakaringirana vechishamiswa kuti unoereketa ndiani. 
John13:23 Umwe wavadzidzi vake waiya akatseama paditi raJesu, uwo waidiwa ndiJesu;" 
John13:24 ndizvo Simoni Petro wakamukopera akati kwaari, “Tironzere, ndiani waanoereketa ndiye.”" 
John13:25 Ndizvo uwo wakatseyama paditi raJesu wakati kwaari, “Mambo, ndiani?”" 
John13:26 Jesu wakapingura akati, “Ndiye uwo wendinozosheya mushuva ndimupe.” Naapo asheya chigurwa chechingwa wakaupa Judhasi, mukororo waSimoni Isikarioti." 
John13:27 Naapo ngesure kwechigurwa chechingwa, Sathani wakapotera kwaari. Ndizvo Jesu wakati kwaari, “Izvo zvounoda kuita zviite ngokukasira.”" 
John13:28 Paiya pasina munhu pakudya wakazia singwisingwi yezvaakaereketa kwaari. 
John13:29 Ngokuti vamweni vakapinimidza kuti, ngokuti Judhasi waiya nenyede yemare, Jesu waimuronzera echiti, “Tenga zvetinoda paDhiri rePhasika,” nokuti ape chiro kuvarombo." 
John13:30 Ndizvo iye aashira chigurwa chechingwa, paripo wakabuda kuenda. Hwaiya hwaa usiku." 
John13:31 Naapo aiya abuda, Jesu wakati, “Zvino Mukororo woMunhu wakudzwa naMwari wakudzwa mukati mwake." 
John13:32 Kudai Mwari akudzwa mukati mwake, Mwari unozomukudzawo mukati mwake emene, naye unozomukudza paripo apapo." 
John13:33 Vana vadoko, inguva doko ndichinemwi. Munozonditsvaka; kudai ngezvandakaronza kuvaJudha, ndizvo ndinoti kwomuri, ‘Pendinoenda, amukoni kuuyapo.’" 
John13:34 Ndinomupa mupango mutsva, kuti mudane umwe kunoumweni; kudai ndini ndakamuda, ngokudaro imwimwiwo mudane." 
John13:35 Ngeichi vanhu veshe vanozozia kuti imwimwi muri vadzidzi vangu, kudai muno rudo umwe kunoumweni.”" 
John13:36 Simoni Petro wakati kwaari, “Mambo, unoenda kuri?” Jesu wakapingura, akati, “Pendinoenda, aukoni kunditeera zvino; asi unozoteera sure kweizvi.”" 
John13:37 Petro wakati kwaari, “Mambo, andikoni kukuteera zvino ngenyi? Ndinozofa ngepamusoro pako.”" 
John13:38 Jesu wakapingura, akati, “Unozofa ngepamusoro pangu here? Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, jongwe arizoriri usati wandiramba katatu." 
John14:1 “Mwoyo yenyu isatambudzika; tendai kunaMwari, mutendewo kwendiri." 
John14:2 Mumhatso mwaBaba angu huriyo ugaro hwakawanda. Kudai zvisakadaro, ndaizodai ndisikazi kumuronzera here kuti ndinoenda koomunasirira ugaro?" 
John14:3 Kudai ndechienda koomunasirira ugaro, ndinozouyazve nokumuashira ndemene, kuti pendiri inini, nemwi mungazoapowo." 
John14:4 Nependinoenda munoizia njira.” 
John14:5 Thomasi wakati kwaari, “Mambo, atizii pounoenda. Njira tingaizia ngenyi?”" 
John14:6 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Inini ndiri njira negwinyiso nokupona. Akuna unouya kunaBaba, asikauyi ndini." 
John14:7 Kudai mwakandizia, mwaizodai mwakamuzia Baba anguwo. Kubvira pano munomuzia, nemwi mwamuona.”" 
John14:8 Firipu wakati kwaari, “Mambo, tipangidzire Baba, nesu tikwaniswe.”" 
John14:9 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Ndakagara nemwi mukuwo wakadai kureba, asi ausati wandizia here, Firipu? Iye wakandiona inini wakaona Baba. Unoronza ngenyi kuti, ‘Tipangidzire Baba?’" 
John14:10 Autendi here kuti inini ndiri mukati mwaBaba naBaba vari mukati mwangu? Mazwi endinoereketa kwomuri andidziereketeri ngesimba rangu; asi Baba vanogara mukati mwangu ndivo vanoita mishando yavo. 
John14:11 Tendai inini kuti ndiri mukati mwaBaba naBaba vari mukati mwangu; asi kudai musikatendi kudaro, tendai ngepamusoro pemishando yemene." 
John14:12 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, uwo unonditenda mishando yendinoita unozoitawo; mishando yakakura kupinda iyi unozoiita, ngokuti inini ndinoenda kunaBaba." 
John14:13 Kunyazwi chiinyi chomunozokumbira ngezina rangu ndinozochiita, kuti Baba vairikidzwe kubudikidza ngoMukororo." 
John14:14 Kudai mwanyazokumbirenyi kwendiri ngezina rangu, inini ndinozochiita." 
John14:15 “Kudai mwechindida, munozongwarira mipango yangu." 
John14:16 Neni ndinozokumbira Baba, naye unozomupa umweni Muembedzeri, kuti agare nemwi nokusikaperi," 
John14:17 ndiye Mweya wegwinyiso; nyika aikoni kumuashira, ngokuti aimuoni nokuti kumuzia. Imwimwi munomuzia, ngokuti unogara nemwi, naye unozogara mukati mwenyu." 
John14:18 “Andizomusii muri nherera; ndinozouya kwomuri. 
John14:19 Kuchinenguva doko nenyika aichazondioni, asi imwimwi munozondiona; ngokuti inini ndinopona, nemwi munozoponawo." 
John14:20 Ngeiro zuva munozozia kuti inini ndiri mukati mwaBaba angu, nemwi muri mukati mwangu, neni ndiri mukati mwenyu." 
John14:21 Uwo unemipango yangu echiingwarira, uwo ndiye unondida; nouwo unondida unodiwa ndiBaba angu, neni ndinozomuda nokudzionisa pachangu kwaari.”" 
John14:22 Judhasi (haiwa Isikarioti) wakati kwaari, “Mambo, unozoita maitirenyi kuti unozodzionisa kwetiri, usikadzionisi kunyika?”" 
John14:23 Jesu wakamupingura, akati kwaari, “Kunyazwi ndiani unondida unozongwarira mazwi angu, naBaba angu vanozomuda, nesu tinozouya kwaari tiite ugaro hwedu pamwepo naye." 
John14:24 Uwo usikandidi aangwariri mazwi angu. Neizwi romunozwa arisirangu akadi, asi ngeraBaba avo vakandituma." 
John14:25 “Izvi zviro ndamuronzera apo ndichakagara nemwi. 
John14:26 Asi Muembedzeri, Mweya Wakachena, waachazotuma Baba ngezina rangu, uwo unozomudzidzisa zviro zveshe, amucherechedzise zveshe zvendakamuronzera." 
John14:27 Kunyarara ndinokusiya kwomuri; kunyarara kwangu ndinomupa. Andimupi kudai ngokupa kwenyika. Mwoyo yenyu isatambudzika, isakarukazve." 
John14:28 Mwakazwa kuti ndakati kwomuri, ‘Ndinoenda, neni ndinozouyazve kwomuri.’ Kudai mwakandida, mwaizodakara kuti ndinoenda kunaBaba, ngokuti Baba vari vakuru kwendiri." 
John14:29 Zvino ndamuronzera zvisati zvaitika, kuti apo zvoozoitika mutende." 
John14:30 Ngesure kweizvi andichazoereketi zvizhinji nemwi, ngokuti mutongi wenyika iyi unouya. Aana simba padera pangu;" 
John14:31 asi ndinoita kudai ngezvaakandipanga Baba, kuti nyika izie kuti ndinomuda Baba. Mirukai, ngatibve pano." 
John15:1 “Inini ndiri muvhini wegwinyiso naBaba angu murimi. 
John15:2 Matai eshe ari mukati mwangu asikabari michero, unoadusa, nawo eshe anobara michero unoatongora, kuti abare michero yakapinda kuwanda." 
John15:3 Imwimwi muri vakatocheneswa ngeizwi rendakaereketa kwomuri. 
John15:4 Garai mukati mwangu neni mukati mwenyu. Kudai ngedai risikakoni kubara michero rega, risikagari mukati mwomuvhini, zvakadaro nemwi kudai musikagari mukati mwangu." 
John15:5 Inini ndiri muvhini, imwimwi muri matai. Uwo unogara mukati mwangu, neni ndiri mukati mwake, ndiye unobara michero yakawanda, ngokuti ngepabanze pangu imwimwi amungakoni kuita chiro." 
John15:6 Kunyazwi ndiani usikagari mukati mwangu, unorashwa kubanze kudai ngedai, rinofota; nematai vanoaunganidza, vaaposhere mumuriro nawo anotsva." 
John15:7 Kudai mwechigara mukati mwangu, nemazwi angu anogara mukati mwenyu, munozokumbira izvo zvomunoda, nazvo zvinozoitwa kwomuri." 
John15:8 Ngeizvi Baba angu vanokudzwa, kuti mubare michero yakawanda, ngokudaro muite vadzidzi vangu." 
John15:9 Kudai ndiBaba vakandida, ngokudaro neni ndakamudawo; garai murudo rwangu." 
John15:10 Kudai mwechingwarira mipango yangu, munozogara murudo rwangu, kudai ndini ndakangwarira mipango yaBaba angu nokugara murudo rwake." 
John15:11 “Ndakaereketa izvi kwomuri, kuti kudakara kwangu kugare kwomuri, nokuti kudakara kwenyu kuzadzisike." 
John15:12 Uyu ndiwo mupango wangu, kuti mudane kudai ndini ndakamuda." 
John15:13 Akuna munhu unorudo rukuru kupinda urwu, kuti munhu afe ngepamusoro peshamwari dzake." 
John15:14 Imwimwi muri shamwari dzangu kudai mwechiita izvo zvendinomupanga. 
John15:15 Andichamudaidzi kuti muri varanda, ngokuti muranda aazii chinoitwa ndiMambo wake; asi ndakamudaidza kuti muri shamwari, ngokuti zveshe zvendakazwa kunaBaba angu ndakazviziisa kwomuri." 
John15:16 Imwimwi amuzi kunditsanangura, asi ndakamutsanangura inini, ndikamuemesa kuti muende, mubare michero nokuti michero yenyu igare; kuti kunyazwi chiinyi chomunozokumbira kunaBaba ngezina rangu, vachipe kwomuri." 
John15:17 Izvi ndinomupanga, kuti mudane umwe kunoumweni." 
John15:18 “Kudai nyika yechimuzonda, mwechizia kuti yakatanga kundizonda inini." 
John15:19 Kudai mwaiya vomunyika, nyika yaizoda vayo. Asi ngokuti amusiri vomunyika akadi, asi ndakamutsanangura kubva munyika, ndizvo nyika inomuzonda." 
John15:20 Karakadzai izwi iro rendakaereketa kwomuri kuti, ‘Muranda aatongopindi mambo wake.’ Kudai vakanditambudza inini, vanozomutambudzawo; kudai vakangwarira izwi rangu, vanozongwarirawo izwi renyu." 
John15:21 Asi zveshe izvi vanozomuitira ngendaa yezina rangu, ngokuti avamuzii uwo wakandituma." 
John15:22 Kudai ndisikazi kuuya ndikaereketa kwavari, vaizodai vasina kushaisha; asi zvino avana chizato chinovapembedza kushaisha kwavo." 
John15:23 Kunyazwi ndiani unondizonda, unozonda Baba angu." 
John15:24 Kudai ndisikazi kuita pakati pavo mishando iyo isikazi kumboitwa ngoumweni, vangadai vasina kushaisha. Asi zvino vakaona vakazonda teshe inini naBaba angu." 
John15:25 Asi kuti izwi rizadzisike iro rakanyorwa muMipango yavo yokuti, ‘Vakandinyenya pasina ndaa.’" 
John15:26 “Naapo aguma Muembedzeri, uwo wendinozotuma kwomuri echibva kunaBaba, kunyazwi Mweya wegwinyiso, uwo unobva kunaBaba, unozondipupurira;" 
John15:27 nemwiwo muri zvapupu, ngokuti mwaiya neni kubvira pakutanga." 
John16:1 “Ndakaereketa izvi zveshe kwomuri kuti musapumhuniswa. 
John16:2 Vanozomudzinga kubva mumhatso dzavo dzokudira; eya, awa richauya apo kunyazwi ndiani unomuuraya, unozopinimidza kuti unoshandira Mwari." 
John16:3 Navo vanozoita izvi ngokuti avazi kumuzia Baba nokuti inini. 
John16:4 Asi ndakamuronzera izvi zviro, kuti apo raguma awa razvo mucherechedze kuti ndakamuronzera ndizvo. “Asi andizi kumuronzera izvi zviro kubvira pakutanga, ngokuti ndaiya ndichinemwi." 
John16:5 Asi zvino ndinoenda kunouwo wakandituma; akuna naumwe wenyu unondibvunza kuti, ‘Unoenda kuri?’" 
John16:6 Asi ngokuti ndamuronzera izvi zviro, mwoyo yenyu yazara ngokutambudzika." 
John16:7 Asi ndinomuronzera gwinyiso; kuti zvakapinda kumunakira kuti ndiende, ngokuti kudai ndisikaendi, Muembedzeri aazouyi kwomuri; asi kuti ndikaenda, ndinozomutuma kwomuri." 
John16:8 Naapo auya, unozoonisa nyika ngendaa yokushaisha, yokururama nendaa yokutongwa;" 
John16:9 ngendaa yokushaisha, ngokuti avanditendi;" 
John16:10 ngendaa yokururama, ngokuti ndinoenda kunaBaba, nemwi amuchazondioni;" 
John16:11 ngendaa yokutongwa ngokuti mutongi wenyika ino wakatongwa. 
John16:12 “Ndichine zviro zvizhinji zvokumuronzera, asi amukoni kuzviashira zvino." 
John16:13 Naapo Mweya wegwinyiso wauya, unozomutungamirira mugwinyiso reshe; ngokuti aazodziereketeri ngesimba rake, asi zvaanozozwa, ndizvo zvaanozoereketa, naye unozomuronzera zviro zvichauya." 
John16:14 Uwo unozondikudza, ngokuti unozoashira zvokwangu nokuzvironza kwomuri." 
John16:15 Zveshe zvaanazvo Baba ngezvangu; ndiyo ndaa ndakati unozotora zvokwangu nokuzvironza kwomuri. 
John16:16 “Kwenguva doko nemwi amuchazondioni, nenguva dokozve nemwi munozondiona.”" 
John16:17 Vamweni vevadzidzi vake vakaereketa pachavo umwe kunoumweni vechiti, “Chiinyi ichi chaanoereketa kwetiri kuti, ‘Inguva doko nemwi amuchazondioni, nenguva dokozve nemwi munozondiona,’ echitizve, ‘Ngokuti ndinoenda kunaBaba?’ ”" 
John16:18 Ndizvo vakati, “Unoronzenyi echiti, ‘Inguva doko?’ Atizii kuti unoronzenyi.”" 
John16:19 Jesu wakazia kuti vaida kumubvunza; naye wakati kwavari, “Munobvunzana here pakati penyu ngeicho chendaronza kuti, ‘Inguva doko nemwi amuchazondioni, nenguva dokozve nemwi munozondiona?’" 
John16:20 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, munozochema nokuboorera, asi nyika inozodakara; imwimwi munozotambudzika, asi kutambudzika kwenyu kunozotsandudzwa kuita kudakara." 
John16:21 Naapo dzimai roopotwa ngokubara rinotambudzika, ngokuti nguva yaro yaguma; asi rabara mwana, arichakarakadzi ngokurwadziwa, ngendaa yokudakara kuti munhu wabarwa munyika." 
John16:22 Nemwi munozotambudzika zvino, asi ndinozomuonazve nemwoyo yenyu inozodakara, nokudakara kwenyu akuna munhu unokudusa kubva kwomuri." 
John16:23 Ngeiro zuva amuzondibvunzi chiro. Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwomuri, kunyazwi chiinyi chomunozokumbira kunaBaba ngezina rangu, unozochipa kwomuri." 
John16:24 Metsa zvino amuzi kukumbira chiro ngezina rangu. Kumbirai nemwi munozoashira, kuti kudakara kwenyu kuzadzisike." 
John16:25 “Ndakaereketa izvi kwomuri ngemiedzaniso. Asi awa rinouya apo andichazoereketi kwomuri ngemiedzaniso, asi ndinozomuronzera pamhene ndiBaba." 
John16:26 Ngeiro zuva munozokumbira ngezina rangu; neni andironzi kwomuri kuti ndinozomukumbirira kunaBaba; 
John16:27 ngokuti Baba vemene vanomuda, ngokuti imwimwi mwakandida nemwi mwakatenda kuti ndakabva kunaMwari." 
John16:28 Ndakabva kunaBaba, neni ndakauya munyika; zve, ndinosiya nyika, ndechienda kunaBaba.”" 
John16:29 Vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari, “Ringira, zvino worowoereketa pamhene, haiwa ngomuedzaniso!" 
John16:30 Zvino tinozia kuti unozia zviro zveshe, autami munhu naumwe kuti akubvunze; ngeichi tinotenda kuti iwewe wakabva kunaMwari.”" 
John16:31 Jesu wakavapingura echiti, “Zvino munotenda here?" 
John16:32 Ringirai, awa rinouya, eya ratoguma, naapo munozoparadzirwa munhu weshe echienda kanyi kwake nokundisiya ndega. Asi andiri ndega akadi, ngokuti Baba vaneni." 
John16:33 Izvi ndakamuronzera kuti mwendiri muone kunyarara. Munyika munozoa nemadambudziko. Asi shingai mwoyo; ndainyisa nyika!” 
John17:1 Naapo Jesu aereketa mazwi aya, wakamirudza madziso ake mudenga, akati, “Baba, awa raguma; irikidzai Mukororo wenyu kuti Mukororo amuirikidze," 
John17:2 kudai ngezvemwakamupa simba padera penyama yeshe, kuti avape kupona kusikaperi avo veshe vemwakamupa." 
John17:3 Uku ndikwo kupona kusikaperi, kuti vamuzie imwimwi, Mwari ega wegwinyiso, naJesu Kristu uwo womwakatuma." 
John17:4 Inini ndakamuirikidza munyika, ndakapedza mushando womwakandipa kuti ndiuite." 
John17:5 Nazvino imwimwi, Baba, ndiirikidzei mwemene ngokuirikidzwa ukwo kwendaiya nakwo nemwi, ngepamberi nyika isati yasikwa." 
John17:6 “Ndakaita kuti zina renyu riziikanwe kuneavo vanhu vomwakandipa kubva munyika. Vaiya venyu, nemwi mwakavapa kwendiri, navo vakangwarira izwi renyu." 
John17:7 Zvino vanozia kuti zveshe zvemwakandipa zvakabva kwomuri; 
John17:8 ngokuti mazwi omwakandipa ndakaapawo kwavari, navo vakaashira, vakazia ngegwinyiso kuti ndakabva kwomuri; vakatenda kuti imwimwi mwakandituma." 
John17:9 Ndinovakumbirira; andikumbiriri nyika, asi avo vomwakandipa, ngokuti vari venyu." 
John17:10 Zveshe zvangu ngezvenyu nezvenyu ngezvangu; neni ndinoirikidzwa mwavari. 
John17:11 Andichimwopi munyika, asi vachirimwo munyika, neni ndouya kwomuri. Baba Vakachena, vangwarirei muzina renyu, iro romwakandipa, kuti vaite umwe kudai tisu tiri umwe." 
John17:12 Apo ndichinavo, ndakavangwarira muzina renyu, iro romwakandipa. Ndakavarinda, akuna naumwe wavo wakarashika, asi mukororo wokurashwa, kuti zvinyorwa zvizadzisike." 
John17:13 Asi zvino ndinouya kwomuri, neizvi zviro ndinoereketa ndizvo munyika, kuti kudakara kwangu kuzadzisike mukati mwavo." 
John17:14 Ndakapa kwavari izwi renyu, nenyika yakavazonda ngokuti avasiri venyika akadi, kudai ndini ndisiri wenyika akadi." 
John17:15 Andikumbiri kuti muvaduse kubva munyika, asi kuti muvangwarire kubva kunouwo wakashata." 
John17:16 Avasiri venyika akadi, kudai ndini ndisiri wenyika." 
John17:17 Vachenesei mugwinyiso; izwi renyu igwinyiso. 
John17:18 Kudai ngezvomwakandituma munyika, ngokudaro neniwo ndinovatuma munyika." 
John17:19 Ngendaa yavo ndinodzichenesa, kuti navowo vacheneswe mugwinyiso." 
John17:20 “Andikumbiriri ava vega, asi naavo vanozotenda kwendiri ngeizwi ravo," 
John17:21 kuti veshe vaite umwe; kudai ndimwi, Baba, muri mukati mwangu, neni ndiri mukati mwenyu, kuti navo vagare mukati mwedu, kuti nyika itende kuti imwimwi mwakandituma." 
John17:22 Nouthende hwomwakandipa, ndakahupawo kwavari, kuti vaite umwe kudai tisu tiriumwe," 
John17:23 inini mukati mwavo nemwi mukati mwangu, kuti vaitwe vakaperera vari umwe, kuti nyika izie kuti imwimwi mwakandituma nokuti mwakavada kudai ngezvemwakandida inini." 
John17:24 Baba, ndinoda kuti avowo vowakandipa vaapo pendiri kuti varingire uthende hwangu, uhwo hwomwakandipa inini, murudo rwenyu nyika isati yasikwa." 
John17:25 Baba vakarurama, nyika aizi kumuzia asi inini ndinomuzia; naava vakazia kuti imwimwi mwakandituma." 
John17:26 Neni ndakavaziisa zina renyu, neni ndichaita kuti riziikanwe, kuti rudo urwo rwomwakandida ndirwo rugare mukati mwavo, neni ndigare mukati mwavo.”" 
John18:1 Naapo Jesu aereketa mazwi aya, wakabuda nevadzidzi vake, vakaambuka ruseri rwebani reKedhironi, apo paiya nomunda, wakapotera mukati mwawo nevadzidzi vake." 
John18:2 Zvino Judhasi, uwo wakamupira, waizia ngendau iyo, ngokuti Jesu waishonganamwo kazhinji nevadzidzi vake." 
John18:3 Ndizvo Judhasi wakatora chikwata chemasoja nevarindi vamweni vaibva kuvapristi vakuru nevaFarisi, vakaendapo vanezvibani nemasasi nezvokurwa ndizvo." 
John18:4 Zvino Jesu, echizia zveshe zvaizomugumira, wakabuda kwavari, akati, “Munotsvaka anani?”" 
John18:5 Vakamupingura, vakati, “Jesu weNazaretha.” Wakati kwavari, “Ndini.” Judhasi, uwo wakamupira, waiya akaema navo." 
John18:6 Naapo avaronzera kuti, “Ndini,” vakaita fundamutete, vakawa pashi." 
John18:7 Ndizvo wakavabvunzazve, akati, “Munotsvaka anani?” Navo vakati, “Jesu weNazaretha.”" 
John18:8 Jesu wakavapingura, akati, “Ndamuronzera kuti ndini. Ndizvo, kuti mwechitsvaka inini, rekerai vanhu ava vaende.”" 
John18:9 Izvi kwaiya kuzadzisika kweizwi, iro raakaereketa rinoti, “Avo vomwakandipa andizi kurashikirwa naumwe wavo.”" 
John18:10 Zvino Simoni Petro waiya aneshoti, wakaishwamura, akatema hloko yomupristi mukuru, akagura nzee yake yokumudyo. Zina rehloko iyo uwo raiya Marikusi." 
John18:11 Ndizvo Jesu wakati kunaPetro, “Hwirinza shoti yako mumakara ayo! Tsani yaakandipa Baba andizoimwi here?”" 
John18:12 Ndizvo chikwata chemajoni nenduna nevarindi vevaJudha vakabata Jesu, vakamusunga." 
John18:13 Navo vakamuunza kutanga kunaAnasi, ngokuti waiya muzvere waKaiafasi, uwo waiya mupristi mukuru ngegorero." 
John18:14 Ndiye Kaiafasi uwo wakanyowedza vaJudha kuti kwaidikanwa kuti munhu umwe afire vanhu. 
John18:15 Simoni Petro wakateera Jesu, nomudzidzi umweni. Zvino uwo mudzidzi waiziikanwa kumupristi mukuru, wakapotera naJesu muruwanze rwomupristi mukuru," 
John18:16 asi Petro akaema pamusiwo kubanze. Ndizvo mudzidzi umweni, uwo waiziikanwa kumupristi mukuru, wakabuda pabanze, akaereketa kunouwo waingwarira musiwo, akapotedza Petro." 
John18:17 Ndizvo musikana uwo waingwarira musiwo wakati kunaPetro, “Newe auri umwe here wevadzidzi vouyu munhu?” Iye wakati, “Andinipi.”" 
John18:18 Zvino varanda nevarindi vakabasira muriro wamasimbe, ngokuti kwaiya nechando, navo vaiya vakaema vechigota muriro pachavo. NaPetro wakaemawo navo, echigota pachake." 
John18:19 Ndizvo mupristi mukuru wakabvunza Jesu ngendaa yevadzidzi vake nokudzidzisa kwake. 
John18:20 Jesu wakamupingura, akati, “Inini ndakaereketa pamhene kuvanhu venyika; nguva dzeshe ndakadzidzisa mumhatso dzokudira nomuTemperi, apo paiungana veshe vaJudha. Andizi kuereketa chiro ngokufishika." 
John18:21 Unondibvunzirenyi? Bvunza avo vakazwa zvendakaereketa kwavari; vanozia zvendakaereketa inini.” 
John18:22 Naapo aiya aereketa izvi, umwe wevarindi vaiya vakaema apo wakamakaya Jesu ngepama echiti, “Unopingura mupristi mukuru kudaro here?”" 
John18:23 Jesu wakamupingura echiti, “Kudai ndaereketa zvakashata, pupura ngezvakashata. Asi kudai ndaereketa zvakanaka, unondimakairenyi?”" 
John18:24 Ndizvo Anasi wakamutumira akasungwa kunaKaiafasi mupristi mukuru. 
John18:25 Zvino Simoni Petro wakaema echigota muriro. Ndizvo vakati kwaari, “Newe auri umwe here wevadzidzi vake?” Iye wakavapingura, akati, “Inini andisiri umwe wavo.”" 
John18:26 Umwe wevaranda vomupristi mukuru, waiya hama youwo waakatema nzee Petro, wakati, “Andizi kukuona unaye mumunda here?”" 
John18:27 Ndizvo Petro wakarambazve; paripo jongwe rakarira. 
John18:28 Ndizvo vakakweya Jesu kubva kunaKaiafasi vechienda naye kumhatso yokutongera. Kwaiya achimangwanani. Ivo vemene avazi kupotera mumhatso yokutongera, kuti vasazosvipiswa, asi kuti vadye Phasika." 
John18:29 Ndizvo Piratu wakabuda kwavari, akati, “Indaa yenyi yomunoitira uyu munhu?”" 
John18:30 Vakapingura, vakati kwaari, “Kudai uyu munhu asiri muiti wezvakashata, taidai tisikazi kumupira kwouri.”" 
John18:31 Ndizvo Piratu wakati kwavari, “Mutorenyi imwimwi pachenyu mumutonge kudai ngemipango yenyu.” VaJudha vakati kwaari, “Akutenderwi kuti isusu tiuraye munhu nokuti ngouri.”" 
John18:32 Uku kwaiya kuti rizadzisike izwi iro raakaereketa Jesu echionisa kuti injiranyi yaaizofa ndiyo. 
John18:33 Ndizvo Piratu wakapoterazve mumhatso yokutongera, adaidza Jesu, akati kwaari, “Iwewe uri mambo wavaJudha here?”" 
John18:34 Jesu wakapingura echiti, “Unoereketa izvi pachako here nokuti wazvironzerwa ngevamweni ngendaa yangu?”" 
John18:35 Piratu wakapingura, akati, “Inini ndiri muJudha here? Dzinza rako nevapristi vakuru vakakupira kwendiri. Chiinyi chowakamboita?”" 
John18:36 Jesu wakapingura, akati, “Umambo hwangu angohwomunyika muno akadi. Kudai umambo hwangu hwaiya hwomunyika muno, varanda vangu vangadai vakandirwira, kuti ndisapirwa kuvaJudha. Asi zvino umambo hwangu auhuri hwomuno akadi.”" 
John18:37 Ndizvo Piratu wakati kwaari, “Ndizvo uri mambo here?” Jesu wakapingura akati, “Iwewe unoronza kuti ndiri mambo. Ngeiyi ndaa ndakabarwa, ngeiyi ndaa ndakauya munyika, kuti ndipupurire gwinyiso. Kunyazwi ndiani uri wegwinyiso unozwa izwi rangu.”" 
John18:38 Piratu wakati kwaari, “Gwinyiso chiinyi?” Aereketa izvi, wakabudazve kuvaJudha, akati kwavari, “Andioni ndaa kwaari." 
John18:39 Asi imwimwi muno mutoo wokuti ndisunhure umwe kwomuri ngePhasika. Ndizvo munoda here kuti ndisunhure kwomuri mambo wevaJudha?” 
John18:40 Ndizvo vakazhambararazve vechiti, “Haiwa uyu munhu, asi Bharabhasi!” Zvino Bharabhasi waiya dzongoni." 
John19:1 Zvino Piratu wakatora Jesu, akamuchaya." 
John19:2 Nemasoja akaruka dzungudza reminzwa, akariisa padera pesoro rake, akamupfekesa gauni rakatsvukuruka." 
John19:3 Akauya kwaari echiti, “Mwauya, mambo wevaJudha!” Nawo aimuchaya ngenyara dzawo." 
John19:4 NaPiratu wakabudazve, akati kwavari, “Ringirai, ndinomubudisa kwomuri, kuti muzie kuti andioni ndaa kwaari.”" 
John19:5 Ndizvo Jesu wakabuda, akapfekeswa dzungudza reminzwa negauni rakatsvukuruka. Piratu wakati kwavari, “Ringirai uyu munhu!”" 
John19:6 Naapo vapristi vakuru nevarindi vamuona, vakazhambarara vechiti, “Mukohomere, mukohomere!” Piratu wakati kwavari, “Mutorenyi imwimwi mumukohomere, ngokuti andioni ndaa kwaari.”" 
John19:7 VaJudha vakamupingura, vakati, “Tinechironzo, ngendaa yechironzo icho unosisira kuti afe, ngokuti iye wakadziita Mukororo waMwari.”" 
John19:8 Naapo Piratu azwa mazwi aya, wakapinda kutya;" 
John19:9 wakapoterazve mumhatso yokutongera, akati kunaJesu, “Unombobva pari?” Asi Jesu aazi kumupingura." 
John19:10 Ndizvo Piratu wakati kwaari, “Aundipinguri here? Auzii here kuti ndinesimba rokukusunhura, neni ndine simba rokukukohomera?”" 
John19:11 Jesu wakamupingura, akati, “Aungakoni kuanesimba padera pangu kuti usikazi kuripuwa rechibva mudenga; ndizvo uwo wakandipira kwouri unokushaisha kwakapinda kukura.”" 
John19:12 Naapo Piratu wakatsvaka kumusunhura, asi vaJudha vakazhambarara vechiti, “Kuti ukasunhura munhu uyu, auri shamwari yaSiza akadi. Kunyazwi ndiani unodziita mambo unoereketa kumukira Siza.”" 
John19:13 Naapo Piratu azwa aya mazwi, wakabudisa Jesu kubanze, wakagara pachigaro chokutongera ndaa, pandau inozwi Yakagangatwa Mapuwe, asi ngokwechiHebheru inozwi Gabatha." 
John19:14 Zvino raiya zuva rokunasirira Phasika, rooda kuita awa rechitanhatu. Wakati kuvaJudha, “Ringirai mambo wenyu!”" 
John19:15 Ndizvo vakazhambarara vechiti, “Mudusenyi, mudusenyi, mukohomere!” Piratu wakati kwavari, “Ndokohomera mambo wenyu here?” Vapristi vakuru vakapingura vechiti, “Isusu atina mambo asi Siza.”" 
John19:16 Ndizvo wakamupira kwavari kuti akohomerwe. Ndizvo vakatora Jesu. 
John19:17 Naye wakabuda echitwara muchinjiko kuenda kundau inozwi Denhenya, iyo inodaidzwa ngokwechiHebheru kuti, Gorogotha." 
John19:18 Apo ndipo pevakamukohomera, pamwepo nevairi vamwe, umwe ngeino noumweni ngeiyo, naJesu ngepakati." 
John19:19 Piratu wakanyorazve chinyorwa, akachiisa padera pomuchinjiko. Uku ndikwo kunyorwa kwacho, “JESU WENAZARETA, MAMBO WEVAJUDHA.”" 
John19:20 VaJudha vazhinji vakadzidza ichi chinyorwa, ngokuti ndau iyo yaakakohomerwa Jesu yaiya pasinde pedhorobha; nacho chaiya chakanyorwa ngechiHebheru nechiRoma nechiGiriki." 
John19:21 Ndizvo vapristi vakuru vevaJudha vakati kunaPiratu, “Usanyora kuti, ‘Mambo wevaJudha,’ asi kuti, ‘Iye wakati, ndiri mambo wevaJudha.’ ”" 
John19:22 Piratu wakapingura akati, “Chendanyora, ndanyora.”" 
John19:23 Naapo masoja aiya akohomera Jesu, akatora zvokufuka zvake, akazvipaura kuita mirwi mirongomuna, soja rimwe ngarimwe murwi waro. Vakatorazve gauni rake; asi gauni rake nehanzu yake raiya risina musono, asi rakarukwa kubvira ngedera kwaro metsa kubani kwaro." 
John19:24 Ndizvo vakaronzerana pakati pavo vechiti, “Tisaribaura, asi ngatiite mabhigidha, tione kuti ngerani;” kuti chinyorwa chizadzisike chinoti, “Vakakoanisirana zvokufuka zvangu pakati pavo, negauni rangu rakaitirwa mabhigidha.” Ndizvo masoja akaita izvi." 
John19:25 Asi kwaiya kwakaemapo pasinde pomuchinjiko waJesu mai ake, nahurwani amai ake, Maria mukadzi waKropasi, naMaria Magadhareni." 
John19:26 Naapo Jesu aona mai ake nomudzidzi uwo waaida vechiema pasindepo, wakati kunamai ake, “Dzimai, wona mukororo wako!”" 
John19:27 Zvino wakati kunamudzidzi uwo, “Wona mai ako!” Kubvira ngeawa iro mudzidzi uwo wakavatora kuti vagare kanyi kwake." 
John19:28 Ngesure kweizvi Jesu, echizia kuti zviro zveshe zvaiya zvaperera, kuti chinyorwa chizadzisike, wakati, “Ndapera ngenyota.”" 
John19:29 Paiya nechidziyo chakazara ngevhini rairungura; ndizvo vakaisa siponji chakazara ngevhini rairungura pachimuti chehisopi, vakachiisa pamuromo wake." 
John19:30 Naapo Jesu aashira vhini rairungura, wakati, “Zvapera.” Wakakotamisa soro rake naye wakapa mweya wake." 
John19:31 Zvino raiya zuva rokunasirira Phasika. VaJudha vakakumbira Piratu kuti mirenje yavo igurwe, vaduswepo kuti miiri isagara pamuchinjiko ngezuva reSabatha, ngokuti Sabatha iro raiya zuva guru." 
John19:32 Ndizvo majoni akauya, akagura mirenje yowokutanga neyoumweni, avo vakakohomerwa naye." 
John19:33 Asi apo vaguma panaJesu, vakaona kuti waiya afa, avazi kugura mirenje yake." 
John19:34 Asi umwe wemajoni wakabaya parutii pake ngomukhondo, paripo pakabuda ngazi nemvura." 
John19:35 (Nouwo wakazviona wakaita chapupu, nechapupu chake chine gwinyiso, naye unozia kuti unoereketa gwinyiso, kuti nemwiwo mutende.)" 
John19:36 Ngokuti izvi zvakaitika kuti chinyorwa chizadzisike chinoti, “Akuna godo rake narimwe rinozogurwa.”" 
John19:37 Nechinyorwa chimwenizve chinoti, “Vanozomuringira uwo wevakabaya.”" 
John19:38 Ngesure kweizvi, Josefa weArimathia, uwo waiya mudzidzi waJesu, asi ngokufishika ngokutya vaJudha, wakakumbira Piratu kuti aduse muiri waJesu naPiratu wakamutendera. Ndizvo wakauya, akadusa muiri wake." 
John19:39 Nikodhemusiwo wakauya, uwo wakauya kwaari pakutanga usiku, echiunza mutombo wakaita mvemve wemhura nowemuaro, wairema kuda kuguma makhirogiramu makumi matatu." 
John19:40 Ndizvo vakatora muiri waJesu, vakauputira ngejira rakachena pamwepo nomutombo wemakha unonuhwira, kudai ngomutoo wevaJudha wokuika." 
John19:41 Zvino kwaiyapo munda pandau iyo yaakakohomerwa, nomumunda uwo mwaiya neiba idzva risikazi kumboikwamwo munhu." 
John19:42 Ndizvo vakaikamwo Jesu, ngokuti raiya zuva rokunasirira revaJudha, ngokuti iba iro raiya pasindepo." 
John20:1 Zvino ngezuva rokutanga revhiki, Maria Magadhareni wakaenda kuiba mangwanani kuchakasvipa, wakaona buwe rakamburumbudzwa kubva paiba." 
John20:2 Ndizvo wakarumba, akaenda kunaSimoni Petro nokunomudzidzi umweni, uwo waaida Jesu, akati kwavari, “Vakadusa Mambo kubva muiba, nesu atizii pevakamuradzika.”" 
John20:3 Ndizvo Petro wakabuda noumweni mudzidzi vakaenda kuiba. 
John20:4 Zvino vakarumba vari pamwepo, asi mudzidzi umweniwo wakarumba akapindira Petro, naye wakatanga kuguma paiba." 
John20:5 Akakotama pashi, akaringira mukati, akaona machira akachena akaradzikwamwo, asi aazi kupindamwo." 
John20:6 Ndizvo Simoni Petro wakagumawo, echimuteera, wakapotera muiba. Akaona machira akachena akaradzikwa," 
John20:7 nedhuku iro raiya rakasungwa musoro mwake, risikazi kuradzikwa pamwepo nemachira akachena, asi raiya rakapetwa riri rega pandau imweni." 
John20:8 Ndizvo mudzidzi umweni, uwo wakatanga kuguma paiba, wakapoterawo akaona, akatenda;" 
John20:9 (ngokuti vaiya vasati vazwisisa chinyorwa chinoti unosisira kuti amuke kubva kwevakafa.) 
John20:10 Ndizvo vadzidzi avo vakaenda kanyi kwavo. 
John20:11 Asi Maria wakaema kubanze kweiba echichema. Achachema wakakotama, akaringira muiba;" 
John20:12 naye wakaona ngirosi mbiri dzakafuka zvakachena, dzakagara imwe ngokusoro neimweni ngokutsoka, apo powaiya wakaradzikwa muiri waJesu." 
John20:13 Nadzo dzakati kwaari, “Dzimai, unochemenyi?” Wakati kwedziri, “Ngokuti vakadusa Mambo wangu, neni andizii pevakamuradzika.”" 
John20:14 Apo aereketa izvi, wakakunukukira sure, akaona Jesu akaema, asi aazi kuzia kuti ndiJesu." 
John20:15 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Dzimai, unochemenyi? Unotsvaka anani?” Aye, echipinimidza kuti waiya murimi, wakati kwaari, “Mambo, kudai wakamudusa kubva pano, ndironzere powakamuradzika, neni ndimutore.”" 
John20:16 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Maria!” Wakakunukuka, akati kwaari ngechiHebheru, “Rabhoni!” (Ndiwo kuti, Mudzidzisi.)" 
John20:17 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Usandibata, ngokuti andisati ndakwira kuna Baba. Asi enda kunevanun'una vangu, wooti kwavari, ‘Ndinokwira kuna Baba angu naBaba enyu, nokunaMwari wangu naMwari wenyu.’ ”" 
John20:18 Maria Magadhareni wakauya, akaronzera vadzidzi kuti, “Ndaona Mambo,” nokuti wakaereketa izvi kwaari." 
John20:19 Zvino madeekoni ezuvaro rokutanga revhiki, misiwo yakakonywa umwo mwaiya nevadzidzi ngendaa yokutya vaJudha, Jesu wakauya, akaema pakati pavo, akati kwavari, “Kunyarara ngakugare kwomuri.”" 
John20:20 Naapo aereketa izvi, wakavaonisa nyara dzake norutii rwake. Naapo vadzidzi vakadakara apo vaona Mambo." 
John20:21 Jesu wakatizve kwavari, “Kunyarara ngakugare kwomuri. Kudai ngezvaakandituma Baba, ngokudaro ndinomutumawo.”" 
John20:22 Naapo aereketa izvi wakavafemera, akati kwavari, “Ashirai Mweya Wakachena." 
John20:23 Kunyazwi ndiani womunozorekerera zvishaishi zvake, zvinozorekererwa; kunyazwi ndiani womusikazorekereri, azvizorekererwi.”" 
John20:24 Zvino Thomasi, umwe wegumi navairi, uwo unozwi Manyambiri, waiya asiripo navo apo Jesu paakauya." 
John20:25 Ndizvo vadzidzi vamweni vakati kwaari, “Tamuona Mambo.” Asi iye wakati kwavari, “Kuti ndisaona munyara dzake mauri ezvipikiri, ndipfekemwo chinwe changu mumauri ezvipikiri, ndipfeke nyara yangu parutii rwake, andizotendi.”" 
John20:26 Ngesure kwemazuva masere, vadzidzi vaiyazve mumhatso naThomasi waiya navo. Jesu wakauya misiwo yakakonywa, wakaema pakati pavo, wakati “Kunyarara ngakugare kwomuri.”" 
John20:27 Zvino wakati kunaThomasi, “Isa chinwe chako apa, uone nyara dzangu; utambanudze nyara yako, uipfeke parutii rwangu. Usaita usikatendi, asi unotenda.”" 
John20:28 Thomasi wakapingura, akati kwaari, “Mambo wangu naMwari wangu!”" 
John20:29 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Wazotenda ngokuti wandiona here? Vanomuchena avo vanotenda vasikazi kuona.”" 
John20:30 Zvino Jesu wakaita mioniso imweni mizhinji mukuona kwevadzidzi vake, isikazi kunyorwa mutsamba iyi." 
John20:31 Asi iyi yakanyorwa kuti imwimwi mutende kuti Jesu ndiKristu, Mukororo waMwari, nokuti ngokutenda muone kupona ngezina rake." 
John21:1 Ngesure kweizvi Jesu wakadzionisazve kuvadzidzi vake paRuandhle rweThibheriasi; naye wakadzionisa ngenjira iyi. 
John21:2 Vaiya vari pamwepo Simoni Petro naThomasi, unozwi Manyambiri, naNathanaeri, uwo waibva Khana reGarire, nevana vaZebedhi, nevamweni vairi vevadzidzi vake." 
John21:3 Simoni Petro wakati kwavari, “Ndinoenda koobata hove.” Vakati kwaari, “Nesu tinoendawo newe.” Vakaenda, vakakwira mungarava, asi usikuhwo avazi kubata chiro." 
John21:4 Asi apo kwooita mambakwedza, Jesu wakaema pahumbikumbi, asi vadzidzi avazi kuzia kuti ndiJesu." 
John21:5 Ndizvo Jesu wakati kwavari, “Vana, mwabata hove here?” Vakamupingura vechiti, “Haiwa.”" 
John21:6 Wakati kwavari, “Kandirai rutaa ngokurutii rwokumudyo rwengarava, nemwi munozoona.” Ndizvo vakarukandira, vaiya vasina simba rokurukweya ngendaa yokuwanda kwehove." 
John21:7 Ndizvo mudzidzi uwo waaida Jesu wakati kunaPetro, “NdiMambo!” Naapo Simoni Petro azwa kuti ndiMambo, wakasimira jira rake, ngokuti waiya mupunu, wakadzikandira muruandhle." 
John21:8 Asi vadzidzi vamweni vakauya vari mungarava, vechikweya rutaa rwakazara ngehove ngokuti vaiya vasiri kuretu nenyika, asi paida kuita zana remamitha." 
John21:9 Naapo vaguma kuhumbikumbi, vakaona apo muriro wemasimbe, nehove yakaiswa padera pomuriro, nechingwa." 
John21:10 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Unzai dzimweni dzehove dzemwabata zvino.”" 
John21:11 Simoni Petro wakakwiramwo akakweyera rutaa kuhumbikumbi, rwakazara ngehove huru dzaiya zana nemakumi mashanu nenhatu; kunyazwi dzaiya zhinji kudaro, rutaa aruzi kubauka." 
John21:12 Jesu wakati kwavari, “Uyai mudye.” Apana naumwe wevadzidzi waishinga kumubvunza kuti, “Urianani?” Vaizia kuti ndiMambo." 
John21:13 Jesu wakauya, akatora chingwa, akavapa, nehove ngokudaro." 
John21:14 Zvino iyi yaiya yaanguva yechitatu yaakadzipangidza Jesu kuvadzidzi, ngesure kwokumuka kwake kwevakafa." 
John21:15 Naapo vapedza kudya kwemangwanani, Jesu wakati kunaSimoni Petro, “Simoni, mukororo waJohani, unondida kupinda ava here?” Wakati kwaari, “Eya, Mambo, unozia kuti ndinokuda.” Wakati kwaari, “Usha vana vemakwai angu.”" 
John21:16 Wakati kwaarizve ngokwechipiri, “Simoni, mukororo waJohani, unondida yaamho here?” Wakati kwaari, “Eya, Mambo, unozia kuti ndinokuda.” Wakati kwaari, “Ngwarira makwai angu.”" 
John21:17 Wakati kwaari ngokwechitatu, “Simoni, mukororo waJohani, unondida here?” Petro wakarwadziwa mwoyo ngokuti wakati kwaari ngokwechitatu, “Unondida here?” Naye wakati kwaari, “Mambo, iwewe unozia zveshe; unozia kuti ndinokuda.” Jesu wakati kwaari, “Usha makwai angu." 
John21:18 Ngegwinyiso ndinoti kwouri, apo uchiri mutsva, waidzisimidza, wechihamba kuenda powaida. Asi apo waa musharuka, unozotambanudza nyara dzako, noumweni unozokusimidza nokukuendesa pousikadi.”" 
John21:19 (Wakaereketa izvi echionisa kuti injira yakaitawani yaizofa ndiyo kuti airikidze Mwari.) Apo aereketa izvi, wakati kwaari, “Nditeere.”" 
John21:20 Ndizvo Petro echikunukukira sure, wakaona mudzidzi uwo waaida Jesu echimuteera, aye waiya akatseama paditi rake pakudya kwemadeekoni, uwozve wakati, “Mambo, ndiani unozokupira?”" 
John21:21 Naapo Petro echimuona wakati kunaJesu, “Mambo, uyukee, unozoitenyi?”" 
John21:22 Jesu wakati kwaari, “Kudai ndechida kuti agare metsa ndiuye, unenyi nazvo iwewe? Nditeere iwewe!”" 
John21:23 Ndizvo iri izwi rakapararira pakati pevakoma rokuti uyu mudzidzi aazofi. Asi Jesu aazi kuronza kwaari kuti aazofi, asi kuti, “Kudai ndechida kuti agare metsa ndiuye, unenyi nazvo iwewe?”" 
John21:24 Uyu ndiye mudzidzi uwo unopupura ngeizvi zviro, nowakanyora izvi zviro, nesu tinozia kuti chapupu chake ngechegwinyiso." 
John21:25 Asi zviripo zvimweni zvizhinji zvaakaita Jesu; kudai zvakanyorwa chimwe ngachimwe chazvo, ndinoti pamweni nenyika yemene aingaeneri tsamba dzinganyorwa." 
Acts1:1 Mudikani Thofireusi, ndakanyora mubhuku rokutanga zveshe zvaakatanga kuita Jesu nokudzidzisa," 
Acts1:2 metsa kuguma pazuva iro raakaashirwa mudenga, apedza kupanga kubudikidza ndiMweya Wakachena vapostori avo vaaiya akatsanangura." 
Acts1:3 Kwavari wakadzionisa ari unopona ngesure kwokutambudzika kwake ngenjira dzinoonisa gwinyiso dzakawanda, echioneka kwavari kazhinji pakati pemazuva makumi marongomuna, echiereketa ngendaa youmambo hwaMwari." 
Acts1:4 Echigara pamwepo navo wakavapanga kuti vasazobva muJerusarema, asi kuti vagarire chigondiso chaBaba, “Icho chemwakazwa kubva kwendiri;" 
Acts1:5 ngokuti Johani wakabhabhatidza ngemvura, asi imwimwi munozobhabhatidzwa ndiMweya Wakachena ngesure kwemazuva mashomani.”" 
Acts1:6 Ndizvo, apo vaiya vaungana, vakamubvunza vechiti, “Mambo, ngouyu mukuwo unozohwirinza umambo kunaIsuraeri here?”" 
Acts1:7 Wakati kwavari, “Andizvopi zvenyu kuti muzie mikuwo nokuti nguva, izvo zvaakangwarira Baba pashi pesimba rake emene." 
Acts1:8 Asi munozoashira simba apo Mweya Wakachena auya padera penyu; nemwi munozoita zvapupu zvangu muJerusarema, muJudhia mweshe, muSamaria nokumagumo enyika.”" 
Acts1:9 Naapo aiya aronza izvi, vacharingira, iye wakamirudzwa kuenda mudenga, negore rakamuashira kumufisha kubva mukuona kwavo." 
Acts1:10 Kwakati vacharingisisa mudenga echikwira, penya, vanhu vairi vakaema pasinde pavo, vane zvokupfeka zvakachena." 
Acts1:11 Vakati, “Vamuna veGarire, munoema ngenyi mwechiringira mudenga? Uyu Jesu watorwa kubva kwomuri kuenda mudenga, unozouyazve kudai ngezvemwamuona echienda mudenga.”" 
Acts1:12 Zvino vakapetuka Jerusarema, kubva paMutunhu wemaOrivhi, uri pasinde peJerusarema, muhambo wezuva reSabatha;" 
Acts1:13 naapo vaiya vapoteramwo, vakakwira mukamera romuturikwa, umwo mwevaigara, Petro, Johani, Jakobe naAndreu, Firipu, Thomasi Bhathoromeu, Mateu, Jakobe, mukororo waArifeusi, Simoni muZeroti naJudhasi, mukororo waJakobe." 
Acts1:14 Ava veshe vakaangirira kukumbira ngechisungo chimwe, pamwepo nemadzimai, naMaria mai aJesu, nevanun'una vake." 
Acts1:15 Mumazuva awo Petro wakaema pakati pevatendi, (uwandu hwevanhu vaiyapo hwaiya hwechida kuguma zana nemakumi mairi,) akati," 
Acts1:16 “Hama, kunodikanwa kuti chinyorwa chizadzisike, icho chakaereketwa karetu ndiMweya Wakachena kubudikidza ngomuromo waDhavhidha ngendaa yaJudhasi uwo wakaita mutungamiriri weavo vakabata Jesu." 
Acts1:17 Ngokuti iye wakaerengwa pamwepo nesu, akaashira chikoaniswa chake chouyu mushando.”" 
Acts1:18 (Zvino munhu uyu wakatenga munda ngomutuso wokusikarurama kwake; naye echiwa ngetsukupinya wakaputika ndani, nematumbu ake eshe akabuda." 
Acts1:19 Zvakaziikanwa ngevagari veshe veJerusarema, ndizvo munda uwo wakadudzwa ngorurumi rwavo kuti, “Akeredhama,” ukwo kunoti, “Munda weNgazi.”)" 
Acts1:20 “Ngokuti kwakanyorwa mubhuku reNdwiyo kuti, ‘Ugaro hwake ngahuite shango, munhu asagara mukati mwahwo;’ ‘Mushando wake ngautorwe ngoumweni.’" 
Acts1:21 “Ndizvo umwe wevanhu vakahamba nesu ngomukuwo weshe waakapotera nokubuda Mambo Jesu pakati pedu," 
Acts1:22 kubvira parubhabhatidzo rwaJohani metsa kuguma pazuva raakatorwa mudenga kubva kwetiri, umwe wavo unosisira kuita chapupu nesu chokumuka kwake kubva kwevakafa.”" 
Acts1:23 Ndizvo vakaemesa vairi, Josefa waizwi Bharsabhasi, uwo mutupo wake waizwi Justusi, naMathiasi." 
Acts1:24 Vakakumbira vakati, “Iwewe, Mambo, unozia mwoyo yevanhu veshe, wonisa pakati peava vairi uwo wewakatsanangura," 
Acts1:25 kuti atore rupande rwouyu mushando noupostori, hwaakapauka Judhasi kubva kwouri, kuti aende kuugaro hwake.”" 
Acts1:26 Navo vakavaitira mabhigidha; nemabhigidha akabata Mathiasi; naye wakaerengwa pamwepo nevapostori vari gumi naumwe. 
Acts2:1 Naapo raguma zuva rePentekosti vaiya vakaungana pamwepo veshe pandau imweyo. 
Acts2:2 Paripo rakaguma kubva mudenga bope rakadai ngokuvhuvhuta kwedutu rine simba, naro rakazadza mhatso yeshe apo pevaigara." 
Acts2:3 Kwakaoneka kwavari ndimi, dzakadai ngemirazvu yomuriro, dzakadziparadzanisa pakati pavo, dzikagara padera pavo veshe." 
Acts2:4 Navo veshe vakazadzwa ndiMweya Wakachena, vakatanga kuereketa ngendimi dzimweni, kudai ngezvaakapa Mweya kwavari kuti vaerekete." 
Acts2:5 Zvino muJerusarema mwaigara vaJudha, vanhu vanodira, vakabva kumadzinza eshe ari pashi pomudenga." 
Acts2:6 Naapo iri bope razwika, mbungano yakaungana pamwepo, navo vakashamiswa ngokuti munhu umwe ngaumwe waivazwa vechiereketa ngendimi yake." 
Acts2:7 Navo vakashamiswa nokukangaidzwa vechiti, “Ringirai, avo veshe vanoereketa avasiri vaGarire here?" 
Acts2:8 Nesu teshe tinoita mazwirenyi munhu umwe ngaumwe ngendimi yake yaakabarwa nayo? 
Acts2:9 VaPartia, vaMedhe, vaEramu nevagari veMesopotamia, Judhia neKhapadhosia, Pontusi neAsia," 
Acts2:10 Frigia nePamufiria, Egipite nemarupande eRibhia anotendenedza Kurene, nevaeni vanobva Roma," 
Acts2:11 veshe vaJudha nevemadzinza vanotenda chiJudha, vaKrete nevaArabhia, tinovazwa vechiereketa ngendimi dzedu ngoukuru hwemishando inesimba yaMwari.”" 
Acts2:12 Veshe vakashamiswa nokukangaidzwa, vechiti umwe kunoumweni, “Zvinoronzenyi izvi?”" 
Acts2:13 Asi vamweni vechiita jee vakati, “Vadhakwa ngevhini idzva.”" 
Acts2:14 Asi Petro, echiema pamwepo nevane gumi naumwe, wakadaidzira ngeizwi rake, echichumaira kwavari echiti, “Vanhu veJudhia nemwi mweshe munogara muJerusarema, izvi ngazviziikanwe kwomuri, mupurutane mazwi angu." 
Acts2:15 Ngokuti ava avazi kudhakwa, kudai ngezvomunopinimidza; ngokuti richiri awa rechitatu rezuva;" 
Acts2:16 asi izvi ndizvo zvakaereketwa ngomuprofeti Joeri echiti," 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Mwari unoti, Mumazuva okupedzisira kunozoitika kuti ndinozodurura Mweya wangu padera pevanhu veshe, nevakororo venyu nevasikana venyu vanozoprofeta, nemajaha enyu anozoona zvioniso, neharahwa dzenyu dzinozorota hope." 
Acts2:18 Kunyazwi nepadera pevaranda vangu vevamuna nepadera pevarandakadzi vangu ndinozodurura ngaao mazuva Mweya wangu; navo vanozoprofeta. 
Acts2:19 Neni ndinozoonisa zvishamiso mugore nezvioniso munyika, ngazi nomuriro nokupwititika kwechiushi." 
Acts2:20 Zuva rinozotsandurwa kuita chidima nomwedzi kuita ngazi, risati raguma zuva guru nerine mbiri raMambo." 
Acts2:21 Kunozoitika kuti kunyazwi ndiani unozodaidza ngezina raMambo unozoponeswa.’ 
Acts2:22 “Imwimwi vamuna vaIsuraeri, izwai mazwi aya. Jesu weNazaretha, munhu wakaoniswa kwomuri ndiMwari ngemishando ine simba nemishamiso nezvioniso, zvaakaita Mwari kubudikidza ndiye pakati penyu, kudai ngezvomunozia mwemene;" 
Acts2:23 uyu Jesu wakapirwa kudai ngokuemeswa kwebangano nokuzia zviri mberi kwaMwari, imwimwi ngenyara dzevanhu vakashata mwakamukohomera nokumuuraya." 
Acts2:24 Asi Mwari wakamumusa, amusunhura pakurwadziwa kworufu, ngokuti azvisaizoitika kuti asungwe ndirwo." 
Acts2:25 Ngokuti Dhavhidha wakaereketa ndiye kuti, ‘Ndakaona Mambo nguva dzeshe andori pamberi pangu; ngokuti iye uri ngokumudyo kwangu kuti ndisazokutukuswa;" 
Acts2:26 ndizvo mwoyo wangu wakadakara, norurumi rwangu rwakadakadzwa; kunyazwi nenyama yangu inozogara mukugonda." 
Acts2:27 Ngokuti iwewe auzorekeri mweya wangu muHaidhesi, zve, auzotenderi Wakachena wako kuti aore." 
Acts2:28 Iwewe wakandiziisa njira dzokupona, unozondizadzisa ngokudakara ngokuapo kwako.’" 
Acts2:29 “Hama, ndingaereketa ngokurerukirwa ngendaa yababamukuru Dhavhidha, kuti iye wakafa, akaikwa, neiba rake riri pakati pedu metsa nyamashi." 
Acts2:30 Ndizvo ari muprofeti, echizia kuti Mwari wakapika kwaari ngemhiko kuti unozoemesa umwe wemibarirwana wechiunu chake ngokwenyama kuti agare pachigaro chake choumambo," 
Acts2:31 echiona zvaiya pamberi, wakaereketa ngokumuka kwaKristu kubva kwevakafa, kuti aazi kurekerwa ari muHaidhesi, nokuti nyama yake aizi kuora." 
Acts2:32 Mwari wakamusa uyu Jesu kubva kwevakafa, nesu teshe tiri zvapupu zvakwo." 
Acts2:33 Ndizvo amirudzwa kumudyo waMwari, aashira chigondiso choMweya Wakachena kubva kunaBaba, wakadurura izvi zvomunoona nezvomunozwa." 
Acts2:34 Ngokuti Dhavhidha aazi kukwira mudenga; asi unoti, ‘Mambo Mwari wakati kunaMambo wangu, gara ngokumudyo kwangu," 
Acts2:35 metsa ndaita magaa ako chitambarariro chetsoka dzako.’ 
Acts2:36 “Ndizvo vemhatso yeshe yaIsuraeri ngavazie yaamho kuti Mwari wakamuita Mambo naKristu, Jesu uyu wemwakakohomera.”" 
Acts2:37 Naapo vazwa izvi, vakabaiwa mumwoyo, navo vakati kunaPetro nokunevapostori vamweni, “Hama, tinozoitenyi?”" 
Acts2:38 NaPetro wakati kwavari, “Tenderukai, mubhabhatidzwe mweshe umwe ngaumwe wenyu ngezina raJesu Kristu, kuti murekererwe zvishaishi zvenyu, nemwi munozoashira chipo choMweya Wakachena." 
Acts2:39 Ngokuti chigondiso chakagondiswa kwomuri nokuvana venyu nokwavari veshe vari kuretu, veshe avo vaanozodaidza Mambo Mwari wedu.”" 
Acts2:40 Wakapupura ngemazwi amweni akawanda nokuvapanga echiti, “Dziponesei pachenyu kubva kunouyu mubarirwana wakashongoroka.”" 
Acts2:41 Ndizvo avo vakaashira mazwi ake ngokudakara vakabhabhatidzwa, ngezuva rimwero kwakatutsirwa kwavari vanhu vanoda kukwana makumi matatu emazana." 
Acts2:42 Navo vakaangira kungwarira zvidzidziso zvevapostori nokuiyana, mukugura chingwa nomukukumbira." 
Acts2:43 Munhu weshe wakagumirwa ngokutya; nemishamiso yakawanda nezvioniso zvakaitwa kubudikidza ngevapostori. 
Acts2:44 Navo veshe vakatenda vaigara pamwepo, nezviro zvavo vakakowerana pakati pavo pamwepo;" 
Acts2:45 navo vaitengesa upfumi hwavo nenhumbi dzavo, vaizvikoanisira kwavari veshe kudai ngokutama kwomunhu." 
Acts2:46 Zuva ngezuva vakagara pamwepo ngechisungo chimwe muTemperi, vechigura chingwa mumizi yavo, vakadya ngokudakara nomwoyo wokuzwanana," 
Acts2:47 vechikudza Mwari, vechidikanwa ngevanhu veshe. NaMambo waitutsira kwavari zuva ngezuva avo vaiponeswa." 
Acts3:1 Zuva rimweni Petro naJohani vaikwira kuTemperi ngeawa rokukumbira, awa rechipfumbamwe." 
Acts3:2 Nomunhu waiya chirema kubvira mundani yamai ake waitwarwa, uwo wevaiisa zuva ngezuva pamusiwo weTemperi, unozwi Musiwo Wakanaka, kuti apemhe kunevaipotera muTemperi." 
Acts3:3 Naapo aona Petro naJohani vooda kupotera muTemperi wakapemha. 
Acts3:4 Petro echimuringisisa, naJohani, wakati, “Ringira kwetiri.”" 
Acts3:5 Naye wakavaringira, echikarira kuti unozopuwa chiro ndivo." 
Acts3:6 Asi Petro wakati, “Andina sirivha nomukore; asi ndinokupa icho chendinacho. Ngezina raJesu Kristu weNazaretha, miruka uhambe.”" 
Acts3:7 Naye wakamubata ngenyara yokumudyo, akamumirudza; paripo tsoka dzake nemadziso etsoka dzake zvakagwinyiswa." 
Acts3:8 Naye echinyanduka wakaema, akatanga kuhamba, akapotera navo muTemperi, echihamba nokunyanduka, echikudza Mwari." 
Acts3:9 Vanhu veshe vakamuona echihamba, echikudza Mwari," 
Acts3:10 navo vakazia kuti ndiye uwo waigara echipemha zvipo pamusiwo weTemperi unozwi Musiwo Wakanaka. Vakashamiswa nokukangaidzwa ngeizvo zvaiya zvaitika kwaari. 
Acts3:11 Naapo achabata Petro naJohani, vanhu veshe vakarumba kuungana kwavari vari muBerere raSoromoni, vechishamiswa kakurutu." 
Acts3:12 Naapo Petro azviona, wakaereketa kunavanhu, “Imwimwi vanhu vaIsuraeri, munoshamiswa ngenyi ngeizvi? Nokuti munotiringisisa ngenyi ingatei isimba redu nokuti unaku hwedu zvaita kuti ahambe?" 
Acts3:13 Mwari waAbrahama, waIsaka, waJakobe nowemadzibaba edu, wakakudza muranda wake Jesu, uwo wemwakapira imwimwi, mukamuramba pamberi pehope yaPiratu, apo paaiya ada kumusunhura." 
Acts3:14 Asi imwimwi mwakaramba uwo Wakachena neWakarurama, mukakumbira kuti muurayi apuwe kwomuri." 
Acts3:15 Mwakauraya Muambi wokupona; uwo waakamusa Mwari kubva kwevakafa. Isusu tiri zvapupu kuneizvi. 
Acts3:16 Ngokugonda zina rake, zina rake remene raita kuti agwinye, uyu munhu womunoona nowomunozia; kubudikidza ngokugonda munaJesu kwaita kuti agwinye kudai pamberi penyu mweshe." 
Acts3:17 “Nazvino hama, ndinozia kuti mwakazviita ngokusikazia, kudai ngezvevakaitawo vatongi venyu." 
Acts3:18 Asi izvo zvaakaronza Mwari ngepamberi ngomuromo wevaprofeti veshe, kuti Kristu wake unozotambudzika, iye wakazvizadzisa kudaro." 
Acts3:19 Ndizvo tenderukai mukunukukire kunaMwari kuti zvishaishi zvenyu zvitsukutidzwe," 
Acts3:20 kuti nguva dzokugwinyiswa mumweya dziuye dzinobva pamberi paMambo, zve, kuti atume Kristu Jesu uwo wakaemeserwa imwimwi." 
Acts3:21 Uwo unosisira kuti aashirwe mudenga metsa nguva yaguma yokumusirirwa kwezviro zveshe, yaakaereketa ndiyo Mwari ngemiromo yevaprofeti vake vakacheneswa kubvira pakutanga." 
Acts3:22 Ngokuti Mosi wakati, ‘Mambo Mwari wenyu unozomumirudzira muprofeti unobva pakati pehama dzenyu, muprofeti wakadai ndini. Munosisira kuzopurutana kuzviro zveshe zvaanozoereketa kwomuri." 
Acts3:23 Kunozoitika kuti weshe usikazopurutani kunouwo muprofeti, unozoparadzwa kubva pakati pevanhu.’" 
Acts3:24 Eya, nevaprofeti veshe, kubvira kunaSamueri naavo veshe vakateera, vakaronza ngaaya mazuva." 
Acts3:25 Imwimwi muri mibarirwana yevaprofeti nevechitenderano chaakaita Mwari namadzibaba enyu, echiti kunaAbrahama, ‘Ngemibarirwana yako madzinza eshe omunyika anozofumiswa.’" 
Acts3:26 Mwari wakamirudza Muranda wake, akamutumira kwomuri kutanga kuti amufumise, ngokutenderudza umwe ngaumwe wenyu kubva mukushata kwenyu.”" 
Acts4:1 Apo Petro naJohani vachaereketa kunevanhu, vapristi nenduna yeTemperi nevaSadhusi vakauya kwavari," 
Acts4:2 vakatsamwa kakurutu ngokuti vaidzidzisa vanhu nokuchumaira kumuka kwevakafa munaJesu. 
Acts4:3 Navo vakavabata, vakavaisa mutirongo metsa zuva rechimangwani, ngokuti aiya aamadeekoni." 
Acts4:4 Asi vazhinji vakazwa izwi vakatenda; nouwandu hwevanhu hwaida kuguma makumi mashanu emazana. 
Acts4:5 Ngezuva rechimangwani, vatongi vavo, vakuru nevanyori, vakaungana muJerusarema," 
Acts4:6 naAnasi mupristi mukuru, Kaiafasi, Johani naArekizanda, naavo veshe vaiya vemhatso yomupristi mukuru." 
Acts4:7 Naapo vaiya vavaemesa pakati pavo, vakavabvunza kuti, “Imwimwi mwaita izvi zviro ngesimba nokuti ngezina raani?”" 
Acts4:8 Zvino Petro, azadzwa ndiMweya Wakachena, wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi vatongi vevanhu nevakuru," 
Acts4:9 kudai isusu techibvunziswa nyamashi ngendaa yomushando wakanaka wakaitwa kunomunhu wakaremara, kuti waponeswa ngenjira yakaitawani," 
Acts4:10 ngazviziikanwe kwomuri mweshe nokuvanhu veshe vaIsuraeri, kuti ngezina raJesu Kristu weNazaretha, uwo wemwakakohomera, uwo waakamusa Mwari kubva kwevakafa, kubudikidza ndiye, uyu munhu unoema pamberi penyu apona." 
Acts4:11 Uyu ndiye ‘Buwe rakarambwa ndimwi vaaki, uwo wakaita soro repakona.’" 
Acts4:12 Akunazve kuponeswa ngoumweni, ngokuti akuna zina rimweni pashi pomudenga rakapuwa kunavanhu kuti tiponeswe ndiro.”" 
Acts4:13 Zvino apo vaona kushinga kwaPetro naJohani, vaona kuti vaiya vanhu vasikazi kudzidza, vanhutu vasina chevanozia, vakashama; navo vakazia kuti vaiya naJesu." 
Acts4:14 Vechiona munhu wakaponeswa echiema navo, avazi kukona kuramba chiro." 
Acts4:15 Asi apo vaiya vavapanga kuti vabve pakati pevatongi, vakapangana pakati pavo" 
Acts4:16 vechiti, “Tinozoitenyi ngevanhu ava? Ngokuti zvakaoneka pamhene ngevanhu veshe vanogara muJerusarema kuti ngegwinyiso mushamiso unembiri wakaitwa kubudikidza ndivo; nesu atikoni kuramba." 
Acts4:17 Asi kuti zvisachazopararira pakati pevanhu, ngativakohomedzise kuti vasachazoereketazve kunevanhu kunyazwi ngouri ngezina iri.”" 
Acts4:18 Naapo vakavadaidza, vakavapangisisa kuti vasachazoereketa nokuti kudzidzisa ngezina raJesu." 
Acts4:19 Asi Petro naJohani vechipingura vakati kwavari, “Kuti kwakanaka mukuona kwaMwari kupurutana kwomuri kunokupurutana kunaMwari, gurai imwimwi;" 
Acts4:20 ngokuti isusu atikoni kurekera kuereketa ngeizvo zviro zvetakaona nezvetakazwa.” 
Acts4:21 Ndizvo apo vaiya vavakohomedzisazve, vakavarekera kuti vaende, vasikaoni ndaa yokuti vavaorore ndiyo, ngendaa yevanhu, ngokuti vanhu veshe vaikudza Mwari ngeizvo zvakaitwa." 
Acts4:22 Ngokuti munhu uwo waiya nemakore anopinda makumi marongomuna okubarwa kwake, uwo chioniso ichi chokuponeswa chakaitwa kwaari." 
Acts4:23 Naapo varekerwa kuti vaende, vakauya kunevanhu vavo, vakavaronzera zveshe izvo zvakaronzwa kwavari ngevapristi vakuru nevakuru." 
Acts4:24 Naapo vazvizwa, vakadaidzira kunaMwari ngechisungo chimwe, vakati, “A Mambo, iwewe ndiwe wakasika denga nenyika noruandhle nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwazvo;" 
Acts4:25 iwewe wakaereketa ndiMweya Wakachena kubudikidza ngomuromo womuranda wako, baba edu Dhavhidha kuti, “ ‘Ngenyi madzinza akaita ushungu nevanhu vakapinimidza zvisina shwiro?" 
Acts4:26 Madzimambo enyika akadzinasirira pachavo nevatongi vakaungana pamwepo kumukira Mambo Mwari naKristu wake.’ 
Acts4:27 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso vakaungana mudhorobha iri kumukira Muranda wako wakachena Jesu, uwo wemwakadzodza, veshe Herodhi naPhontiusi Piratu, nemadzinza nevanhu veshe vaIsuraeri," 
Acts4:28 kuita zveshe izvo zvakaemeswa ngepamberi ngenyara yako nangokupanga kwako kuti zviitike. 
Acts4:29 Zvino, Mambo Mwari, ringira kukohomedzisa kwavo, upe kuvaranda vako kuti vaerekete izwi rako ngokushinga kweshe." 
Acts4:30 Naapo mwechitambanudza nyara yenyu kuponesa, zvioniso nemishamiso zvinoitwa kubudikidza ngezina roMuranda wenyu wakachena Jesu.”" 
Acts4:31 Naapo vaiya vakumbira, ndau yakazungunyiswa apo pevaiya vakaungana; navo veshe vakazadzwa ndiMweya Wakachena, vakaereketa izwi raMwari ngokushinga." 
Acts4:32 Zvino mbungano yeshe yeavo vakatenda vaiya nomwoyo umwe nomweya umwe, akuna naumwe wavo waironza kuti zviro zvaaiya nazvo zvaiya zvake; asi zveshe zvaiya zvavo veshe." 
Acts4:33 Ngesimba guru vapostori vakaita chapupu chokumuka kwaMambo Jesu kubva kwevakafa; nenyasha huru dzaiya padera pavo veshe. 
Acts4:34 Ngokuti paiya pasina naumwe pakati pavo waitama, ngokuti vazhinji vaiya neminda nokuti mhatso vakazvitengesa, vakaunza mitengo yeizvo zvakatengeswa," 
Acts4:35 vakaiisa patsoka dzevapostori; nazvo zvakakoanisirwa kunaumwe ngaumwe kudai ngokutama kwomunhu. 
Acts4:36 NaJosefa, uwo wakadudzwa ngevapostori kuti, Bhanabhasi, (zvinoronza kuti, “Mukororo wokuembedzera,”) muRevhi, munhu weSaipurasi," 
Acts4:37 wakatengesa munda, naye wakaunza mare, akaiisa patsoka dzevapostori." 
Acts5:1 Asi munhu waizwi Ananiasi, nomukadzi wake Safira, wakatengesa nhaka." 
Acts5:2 Wakasara norupande rwomutengo, nomukadzi wake echizia naye, aunza rupande rwomutengo, wakaruisa patsoka dzevapostori." 
Acts5:3 Asi Petro wakati, “Ananiasi, Sathani wazadza ngenyi mwoyo wako kuti unyepe kunoMweya Wakachena nokusara norupande rwomutengo womunda." 
Acts5:4 Ngenguva uchipo waiya usiri wako here? Nangesure kwokutengeswa kwawo, ausaiya uri pashi pesimba rako here? Wakapinimidza ngenyi izvi mumwoyo mwako? Auzi kunyepera vanhu, asi Mwari.”" 
Acts5:5 Naapo Ananiasi echizwa aya mazwi, wakawa pashi, akafa. Nokutya kwakakura kwakagumira avo veshe vakazvizwa." 
Acts5:6 Majaha akamiruka, akamuputira, akamutwara kuenda kubanze koomuika." 
Acts5:7 Ngesure kwomukuwo unoda kuita maawa matatu, mukadzi wake, asikazii izvi zvakaitika, wakapoteramwo." 
Acts5:8 Petro wakati kwaari, “Ndironzere kuti mwakatengesa munda here ngemare yakadai?” Naye wakati, “Eya, ngemare yakadaro.”" 
Acts5:9 Asi Petro wakati kwaari, “Mwakatenderana ngenyi kuedza Mweya waMambo? Wona, tsoka dzaavo vaika mwamuna wako dziri pamusiwo, navo vanozokutwara kuenda kubanze.”" 
Acts5:10 Paripo wakawa pashi patsoka dzake, akafa. Naapo majaha apotera akamuona afa, akamutwara kumubudisa kubanze, akamuika paiya nomwamuna wake." 
Acts5:11 Nokutya kwakakura kwakagumira veshe vechiara nepadera peavo veshe vakazwa izvi.
