Acts5:12 Zvino zvioniso nezvishamiso zvakawanda zvaiitwa ngenyara dzevapostori pakati pevanhu. Navo vaiyapo veshe ngechisungo chimwe muBerere raSoromoni. 
Acts5:13 Asi akuna naumwe wechikwata chimweni waishinga kuti apindire mukati mwavo, asi vanhu vakavaremeredza." 
Acts5:14 Nevatendi vakapinda kututsirwa kunaMambo, vazhinji vamuna nevakadzi," 
Acts5:15 ndizvo vakabudisa mumapato avo vairwara, vakavaradzika pamanhi nepamisengere, kuti apo Petro echipindapo, bvute rake ritibikire vamweni vavo." 
Acts5:16 Vakaunganawo vanhu vazhinji vechibva kumadhorobha aitendenedza Jerusarema, vechiunza vairwara ngomweya ine tsvina, navo veshe vakaponeswa." 
Acts5:17 Asi kwakamiruka mupristi mukuru, naavo veshe vaiya naye, venhengo yechikwata chevaSadhusi, navo vakazara ngendurumwa," 
Acts5:18 vakabata vapostori, vakavaisa mutirongo risina shwiro." 
Acts5:19 Asi usiku ngirosi yaMambo yakabeura misiwo yetirongo, ikavabudisa kubanze, nayo yakati," 
Acts5:20 “Endai, mueme muTemperi mwechironzera vanhu mazwi eshe okupona uku.”" 
Acts5:21 Naapo vazwa izvi, vakapotera muTemperi mangwanani maishi, vakadzidzisa. Naapo mupristi mukuru wakauya naavo vaiya naye, akadaidza pamwepo vatongi veshe nevakuru veshe vevanhu vaIsuraeri, vakatumira izwi kutirongo kuti vavaunze." 
Acts5:22 Asi apo vangwariri veTemperi vakatumwa vagumapo, avazi kuvaona mutirongo, navo vakapetuka vakavaronzera" 
Acts5:23 vechiti, “Mhatso yetirongo taiona yakakonywa zvakanaka, nevangwariri vakaema pamisiwo; asi apo tabeura atizi kuona munhu mukati.”" 
Acts5:24 Zvino apo nduna yeTemperi nevapristi vakuru vazwa mazwi aya, vakakangaidzwa kakurutu ndivo, kuti izvi zvingazoita mapererenyi." 
Acts5:25 Naapo pakauya munhu umweni akavaronzera echiti, “Wonai, vanhu vemwakakonyera mutirongo vanoema muTemperi vechidzidzisa vanhu.”" 
Acts5:26 Naapo nduna pamwepo nevangwariri veTemperi vakaenda, vakavaunza, asi avazi kuita zvokuvaangiridza, ngokuti vaitya kupondwa ngemapuwe ngevanhu." 
Acts5:27 Naapo vaiya vavaunza, vakavaisa pamberi pevatongi. Nomupristi mukuru wakavabvunza" 
Acts5:28 echiti, “Takamupangirisisa kuti musazodzidzisa ngeiri zina, zvino wonai, mwazadza Jerusarema ngorudzidziso rwenyu, nemwi munoda kuunza padera pedu ngazi yomunhu uyu.”" 
Acts5:29 Asi Petro nevapostori vakapingura, vakati, “Tinosisira kuti tipurutane Mwari, haiwa kupurutana vanhu." 
Acts5:30 Mwari wemadzibaba edu wakamusa Jesu uwo wemwakauraya ngokumuturika pamuti. 
Acts5:31 Iye Mwari wakamumirudza ngokumudyo kwake kuti aite Mutungamiriri noMuponesi, kuti ape kutenderuka kuvaIsuraeri nokukungurirwa zvishaishi." 
Acts5:32 Nesu tiri zvapupu zvaaya mazwi, noMweya Wakachena, uwo waakapa Mwari kwavari vanomupurutana.”" 
Acts5:33 Naapo vazwa izvi, vakazadzwa ngoushungu, vakada kuvauraya." 
Acts5:34 Asi umwe wevaFarisi wakamiruka kubva pakati pevatongi, zina rake ndiGamarieri, mudzidzisi weMipango, uwo wairemeredzwa ngevanhu veshe, naye wakapanga kuti avo vanhu vambobudiswa kubanze kwomukuwo mudoko." 
Acts5:35 Wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi vamuna vaIsuraeri, dzingwarirenyi ngeizvo zvomunoda kuita ngeava vanhu." 
Acts5:36 Ngokuti ngemazuva ekaretu Theudhasi wakamiruka, echiti iye waiya mukuru. Vanhu vaida kuita mazana marongomuna vakamuteera; asi wakaurawa, naavo veshe vakamuteera vakaparadzwa, vakapera." 
Acts5:37 Ngesure kwake Judhasi muGarire wakamiruka ngemazuva okunyorwa mazina, wakakweya vanhu vamweni kuti vamuteere; iye naye wakafa, naavo veshe vakapaukiswa ndiye vakapararira veshe." 
Acts5:38 Ndizvo zvino ndinoti kwomuri, taraukai kubva kuneava vanhu, muvarekere vari vega; ngokuti kudai iri zano nouyu mushando zviri zvevanhu, zvinozoparadzwa." 
Acts5:39 Asi kuti zviri zvaMwari, amuna simba rokuvanyisa. Ngokuti pamweni mungadai mwechirwisana naMwari!” Navo veshe vakatenderana naye," 
Acts5:40 naapo vadaidza vapostori kwavari, vakavashwapura, vakapangirisisa kuti vasazoereketa ngezina raJesu, vakavarekera." 
Acts5:41 Ndizvo vakabva pamberi pevatongi, vechidakara ngokuti vakaerengwa kuita vanosisira kuitirwa zvinotsverudza ngendaa yezina rake." 
Acts5:42 Mazuva eshe muTemperi nomumakanyi avazi kurekera kudzidzisa nokuchumaira ndiJesu kuti ndiye Kristu. 
Acts6:1 Zvino mumazuva aya, apo vadzidzi vaiangira kuwanzwa, vaJudha vaiereketa chiGiriki vakavhuruvhutira vaHebheru, ngendaa yokuti shirikadzi dzavo dzairekeredzwa mukukoanisirwa kwezuva ngezuva." 
Acts6:2 Nevari gumi navairi vakadaidza kwavari chiunga chevadzidzi, vakati, “Akusisiri kuti isusu tisiye izwi raMwari, tishande pamatafura." 
Acts6:3 Ndizvo, hama dzangu, tsanangurai vamuna vanomwe kubva pakati penyu vanogondeka, vakazara ndiMweya nokungwara, vetingaemesa padera pouyu mushando." 
Acts6:4 Asi isusu tinozoangira mukukumbira nomumushando weizwi.” 
Acts6:5 Neizwi iro rakadakadza chiunga cheshe, navo vakatsanangura Stefano, munhu wakazara ngokugonda noMweya Wakachena, Firipu, Prokhorusi, Nikano, Thimona, Phamenasi naNikorusi weAntiokhi waiya akatenderukira kuchiJudha." 
Acts6:6 Vakavaisa pamberi pevapostori, naapo vaiya vakumbira, vakaisa nyara dzavo padera pavo." 
Acts6:7 Neizwi raMwari rakaangira kupararira; chiunga chevadzidzi chakaangira kukura kakurutu muJerusarema; nevapristi vazhinji vakapurutana mukutenda. 
Acts6:8 Stefano azara ngenyasha nesimba, waiita mishamiso nezvioniso zvikuru pakati pevanhu." 
Acts6:9 Zvino vamweni veavo vemhatso yokudira vanozwi Vanhu Vakasununguka, nevaKurene, nevaArekizanda, neavo vanobva Sirisia, nevaAsia, vakamiruka vechiita hasha naStefano." 
Acts6:10 Navo avazi kukona kuemesedzana noungwaru noMweya zvaakaereketa ndizvo. 
Acts6:11 Naapo ngokufishika vakanyengerera vanhu kuti vati, “Takamuzwa echiereketa mazwi okutuka Mosi naMwari.”" 
Acts6:12 Navo vakavherudza vanhu nevakuru nevanyori, vakamutsotokera, vakamubata, vakamuunza kune vatongi." 
Acts6:13 Vakaemesa zvapupu zvokunyepa, izvo zvakati, “Munhu uyu aatongorekeri kuereketa mazwi okutuka iyi ndau yakachena neMipango;" 
Acts6:14 ngokuti takamuzwa echironza kuti, uyu Jesu weNazaretha unozoparadza ndau iyi, nokupinduridza mitoo yaakapa kwetiri Mosi.”" 
Acts6:15 Naavo veshe vaiya vakagara pavatongi, vechimuringisisa, vakaona hope yake yakadai ngehope yengirosi." 
Acts7:1 Zvino mupristi mukuru wakati, “Izvi zvine gwinyiso here?”" 
Acts7:2 Naye wakati, “Hama nemadzibaba, purutanai kwendiri. Mwari wouthende wakaoneka kunababa edu Abrahama, apo pevaigara muMesopotamia, vasati vagara muHarani," 
Acts7:3 wakati kwaari, ‘Buda munyika yako nokubva kuhama dzako, uende munyika yendinozokupangidzira.’" 
Acts7:4 Naapo wakabuda kubva munyika yevaKharadhea, akagara muHarani. Ngesure kwokufa kwababa ake, Mwari wakamuthuthisa kubveyo kuti auye munyika iyi yomunogara zvinopano imwimwi;" 
Acts7:5 naye aazi kumupa nhaka mukati mwayo, haiwa kunyazwi nepanokwana kutsikwa ngetsoka, asi wakamugondisa kuti unozoipa kwaari kuti iite nhaka yake neyorudzi rwake runozouya sure kwake, apo paaiya asati abara mwana." 
Acts7:6 NaMwari wakaereketa ngenjira iyi kuti, ‘Mibarirwana yake inozoita vanhu vapara munyika yevamweni, avo vachavaita hloko dzavo, vechivabata ngenjira yakashata metsa kupera kwemakore mazana marongomuna." 
Acts7:7 Asi ndinozoritonga iro dzinza revanozoitwa ndiro hloko,’ wakaronza Mwari, ‘Nangesure kweizvo vanozobuda, vandidire mundau iyi.’" 
Acts7:8 Naapo wakamupa chitenderano chokuchekwa. Ndizvo Abrahama abara Isaka, wakamucheka ngezuva rechisere; naIsaka wakabara Jakobe naJakobe wakabara madzibaba mukuru gumi navairi." 
Acts7:9 “Nemadzibaba mukuru vakaita ndurumwa ndiJosefa, vakamutengesa Egipite; asi Mwari waiya naye," 
Acts7:10 naye wakamununurira kubva kumadambudziko ake eshe, wakamupa nyasha noungwaru pamberi paFaro, mambo weEgipite, uwo wakamuemesa kuti aite mutongi padera peEgipite nemhatso yake yeshe." 
Acts7:11 Zvino nzara yakauya padera penyika yeshe yeEgipite neyeKhenani, nokutambudzika kukurutu; nemadzibaba edu avazi kuona zvokudya." 
Acts7:12 Asi apo Jakobe azwa kuti yaiyamwo koroni muEgipite, wakatuma madzibaba edu panguva yokutanga." 
Acts7:13 Parwendo rwechipiri, Josefa wakaita pachake kuti aziikanwe kuvakoma vake, nehama dzaJosefa dzakaziikanwa kunaFaro." 
Acts7:14 NaJosefa wakavatuma koodaidza kuti vauye kwaari baba ake Jakobe nehama dzake dzeshe, vanhu makumi manomwe navashanu;" 
Acts7:15 ndizvo Jakobe wakadzaka kuenda Egipite. Naye wakafa, iye namadzibaba edu," 
Acts7:16 navo vakatwarwa kupetudzwa Shekemi, vakaikwa muiba raakatenga Abrahama ngesirivha kubva kuvakororo vaHamori muShekhemu." 
Acts7:17 “Naapo wakwedzera mukuwo wechigondiso, chaakapika Mwari kuna Abrahama, vanhu vakaangira kuwanda nokuita vazhinji muEgipite," 
Acts7:18 metsa ‘Kwagadzwa mambo umweni kutonga padera peEgipite, uwo waiya asikazii Josefa.’" 
Acts7:19 Wakabata dzinza redu ngourimbwi, wakaangiridza madzibaba edu kuti varashe vana vavo, kuti vasapona." 
Acts7:20 Panguva iyi Mosi wakabarwa, naye waiya akanaka kakurutu pamberi paMwari. Wakarerwa mwedzi mitatu mumhatso yababa ake;" 
Acts7:21 naapo aiswa pabanze, mwanasikana waFaro wakamutonha, akamurera kuti aite mwana wake." 
Acts7:22 NaMosi wakadzidziswa ungwaru hweshe hwevaEgipite, waiya akagwinya mumazwi ake nomumishando yake." 
Acts7:23 “Naapo aguma makore makumi marongomuna okubarwa, wakada mumwoyo mwake kuti ahambire hama dzake vana vaIsuraeri." 
Acts7:24 Naapo echiona umwe wavo echishaishirwa, wakarwira uwo waitsikirirwa, akauraya muEgipite." 
Acts7:25 Asi wakapinimidza kuti hama dzake dzaizwisisa kuti Mwari waida kuvaponesa kubudikidza ngenyara yake, asi avazi kuzwisisa." 
Acts7:26 Ngezuva raiteera, wakaguma kwavari vechiambana, naye wakaereketa kwavari kuti avaiyanise echiti, ‘Vamuna, muri hama; munoshaishirana ngenyi?’" 
Acts7:27 Asi iye waishaishira muakirwana wake wakamututumidza echiti, ‘Ndiani wakakuemesa kuita mambo nomutongi padera pedu?" 
Acts7:28 Iwewe unoda kundiuraya here kudai ngezvewakauraya muEgipite zuro?’ 
Acts7:29 Naapo Mosi azwa izwi iro wakatiza, akaita chigarandimo munyika yeMidhiani, apo paakabara vakororo vairi." 
Acts7:30 “Naapo makore makumi marongomuna apera, ngirosi yakaoneka kwaari ari mushango roMutunhu weSinai, iri mumirazvu yomuriro." 
Acts7:31 Naapo Mosi echiona, wakashamiswa ngechioniso; achakwedzera kuringira, izwi raMambo Mwari rakazwika rechiti," 
Acts7:32 ‘Inini ndini Mwari wemadzibaba ako, Mwari waAbrahama, waIsaka nowaJakobe.’ NaMosi wakahuta, akatya kuringira." 
Acts7:33 Mambo Mwari wakati kwaari, ‘Dusa magwada kubva patsoka dzako, ngokuti pandau pewakaema pamavhu akachena." 
Acts7:34 Ngegwinyiso ndakaona kutambudzwa kwevanhu vangu vari muEgipite, ndakazwa kugomera kwavo, ndadzaka kuti ndivanunure. Zvino uya, ndinozokutuma Egipite.’" 
Acts7:35 “Ndiye uyu Mosi wevakaramba vechiti, ‘Ndiani wakuita mambo nomutongi?’ Ndiye wakatumwa ndiMwari kuti aite mambo nomusunhuri kubudikidza ngengirosi yakaoneka kwaari mupfiba." 
Acts7:36 Uyu munhu wakavatungamirira kubuda, aita mishamiso nezvioniso munyika yeEgipite nomuRuandhle Rwakatsvuka nomushango kwemakore makumi marongomuna." 
Acts7:37 Uyu ndiye Mosi uwo wakati kuvana vaIsuraeri, ‘Mwari unozomumirudzira Muprofeti kubva muhama dzenyu, wakadai ndini.’" 
Acts7:38 Uyu ndiye waiya mumbungano mushango nengirosi yakaereketa kwaari paMutunhu weSinai, anemadzibaba edu; uwo wakaashira mazwi okupona kuti aape kwetiri." 
Acts7:39 Madzibaba edu akaramba kumupurutana, asi vakamututumidza parutii kubva kwavari, vakakunukudzira mwoyo yavo kuhwirira Egipite," 
Acts7:40 vechiti kunaAroni, ‘Tiitire zvimwari zvinozotitungamirira; ngokuti uyu Mosi wakatibudisa kubva kunyika yeEgipite, atizii chakaitika kwaari.’" 
Acts7:41 Navo vakaumba konyana ngaawo mazuva, vakaita mudiro kunouwo muedzaniso, vakadakara ngomushando wenyara dzavo." 
Acts7:42 Asi Mwari wakavafuratira, akavarekera kuti vadire hondo dzomudenga, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mubhuku revaprofeti kuti, “Mwakapira kwendiri here mhuka dzakaurawa nemidiro kwemakore makumi marongomuna muri mushango, imwimwi vemhatso yaIsuraeri?" 
Acts7:43 Nemwi mwakatora tende raMorekhi nenyeredzi yechimwari chenyu Refani, miedzaniso yemwakaita kuti muidire; neni ndinozomututisa kuenda mberi kweBhabhuroni." 
Acts7:44 “Madzibaba edu vaiya netende rechapupu mushango, kudai ngezvaakaemesa uwo wakaereketa kunaMosi, kuti ariite kudai ngechionero chaakaona." 
Acts7:45 Iro rakaashirwa ngemadzibaba edu vakapotera naro naJoshua, apo pevakapotera kugara nhaka yevemadzinza, aakadzinga Mwari kubva pamberi pehope dzemadzibaba edu. Naro rakaapo metsa kuguma kumazuva aDhavhidha," 
Acts7:46 uwo wakaona nyasha pamberi paMwari, akadisisa kuti atsvakire mhatso yaJakobe ugaro." 
Acts7:47 Asi ndiSoromoni wakazomuakira mhatso. 
Acts7:48 Asi Uripadera pazveshe aagari muugaro hwakaitwa ngenyara; kudai ngezvaakaereketa muprofeti echiti," 
Acts7:49 “Denga ndicho chigaro changu choumambo, nenyika ndicho chitambarariro chetsoka dzangu. Munozondiakira mhatso yakadini, unoronza Mambo Mwari, nokuti ngeiri ndau yokuzorora kwangu?" 
Acts7:50 Nyara yangu aizi kuita izvi zveshe here? 
Acts7:51 “Imwimwi mune mitsipa yakakukutara, nevano mwoyo nenzee zvisikazi kuchekwa, munondogara mwechirwisana noMweya Wakachena; kudai ngezvevakaita madzibaba enyu, ndizvo zvomunoitawo imwimwi." 
Acts7:52 Ngouri wevaprofeti usikazi kutambudzwa ngemadzibaba enyu? Navo vakauraya avo vakavaronzera ngepamberi ngokuuya kwoUmwe Wakarurama, zvinopano imwimwi mwakamupira nokumuuraya." 
Acts7:53 Imwimwi mwakaashira Mipango yakaunzwa ngengirosi, nemwi amuzi kuingwarira.”" 
Acts7:54 Naapo vechizwa izvi vakanyangadzwa navo vakamukwetsera mazino. 
Acts7:55 Asi iye azadzwa ngoMweya Wakachena, akaringira mudenga, akaona uthende hwaMwari naJesu akaema ngokumudyo kwaMwari." 
Acts7:56 Akati, “Ringira, ndinoona mudenga mwakabeurwa, noMukororo woMunhu akaema ngokumudyo kwaMwari.”" 
Acts7:57 Asi vakadaidzira ngeizwi guru, vakatsiira nzee dzavo, vakamutsotokera ngechisungo chimwe." 
Acts7:58 Navo vakamubudisa kubanze kwedhorobha, vakamuponda ngemapuwe. Nezvapupu zvakaisa zvokufuka zvavo patsoka dzejaha raizwi Sauri." 
Acts7:59 Navo vakaponda Stefano ngemapuwe; wakakumbira echiti, “Mambo Jesu, ashirai mweya wangu.”" 
Acts7:60 Naye wakagwadama pashi, akadaidzira ngeizwi guru echiti “Mambo, usavaitira ndaa ngouku kushaisha.” Naapo aereketa izvi, wakafa." 
Acts8:1 NaSauri waiya mubangano rokuurawa kwake. Kwakabuda ngeiro zuva kutambudzwa kukurutu kwechiara chaiya muJerusarema; navo veshe vakapararira munyika yeJudhia neSamaria, kwakasara vapostori vega." 
Acts8:2 Nevanhu vaidira vakaika Stefano, vakamuchema kakurutu." 
Acts8:3 Asi Sauri waiparadza chiara, echipotera mumhatso ngemhatso, nokubata ngesimba veshe vamuna nevakadzi nokuvakonyera mutirongo." 
Acts8:4 Ndizvo avo vakapararira vakahambira ndau dzeshe vechichumaira izwi. 
Acts8:5 Firipu wakadzaka kudhorobha reSamaria, wakachumaira kwavari ndiKristu." 
Acts8:6 Vanhu vazhinji vakapurutana ngechisungo chimwe kune izvo zvaironzwa ndiFiripu, apo vazwa, vaona zvioniso zvaakaita." 
Acts8:7 Ngokuti kwakabuda mweya yetsvina kubva muvazhinji vaiya nayo, yechidaidzira ngeizwi guru; nevazhinji vaiya vakaoma muiri nezvirema vakaponeswa." 
Acts8:8 Kwakaapo kudakara kukurutu mudhorobha iro. 
Acts8:9 Asi waiyapo munhu umweni, zina rake raizwi Simoni, waikamba mudhorobha iro, echishamisa dzinza revaSamaria, echironza kuti iye waiya mukuru." 
Acts8:10 Vakamupurutana veshe, kubvira kuvadoko metsa kuvakuru vechiti, “Uyu munhu isimba guru raMwari.”" 
Acts8:11 Navo vakamupurutana ngokuti kubvira mukuwo wakareba iye waiya avashamisa ngokukamba kwake. 
Acts8:12 Asi apo vakatenda Firipu waiya echichumaira mashoko akanaka ngendaa youmambo hwaMwari nezina raJesu Kristu, vakabhabhatidzwa, veshe vamuna nevakadzi." 
Acts8:13 Kunyazwi naye Simoni wakatenda. Abhabhatidzwa wakaangira kugara naFiripu; wakashamiswa kakurutu echiona zvioniso nemishamiso mikuru yechiitwa. 
Acts8:14 Naapo vapostori vaiya muJerusarema vazwa kuti vaSamaria vaiya vaashira izwi raMwari, vakatuma kwavari Petro naJohani." 
Acts8:15 Avo vairi vadzakayo, vakavakumbirira kuti vaashire Mweya Wakachena;" 
Acts8:16 ngokuti waiya usati wadzaka padera poumwe wavo, asi vaiya vakabhabhatidzwa ngezina raMambo Jesu." 
Acts8:17 Naapo vakaisa nyara dzavo padera pavo, vakaashira Mweya Wakachena." 
Acts8:18 Zvino apo Simoni aona kuti Mweya wakapuwa kubudikidza ngokuiswa kwenyara dzevapostori padera pavo, iye wakada kuvapa mare" 
Acts8:19 echiti, “Ndipeiwo iri simba kuti kunyazwi ndiani wendinozoisa nyara yangu padera pake, unozoashira Mweya Wakachena.”" 
Acts8:20 Asi Petro wakati kwaari, “Mare yako ngaipere pamwepo newe, ngokuti wapinimidza kuti chipuwo chaMwari chingatengwa ngemare!" 
Acts8:21 Iwewe auna rupande nokuti chikoaniswa kuiyi ndaa, ngokuti mwoyo wako auzi kururama pamberi paMwari." 
Acts8:22 Ndizvo tenderuka ubve mukushaisha kwako uku, ukumbire kunaMambo, kuti pamweni kungarekererwa kwouri kupinimidza kwomwoyo wako." 
Acts8:23 Ngokuti ndinoona kuti uri muchanduru chinovava nomukusungwa ngemaketani okushaisha.” 
Acts8:24 NaSimoni wakapingura, akati, “Ndikumbirirei kunaMambo kuti ndisazogumirwa ngechimwe cheizvo zvemwaereketa.”" 
Acts8:25 Ndizvo apo vaiya vaita chapupu nokuereketa izwi raMambo, vakapetuka Jerusarema, vechichumaira vhangeri mumizi mizhinji yevaSamaria." 
Acts8:26 Asi ngirosi yaMambo yakaereketa kunaFiripu yechiti, “Miruka, uende kubani ngenjira inodzaka kubva Jerusarema kuenda Gaza. Iyi injira yomushango.”" 
Acts8:27 Naye wakamiruka, akaenda. Ringira, munhu weEthiopia, muthenwa, nduna huru yaKhandase mambokadzi weEthiopia, waingwarira upfumi hwake hweshe, waiya akauya Jerusarema koodira." 
Acts8:28 Iye waipetuka; akagara mungoro yake, naye waifunda bhuku romuprofeti Isaya." 
Acts8:29 NoMweya wakati kunaFiripu, “Kwedzera ushongane nengoro iyi.”" 
Acts8:30 Firipu wakarumba kuenda kwaari, wakamuzwa echifunda bhuku raIsaya muprofeti, wakabvunza akati, “Unozwisisa here izvi zvounofunda?”" 
Acts8:31 Naye wakapingura akati, “Ndingaita mazwisisirenyi, asi kuti umwe anditungamirira?” Naye wakapota Firipu kuti akwire, agare naye." 
Acts8:32 Norupande rwezvinyorwa rwaaifunda rwaiya urwu, “Iye wakakweiwa kudai ngegwai koourawa, nokudai ngemwana wegwai rinonyarara pamberi pounorigunda, ngokudaro aabeuri muromo wake." 
Acts8:33 Mukutsverudzwa kwake kutonga kwakarurama kwakabviswa kwaari. Ndiani unozoronza mibarirwana yake? Ngokuti kupona kwake kwakatorwa kubva munyika.” 
Acts8:34 Nomuthenwa wakapingura kunaFiripu, akati, “Ndinokupota, muprofeti unoereketa izvi ndiani, ndiye emene here nokuti unoereketa ngoumweni?”" 
Acts8:35 Naapo Firipu wakabeura muromo wake, akatanga kubvira pachinyorwa ichi, wakachumaira kwaari ndiJesu." 
Acts8:36 Vachahamba munjira, vakaguma pamvura; nomuthenwa wakati, “Ringira, mvura iri pano. Chiinyi chinondirambidza kuti ndisabhabhatidzwa?” [" 
Acts8:37 Firipu wakapingura, akati, “Kudai wechitenda ngomwoyo wako weshe, kunotenderwa.” Naye wakapingura echiti, “Ndinotenda kuti Jesu Kristu Mukororo waMwari.”]" 
Acts8:38 Naye wakapanga kuti ngoro iemeswe. Navo veshe vakadzaka mumvura, Firipu nomuthenwa, naye wakamubhabhatidza." 
Acts8:39 Naapo vabuda kubva mumvura, Mweya waMambo wakabvisa Firipu; nomuthenwa aazi kuchamuona, ngokuti iye wakaenda munjira yake echidakara." 
Acts8:40 Asi Firipu wakaoneka ari muAzotusi; echihamba, wakachumaira vhangeri mumadhorobha eshe metsa wakaguma Sizaria." 
Acts9:1 Asi Sauri echifemurika ngoushungu wokuda kuuraya vadzidzi vaMambo, wakaenda kumupristi mukuru," 
Acts9:2 akakumbira kwaari tsamba dzokuenda Dhamasekusi, kumhatso dzokudira, kuti kudai echizoona vateeri veNjira iyi, kunyazwi vamuna nokuti vakadzi, waizovaunza vakasungwa Jerusarema." 
Acts9:3 Zvino echihamba wakakwedzera Dhamasekusi. Paripo kujeka kwakauya kwechibva mudenga kumutendenedza. 
Acts9:4 Naye wakawa pashi, wakazwa izwi rechiti kwaari, “Sauri, Sauri, unonditambudzirenyi?”" 
Acts9:5 Naye wakati, “Urianani, Mambo?” Wakati, “Ndini Jesu uwo wounotambudza; [kwakakonza kwouri kupunhura zvibaiso zvinopinza.”" 
Acts9:6 Asi iye echihuta nokushama wakati, “Mambo, unoda kuti ndiitenyi?” NaMambo wakati kwaari,] “Asi miruka, upotere mudhorobha, naapo unozoronzerwa iwewe izvi zvinosisira kuti uite.”" 
Acts9:7 Vamuna vaihamba naye vakaema vasikaereketi, vechizwa izwi, asi vasikaoni munhu." 
Acts9:8 Sauri wakamiruka kubva pashi, naapo abeura madziso ake, aazi kuona chiro; ndizvo vakamubata ngenyara, vakamuunza muDhamasekusi." 
Acts9:9 Naye wakaita mazuva matatu asikaoni, asikazi kudya nokuti kumwa." 
Acts9:10 Zvino waiyamo mudzidzi muDhamasekusi, zina rake raizwi ndiAnaniasi. Mambo wakati kwaari muchioniso, “Ananiasi,” naye wakati, “Ndiri pano, Mambo.”" 
Acts9:11 NaMambo wakati kwaari, “Miruka uende mupato rinozwi Rakarurama, ubvunze mumhatso yaJudhasi munhu unozwi ndiSauri weTharsusi; ngokuti, ringira, iye unokumbira," 
Acts9:12 naye waona muchioniso munhu unozwi ndiAnaniasi, echipotera nokuisa nyara dzake padera pake, kuti aonezve.”" 
Acts9:13 Asi Ananiasi wakapingura echiti, “Mambo, ndakazwa ngevanhu vazhinji ngendaa yomunhu uyu, ngokuwanda kweizvo zvakashata zvaakaita kune vakacheneswa venyu muJerusarema;" 
Acts9:14 nepano unaro simba raakapuwa ngevapristi vakuru kuti asunge avo veshe vanokumbira ngezina renyu.” 
Acts9:15 Asi Mambo wakati kwaari, “Enda, ngokuti mudziyo wakatsanangurwa ndini kuti atware zina rangu kune vemadzinza nemadzimambo nokuvana vaIsuraeri." 
Acts9:16 Ngokuti inini ndinozomuonisa zveshe zvaanosisira kuzotambudzwa ndizvo ngendaa yezina rangu.” 
Acts9:17 Ndizvo Ananiasi wakaenda, akapotera mumhatso. Echiisa nyara dzake padera paSauri, akati, “Mukoma Sauri, Mambo Jesu, uwo wakaoneka kwouri munjira yewakauya ndiyo, wandituma kuti uonezve, uzadzwe ndiMweya Wakachena.”" 
Acts9:18 Paripo zvakawa kubva kumadziso ake zviro zvakadai ngemagwamba ehove, naye wakaonazve. Wakamiruka, akabhabhatidzwa," 
Acts9:19 wakadya zvokudya, akagwinyiswa. Sauri wakagareyo mazuva amweni nevadzidzi muDhamasekusi." 
Acts9:20 Paripo mumhatso dzokudira wakachumaira ndiJesu echiti, “Uyu Mukororo waMwari.”" 
Acts9:21 Veshe vakamuzwa vakashamiswa vechiti, “Uyu andiyepi here wakauraya avo vaikumbira ngezina iro muJerusarema? Naye wakauya pano here ngeichi chizato, kuti aende navo vakasungwa pamberi pevapristi vakuru?”" 
Acts9:22 Asi Sauri wakaramba echigwinyiswa, akanasa kugutsa vaJudha vaigara muDhamasekusi, echikohomedzisa kuti uyu Jesu ndiye Kristu." 
Acts9:23 Nangesure kwemazuva mazhinji apera, vaJudha vakapangana kumuuraya," 
Acts9:24 asi bangano ravo rakaziikanwa kunaSauri. Vakarinda misiwo masikati nousiku kuti vamuuraye; 
Acts9:25 asi vadzidzi vake vakamutora usiku, vakamubudisa ngepaburi reparukumbati, vakamudzasa ari mudendere." 
Acts9:26 Naapo aguma Jerusarema, wakaedza kuti abatanewo nevadzidzi; navo veshe vakamutya, vasikatendi kuti waa mudzidzi." 
Acts9:27 Asi Bhanabhasi wakamutora, akamuunza kune vapostori, wakadudzira kwavari maonere aakaita Mambo munjira, nenjira yaakaereketa ndiyo kwaari, nenjira yaaiya akachumaira ngezina raJesu ngokushinga muDhamasekusi." 
Acts9:28 Ndizvo wakagara navo echihamba kupotera nokubuda pakati pavo muJerusarema, akachumaira ngokushinga ngezina raMambo." 
Acts9:29 Wakaereketa echiphikisana nevaJudha vaiereketa chiGiriki, asi vakatsvaka mazano okuda kumuuraya." 
Acts9:30 Asi apo hama dzazvizia, vakamudzasa kuenda Sizaria, vakamutumira Tharsusi." 
Acts9:31 Ndizvo chiara cheshe chaiya muJudhia nomuGarire neSamaria chakaona kunyarara, chikaakiwa, nacho chechihamba ngokumutya Mambo nomukuembedzerwa ndiMweya Wakachena, chakawandiswa." 
Acts9:32 Kwakaitika kuti Petro echihamba kundau dzeshe pakati pavo veshe wakadzaka kune vakacheneswa vaigara Ridha. 
Acts9:33 Naapo wakaona munhu waizwi ndiAeneasi, uwo waiya akaata mumubhedhi wake makore masere, ngokuti waiya akaoma muiri." 
Acts9:34 Petro wakati kwaari, “Aeneasi, Jesu Kristu unokuponesa; miruka, unasire mubhedhi wako.” Paripo iye wakamiruka." 
Acts9:35 Naavo veshe vaigara muRidha nomuSharoni vakamuona, vakatenderukira kunaMambo." 
Acts9:36 Zvino kwaiyapo muJopa mudzidzi, zina rake raizwi Thabhitha, ukwo kunoti ngokukumuchwa, Dhokasi. Iri dzimai raiya nemishando yakanaka nokukovera zvipo." 
Acts9:37 Kwakaitika ngaawo mazuva, kuti rakarwara, rikafa. Naapo vaiya varishambidza, vakariisa mukamera romuturika." 
Acts9:38 Ngokuti Ridha raiya pasinde peJopa, vadzidzi vechizwa kuti Petro waiyamwo, vakatuma vanhu vairi kwaari, vechimupota vechiti, “Usanonoka kuuya kwetiri.”" 
Acts9:39 Ndizvo Petro wakamiruka, akaenda navo. Naapo aguma, vakamuunza mukamera romuturika; shirikadzi dzeshe dzakaema pasinde pake dzechichema, dzechipangidzira mabhachi nezvokufuka zvaakaita Dhokasi, achiripo navo." 
Acts9:40 Petro wakabudisa veshe pabanze, wakagwadama, akakumbira. Akunukukira kunomuiri, akati, “Thabhitha, muka.” Naye wakasvinura madziso ake, naapo aona Petro, wakamuka, akagara." 
Acts9:41 Naye amubata ngenyara yake wakamumirudza. Naapo adaidza vakacheneswa neshirikadzi wakamuisa pamberi pavo echipona. 
Acts9:42 Zvakaziikanwa mukati mweJopa reshe, vazhinji vakatenda kuna Mambo." 
Acts9:43 Naye wakagara mazuva mazhinji muJopa nomunhu unozwi Simoni, musukuti." 
Acts10:1 MuSizaria waiyamwo munhu waizwi Khoneriusi, nduna yezana yechikwata chemajoni chaizwi cheItaria." 
Acts10:2 Waiya munhu unodira nounotya Mwari pamwepo nevemhatso yake yeshe, wakakovera zvipo ngenyasha kuvanhu nokugara echikumbira kunaMwari." 
Acts10:3 Zvino nguva yooda kuita awa rechipfumbamwe rezuva, wakanasa kuona muchioniso ngirosi yaMwari yechipotera, yechiti kwaari, “Khoneriusi.”" 
Acts10:4 Wakaringisisa ngirosi echitya, akati, “Chiinyi, Mambo?” Nayo yakati kwaari, “Mikumbiro yako nokukovera zvipo kwako zvakakwira kuita mucherechedziso pamberi paMwari." 
Acts10:5 Zvino tuma vanhu kuJopa vaunze munhu unozwi Simoni, uwo unozwi Petro." 
Acts10:6 Iye unogara nomunhu unozwi Simoni, musukuti, mhatso yake iri pasinde poruandhle.”" 
Acts10:7 Apo ngirosi yakaereketa kwaari yaenda, wakadaidza vairi vevaranda vemhatso yake, nejoni raidira reavo vaigara vechimushandira," 
Acts10:8 naapo aronza kwavari zveshe, wakavatuma kuenda Jopa." 
Acts10:9 Zvino nechimangwani, avo vachahamba vechikwedzera kudhorobha, Petro wakakwira padenga remhatso rakaterama kookumbira, rooda kuita awa rechitanhatu." 
Acts10:10 Wakazwa nzara, echidisisa kuti adye chiro; asi vachanasirira, wakabatwa ndimweya." 
Acts10:11 Naye wakaona denga rakabeuka, nechiro chaidzaka chakadai ngejira gurutu rakadzaswa panyika rakasungwa marupande aro marongomuna." 
Acts10:12 Mukati mwaro mwaiya nembeu dzeshe dzemhuka dzine mirenje mirongomuna nezvipuka zveshe zvinotamanda zvomunyika neshiri dzomudenga. 
Acts10:13 Neizwi rakauya kwaari rechiti, “Miruka, Petro; uraya, wechidya.”" 
Acts10:14 Asi Petro wakati, “Haiwa, Mambo! Ngokuti andizi kumbodya chiro chisina shwiro nechakasvipiswa.”" 
Acts10:15 Neizwi rakauyazve kwaari ngokwechipiri rechiti, “Chaakachenesa Mwari, usati achina shwiro.”" 
Acts10:16 Ichi chakaitika mikuwo mitatu, jira rakaashirwazve mudenga." 
Acts10:17 Zvino Petro achakangaidzwa mukati mwake kuti chinoronzenyi chioniso icho chaaiya aona, penya, avo vanhu vakatumwa ndiKhoneriusi, vaiya vechibvunza mhatso yaSimoni, vakaema pamusiwo." 
Acts10:18 Navo vakadaidzira, vakabvunza kuti, Simoni unozwi Petro unogarapo here." 
Acts10:19 NaPetro achapinimidza ngechioniso, Mweya wakati kwaari, “Ringira, vanhu vatatu vanokutsvaka." 
Acts10:20 Asi miruka udzake, uende navo usikagonondi; ngokuti ndini ndakavatuma.”" 
Acts10:21 Petro wakadzaka kune vanhu avo, akati, “Ndini uwo womunotsvaka; mwahambirenyi?”" 
Acts10:22 Navo vakati, “Khoneriusi, nduna yezana, munhu wakarurama nounotya Mwari, unembiri yakanaka kudzinza reshe revaJudha, wakapangwa ngengirosi yakachena kukudaidza kuti uuye kumhatso yake, nokuzwa mazwi anobva kwouri.”" 
Acts10:23 Ndizvo Petro wakavadaidza kuti vapotere mukati, wakavapa zvokudya. Nechimangwani wakamiruka, akaenda navo, nehama dzimweni dzeJopa dzakaendawo naye." 
Acts10:24 Nechimangwani vakapotera muSizaria, naKhoneriusi waivagarira, waiya adaidza pamwepo hama dzake neshamwari dzake dzinodikanwa." 
Acts10:25 Naapo Petro apotera, Khoneriusi wakashongana naye, akawira patsoka dzake, akamudira." 
Acts10:26 Asi Petro wakamumirudza echiti, “Miruka; neniwo ndiri munhu.”" 
Acts10:27 Naapo achaereketa naye, wakapotera mukati, akaona vazhinji vakaungana;" 
Acts10:28 akati kwavari, “Imwimwi munozia kuti azvitenderwi ngemipango kuti muJudha ashonganiswe nokuti auye kunomunhu wedzinza rimweni. Asi inini Mwari wakandipangidzira kuti ndisazoronza kuti munhu chiro chisina shwiro nokuti wakasvipiswa." 
Acts10:29 Ndizvo apo ndadaidzwa, ndauya ndisikarambi. Ndizvo ndinobvunza mwakandidaidzirenyi?”" 
Acts10:30 NaKhoneriusi wakati, “Aamazuva marongomuna akapinda, metsa kuguma awa iri, ndaingwarira awa rokukumbira rechipfumbamwe mumhatso yangu; ndakaona munhu wakaema pamberi pangu anezvokufuka zvinon'anikira." 
Acts10:31 Naye wakati, ‘Khoneriusi, mikumbiro yako yakazwika, nokukovera zvipo kwako kwakakarakadzwa pamberi paMwari." 
Acts10:32 Ndizvo tuma kuJopa, udaidze Simoni, uwo unozwi Petro; unogara mumhatso yaSimoni, musukuti, pasinde poruandhle.’" 
Acts10:33 Ndizvo paripo ndakatuma vanhu kwouri, newe ngokuuya wanasa; ndizvo tiri pano teshe pamberi paMwari kuzwa zveshe zvakapangwa kwouri ndiMwari.”" 
Acts10:34 NaPetro ashama muromo wake, wakati, “Ngegwinyiso ndinoona kuti Mwari andiyepi mutsananguri wevanhu," 
Acts10:35 asi kumadzinza eshe, weshe unomutya nokuita zvakarurama unoashirika kwaari." 
Acts10:36 Munorizia izwi iro raakatuma kunavana vaIsuraeri, echichumaira mashoko akanaka okunyarara ndiJesu Kristu (ndiye Mambo wavo veshe.)" 
Acts10:37 Imwimwi munorizia izwi rakachumairwa munyika yeshe yeJudhia, kubvira ngomuGarire ngesure kworubhabhatidzo rwaakachumaira Johani;" 
Acts10:38 ngenjira iyo Mwari yaakamudzodza ndiyo Jesu weNazaretha ndiMweya Wakachena nesimba; uwo waihamba echiita zvakanaka, echiponesa avo veshe vaitambudzwa ndiDhiabhorosi, ngokuti Mwari waiya naye." 
Acts10:39 Nesu tiri zvapupu zveizvo zveshe zvaakaita kweshe munyika yevaJudha nomuJerusarema. Ndiye wevakauraya ngokumuturika pamuti; 
Acts10:40 uyu Mwari wakamumusa kubva murufu ngezuva rechitatu, akamupa simba kuti aoneke pamhene," 
Acts10:41 asi haiwa kuoneka ngevanhu veshe, asi kwetiri isusu, takatsanangurwa karetu ndiMwari kuita zvapupu, avo vakadya nokumwa naye ngesure kwokumuka kwake kubva kwevakafa." 
Acts10:42 Wakatipanga kuchumaira kuvanhu nokupupura kuti uyu ndiye wakaemeswa ndiMwari kuita Mutongi wevanozwa nevakafa. 
Acts10:43 Kwaari vaprofeti veshe vanoita chapupu ndiye, kuti ngezina rake, munhu weshe unotenda kwaari unozorekererwa zvishaishi.”" 
Acts10:44 Naapo Petro achaereketa aya mazwi, Mweya Wakachena wakadzaka padera pavo veshe vakazwa izwi." 
Acts10:45 Naavo vatendi vevakachekwa avo vakauya naPetro vakashamiswa ngokuti chipo choMweya Wakachena chakadururwawo padera pevemadzinza. 
Acts10:46 Ngokuti vaivazwa vechiereketa ngendimi nokukurisa Mwari. Naapo Petro wakapingura, akati," 
Acts10:47 “Pane ungarambidza mvura here kuti ava vasabhabhatidzwa, avo vakaashira Mweya Wakachena kudai tisu?”" 
Acts10:48 Naye wakapanga kuti vabhabhatidzwe ngezina raJesu Kristu. Vorovomupota kuti agarepo mazuva amweni. 
Acts11:1 Zvino vapostori nehama dzaigara muJudhia vakazwa kuti vemadzinza navo vaiya vaashira izwi raMwari. 
Acts11:2 Naapo Petro akwira Jerusarema, vatendi avo vevakachekwa vakaita hasha naye" 
Acts11:3 vechiti, “Iwewe wakapotera kunevanhu vasikazi kuchekwa, ukadya navo.”" 
Acts11:4 Asi Petro wakatanga kuvaronzera zveshe ngokuteererana kwazvo echiti," 
Acts11:5 “Ndaiya ndiri mudhorobha reJopa ndechikumbira; ndakabatwa ndimweya, ndakaona muchioniso chiro chakadai ngejira guru, rechidzaswa rakasungwa marupande marongomuna kubva mudenga; chakauya kwendiri." 
Acts11:6 Apo ndaringisisa, ndakaona mhuka dzine mirenje mirongomuna nezvikara zvomushango nezvinotamanda neshiri dzomudenga." 
Acts11:7 Ndakazwawo izwi rechiti kwendiri, ‘Miruka, Petro; uuraye, udye.’" 
Acts11:8 Asi ndakati, ‘Haiwa, Mambo! Ngokuti apana chiro chisina shwiro nokuti chakasvipiswa chakambopotera mumuromo mwangu.’" 
Acts11:9 Asi izwi rakapingura ngokwechipiri rechibva mudenga rechiti, ‘Chaakachenesa Mwari, usati chiro chisina shwiro.’" 
Acts11:10 Izvi zvakaitika katatu; nazvo zveshe zvakaashirwazve kuhwirira mudenga. 
Acts11:11 Panguvayo vanhu vatatu vakaguma pamhatso petaigara, avo vaiya vatumwa kwendiri vechibva Sizaria." 
Acts11:12 NoMweya wakandironzera kuti ndiende navo, pasina muketo pakati pavo nesu. Nehama idzi nhanhatu dzakaendawo neni; nesu takapotera mumhatso yomunhuwo." 
Acts11:13 Naye wakaerengudza kwetiri ngenjira yeyakaoneka ndiyo ngirosi yechiema mumhatso mwake yechiti, ‘Tumira izwi kuJopa, uunze Simoni uwo unozwi Petro." 
Acts11:14 Naye unozoereketa kwouri mazwi ounozoponeswa ndiwo, iwewe nevemhatso yako veshe.’" 
Acts11:15 Naapo ndichatanga kuereketa, Mweya Wakachena wakadzaka padera pavo, kudai ngezvewakadzaka padera pedu pakutanga." 
Acts11:16 Neni ndakakarakadza izwi raMambo raakaereketa echiti, ‘Johani wakabhabhatidza ngemvura, asi imwimwi munozobhabhatidzwa ndiMweya Wakachena.’" 
Acts11:17 Ndizvo, kudai Mwari akavapa chipo chimwecho icho chaakapawo kwetiri, apo petakatenda kunaMambo Jesu Kristu, inini ndirianani kuti ndingarwisana naMwari?”" 
Acts11:18 Naapo vazwa izvi, vakanyarara. Vakakudza Mwari vechiti, “Ndizvo Mwari wakapawo kunevemadzinza kutenderuka kuti vapone.”" 
Acts11:19 Ndizvo avo vakapararira kundau dzeshe ngendaa yokutambudzwa ukwo kwakaitika ngendaa yaStefano, vakahamba metsa kuguma Foenisia neSaipurasi neAntiokhi, vasikaereketi izwi kumunhu, asi kwega kuvaJudha." 
Acts11:20 Asi vaiyapo vamweni vaiya vanhu veSaipurasi neveKurene, avo vakati vaguma muAntiokhi, vaiereketawo kuvaGiriki, vechichumaira ndiMambo Jesu." 
Acts11:21 Nenyara yaMambo yaiya navo, vazhinji vakatenda, vakatenderukira kunaMambo." 
Acts11:22 Mbiri yavo yakazwika munzee dzechiara chaiya muJerusarema, navo vakatuma Bhanabhasi kuenda Antiokhi." 
Acts11:23 Naapo aguma nokuona nyasha dzaMwari, wakadakara; akavapanga veshe kuti varambe vakagondeka munaMambo ngomwoyo unogwinyisira." 
Acts11:24 Ngokuti waiya munhu wakanaka, wakazara ndiMweya Wakachena nokugonda. Vanhu vazhinji vakatutsirwa kunaMambo." 
Acts11:25 Bhanabhasi wakaenda Tarsusi kootsvaka Sauri; 
Acts11:26 naapo amuona, wakamuunza Antiokhi. Bhanabhasi naSauri vakapedza gore reshe vechiungana pamwepo nechiara, vechidzidzisa vanhu vazhinji; muAntiokhi vadzidzi vakatanga kududzwa kuti vaKristu." 
Acts11:27 Mazuva awo vaprofeti vakadzaka Antiokhi vechibva Jerusarema. 
Acts11:28 Umwe wavo waizwi ndiAgabhusi wakamiruka, akavaronzera kubudikidza ndiMweya kuti nzara huru inozogumira nyika yeshe; iyo yakaitika ngemazuva aKraudhiusi." 
Acts11:29 Nevadzidzi vakatenderana, munhu weshe kudai ngezvaaikona, kuti atumire zvingadetsera hama dzaigara muJudhia;" 
Acts11:30 navo vakaita kudaro, vakazvitumira kunevakuru ngenyara dzaBhanabhasi naSauri." 
Acts12:1 Asi ngouwo mukuwo Herodhi mambo wakatambanudza nyara dzake kutambudza vamweni vechiara. 
Acts12:2 Wakauraya Jakobe, mukoma waJohani, ngeshoti." 
Acts12:3 Naapo aona kuti zvakadakadza vaJudha, wakaenda mberi kubatawo Petro. Awo aiya mazuva edhiri reChingwa chisina Mumera." 
Acts12:4 Naapo amubata, wakamukonyera mutirongo, akamuisa kuzvikwata zvirongomuna zvemajoni, kuti zvimurinde, echipinimidza kumubudisa pamberi pevanhu ngesure kwePhasika." 
Acts12:5 Ndizvo Petro wakangwarirwa mutirongo, asi chiara chakaangira kumukumbirira kunaMwari." 
Acts12:6 Ngousiku uhwo apo Herodhi paaizomuka echimubudisa, Petro waiya akaata pakati pemajoni mairi, akasungwa ngemaketani mairi, nevarindi vaiya pamusiwo vechingwarira tirongo." 
Acts12:7 Apapo ngirosi yaMambo yakaemapo, nokujeka kwakajeka mukamera retirongo; nayo yakatsungudza Petro ngeparutii, ikamumusa yechiti, “Kasira kumiruka.” Nemaketani akarungunuka kubva munyara dzake." 
Acts12:8 Nengirosi yakati kwaari, “Dzisimidze usunge magwada ako”, naye wakaita kudaro. Yakati kwaari, “Pfeka chokufuka chako, unditeere.”" 
Acts12:9 Petro wakabuda kubanze akaiteera; aazi kunasa kuzia zvaiitwa ngengirosi, asi wakapinimidza kuti waiona chioniso." 
Acts12:10 Naapo vapinda varindi vokutanga nevechipiri, vakaguma pamusiwo wesimbi wokupotera ndiwo mudhorobha. Nawo wakavabeukira wemene; vakabuda, vakahamba ngepato rimwe; paripo ngirosi yakamusiya." 
Acts12:11 Naapo Petro apembenuka, wakati, “Zvino ndinozia ngegwinyiso kuti Mambo wakatuma ngirosi yake, akandinunura kubva munyara yaHerodhi nokubva mukukarira kweshe kwevanhu vevaJudha.”" 
Acts12:12 Naapo azia ngeizvi, wakaenda kumhatso yaMaria, mai aJohani, mutupo wake waizwi Marako; apo pevaiya vakaungana vazhinji vechikumbira." 
Acts12:13 Asi adododza pamusiwo, musikana waizwi ndiRodha wakauya koodaira." 
Acts12:14 Asi apo azia izwi raPetro, aazi kubeura musiwo ngokudakara, asi wakarumba kupotera, akavaronzera kuti Petro wakaema pamusiwo." 
Acts12:15 Vakati kwaari, “Unopenga.” Asi iye wakaangira kugwinyisa kuti ndizvo. Asi vakati, “Ingirosi yake!”" 
Acts12:16 Asi Petro wakaangira kudododza; naapo vabeura vakamuona, vakashamiswa." 
Acts12:17 Asi wakaita ngenyara yake kuti vanyarare, wakadudzira kwavari ngenjira yaakabudiswa ndiyo ndiMambo mutirongo. Wakati, “Ronzai izvi kunaJakobe nokunehama.” Wakabvapo, akaenda kundau imweni." 
Acts12:18 Zvino kwaedza, kwaitika bope guru pakati pevarindi, ngendaa yezvakaitika kunaPetro." 
Acts12:19 Naapo Herodhi amutsvaka, asikamuoni, wakabvunzisisa varindi, akapanga kuti vaurawe. Naye wakadzaka kubva Judhia, akaenda Sizaria, akagarayo." 
Acts12:20 Zvino Herodhi wakatsenekera kakurutu vanhu veThire neveSidhoni; navo vakauya kwaari muchiunga chimwe, naapo vaiyana naBrastusi, nduna yekamera ramambo, vakakumbira kuti vaiyaniswe, ngokuti nyika yavo yaiona zvokudya kubva munyika yamambo." 
Acts12:21 Ngezuva rakaemeswa, Herodhi wakadzisimidza zvokufuka zvoumambo, akagara pachigaro choumambo, wakaereketa kwavari." 
Acts12:22 Nevanhu vakadaidzira vechiti, “Iri izwi raMwari, haiwa romunhu!”" 
Acts12:23 Paripo ngirosi yaMambo yakamurova, ngokuti aazi kukudza Mwari; naye wakadyiwa ngehonye, akafa." 
Acts12:24 Asi izwi raMwari rakaangira kupararira nokuwanziswa. 
Acts12:25 Zvino Bhanabhasi naSauri vakahwirira Jerusarema, apo vaiya vapedza mushando wavo, vechitora navo Johani uwo waizwi Marako." 
Acts13:1 Zvino muAntiokhi muchiara chaiya chiripo mwaiya nevaprofeti nevadzidzisi: Bhanabhasi, Simeoni uwo waizwi ndiNiga, Rusiasi weKurene, Manaene uwo wakakura pamwepo naHerodhi sadunhu, naSauri." 
Acts13:2 Vachadira Mambo, vechiera kudya, Mweya Wakachena wakati, “Paradzanisai kwendiri Bhanabhasi naSauri kuti vaite mushando wendakavadaidzira.”" 
Acts13:3 Apo vaera kudya nokukumbira, vakaisa nyara dzavo padera pavo, vakavaendesa." 
Acts13:4 Ndizvo vatumwa ndiMweya Wakachena, vakadzaka kuenda Sereusia, nokubvapo vakahamba ngengarava kuenda Saipurasi." 
Acts13:5 Naapo vaguma Saramisi, vakateketesa izwi raMwari mumhatso dzokudira dzevaJudha. Navo vaiyazve naJohani mudetseri wavo." 
Acts13:6 Naapo vaiya vahamba pachiwi peshe metsa kuguma Phafosi, vakashongana noumwe waiya n'anga muprofeti wokunyepa, muJudha, zina rake raizwi ndiBha-Jesu." 
Acts13:7 Uwo waigara pamwepo nomutongi mukuru waizwi ndiSergiusi Phaurusi, waiya munhu uneungwaru. Iye adaidza kwaari Bhanabhasi naSauri, waidisisa kuti azwe izwi raMwari." 
Acts13:8 Asi n'anga Erimasi, (ngokuti ndikwo kukumuchwa kwezina rake) wakarwisana navo, echida kupaukisa mutongi mukuru kubva mukugonda." 
Acts13:9 Asi Sauri, uwozve unozwi Phauri, azadzwa ndiMweya Wakachena, wakamuringisisa," 
Acts13:10 akati, “Iwewe mukororo waDhiabhorosi, iwewe gaa rokururama kweshe, wakazara ngokuchengedzera nourimbwi hweshe, aurekeri here kushongorosa njira dzakarurama dzaMambo?" 
Acts13:11 Zvino, ringira, nyara yaMambo iri padera pako, newe unozoita bofu, usikakoni kuona zuva kwomukuwo.” Paripo mhute nechidima zvakawira padera pake; wakahambahamba kutsvaka vanhu vokumutungamirira ngenyara." 
Acts13:12 Apo mutongi mukuru aona izvo zvakaitika, wakatenda, echishamiswa ngezvidzidziso zvaMambo." 
Acts13:13 Zvino Phauri nevangani vake vakahamba ngengarava kubva Phafosi, vakaguma Pherga muPhamufiria. Johani wakabva kwavari, akapetuka Jerusarema;" 
Acts13:14 asi vechihamba kubva Pherga, vakaguma Antiokhi muPhisidhia. Ngezuva reSabatha, vapotera mumhatso yokudira, vakagara pashi." 
Acts13:15 Ngesure kwokudzidzwa kweMipango nevaprofeti, vakuru vemhatso yokudira vakatumira izwi kwavari vechiti, “Vamuna, hama, kudai muneizwi mukati mwenyu rokupanga vanhu, riereketenyi.”" 
Acts13:16 Ndizvo Phauri wakamiruka, akakopera ngenyara, akati, “Imwimwi vanhu vaIsuraeri, nemwi munotya Mwari, purutanai." 
Acts13:17 Mwari wevanhu ava vaIsuraeri wakatsanangura madzibaba edu, wakakudza vanhu ava apo vaiya vanhu vapara munyika yeEgipite, ngomuoko unesimba wakavabudisa mukati mwayo." 
Acts13:18 Mumakore anoda kukwana kuita makumi marongomuna wakavasengerera mushango. 
Acts13:19 Naapo aparadza madzinza manomwe aigara munyika yeKhenani, wakavakoanisira nyika yavo kuita nhaka." 
Acts13:20 Nangesure kwemakore anoda kuguma mazana marongomuna nemakumi mashanu, wakavapa vatongi metsa kuguma kunaSamueri muprofeti." 
Acts13:21 Ngesure kweizvi vakakumbira kuti vapuwe mambo, naMwari wakavapa Sauri mukororo waKishi, munhu wedzinza raBenjamini, uwo wakatonga makore makumi marongomuna." 
Acts13:22 Naapo amubvisa, wakavamirudzira Dhavhidha kuti aite mambo wavo. Muuchapupu hwaakaita ndiye, wakati, ‘Ndaona munaDhavhidha mukororo waJesi kuti munhu unoda zvinodiwa ngomwoyo wangu, uwo unozoita kuda kwangu kweshe.’" 
Acts13:23 Ngorudzi rwomunhu uyu Mwari, kudai ngechigondiso chake, wakaunza kunevaIsuraeri Muponesi, Jesu." 
Acts13:24 Asati auya Jesu, Johani waiya achumaira ngorubhabhatidzo rwokutenderuka kuvanhu veshe vaIsuraeri." 
Acts13:25 Naapo Johani echipedzisa mushando wake, wakati, ‘Munopinimidza kuti inini ndiri anani? Andiriyepi. Haiwa, asi umwe unouya sure kwangu, uwo wendisikasisiri inini kusunhura tambo dzemagwada etsoka dzake.’" 
Acts13:26 “Vamuna, hama, vakororo vorudzi rwaAbrahama, naavo vari pakati penyu vanomutya Mwari, izwi iri roruponeso rakatumirwa kwetiri." 
Acts13:27 Ngokuti avo vanogara muJerusarema nevatongi vavo avazi kumuzia nokuti kuzwisisa mazwi evaprofeti, awo anodzidzwa Sabatha rimwe ngarimwe, vakaazadzisa ngokumuitira ndaa." 
Acts13:28 Kunyazwi avazi kuona ndaa kwaari yaiita kuti afe, asi vakakumbira Piratu kuti Jesu aurawe." 
Acts13:29 Naapo vazadzisa zveshe zvakanyorwa ngendaa yake, vakamudzasa kubva pamuchinjiko, vakamuradzika muiba." 
Acts13:30 Asi Mwari wakamumusa kubva kwevakafa; 
Acts13:31 wakaoneka mazuva mazhinji kwavari avo vakakwira naye kubva Garire kuenda Jerusarema, avo zvino vari zvapupu zvake kuvanhu." 
Acts13:32 Nesu tinochumaira kwomuri mashoko akanaka echigondiso icho chakaitwa kumadzibaba," 
Acts13:33 kuti Mwari wakachizadzisa ichi kwetiri vana vavo, ngokumumusa Jesu; kudai ngezvakanyorwawo munduyo yechipiri yechiti, “ ‘Iwewe uri Mukororo wangu, nyamashi ndaita Baba ako.’" 
Acts13:34 Ngendaa yokuti wakamumusa kubva kwevakafa, zvino aachahwiriri mukuora, wakaereketa kudai, ‘Ndinozokupa zvifumiso zvakachena nezvinogondeka zvaDhavhidha.’" 
Acts13:35 Nomunduyo imweni unoti, ‘Auzotenderi Wakachena wako kuti aore.’" 
Acts13:36 Ngokuti Dhavhidha, apedza kuita kuda kwaMwari pakati pedzinza rake, wakafa, naye wakaikwa pane madzibaba ake, akaora." 
Acts13:37 Asi uwo waakamusa Mwari aazi kuora. 
Acts13:38 Ndizvo ngakuziikanwe kwomuri vamuna, hama, kuti kubudikidza ndiye uyu kunochumairwa kwomuri kurekererwa kwezvishaishi." 
Acts13:39 Kubudikidza ndiye veshe vanotenda vanopembedzwa kubva kuzviro zveshe zvemwaiya musikapembedzwi ngeMipango yaMosi. 
Acts13:40 Ndizvo ngwarai kuti zvisazomugumira izvo zvakaereketwa ngevaprofeti: 
Acts13:41 Ringirai, imwimwi vashoori, mushamiswe, mupere; ngokuti ndinoshanda mushando mumazuva enyu, mushando womusikazotendi, kunyazwi munhu amuronzera ndiwo.”" 
Acts13:42 Navo vechibuda, vanhu vakavapota kuti aya mazwi aereketwe kwavari ngeSabatha raiteera." 
Acts13:43 Naapo mushongano wokudira waparara, vazhinji vevaJudha neavo vemadzinza vakatenderukira muchiJudha vakateera Phauri naBhanabhasi; ivo vechiereketa kwavari, vakavagwinyisa kuti vaangire kugara munyasha dzaMwari." 
Acts13:44 NgeSabatha raiteera uzhinji hwevanhu veshe vedhorobha vakaungana kuzwa izwi raMwari. 
Acts13:45 Asi apo vaJudha vechiona mbungano, vakazara ngendurumwa, vakaphikisa zvakaereketwa ndiPhauri, vechimutuka." 
Acts13:46 Naapo Phauri naBhanabhasi vakaereketa ngokushinga vechiti, “Kwaisisira kuti izwi raMwari ritange kuereketwa kwomuri. Kwechioneka kuti munoriramba mwechiti ribve kwomuri, mwechidzierenga kuti amusisirwi nokupona kusikaperi, ringirai, tinokunukukira kuenda kune vemadzinza." 
Acts13:47 Ngokuti Mambo wakatipanga kudaro echiti, ‘Ndakakuemesa kuti uite kujeka kunevemadzinza, kuti uite ruponeso metsa kumagumo enyika.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Naapo vemadzinza vazwa izvi, vakadakara, vakakurisa izwi raMambo; naavo veshe vakaemeserwa kupona kusikaperi vakatenda." 
Acts13:49 Neizwi raMambo rakaparadzirwa munyikamwo mweshe. 
Acts13:50 Asi vaJudha vakavherudza vakadzi vaidira vairemeredzeka nevakuru vedhorobha, vakamusira madambudziko Phauri naBhanabhasi, vakavadzinga kubva munharaunda yavo." 
Acts13:51 Asi ivo vakaguwa bukuta patsoka dzavo kuvaitira ndaa, vakaguma Ikoniumu." 
Acts13:52 Nevadzidzi vakazara ngokudakara noMweya Wakachena. 
Acts14:1 Zvino muIkoniumu vakapotera pamwepo mumhatso yokudira yevaJudha, vakaereketa ngokudaro vazhinji vakatenda vaJudha navaGiriki." 
Acts14:2 Asi vaJudha vasikatendi vakavherudza mweya yevemadzinza kuti varwisane naavo vakoma. 
Acts14:3 Ndizvo vakagarapo mukuwo wakareba, vechiereketa ngokushinga ndiMambo, uwo wakaita chapupu kuizwi renyasha dzake, echitendera kuti zvioniso nemishamiso zviitwe ngenyara dzavo." 
Acts14:4 Asi vanhu vazhinji vedhorobha vakaparadzana; rumwe rupande rwakaema navaJudha norupande rumweni rwakaema nevapostori. 
Acts14:5 Naapo vakavamukira veshe vemadzinza nevevaJudha nevatongi vavo, kuti vavaitire zvakashata nokuvaponda ngemapuwe," 
Acts14:6 vakazvizia, vakatiza kuenda kumadhorobha eRikaonia, anozwi Ristra neDhebhe nokunharaunda dzawo." 
Acts14:7 Naapo vaichumaira vhangeri. 
Acts14:8 Zvino muRistra mwaigara munhu waiya chigwadara tsoka dzake, wakabarwa ari chirema kubvira mundani yamai ake, aazi kumbohamba." 
Acts14:9 Wakapurutana Phauri echiereketa; iye amuringisisa, aona kuti waiya nokutenda kwaimuita kuti aponeswe," 
Acts14:10 wakati ngeizwi guru, “Ema ngetsoka dzako.” Naye wakanyanduka, akahamba." 
Acts14:11 Naapo mbungano yaona izvo zvakaitwa ndiPhauri, yakadaidzira yechiti ngorurumi rwechiRikaonia, “Zvimwari zvadzaka kwetiri, zvinomuemo wevanhu!”" 
Acts14:12 Navo vakadudza Bhanabhasi kuti, Zeusi, naPhauri kuti, Hermesi, ngokuti iye waiya muereketi mukuru." 
Acts14:13 Nomupristi waZeusi, uwo temperi rake raiya pamberi pedhorobha, wakaunza n'ombe nemaruva kumisiwo, waida kupira mudiro kwavari, pamwepo nembungano." 
Acts14:14 Asi apo vapostori Bhanabhasi naPhauri vazvizwa, vakabaura zvokusimira zvavo, vakarumba kuenda pakati pembungano, vechidaidzira" 
Acts14:15 vechiti, “Vanhu, munoita izvi ngenyi? Isusuwo tiri vanhu vakadai ndimwi, tinounza kwomuri mashoko akanaka okuti mutenderuke kubva kuneizvi zvisina shwiro, muuye kunaMwari unopona, uwo wakasika denga nenyika noruandhle neizvo zveshe zviri mukati mwazvo." 
Acts14:16 Panguva yakapinda wakaatendera madzinza eshe kuti ahambe ngenjira dzawo; 
Acts14:17 asi aazi kusiya asina uchapupu pachake, echiita zvakanaka, echimupa mvura inonaya kubva mudenga, nokukukura zviyo zvakawanda, echizadza mwoyo yenyu ngezvokudya nokudakara.”" 
Acts14:18 Ngemazwi aya zvakavakonzera kurambidza mbungano kuti isazopira mudiro kwavari. 
Acts14:19 Asi vaJudha vakagumapo vechibva Antiokhi naIkoniumu, navo vakavherudza mbungano, vakaponda Phauri ngemapuwe, vakamukweya kumubudisa kubanze kwedhorobha, vechipinimidza kuti wafa." 
Acts14:20 Asi apo vadzidzi vaungana kumutendenedza, wakamiruka, akapotera mudhorobha; nechimangwani wakaenda naBhanabhasi Dhebhe." 
Acts14:21 Naapo vachumaira vhangeri mudhorobha iro, vakaita vadzidzi vazhinji, vakapetuka Ristra neIkonaiumu neAntiokhi," 
Acts14:22 vechigwinyisa mweya yevadzidzi, vechivapota kuti vaangirire kugara mukutenda, vechiti kunosisira kuti tipotere muumambo hwaMwari kubudikidza ngokupotya madambudziko akawanda." 
Acts14:23 Naapo vaiya vagadza vakuru muchiara chimwe ngachimwe, vakakumbira nokuera kudya, vakavapira kunaMambo uwo wevakatenda kwaari." 
Acts14:24 Zvino vakahamba vechipinda ngemuPhisidhia, vakaguma Pamufiria." 
Acts14:25 Naapo vaiya vaereketa izwi muPherga, vakadzaka kuenda Ataria." 
Acts14:26 Vechibvapo vakahamba ngengarava kuenda Antiokhi, apo pevakapirwa munyasha dzaMwari, kuita mushando uwo wevaiya vapedza." 
Acts14:27 Naapo vaguma, vakaunganidza chiara pamwepo, vakavashumira zveshe zvaakaita Mwari ndivo, nenjira yaakabeurira ndiyo vemadzinza musiwo wokugonda." 
Acts14:28 Navo vakagarapo nevadzidzi mukuwo wakareba. 
Acts15:1 Vanhu vamweni vakadzaka vechibva Judhia, vaidzidzisa hama vechiti, “Ngepabanze pokuti mwachekwa, kudai ngomushuma waMosi, amungaponeswi.”" 
Acts15:2 Naapo Phauri naBhanabhasi vaitirana hasha navo nokubvunzisana, Phauri naBhanabhasi nevamweni vavo vakaemeswa kuti vakwire Jerusarema kuvapostori nevakuru ngeiyi ndaa." 
Acts15:3 Ndizvo vechitumwa ngechiara, vakahamba ngemuFoenisia nomuSamaria, vechivaronzera ngokutenderuka kwevemadzinza, navo vakaita kuti hama dzeshe dzidakare kakurutu." 
Acts15:4 Naapo vaguma Jerusarema, vakaashirwa ngechiara nevapostori nevakuru, navo vakashumira zveshe zvaaiya aita Mwari ndivo." 
Acts15:5 Asi vakamiruka vamweni vorudzidziso rwevaFarisi, avo vakatenda vechiti, “Kunosisira kuti vachekwe nokupangwa kuti vangwarire Mipango yaMosi.”" 
Acts15:6 Vapostori nevakuru vakaungana kuti vapangane ngeiyi ndaa. 
Acts15:7 Ngesure kwokuphikisana kukurutu, Petro wakamiruka, akati kwavari, “Hama, munozia kuti kubvira mazuva okutanga Mwari wakatsanangura pakati penyu, kuti kubudikidza ngomuromo wangu vemadzinza vazwe izwi revhangeri, vatende." 
Acts15:8 Mwari uwo unozia mwoyo wakaita chapupu ndivo, ngokuvapa Mweya Wakachena kudai ngezvaakaita kwetiri;" 
Acts15:9 naye aazi kuita mupauko pakati pedu navo, echichenesa mwoyo yavo ngokugonda." 
Acts15:10 Ndizvo zvino munoedza Mwari ngenyi, ngokuisa joka mumutsipa mwevadzidzi, revasikazi kukona kutwara madzibaba edu nokuti isusu?" 
Acts15:11 Asi tinotenda kuti tinozoponeswa ngenyasha dzaMambo Jesu kudai ndivo.” 
Acts15:12 Mbungano yeshe yakanyarara, nayo yakapurutana kunaBhanabhasi naPhauri vechivaronzera ngezvioniso nemishamiso zvaakaita Mwari kubudikidza ndivo pakati pevemadzinza." 
Acts15:13 Naapo vapedza kuereketa, Jakobe wakapingura echiti, “Hama, vakoma, mwechindizwai." 
Acts15:14 Simeoni wadudzira njira yaakatanga ndiyo Mwari kuhambira vemadzinza, kuti atore kubva kwaari vanhu vezina rake." 
Acts15:15 Nemazwi evaprofeti anotenderana neizvi, kudai ngezvakanyorwa," 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Ngesure kweizvi ndinozopetuka, ndinozoakisazve ugaro hwaDhavhidha hwakaputsika, neni ndinozoakisazve matongo ahwo, ndinozohuemesa," 
Acts15:17 kuti vakasara veavo vanhu vatsvake Mambo Mwari, nevemadzinza veshe, avo vanodaidzwa ngezina rangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari uwo wakaita izvi zveshe," 
Acts15:18 kuti zviziikanwe kubvira karetu.’ 
Acts15:19 “Ndizvo kugura kwangu inini ndinoti atisisiri kutambudza avo vemadzinza vanotenderukira kunaMwari," 
Acts15:20 asi ngativanyorere kuti vasasvipiswa ngokudya zvakadirwa miedzaniso, kuomba, vasadya zvinodzipwa nengazi." 
Acts15:21 Ngokuti kubvira kumibarirwana yekaretu, Mosi unavo kumadhorobha eshe vanochumaira ndiye, echidzidzwa mumhatso dzokudira Sabatha rimwe ngarimwe.”" 
Acts15:22 Naapo vapostori nevakuru vakatenderana pamwepo nechiara cheshe, kuti vatsanagure vanhu kubva pakati pavo kuti vavatume kuenda Antiokhi, pamwepo naPhauri naBhanabhasi. Vakatuma Judhasi unozwi Bharsabhasi naSirasi, avo vaiya vanhu vakuru pakati pehama," 
Acts15:23 vakanyora tsamba vechiti, “Hama, veshe vapostori nevakuru, kunehama dzemadzinza dzinogara muAntiokhi nomuSiria nevari muSirisia, tinomuchingamidza." 
Acts15:24 Takazwa kuti vanhu vamweni vakabva kwetiri vakamutambudza ngemazwi, vechipaukisa mweya yenyu, vetisikazi kutuma kuita izvo," 
Acts15:25 zvakaoneka kwetiri zvakanaka, apo taungana ngechisungo chimwe, kuti titsanangure vanhu nokuvatuma kwomuri pamwepo nevanodikanwa vedu, Bhanabhasi naPhauri," 
Acts15:26 vanhu avo vakaisa kupona kwavo mungozi ngendaa yezina raMambo wedu Jesu Kristu. 
Acts15:27 Ndizvo tatuma Judhasi naSirasi, ivo vanozomuronzera vemene zviro izvi ngomuromo." 
Acts15:28 Ngokuti zvakaoneka zvakanaka kuMweya Wakachena nokwetiri kuti tisamutwarisa mutwaro unorema kupinda izvo zviro zvinosisira: 
Acts15:29 kuti murekere kudya izvo zvinopirwa miedzaniso yokudira nengazi nezvinodzipwa nokuomba. Kudai mwechidzingwarira kubva kuneizvi pachenyu, zvinozonaka kwomuri. Chisarai zvakanaka.”" 
Acts15:30 Ndizvo vakatumwa kuti vaende, vakadzaka Antiokhi; naapo vaiya vaunganidza mbungano pamwepo, vakavapa tsamba." 
Acts15:31 Naapo vaidzidza, vakadakara ngemazwi okugwinyiswa." 
Acts15:32 Judhasi naSirasi vemene vaiya vaprofeti, vakaembedzera hama ngemazwi mazhinji nokuvagwinyisa." 
Acts15:33 Ngesure vagarapo kamukuwo, vakaendeswa ngehama ngokunyarara kuneavo vakavatuma. [" 
Acts15:34 Asi zvakanakira Sirasi kugarapo.] 
Acts15:35 Asi Phauri naBhanabhasi vakagara muAntiokhi, vechidzidzisa nokuchumaira izwi raMambo, nevamweniwo vazhinji." 
Acts15:36 Ngesure kwamazuva Phauri wakati kunaBhanabhasi, “Ngatihwirire zvino, tihambire hama mumadhorobha eshe etakachumaira izwi raMambo, tione kugara kwavanoita.”" 
Acts15:37 Asi Bhanabhasi waida kutora Johani, waizwi Marako, kuhamba navo." 
Acts15:38 Asi Phauri wakakarakadza kuti azvizi kunaka kutora uwo wakadzipaura kubva kwavari vari muPhamufiria, usikazi kuenda navo kumushando." 
Acts15:39 Vakaitirana hasha dzakashata, vakaparadzana umwe kubva kunoumweni, naBhanabhasi wakatora Marako kuenda naye, akahamba ngengarava kuenda Saipurasi." 
Acts15:40 Asi Phauri wakatsanangura Sirasi, akaenda, apirwa kunyasha yaMambo ngehama." 
Acts15:41 Naye wakahamba muSiria nomuSirisia, echigwinyisa zviara." 
Acts16:1 Naye wakagumawo Dhebhe neRistra, apo paiya nomudzidzi waizwi ndiThimothi, mukororo womudzimai waiya muJudha, waiya mutendi; asi baba ake vaiya muGiriki." 
Acts16:2 Iye waipupurirwa zvakanaka ngevatendi vaigara muRistra nomuIkonaiumu. 
Acts16:3 Phauri waida kuti aende naye; wakamutora, akamucheka ngendaa yevaJudha vaigara kundau idzo, ngokuti veshe vaizia kuti baba ake vaiya muGiriki." 
Acts16:4 Vachahamba mumadhorobha vakapa kwavari mipango iyo yakaemeswa ngevapostori nevakuru vaiya muJerusarema, kuti vaingwarire." 
Acts16:5 Ndizvo zviara zvakagwinyiswa mukugonda navo vakaangira kuwanda mazuva eshe. 
Acts16:6 Navo vakahamba ngepakati penyika idzi, Frigia neGaratia, vaiya varambidzwa ndiMweya Wakachena kuereketa izwi muAsia." 
Acts16:7 Naapo vaiya vaguma pakaringirana nomuMisia, vakaedza kuenda Bhithinia; asi Mweya waJesu auzi kuvatendera." 
Acts16:8 Ndizvo vapinda ngomuMisia, vakadzaka kuenda Troasi." 
Acts16:9 Nechioniso chakaoneka usiku kunaPhauri; munhu waibva Masedhonia wakaema, echimupota echiti, “Ambukai Masedhonia, mutidetsere.”" 
Acts16:10 Naapo aona chioniso, paripo takaedza kuenda Masedhonia, techigura kuti Mwari wakatidaidza kuti tichumaire vhangeri kwavari." 
Acts16:11 Ndizvo tichabva Troasi, takaruramisa kuhamba ngengarava kuenda Samotresi, ngezuva raiteera, takaenda Neaporisi." 
Acts16:12 Kubvapo takaenda muFiripi, iro riri dhorobha renharaunda yokutanga yeMasedhonia, raitongwa ngevaRoma. Nesu takagara mudhorobha iro mazuva amweni." 
Acts16:13 Ngezuva reSabatha takabuda kuenda kubanze kwomusiwo waiya pamhiri porwizi, apo petaipinimidza kuti pandau yokukumbirirapo; takagara pashi tikaereketa kumadzimai vaiya vaunganapo." 
Acts16:14 Nomudzimai umwe wakatizwa, zina rake raizwi Ridhia, mutengesi wemachira akatsvukuruka, wedhorobha reThiatira, uwo waidira Mwari. Mambo wakabeura mwoyo wake kuti apurutane izvo zvakaereketwa ndiPhauri." 
Acts16:15 Naapo abhabhatidzwa nevemhatso yake, wakatipota echiti, “Kudai mwandierenga kuti ndiri unogondeka kunaMambo, uyai mupotere mumhatso mwangu, mugaremwo.” Naye wakatinyengerera." 
Acts16:16 Naapo, tichaenda kundau yokukumbira, takashongana nomusikana, waiya hloko anomweya wokufembera, waiunza mare yakawanda kune madzimambo ake ngokufembera." 
Acts16:17 Wakateera Phauri nesu, echidaidzira echiti, “Ava vanhu varanda vaMwari Uripadera pazveshe, avo vanoteketesa kwomuri njira yoruponeso.”" 
Acts16:18 Wakaita izvi mazuva mazhinji. Asi Phauri, echitambudzwa kakurutu, wakakunukuka, akati kunomweya uwo, “Ndinokupanga ngezina raJesu Kristu kuti ubude kubva mwaari.” Nawo wakabuda ngeawa iro." 
Acts16:19 Asi apo madzimambo ake azia kuti magondero avo okuona mare apera, vakabata Phauri naSirasi, vakavakweya kuenda navo pandau yomusika pamberi pevatongi." 
Acts16:20 Naapo vavaunza pavatongi vakuru, vakati, “Ava vanhu vaJudha vanoshaishira dhorobha redu." 
Acts16:21 Vanodzidzisa tsika dzisikatenderwi ngemipango yedu kuashira nokuti kungwarira, isusu vaRoma.”" 
Acts16:22 Mbungano yakavarwisa; nevatongi vakuru vakavabaurira zvokufuka zvavo, nokupanga kuti vashwapurwe ngemishwapo." 
Acts16:23 Naapo vaiya vavashwapura yaamho, vakavakonyera mutirongo, vechikohomedzisa mungwariri wemabhanditi kuti anase kuvangwarira yaamho." 
Acts16:24 Iye akohomedziswa kudaro, wakavakonyera mutirongo yomukati, wakasunga tsoka dzavo ngemanguri." 
Acts16:25 Kwaakuita pakati pousiku Phauri naSirasi vaikumbira nokuemba kukudza Mwari, nemabhanditi aivapurutana." 
Acts16:26 Paripo kuzungunyika kukurutu kwenyika kwakaitika, ngokudaro madzeyo emhatso yetirongo akakutukutuswa; paripo misiwo yeshe yakabeurwa nezvisungo zvomunhu weshe zvakasunhurwa." 
Acts16:27 Naapo mungwariri wamabhanditi amuka muhope echiona misiwo yetirongo yabeuka, wakashwamura shoti yake echida kudziuraya pachake, echipinimidza kuti mabhanditi aiya atiza." 
Acts16:28 Asi Phauri wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru kuti, “Usadzikuwadza, ngokuti teshe tiri muno.”" 
Acts16:29 Naye wakakumbira zvivheneko, wakapoteramwo echirumba, echihuta ngokutya. Wakawira pamberi paPhauri naSirasi." 
Acts16:30 Wakavabudisa kubanze, akati, “Madzimambo, kunosisira kuti ndiitenyi kuti ndiponeswe?”" 
Acts16:31 Navo vakati, “Tenda Mambo Jesu, newe unozoponeswa, iwewe nevemhatso yako.”" 
Acts16:32 Navo vakachumaira kwaari izwi raMambo nokwavari veshe vaiya mumhatso mwake. 
Acts16:33 Wakavatora ngeawa iro rousiku, akashamba zvironda zvavo. Wakabhabhatidzwa paripo nemhuri yake yeshe." 
Acts16:34 Naapo wakavapotedza mumhatso mwake, akaisa zvokudya pamberi pavo; akadakara kakurutu nevemhatso yake yeshe, ngokuti waiya atenda Mwari." 
Acts16:35 Asi apo kwaedza, vatongi vakatuma mapurisa vechiti, “Sunhurai avo vanhu vaende.”" 
Acts16:36 Nomungwariri wemabhanditi wakaronza aya mazwi kunaPhauri echiti, “Vatongi vatumira izwi rokuti musunhurwe muende; ndizvo zvino budai, muende ngokunyarara.”" 
Acts16:37 Asi Phauri wakati kwavari, “Vakatishwapura pamberi pevanhu veshe, tiri vasikazi kutongwa ndaa, tiri vanhu vaRoma, navo vakatikonyera mutirongo; zvino votibudisa ngokufishika here? Haiwa! Asi ngavauye vemene vatibudise.”" 
Acts16:38 Mapurisa akaronza aya mazwi kuvatongi, navo vakatya apo vazwa kuti vaiya vaRoma;" 
Acts16:39 ndizvo vakauya, vakavapota kuti vavakungurire. Naapo vavabudisa kubanze, vakakumbira kwavari kuti vabve mudhorobha." 
Acts16:40 Ndizvo vakabuda mutirongo, vakapotera mumhatso yaRidhia; naapo vaona hama, vakavagwinyisa, vakaenda." 
Acts17:1 Zvino vahamba ngemuAmufiporisi nomuAporonia, vakaguma Thesaronika, apo paiya nemhatso yokudira yevaJudha." 
Acts17:2 NaPhauri wakapoteramwo, kudai ngomuitiro wake, mumaSabatha matatu wakaphikisana navo ngezvinyorwa" 
Acts17:3 echidudzira nokugwinyisisa kuti kwaisisira kuti Kristu atambudzwe nokumuka kubva kwevakafa echiti, “Uyu Jesu wendinochumaira kwomuri, ndiye Kristu.”" 
Acts17:4 Nevamweni vavo vakaongwa, vakaiyana naPhauri naSirasi, nembungano huru yevaGiriki vaidira nevazhinji vemadzimai airemeredzeka." 
Acts17:5 Asi vaJudha vaiya nendurumwa, vakatora vanhu vakashata vapepesheki, vakaunganidza mbungano, vakaita bope mudhorobha; vakarwisa mhatso yaJasoni, vakaedza kuvabudisa kunevanhu." 
Acts17:6 Naapo vasikavaoni, vakakweya Jasoni nehama dzimweni nokuvaunza pamberi pevatongi vedhorobha, vechidaidzira vechiti, “Ava vanounza madambudziko munyika, vatogumawo muno." 
Acts17:7 Jasoni ndiye wakavaashira, navo veshe vanoita zvinorwisana nezviemeso zvaSiza, vechironza kuti uripo mambo umweni, Jesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Vanhu nevatongi vedhorobha vakakaruka apo vazwa izvi. 
Acts17:9 Naapo vaiya vatora chibatiso kubva kunaJasoni nokunevamweni, vakavatendera kuti vaende." 
Acts17:10 Paripo vatendi vakatuma Phauri naSirasi usiku kuti vaende Bheria; naapo vagumayo vakapotera mumhatso yokudira yevaJudha. 
Acts17:11 Zvino vaJudha ava vaiya vakarurama kupinda veThesaronika ngokuti vakaashira izwi ngomwoyo weshe, vechitsvakisisa zvinyorwa mazuva eshe kuti vaone kuti izvi zvakadaro here." 
Acts17:12 Ndizvo vazhinji vavo vakatenda, nemadzimai vairemeredzeka vevaGiriki nevamuna vazhinji." 
Acts17:13 Asi apo vaJudha veTesoronika vazia kuti izwi raMwari rakachumairwawo ndiPhauri muBheria, vakagumapowo vechiita bope nokutambudza mbungano." 
Acts17:14 Paripo vatendi vakatumira Phauri kuti aende kuruandhle, asi Sirasi naThimothi vakasaramwo." 
Acts17:15 Asi avo vakaperekedza Phauri vakamugumisa Atenesi; naapo vakapangwa kuti varonzere Sirasi naThimothi kuti vauye kwaari ngokukasira, vakaenda." 
Acts17:16 Zvino Phauri achavagarira muAtenesi, mweya wake wakatambudzika yaamho, echiona dhorobha rakazara ngemiedzaniso yokudira." 
Acts17:17 Ndizvo wakaphikisana mumhatso yokudira navaJudha nevanhu vaidira, nomundau yomusika mazuva eshe wakapangana naavo vakashongana nayepo." 
Acts17:18 Nevamweni vakangwara vevaEpikurio nevaStoiki, vaida ungwaru, vakashongana naye. Vamweni vakati, “Uyu muereketi wezvisina shwiro unotinyi?” Vamweni vakati, “Wakadai ngomuchumairi wezvimwari zvipara.” Ngokuti iye wakachumaira kwavari ndiJesu nokumuka kwevakafa." 
Acts17:19 Navo vakamubata, vakamuunza pamberi paAreopagusi vechiti, “Tingazia here kuti uku kudzidzisa kutsva kunoereketwa ndiwe kunoronzenyi?" 
Acts17:20 Ngokuti unoronza zviro zvisikazwiki kunzee dzedu. Ndizvo tinoda kuzia kuti izvi zvinoronzenyi.” 
Acts17:21 Zvino veshe veAtenesi nevapara vaigaramwo avazi kupedzera mukuwo wavo kuzviro zvimweni, asi kwega kuronza nokuti kuzwa chiro chitsva." 
Acts17:22 Ndizvo Phauri wakaema pakati paAreopagusi, wakati, “Imwimwi vamuna veAtenesi, pazviro zveshe ndinoona kuti munodira yaamho." 
Acts17:23 Ngokuti ndechipinda, ndakaringira zviro zvomunodira, ndakaonazve arita rine izvi zvinyorwa, ‘KUNA MWARI USIKAZIIKANWI.’ Ndizvo uwo womunodira musikamuzii, uyu ndiye wendinochumaira kwomuri inini." 
Acts17:24 Mwari uwo wakasika nyika nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwayo, ndiye Mambo womudenga nomunyika, aagari mumatemperi akaakwa ngenyara dzevanhu," 
Acts17:25 zve aashandirwi ngenyara dzevanhu, kudai ngounotama chiro, ndiye unopa veshe kupona nokufema nezviro zveshe." 
Acts17:26 Wakaita madzinza eshe evanhu kubva pamunhu umwe, kuti vagare padera penyika peshe, wakaemesera nguva dzavo nemigano yokugara kwavo," 
Acts17:27 kuti vatsvake Mwari, kuti pamweni ngokugonda vaambamire, vamuone, kunyazwi asiri kuretu akadi kubva pana umwe ngaumwe wedu." 
Acts17:28 ‘Ngokuti kwaari tinopona nokuhamba, tine unhu hwedu;’ kudai ngezvevakaereketazve vamweni vevanyori venyu venduyo vechiti, ‘Ngokuti isusu tiri mibarirwana yake.’" 
Acts17:29 Ndizvo ngokuti tiri mibarirwana yaMwari, atisisiri kuti tipinimidze kuti uMwari hwakada kudai ngomukore nokuti sirivha nokuti buwe rakatsetswa ngengwazi ngemazano omunhu." 
Acts17:30 Ngegwinyiso ngemikuwo yokusikazia kwomunhu Mwari aazi kuringisisa; asi zvino unopangisisa vanhu veshe kundau dzeshe, kuti vatenderuke;" 
Acts17:31 ngokuti wakaemesa zuva raanozotonga ndiro nyika ngokururama ngouwo munhu waakagadza; ngouwo waakagwinyisa kuvanhu veshe ngokumumusa kubva kwevakafa.” 
Acts17:32 Naapo vazwa ngokumuka kubva kwevakafa, vamweni vakaita jee; asi vamweni vakati, “Tinozokuzwazve ngeiyi ndaa.”" 
Acts17:33 Ngokudaro Phauri wakabuda kubva pakati pavo. 
Acts17:34 Asi vanhu vamweni vakanamatira kwaari, vakatenda. Pakati pavo paiya Dhionisiusi muAreopagusi nomudzimai waizwi Dhamarisi nevamweni navo." 
Acts18:1 Sure kweizvi Phauri wakabva Atenesi akaguma Khorinte. 
Acts18:2 Naye wakaona munhu muJudha waizwi Akwira, waiya munhu wePontusi ngokubarwa, waiya achandoguma echibva Itaria, pamwepo nomukadzi wake Prisira, ngokuti Kraudhiusi waiya apanga kuti vaJudha veshe vabve muRoma. Phauri wakaenda kwavari." 
Acts18:3 Ngokuti iye waiya nomushando wakatodzana newavo, wakagara navo, vakashanda pamwepo; ngokuti mushando wavo waiya wokuruka matende." 
Acts18:4 Naye wakaphikisana navo vomumhatso yokudira mazuva eshe eSabatha, echida kutenderudza veshe vaJudha nevaGiriki." 
Acts18:5 Asi apo Sirasi naThimothi vaiya vauya vechibva Masedhonia, Phauri akabatika ngeizwi, wakapupura kuvaJudha kuti Jesu ndiye Kristu." 
Acts18:6 Vakati vaphikisa nokumutuka, iye wakaguwa bukuta kubva pane zvokusimira zvake, akati kwavari, “Ngazi yenyu ngaigare padera pemasoro enyu! Andina ndaa inini. Kubvira zvino ndinozoenda kune vemadzinza.”" 
Acts18:7 Naye wakabvapo, akapotera mumhatso yomunhu waizwi Thitiusi Justusi, uwo waidira Mwari; mhatso yake yaiya pasinde pemhatso yokudira." 
Acts18:8 Krispusi, mukuru wemhatso yokudira, wakatenda Mambo nevemhatso yake yeshe; nevazhinji vevaKhorinte vakazwa Phauri, vakatenda, vakabhabhatidzwa." 
Acts18:9 Mambo wakati kunaPhauri muchioniso usiku, “Usatya, asi ereketa, usanyarara;" 
Acts18:10 ngokuti inini ndinewe, akuna munhu unozokumukira kukuremadza; ngokuti ndine vanhu vakawanda mudhorobha iri.”" 
Acts18:11 Naye wakagarapo gore nomwedzi mitanhatu, echidzidzisa izwi raMwari pakati pavo." 
Acts18:12 Asi apo Gario aita mutongi mukuru weAkhaiya, vaJudha vakamukira Phauri ngechisungo chimwe, vakamuunza pamberi pechigaro chokutonga" 
Acts18:13 vechiti, “Uyu munhu unopausa vanhu kuti vadire Mwari ngenjira inopesana neMipango.”" 
Acts18:14 Apo Phauri ooda kubeura muromo wake kuereketa, Gario wakati kuvaJudha, “Kudai yaiya ndaa yokushata nokuti yokumukira, imwimwi vaJudha, ndaisisira kuti ndisengerere kwomuri." 
Acts18:15 Asi kudai iri ndaa yemibvunzo yemazwi neyemazina neyemipango yenyu, dzionerei pachenyu imwimwi; andidi kuita mutongi wendaa dzakadaro.”" 
Acts18:16 Naye wakavadzinga kubva pachigaro chokutonga. 
Acts18:17 Navo veshe vakabata Sosithenesi, mukuru wemhatso yokudira, vakamurova pamberi pechigaro chokutonga. NaGario aazi kutambudzika ngechimwe cheizvi." 
Acts18:18 Naapo Phauri agarapo mazuva mazhinji, wakavhaisa vatendi, akahamba ngengarava kubva apo kuenda Siria, echiperekedzwa ndiPrisira naAkwira; muKhenikeria wakaparwa soro rake, ngokuti waiya akapika mhiko." 
Acts18:19 Naapo aguma paEfesu, wakavasiyapo; asi Phauri pachake wakapotera mumhatso yokudira, akaereketa nevaJudha." 
Acts18:20 Naapo vakakumbira kuti agare navo mukuwo wakapinda kureba, aazi kutenda;" 
Acts18:21 asi wakavavhaisa echiti, “Ndinozouyazve kwomuri, kudai Mwari echitenda,” wakahamba ngengarava kubva Efesu." 
Acts18:22 Naapo aguma Sizaria, wakakwira kuchingamidza chiara, wakadzaka kuenda Antiokhi." 
Acts18:23 Agarapo mukuwo, wakabveyo, akahamba nyika yeGaratia neFrigia ngokuteererana, echigwinyisa vadzidzi veshe." 
Acts18:24 Zvino muJudha waizwi Aporosi, muArekizandria ngokubarwa, waiya munhu waikona kuereketa zvakanaka, wakauya Efesu; naye waiya ngwazi muzvinyorwa." 
Acts18:25 Uyu waiya akadzidziswa njira yaMambo; echipisha mumweya, wakanasa kuereketa nokudzidzisa ngendaa yaJesu, kunyazwi waizia ngorubhabhatidzo rwaJohani rwega." 
Acts18:26 Wakatanga kuereketa ngokushinga mumhatso yokudira, asi apo Prisira naAkwira vamuzwa, vakamutora parutii, vakanasa kumududzira ngenjira yaMwari." 
Acts18:27 Naapo echida kupinda kuenda Akhaiya, vatendi vakamugwinyisa, vakanyora tsamba kunevadzidzi kuti vamuashire. Naapo aguma, wakadetsera kakurutu avo vakatenda kubudikidza ngenyasha." 
Acts18:28 Ngokuti wakanasa kunyisa vaJudha pamhene, echionisa ngezvakanyorwa kuti Jesu ndiye Kristu." 
Acts19:1 Naapo Aporosi ari muKhorinte, Phauri apedza kuhambira nyika dzedera wakaguma Efesu, akaona vadzidzi vamweni." 
Acts19:2 Naye wakati kwavari, “Mwakaashira Mweya Wakachena here apo pemwakatenda?” Navo vakati kwaari, “Haiwa, atizi nokutongozwa kuti uripo Mweya Wakachena.”" 
Acts19:3 Naye wakati, “Mwakabhabhatidzwa ngorubhabhatidzo rwenyi?” Navo vakati, “Ngorubhabhatidzo rwaJohani.”" 
Acts19:4 Phauri wakati, “Johani wakabhabhatidza ngorubhabhatidzo rwokutenderuka, echironzera vanhu kuti vatende uwo waizouya sure kwake, kunoronza Jesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Naapo vazwa izvi, vakabhabhatidzwa ngezina raMambo Jesu." 
Acts19:6 Naapo Phauri aisa nyara dzake padera pavo, Mweya Wakachena wakauya padera pavo; navo vakaereketa ngendimi nokuprofeta." 
Acts19:7 Veshe pamwepo vaida kukwana kuita vanhu gumi navairi. 
Acts19:8 Naye wakapotera mumhatso yokudira, akaereketa ngokushinga kwemwedzi mitatu, echiphikisana navo echivanyengerera ngendaa yezvoumambo hwaMwari." 
Acts19:9 Naapo vamweni vakaomesa mwoyo nokuramba kutenda, vechiereketa zvakashata ngeiyo Njira pamberi pevanhu vazhinji, wakabva kwavari, akaenda pamwepo nevadzidzi, echipangana navo zuva ngezuva muchikora chaTiranusi." 
Acts19:10 Izvi zvakaangira kuitwa makore mairi, ngokudaro avo veshe vaigara muAsia vakazwa izwi raMambo, veshe vaJudha nevaGiriki." 
Acts19:11 Mwari wakaita mishamiso isina kumboitika ngenyara dzaPhauri," 
Acts19:12 ngokudaro kwakatorwa kubva pamuiri pake madhuku nokuti machira, kuenda nazvo kunevairwara, nenhenda dzevaiya nadzo dzakabva kwavari, nomweya yakashata yakabuda kubva mwavari." 
Acts19:13 Asi vamweni vevaJudha, n'anga vaihamba vechidzinga mweya yakashata, vakaedza kudaidza zina raMambo Jesu padera peavo vaiya nomweya yakashata vechiti, “Ndinokupanga ndiJesu uwo unochumairwa ndiPhauri.”" 
Acts19:14 Vaiyapo vakororo vanomwe vomupristi mukuru wevaJudha waizwi Sikevha, avo vaiita izvi." 
Acts19:15 Asi mweya wakashata wakapingura, ukati kwavari, “Jesu ndinomuzia naPhauri ndinomuzia; asi imwimwi muri anani?”" 
Acts19:16 Naapo munhu waiya nomweya wakashata wakavanyandukira, akavanyisa veshe, ngokudaro vakatiza kubva mumhatsomwo vari mititinini, vakaremadzwa." 
Acts19:17 Neizvi zvakaziikanwa ndivo veshe vaJudha nevaGiriki vaigara muEfesu, nokutyisa kwakagumira veshe. Nezina raMambo Jesu rakakudzwa." 
Acts19:18 Vazhinji veavo vakatenda, vakauya vechireurira nokuonisa zviito zvavo." 
Acts19:19 Nevazhinji veavo vaishandisa zvokukamba vakaunza tsamba dzavo pamwepo, vakadzipisha mukuona kwavo veshe. Navo vakaerenga mutengo wadzo, vakaona kuti waiya mazana makumi mashanu ezvigurwa zvesirivha." 
Acts19:20 Ngenjira iyi izwi raMambo rakakura ngesimba, rakanyisa." 
Acts19:21 Zvino ngesure kweizvi, Phauri wakaemesa mumweya kuhamba ngemuMasedhonia nomuAkhaiya, echienda Jerusarema, echiti, “Ndagumayo, ndinosisirazve kuti ndione Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Naapo atuma vairi veavo vaimudetsera kuti vaende Masedhonia, Thimothi naErastusi, iye emene wakagara mukuwo mudoko muAsia." 
Acts19:23 Ngouwo mukuwo kwaitwa bope gurutu ngendaa yeiyo Njira. 
Acts19:24 Ngokuti munhu umweni waizwi Dhemetriusi, mupfuri wesirivha, waipfura miedzaniso yesirivha yechimwarikadzi Artemisi, wakapfumisa vapfuri ngemare yakawanda." 
Acts19:25 Wakavaunganidza pamwepo vashandi vomushando umwewo, akati, “Vamuna, munozia kuti ngouyu mushando tinopfumiswa." 
Acts19:26 Nemwi munoona nokuzwa kuti uyu Phauri wakanyengerera nokutenderudza vanhu vazhinji, haiwa muEfesu mwega, asi munyika yeshe yeAsia echiti, ‘Akuna zvimwari zvakaitwa ngenyara.’" 
Acts19:27 Nengozi iripo andiyopi yega yokuti mushando wedu uyu ungashoorwa; asiwo kuti temperi rechimwarikadzi chikuru Artemisi rinozoerengwa kuti arina shwiro, nokuti ukuru hwake huparadzwe, uwo unodirwa ndivo veshe muAsia nomunyika dzeshe.”" 
Acts19:28 Apo vazwa izvi vakazara ngoushungu, vakadaidzira vechiti, “Mukuru Artemisi wevaEfesu!”" 
Acts19:29 Dhorobha rakazara ngehohoho; vakarumba ngechisungo chimwe kupotera mundau yokutambira, vechikweya Gaiusi naAristakhusi, vanhu veMasedhonia, avo vaiperekedza Phauri murwendo rwake." 
Acts19:30 Phauri wakada kupotera kunevanhu avo, asi vadzidzi avazi kumutendera." 
Acts19:31 Vamweni venduna dzeAsia vaiya shamwari dzake, vakatuma kwaari, vakamupota kuti arekere kupotera mundau yokutambira." 
Acts19:32 Ndizvo vamweni vakadaidzira chiro chimwe, nevamweni chimweni; ngokuti mbungano yakakangaidzwa, uzhinji hwavo avazi kuzia chevakaunganira." 
Acts19:33 Navo vakabudisa pamberi Arekizanda kubva pakati pechiunga, vaJudha vechimusukumidzira mberi. NaArekizanda wakakopera ngenyara, echida kudzirwira kunevanhu." 
Acts19:34 Asi apo vazia kuti muJudha, veshe ngeizwi rimwe vakadaidzira kwomukuwo waida kuita maawa mairi vechiti, “Mukuru Artemisi wevaEfesu!”" 
Acts19:35 Naapo munyori wedhorobha anyaradza chiunga, wakati, “Imwimwi vamuna veEfesu, ndiani munhu usikazii kuti dhorobha reEfesu mungwariri wetemperi reArtemisi mukuru nomuedzaniso wakawa kubva mudenga?" 
Acts19:36 Ndizvo kwechioneka kuti izvi zviro azvingarambiki, kunosisira kuti munyarare, musikaiti ngechara." 
Acts19:37 Ngokuti imwimwi mwaunza panapa ava vanhu, vasiri madzongoni ematemperi nokuti vatuki vechimwarikadzi chedu." 
Acts19:38 Ndizvo kuti Dhemetriusi nevapfuri vanaye vane ndaa kunomunhu kunyazwi ngouri, mazuva okutonga ndaa aripo, nevatongi varipo; ngavamangarirane umwe noumweni." 
Acts19:39 Asi kuti mwechitsvaka chiro chimweni, chinozogurwa ngomushongano wakaemeswa." 
Acts19:40 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso tine ngozi yokuitirwa ndaa, ngendaa yebope raitwa nyamashi, apana chizato chetingapa kupembedza bope iri.”" 
Acts19:41 Naapo aereketa kudaro, wakaparadza mushongano." 
Acts20:1 Bope rakati ranyarara, Phauri wakadaidza vadzidzi, wakavagwinyisa, akavavhaisa, wakabvapo akaenda Masedhonia." 
Acts20:2 Naapo ahamba ngemundau idzo, echivagwinyisa ngemazwi mazhinji, wakaguma Girisi." 
Acts20:3 Wakapedzamwo mwedzi mitatu. VaJudha vakapangana kumurwisa, apo echirongedza kuhamba ngengarava kuenda Siria, wakadziemesera kuhwirira echihamba ngemuMasedhonia." 
Acts20:4 Wakaperekedzwa kuguma Asia ndiSopata, mukororo waPhirusi weBheria, naAristakusi naSekundusi veThesaronika, Gaiusi weDhebhe, Thimothi, Thichikusi naTrofimusi veAsia." 
Acts20:5 Ava vakatungamira mberi, vakatigarira muTroasi;" 
Acts20:6 asi isusu takahamba ngengarava kubva Firipi ngesure kwemazuva eChingwa chisina Mumera, takaguma kwavari muTroasi ngesure kwemazuva mashanu; takagarapo mazuva manomwe." 
Acts20:7 Nangezuva rokutanga revhiki, apo taungana kugura chingwa, Phauri wakaereketa kwavari; echida kubvapo nechimangwani, wakaangira kuereketa kwake metsa pakati pousiku." 
Acts20:8 Zvaiyapo zvibani zvakawanda mukamera romuturikwa umwo mwetakaungana. 
Acts20:9 Jaha, raizwi Utikusi, raiya rakagara pachiwindo, rakabatwa ngehope dzemadzikirira apo Phauri acharebesa kuereketa kwake; iro rechinyiswa ngehope dzaro, rakawa kubva kumuturikwa wechitatu, navo vakarimirudza rafa." 
Acts20:10 Asi Phauri wakadzaka, akakotama padera pake, akamufungatira, akati, “Musatambudzika, ngokuti uchapona.”" 
Acts20:11 Naapo akwira mumuturikwa, wakagura chingwa, akadya, wakaangira kuereketa navo mukuwo wakareba, metsa kwakaedza; ngokudaro wakabvapo." 
Acts20:12 Navo vakaunza jaha rechizwa, vakaembedzerwa kakurutu." 
Acts20:13 Asi isusu, takatanga kuenda kungarava, takahamba ngengarava kuenda Asosi, apo techikarira kutorapo Phauri; ngokuti ndiye waiya aronga kudaro, echida pachake kuhamba ngetsoka." 
Acts20:14 Naapo ashongana nesu muAsosi, takamukwidza mungarava, tikaenda Mitureni." 
Acts20:15 Techihamba kubvapo ngezuva raiteera, takaguma kundau yakaringirana neKhiosi. Ngezuva raiteera takaguma Samosi; ngezuva raiteera, takaguma Miretusi." 
Acts20:16 Ngokuti Phauri wakadziemesera kuhamba ngengarava kudarika Efesu, kuti asazopedza mukuwo muAsia; ngokuti waikasira, kuti kudai echikona ungaguma Jerusarema ngezuva rePentekosti." 
Acts20:17 Ari muMiretusi wakatumira izwi Efesu, kuti vauye kwaari vakuru vechiara." 
Acts20:18 Naapo vaguma kwaari, wakati kwavari, “Imwimwi mwemene munozia kugara kwangu pakati penyu nguva dzeshe kubvira ngezuva rokutanga rendakatsika tsoka muAsia," 
Acts20:19 ndechishandira Mambo ngokupfaa kweshe kwomupinimidzo nemasodzi, nokuedzwa ukwo kwakandigumira kubudikidza ngokurwiswa ngevaJudha." 
Acts20:20 Andizi kutya kuita kwomuri chiro chinomudetsera, ndechichumaira izwi kwomuri nokumudzidzisa pamhene, kubva kumhatso kuenda kumhatso," 
Acts20:21 ndechivapanga kakurutu veshe vaJudha navaGiriki ngendaa yokutenderuka kunaMwari nokugonda kunaMambo wedu Jesu. 
Acts20:22 Zvino, ringira, ndinoenda Jerusarema, ndakasungwa muMweya, ndisikazii izvo zvinozondigumira apo;" 
Acts20:23 asi kuti Mweya Wakachena unondipupurira mumadhorobha eshe kuti kusungwa nokutambudzwa kunondigarira. 
Acts20:24 Asi andierengi kupona kwangu kuita chiro chinodikanwa kwendiri, kuti ndipedze bingo rangu, nomushando wendakaashira kubva kunaMambo Jesu kuchumaira vhangeri renyasha dzaMwari." 
Acts20:25 “Zvino, ringirai, inini ndinozia kuti imwimwi mweshe mwendakahambira pakati penyu ndechichumaira umambo, amuchazoonizve hope yangu." 
Acts20:26 Ndizvo ndinopupura kwomuri ngeiri zuva kuti ndakachena kune ngazi yenyu yeshe," 
Acts20:27 ngokuti andizi kuumira kumuronzera kupanga kweshe kwaMwari. 
Acts20:28 Dzingwarirenyi imwimwi pachenyu nedanga reshe remwakaemeswa padera paro ndiMweya Wakachena, kuti muite vangwariri varo, muushe chiara chaMwari, chaakatenga ngengazi yoMukororo wake emene." 
Acts20:29 Ndinozia kuti ngesure kwokuenda kwangu, mathika anokara anozopotera pakati penyu, asina nyasha kudanga." 
Acts20:30 Vamweni vanobva pakati penyu pemene vanozobuda vanhu, vechiereketa manyepo kupausa vadzidzi kuti vavateere." 
Acts20:31 Ndizvo rindai, mwechikarakadza kuti ngomukuwo wemakore matatu andizi kurekera kupanga mweshe umwe ngaumwe wenyu usiku nemasikati, ndechichema masodzi." 
Acts20:32 Nazvino ndinomupira kunaMwari nokuizwi renyasha dzake, iro rine simba rokumuaka nokumupa nhaka pakati pavo veshe vakacheneswa." 
Acts20:33 Andizi kuemura sirivha nokuti mukore nokuti zvokufuka zvomunhu. 
Acts20:34 Imwimwi mwemwene munozia kuti idzi nyara dzakashandira izvo zvendaitama, nezveavo vaiya neni." 
Acts20:35 Ngezviro zveshe ndakamupa chionero, kuti ngokushanda kudaro tinosisira kuti tidetsere avo vasina simba, nokukarakadza mazwi aMambo Jesu, kudai ngezvaakaronza emene echiti, ‘Kunopinda kudakadza kupa kunokuashira.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Naapo aereketa kudaro wakagwadama pashi, akakumbira navo veshe." 
Acts20:37 Navo veshe vakachema masodzi, vakamumbundira Phauri, vakamuvhaisa ngomuromo," 
Acts20:38 vechitambudzika kakurutu ngeizwi raakaereketa, kuti avachazomboonizve hope yake. Vakamuperekedza kuenda kungarava." 
Acts21:1 Naapo taparadzana navo, takahamba ngengarava tikarurama kuenda Khosi, ngezuva raiteera takaguma Rodhesi nokubvapo takaguma Patara." 
Acts21:2 Taona ngarava yaiambuka kuenda Foenisia, takapoteramwo, takahamba." 
Acts21:3 Naapo taona Saipurasi, takarisiya ngokumuoshwe, takahamba kuenda Siria, tikaguma Thire; ngokuti apo ngarava yaibudiswa mitwaro yayo." 
Acts21:4 Techiona vadzidzi, takagarapo mazuva manomwe. Kubudikidza ndiMweya Wakachena vakaronzera Phauri kuti asakwira Jerusarema." 
Acts21:5 Naapo tapedzapo mazuva edu, takabvapo, tikaenda rwendo rwedu; navo veshe pamwepo nevakadzi vavo nevana vakatiperekedza metsa takabuda mudhorobha; tikagwadama pahumbikumbi yoruandhle, takakumbira." 
Acts21:6 Naapo takavhaisana, takapotera mungarava, navo vakahwirira kanyi." 
Acts21:7 Naapo tapedza rwendo kubva Thire, takaguma Putoremaisi; nesu takachingamidza vatendi, takagara navo zuva rimwe." 
Acts21:8 Nechimangwani takabvapo, takaguma Sizaria: takapotera mumhatso yaFiripu muvhangeri, uwo waiya umwe wevanomwe, takagara naye." 
Acts21:9 Waiya nevasikana varongomuna, mhandara, avo vaiprofeta." 
Acts21:10 Naapo tichagarapo mazuva mazhinji, kwakadzaka muprofeti waibva Judhia, waizwi Agabhusi."
