Acts21:11 Echiuya kwetiri, wakatora bhande raPhauri, wakadzisunga tsoka dzake nenyara, akati, “Unoronza izvi Mweya Wakachena, ‘Ngokudaro vaJudha vari muJerusarema vanozosunga munewebhande iri, vanozomupira munyara dzevemadzinza.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Naapo tazwa izvi, teshe, isusu nevanhu veiyo ndau, taimupota kuti asakwira Jerusarema." 
Acts21:13 Zvino Phauri wakapingura, akati, “Munoitenyi mwechichema nokutambudza mwoyo wangu? Ngokuti inini ndakanasirira haiwa kusungwa kwega, asi nokufira zina raMambo Jesu muJerusarema.”" 
Acts21:14 Naapo asikazi kutenda kupotwa, takanyarara techiti, “Kuda kwaMambo ngakuitike.”" 
Acts21:15 Mazuva aya apera, takatora nhumbi dzedu, takakwira Jerusarema." 
Acts21:16 Vakahambawo nesu vamweni vevadzidzi vaibva Sizaria, vakauya kumhatso yomunhu unozwi Nasoni weSaipurasi, mudzidzi wokutanga, wetaizogara mumhatso mwake." 
Acts21:17 Naapo taguma Jerusarema, vatendi vakatiashira ngokudakara." 
Acts21:18 Ngezuva raiteera Phauri wakaenda nesu kunaJakobe; nevanhu vakuru veshe vaiyapo. 
Acts21:19 Naapo avachingamidza, wakaerengudza chimwe ngachimwe ngokuteererana kwazvo izvo zvaakaita Mwari pakati pevemadzinza ngokushanda kwake." 
Acts21:20 Naapo vazvizwa, vakakudza Mwari. Vakati kwaari “Unoona, hama, kuwanda kwemakumi emazana eavo vakatenda pakati pevaJudha; navo veshe vanotsamwirira muMipango." 
Acts21:21 Zvino vakaronzerwa kuti iwewe unodzidzisa vaJudha veshe vari pakati pevemadzinza kuti varambe zvaMosi, wechivaronzera kuti vasacheka vana vavo nokuti vasangwarira mishuma." 
Acts21:22 Zvino toitenyi? Ngegwinyiso vanozozwa kuti iwewe wauya. 
Acts21:23 Ndizvo ita izvi zvetinokuronzera. Tine vanhu varongomuna pano vakapika mhiko. 
Acts21:24 Tora vanhu ava udzichenese pachako navo, uvabhadharire zveshe zvavo, kuti vapare masoro avo. Ndizvo veshe vanozozia kuti apana gwinyiso pane izvo zveshe zvevakaronzerwa ngendaa yako, asi kuti iwewe wemene unonasa kuhamba, wechingwarira Mipango." 
Acts21:25 Asi ngendaa yeavo vemadzinza vakatenda, takanyora tsamba, techigura kuti vadzingwarire kubva pane zvinobairwa miedzaniso yokudira nengazi neizvo zvinodzipwa nokuomba.”" 
Acts21:26 Zvino Phauri wakatora vanhu avo, ngezuva raiteera akadzichenesa pachake, wakapotera muTemperi navo, echionisa pamhene kuzadzisika kwemazuva okucheneswa, metsa mudiro wakapirwa ngendaa yaumwe ngaumwe wavo." 
Acts21:27 Naapo mazuva manomwe ooda kupera, vaJudha vaibva Asia, avo vamuona ari muTemperi vakavherudza mbungano yeshe, vakamubata," 
Acts21:28 vechidaidzira, “Vanhu vaIsuraeri, detserai! Uyu ndiye munhu unodzidzisa vanhu veshe kundau dzeshe kurwisana navanhu neMipango neiyi ndau; ndiyezve wakaunza vaGiriki muTemperi, wakasvipisa iyi ndau yakachena.”" 
Acts21:29 Ngokuti vaiya vakaona Trofimusi muEfesu anaye mudhorobha, vakapinimidza kuti Phauri wakamuunza muTemperi." 
Acts21:30 Nedhorobha reshe rakavherudzwa, nevanhu vakarumba pamwepo. Navo vakabata Phauri, vakamukweyera kubanze kweTemperi; paripo misiwo yakakonywa." 
Acts21:31 Naapo vachatsvaka kumuuraya, izwi rakaguma kunduna huru yemakumi emazana, kuti Jerusarema reshe raiya nehohoho." 
Acts21:32 Paripo wakatora majoni nenduna dzemazana, akarumba kudzaka kwavari; naapo vaona nduna huru nemajoni, vakarekera kuponda Phauri." 
Acts21:33 Naapo nduna huru yakakwedzera, ikamubata, ikapanga kuti asungwe ngemaketani mairi; ikabvunza kuti ndiani nokuti waitenyi." 
Acts21:34 Vamweni pakati pembungano vakadaidzira chiro chimwe, vamweni chimweni; naapo yakorera kuzia gwinyiso ngendaa yehohoho, yakapanga kuti aunzwe kumhatso yevarwi vehondo." 
Acts21:35 Naapo aguma pamakwiro, wakatwarwa ngemajoni ngendaa yebope rembungano." 
Acts21:36 Ngokuti mbungano yakateera ngesure, yechidaidzira yechiti, “Muurayenyi!”" 
Acts21:37 Naapo vooda kuunza Phauri mumhatso yevarwi, wakati kunenduna huru, “Ndingatenderwa here kuereketa chiro kwouri?” Naye wakati kwaari, “Unozia chiGiriki here?" 
Acts21:38 Andiwepi muEgipite, uwo pamazuva apera wakavherudza vanhu kumukira, akaenda mushango nevaurayi mazana makumi marongomuna here?”" 
Acts21:39 Phauri wakati, “Inini ndiri muJudha, unobva Tarsusi reSirisia, wakabarwa mudhorobha guru rine mbiri; ndinokupota, nditendere ndierekete kuvanhu.”" 
Acts21:40 Naapo amutendera, Phauri echiema pamakwiro wakakopera vanhu ngenyara; naapo kwaiyapo kunyarara kukuru, iye wakaereketa kwavari ngendimi yechiHebheru echiti." 
Acts22:1 “Hama nemadzibaba, izwai zvino kudzirwira kwendinoita pamberi penyu.”" 
Acts22:2 Naapo vazwa kuti waiereketa kwavari ngendimi yechiHebheru, vakapinda kunyarara. Zvino wakati." 
Acts22:3 “Inini ndiri muJudha, ndakabarwa muTarsusi reSirisia, asi ndakakurira panapa mudhorobha iri, patsoka dzaGamarieri, ndakadzidziswa kudai ngomushuma wemipango yemadzibaba edu, ndechitsamwirira kunaMwari, kudai ngezvomunoita imwimwi mweshe nyamashi." 
Acts22:4 Neni ndakatambudza veiyi Njira metsa parufu, ndechivasunga nokuvakonyera mutirongo, veshe vamuna nevakadzi," 
Acts22:5 kudai ngezvaanondiitira chapupu mupristi mukuru navo veshe vakuru. Ndakaashira kubva kwavari tsamba dzokuenda kunevatendi, ndakaenda Dhamasekusi, kuti ndivaunzezve Jerusarema vakasungwa kuti vaororwe." 
Acts22:6 “Zvino ndakati ndechihamba rwendo rwangu, ndechikwedzera Dhamasekusi, ooda kuita masikati, paripo kujeka kukurutu kwakajeka kunditendenedza kwechibva mudenga." 
Acts22:7 Ndakawa pashi, ndikazwa izwi rechiti kwendiri, ‘Sauri, Sauri, unonditambudzirenyi?’" 
Acts22:8 Neni ndakapingura ndikati, ‘Ndimwi anani, Mambo?’ Naye wakati kwendiri, ‘Ndini Jesu weNazaretha, uwo wounotambudza.’" 
Acts22:9 Naavo vaiya neni vakaona kujeka, asi avazi kuzwa izwi rouwo waiereketa kwendiri." 
Acts22:10 Ndakati, ‘Ndinozoitenyi, Mambo?’ NaMambo wakati kwendiri, ‘Miruka, uende Dhamasekusi; naapo unozoronzerwa zveshe zvowakaemeserwa kuti uite.’" 
Acts22:11 Naapo ndisikakoni kuona ngendaa yokupenya kwokujeka ukwo, avo vaiya neni vakandibata ngenyara, vakanditungamirira, ndakaguma muDhamasekusi." 
Acts22:12 “Zvino munhu umweni waizwi Ananiasi, wakarurama kudai ngezvinodiwa ngeMipango, unembiri yakanaka mukati mwavaJudha veshe vaigara apo," 
Acts22:13 wakauya kwendiri; echiema pasinde pangu, wakati kwendiri, ‘Mukoma Sauri, chionazve.’ Ngeiro awa ndakaringira neni ndakamuona." 
Acts22:14 Naye wakati, ‘Mwari wemadzibaba edu wakakuemesa kuti uzie kuda kwake, kuona Uwo Wakarurama nokuzwa izwi rinobva pamuromo wake;" 
Acts22:15 ngokuti iwewe unozoita uchapupu ndiye kuvanhu veshe cheizvo zvewakaona nezvewakazwa. 
Acts22:16 Zvino uchagarirenyi? Miruka, ubhabhatidzwe, usukwe zvishaishi zvako, ukumbire ngezina rake.’" 
Acts22:17 “Naapo ndapetuka Jerusarema, ndechikumbira muTemperi, ndakabatwa ndimweya," 
Acts22:18 ndakaona Jesu echiti kwendiri, ‘Kasira, ubude kubva muJerusarema, ngokuti avazoashiri uchapupu hwako ndini.’" 
Acts22:19 Neni ndakati, ‘Mambo, ivo vemene vanozia kuti ndaivakonyera mutirongo nokuvaponda mumhatso dzeshe dzokudira, avo vakatenda mwemuri." 
Acts22:20 Naapo ngazi yaStefano chapupu chenyu yaparadzwa, ininiwo ndaiema pasinde, ndechitendera nokungwarira zvokufuka zveavo vakamuuraya.’" 
Acts22:21 Naye wakati kwendiri, ‘Enda, ngokuti inini ndinozokutuma kuenda kuretu kuvanhu vemadzinza.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Navo vakamupurutana metsa azoereketa izwi iri, vakadaidzira ngemazwi avo, vakati, “Bvisai munhu wakadaro panyika! Ngokuti aasisiri kuti apone.”" 
Acts22:23 Vachadaidzira nokukandira zvokufuka zvavo, vechikushira bukuta mudenga," 
Acts22:24 nduna huru yakapanga kuti apotedzwe mumhatso yevarwi, echironza kuti abvunzisiswe ngokushwapurwa, kuti vazie kuti indaa yenyi yevakadaidzira kudaro ndiye." 
Acts22:25 Asi apo vamusunga kuti ashwapurwe, Phauri wakati kunenduna yezana yaiema pasinde, “Kunotenderwa here kwomuri ngemipango kuti mushwapure munhu muRoma, asikazi kunyiswa ngendaa?”" 
Acts22:26 Naapo nduna yezana yazwa, yakaenda kunduna huru yemakumi emazana, yakamuronzera yechiti, “Unoda kuitenyi? Ngokuti uyu munhu muRoma.”" 
Acts22:27 Nduna huru yemakumi emazana yakauya, ikati kwaari, “Ndironzere, uri muRoma here?” Naye wakati, “Eya.”" 
Acts22:28 Nduna huru yemakumi emazana yakapingura, ikati, “Ndakatenga uRoma uhwu ngomutengo mukuru.” NaPhauri wakati, “Asi inini ndakabarwa ndakadaro.”" 
Acts22:29 Ndizvo vaida kumubvunzisa vakabva kwaari ngokukasira; nenduna huru yemakumi yakatya, apo yazia kuti waiya muRoma, ngokuti yaiya yamusunga." 
Acts22:30 Asi nechimangwani, echida kuzia gwinyiso reizvo zvaakaitirwa ndaa ngevaJudha, wakamusunhura, akapanga vapristi vakuru nevatongi veshe vevaJudha kuti vaungane, wakadzasa Phauri, akamuisa pamberi pavo." 
Acts23:1 Phauri echiringisisa vatongi vevaJudha wakati, “Hama, inini ndakapona ndisina ndaa mumwoyo pamberi paMwari metsa kuguma zuva iri.”" 
Acts23:2 Zvino mupristi mukuru Ananiasi wakapanga avo vaiema pasinde pake kumupamhadza pamuromo. 
Acts23:3 Naapo Phauri wakati kwaari, “Mwari unozokupamhadza, iwewe rukumbati rwakachena! Unogara kunditonga ngeMipango, nokupanga kuti ndipamhadzwe ngenjira inopesana neMipango here?”" 
Acts23:4 Naavo vaiema pasinde vakati, “Unotuka mupristi mukuru waMwari here?”" 
Acts23:5 NaPhauri wakati, “Andizi kuzia, hama, kuti ndiye mupristi mukuru; ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, ‘Usazoereketa zvakashata ngomutongi wevanhu vako.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Asi apo Phauri paakaona kuti rupande rwavo rumwe rwaiya vaSadhusi norumweni rwaiya vaFarisi, wakadaidzira mumbungano, “Hama, inini ndiri muFarisi, mukororo wevaFarisi; ngendaa yokugonda kwokumuka kubva kwevakafa inini ndinotongwa.”" 
Acts23:7 Naapo adaro, pakamuswa hasha pakati pevaFarisi nevaSadhusi; nembungano yakaguka ngepakati." 
Acts23:8 (Ngokuti vaSadhusi vanoti akuna kumuka kwevakafa nokuti akuna ngirosi nokuti mweya; asi vaFarisi vanotenda zveshe.) 
Acts23:9 Naapo kwakamuka bope guru; vamweni vevanyori vevaFarisi vakamiruka, vakaphikisa vechiti, “Ationi kushata kunouyu munhu. Pamweni mweya wakaereketa kwaari nokuti ngirosi?”" 
Acts23:10 Naapo kwamuka kuphikisana kukurutu, nduna huru yemakumi emazana, yechitya kuti Phauri unozobvajurwa ndivo kuita zvigurwa, yakapanga varwi kuti vadzake vamubvuke ngesimba kubva kwavari, vamuise mumhatso yevarwi." 
Acts23:11 Usiku hwaiteera Mambo wakaema pasinde pake, akati, “Shinga! Ngokuti kudai ngezvewakaita chapupu ndini muJerusarema, ngokudaro kunosisira kuti uite chapupu muRomawo.”" 
Acts23:12 Zvino kwaedza, vaJudha vakapangana, vakadzisunga ngemhiko yokuti avazodyi nokuti kumwa metsa vauraya Phauri." 
Acts23:13 Naavo vakapangana iri zano vaipinda makumi marongomuna kuwanda. 
Acts23:14 Navo vakauya kunevapristi vakuru nevakuru vechiti, “Tadzisunga ngemhiko hurutu kuti, atizorairi chiro metsa tauraya Phauri." 
Acts23:15 Ndizvo zvino imwimwi pamwepo nevatongi ronzerai nduna huru yemakumi emazana kuti amudzase kwomuri, muite kudai ngevanoda kunasa kutsvakisisa ndaa yake. Isusu tinonga tanasirira kumuuraya asati aguma pano.”" 
Acts23:16 Asi mukororo womukunda waPhauri wakazwa ngendaa yokumuhwarira kwavo, naye wakaenda, akapotera mumhatso yevarwi, akaronzera Phauri." 
Acts23:17 NaPhauri wakadaidza kwaari imwe yenduna dzezana, akati, “Enda neiri jaha kunduna huru yemakumi emazana, ngokuti rinacho chiro chokumuronzera.”" 
Acts23:18 Ndizvo yakaenda naro kunduna huru yemakumi emazana, yakati, “Phauri mubhanditi wakandidaidza kwaari, akakumbira kuti ndiunze iri jaha kwouri rinacho chokuronza kwouri.”" 
Acts23:19 Nduna huru yemakumi emazana yakaribata ngenyara, ikaenda naro, ikaribvunza ngokufishika yechiti “Chiinyi chounoda kundironzera?”" 
Acts23:20 Naro rakati, “VaJudha vatenderana kukukumbira kuti udzase Phauri mangwani kuvatongi vevaJudha, vechiita kudai ngevanoda kutsvakisisa chiro ndiye." 
Acts23:21 Ndizvo usazotenda kwavari; ngokuti vanozomuhwarira vanhu vanopinda makumi marongomuna, avo vadzisunga ngemhiko yokuti avazodyi nokuti kumwa metsa vamuuraya; zvino vanasirira, vechigarira chigondiso chinobva kwouri.”" 
Acts23:22 Ndizvo nduna huru yemakumi emazana yakatendera kuti jaha riende, echiripangisisa kuti, “Usazoronzera munhu kuti waziisa izvi kwendiri.”" 
Acts23:23 Zvino wakadaidza kwaari nduna mbiri dzezana, akati, “Nasirirai varwi mazana mairi, vanogadha mahachi makumi manomwe, vane mikhondo mazana mairi, okuenda Sizaria ngeawa rechitatu rousiku." 
Acts23:24 Munasire zvifuyo kuti mugadhise Phauri padera pazvo, mumugumise akangwaririka kunaFerikisi mutongi.”" 
Acts23:25 Naye wakanyora tsamba ngendaa iyi echiti. 
Acts23:26 “Kraudhiusi Rusiasi unomuchingamidza imwimwi mambo wakanasa kunaka Ferikisi. 
Acts23:27 Uyu munhu wakabatwa ngevaJudha, waiya ooda kuurawa ndivo, apo ndakaguma kwavari nevarwi vehondo, ndakamuponesa, ndaiya ndazwa kuti muRoma." 
Acts23:28 Ngokuti ndaida kuti ndizie ndaa yevakamuitira, ndamudzasa kuenda naye kuvatongi vavo vevaJudha." 
Acts23:29 Ndakaona kuti wakaitirwa ndaa yemibvunzo yemipango yavo, asi waiya asina ndaa yaakaitirwa inosisira kuti aurawe nokuti asungwe." 
Acts23:30 Naapo ndakaronzerwa inini kuti kunopanganwa zano rokuuraya uyu munhu, paripo ndakamutumira kwouri, ndechipangirazve avo vakamuitira ndaa kuti vaerekete kushaisha kwake pamberi pako.”" 
Acts23:31 Ndizvo varwi, kudai ngezvevakapangwa, vakatora Phauri, vakamuunza usiku Antipatirisi." 
Acts23:32 Asi ngechimangwani vakasiya vanogadha mahachi kuti vaende naye, vakahwirira kumhatso yevarwi." 
Acts23:33 Naavo vaguma Sizaria, vakapa tsamba kunomutongi, vakaunza Phauri pamberi pake." 
Acts23:34 Naapo aidzidza, wakabvunza kuti waiya wenyika iri. Naapo azia kuti waiya weSirisia," 
Acts23:35 wakati, “Ndinozozwa ndaa yako, apo vaguma avo vanokuitira ndaa.” Wakapanga kuti angwarirwe mungome mwaHerodhi." 
Acts24:1 Ngesure kwemazuva mashanu, Ananiasi mupristi mukuru wakadzaka pamwepo nevakuru vamweni, noumweni waiya muereketeri, waizwi Teturusi, navo vakaronzera mutongi vechiitira ndaa Phauri." 
Acts24:2 Naapo adaidzwa, Teturusi wakatanga kumuitira ndaa echiti, “Kubudikidza ndimwi tinodakara ngokunyarara kukurutu, zviro zvakashata zvinonasiriswa kuneiri dzinza ngenyasha dzenyu." 
Acts24:3 Tinozviashira ngenjira dzeshe nokundau dzeshe, Ferikisi wakanasa kunaka, techikubonga kakurutu." 
Acts24:4 Asi andichadi kumunonosa, ndinokupota kuti undizwe ngenyasha dzako mazwi mashomani." 
Acts24:5 Ngokuti takaona uyu munhu kuti wakashata yaamho, unomusa bope pakati pevaJudha veshe munyika dzeshe, nomutungamiriri wechikwata chevaNazaretha." 
Acts24:6 Wakaedza kusvipisa Temperi, asi takamubata. Takada kumutonga kudai ngemipango yedu." 
Acts24:7 Asi nduna huru yemakumi emazana Rusiasi wakauya, akamubvuka ngesimba guru kubva kunyara dzedu," 
Acts24:8 echipanga avo vanomuitira ndaa kuti vauye kwouri. Ngokumubvunzisisa wemene unozokona kuzia izvi zveshe zvetinomuitira ndaa ndizvo.” 
Acts24:9 NevaJudha vakapindirawo kumuitira ndaa, vechigwinyisa kuti izvi ndizvo." 
Acts24:10 Naapo mutongi akopera kwaari kuti aerekete, Phauri wakapingura, akati, “Inini ndinozia kuti iwewe wakaita mutongi wedzinza iri makore mazhinji, ndizvo ndinodakara ngokudzirwira pamberi pako." 
Acts24:11 Kudai ngezvoungakona kudzionera iwewe pachako, kuti aasati apinda mazuva gumi namairi kubvira panguva yendakakwira Jerusarema koodira." 
Acts24:12 Avazi kundiona muTemperi ndechiitirana hasha nomunhu nokuti ndechivherudza mbungano kuita bope, kunyazwi mumhatso dzokudira nokuti mudhorobha." 
Acts24:13 Avakoni zvinopano kuonisa kwouri gwinyiso reizvo zvevanondiitira ndaa ndizvo. 
Acts24:14 Asi izvi ndinotenda kwouri, kuti kudai ngeNjira yevanodudza kuti kupaukisa, ngokudaro inini ndinodira Mwari wemadzibaba edu, ndechitenda zveshe zviri zveMipango neizvo zvakanyorwa muvaprofeti." 
Acts24:15 Ndine gonda munaMwari, iro revanotendawo ava, kuti kunozoapo kumuka kwevakafa, kwevakarurama nokwevasikazi kururama." 
Acts24:16 Ngeiyi ndaa ndinoedza pachangu kugara ndino mwoyo usina ndaa kunaMwari nokunevanhu nguva dzeshe. 
Acts24:17 Zvino ngesure kwemakore akawanda, ndakauya koopa zvipo nezvokupira mudiro kunevedzinza rangu." 
Acts24:18 Mukuita izvi vakandiona ndakacheneswa muTemperi, pasina nembungano nokuti bope. Asi vaiyapo vaJudha vamweni vakabva Asia;" 
Acts24:19 avo vaisisira kuti vaapano pamberi pako nokundiitira ndaa, kudai vane ndaa kwendiri." 
Acts24:20 Nokuti ava vanhu vari pano ngavaronze kushata kwevakaona kwendiri, ngeiyo nguva yendakaema pamberi pevatongi," 
Acts24:21 ngokubanze kweizwi rimwe rega rendakadaidzira ndakaema pakati pavo ndechiti, ‘Indaa yokumuka kwevakafa, ndiyo ndaa yendinotongwa ndiyo nyamashi pamberi pako.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Asi Ferikisi, echizia kakurutu ngendaa yeNjira iyi, wakavaronzera kuti vaemere echiti, “Apo Rusiasi nduna huru yemakumi emazana adzaka uno, ndinozokwarisisa ndaa yenyu.”" 
Acts24:23 Naye wakapanga nduna yezana kuti iye angwarirwe akasunhurika, pasina hama yake inorambidzwa kumushandira." 
Acts24:24 Ngesure kwemazuva Ferikisi wakauya naDhrusira mukadzi wake, waiya muJudha, naye wakadaidza Phauri, akamuzwa echiereketa ngorutendo ruri munaKristu Jesu." 
Acts24:25 Naapo paaionisa ngokururama nokudzibata nokutongwa kunozouya, Ferikisi wakatyiswa, akati, “Enda hako zvinopano, naapo ndazoona mukuwo kwawo, ndinozokudaidzazve.”" 
Acts24:26 Iye waigonda kuti waizopuwa mare ndiPhauri. Ndizvo wakamudaidza mikuwo mizhinji echipangana naye. 
Acts24:27 Asi apo makore mairi apera, Phokiusi Festusi wakagara pandau yeFerikisi mutongi; naFerikisi echida kudiwa ngevaJudha, wakasiya Phauri mutirongo." 
Acts25:1 Ndizvo Festusi aguma munyikayo, ngesure kwemazuva matatu wakakwira Jerusarema, echibva Sizaria." 
Acts25:2 Apo vapristi vakuru nevakuru vevaJudha vakamuronzera ndaa yaPhauri, vakapota kwaari," 
Acts25:3 vechikumbira kuti avadakadzise ngokuita kuti Phauri atumirwe Jerusarema, kuti vazohwarira kumuuraya munjira." 
Acts25:4 Asi Festusi wakapingura akati Phauri wakangwarirwa muSizaria, ngokuti iye waida kukasira kuendayo." 
Acts25:5 Wakati, “Ndizvo ngavadzake neni avo vane simba pakati penyu, kudai iripo ndaa kunouwo munhu, ngavamumangarire.”" 
Acts25:6 Naapo agara pakati pavo mazuva asikapindi masere nokuti gumi, iye wakadzaka kuenda Sizaria; nechimangwani wakagara pachigaro chokutonga ndaa, akapanga kuti Phauri aunzwe." 
Acts25:7 Naapo auya, vaJudha avo vakadzaka vechibva Jerusarema vakaema vechimutendenedza, vechimuitira ndaa dzakawanda dzakashata, dzevasaikona kuonisa pamhene." 
Acts25:8 Naapo Phauri mukudzirwira kwake wakati, “Andizi kugura mipango yevaJudha nokuti yeTemperi nokuti kunaSiza.”" 
Acts25:9 Asi Festusi, echida kudiwa ngevaJudha, wakapingura Phauri, akati, “Unotenda here kukwira Jerusarema, utongwe ngeidzi ndaa pamberi pangu?”" 
Acts25:10 Asi Phauri wakati, “Ndinoema pachigaro chokutonga chaSiza, apo panosisira kuti nditongwe. Andizi kuita chiro chakashata kuvaJudha, kudai ngezvounonasa kuzia iwewe." 
Acts25:11 Ndizvo kudai ndiri muiti wezvakashata, ndakaita chinosisira kuti ndife, andirambi kufa akadi; asi kudai pasina gwinyiso kuneizvo zvevanondiitira ndaa ndizvo ava, apana munhu ungandipira kwavari. Ndinopota kuti ndaa yangu ikwidzwe kunaSiza.”" 
Acts25:12 Naapo Festusi apangana nevatongi vevaJudha, wakapingura echiti, “Iwewe wapota kuti ndaa yako ikwidzwe kunaSiza; unozoenda kunaSiza.”" 
Acts25:13 Zvino kwapera mazuva amweni, mambo Agripa naBhenise vakaguma Sizaria, vakachingamidza Festusi." 
Acts25:14 Navo vachagarapo mazuva mazhinji, Festusi wakatura ndaa yaPhauri pamberi pamambo echiti, “Pane munhu wakasiiwa ari bhanditi ndiFerikisi." 
Acts25:15 Naapo ndaiya muJerusarema vapristi vakuru nevakuru vevaJudha vakanditurira ndaa, vechikumbira kuti atongwe." 
Acts25:16 Inini ndakapingura kuti andiwopi mushuma wevaRoma kuti vapire munhu kunyazwi ngouri kumutongi, asati aonana hope kuhope nouwo unomumangarira, kuti aone mukuwo wokudzirwira ngendaa yaanoitirwa." 
Acts25:17 Ndizvo apo vaungana pano, andizi kunonoka, asi ngezuva raiteera ndakagara pachigaro chokutonga ndaa, ndakapanga kuti uwo munhu aunzwe." 
Acts25:18 Naapo vaimuitira ndaa vaema, avazi kumuitira ndaa yezvakashata kudai ngezvendaikarira." 
Acts25:19 Asi vakamuitira ndaa yezviro zvimweni nemibvunzo ngendaa yokudira kwavo nendaa youmwe Jesu, wakafa, waakagwinyisisa Phauri kuti unopona." 
Acts25:20 Ndechikangaidzwa ngenjira yokubvunzwa kweizvi zviro, ndakamubvunza kuti ungatenda kuenda Jerusarema, atongerweyo ndaa idzi." 
Acts25:21 Asi apo Phauri akumbira kuti angwarirwe metsa ndaa igurwe ndimambo mukuru, ndakapanga kuti angwarirwe metsa ndakona kumutumira kunaSiza.”" 
Acts25:22 Agripa wakati kunaFestusi, “Inini ndingada kuti ndimuzwe munhuwo pachangu.” Iye wakati, “Mangwani unozomuzwa.”" 
Acts25:23 Ndizvo nechimangwani Agripa naBhenise vakauya, vakapfeka zvouthende hukuru, vakapotera kundau yokupurutana ndaa, pamwepo nenduna huru nevakuru vedhorobha. Naapo Festusi apanga, Phauri wakapotedzwamwo." 
Acts25:24 NaFestusi wakati, “Mambo Agripa nevanhu veshe vari pano nesu, munoona munhu uyu, uwo wevakaitira ndaa vaJudha veshe, veshe vomuJerusarema nevepano, vechidaidzira kuti aasisiri kuti apone." 
Acts25:25 Asi inini ndakaona kuti aazi kuita chiro chinomuita kuti aurawe; zvino kudai ngezvaakakumbira kuti ndaa yake ikwidzwe kunamambo mukuru, ndakagura kumutumirayo." 
Acts25:26 Asi andina chiro chine gwinyiso chokunyora kunamambo wangu. Ndizvo ndamuunza pamberi penyu, kakurutu pamberi pako, mambo Agripa, kuti ngesure kwokutsvakisisa ndingatozoona chokunyora." 
Acts25:27 Ngokuti kwendiri kunooneka chiri chiro chisina shwiro, mukutumira bhanditi, pasikadudzirwi ndaa dzaanopomerwa ndidzo.”" 
Acts26:1 Agripa wakati kunaPhauri, “Unotenderwa kudziereketera pachako.” Naapo Phauri wakatambanudza nyara yake, akadzirwira." 
Acts26:2 “Ndinopinimidza kuti ndinomuchena ngokuti ndiri pamberi pako, mambo Agripa, ndinodzipingurira nyamashi ndaa dzeshe dzendinomangarirwa ngevaJudha," 
Acts26:3 kakurutu ngokuti iwewe unonasa kuzia mishuma nemibvunzo yeshe iri pakati pevaJudha. Ndizvo ndinokupota kuti undipurutane ngokusengerera. 
Acts26:4 “Njira yokupona kwangu kubvira muutsva hwangu, ukwo kwakapera kubvira pakutanga pakati pevedzinza rangu nomuJerusarema, vaJudha veshe vanoizia." 
Acts26:5 Vakandizia kubvira pakutanga, kudai vechida kupupura, kuti ngenjira yakapindisisa kururama yokudira kwedu, ndakapona ndiri muFarisi." 
Acts26:6 Nazvino ndinoema pano kutongwa ngendaa yegonda rechigondiso icho chakaitwa kunemadzibaba edu ndiMwari," 
Acts26:7 chigondiso icho madzinza edu gumi namairi chevaigonda kuashira, apo vechidira Mwari usiku namasikati. Ngendaa yeichi chigondiso ndinoitirwa ndaa ngevaJudha, mambowoe!" 
Acts26:8 Ngenyi kwechipinimidzwa ndimwi kuti azvingaitiki kuti Mwari amuse vakafa? 
Acts26:9 “Ngegwinyiso inini pachangu ndakagutswa mukati mwangu kuti ndinosisira kuti ndiite zvakawanda zvinorwisana nezina raJesu weNazaretha. 
Acts26:10 Ndakaita izvi muJerusarema; ndakakonyera vazhinji vevakacheneswa mutirongo, ndapuwa simba kubva kuvapristi vakuru, asi apo vaiurawa, ndakatenderawo." 
Acts26:11 Ndechivatambudza kazhinji mumhatso dzokudira, ndakaedza kuita kuti vatuke Mwari; ndine ushungu hukuru kwavari, ndakavatambudza metsa kuguma kumadhorobha emadzinza amweni." 
Acts26:12 “Ndizvo zvakaita kuti ndiende Dhamasekusi, ndine simba nokutumwa kubva kuvapristi vakuru." 
Acts26:13 Pakati pemasikati, ndiri munjira, mambowoe, ndakaona kujeka kwakabva mudenga, kwakapinda kujeka kwezuva, kwechijeka kunditendenedza naavo vaihamba neni." 
Acts26:14 Naapo takawa teshe pashi, ndakazwa izwi rechiti kwendiri mundimi yechiHebheru, ‘Sauri, Sauri, unonditambudzirenyi? Kwakakonza kwouri kupunhura pakapinza.’" 
Acts26:15 Neni ndakati, ‘Ndimwi anani, Mambo?’ NaMambo wakati, ‘Ndini Jesu wounotambudza." 
Acts26:16 Asi miruka, ueme ngetsoka dzako; ngokuti ndaoneka kwouri ngendaa iyi, kuti ndikuemese kuita mushandi nomupupuri weizvo zvewaona neizvo zvendinozooneka kwouri ndizvo." 
Acts26:17 Ndinozokununurira kubva kunevanhu veshe nokubva kunevemadzinza, avo vendinokutumira kwavari" 
Acts26:18 kubeura madziso avo nokuvatenderudza kuti vabve muchidima, vapotere mukujeka, nokubva kusimba raSathani kuuya kunaMwari, kuti vaashire kukungurirwa kwezvishaishi, kuti vagare nhaka mukati mweavo vakacheneswa ngokugonda kwendiri.’" 
Acts26:19 “Ndizvo, mambo Agripa, andizi kuramba kupurutana chioniso chomudenga," 
Acts26:20 asi ndakatanga kuchumaira kwavari veshe veDhamasekusi nomuJerusarema nomunyika mweshe mweJudhia nokunevemadzinza kuti vatenderuke, vakunukukire kunaMwari, vechiita mishando inosisira kutenderuka kwavo." 
Acts26:21 Ngeiyi ndaa vaJudha vakandibata ndiri muTemperi, vakaedza kundiuraya." 
Acts26:22 Ndizvo ndakadetserwa ngorudetso rwakabva kunaMwari, ndichakaema nanyamashi, ndechipupura kwavari veshe vadoko nevakuru, ndisikaronzi chiro chimweni ngokubanze kweizvo zvevakaronza vaprofeti naMosi kuti zvinozouya;" 
Acts26:23 kuti kunosisira kuti Kristu atambudzike nokuti aite wokutanga kumuka kubva kwevakafa, kuti achumaire kujeka kuvanhu vedu nokune vemadzinza.”" 
Acts26:24 Achadzirwira kudaro, Festusi wakadaidzira ngeizwi guru echiti, “Phauri, unopenga! Kudzidza kwako kukuru kunokupengesa.”" 
Acts26:25 Asi Phauri wakati, “Andipengi akadi, mambo Festusi, asi ndinoereketa mazwi anegwinyiso noungwaru." 
Acts26:26 Ngokuti mambo unozia ngendaa yeizvi zviro, uwozve pamberi pake ndinoereketa ngokusunhurika; ngokuti ndinozia kuti akuna nachimwe cheizvi chakafishika kwaari, ngokuti izvi azvizi kuitika pakafishika." 
Acts26:27 Mambo Agripa, unotenda here zvinyorwa zvevaprofeti? Ndinozia kuti unozvitenda.”" 
Acts26:28 NaAgripa wakati kunaPhauri, “Ngokukasira unoda kundiita muKristu here?”" 
Acts26:29 NaPhauri wakati, “Ndinoda pamberi paMwari, kunyazwi mukuwo mudoko nokuti muzhinji, haiwa iwewe wega, asi naavo veshe vanondizwa nyamashi vangaita vakadai ndini, ngokubanze kweizvi zvisungo.”" 
Acts26:30 Naapo mambo wakamiruka nomutongi naBhenise naavo vaaigara navo. 
Acts26:31 Naapo vaiya vatorana dumba, vakapangana umwe kunoumweni vechiti, “Munhu uyu aazi kuita chiro chinomuita kuti aurawe nokuti asungwe.”" 
Acts26:32 NaAgripa wakati kunaFestusi, “Munhu uyu dai asikazi kukumbira kuti ndaa yake ikwidzwe kunaSiza, waizodai asunhurwa.”" 
Acts27:1 Naapo kwagurwa kuti tiende ngengarava Itaria, vakapira Phauri nemabhanditi amweni kunduna yezana yaizwi ndiJuriusi wehondo yaAgustusi." 
Acts27:2 Techipotera mungarava yaAdramitiumu, yaida kuenda kundau dziri kumhiri kworuandhle rweAsia, takahamba, Aristakhusi muMasedhonia wakabva Thesaronika wakahamba nesu." 
Acts27:3 Nechimangwani takaguma paSidhoni; naJuriusi wakabata Phauri zvakanaka, wakamutendera kuti ahambire shamwari dzake, kuti vamudetsere." 
Acts27:4 Techihamba ngengarava kubvapo, takahamba ngepakafishika peSaipurasi, ngokuti dutu raipesana nesu." 
Acts27:5 Apo tahamba kuambuka ruandhle ruri pasinde neSirisia nePhamufiria, takaguma Mira, mudhorobha reRisia." 
Acts27:6 Naapo nduna yezana yakaona ngarava yeArekizandria, yaihamba kuenda Itaria, nayo yakatipotedzamwo." 
Acts27:7 Naapo takahamba zvianana mazuva mazhinji, tikaguma tatambudzika apo pakaita maringwa neSinidhusi, naapo dutu risikatitenderi kugumayo, takahamba kuenda pakafishika paKrete, apo pakaita maringwa naSaramoni." 
Acts27:8 Ngokutambudzika takahamba ngepasinde payo, tikaguma kundau yaidaidzwa kuti, Mazambuko Akanaka, pasinde pawo paiya nedhorobha reRasea." 
Acts27:9 Naapo mukuwo wakareba wapera, nokuhamba kwomumvura kwaiya kwaane ngozi zvino, ngokuti mukuwo womushongano wokuera kudya waiya wapinda, Phauri wakavanyowedza," 
Acts27:10 akati kwavari, “Vamuna, ndinoona kuti muhambo wengarava uyu unozoita madambudziko nokurashikirwa ngezvakawanda, andizvopi zvega zvemitwaro nengarava, asi nokupona kwedu.”" 
Acts27:11 Asi nduna yezana yakanasa kupurutana muhambisi wengarava mukuru nomuna wengarava kupinda izvo zvakaereketwa ndiPhauri. 
Acts27:12 Ngokuti zambuko raiya risikazi kunaka kuti vangagarapo kupedza nguva yechando; uzhinji hwavo vakapangana kubvapo, kuti pamweni vangakona kuguma paFoenikisi nokugarapo nguva yechando; ndau iyo ndiro zambuko reKrete, rinoringira kubani kwemabirirazuva nedera kwemabirirazuva." 
Acts27:13 Apo dutu rokubani rakavhuvhuta zvianana, navo vechikarira kuti vakaona chevaida, vakamirudza chitsimiso, vakahamba kuteera Krete, pasinde pemahumbikumbi." 
Acts27:14 Asi ngokukasira mubvumo mukuru, unozwi wedera kwemabvazuva, wakavhuvhuta, wechibva munyika." 
Acts27:15 Naapo ngarava yakabatwa, isikakoni kuenda mberi, takaringirana nokunobva dutu, takarekera, tikatorwa ndiro." 
Acts27:16 Takahamba ngokubani kuenda pachiwi chidoko pakafishika chinozwi Khaudha, takakona kusunga mukumbi. Asi tatambudzika." 
Acts27:17 Vapedza kuukwidza, vakashandisa zvaidetsera, vechisunga ngarava ngepashi; navo vechitya kuti vanozokandirwa pajecha repaSiritisi, vakadzasa machira okuhambisa ndiwo ngarava, ngokudaro takatorwa." 
Acts27:18 Techitambudzwa kakurutu ngomubvumo wedutu nechimangwani vakatanga kurasha mitwaro muruandhle; 
Acts27:19 ngezuva rechitatu vakatanga kurasha midziyo yengarava ngenyara dzavo. 
Acts27:20 Naapo zuva nokuti nyeredzi azvizi kujeka kwemazuva mazhinji, nomubvumo mukuru waiya padera pedu, gonda reshe rokuti tinozopona rakapera." 
Acts27:21 Naapo vagara mukuwo wakareba vasina kudya, Phauri wakaema pakati pavo, akati, “Hama, mwaisisira dai mwakapurutana kwendiri, musikazi kuhamba kubva Krete, musaizoona uku kutambudzika nokurashikirwa." 
Acts27:22 Zvino ndinomupanga kuti mutsunge mwoyo; ngokuti akuna munhu unozofa pakati penyu, asi kwega ngarava." 
Acts27:23 Ngokuti kwakaema pasinde pangu usiku huno ngirosi yaMwari, wendiri wake nowendinoshandira" 
Acts27:24 yechiti, ‘Usatya, Phauri; kunosisira kuti ueme pamberi paSiza; wona, Mwari wakakupawo veshe avo vanohamba newe.’" 
Acts27:25 Ndizvo, hama, tsungai mwoyo, ngokuti ndinogonda Mwari kuti kunozoitika kudai ngezvaakaereketa kwendiri." 
Acts27:26 Asi kunosisira kuti tikandirwe pachiwi chimweni.” 
Acts27:27 Asi apo usiku hwechigumi nohurongomuna hwaguma, tichandotorwa apo naapo muruandhle rweAdhria, kwooita pakati pousiku vashandi vengarava vakakarakadza kuti vaikwedzera pasinde penyika." 
Acts27:28 Navo vakapima kudzama kwemvura, vakaona kuti aiya mamitha makumi marongomuna; ngesure vahamba nharauko doko vakapimazve, vakaona kuti aiya mamitha makumi matatu." 
Acts27:29 Vechitya kuti pamweni tingazowira pamapuwe, vakadzasa zvitsimiso zvengarava zvirongomuna ngesure kwengarava, vakadisisa kuti kuedze." 
Acts27:30 Apo vashandi vengarava vachatsvaka kutiza kubva mungarava, vakadzasa mukumbi muruandhle, vechiita kudai ngevanokandira zvitsimiso kubvira ngemberi kwengarava." 
Acts27:31 Phauri wakati kunenduna yezana nokuvarwi, “Ngapabanze pokuti ava vagare mungarava, amungaponi.”" 
Acts27:32 Naapo varwi vakacheka mapote omukumbi, vakaurekera kuti uwe." 
Acts27:33 Naapo kwaedza, Phauri wakavapota kuti veshe vadye echiti, “Zuva iri raarechigumi namarongomuna romunogara mwechirekera kudya, musina chemwakatongodya." 
Acts27:34 Ndizvo ndinomupota kuti mudye, ngokuti ndikwo kunomupa simba rokuti mupone; ngokuti akuna norubvudzi runozotsakatika kubva musoro roumwe wenyu.”" 
Acts27:35 Naapo aereketa izvi, wakatora chingwa, akachibonga kuna Mwari pamberi pavo veshe, naye wakachigura, akatanga kudya." 
Acts27:36 Naapo vakashingiswa veshe, vakatorawo kudya." 
Acts27:37 Nesu teshe taiya mungarava taiya vanhu vaiya mazana mairi nemakumi manomwe navatanhatu. 
Acts27:38 Naapo vaguta, vakarerusa ngarava, vechirasha koroni muruandhle." 
Acts27:39 Naapo kwaedza, avazi kuzia iyo nyika, asi vakaona chipforo chine humbikumbi rine jecha, vakapangana kuti vangakona here kuhambisa ngarava kuiisa padera pehumbikumbi." 
Acts27:40 Vakacheka mapote ezvitsimiso vakazvisiya muruandhle, ngouwo mukuwo vechisunhura mapote aisunga zvihambiso zvengarava, vechikwidza machira okuhambisa emberi kunedutu, vakaaringirisa kumhiri." 
Acts27:41 Asi vechiguma pandau panoshongana maruandhle mairi, vakaemesa ngarava mujecha; nemberi kwengarava kwakaemeswa kwakagara kusikakutukuswi, asi rutii rwayo rwesure rwakatanga kupwanywa ngemafungu." 
Acts27:42 Vangwariri vakapangana kuda kuuraya mabhanditi, kuti amweni awo asazoshambira kubuda nokutiza;" 
Acts27:43 asi nduna yezana, yechidisisa kuponesa Phauri, yakavapinga kuti vasaita kukarakadza kwavo. Wakavapanga kuti avo vaikona kushambira vadzikandire muruandhle, vabude kunyika" 
Acts27:44 nevakasara, vamweni vabude padera pezvigurwa zvengarava nokuti padera pemarupande amweni engarava. Ndizvo zvakaitika kuti veshe vakabuda kunyika vakangwaririka." 
Acts28:1 Naapo tapona, takazia kuti chiwi chaizwi Maritha." 
Acts28:2 Vagari vepachiwipo vakatiitira nyasha dzinoshamisa, ngokuti vakatibasirira muriro, vakatiashira teshe, ngokuti mvura yainaya nechando chaitonhora." 
Acts28:3 Asi apo Phauri aunganidza dzido rehuni nokuriisa pamuriro, buura rakabuda ngendaa yokupisha, rikaramba rakaruma panyara yake." 
Acts28:4 Naapo vagari vepachiwipo vaona chikara chakaruma panyara yake, vakati umwe kunoumweni, “Ngegwinyiso uyu munhu muurayi; kunyazwi akapona kubva muruandhle, kururama akumutenderi kuti apone.”" 
Acts28:5 Asi iye wakazuwira chikara pamuriro, asikazi kuremadzwa." 
Acts28:6 Vakaema vechikarakadza kuti uchazvimba nokuti kuwa pashi ngokukasira echifa; asi apo vagarira mukuwo wakareba, vasikazi kuona chiro chakashata chechiitika kwaari, vakakunukudza kupinimidza kwavo, vakati, uyu chimwari." 
Acts28:7 Zvino pasinde pendau iyo paiya neminda yamambo mukuru wechiwi, zina rake raizwi Pabhuriusi; uwo wakatiashira, akanasa kutingwarira mazuva matatu." 
Acts28:8 Kwakaitika kuti baba aPabhuriusi vaiya vakaata vakabatwa ngemutsarara nenyoka dzokuhambisa; Phauri wakapoteramwo mwevaiya, akakumbira, echiisa nyara dzake padera pavo, akavaponesa." 
Acts28:9 Naapo izvi zvaitika, vamweni vevanhu vaiya nenhenda pachiwi, vakauya vakaponeswa." 
Acts28:10 Vakationisa kuremeredzwa kukurutu; tobvapo ngengarava, vakakwidza mungarava izvo zvetaitama parwendo." 
Acts28:11 Ngesure kwemwedzi mitatu takahamba tiri mungarava yokwaArekizandria, iyo yaiya yakagara pachiwipo mukuwo wechando weshe, chioniso chayo chaizwi Chimwari Manyambiri." 
Acts28:12 Techiguma Sirakuse, takagarapo mazuva matatu." 
Acts28:13 Tabvapo takatenderera, tikaguma Regiumu. Ngesure kwezuva rimwe dutu raibva ngokubani rakavhuvhuta, nepazuva rechipiri takaguma Phuteori." 
Acts28:14 Ndipo petakaona vatendi, vakatikoka kugara navo mazuva manomwe. Ndizvo takaguma Roma." 
Acts28:15 Kubvira apo, vakoma vakazwa ngendaa yedu, vakauya kutiashira, metsa paMusika weApiusi nokuHodhera Nhatu. Apo Phauri avaona, wakabonga Mwari, akashingiswa." 
Acts28:16 Naapo takapotera muRoma, nduna yezana yakapira mabhanditi kune nduna yechikwata chemajoni, asi Phauri wakatenderwa kugara ari ega nejoni raimungwarira." 
Acts28:17 Kwapera mazuva matatu, wakadaidza pamwepo avo vaiya vakuru vevaJudha; naapo vaiya vaungana, wakati kwavari, “Hama, kunyazwi inini andizi kuita chiro chakashata kunevanhu vedu nokuti kumishuma yemadzibaba edu, asi ndakabva Jerusarema ndiri bhanditi, ndakaiswa munyara dzevaRoma." 
Acts28:18 Naapo vaiya vandibvunzisisa, vakada kundisunhura, ngokuti paiya pasina ndaa yokuti ndiurawe." 
Acts28:19 Asi apo vaJudha varamba, ndakaitwa kuti ndikwidze ndaa yangu kunaSiza; haiwa kuti ndaiya nendaa yokumangarira dzinza rangu ndiyo." 
Acts28:20 Ndizvo ngeiyi ndaa ndakamudaidza kuti ndimuone nokuereketa nemwi, ngokuti ngendaa yegonda raIsuraeri ndakasungwa ngeketani iyi.”" 
Acts28:21 Navo vakati kwaari, “Atizi kuashira tsamba dzakabva Judhia ngendaa yako, akunazve umwe wevatendi wakauya pano kootironzera nokuti kuereketa chiro chakashata ndiwe." 
Acts28:22 Asi tinodisisa kuzwa ndiwe izvo zvounopinimidza; ngokuti ngendaa yechiunga ichi, kunoziikanwa kwetiri kuti kundau dzeshe chinoereketwa zvakashata ndicho.”" 
Acts28:23 Naapo vaiya vamuemesera zuva, vakauya kwaari vakawanda pandau paaigara. Wakavaerengudzira, echipupura ngoumambo hwaMwari, echinasa kuvaronzera ndiJesu, kubvira kuMipango yeshe yaMosi nevaprofeti, kubvira mangwanani metsa madeekoni." 
Acts28:24 Vamweni vakatenda izvo zvaakaronza, asi vamweni avazi kuzvitenda." 
Acts28:25 Ndizvo avazi kutenderana pachavo; naapo vechibvapo, Phauri aereketa izwi rimwe kuti, “Mweya Wakachena wakanasa kuereketa ndiIsaya muprofeti kunemadzibaba enyu" 
Acts28:26 “echiti, ‘Enda kuneava vanhu wechiti, ngegwinyiso munozozwa, asi musikazwisisi; ngegwinyiso munozoona, asi musikaonesisi." 
Acts28:27 Ngokuti mwoyo yeava vanhu yakakonza nenzee dzavo adzizwisisi nemadziso avo vakatswatira; kuti vasazoona ngemadziso avo, vazwe ngenzee dzavo, nokuzwisisa ngomwoyo yavo, vatenderuke, neni ndivaponese.’" 
Acts28:28 “Ndizvo ngakuziikanwe kwomuri kuti urwu ruponeso rwaMwari runotumirwa kumadzinza; navo vanozozwawo.” [ 
Acts28:29 Naapo aereketa mazwi aya, vaJudha vakaenda vechiitirana hasha huru.]" 
Acts28:30 Naye wakagara makore mairi eshe ari mumhatso yake yaaibhadhara pachake, echiashira avo veshe vaipoteramwo," 
Acts28:31 echichumaira umambo hwaMwari nokudzidzisa ngendaa yaMambo Jesu Kristu ngokushinga kweshe, pasina naumwe waimurambidza." 
Romans1:1 Phauri, muranda waJesu Kristu, wakadaidzwa kuita mupostori, wakaemeserwa vhangeri raMwari," 
Romans1:2 iro raakagondisa karetu kubudikidza ngevaprofeti vake muzvinyorwa zvakachena," 
Romans1:3 ngendaa yoMukororo wake, wakabarwa kubva kurudzi rwaDhavhidha ngokwenyama," 
Romans1:4 wakaoniswa ngesimba kuti Mukororo waMwari ndimweya wokuchenesa ngokumuka kwake kubva kwavakafa, Jesu Kristu Mambo wedu," 
Romans1:5 kubudikidza ndiye takaashira nyasha noupostori kuti tiunze kupurutana kwokugonda pakati pamadzinza eshe ngendaa yezina rake," 
Romans1:6 nemwiwo muri pakati pavo mwakadaidzwa kuita vaJesu Kristu. 
Romans1:7 Kwavari veshe vari muRoma vanodikanwa ndiMwari, vakadaidzwa kuita vakacheneswa. Nyasha kwomuri nokunyarara kunobva kunaMwari Baba wedu naMambo Jesu Kristu." 
Romans1:8 Pakutanga, ndinobonga Mwari wangu kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu ngendaa yenyu mweshe, ngokuti kugonda kwenyu kunochumairwa munyika dzeshe." 
Romans1:9 Ngokuti Mwari uwo wendinoshandira mumweya wangu muvhangeri roMukororo wake, ndiye chapupu changu, kuti ndinomukarakadza ngenguva dzeshe mumikumbiro yangu," 
Romans1:10 ndechikumbira ngokuda kwaMwari pakugumisira ndingabudirira kuti ndiuye kwomuri. 
Romans1:11 Ngokuti ndine chishuwo chokuda kumuona, kuti ndingakoanisirana nemwi chimwe chezvipo zvomweya kuti mugwinyiswe," 
Romans1:12 zvinoronza kuti, isusu tingagwinyisana ngokugonda kwoumwe ngaumwe wedu, kweshe kwenyu nokwangu." 
Romans1:13 Ndinoda kuti muzie, hama, kuti kazhinji ndaida kuti ndiuye kwomuri (asi ndakapingwa metsa zvino), kuti ndianemuchero umweni pakati penyu kudai ngezvendinawozve kumadzinza amweni." 
Romans1:14 Ndine chikwereti kwavari veshe vaGiriki nevapara, vakangwara nemapenzi;" 
Romans1:15 ndizvo kudai ngezvendinodisisa ndakasisira kuchumaira vhangeri kwomurizve imwimwi vari muRoma. 
Romans1:16 Ngokuti andina nyowa ngevhangeri; ngokuti isimba raMwari rokuponesa veshe vanotenda, kutanga kuvaJudha nokuvaGirikiwo." 
Romans1:17 Ngokuti mukati mwaro rinoonisa kururama kwaMwari kubva mukugonda kuenda mukugonda; kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Uwo wakarurama kubudikidza ngokugonda unozopona.”" 
Romans1:18 Ngokuti ushungu hwaMwari hunooniswa hwechibva mudenga kurwa nazvo zveshe zvisikasisirani naMwari nokusikarurama kwevanhu vanotsikirira gwinyiso ngokusarurama. 
Romans1:19 Ngokuti izvo zvinoziikanwa ngevanhu ngendaa yaMwari zviri pamhene kwavari, ngokuti Mwari wakazvionisa kwavari." 
Romans1:20 Ngokuti kubvira pakusikwa kwenyika zviro zvake zvisikaoneki, zvechiziikanwa kudai ngezviro zvakasikwa, zvinoti, simba rake remhera nariini noUmwari hwake, zvinonasa kuoneka. Ndizvo avachaiti vasina ndaa;" 
Romans1:21 ngokuti kunyazwi vechimuzia Mwari avazi kumuremeredza kudai ndiMwari nokuti kumubonga, asi vakaita vasina shwiro mumipinimidzo yavo nemwoyo yavo isina kungwara yakaita chidima." 
Romans1:22 Vechidziita vakangwara, vakaita mapenzi;" 
Romans1:23 vakatenganisana uthende hwaMwari husikaori kuti vaashire muemo womuedzaniso womunhu unoora nokuti weshiri nokuti wemhuka dzine mirenje mirongomuna nokuti wezvinotamanda. 
Romans1:24 Ndizvo Mwari wakavarekera mukuemura kwomwoyo yavo kutsvina, kuti vadzishaishire miiri yavo pakati pavo pachavo," 
Romans1:25 vakatenganisa gwinyiso raMwari kuti vaashire manyepo nokudira nokushandira icho chakasikwa pandau yoMusiki, uwo unomuchena mhera nariini! Ameni." 
Romans1:26 Ngeiyi ndaa Mwari wakavarekera mukuemura kwavo kunotsverudza. Ngokuti nevakadzi vavo vakatenganisana chibarirwe kuita izvo zvinosiyana nechibarirwe," 
Romans1:27 ngokudarowo vamuna navo vechirekera chibarirwe chavo nevakadzi, vakatsva ngokuemurana kwavo umwe kunoumweni, vamuna vechiita nevamuna izvo zvisikasisiri, vechiashira mukati mwavo ukwo kuthuswa kunosisira kupauka kwavo." 
Romans1:28 Kudai ngezvevasikazi kuona zvakanaka kugara vasikazii Mwari, Mwari wakavarekera mukupinimidza kunonyangadza nokuita zviro zvisikasisiri." 
Romans1:29 Vaiya vakazadzwa ngokusikarurama kweshe, kuomba, kuboka, kuitirana zvakashata. Vakazadzwa ngendurumwa, kuuraya, hasha, kuchengedzera, kushatisisa, kureya," 
Romans1:30 kushonyongora, kunyenya Mwari, kudada, kudzikudza, kuganza, kutanda zvakashata, kusikapurutana vabari," 
Romans1:31 mapenzi, vasikagondeki, vasina rudo kuhama, vasina nyasha." 
Romans1:32 Kunyazwi vechizia chiemeso chaMwari chinoti avo vanoita zvakadaro vanosisira kufa, avateri kuita izvi zvega, asi vanotenderazve naavo vanogara vechizviita." 
Romans2:1 Ndizvo auchaiti usina ndaa, kunyazwi ndiani unotonga umweni; ngokuti ngeicho chounotonga umweni ndicho unodziitira ndaa ndicho, ngokuti iwewe, mutongi, unondoita zviro ndizvo ndizvo." 
Romans2:2 Tinozia kuti kutonga kwaMwari kunegwinyiso kunowira padera paavo vanoita zviro zvakadaro. 
Romans2:3 Iwe munhuwe, unotonga avo vanoita zviro zvakadaro, asi newe wechiitawo zvakadaro, unopinimidza kuti iwewe unozopokonyoka kutonga kwaMwari here?" 
Romans2:4 Nokuti unoshoora here upfumi hwenyasha dzake nokushingirira nokusengerera, usikazii kuti nyasha dzaMwari dzinokukweera kuti utenderuke?" 
Romans2:5 Asi ngokukonza nokusikatenderuka kwomwoyo wako unodziunganidzira pachako ushungu pazuva roushungu, apo panozooniswa kutonga kwakarurama kwaMwari." 
Romans2:6 Uwo unozounzidzira kumunhu weshe kudai ngemishando yake; 
Romans2:7 kwavari avo ngokusengerera vanoita zvakanaka mukutsvaka uthende nokuremeredzwa nokusikaori, unozovapa kupona kusikaperi;" 
Romans2:8 asi kwavari vanodzida vasikapurutani gwinyiso, asi vanopurutana zvisikazi kururama, kunozoapo ushungu nokutseneka." 
Romans2:9 Kunozoapo kutambudzika nokurwadziwa padera pomunhu weshe unoita zvakashata, kutanga kuvaJudha nokuvaGirikiwo," 
Romans2:10 asi uthende nokuremeredzwa nokunyarara kunozoa kunomunhu weshe unoita zvakanaka, kutanga kuvaJudha nokuvaGiriki navo." 
Romans2:11 Ngokuti kunaMwari akuna mukheto. 
Romans2:12 Ngokuti avo veshe vakashaisha vasina Mupango vanozofawo vasina Mupango, navo veshe vakashaisha vari pashi peMupango vanozotongwa ngeMupango." 
Romans2:13 Ngokuti andivopi vazwi veMupango vanozopembedzwa pamberi paMwari, asi vaiti veMupango vanozopembedzwa." 
Romans2:14 Naapo vemadzinza avo vasina Mupango vanodziitira zvinodiwa ngeMupango, ava kunyazwi vasina Mupango vari mipango pachavo." 
Romans2:15 Vanoonisa zvinodiwa ngeMupango zvakanyorwa mumwoyo yavo, naapo mwoyo yavo inoita chapupu nawo nemipinimidzo yavo umwe ngaumwe inovaitira ndaa nokuti kuvapembedza," 
Romans2:16 ngeiro zuva raanozotonga ndiro Mwari zvakafishika zvevanhu, ndiye Kristu Jesu, kudai ngevhangeri rangu." 
Romans2:17 Asi kudai iwewe wechidzidaidza pachako kuti uri muJudha, wechigonda Mupango nokuganza ndiMwari," 
Romans2:18 wechizia kuda kwake, wechikona kutsara izvo zvakapinda kunaka, ngokuti unodzidziswa muMupango," 
Romans2:19 newe unegwinyiso kuti uri mutungamiriri wemapofu, nokujeka kwaavo vari muchidima," 
Romans2:20 nomupangi wemapenzi, nomudzidzisi wevana, iwewe muMupango une chiemo chokuzia nechegwinyiso," 
Romans2:21 ndizvo iwewe unodzidzisa vamweni, audzidzidzisi here? Iwewe unochumaira kuti munhu asazoba, unoba here iwewe?" 
Romans2:22 Iwewe unoti munhu asazoomba, unoomba here iwewe? Iwewe unonyenya miedzaniso inodirwa, unoba here zvakacheneswa mumatemperi?" 
Romans2:23 Iwewe unodziganzisa ngeMupango, ngokugura kwako Mupango, unoita here kuti Mwari asaremeredzwa?" 
Romans2:24 Ngokuti, kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Zina raMwari rinotukwa pakati pevemadzinza ngendaa yenyu.”" 
Romans2:25 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso kuchekwa kunodetsera kudai uri muiti weMupango; asi kudai uri muguri weMupango, kuchekwa kwako kunoita kusikachekwi." 
Romans2:26 Ndizvo, kudai avo vasikazi kuchekwa vechingwarira zviemeso zveMupango, kusikachekwa kwavo akuzoerengwi here kuti kuri kuchekwa?" 
Romans2:27 Zvino avo vasikazi kuchekwa kuri chibarirwe kudai vechingwarira Mupango avazokutongi iwewe uneMupango yakanyorwa nokuchekwa asi unogura Mupango. 
Romans2:28 Ngokuti andiyepi muJudha emene unooneka akadaro ngokubanze, nokuti kuchekwa ukwo kuri kwokubanze kwomuiri." 
Romans2:29 Asi muJudha ndiye uri muJudha ngomukati, nokuchekwa kwemene kwomumwoyo, kunoitwa mumweya andikwopi kwezvakanyorwa. Kukudzwa kwake akubvi kuvanhu asi kunobva kunaMwari." 
Romans3:1 Ndizvo muJudha unenyi chaanopinda vamweni ndicho? Nokuti kuchekwa kunodetserenyi? 
Romans3:2 Kakurutu ngenjira dzeshe. Kutanga ndivo vaJudha vakapuwa mazwi aMwari. 
Romans3:3 Ndizvo kunozoitikenyi kudai vamweni vavo vasikazi kugondeka? Kusikagondeka kwavo kunozoita here kuti kugondeka kwaMwari kuite kusina shwiro? 
Romans3:4 Haiwa! Mwari ngaaoneke ari gwinyiso, kunyazwi munhu weshe munyepi, kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Kuti iwewe upembedzwe ngemazwi ako nokunyisa mukutongwa kwako.”" 
Romans3:5 Asi kudai kusikarurama kwedu kwechionisa kururama kwaMwari, tinozotinyi? Mwari uri usikazi kururama here, uwo unounzidzira ngoushungu? (Ndinoereketa kudai ngomunhu.)" 
Romans3:6 Haiwa! Ngokuti kudai zvakadaro Mwari ungazoita matongerenyi nyika? 
Romans3:7 Asi kudai gwinyiso raMwari rechiwanzwa ngokunyepa kwangu, kuita kukudzwa kwake, ngenyi inini ndichatongwa kudai ngomushaishi?" 
Romans3:8 Atironzi ngenyi (kudai ngokureyiwa kwedu nokudai ngezvevanoronza vamweni tisu kuti tinoti), “Ngatiite zvakashata kuti kunaka kuuye?” Avo kurashwa kwavo kunovasisira!" 
Romans3:9 Zvino chiinyi? Isusu vaJudha tirinane kuvapinda here? Haiwa, azvizi kudaro; ngokuti ngepamberi tambotonga kuti vanhu veshe, vaJudha nevaGiriki, vari pashi pesimba rokushaisha," 
Romans3:10 kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Apana naumwe wakarurama, haiwa, apana naumwe;" 
Romans3:11 apana naumwe unozwisisa, apana naumwe unotsvaka Mwari." 
Romans3:12 Veshe vakapauka, veshe pamwepo vakaita vasina shwiro; apana naumwe unoita zvakanaka, haiwa, apana naumwe.”" 
Romans3:13 “Mikuro yavo iiba rakabeuka; ngorurumi rwavo vanochengedzera.” “Uroyi hwechianzo huri pashi pemiromo yavo.” 
Romans3:14 “Miromo yavo yakazara ngokutuka nokuvava.” 
Romans3:15 “Tsoka dzavo dzinohambisa kuenda kooparadza ngazi; 
Romans3:16 kuparadzwa nokutambudzika zviri munjira dzavo," 
Romans3:17 nenjira yokunyarara avazi kuizia.” 
Romans3:18 “Apana kutya Mwari pamberi pemadziso avo.” 
Romans3:19 Zvino tinozia kuti kunyazwi ngechiri chinoronzwa ngoMupango chinoereketwa kwavari vari pashi peMupango, kuti miromo yeshe inyaradzwe, nenyika yeshe iuye mukutonga kwaMwari." 
Romans3:20 Ngokuti akuna munhu naumwe ungapembedzwa pamberi pake ngemishando yoMupango, ngokuti kubudikidza ngoMupango kushaisha kwakaziikanwa." 
Romans3:21 Asi zvino kururama kwaMwari kwakaoniswa ngepabanze peMupango, kunyazwi Mupango nevaprofeti zvinoita chapupu ndizvo," 
Romans3:22 kururama kwaMwari kunouya kubudikidza ngokugonda Jesu Kristu kwavari veshe vanotenda. Ngokuti apana muparadzaniso," 
Romans3:23 ngokuti veshe vakashaisha avahaniri kuuthende hwaMwari; 
Romans3:24 vechipembedzwa ngenyasha dzake ngokuripirwa kuri munaJesu Kristu," 
Romans3:25 uwo waakaemesa Mwari kuita mudiro wokuiyanisa, ngokugonda, ngengazi yake, kuti kuashirwe ngokugonda. Uku ndikwo kunoonisa kururama kwaMwari, ngokuti mukusengerera kwake wakafuratira zvishaishi zvakaitwa ngepamberi." 
Romans3:26 Kwaiya kuonisa ngouyu mukuwo kuti iye pachake wakarurama nokupembedza uwo unotenda munaJesu. 
Romans3:27 Zvino kuganza kwedu kunoitenyi? Kwakabviswa. Ngomupango uri? Ngomupango wemishando here? Haiwa! Asi ngomupango wokugonda. 
Romans3:28 Ngokuti tinotenda kuti munhu unopembedzwa ngokugonda ngepabanze pemishando yoMupango. 
Romans3:29 Zve Mwari ndiMwari wevaJudha vega here? Andiyepi Mwari wevemadzinzawo here? Eya, uri wevemadzinzawo." 
Romans3:30 Mwari ndiumwe ega; naye unozopembedza vakachekwa kubudikidza ngokugonda nevasikazi kuchekwa kubudikidza ngokugonda. 
Romans3:31 Ndizvo tinorekeredza Mupango ngokugonda uku here? Haiwa! Asi tinogwinyisisa Mupango. 
Romans4:1 Ndizvo tinozotinyi ndiAbrahama, baba edu ngokwenyama?" 
Romans4:2 Ngokuti kudai Abrahama akapembedzwa ngemishando, unacho chokuganza ndicho, asi haiwa pamberi paMwari." 
Romans4:3 Ngokuti zvinyorwa zvinotinyi? “Abrahama wakagonda Mwari, kwakaerengerwa kwaari kuti kuri kururama.”" 
Romans4:4 Zvino kwaari unoshanda, muthuso wake auerengwi kuti chipo, asi kuti muthuso." 
Romans4:5 Asi kwaari usikashandi asi iye unogonda kunouwo unopembedza vasikadi Mwari, kugonda kwake kunoerengerwa kwaari kuti kururama." 
Romans4:6 Dhavhidhawo unofumisa munhu uwo waakaerengera Mwari kuti kururama ngepabanze pemishando 
Romans4:7 echiti, “Vanomuchena avo vane zvinyangadzo zvavo zvakarekererwa, nezvishaishi zvavo zvakafishwa;" 
Romans4:8 unomuchena munhuwo waasikaerengi Mambo kuti uno kushaisha.” 
Romans4:9 Ndizvo chifumiso ichi ngechevakachekwa here nokuti kunevasikazi kuchekwawo? Ngokuti tinoti, “Kuna Abrahama kugonda kwake kwakaerengerwa kwaari kuti wakarurama.”" 
Romans4:10 Ndizvo kwakaita maerengerwenyi kwaari? Zvakaitika achekwa here nokuti asati achekwa? Haiwa achekwa, asi asati achekwa." 
Romans4:11 Wakaashira kuchekwa kuita chioniso chinogwinyisa kururama kwokugonda ukwo kwaaiya anakwo asati achekwa, kuti aite baba weavo veshe vanotenda, kunyazwi vasina kuchekwa, kuti kuerengerwe kwavari kuti vakarurama," 
Romans4:12 nokuti aite baba vevakachekwa haiwa vevakachekwa vega asi veavozve vanohamba muzvitsiko zvokugonda kwavaiya vanakwo baba edu Abrahama apo vaiya vasati vachekwa. 
Romans4:13 Ngokuti chigondiso chokuti unozogara nhaka yenyika achizi kuitwa kunaAbrahama nokuti kunevana vake kubudikidza ngoMupango akadi, asi chakaitwa kubudikidza ngokururama kwokugonda." 
Romans4:14 Ngokuti kudai avo veMupango vari vanogara nhaka, kugonda kwaitwa kusina shwiro nechigondiso chinoita chisina shwiro." 
Romans4:15 Ngokuti Mupango inounza ushungu, asi apo pasina Mupango apana kupauka." 
Romans4:16 Ndiyo ndaa kwechiitwa ngokugonda, kuitira chigondiso kuti chiitwe ngenyasha, chigwinyiswe kumibarirwana yeshe, haiwa kwavari veMupango, asi nokwavari avo vanokoanisirana kugonda kwaAbrahama, uri baba edu teshe," 
Romans4:17 kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Ndakakuita baba wemadzinza akawanda” mukuona kwaMwari uwo waakatenda, unomusa vakafa echidaidza izvo zvisipo kudai ngezviripo." 
Romans4:18 Abrahama wakatenda Mwari kunyazwi paiya pasina chizato chaiita kuti agonde, ngokudaro wakaita baba wemadzinza akawanda, kudai ngezvaakaronzerwa kuti, “Mubarirwana wako unozowanda.”" 
Romans4:19 Aazi kurembedzeka mukugonda, apo paakapinimidza ngomuiri wake uwo waiya wakadai ngowakafa, anemakore anoda kuita zana, nokuti ngokufa kwechibereko chaSara." 
Romans4:20 Akuna kugononda kwakamuita kuti apere simba ngechigondiso chaMwari, asi wakagwinyiswa mukugonda kwake echikudza Mwari," 
Romans4:21 echigwinyisa kakurutu kuti Mwari unokona kuita icho chaakagondisa. 
Romans4:22 Ndiyo ndaa yakaita kuti kugonda kwake, “Kuerengerwe kwaari kuti kururama.”" 
Romans4:23 Zvino akuzi kunyorwa ngendaa yake yega kuti, “Kwakaerengerwa kwaari kuti kururama,”" 
Romans4:24 asi ngendaa yeduwo. Kunozoerengerwa kudaro kwetiri isusu tinotenda kwaari uwo wakamusa Jesu Mambo wedu kubva kunevakafa," 
Romans4:25 uwo wakapirwa ngendaa yezvishaishi zvedu, echimuswazve kuitira kupembedzwa kwedu." 
Romans5:1 Ndizvo, kudai ngezvetinopembedzwa ngokugonda, tino kunyarara naMwari kubudikidza ndiMambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
Romans5:2 Kubudikidza ndiye takapotedzwa ngokugonda munyasha idzi dzetinoema mukati mwadzo, nesu tinoganza mukugonda ngokuwa nouthende hwaMwari." 
Romans5:3 Andizvopi zvega, asi tinoganza mumadambudziko edu, techizia kuti kutambudzika kunobara kusengerera" 
Romans5:4 nokusengerera kunobara kurovedzera, nokurovedzera kunobara kugonda," 
Romans5:5 nokugonda akutitsverudzi, ngokuti rudo rwaMwari rwakadururwa mumwoyo yedu kubudikidza ndiMweya Wakachena wakapuwa kwetiri." 
Romans5:6 Ngokuti apo petaiya tisina simba, ngomukuwo wakasisira Kristu wakafira vasikatendi Mwari." 
Romans5:7 Ngokuti zvakakonza kuti munhu afire munhu wakarurama, kunyazwi pamweni umwe ungashingirira kufira munhu wakanaka." 
Romans5:8 Asi Mwari unoonisa rudo rwake kwetiri ngokuti apo tichiri vashaishi Kristu wakatifira. 
Romans5:9 Kakurutu zvino, takapembedzwa ngengazi yake, tinozoponeswa ndiye kubva kuushungu hwaMwari." 
Romans5:10 Ngokuti kudai apo taiya magaa takaiyaniswa kunaMwari kubudikidza ngokufa kwoMukororo wake, kakurutu tiri vakaiyaniswa, tinozoponeswa ngendaramo yake." 
Romans5:11 Andizvopi zvega, asi tinoganzazve kunaMwari kubudikidza ndiye Mambo wedu Jesu Kristu, zvino kubudikidza ndiye takaashira kuiyaniswa." 
Romans5:12 Ndizvo kudai ngezvokwakapotera kushaisha munyika kubudikidza ngomunhu umwe norufu rwakauya kubudikidza ngokushaisha, ngokudaro rufu rwakagumira vanhu veshe ngokuti veshe vakashaisha;" 
Romans5:13 ngegwinyiso kushaisha kwaiyapo munyika Mupango usati waapo, asi kushaisha akuerengwi apo pasina Mupango." 
Romans5:14 Asi rufu rwakatonga kubvira kunaAdhamu metsa kuguma kunaMosi, kunyazwi nokwavari vasikazi kushaisha ngenjira yaakapauka ndiyo Adhamu, uwo waiya muedzaniso wouwo waiya echizouya." 
Romans5:15 Asi chipo chenyasha achizi kuedzaniswa nokupauka. Ngokuti kudai vazhinji vakafa ngokupauka kwomunhu umwe, kakurutu nyasha dzaMwari nechipo chenyasha chomunhu umwe, Jesu Kristu, chakawanziswa kune vazhinji." 
Romans5:16 Asi chipo chenyasha achizi kuedzanisirwa uwo wakashaisha. Ngokuti kutongwa kwakaguma ngoumwe kwakaunza kurashwa, asi chipo chenyasha chakauya ngokupauka kwavazhinji kuti kupembedzwe." 
Romans5:17 Kudai, ngokuti munhu umwe wakashaisha, rufu rwakatonga kubudikidza ngomunhu umwe, kakurutu avo vanoashira ngokuwanda kwenyasha nechipo chokururama vanozotonga mukururama kubudikidza ngomunhu umwe, Jesu Kristu." 
Romans5:18 Ndizvo kudai kupauka kwoumwe kwakaunza kurashwa kwevanhu veshe, ndizvo kubudikidza ngokuita kwomunhu umwe wakarurama chipo chenyasha chakatungamirira vanhu veshe mukupembedzwa nomukupona." 
Romans5:19 Ngokuti ngokusikapurutana kwomunhu umwe vazhinji vakaitwa vashaishi, ngokudaro ngokupurutana kwomunhu umwe vazhinji vanozoitwa vakarurama." 
Romans5:20 NoMupango wakapotera kuti kushaisha kuwande; asi apo kushaisha kwawanzwa, nyasha dzakapinda kakurutu kuwanzwa," 
Romans5:21 ndizvo, kudai kushaisha kwakatonga kubudikidza ngorufu, nyasha dzinotongawo kubudikidza ngokururama kunotungamirira kupinda mukupona kusikaperi kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu Mambo wedu." 
Romans6:1 Ndizvo tinozotinyi? Tondogara mukushaisha here kuti nyasha dziwanzwe? 
Romans6:2 Haiwa! Isusu takafa kuzvishaishi tingachaita maponerenyi mukati mwazvo? 
Romans6:3 Nokuti amuzii here kuti isusu teshe takabhabhatidzwa munaKristu Jesu takabhabhatidzirwa murufu rwake? 
Romans6:4 Ndizvo takaikwa pamwepo naye ngokubhabhatidzwa murufu, ndizvo kudai ndiKristu akamuswa kubva kwevakafa ngouthende hwaBaba, ngokudaro isusuwo tihambe mukupona kutsva." 
Romans6:5 Ngokuti kudai takabatanidzwa pamwepo naye murufu rwakadai ngorwake, ngegwinyiso tinozobatanidzwa naye mukumuka kwakadai ngokwake;" 
Romans6:6 techizia kuti munhu wedu wekare wakakohomerwa pamwepo naye kuti muiri wokushaisha upere, kuti isusu tisachazoita varanda vokushaisha." 
Romans6:7 Ngokuti uwo wafa wapembedzwa kubva kuzvishaishi. 
Romans6:8 Asi kudai isusu takafa pamwepo naKristu, tinogonda kuti tinozoponazve naye." 
Romans6:9 Ngokuti tinozia kuti Kristu amuswa kubva kwevakafa aachatongofizve; rufu aruchazotongi padera pake. 
Romans6:10 Ngokuti rufu rwaakafa, wakafa kuzvishaishi kamwe kega; asi ndaramo yaanopona, unopona kunaMwari." 
Romans6:11 Ndizvo ngokudaro mwechidzierenga nemwi kuti muri vakafa kuzvishaishi, asi kuti munopona kunaMwari munaKristu Jesu." 
Romans6:12 Ndizvo musatendera kuti kushaisha kutonge mumiiri yenyu inofa, kuti mupurutane kuemura kwayo." 
Romans6:13 Zve, musapa zvemiiri yenyu kuita midziyo inoshandiswa kuita zvisikazi kururama, asi dzipirenyi kunaMwari kudai ngevanhu vakamuswa kubva kwevakafa, nezvemiiri yenyu kuita midziyo yokushanda zvokururama kunaMwari." 
Romans6:14 Ngokuti kushaisha akuzotongi padera penyu akadi, ngokuti imwimwi amusiri pashi peMipango asi pashi penyasha." 
Romans6:15 Zvino chiinyi? Tinozoshaisha here ngokuti atisiri pashi peMupango asi pashi penyasha? Haiwa! 
Romans6:16 Amuzii here kuti uwo womunodzipa kwaari kuita hloko dzinopurutana, munoita hloko dzouwo womunopurutana, kunyazwi dzokushaisha kunoisa murufu nokuti dzokupurutana kunoisa mukururama?" 
Romans6:17 Asi ngaabongwe Mwari kuti kunyazwi imwimwi mwaiya hloko dzokushaisha, mwakaita vanopurutana ngomwoyo weshe kugwinyiso rinooneka mudzidziso yakapuwa kwomuri," 
Romans6:18 nokuti imwimwi, mwechisunhurwa kubva mukushaisha, mwakaita hloko dzokururama." 
Romans6:19 Ndinoereketa ngomushuma wevanhu, ngendaa yokutama simba kwenyu muchibarirwe. Ngokuti kudai ngezvemwakapira nhengo dzemiiri yenyu kuita hloko dzokusikasukika nedzokushaisha kuti muite zvakashata yaamho, ndizvo zvino mwechipira nhengo dzemiiri yenyu kuita hloko dzokururama kunomuita vakacheneswa." 
Romans6:20 Naapo pemwaiya hloko dzokushaisha, mwaiya mwakasunhurwa kubva kundaa dzokururama." 
Romans6:21 Ndizvo zvino mwaiya nemichero yakaitawani ngouwo mukuwo kubva kuneizvo zviro zvomunotsveruka ndizvo? Ngokuti magumo azvo rufu. 
Romans6:22 Asi zvino mwasunhurwa kubva mukushaisha mwaita hloko dzaMwari, munemichero yenyu inoita kuti mucheneswe, nemagumo enyu kupona kusikaperi." 
Romans6:23 Ngokuti misharo yokushaisha kufa, asi chipo chenyasha dzaMwari kupona kusikaperi munaKristu Jesu Mambo wedu." 
Romans7:1 Amuzii here, hama, ngokuti ndinoereketa kuneavo vanozia mipango, kuti mipango inotonga padera pomunhu mukuwo wega waanopona?" 
Romans7:2 Ngokuti mukadzi unomwamuna unosungwa ngomupango kunomwamuna wake achapona; asi kuti mwamuna wake afa, unosunhurwa kubva kumupango wemwamuna wake." 
Romans7:3 Ndizvo kudai apo mwamuna wake achapona, akagara nemwamuna umweni, unozozwi muombi. Asi kuti mwamuna wake afa, iye unosunhurwa kubva kumupango, ndizvo aachazozwi muombi kunyazwi akagara nomwamuna umweni." 
Romans7:4 Ndizvo, hama dzangu, imwimwiwo mwakafa kuMupango kubudikidza ngomuiri waKristu, kuti muite vemunhu uwo wakamuswa kubva kwevakafa, kuti tiberekere Mwari michero." 
Romans7:5 Ngokuti apo petaiya munyama, kuemura kwokushata, kwakamuswa ngendaa yoMupango, kwakashanda munhengo dzomuiri wedu kukabudisa michero inounza rufu." 
Romans7:6 Asi zvino isusu takasunhurwa kubva kuMupango, takafa kuneizvo zvaiya zvakatiita vasungwa, ndizvo zvino atishandi tiri hloko pashi pemitemo yekaretu yakanyorwa, asi tiri mundaramo itsva yomweya." 
Romans7:7 Ndizvo tinozotinyi? Mupango kushaisha here? Haiwa! Asi kudai waiya usiri mupango ndaizodai ndisikazi kuzia kushaisha. Ngokuti ndaizodai ndisikazi kuzia kuemura kudai mupango usikazi kuti, “Usazoemura.”" 
Romans7:8 Asi kushaisha, kwechiona njira muzvironzo, kwakashanda mukati mwangu mbeu dzeshe dzokuemura. Ngokuti ngepabanze peMupango kushaisha kwakafa." 
Romans7:9 Neni ndaipona ngepabanze peMupango karetu, asi apo kwaguma zvironzo, kushaisha kwakamuswa" 
Romans7:10 neni ndakafa, nomupango uwo waigondisa kupona, uyu ndakauona wechiita rufu kwendiri." 
Romans7:11 Ngokuti kushaisha, kwechiona njira kubudikidza ngezvironzo, kwakandichengedzera nokubudikidza ndizvo kwakandiuraya." 
Romans7:12 Ndizvo Mupango wakachena, nezvironzo zvakachena, zvakarurama zvakanaka." 
Romans7:13 Ndizvo izvo zviri zvakanaka zvakaita rufu kwendiri here? Haiwa! Asi ndikwo kushaisha, kunounza rufu kwendiri kubudikidza ngeicho chakanaka, kuitira kuti kushaisha kuoneke kuti kushaisha, ngokubudikidza ngezvironzo kuite kwakanyanyisisa kushata." 
Romans7:14 Ngokuti tinozia kuti Mupango ngewoMweya; asi inini ndiri wenyama, ndakatengeswa pashi pokushaisha." 
Romans7:15 Inini andizwisisi zvendinoita. Ngokuti andiiti izvo zvendinoda, asi ndinoita izvo zvendinonyenya." 
Romans7:16 Zvino kudai ndechiita zvendisikadi, ndinotendera kuti Mupango wakanaka." 
Romans7:17 Ndizvo zvino andinipi ndinoita kudaro, asi kushaisha kunogara mukati mwangu." 
Romans7:18 Ngokuti ndinozia kuti amuna zvakanaka zvinogara mukati mwangu, izvo zvinoronza munyama yangu. Ngokuti kuda kurimwo mukati mwangu, asi kuita zvakanaka amuna akadi." 
Romans7:19 Ngokuti zvakanaka zvendinoda kuita andizviiti, asi kushata kwendisikadi ndikwo kwendinoita." 
Romans7:20 Zvino kudai ndechiita zvendisikadi, andinipi ndinozviita, asi kushaisha kunogara mukati mwangu." 
Romans7:21 Ndizvo ndinoona zvakaita mupango kuti apo ndooda kuita zvakanaka, kushata kundoripo pendiri." 
Romans7:22 Ngokuti ndinodakara muMupango waMwari ngomunhu womukati mwangu," 
Romans7:23 asi ndinoona mupango umweni uri munhengo dzangu, wechiambana nomupango mumupinimidzo wangu wechindiisa muuranda kumupango wokushaisha uri munhengo dzangu." 
Romans7:24 Munhu unotambudzika wakadai ndini! Ndiani unozondinunurira kubva kunouyu muiri worufu? 
Romans7:25 Ngaabongwe Mwari kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu Mambo wedu! Ndizvo zvino, inini ndemene ngomupinimidzo wangu ndiri hloko yoMupango waMwari, asi ngenyama yangu ndiri hloko yemipango yokushaisha." 
Romans8:1 Ndizvo zvino akuchina kuitirwa ndaa kwavari vari munaKristu Jesu. 
Romans8:2 Ngokuti mupango woMweya wokupona munaKristu wakandisunhura kubva kunemupango wokushaisha neworufu. 
Romans8:3 Ngokuti Mwari wakaita izvo zvewaiya usikakoni kuita Mupango, ngendaa yokupera simba kwawo kubudikidza ngenyama; Mwari wakatuma Mukororo wake ari mumuemo wenyama ino kushaisha ngendaa yokushaisha, iye wakaitira ndaa kushaisha kuri munyama," 
Romans8:4 kuti kururama kwoMupango kuzarisike mukati mwedu, isusu tisikahambi ngezvenyama asi ngezvoMweya." 
Romans8:5 Ngokuti avo vanopona ngezvenyama vanoemesa mipinimidzo yavo kuzviro zvenyama, asi avo vanopona ngezvoMweya vanoemesa mipinimidzo yavo kuzviro zvoMweya." 
Romans8:6 Ngokuti kuemesa mupinimidzo kuzviro zvenyama kufa, asi kuemesa mupinimidzo kuzviro zvoMweya kupona nokunyarara." 
Romans8:7 Ngokuti mupinimidzo wezvenyama kuambana naMwari; ngokuti aupfairi Mupango waMwari, ngegwinyiso aungakoni;" 
Romans8:8 naavo vari munyama avangamudakadzi Mwari. 
Romans8:9 Asi imwimwi amuri munyamapi, asi mwaa muMweya, kudai ngegwinyiso Mweya waMwari wechigara mukati mwenyu. Kunyazwi ndiani usina Mweya waKristu, uyu aasiri wake akadi." 
Romans8:10 Asi kudai Kristu ari mukati mwenyu, kunyazwi muiri wakafa ngendaa yokushaisha, Mweya unopona ngendaa yokururama." 
Romans8:11 Kudai Mweya wouwo wakamusa Jesu kubva kwevakafa wechigara mukati mwenyu, uwo wakamusa Kristu kubva kwevakafa unozoponesazve miiri yenyu inofa ngoMweya wake unogara mukati mwenyu." 
Romans8:12 Ndizvo zvino, hama, tine zvikwereti, haiwa kunyama, kuti tipone ngezvenyama," 
Romans8:13 ngokuti kudai mwechipona ngezvenyama munozofa, asi kudai ndiMweya mwechiuraya zviito zvomuiri munozopona." 
Romans8:14 Ngokuti veshe vanotungamirirwa ndiMweya waMwari ava vana vaMwari. 
Romans8:15 Ngokuti amuzi kuashira Mweya wouhloko kuti mutyezve, asi mwakaashira Mweya kuti muite vana vaMwari, ndiwo tinochema techiti, “Abha! Baba!”" 
Romans8:16 Mweya emene unoita chapupu pamwepo nomweya wedu kuti isusu tiri vana vaMwari; 
Romans8:17 kudai tiri vana, tiri vanogara nhaka, vanogara nhaka yaMwari, naavo vanogara nhaka pamwepo naKristu, kudai ngegwinyiso techitambudzwa pamwepo naye kuti tikudzwewo pamwepo naye." 
Romans8:18 Ngokuti ndinoerenga kuti madambudziko omukuwo uno aasisiri kuedzaniswa nouthende uhwo hunozooniswa kwetiri. 
Romans8:19 Ngokuti ngokushuwira kukurutu zvakasikwa zvinogarira kuoniswa kwevana vaMwari; 
Romans8:20 ngokuti zvakasikwa zvakapfaiswa kunezvisina shwiro, haiwa ngokuda kwazvo asi ngokuda kwouwo wakaita kuti zvipfaiswe mukugonda;" 
Romans8:21 ngokuti zvakasikwa zvemene zvinozosunhurwa kubva muuranda hwokuora kupotera mukusunhurika kwouthende hwevana vaMwari. 
Romans8:22 Ngokuti tinozia kuti zvakasikwa zveshe zvinogomera pamwepo mukurwadziwa kudai ngekwokubara metsa nazvino. 
Romans8:23 Andizvopi zvega zvisikwa, asi isusuwo pachedu, avo vane michero yokutanga yoMweya, tinogomera mukati mwedu techigarira kuitwa vana vaMwari, kusunhurwa kwemiiri yedu." 
Romans8:24 Ngokuti takaponeswa ngokugonda. Asi kugonda ukwo kunooneka akusiri kugonda akadi. Ngokuti ndiani unogonda icho chaanoona? 
Romans8:25 Asi kudai tine gonda reicho chetisikaoni, tinozochigarira ngokusengerera." 
Romans8:26 Ngokudaro Mweya unotidetsera mukurembedzeka kwedu; ngokuti atizii njira inosisira yokukumbira ndiyo, asi Mweya emene unoita muemeri ngokugomera kusikabviri kuronzwa." 
Romans8:27 Mwari unoringisisa mwoyo unozia mupinimidzo woMweya, ngokuti Mweya unokumbirira vakacheneswa kudai ngokuda kwaMwari." 
Romans8:28 Nesu tinozia kuti zveshe zvinoshanda pamwepo kuita zvakanaka kwavari avo vanomuda Mwari, avo vakadaidzwa kudai ngokuemesa kwake." 
Romans8:29 Ngokuti avo vaakazia ngekaretu wakavaemesa ngekaretu kuti vatodzaniswe nomuemo woMukororo wake, kuti iye aite dangwe pakati pehama dzakawanda." 
Romans8:30 Naavo vaakaemesa ngekaretu wakavadaidzawo; naavo vaakadaidza wakavaruramisawo; naavo vaakaruramisa wakavakurisawo. 
Romans8:31 Ndizvo tinozotiyi kuneizvi? Kudai Mwari echitirwira, ndiani unozorwisana nesu?" 
Romans8:32 Iye usikazi kuramba noMukororo wake, asi wakamupa ngendaa yedu teshe, aazotipi ngenyasha zviro zveshe zvaanazvo here?" 
Romans8:33 Ndiani unozoitira ndaa vakatsanangurwa vaMwari? NdiMwari unopembedza. 
Romans8:34 Ndiani unozoitira ndaa? NdiJesu Kristu wakafa, eya, wakamuswa kubva kwevakafa, uwo uri ngokumudyo kwaMwari, uwozve unotikumbirira." 
Romans8:35 Ndiani unozotiparadzanisa norudo rwaKristu? Madambudziko here, nokuti kurwadziwa, nokuti kutambudzwa, nokuti nzara, nokuti kutama zvokupfeka, nokuti ngozi, nokuti shoti?" 
Romans8:36 Kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Ngendaa yako tinourawa zuva reshe; takaerengwa tiri vakadai ngemakwai akaemeserwa kuurawa.”" 
Romans8:37 Haiwa, muizvi zveshe tiri vanopinda vanyisi kubudikidza ndiye uwo wakatida." 
Romans8:38 Ngokuti ndinaro gwinyiso kuti kunyazwi rufu nokuti kupona, nokuti ngirosi, nokuti umambo, nokuti zviri pano, nokuti zvinouya, nokuti masimba," 
Romans8:39 nokuti urebu, nokuti udzamu, nokuti chiro chimweni chakasikwa, achingakoni kutiparadzanisa norudo rwaMwari ruri munaKristu Jesu Mambo wedu." 
Romans9:1 Ndinoronza gwinyiso ndiKristu, andinyepi; mhumba yangu inondiitira chapupu muMweya Wakachena," 
Romans9:2 kuti ndinotambudzika kakurutu nokurwadziwa kusina magumo mumwoyo wangu. 
Romans9:3 Ngokuti ndaizoda kuti inini ndemene ndiite wakatukwa newakaparadzaniswa kubva kunaKristu ngendaa yehama dzangu, idzo dziri hama dzedzinza rangu." 
Romans9:4 Ndivo vaIsuraeri, kwavari wakavaita vana vake, vanouthende, zvitenderano, nokupuwa kwoMupango, kudira nezvigondiso;" 
Romans9:5 ndiwo madzibaba mukuru avo, kubudikidza ndivo Kristu wakabarwa ngokwenyama, uwo uri padera pazveshe, Mwari ngaakudzwe mhera nariini! Ameni." 
Romans9:6 Asi azvironzi kuti izwi raMwari rakakorera. Ngokuti andivopi veshe akadi avo vakabva kunaIsuraeri vanoita vanhu vaIsuraeri," 
Romans9:7 andivopi veshe vanoita vana vaAbrahama; asi, “Kubudikidza ndiIsaka mibarirwana inozodudzwa.”" 
Romans9:8 Izvi zvinoronza kuti andivopi vana vakabarwa ngokwenyama vanoita vana vaMwari, asi vana vechigondiso ndivo vanoerengwa kuti mibarirwana." 
Romans9:9 Ngokuti iri ndiro izwi rechigondiso rinoti, “Ngouyu mukuwo ndinozopetuka naSara unozoa nomukororo.”" 
Romans9:10 Izvi andizvopi zvega zvakadaro; asi Rebheka naye apo aiya aanemimba ngemwamuna umwe, ndiIsaka baba edu," 
Romans9:11 kunyazwi vana vasati vabarwa nokuti vasati vaita zvakanaka nokuti zvakashata, kuti zano raMwari rokutsanangura rigwinyiswe," 
Romans9:12 haiwa ngemishando asi ngendaa yokudaidza kwake, kwakaronzwa kwaari, kuti, “Mukuru unozoshandira mudoko.”" 
Romans9:13 Kudai ngezvakanyorwa zvinoti, “Jakobe ndakamuda, asi Isau ndakamuzonda.”" 
Romans9:14 Zvino tinozotinyi? Kuripo kusikarurama here kunaMwari? Haiwa! 
Romans9:15 Ngokuti unoti kunaMosi, “Ndinozomuitira nyasha wendinoda kuitira nyasha, nokukungurira wendinoda kukungurira.”" 
Romans9:16 Ndizvo azviiti ngokuda kwomunhu nokuti ngokuita kwomunhu, asi ngenyasha dzaMwari." 
Romans9:17 Ngokuti zvinyorwa zvinoti kunaFaro, “Ngeiyi ndaa ndakakuemesa kuti ndionise simba rangu mwouri, nokuti zina rangu riteketeswe munyika dzeshe.”" 
Romans9:18 Ndizvo unoitira nyasha kwaari weshe waanoda kuitira nyasha, naye unokonzesa mwoyo wouwo weshe waanoda." 
Romans9:19 Zvino unozoti kwendiri, “Ngenyi iye achiri kutsvaka ndaa? Ngokuti ndiani ungakona kuambana nokuda kwake?”" 
Romans9:20 Asi iwewe urianani, munhu, unopingurana naMwari? Chiro chakaumbwa chingaronza here kunouwo wakachiumba kuti, “Wakandiumba kudai ngenyi?”" 
Romans9:21 Muumbi aana simba here padera pedongo, kubva pachimburumbwa chimwecho kuumba chidziyo chimwe chemishando inoremeredzeka nechimweni chemishando isikaremeredzeki?" 
Romans9:22 Kungaanenyi kudai Mwari, echida kuonisa ushungu hwake nokuita kuti simba rake riziikanwe, akashingirira ngokusengerera kukurutu kumidziyo youshungu yakaemeserwa kuparadzwa," 
Romans9:23 kuitira kuti aziise upfumi hwouthende hwake kumidziyo yenyasha, iyo yakanasirirwa uthende karetu," 
Romans9:24 kunyazwi isusu avo vaakadaidza, haiwa vanobva kuvaJudha vega asi navozve vanobva kumadzinza?" 
Romans9:25 Kudai ngezvaakaronza mutsamba yaHosea echiti, “Avo vaiya vasiri vanhu vangu ndinozovadaidza kuti, ‘Vanhu vangu,’ nouwo waiya asikadikanwi ndinozomudaidza kuti, ‘Mudikani wangu.’" 
Romans9:26 Kunozoitika kuti pandau paakaronza kwavari kuti, ‘Amuri vanhu vangupi,’ vanozodaidzwa kuti, ‘Vana vaMwari unopona.’ ”" 
Romans9:27 NaIsaya wakadaidzira ngendaa yevaIsuraeri kuti, “Kunyazwi uwandu hwevana vaIsuraeri hwechinyazodai ngejecha roruandhle, vakasara vavo ndivo vanozoponeswa;" 
Romans9:28 ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozozadzisa izwi rake munyika echiripedzisa ngokukasira.” 
Romans9:29 Kudai ngezvaakaronza Isaya karetu echiti, “Kudai Mambo Mwari wehondo asikazi kutisiira mibarirwana, tingadai takaitwa kudai ngeSodhoma nokudai ngeGomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Ndizvo zvino, tinozotinyi? Kuti vemadzinza avo vasikazi kuteera kururama vakahanira kururama, ndikwo kuti, kururama kubudikidza ngokugonda;" 
Romans9:31 asi Isuraeri echiteera mupango wokururama aazi kuhanira mupango uwo. 
Romans9:32 Ngenyi? Ngokuti avazi kukutsvaka ngokugonda, asi kudai ngounohanira ngemishando. Vakapumhunwa ngebuwe rokupumhunisa," 
Romans9:33 kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Ringirai, ndinoradzika buwe muZioni rokupumhuna, ruware runozovaita kuti vawe, nouwo unotenda kwaari aazotsverudzwi.”" 
Romans10:1 Hama, chidisiso chomwoyo wangu nokukumbira kwangu kunaMwari ngendaa yevaIsuraeri kuti vaponeswe." 
Romans10:2 Ngokuti ndinovaitira chapupu kuti vanotsamwirira kunaMwari, asi vanoita ngokusikazia." 
Romans10:3 Ngokuti, vasikazii kururama kunobva kunaMwari, vechitsvaka kuemesa kururama kwavo, avazi kudzipfaisa pashi pokururama kwaMwari." 
Romans10:4 Ngokuti Kristu ndiye magumo oMupango, kuti weshe unogonda aruramiswe." 
Romans10:5 Mosi unonyora ngendaa yokururama kunobva kuMupango echiti, “Munhu uwo unoita kururama kweMipango, unozopona ndiyo.”" 
Romans10:6 Asi kururama ukwo kunobva mukugonda kunoronza kuti, “Usaereketa mumwoyo mwako kuti, ‘Ndiani unozokwira mudenga?’ ” (ukwo kunoti, kudzasa Kristu pashi)." 
Romans10:7 “Nokuti, ‘Ndiani unozodzaka mukudzama?’ ” (ukwo kunoti, kumubudisa Kristu kubva kunevakafa)." 
Romans10:8 Asi zvinoronzenyi? “Izwi riri pasinde pako, pamuromo pako nomumwoyo mwako” (ndikwo kuti, izwi rokugonda retinochumaira);" 
Romans10:9 ngokuti kudai wechipupura kuti Jesu ndiMambo ngomuromo wako nokutenda mumwoyo mwako kuti Mwari wakamumusa kubva kunevakafa, unozoponeswa." 
Romans10:10 Ngokuti munhu unotenda ngomumwoyo wake naye unoruramiswa, naye unopupura ngomuromo wake unoponeswa." 
Romans10:11 Ngokuti zvinyorwa zvinoti, “Kunyazwi ndiani unotenda mwaari aazotsverudzwi.”" 
Romans10:12 Ngokuti akuna muparadzaniso pakati pomuJudha nomuGiriki; ngokuti Mambo umwewo ndiye Mambo wavo veshe unodururira upfumi hwake padera pavo veshe vanokumbira kwaari. 
Romans10:13 Ngokuti, “Kunyazwi ndiani unokumbira ngezina raMambo unozoponeswa.”" 
Romans10:14 Asi vangazoita makumbirirenyi kwaari uwo wevasikazi kutenda? Zve, vangazoita matenderenyi kwaari uwo wevasikazi kuzwa ndiye? Zve, vangazoita mazwirenyi pasina muchumairi?" 
Romans10:15 Vangazoita machumairirenyi kuti vasikazi kutumwa? Kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Manakirenyi akaita tsoka dzaavo vanochumaira mashoko akanaka!”" 
Romans10:16 Asi andivopi veshe vakapurutana vhangeri; ngokuti Isaya unoti, “Mambo Mwari, ndiani wakatenda izwi redu?”" 
Romans10:17 Ndizvo kugonda kunouya ngokuzwa, nokuzwa kunouya ngeizwi raKristu." 
Romans10:18 Asi ndinobvunza, avazi kuzwa here? Eya, ngegwinyiso vakazwa; “Izwi ravo rakabuda kuenda panyika peshe, nemazwi avo akaguma kumagumo enyika.”" 
Romans10:19 Asi ndinobvunzazve, vaIsuraeri avazi kuzwisisa here? Pakutanga Mosi unoti, “Ndinozomuita kuti muite ndurumwa ngavanhu vasiri dzinza; ngedzinza risina kungwara ndinozomutsenesa.”" 
Romans10:20 Naapo Isaya asingatyi unoti, “Ndakaoneka ngaavo vasikazi kunditsvaka; ndakadzionisa kwavari vasikazi kubvunza ndini.”" 
Romans10:21 Asi kuvaIsuraeri unoti, “Zuva reshe ndakatambanudzira nyara dzangu kunevanhu vasikapurutani nevanoramba.”" 
Romans11:1 Ndinobvunza zvino, Mwari wakaramba vanhu vake here? Haiwa! Ngokuti inini pachangu ndiri muIsuraeri, wedzinza raAbrahama, wemhatso yaBhenjamini." 
Romans11:2 Mwari aazi kuramba vanhu vake vaakazia ngekaretu. Amuzii here izvo zvinoronza zvinyorwa ndiErija, ngenjira yaakapota ndiyo kuna Mwari kuitira vaIsuraeri ndaa?" 
Romans11:3 “Mambo Mwari, vakauraya vaprofeti vako, vakaputsira pashi maarita ako; inini ndini ndega ndasara, navo vanotsvaka kundiuraya.”" 
Romans11:4 Asi mupinguro waMwari unotinyi kwaari? “Ndakadzisiira makumi emazana manomwe evanhu vasikazi kugwadamira Bhaari ngemabvi avo.” 
Romans11:5 Ndizvo ngomukuwo unozve varipo vakasara, vakatsanangurwa ngenyasha." 
Romans11:6 Asi kuti kuri kwenyasha, akuchiri kwemishando akadi; kuti zvakadaro nyasha adzichazi kuita nyasha." 
Romans11:7 Ndizvo chiinyi? Icho chaakatsvaka Isuraeri aazi kuchiona. Vakatsanangurwa vakachiona, asi vamweni veshe vakakonziswa." 
Romans11:8 Kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Mwari wakavapa mweya wokukangaidzwa, wakavapa madziso okuti vasaona nenzee dzokuti vasazwa, metsa kuguma kuneiri zuva.”" 
Romans11:9 Dhavhidha unoti, “Tafura ravo ngariite murau nechirimbana, ngavawe nokuunzidzirwa kwavo;" 
Romans11:10 madziso avo ngaaitiswe rubuma, kuti vasaona, uvakopfamise mishana yavo nguva dzeshe.”" 
Romans11:11 Ndizvo ndinobvunza kuti, vakapumhunwa here kuti vawe? Haiwa! Asi kubudikidza ngokushaisha kwavo ruponeso rwakauya kunevemadzinza, kuvamusira godo." 
Romans11:12 Zvino kudai kushaisha kwavo kwechiita upfumi hwenyika, nokukorera kwavo kwechiita upfumi hwevemadzinza, kuzara kwouwandu hwavo kunozopinda kwakaitawani!" 
Romans11:13 Asi ndinoereketa kwomuri imwimwi vemadzinza. Kwechioneka zvino kuti inini ndiri mupostori wevemadzinza, ndinokudza mushando wangu," 
Romans11:14 kuti pamweni ndingaita kuti vanhu vangu vaIsuraeri vaite godo, kuti ndikone kuponesa vamweni vavo." 
Romans11:15 Ngokuti kudai kurashwa kwavo kuri kuiyaniswa kwenyika, kuashirwa kwavo kunozoronzenyi? Kunozoita kupona kunevakafa!" 
Romans11:16 Kudai hlama yakapirwa kuita michero yokutanga yakacheneswa, ngokudarozve hlama yeshe yakachena; kudai nzinde yakachena, ndizvo nenhai dzakachenawo." 
Romans11:17 Asi kudai nhai dzimweni dzakagurwa, newe, uri muorivhi womushango, wakabatanidzwa mukati mwadzo, ukakoanisirana nadzo kunaka kwomuorivhi," 
Romans11:18 usaganza padera penhai. Kudai wechiganza, iwewe andiwepi unotwara nzinde, asi nzinde ndiyo inotwara iwewe." 
Romans11:19 Ndizvo unozoti, “Nhai dzakagurwa kuti inini ndibatanidzwe.”" 
Romans11:20 Zvakanaka. Dzakagurwa ngendaa yokugononda kwadzo, asi iwewe unoema kubudikidza ngokugonda. Usadzikudza mumupinimidzo wako, asi itya." 
Romans11:21 Ngokuti kudai Mwari asikazi kurekera nhai dzepo, aazokurekeri newewo." 
Romans11:22 Ndizvo ringira nyasha noushungu hwaMwari: ushungu hwakaoniswa kwavari vakawa, asi dzakaoniswa nyasha dzaMwari kwouri, kudai wechizoangira kugara munyasha dzake; pamweni newe ungazotemwawo." 
Romans11:23 Kunyazwi naavo vaIsuraeri, kudai vasikaangiri kugara mukugononda kwavo, vanozobatanidzwa, ngokuti Mwari unesimba rokuvabatanidzazve." 
Romans11:24 Ngokuti kudai iwewe wakatemwa kubva kumuorivhi womushango pakusikwa nokubatanidzwa, ngenjira yakaparadzana pakusikwa, mukati mwomuorivhi womumunda, kunozopinda kwakaitawani idzi dziri dzepo kuti dzibatanidzwe kumuorivhi wadzo." 
Romans11:25 Ngokuti andidi, hama, kuti muite vasikazii ngeichi chakafishika; kuti musadziita vakangwara mumipinimidzo yenyu, ngokuti vaIsuraeri vamweni vakagumirwa ngokutindiara kwomwoyo, metsa kugume kuzarisika kwouwandu hwevemadzinza." 
Romans11:26 Ndizvo vaIsuraeri veshe vanozoponeswa; kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Kunozobuda Mununuri kubva muZioni; iye unozodusa kusikatya Mwari kubva kunaJakobe.”" 
Romans11:27 “Neichi chinozoita chitenderano changu navo, apo pendinozodusa zvishaishi zvavo.”" 
Romans11:28 Ngendaa yevhangeri vari magaa a Mwari, ngendaa yenyu; asi ngendaa yokutsanangurwa vari vanodikanwa ngendaa yemadzibabamukuru avo." 
Romans11:29 Ngokuti zvipo nokudaidza kwaMwari zviri zvisikakunukudzwi. 
Romans11:30 Kudai ndimwi ngemikuwo yakapinda mwaiya vasikapurutani kunaMwari, asi zvino mwakaashira nyasha ngokusikapurutana kwavo," 
Romans11:31 ndizvo zvino vari vasikapurutani kuitira kuti ngenyasha idzo dzaoniswa kwomuri vangaashirawo nyasha. 
Romans11:32 Ngokuti Mwari wakavakonyera veshe mukusikapurutana, kuti avaitire nyasha veshe." 
Romans11:33 Kukuranyi kwakaita upfumi noungwaru noruziyo rwaMwari! Ndiani ungakona kududzira zvitongero zvake nenjira dzake adzingazwisisiki! 
Romans11:34 “Ngokuti ndiani wakazia mupinimidzo waMambo Mwari? Nokuti ndiani wakaita mupangi wake?” 
Romans11:35 “Nokuti ndiani wakamupa chipo kutanga kuti azopuwawo chipo?” 
Romans11:36 Ngokuti kubva kwaari nokubudikidza ndiye nekwaari zviro zveshe zvakasikwa ngezvake. Kwaari ngakuapo uthende husikaperi. Ameni. 
Romans12:1 Ndizvo ndinomupota, hama, ngenyasha dzaMwari, kuti mupire miiri yenyu kuita mudiro unopona, wakachena nounoashirika kunaMwari, uri mushando wenyu wokudira uneshwiro." 
Romans12:2 Musatodzera zveiyi nyika, asi mwechitsandurwa ngokumusirirwa kwomupinimidzo wenyu, kuti mutsvakisise kuzia kuda kwaMwari, kwakanaka, kunoashirika nekwakaperera." 
Romans12:3 Ngokuti kubudikidza ngenyasha dzakapuwa kwendiri ndinoti kuno munhu weshe uri pakati penyu, asadzipinimidza iye pachake kupinda kupinimidza kunosisira, asi kuti apinimidze ngokutonga kwakangwara, kudai ngezvaakapa Mwari kunomunhu weshe kudai ngechipimo chokutenda kwake." 
Romans12:4 Ngokuti kudai ngezvetinadzo nhengo dzakawanda mumuiri umwe, andidzopi dzeshe nhengo dzine mushando umwewo," 
Romans12:5 ndizvo isusu, tiri vazhinji, tiri muiri umwe munaKristu, umwe ngaumwe inhengo umwe kunoumweni." 
Romans12:6 Tine zvipo zvakaparadzana, kudai ngenyasha dzakapuwa kwetiri: kudai chinyari chokuprofeta, ngatiprofete kudai ngokukura kwokugonda kwedu;" 
Romans12:7 kudai uri mushando, ngazvioneke mukushandira; kudai ngomudzidzisi, ngazvioneke mukudzidzisa;" 
Romans12:8 kudai ngomupangi, ngaazvioneke mukupanga; kudai ngomupi, ngazvioneke mukupa ngenyasha; kudai ngomutongi, ngaatonge ngokungwara; kudai ngomuiti wenyasha, ngaaite ngokudakara." 
Romans12:9 Rudo ngaruite rusina kudziitisa; nyenyai izvo zvakashata, batirirai kuneizvo zvakanaka;" 
Romans12:10 dananai umwe kunoumweni ngorudo rukuru; muremeredzane umwe kunoumweni. 
Romans12:11 Shandai ngesimba, musaita nungo. Itai vanopisha mumweya, mwechishandira Mambo."
