Romans12:12 Itai vanodakara mukugonda kwenyu, musengerere mumadambudziko, mwechiangirira mukukumbira." 
Romans12:13 Koveranai nevakacheneswa zvevanotama, ashirai vapfumba." 
Romans12:14 Fumisai vanomutambudza; vafumisenyi musavatuka. 
Romans12:15 Dakarai naavo vanodakara, mwechichema naavo vanochema." 
Romans12:16 Garai mukunyarara umwe kunoumweni; musatsvaka zvine mbiri, asi mwechihamba pamwepo nevakapfaa; musadziita vakangwara mumipinimidzo yenyu." 
Romans12:17 Musaunzidzira munhu kushata ngendaa yokuitirwa zvakashata, asi tsvakai zvakarurama mukuona kwevanhu veshe." 
Romans12:18 Kudai zvechiitika, ngepomunokona ndipo, garai mukunyarara nevanhu veshe." 
Romans12:19 Musaunzidzira pachenyu, vanodikana, asi taraukirai ushungu hwaMwari; ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Kuunzidzira ngekwangu, inini ndinozounzidzira, unoronza Mambo Mwari.”" 
Romans12:20 Haiwa, “Kudai gaa rako rafukama, wechiripa zvokudya; kudai rine nyota, wechiripa zvokumwa; ngokuti ngokuita kudaro unozoisa murwi wemasimbe anopisha omuriro padera pesoro raro.”" 
Romans12:21 Musanyiswa ngokushata, asi nyisai kushata ngokunaka." 
Romans13:1 Munhu weshe ngaapfaire madzimambo anotonga padera pake. Ngokuti akuna umambo usikazi kubva kunaMwari, navo varipo vakagadzwa ndiMwari." 
Romans13:2 Ndizvo iye unoemesedzana noumambo, unorwisana neicho chaakaemesa Mwari, naavo vanorwisa vanodzitorera kutongwa." 
Romans13:3 Ngokuti vatongi avatyisi kwavari vanoita mishando yakanaka, asi kwavari vanoita zvakashata. Unoda kuita usikatyi mambo here? Ita zvakanaka newe unozokudzwa ndiye;" 
Romans13:4 ngokuti iye muranda waMwari kwouri unokuitira zvakanaka. Asi kudai wechiita zvakashata, wechitya, ngokuti iye aateri kutwara shoti pasina chiro! Ngokuti muranda waMwari muunzidziri woushungu kunouwo unoita zvakashata." 
Romans13:5 Ndizvo munosisira kuti muvapfaire, haiwa ngendaa youshungu hwega, asi ngendaazve yemhumba." 
Romans13:6 Ngeiyi ndaa munobhadharazve chibharo, ngokuti madzimambo varanda vaMwari, vanogara vechiita izvi zviro." 
Romans13:7 Bhadharai kwavari veshe izvo zvinovasisira; chibharo kwavari vechibharo, murimwa kwavari vomurimwa, mwechitya vanotyiwa, remeredzai avo vanosisira kuremeredzwa." 
Romans13:8 Musaita chikwereti chechiro kumunhu, kwega kuti mudane umwe noumweni; ngokuti iye unomuda muakirwana wake wakazadza Mupango." 
Romans13:9 Ngokuti Mupango unoti, “Usazoomba, usazouraya, usazoba, usazoemura,” neimweni mipango inoerengerwa pamwepo neizwi iri rokuti, “Unozomuda muakirwana wako kudai ngezvounodzida iwewe pachako.”" 
Romans13:10 Rudo arushandi zvakashata kunomuakirwana; ndizvo rudo ruri kuzadza Mupango. 
Romans13:11 Nemwi munozia awa kuti zvino yaanguva yaamho yokuti mumuke kubva muhope. Ngokuti zvino ruponeso rwedu rwaapasinde kwetiri kunomukuwo wetakatenda; 
Romans13:12 usiku hwapera, kuedza kwaapasinde. Ndizvo ngatirashe mishando yechidima, ngatipfeke chihlangu chokujeka." 
Romans13:13 Ngatihambe ngenjira inosisira kudai ngevanohamba masikati, tisikahambi ngouhaya nokudhakwa, tisikahambi ngokushanja, nokuti ngokuemura kunotsverudza, tisikahambi ngehasha nendurumwa." 
Romans13:14 Asi mupfeke Mambo Jesu Kristu, musikatsvaki kudakadza nyama pakuemura kwayo." 
Romans14:1 Ashirai munhu wakarembedzeka mukugonda, muashirenyi, asi musikaphikisani naye ngendaa yemipinimidzo." 
Romans14:2 Munhu umwe unogonda kuti ungadya zviro zveshe, asi munhu wakarembedzeka unodya miriwo yemashakani." 
Romans14:3 Iye unodya asashoora usikadyi, naye usikadyi asatonga unodya; ngokuti Mwari wakamuashira." 
Romans14:4 Urianani iwewe unotonga muranda woumweni? Zviri pamberi pamambo wake kuti aeme nokuti kuwa. Asi unozoema, ngokuti Mambo unesimba rokuita kuti aeme." 
Romans14:5 Munhu umweni unoremeredza zuva rimwe kupinda rimweni, umweni unoremeredza mazuva eshe kuti akatodzana. Munhu weshe ngaanase kuzia mumupinimidzo wake." 
Romans14:6 Uwo unongwarira zuva, unoringwaririra kukudza Mambo. Nouwo unodya, unodyira kukudza Mambo ngokuti unobonga Mwari; apo uwo usikadyi, aadyiri kukudzwa kwaMambo naye unobonga Mambo." 
Romans14:7 Ngokuti apana naumwe wedu unodziponera pachake ega, apanazve unodzifira pachake ega." 
Romans14:8 Ngokuti kudai techipona, tinoponera Mambo, nokuti dai techifa, tinofira Mambo; ndizvo zvino, kunyazwi techipona nokuti techinyafa, tiri vaMambo." 
Romans14:9 Ngokuti ngeiyi ndaa Kristu wakafa akaponazve, kuti aite Mambo wevakafa nevanopona." 
Romans14:10 Ngenyi iwewe wechiitira ndaa hama yako? Nokuti iwewe unoshoora ngenyi hama yako? Ngokuti isusu teshe tinozoema pamberi pechigaro chokutonga chaMwari. 
Romans14:11 Ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Kudai ngezvendinopona, unoronza Mambo Mwari, mabvi eshe anozondigwadamira nendimi dzeshe dzinozokudza Mwari.”" 
Romans14:12 Ndizvo umwe ngaumwe wedu unozodzipingurira kunaMwari. 
Romans14:13 Ndizvo tisachaitirana ndaa umwe kunoumweni, asi zvirinane kuti mugure kuti asazoapo munhu unoisa chipumhuniso munjira yehama yake nokuti kuita kuti iwe." 
Romans14:14 Ndinozia neni ndinoongiwa munaMambo Jesu kuti akuna chiro chinosvipisa mwechiri pachacho; asi chinoita chakasvipiswa kwaari unopinimidza kuti chakasvipiswa. 
Romans14:15 Ngokuti kudai hama yako yechisvipiswa mwoyo ngendaa yokudya kwako, ngokudaro auchahambi ngorudo. Usamuuraya ngokudya kwako uwo waakafira Kristu." 
Romans14:16 Ndizvo musatendera kuti kunaka kwenyu kuereketwe ndikwo kuti kwakashata. 
Romans14:17 Ngokuti umambo hwaMwari andihwopi hwokudya nokuti kumwa, asi kururama nokunyarara nokudakara muMweya Wakachena." 
Romans14:18 Kunyazwi ndiani unoshandira Kristu ngokuita izvi unoashirika kunaMwari nokuashirikazve kunevanhu. 
Romans14:19 Ndizvo ngatitsvake izvo zvinounza kunyarara neizvo zvetingagwinyisana ndizvo umwe kunoumweni. 
Romans14:20 Musaparadza mushando waMwari ngendaa yezvokudya. Ngegwinyiso zviro zveshe zvakacheneswa, asi zvakashata kunyazwi kunaani unoita kuti vanhu vamweni vawe ngezvaanodya;" 
Romans14:21 kwakanaka kurekera kudya nyama nokurekera kumwa vhini nokuti kurekera kuita chiro chimweni chinoita kuti hama yako ipumhunwe. 
Romans14:22 Kugonda kwounakwo, ngakugare pakati pako naMwari. Unomuchena usikadziitiri ndaa pazviro zvaanotendera." 
Romans14:23 Asi uwo unogononda watoitirwa ndaa, kudai echidya, ngokuti aaiti ngokugonda; ngokuti kunyazwi ngechiri chisikaitwi ngokugonda kushaisha." 
Romans15:1 Isusu takagwinya tinosisira kutwara kurembedzeka kwevasina simba, haiwa kuti tidzidakadze pachedu." 
Romans15:2 Umwe ngaumwe wedu ngaadakadze muakirwana wake ngezvakanaka, zvinomuaka." 
Romans15:3 Ngokuti Kristu aazi kudzidakadza pachake; asi, kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Kutuka kweavo vakakutuka iwewe kwakawira padera pangu.”" 
Romans15:4 Ngokuti kunyazwi ngezviri zvakanyorwa karetu zvakanyorwa kuti isusu tidzidze, kuti kubudikidza ngokusengerera nokuembedzerwa kwezvinyorwa tiwe nokugonda." 
Romans15:5 Mwari wokusengerera nowokuembedzera ngaamupe kuti muite mupinimidzo umwewo umwe kunoumweni, kudai ngezvinoda Kristu Jesu," 
Romans15:6 kuti muri pamwepo ngeizwi rimwe mukudze Mwari naBaba aMambo wedu Jesu Kristu. 
Romans15:7 Ndizvo ashiranai umwe noumweni, kudai ndiKristu wakamuashirawo kuti Mwari akudzwe." 
Romans15:8 Ngokuti ndinomuronzera kuti Kristu wakaitwa muranda kune vakachekwa kuti aonise gwinyiso raMwari, kuti agwinyisise zvigondiso zvakagondiswa kumadzibaba," 
Romans15:9 nokuitira kuti madzinza akudze Mwari ngendaa yenyasha dzake. Kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Ngeiyi ndaa ndinozomukudza pakati pevemadzinza, ndiembere kukudzwa kwezina renyu.”" 
Romans15:10 Zve unoti, “Dakarai, imwimwi vemadzinza, pamwepo nevanhu vake.”" 
Romans15:11 Zve, “Kudzai Mambo Mwari, imwimwi mweshe vemadzinza, vanhu veshe ngavamukudze.”" 
Romans15:12 Zve Isaya unoti, “Runzinde rwaJese runozouya, nouwo unozomiruka kutonga padera pevemadzinza; vemadzinza vanozogondera mwaari.”" 
Romans15:13 Zvino Mwari wokugonda ngaamuzarise ngokudakara kweshe nokunyarara mukutenda, kuti kubudikidza ngesimba roMweya Wakachena muwe negonda rinofashukira." 
Romans15:14 Inini ndemene ndinonasa kuzia ndimwi, hama dzangu, kuti imwimwi mwemene mwakazara ngokunaka, mwakazara ngokuzia kweshe, munokonazve kupangana umwe kunoumweni." 
Romans15:15 Asi ndakanyora kwomuri ngokushinga yaamho ngezviro zvimweni, kumukarakadzisa ngendaa yenyasha dzakapuwa kwendiri ndiMwari," 
Romans15:16 kuti ndiite mushandiri waKristu Jesu kunevemadzinza mumushando woupristi muvhangeri raMwari, kuti vemadzinza vangaita mudiro unoashirika, wakacheneswa ndiMweya Wakachena." 
Romans15:17 Ndizvo ndinakwo kuganza ngomushando wangu munaKristu Jesu ngezviro zvaMwari. 
Romans15:18 Ngokuti andizoshingi kuereketa ngezviro zvimweni kwega ngeizvo zvaakaita Kristu kubudikidza ndini kuitira kuti vemadzinza vapurutane, ngeizwi nomushando," 
Romans15:19 ngesimba rezvioniso nemishamiso, ngesimba roMweya waMwari, kuti kubvira ngeJerusarema nokunharaunda dzaro metsa kuguma Iririkomu ndakanasa kuchumaira vhangeri raKristu." 
Romans15:20 Eya, ngokudaro ndakadisisa kuchumaira vhangeri pandau dzisaiziikanwa zina raKristu, kuti ndisazoaka padera petsikiro roumweni munhu," 
Romans15:21 asi kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Vanozoona avo vasikazi kuronzerwa mashoko ndiye, naavo vanozozwisisa uwo wevasikazi kuzwa ndiye.”" 
Romans15:22 Iyi ndiyo ndaa yakandipinga kazhinji kuti ndisauya kwomuri. 
Romans15:23 Asi zvino, ndisina ndau yokushanda kuneidzi nyika, ndinodisisa ngaaya makore akawanda kuti ndiuye kwomuri." 
Romans15:24 Ndinogonda kuti ndinozomuona apo ndoopinda kuenda Sipeini, nokuperekedzwa ndimwi parwendo rwangu, apo ndambodakara pamwepo nemwi kamukuwo kadoko." 
Romans15:25 Asi zvino, eya, ndinoenda Jerusarema kooshandira vakacheneswa vaMwari." 
Romans15:26 Ngokuti zvakavadakadza avo veMasedhonia neveAkhaiya kupa zvipo kunevarombo vari pakati pevakacheneswa muJerusarema. 
Romans15:27 Vakadakara kuzviita, ngegwinyiso ivo vane chikwereti kwavari; ngokuti kudai vemadzinza vakauya vakakoanisirana navo zvifumiso zvavo zvoMweya, ivo vanosisirawo kuvashandira ngezviro zvevanotama zvomuiri." 
Romans15:28 Ndizvo apo ndapedza kuita izvi nokuvaunzira michero iyi yakaunganidzwa, ndinozopinda kuenda Sipeini ngekwenyuyo;" 
Romans15:29 neni ndinozia kuti apo ndoouya kwomuri, ndinozouya ngokufumiswa kwakazara kwaKristu." 
Romans15:30 Zvino ndinomupota, hama, ndiMambo wedu Jesu Kristu norudo rwoMweya, kuti mutambudzike pamwepo neni mumikumbiro yenyu kunaMwari ngendaa yangu," 
Romans15:31 kuti ndinunurwe kubva kunevasikatendi vari muJudhia, nokuti nomushando wangu kuneveJerusarema uashirike kunevakacheneswa vaMwari," 
Romans15:32 ndizvo kuti ngokuda kwaMwari ndingauya kwomuri ngokudakara kuti ndizorore pamwepo nemwi. 
Romans15:33 Zvino Mwari wokunyarara ngaagare nemwi mweshe. Ameni. 
Romans16:1 Ndinoda kuronza kwomuri kuti Febhi hama yedu, mushandiri wechiara chiri muKhenikerea," 
Romans16:2 kuti mumuashire munaMambo ngenjira inosisira vakacheneswa, mumudetsere ngeizvo zveshe zvaanotama kudetserwa ndizvo ndimwi, ngokuti iye emene wakadetsera vazhinji neniwo pachangu." 
Romans16:3 Tambisai Prisikha naAkwira, vangani vangu mumushando waKristu Jesu," 
Romans16:4 avo ngendaa yangu vakaradzika pashi kupona kwavo; andinipi ndega ndinovabonga asi zviara zveshe zvevemadzinza. 
Romans16:5 Tambisaizve chiara chiri mumhatso yavo. Tambisai Epaenetusi mudikani wangu, ndiye mutendi wokutanga kutenda munaKristu muAsia." 
Romans16:6 Tambisai Maria, uwo wakashanda ngesimba pakati penyu." 
Romans16:7 Tambisai Andronikhusi naJuniasi, hama dzangu nevangani vangu muubhanditi; vanhu vane mbiri mukati mwevapostori, vaiya munaKristu kutangira inini." 
Romans16:8 Tambisai Ampriatusi, mudikani wangu munaMambo." 
Romans16:9 Tambisai Ubhanusi, mungani wedu mukushandira Kristu, naStakhusi mudikani wangu." 
Romans16:10 Tambisai Aperesi, unotendwa munaKristu. Tambisai avo vari vemhuri yaAristobhurusi." 
Romans16:11 Tambisai Herodhioni hama yangu. Tambisai avo vemhuri yaNakisusi, vari munaMambo." 
Romans16:12 Tambisai Trifaena naTrifosa, avo vakashanda ngesimba muna Mambo. Tambisai Persisi unodikanwa, wakashanda kakurutu munaMambo." 
Romans16:13 Tambisai Rufusi, wakatsanangurwa munaMambo, namai ake nevanguwo." 
Romans16:14 Tambisai Asinikritusi, Fregoni, Hermesi, Patrobhasi, Hermasi nehama dziri kwavari." 
Romans16:15 Tambisai Firorogusi, Juria, Nereusi nehama yake, Orimpasi nevakacheneswa veshe vaanogara navo." 
Romans16:16 Chingamidzanai umwe kunoumweni ngomuromo ngenjira yakachena. Zveshe zviara zvaKristu zvinomutambisa. 
Romans16:17 Ndinomupota, hama, ngwarai avo vanomusa kuparadzana nokupumhunisa, zvakapesana neizvo zvemwakadzidziswa; mubve kwavari." 
Romans16:18 Ngokuti vanhu vakadaro avashandiri Kristu Mambo wedu, asi vanoshandira ndani dzavo, nokuereketa kwavo kwakaserera kwakanaka vanochengedzera mwoyo yeavo vasina ndaa." 
Romans16:19 Ngokuti kupurutana kwenyu kwakazwika kunevanhu veshe, ndizvo ndinodakara ndimwi, asi ndinoda kuti mungware kuneizvo zvakanaka asi musikazi kungwara kuneizvo zvakashata." 
Romans16:20 Mwari wokunyarara unozoparadza Sathani pashi petsoka dzenyu ngokukasira. Nyasha dzaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzigare nemwi. 
Romans16:21 Thimothi, mungani wangu wendinoshanda naye, unomutambisa; naRukiusi, Jasoni naSosipata, hama dzangu." 
Romans16:22 Inini Thetiusi unonyora tsamba iyi, ndinomutambisa munaMambo." 
Romans16:23 Gaiusi, unondiburira nechiara cheshe, unomutambisa. Erastusi, mungwariri wemare yedhorobha, unomutambisa, nehama yedu Kwatusi unomutambisa. [" 
Romans16:24 Nyasha dzaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzigare nemwi mweshe. Ameni.] 
Romans16:25 Zvino kwaari unesimba rokumugwinyisa kudai ngezvinoronzwa ngevhangeri rangu nokuchumairwa kwaJesu Kristu, kudai ngokuoniswa kwechakafishika chakangwarirwa mukunyarara kubvira pakutanga pakusikwa kwenyika," 
Romans16:26 asi zvino chaoniswa kubudikidza ngezvinyorwa zvevaprofeti kumadzinza eshe, kudai ngomupango waMwari wemhera nariini, kuitira kuti apurutane nokugonda;" 
Romans16:27 kunaMwari ega wakangwara ngaugare uripo uthende mhera nariini kubudikidza ndiJesu Kristu! Ameni. 
1Corinthians1:1 Phauri, wakadaidzwa kuita mupostori waKristu Jesu ngokuda kwaMwari, naSosithenesi hama yedu," 
1Corinthians1:2 kuchiara chaMwari icho chiri muKhorinte, kwavari vakacheneswa munaKristu Jesu, vakadaidzwa kuita vakacheneswa, pamwepo naavo veshe vari kundau dzeshe vanodaidza zina raMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, Mambo wavo nowedu." 
1Corinthians1:3 Nyasha ngadzigare kwomuri nokunyarara kunobva kunaMwari Baba edu naMambo Jesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians1:4 Ndinobonga Mwari wangu ngenguva dzeshe ndimwi, ngendaa yenyasha dzaMwari dzakapuwa kwomuri munaKristu Jesu," 
1Corinthians1:5 ngokuti muzviro zveshe mwakafumiswa mwaari mukuereketa kweshe nomukuzia kweshe," 
1Corinthians1:6 kudai ngouchapupu ndiKristu hwakagwinyiswa mukati mwenyu," 
1Corinthians1:7 kuti musatama chipo chomweya apo mwechigarira kuoniswa kwaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians1:8 Uwo unozomugwinyisawo metsa kumagumo, kuti muite vasikaitirwi ndaa ngezuva raMambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Mwari unogondeka, uwo wemwakadaidzwa ndiye mukuiyana noMukororo wake, Jesu Kristu Mambo wedu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Zvino ndinomupota, hama, ngezina raMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, kuti mweshe muerekete chiro chimwecho, zve, kuti kusaapo kuparadzana pakati penyu, asi kuti muite vakasungwa pamwepo mumupinimidzo umwe nebiningidzo rimwero." 
1Corinthians1:11 Ngokuti kwakaronzwa kwendiri, hama dzangu, ngaavo vemhuri yaKhroe, kuti dziripo hasha pakati penyu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Zvendinoronza ngeizvi, kuti umwe ngaumwe wenyu unoti, “Inini ndiri waPhauri,” nokuti, “Inini ndiri waAporosi,” nokuti, “Inini ndiri waKhefasi,” nokuti, “Inini ndiri waKristu.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Kristu wakaparadzaniswa here? Phauri wakakohomerwa here ngendaa yenyu? Nokuti mwakabhabhatidzwa here ngezina raPhauri? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndinobonga Mwari kuti andizi kubhabhatidza naumwe wenyu, kwega Krispusi naGaiusi," 
1Corinthians1:15 kuti kusaapo naumwe ungazoti, mwakabhabhatidzwa ngezina rangu." 
1Corinthians1:16 (Inini ndakabhabhatidzawo vemhuri yaStefanasi, ngokubanze kwavo andikarakadzi kuti ndakabhabhatidza umwenizve.)" 
1Corinthians1:17 Ngokuti Kristu aazi kundituma kuti ndibhabhatidze, asi kuti ndichumaire vhangeri, haiwa ngoungwaru hwemazwi, kuti ngokudaro muchinjiko waKristu usazoitwa usina shwiro." 
1Corinthians1:18 Ngokuti izwi romuchinjiko upenzi kwavari vanopera, asi kwetiri isusu tinoponeswa, isimba raMwari." 
1Corinthians1:19 Ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Ndinozoparadza ungwaru hwevakangwara nokuzwisisa kwevanozia ndinozokurasha.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Uripari wakangwara? Iripari ngwazi yokufunda? Iripari ngwazi yokuereketa yeiyi nguva? Mwari aazi kuzviita upenzi here zvoungwaru hweiyi nyika? 
1Corinthians1:21 Ngokuti, muungwaru hwaMwari, nyika aizi kuzia Mwari kubudikidza ngoungwaru hwayo, kwakadakadza Mwari, kubudikidza ngoupenzi hwokuchumaira, kuti avo vanotenda avaponese." 
1Corinthians1:22 Ngokuti vaJudha vanokumbira chioniso nevaGiriki vanotsvaka ungwaru," 
1Corinthians1:23 asi isusu tinochumaira Kristu wakakohomerwa, kuvaJudha chipumhuniso nokunevemadzinza upenzi," 
1Corinthians1:24 asi kwavari vakadaidzwa, veshe vaJudha nevaGiriki, Kristu simba raMwari noungwaru hwaMwari." 
1Corinthians1:25 Ngokuti upenzi hwaMwari hwakapinda kungwara kuneungwaru hwevanhu; nokurembedzeka kwaMwari kwakapinda kugwinya kunekugwinya kwevanhu. 
1Corinthians1:26 Ngokuti ringirai kudaidzwa kwenyu, hama, kuti akuna vazhinji venyu vakangwara ngokwenyama, akuna vazhinji vane simba, akuna vazhinji vanoremeredzwa, vanodaidzwa." 
1Corinthians1:27 Asi Mwari wakatsanangura zviro zvoupenzi munyika, kutsverudza vakangwara; Mwari wakatsanangura zviro zvakarembedzeka munyika kutsverudza zvakagwinya." 
1Corinthians1:28 Mwari wakatsanangura zviri pashi nezvinoshoorwa munyika, kunyazwi nezviro zvisipo, kuita kuti zviripo zviite zvisina shwiro," 
1Corinthians1:29 kuti kusazoapo naumwe unozoganza pamberi paMwari. 
1Corinthians1:30 Ndiye chinyuka chokupona kwenyu munaKristu Jesu, uwo wakaitwa ungwaru hwedu ndiMwari, nokururama kwedu, kucheneswa nokuripirwa," 
1Corinthians1:31 kuitira kuti kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Iye unoganza, ngaaganze ndiMambo Mwari.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Naapo pendakauya kwomuri, hama, ndechichumaira chakafishika chaMwari, andizi kushandisa mazwi makuru nokuti ungwaru hwakakura." 
1Corinthians2:2 Ngokuti ndakadziemesera kuti andizozii chiro pakati penyu kwega Jesu Kristu, uwo wakakohomerwa." 
1Corinthians2:3 Neni ndakauya kwomuri ndakarembedzeka, ndechitya, ndechihuta kakurutu." 
1Corinthians2:4 Mazwi angu nokuchumaira kwangu kwaiya kusina mazwi okukoka oungwaru, asi mukuoniswa kwoMweya nokwesimba," 
1Corinthians2:5 kuti kugonda kwenyu kusazotseama muungwaru hwevanhu, asi musimba raMwari." 
1Corinthians2:6 Asi pakati pevabva muzero tinoereketa ungwaru, kunyazwi husiri ungwaru hweiyi nyika nokuti hwevatongi veiyi nyika, avo vanopera." 
1Corinthians2:7 Asi tinoereketa ungwaru hwaMwari, hwakafishika, hwakafishwa, uhwo Mwari hwaakaemesa karetu nyika isati yasikwa, kuita uthende hwedu." 
1Corinthians2:8 Apana naumwe wevatongi weiyi nyika wakazwisisa izvi; ngokuti dai vakazwisisa, vaizodai vasikazi kukohomera Mambo wouthende." 
1Corinthians2:9 Asi kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Izvo zvisikazi kuoneka ngemadziso nokuti kuzwika ngenzee nokuti zvisikaziikanwi mumwoyo mwevanhu, izvo ndizvo zvaakanasirira Mwari kwavari vanomuda.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Zviro izvi Mwari wakazvionisa kwetiri kubudikidza ndiMweya; ngokuti Mweya unotsvakisisa zveshe, kunyazwi noudzamu hwaMwari." 
1Corinthians2:11 Ngokuti ndiani munhu unozia zvomunhu, kwega mweya womunhu uri mukati mwake? Ngokudarozve akuna unozwisisa zvaMwari, kwega Mweya waMwari." 
1Corinthians2:12 Zvino atizi kuashira mweya wenyika, asi Mweya unobva kunaMwari, kuti tizwisise zvipo zvakapuwa kwetiri ndiMwari." 
1Corinthians2:13 Tinoereketa ngezviro izvi ngemazwi, haiwa akadzidziswa ngoungwaru hwevanhu, asi ngemazwi akadzidziswa ndiMweya, mukududzira gwinyiso roMweya kwavari voMweya." 
1Corinthians2:14 Asi munhu wenyama aashiri zviro zvoMweya waMwari, ngokuti zviri upenzi kwaari, naye aakoni kuzvizwisisa, ngokuti zvinotongwa ndiMweya." 
1Corinthians2:15 Asi uwo woMweya unotonga zviro zveshe, asi iye emene aatongwi ngomunhu." 
1Corinthians2:16 “Ngokuti ndiani wakazia mupinimidzo waMambo Mwari kuti amupange?” Asi isusu tinawo mupinimidzo waKristu. 
1Corinthians3:1 Asi inini, hama, ndaiya ndisikakoni kuereketa kwomuri kudai ndivo voMweya, asi kudai ndivo venyama, kudai ngevana vadoko munaKristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ndakamupa mukaka, haiwa kudya kwakagwinya, ngokuti mwaiya musati mwakona. Haiwa, kunyazwi nazvino, amusati mwakona," 
1Corinthians3:3 ngokuti muchiri venyama. Ngokuti kwechioneka kuti kuripo pakati penyu ndurumwa nehasha, amurivopi here venyama, mwechihamba ngomuitiro wevanhu?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Ngokuti apo umwe unoti, “Inini ndiri waPhauri,” noumweni unoti, “Inini ndiri waAporosi,” amuri vanhupi here?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Ndizvo Aporosi uri anani? NaPhauri uri anani? Varanda vemwakatenda kubudikidza ndivo, umwe ngaumwe kudai ngezvaakapuwa ndiMambo." 
1Corinthians3:6 Inini ndakasima, Aporosi wakadiridzira, asi Mwari wakameresa." 
1Corinthians3:7 Ndizvo andiyepi unosima uri chiro, nokuti unodiridzira, asi ndiMwari ega unomeresa." 
1Corinthians3:8 Uwo unosima nouwo unodiridzira chiro chimwe; asi umwe ngaumwe unozoashira musharo wake, kudai ngomushando wake." 
1Corinthians3:9 Ngokuti tiri vashandi pamwepo naMwari; imwimwi muri munda waMwari. Imwimwi muri mhatso yaMwari. 
1Corinthians3:10 Kudai ngenyasha dzaMwari dzakapuwa kwendiri, kudai ngomuaki uri ngwazi nowakangwara ndakaisa tsikiro, asi umweni unoaka padera paro. Muaki umwe ngaumwe ngaangware ngenjira yaanoaka ndiyo padera paro." 
1Corinthians3:11 Ngokuti akuna naumwe ungaaka tsikiro rimweni, kwega iro rakaakwa, tsikiro iro ndiJesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Asi kudai munhu echiaka padera peiro tsikiro, ngomukore, sirivha, mapuwe anomutengo mukuru, mimbiti, mwenje, mahlanga," 
1Corinthians3:13 mushando womunhu weshe unozooniswa, ngokuti zuva iro rinozouonisa, ngokuti unozooniswa ngomuriro, nomuriro wemene unozoedza mushando womunhu weshe kuti wakadini." 
1Corinthians3:14 Asi kudai mushando womunhu nokuti ngouri wechizotsima waakaaka padera paro, iye unozoashira musharo." 
1Corinthians3:15 Kudai mushando womunhu nokuti ngouri wechizopishwa, iye unozorashikirwa ndiwo, asi muaki emene unozoponeswa, asi kudai ngokupotya muriro." 
1Corinthians3:16 Amuzii here kuti imwimwi muri temperi raMwari nokuti Mweya waMwari unogara mukati mwenyu? 
1Corinthians3:17 Kudai munhu kunyazwi ndiani echishaishira temperi raMwari, Mwari unozomushaishirawo. Ngokuti temperi raMwari rakachena, ndimwi temperi iro." 
1Corinthians3:18 Munhu asadzichengedzera pachake. Kudai munhu echipinimidza kuti wakangwara pakati penyu paneiyi nguva, ngaaite benzi, kuti aite wakangwara." 
1Corinthians3:19 Ngokuti ungwaru hweiyi nyika upenzi kunaMwari. Ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Unobata vakangwara muurimbwi hwavo.”" 
1Corinthians3:20 Zve unoti, “Mambo Mwari unozia mikarakadzo yevakangwara kuti iri isina shwiro.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Ndizvo munhu asaganza ngevanhu. Ngokuti zviro zveshe ngezvenyu," 
1Corinthians3:22 kunyazwi Phauri nokuti Aporosi nokuti Khefasi nokuti nyika nokuti kupona nokuti rufu nokuti zviro zviripo nokuti zviro zvichazouya, zveshe ngezvenyu." 
1Corinthians3:23 Nemwi muri vaKristu, naKristu ngewaMwari." 
1Corinthians4:1 Munhu ngaapinimidze tisu kuti tiri vashandi vaKristu nevangwariri vezvakafishika zvaMwari. 
1Corinthians4:2 Kuneizvi kunotsvakisiswa kunemungwariri kuti aite unogondeka. 
1Corinthians4:3 Asi kwendiri chiri chiro chidoko kuti nditongwe ndimwi nokuti ngokutonga kwomunhu. Asi inini andidzitongi pachangu. 
1Corinthians4:4 Ngokuti andizii chiro chinondiitira ndaa pachangu, asi andipembedzwi ngeichi. Asi uwo unonditonga ndiMambo." 
1Corinthians4:5 Ndizvo musatonga chiro nguva isati yaguma, Mambo asati auya, uwo unozounza mukujeka zviro zvakafishika zvechidima, naye uchabudisa pamhene mipinimidzo yomwoyo. Naapo munhu weshe unozoashira kukudzwa kwake kunobva kunaMwari." 
1Corinthians4:6 Inini ndakaedzanisa muedzaniso uyu kwendiri nokuna Aporosi ngendaa yenyu, hama, kuti mudzidze kubudikidza tisu biningidzo reizvo zvakanyorwa zvinoti, “Musapinda zvakanyorwa,” kuti kusazoapo naumwe wenyu unodzitunhumadza kurwisana umwe kunoumweni." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ngokuti ndiani unokuita wakapinda vamweni? Unenyi chousikazi kuashira? Asi kuti wakachiashira, unoganza ngenyi, kudai ngousikazi kuchiashira kudai ngechipo?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Zvino mwagutiswa! Zvino mwaganya! Mwakaita madzimambo tisiripo! Ngegwinyiso ndingada kuti muite madzimambo kuti isusuwo tiite madzimambo nemwi. 
1Corinthians4:9 Ngokuti ndinopinimidza kuti Mwari wakatiemesa isusu vapostori tiri vokugumisira kwavari veshe, kudai ngevanhu vakatongerwa rufu. Ngokuti takaitwa vokuringirwa kunyika, kungirosi nokunevanhu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tiri mapenzi ngendaa yaKristu, asi imwimwi muri vakangwara munaKristu. Isusu takarembedzeka, asi imwimwi mwakagwinya. Imwimwi munakwo kuremeredzwa, asi isusu atiremeredzwi." 
1Corinthians4:11 Metsa kuguma awa iri tine nzara nenyota, tiri mititinini, tinopamhadzwa, tiri vapepesheki." 
1Corinthians4:12 Tinotambudzika, techishanda ngenyara dzedu. Naapo techitukwa, tinofumisa; apo techitambudzwa, tinoshingirira;" 
1Corinthians4:13 naapo techireiwa, tinoiyanisa. Takaitwa vakadai ngemarara enyika, tiri makoko ezviro zveshe metsa nazvino." 
1Corinthians4:14 Andinyori izvi zviro kumutsverudza, asi kuti ndimupange kudai ngezvomuri vana vanodikanwa." 
1Corinthians4:15 Ngokuti kunyazwi mungaane vadzidzisi vari makumi emazana gumi munaKristu, amuna madzibaba akawanda. Ngokuti munaKristu Jesu inini ndakamubara kubudikidza ngevhangeri." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ndizvo ndinomupota, itai vanondiedzerera." 
1Corinthians4:17 Ngendaa iyi ndakatumira kwomuri Thimothi, mwana wangu unodikanwa nounogondeka munaMambo, iye unozomuedzurira njira dzangu munaKristu, kudai ngezvendinodzidzisa kundau dzeshe muzviara zveshe." 
1Corinthians4:18 Asi vamweni venyu vanodzikudza vechipinimidza kuti andiuyiyo kwomuri. 
1Corinthians4:19 Asi ndinozouya kwomuri ngokukasira, kudai Mambo echitenda, neni ndinozozia, haiwa ngeizwi raavo vanodzikudza, asi ngesimba ravo." 
1Corinthians4:20 Ngokuti umambo hwaMwari andihwopi hweizwi, asi hwesimba." 
1Corinthians4:21 Munodenyi? Ndinozouya kwomuri nendonga here nokuti norudo nomweya wakapfaa? 
1Corinthians5:1 Kunozwika kuti kuripo kuomba pakati penyu, nokuomba kwakadaro apana pakati pevemadzinza; kwokuti munhu unotora mukadzi wababa ake." 
1Corinthians5:2 Nemwi munodzikudza! Amusisiri kubonda here, kuti uwo wakaita uku kushata aduswe pakati penyu?" 
1Corinthians5:3 Ngokuti inini ngegwinyiso ndisinyaripo ngomuiri, asi ndiripo ngomweya; nazvino kudai ngouripo ndatomutonga munhu uwo wakaita icho chiro." 
1Corinthians5:4 Naapo imwimwi mwaungana pamwepo muzina raMambo wedu Jesu, nomweya wangu uripo nesimba raMambo wedu Jesu," 
1Corinthians5:5 munozopira munhu uyu kunaSathani kuti aparadzwe nyama, kuti mweya wake uponeswe ngezuva raMambo Jesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Kudziganzisa kwenyu akuzi kunaka. Amuzii here kuti zvimumera zvishomanani zvinofemisa hlama yeshe? 
1Corinthians5:7 Dusai mumera wekare, kuti muite hlama itsva, kudai ngezvomuri vasina mumera. Ngokuti Kristu gwai rePhasika redu wakabairwa kuita mudiro." 
1Corinthians5:8 Ndizvo ngatingwarire mushongano wedhiri, haiwa ngomumera wekare, nokuti ngomumera wekururu nowokushata, asi ngechingwa chisina mumera, chokugondeka nechegwinyiso." 
1Corinthians5:9 Ndakanyora kwomuri mutsamba yangu kuti musazwanana nevanoomba," 
1Corinthians5:10 izvi azvironzi vanoomba venyika iyi, nokuti vanoemura, nokuti mbavha, nokuti vanodira miedzaniso; ngokuti mukadaro, kunosisira kuti mubve munyika." 
1Corinthians5:11 Asi zvino ndinonyora kwomuri kuti musazwanana nomunhu unozwi mutendi, kudai ari muombi, nokuti muemuri, nokuti mudiri wemiedzaniso, nokuti mutuki, nokuti chiradza, nokuti mupambi; nomunhu wakadaro, haiwa, musadya naye." 
1Corinthians5:12 Ngokuti ndinenyi kuti nditonge avo vari vokubanze? Amutongi here avo vomukati? 
1Corinthians5:13 Asi avo vokubanze Mwari unozovatonga. “Budisai munhu uwo wakashata kuti abve pakati penyu.” 
1Corinthians6:1 Uripo here unendaa kuno umweni, unoshinga kuenda koomangara pamberi pevasikazi kururama, asikaendi pamberi pevakacheneswa?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Amuzii here kuti vakacheneswa vanozotonga nyika? Nokudai nyika inozotongwa ndimwi, amusisiri here kutonga ndaa dzakatsonga?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Amuzii here kuti tinozotonga ngirosi? Kunozopinda kwakaitawani muzviro zvokupona uku? 
1Corinthians6:4 Ndizvo kudai munendaa dzokugura dzokupona uku, munovaemesa kuita vatongi here avo vasina chimiro kwacho muchiara?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Ndinoereketa izvi kuti ndimutsverudze. Chiri gwinyiso here kuti apana naumwe munhu wakangwara pakati penyu, ungakona kugura ndaa pakati pehama dzake." 
1Corinthians6:6 Asi mutendi unomangarira mutendi umweni wake here, kuti atongwe ngevasikatendi?" 
1Corinthians6:7 Ndizvo ngegwinyiso dziripo ndaa pakati penyu, kuti munomangarirana umwe noumweni kuronza kukorera kwenyu. Amutendi ngenyi kushaishirwa? Amutendi ngenyi kubirwa?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Asi imwimwi munoshaisha mwemene nokubirana, nokuna vatendi ngokudaro." 
1Corinthians6:9 Amuzii here kuti vasikazi kururama avazogari nhaka youmambo hwaMwari? Musachengedzerwa! Akuna vasvinuki, vadiri vemiedzaniso, vaombi, vashaishi, vanoshanja nevamuna," 
1Corinthians6:10 mbavha, vaemuri, varadzi, vatuki, vanoba, avatongozogari nhaka youmambo hwaMwari." 
1Corinthians6:11 Nevamweni venyu vaiya vakadaro. Asi mwakashambwa nokucheneswa nokupembedzwa, muzina raMambo Jesu Kristu, muMweya waMwari wedu." 
1Corinthians6:12 “Zviro zveshe zvinotenderwa kwendiri,” asi andizvopi zviro zveshe zvinondinakira. “Zviro zveshe zvinotenderwa kwendiri,” asi andizonyiswi ngechiro nachimwe." 
1Corinthians6:13 “Kudya ngekwendani, nendani ngeyokudya.” Asi Mwari unozoparadza zveshe chimwe ngachimwe. Muiri ausiri wokuomba akadi, asi ngowaMambo naMambo ngowomuiri." 
1Corinthians6:14 Mwari wakamusa Mambo naye unozotimusawo ngesimba rake. 
1Corinthians6:15 Amuzii here kuti miiri yenyu inhengo dzaKristu? Ndizvo ndinozotora here nhengo dzaKristu ndidziite nhengo dzemhombwe? Haiwa! 
1Corinthians6:16 Amuzii here kuti uwo unokwambatirana nemhombwe, unoita muiri umwe nayo? Ngokuti wakati, “Vairi vanozoita nyama imwe.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Asi iye wasunganidzwa naMambo unoita mweya umwewo naye. 
1Corinthians6:18 Tizai kuomba! Chishaishi cheshe chaanoita munhu chiri ngokubanze kwomuiri; asi iye unoomba unoshaishira muiri wake. 
1Corinthians6:19 Amuzii here kuti muiri wenyu itemperi roMweya Wakachena uri mukati mwenyu, womwakaashira kubva kunaMwari, nemwi amuchiri venyu akadi?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Ngokuti imwimwi mwakatengwa ngomutengo. Ndizvo kudzai Mwari mumiiri yenyu. 
1Corinthians7:1 Zvino ngendaa yeizvo zvemwakanyora ndizvo kwendiri, ndinoti, “Zvakanaka kuti munhu asagwama mukadzi.”" 
1Corinthians7:2 Asi, ngendaa dzokuomba, munhu weshe ngaano mukadzi wake, nomukadzi weshe ngaano mwamuna wake." 
1Corinthians7:3 Mwamuna ngaape kumukadzi wake izvo zvinomusisira, ngokudaro mukadzi ngaape kumwamuna wake." 
1Corinthians7:4 Mukadzi aana simba rokutonga padera pomuiri wake, asi mwamuna. Ngokudarozve mwamuna aana simba rokutonga padera pomuiri wake, asi mukadzi." 
1Corinthians7:5 Musanyimana, asi mwechiita ngokutenderana kwenguva, kuti mudzipire mukukumbira, mworomwozo kwambatirana, kuti Sathani asamuedza ngendaa yokutama simba kwenyu rokudzibata." 
1Corinthians7:6 Asi ndinoronza izvi kumutendera, haiwa kumupanga." 
1Corinthians7:7 Asi ndinoda kuti vamuna veshe vadai ndini. Asi munhu weshe unechipo chake chakaparadzana chinobva kunaMwari, umwe chembeu iyi noumweni chembeu iyo." 
1Corinthians7:8 Asi ndinoti kwavari vasikazi kuroora, nokunevari shirikadzi, zvakanaka kwavari kudai vechigara kudai ndini." 
1Corinthians7:9 Asi kuti vasina simba rokudzibata, ngavaroore, ngokuti kwakapinda kunaka kuroora kuno kutsva ngokuemura." 
1Corinthians7:10 Kwavari vakaroora, ndinovapanga, asi andinipi, asi ndiMambo, kuti, “Mukadzi asaparadzana nomwamuna wake.”" 
1Corinthians7:11 (Asi kudai iye echiparadzana naye, ngaagare asikazi kuroorwa, nokuti ngaaiyaniswe nomwamuna wake;) zve, kuti mwamuna asazoramba mukadzi wake." 
1Corinthians7:12 Asi kunevamweni ndinoronza inini, haiwa Mambo. Kudai aripo mutendi, uno mukadzi usikatendi, nomukadzi uwo echitenda kugara naye, asamuramba." 
1Corinthians7:13 Nomukadzi uno mwamuna usikatendi nomwamuna echitenda kugara naye, asamuramba." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ngokuti mwamuna usikatendi unocheneswa kubudikidza ngomukadzi, nomukadzi usikatendi unocheneswa kubudikidza ngomwamuna. Dai zvisikazi kudaro, vana venyu vaizodai vasikazi kucheneswa, asi zvino vakacheneswa." 
1Corinthians7:15 Asi kudai usikatendi echida kuenda, ngaaende; mutendi mwamuna nokuti mukadzi aazi kusungwa mundaa dzakadaro. Ngokuti Mwari wakatidaidzira kunyarara." 
1Corinthians7:16 Iwewe mukadzi, unozia ngenyi kuti unozoponesa mwamuna wako? Iwewe mwamuna, unozia ngenyi kuti unozoponesa mukadzi wako?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Munhu weshe ngaapone kudai ngezvaakamukoanisira Mambo, nokuneizvo zvaakamudaidzira Mwari. Ndizvo zvendinopanga kuzviara zveshe." 
1Corinthians7:18 Uripo here panguvayo munhu wakadaidzwa akachekwa? Asazoita kuti chioniso chokuchekwa chiduswe. Uripo here panguvayo wakadaidzwa asikazi kuchekwa? Asachatsvaka kuchekwa. 
1Corinthians7:19 Kuchekwa chiro chisina shwiro, nokusikachekwa chiro chisina shwiro, kwega kungwarira Mipango yaMwari." 
1Corinthians7:20 Munhu weshe ngaagare mukudaidzwa kwaakadaidzwa kwokuri. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wakadaidzwa here uri hloko? Usakanuka ndizvo. Asi kudai ungasunhurika, tsanangura icho." 
1Corinthians7:22 Ngokuti uwo wakadaidzwa kunaMambo ari hloko, uri wakasunhurwa waMambo. Ngokudaro uwo wakadaidzwa ari wakasunhurika, uri hloko yaKristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Imwimwi mwakatengwa ngomutengo; musaita hloko dzevanhu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Hama, munhu weshe mukudaidzwa kwaakadaidzwa ndikwo, ngaagarepo pamberi paMwari." 
1Corinthians7:25 Zvino ngendaa yemhandwe, andina chironzo chaMambo. Asi ndinoronza kupinimidza kwangu, kudai ngouwo wakaitirwa nyasha ndiMambo kuita unogondeka." 
1Corinthians7:26 Ndizvo ndinopinimidza kuti zvakanaka, ngendaa yokutambudzika kuripo, kuti munhu agare kudai ngezvaari azvo." 
1Corinthians7:27 Wakasungirwa pamukadzi here? Usatsvaka kusunhurika. Wakasunhurwa here kubva pamukadzi? Usatsvaka kuroora. 
1Corinthians7:28 Asi kudai waroora, auzi kushaisha; nokudai mhandwe yaroorwa, aizi kushaisha. Asi vakadaro vanozoa nokutambudzika munyika, asi inini ndinoda kumungwadza." 
1Corinthians7:29 Asi ndinoronza izvi, hama, nguva idoko, kuti kubvira zvino, veshe avo vane vakadzi vaite kudai ngevasina;" 
1Corinthians7:30 naavo vanochema, kuti vaite kudai ngevasikachemi; naavo vanodakara, vaite kudai ngevasikadakari; naavo vanotenga, vaite kudai ngevasikazi kuganya;" 
1Corinthians7:31 naavo vanoshandisa zvomunyika, vaite kudai ngevasikanyanyi kuzvishandisa, ngokuti muemo wenyika ino unopinda." 
1Corinthians7:32 Asi ndinoda kuti imwimwi muite vasina zvokudembatemba. Iye usikazi kuroora unobatika ngezviro zvaMambo, ngenjira yaangamudakadza ndiyo Mambo;" 
1Corinthians7:33 asi uwo wakaroora, unobatika ngezviro zvomunyika, ngenjira yaangamudakadza ndiyo mukadzi wake," 
1Corinthians7:34 nokudisisa kwake kwakapaurwa. Uwo usikazi kuroorwa nemhandwe unobatika ngezviro zvaMambo, kuti aite wakacheneswa zveshe muiri nomweya. Asi uwo wakaroorwa unobatika ngezviro zvenyika, ngenjira yaangadakadza ndiyo mwamuna wake." 
1Corinthians7:35 Ndinoronza izvi kwomuri kuti mudetserwe, haiwa kuteya murau padera penyu, asi kuti zviitwe ngenjira inosisira, kuti mubatirire kunaMambo musikakangaidzwi." 
1Corinthians7:36 Asi kudai ngevakagondisana kuti aripo munhu unopinimidza kuti unoita zvisikasisiri kunemhandwe yake, yabva muzero, nokudai kwechisisira kudaro, echida kuroora, aashaishi; ngavaroore." 
1Corinthians7:37 Asi iye unoema akagwinya mumwoyo mwake, asina chinomuangiridza, asi unesimba padera pokuda kwake, naye wakadziemesera mumwoyo mwake kuti unozongwarira mhandwe yake, unoita zvakanaka." 
1Corinthians7:38 Ndizvo uwo unoroodza mhandwe yake kuti iroorwe unoita zvakanaka; nouwo usikairoodzi, unoita zvakapinda kunaka." 
1Corinthians7:39 Mukadzi unosungirwa kumwamuna wake nguva yeshe yaanopona mwamuna wake. Asi kuti mwamuna afa, wasunhurika kuti aroorwe ngowaanoda, kwega ngenjira yaMambo." 
1Corinthians7:40 Asi unopinda kudakara kudai echindogara akadaro. Uku ndikwo kupinimidza kwangu; ndinopinimidza kuti ndino Mweya waMwari. 
1Corinthians8:1 Zvino ngendaa yezviro zvinopirwa kumiedzaniso yokudira, tinozia kuti, “Teshe tinakwo kuzia.” Kuzia kunopara kudzikudza, asi rudo runoaka." 
1Corinthians8:2 Kunyazwi ndiani unopinimidza kuti unozia chiro, iye asati aanakwo kuzia kunodikanwa;" 
1Corinthians8:3 asi munhu weshe unoda Mwari, unoziikanwa ndiye." 
1Corinthians8:4 Ndizvo ngendaa yokudya izvo zvinopirwa kumiedzaniso, tinozia kuti, “Akuna muedzaniso munyika unopona,” nokuti, “Akuna Mwari umweni, asi umwe.”" 
1Corinthians8:5 Ngegwinyiso kunyazwi zvinyaripo zvinodaidzwa kuti zvimwari, mudenga nokuti munyika; kudai ngezvezviripo zvimwari zvizhinji nemadzimambo mazhinji," 
1Corinthians8:6 asi kwetiri uripo Mwari umwe, ndivo Baba, zviro zveshe zviripo zvinobva kwaari, nesu tiripo ngokuda kwake, naMambo umwe Jesu Kristu, kubudikidza ndiye zviro zveshe zviripo, nesu kubudikidza ndiye tiripo." 
1Corinthians8:7 Asi veshe avana kuzia uku. Ngokuti vamweni vechirovedzera kumiedzaniso metsa zvino, vachandopinimidza ngokudya kwevanodya kudai ngechiro chinopirwa kunemuedzaniso wokudira; nemhumba yavo isina simba inosvipiswa." 
1Corinthians8:8 Asi kudya akuzotiunzi pasinde paMwari. Kunyazwi techirekera kudya, atiiti vakapinda kushata, kunyazwi techidya, atiiti vakapinda kunaka." 
1Corinthians8:9 Asi ngwarai kuti kunyazwi ngeiri njira, uku kusunhurika kwenyu kusaita chipumhuniso kwavari vasina simba." 
1Corinthians8:10 Ngokuti kudai munhu echizokuona iwewe unokuzia, wechidya mutemperi romuedzaniso wokudira, aizogwinyiswi here mhumba yake, isina simba, kudya zviro zvakapirwa kumiedzaniso yokudira?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Ndizvo ngokuzia kwako iye usina simba unofa, hama iyo yaakafira Kristu." 
1Corinthians8:12 Ngokudaro apo pounoshaishira hama dzako nokuremadza mhumba yadzo isina simba, unoshaishira Kristu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Ndizvo kudai chokudya chechiita kuti hama yangu iwe, andizodyi nyama mhera nariini, kuti ndisazoita kuti hama yangu iwe." 
1Corinthians9:1 Andizi kusunhurika here? Andisiri mupostori here? Andizi kuona Jesu Mambo wedu here? Imwimwi amusiri mushando wangu munaMambo here? 
1Corinthians9:2 Kudai ndisiri mupostori kunevamweni, zvakanyadaro kwomuri ndiri mupostori; ngokuti imwimwi muri chioniso choupostori hwangu munaMambo." 
1Corinthians9:3 Uku ndikwo kudzirwira kwangu kwavari vanonditonga. 
1Corinthians9:4 Atitenderwi here kuti tidye nokumwa? 
1Corinthians9:5 Atitenderwi here kuhamba murwendo rwedu tine mukadzi mutendi, kudaiwo ngevamweni vevapostori nehama dzaMambo naKhefasi?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Nokuti inini ndega naBhanabhasi, atitenderwi here kurekera kudzishandira?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Ndiani mujoni unoshanda mushando woujoni ngemare yake? Ndiani unosima munda wemivhini, asikadyi michero yawo? Ndiani unousha zvifuyo, asikadyi mukaka wazvo?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Ndinoereketa izvi here ngomushuma wevanhu, nokuti Mipango aironziwo kudaro here?" 
1Corinthians9:9 Ngokuti kwakanyorwa muMipango yaMosi kuti, “Usazosungira pamuromo wen'ombe apo inopura zviyo.” In'ombe here yaanopinimidza ndiyo Mwari?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Nokuti aaereketi ngendaa yedu tega here? Eya, zvakanyorwa ngendaa yedu, ngokuti uwo unorima unosisira kuti arime echigonda, nouwo unopura, unosisira kuti apure echigonda kuashira." 
1Corinthians9:11 Kudai isusu takakusha kwomuri zviro zvoMweya zvakanaka, indaa huru here kudai techizokukura zviro zvenyu zvenyika?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Kudai vamweni vanouku kutenderwa padera penyu, kunozopinda kwakaitawani kwetiri isusu? Kunyazwi atizi kushandisa uku kutenderwa, asi tinosengerera zviro zveshe kuti tisazopinga vhangeri raKristu." 
1Corinthians9:13 Amuzii here kuti avo vanoshanda pane zvakacheneswa, vanodya kwezviro zvomutemperi? Naavo vanoshandira pamaarita, vane zvikoaniswa zvavo zvepaarita?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Ngokudaro Mambo wakapanga kuti avo vanochumaira vhangeri, vapone ngezvevhangeri." 
1Corinthians9:15 Asi inini andizi kushandisa chimwe cheizvi zviro; nokuti andizi kunyora izvi kuti zviitirwe kwendiri, ngokuti zvirinane kuti ndife, pane kuti munhu aite kuti kuganza kwangu kuitwe kusina shwiro!" 
1Corinthians9:16 Ngokuti kudai ndechichumaira vhangeri, andina chiro chokuganza ndicho, ngokuti ndamanikidzwa. Ngokuti indaa kwendiri kudai ndisikachumairi vhangeri!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Ngokuti kudai ndechiita izvi ngokuda kwangu, ndinoona musharo; asi kudai ndechizviita ngokusikada kwangu, ndino ungwariri hunogondwa kwendiri." 
1Corinthians9:18 Ndizvo musharo wangu ngowenyi? Izvi zvega, apo ndechichumaira vhangeri, ndichumaire vhangeri ngenyasha, kuti ndisashandisa kweshe kutenderwa kwangu muvhangeri." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ngokuti kunyazwi ndaiya ndiri wakasunhurika kunevanhu veshe, ndakadziisa pashi muusungwa kwavari veshe, kuti ndiuyirwe ngevakapinda kuwanda." 
1Corinthians9:20 KuvaJudha, ndakaita kudai ngomuJudha, kuti ndiuyirwe ngavaJudha. Kwavari vari pashi peMipango, ndakaita kudai ngouri pashi peMipango, kunyazwi ndisiri pashi peMipango ndemene, kuti ndiuyirwe ngaavo vari pashi peMipango." 
1Corinthians9:21 Kwavari vasina Mipango ndakaita kudai ndivo vasina Mipango, (kunyazwi andizi kusunhurika kubva kuMipango yaMwari, asi ndiri pashi peMipango yaKristu,) kuti ndiuyirwe ngaavo vasina Mipango." 
1Corinthians9:22 Kwavari vakarembedzeka, ndakaita wakarembedzeka, kuti ndiuyirwe ngevakarembedzeka. Ndakaita zviro zveshe kuvanhu veshe, kuti ngenjira dzeshe ndiponese vamweni." 
1Corinthians9:23 Neni ndinoita izvo zveshe ngendaa yevhangeri, kuti ndionewo chikoaniswa muzvifumiso zvaro." 
1Corinthians9:24 Amuzii here kuti avo vanorumba mujaho, vanorumba veshe, asi ndiumwe unoashira muthuso? Ngokudaro rumbai imwimwi kuti muuashire." 
1Corinthians9:25 Mutambi weshe wemitambo unodzibata muzviro zveshe. Unoita kudaro kuti aashire dzungudza rinoora. Asi isusu tinoashira risikaori. 
1Corinthians9:26 Ndizvo inini andirumbi kudai ngomunhu usikazii nokuti kuambana kudai ngounoambana nedutu; 
1Corinthians9:27 asi ndinoponda muiri wangu, ndechiuisa muuranda, kuti ngesure ndapedza kuchumaira kunevamweni, inini pachangu ndiite unorashwa." 
1Corinthians10:1 Andidi kuti muite vasikazii, hama, kuti madzibaba edu eshe aiya pashi pegore, navo veshe vakaambuka ruandhle," 
1Corinthians10:2 navo veshe vakabhabhatidzwa munaMosi mugore nomuruandhle," 
1Corinthians10:3 navo veshe vakadya kudya kumwekwo kwomweya," 
1Corinthians10:4 navo veshe vakamwa kumwa kumwekwo kwomweya. Ngokuti vakamwa kubva pabuwe romweya rakavateera, nebuwe iro raiya Kristu." 
1Corinthians10:5 Asi Mwari aazi kudakadzwa ngevazhinji vavo, ngokuti vakapedzwa mushango." 
1Corinthians10:6 Zvino zviro izvi zvinoita zvionero zvedu kuti isusu tisazoemura zvakashata, kudai ngezvakaemura avo." 
1Corinthians10:7 Musazoita vanodira miedzaniso, kudai ngezvakaitwa ngevamweni vavo; kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Vanhu vakagara pashi kudya nokumwa, vakamirukazve kutamba.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Atisisiri kudzipinza mundaa dzokuomba kudai ngezvevakaita vamweni vavo, vakaurawa ngezuva rimwe vanhu makumi mairi namatatu emakumi emazana." 
1Corinthians10:9 Atisisiri kuedza Kristu, kudai ngezvavakamuedza vamweni vavo, navo vakapedzwa ngenyoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Nemwi musazovhuruvhuta kudai ngezvevakavhuruvhuta vamweni vavo, navo vakapedzwa ngoMuurayi." 
1Corinthians10:11 Asi izvi zviro zvakaitwa kwavari kuita zvionero; nazvo zvakanyorwa kuti zvitingwadze, isusu tagumirwa ngokupera kwenyika." 
1Corinthians10:12 Ndizvo iye unokarakadza kuti unoema, ngaangware kuti asazowa." 
1Corinthians10:13 Akuna kuedzwa kwakamugumira ukwo kusikazi kugumira vanhu vamweni. Mwari unogondeka, naye aazotendi kuti muedzwe kupinda simba romunaro, asi pakuedzwa unozomunasirirazve njira yokupokonyoka ndiyo, kuti mukone kuwa nesimba rokushingirira." 
1Corinthians10:14 Ndizvo, vanodikanwa vangu, tizai kubva mukudira miedzaniso." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ndinoita kudai ngounoereketa kunevakangwara; pinimidzai pachenyu zvendinoronza. 
1Corinthians10:16 Tsani yokubonga, yetinobonga ndiyo, andiyopi yokuiyana mungazi yaKristu here? Chingwa icho chetinogura, andichopi chokuiyana mumuiri waKristu here?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Ngokuti pane chingwa chimwe, isusu tinyari vazhinji, tiri muiri umwe. Ngokuti isusu teshe tinodya chingwa chimwe." 
1Corinthians10:18 Ringirai vaIsuraeri vari venyama. Avo vanodya midiro inopirwa, avana kuiyana here nearita?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Ndizvo, ndotinyi zvino? Ndinozoronza here kuti chiro chakapirwa miedzaniso yokudira chine shwiro nokuti muedzaniso chiro chine shwiro?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Asi izvo zviro zvevanopira, vanozvipira kunemadhimoni, haiwa kunaMwari. Neni andidi kuti muiyane nemadhimoni." 
1Corinthians10:21 Amungamwi kubva kunetsani yaMambo nokutsani yemadhimoni. Amukoni kudya kubva patafura raMambo nepatafura remadhimoni. 
1Corinthians10:22 Nokuti isusu tinoda kumusa ndurumwa yaMambo here? Isusu takagwinya kumupinda here? 
1Corinthians10:23 “Zviro zveshe zvinotenderwa,” asi andizvopi zviro zveshe zvinodetsera. “Zviro zveshe zvinotenderwa,” asi andizvopi zviro zveshe zvinoaka." 
1Corinthians10:24 Kusazoapo munhu unodzitsvakira zvake, asi zvoumweni." 
1Corinthians10:25 Idyai cheshe chinotengeswa pamusika wenyama, musikabvunzi mubvunzo ngendaa yemhumba," 
1Corinthians10:26 ngokuti, “Nyika ngeyaMambo Mwari, nazvo zveshe zvirimwo.”" 
1Corinthians10:27 Kudai umwe weavo vasikatendi echimukoka koodya, nemwi mwechida kuenda, idyai cheshe chinoiswa pamberi penyu, musikabvunzi mubvunzo ngendaa yemhumba." 
1Corinthians10:28 Asi kudai aripo munhu unozoti kwomuri, “Ichi chakapirwa kune miedzaniso yokudira,” musachidya, ngendaa youwo wachironza kwomuri, uye ngendaa yemhumba." 
1Corinthians10:29 Andironzi ngendaa yemhumba yako, asi ngendaa yemhumba youmweni, ngokuti kusunhurika kwangu kunotongwa ngenyi ngemhumba youmweni?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Kudai ndechidya ndechibonga, ngenyi ndechitukwa ngendaa yeizvo zvendinobonga?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Ndizvo kunyazwi mwechidya nokuti mwechimwa, kunyazwi chiinyi chomunoita, itai zveshe mukukudza Mwari." 
1Corinthians10:32 Musapumhunisa vaJudha nokuti vaGiriki nokuti chiara chaMwari," 
1Corinthians10:33 kudai ndiniwo ndinoedza kudakadza vanhu veshe ngezviro zveshe zvendinoita, ndisikatsvaki kuuyirwa kwangu, asi kuuyirwa kwevazhinji, kuti vaponeswe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Itai vaedzereri vangu, kudai ndiniwo ndiri muedzereri waKristu." 
1Corinthians11:2 Zvino ndinomuirikidza ngokuti munondikarakadza ngezviro zveshe nokubatirira kuzviemeso kudai ngezvendakazvipira kwomuri. 
1Corinthians11:3 Asi ndinoda kuti muzie kuti Kristu ndiye soro romunhu weshe, nomwamuna ndiye soro romukadzi wake, naMwari ndiye soro raKristu." 
1Corinthians11:4 Kunyazwi ndiani mwamuna unokumbira nokuti kuprofeta anesoro rakafukidzwa, aaremeredzi soro rake." 
1Corinthians11:5 Asi mukadzi weshe unokumbira nokuti kuprofeta anesoro rake risikazi kufukidzwa, aaremeredzi soro rake, ngokuti kudai zvakadaro, zvakatodzana nokuparwa soro rake." 
1Corinthians11:6 Ngokuti kudai mukadzi asikazi kudzifukidza pachake, ngaagundwe bvudzi rake. Asi kudai zvechitsverudza kuti mukadzi agundwe nokuti kuparwa, ngaafukidze soro rake." 
1Corinthians11:7 Ngokuti azvisisiri kuti mwamuna afukidze soro rake, ngokuti iye muedzaniso nouthende hwaMwari; asi mukadzi ndiye uthende hwomwamuna." 
1Corinthians11:8 Ngokuti mwamuna aazi kubva kumukadzi, asi mukadzi wakabva kumwamuna." 
1Corinthians11:9 Ngokuti mwamuna aazi kusikirwa mukadzi, asi mukadzi wakasikirwa mwamuna." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ngeiyi ndaa kunosisira kuti mukadzi afukidze soro rake kuonisa kuti uri pashi pesimba remwamuna wake ngendaa yengirosi. 
1Corinthians11:11 Zvakanyadaro mukadzi aari ngokubanze kwomwamunapi, nokuti mwamuna aari ngokubanze kwomukadzipi kunaMambo." 
1Corinthians11:12 Ngokuti kudai ngomukadzi wakabva kuno mwamuna, ngokudaro mwamuna unobarwa ngomukadzi; asi zviro zveshe zvakabva kunaMwari." 
1Corinthians11:13 Dzigurirei mwemene; zvinosisira here kuti mukadzi akumbire kunaMwari anesoro risikazi kufukidzwa? 
1Corinthians11:14 Amudzidziswi here ngechibarirwe chenyu kuti, kudai mwamuna ane bvudzi rakareba, rinomutsverudzisa," 
1Corinthians11:15 asi kudai mukadzi anebvudzi rakareba, riri uthende kwaari? Ngokuti bvudzi rake rakahinwa kwaari kumufukidza." 
1Corinthians11:16 Asi kuti aripo munhu unooneka, echida kuita hasha, atina muitiro wakadaro, kunyazwi nezviara zvaMwari azvinawo." 
1Corinthians11:17 Asi ndechimupa uku kupanga, andimuirikidzi akadi, kuti munoungana pamwepo musikaunganiri zvakapinda kunaka, asi munounganira zvakapinda kushata." 
1Corinthians11:18 Ngokuti kutanga kwazvo zveshe, naapo mwoungana muchiara, ndinozwa kuti kuripo kuparadzana pakati penyu; neni ndinotenda zvimweni zvazvo." 
1Corinthians11:19 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso kunosisira kuti kuapo kuparadzana pakati penyu, kuti zvinase kuoneka pamhene kuti ngevari vanoashirika." 
1Corinthians11:20 Naapo mwaungana pamwepo, asikutipi mudye kudya kwaMambo." 
1Corinthians11:21 Ngokuti apo nguva yaguma yokudya, munhu weshe unodzitorera kutangira vamweni kudya kwake; umweni unenzara noumweni waradza." 
1Corinthians11:22 Chiinyi! Amuna here mhatso dzokudyira nedzokumwira? Nokuti munoshoora here chiara chaMwari nokuvatsverudza avo vasina chiro? Ndinozotinyi kwomuri? Ndinozomuirikidza ngeichi here? Ngendaa iyi andimuirikidzi. 
1Corinthians11:23 Ngokuti ndakaashira kubva kunaMambo, icho chendakapawo kwomuri, kuti Mambo Jesu ngousiku uhwo hwaakatengeswa ndihwo, wakatora chingwa," 
1Corinthians11:24 naapo abonga, wakachigura, akati, “Uyu ndiwo muiri wangu, unogurwa ngendaa yenyu. Itai ichi mukundikarakadza.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Ngokudarozve wakatora tsani, ngesure kwokudya echiti, “Tsani iyi ndiyo chitenderano chitsva mungazi yangu. Itai ichi nguva dzeshe dzomunomwa kweiri, mukundikarakadza.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Ngokuti nguva dzeshe dzomunodya ichi chingwa nokumwa kuiyi tsani, munoteketesa kufa kwaMambo metsa auye." 
1Corinthians11:27 Ndizvo, kunyazwi ndiani unozodya chingwa nokuti kumwa kutsani yaMambo ngenjira isikasisiri, unozoita ndaa yomuiri neyengazi yaMambo." 
1Corinthians11:28 Asi munhu ngaadziringire pachake, adaro ngaadye kuneicho chingwa nokumwa kuneiyo tsani." 
1Corinthians11:29 Ngokuti uwo unodya nokuti kumwa, asikanasi kuzwisisa muiri, unodyira nokuti kumwira kutongwa pachake." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ngeiyi ndaa vazhinji venyu vakarembedzeka nokurwara, nevazhinji vakafa." 
1Corinthians11:31 Asi kudai isusu pachedu takadziringira, taizodai tisikatongwi." 
1Corinthians11:32 Asi apo petinotongwa, tinoororwa ndiMambo, kuti tisazorashwa pamwepo nevenyika." 
1Corinthians11:33 Ndizvo, hama dzangu, apo mwoungana pamwepo kuti mudye, emeranai." 
1Corinthians11:34 Kudai aripo unenzara, ngaadye kanyi, kuti kuungana kwenyu kusazoita kuti mutongwe. Ngendaa yezviro zvimweni ndinozozvirongedza ndauyeyo." 
1Corinthians12:1 Zvino ngendaa yezvipo zvoMweya, hama, andidi kuti muite vasikazii." 
1Corinthians12:2 Munozia kuti apo muchiri mahedheni mwaikweyiwa kuenda kune iyo miedzaniso isikaereketi, kunyazwi mwaikweyiwa ngenjira yakadini." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ndizvo ndinoda kuti muzwisise kuti akuna munhu, unoereketa ndiMweya waMwari, ungaronza kuti, “Jesu wakatukwa!” Zve, akuna munhu ungaronza kuti, “Jesu ndiMambo”, kwega atungamirirwa ndiMweya Wakachena." 
1Corinthians12:4 Zvino zviripo zvipo zvakaparadzana, asi Mweya ndiumwe;" 
1Corinthians12:5 kuripozve kuparadzana kwokushandira, asi Mambo ndiumwewo;" 
1Corinthians12:6 kuripozve kuparadzana kwemishando, asi Mwari umwe, uwo unoshanda zviro zveshe kwavari veshe." 
1Corinthians12:7 Asi kuno munhu weshe kunopuwa kuoniswa kwoMweya, kuti veshe vafumiswe." 
1Corinthians12:8 Ngokuti kuno umwe kunopuwa kubudikidza ndiMweya izwi roungwaru, nokuno umweni kunopuwa izwi roruziyo, ndiMweya umwewo." 
1Corinthians12:9 Kuno umweni kunopuwa kugonda, kubudikidza ndiMweya umwewo, nokuno umweni kunopuwa zvipo zvokuponesa, kubudikidza ndiMweya umwewo," 
1Corinthians12:10 nokuno umweni kunopuwa kuita mishando yokuita mishamiso, nokuno umweni kunopuwa kuprofeta, nokuno umweni kunopuwa kuzwisisa mweya, nokuno umweni kunopuwa kuereketa ngendimi dzakaparadzana, nokuno umweni kunopuwa kududzira ndimi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Asi izvi zveshe zvinoshandwa kubudikidza ngaumwe ndiMweya umwewo; unokoanisira kuno munhu umwe ngaumwe, kudai ngokuda kwake." 
1Corinthians12:12 Ngokuti kudai ngomuiri umwe, unemarupande akawanda, nemarupande eshe omuiri akanyawanda ari muiri umwe, ndizvo zvakaitawo Kristu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Ngokuti isusu teshe takabhabhatidzwa muMweya umwe kuita muiri umwe, vaJudha nokuti vaGiriki, vakasungwa nokuti vakasunhurika, nesu teshe takaitwa kuti timwe kuMweya umwewo." 
1Corinthians12:14 Ngokuti muiri auizwi ngerupande rumwe, asi ngemarupande mazhinji." 
1Corinthians12:15 Kudai tsoka yechiti, “Ngokuti andiri nyarapi, andichiri womuiripi”, izvo zvingaita kuti isaita nhengo yomuiri here?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Nokudai nzee yechiti, “Ngokuti andiri dzisopi, andichiri womuiripi;” izvo zvingaita kuti isaita nhengo yomuiri here?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Kudai muiri weshe waiya dziso, kuzwa kwaizoapari? Kudai weshe waiya nzee, kunuhwidza kwaizoapari?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Asi kuti ngezvezvakaita zvino Mwari wakaemesa marupande mumuiri rumwe ngarumwe, kudai ngokuda kwake." 
1Corinthians12:19 Kudai eshe aiya rupande rumwe, muiri ungazoapari?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Asi zvino kunemarupande mazhinji, asi muiri umwe." 
1Corinthians12:21 Dziso aringakoni kuronza kunenyara kuti, “Andikutami iwewe,” nokutizve soro aringakoni kuronza kudaro kunemirenje, “Andikutami iwewe.”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Haiwa, marupande omuiri awo anoringirika akarembedzeka, ndiwo anopinda kudikanwa," 
1Corinthians12:23 naawo marupande omuiri etinopinimidza ndiwo kuti aanyanyi kuremeredzwa, ndiwo etinoremeredza kakurutu, nemarupande edu asikanasi kuringirika, ndiwo anoringirika akapinda kunaka;" 
1Corinthians12:24 apo marupande edu anoringirika aatami kuremeredzwa. Asi Mwari wakaronga muiri, echipa kuremeredzwa kukurutu kuno urwo rupande rwaikutama," 
1Corinthians12:25 kuti kusazoapo kuparadzana mumuiri, asi kuti marupande eshe angwarirane rumwe kuno rumweni." 
1Corinthians12:26 Kudai rupande rumwe rwechitambudzika, marupande eshe anotambudzika pamwepo narwo; kudai rupande rumwe rwechiremeredzwa, marupande eshe anodakara pamwepo narwo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Zvino imwimwi muri muiri waKristu, uwo nouwo muri marupande awo." 
1Corinthians12:28 NaMwari wakaemesa muchiara, vokutanga vapostori, vechipiri vaprofeti, vechitatu vadzidzisi, ngesure vaiti vemishamiso, ngesure zvipo zvokuponesa, vadetseri, vatungamiriri nevaereketi vendimi dzakaparadzana." 
1Corinthians12:29 Veshe vapostori here? Veshe vaprofeti here? Veshe vadzidzisi here? Veshe vaiti vemishamiso here? 
1Corinthians12:30 Veshe vanezvipo zvokuponesa here? Veshe vanoereketa ngendimi here? Veshe vanodudzira here? 
1Corinthians12:31 Asi itai vanodisisa zvipo zvakapinda kukura. Asi ndinomuonisa njira yakapinda kunaka. 
1Corinthians13:1 Kunyazwi ndikanyaereketa ngendimi dzevanhu nedzengirosi, asi ndisina rudo, ndiri thusi rinoita bope nokuti ngoma yesimbi inorira." 
1Corinthians13:2 Kunyazwi ndinokuprofeta, ndikazia zvakafishika zveshe nokuzia kweshe, kunyazwi ndinokugonda kweshe, kunokwana kudusa mitunhu, asi ndisina rudo, andiri chiropi." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ndikapa zveshe zvendinazvo kukovera varombo, nokuti ndikapa muiri wangu kupishwa, asi ndisina rudo, azvindidetseri chiro." 
1Corinthians13:4 Rudo runosengerera; rudo runenyasha; rudo aruna ndurumwa nokuti kudziganzisa, nokuti kudzitunhumadza." 
1Corinthians13:5 Aruiti zvisikasisiri. Rudo arudzitsvakiri zvarwo, arutseneswi nokuti kuereketa zvakashata." 
1Corinthians13:6 Arudakari ngezvisikazi kururama, asi runodakara ngezvegwinyiso." 
1Corinthians13:7 Runodumaidza zviro zveshe, runotenda zviro zveshe, runogondera zviro zveshe, runoshingirira zviro zveshe." 
1Corinthians13:8 Rudo aruperi; asi kudai kunyaripo kuprofeta, kunozopera; kunyaripo kuereketa ngendimi, dzinozonyarara; kunyaripo kuzia, kunozopera." 
1Corinthians13:9 Ngokuti tinozia zvimweni nesu tinoprofeta zvimweni; 
1Corinthians13:10 asi apo zvaguma zvakaperera, naapo izvo zvisikazi kuperera zvinozopera." 
1Corinthians13:11 Naapo ndichiri mwana mudoko, ndakaereketa kudai ngomwana mudoko, ndakapinimidza kudai ngomwana mudoko, ndakazia kudai ngomwana mudoko; apo ndaa munhu wakura, ndakarasha zvouhwana." 
1Corinthians13:12 Ngokuti zvino tinoona ngomuchiboniboni mumauma, asi ngenguva iyo tinozoonana hope kuhope. Zvino ndinozia zvimweni, asi ngenguva iyo ndinozonasa kuzia kudai ngezvendakaziikanwa." 
1Corinthians13:13 Ndizvo zvino zvinogara kugonda, kutenda norudo, izvi zvitatu; asi chikuru chazvo chakapindisisa kukura rudo." 
1Corinthians14:1 Teerai rudo, mudisise zvipo zvoMweya, kakurutu kuti muprofete." 
1Corinthians14:2 Ngokuti uwo unoereketa ngendimi aaereketi kunevanhu asi kunaMwari; ngokuti apana munhu unomuzwa, asi unoereketa zvakafishika muMweya." 
1Corinthians14:3 Asi ngenjira imweni uwo unoprofeta unoereketa kuvanhu zvinoaka, zvinoembedzera nezvinonyaradza." 
1Corinthians14:4 Uwo unoereketa ngendimi unodziaka, asi uwo unoprofeta unoaka chiara." 
1Corinthians14:5 Zvino ndinoda kuti imwimwi mweshe muerekete ngendimi, asi kupinda izvo, kuti muprofete. Ngokuti uwo unoprofeta, mukuru kupinda uwo unoereketa ngendimi, asi kuti umweni akakhumucha, kuti chiara chiakiwe." 
1Corinthians14:6 Asi zvino, hama, kudai ndechiuya kwomuri, ndechiereketa ngendimi ndinozomudetsera ngenjiranyi, ngepabanze pokuti ndierekete kwomuri ngenjira inomuunzira chioniso nokuti ruziyo nokuti chiprofeti nokuti chidzidziso?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Kunyazwi zviro zvisina kupona zvinorira, kunyazwi iri nyere nokuti chidangari, kudai zvisikaparadzani mukurira kwazvo, kungaitwa maziirwenyi kurira kwazvo?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Ngokuti kudai gwama rikarira kusikaziikanwi, ndiani unozodzinasirira kuenda kuhondo?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Ndizvo nemwiwo pachenyu, kudai mwechiereketa ngendimi izvo zvisikanasi kuzwisisika, zvingaita maziikanirwenyi izvo zvinoereketwa? Ngokuti ngokudaro munozoereketa kunedutu." 
1Corinthians14:10 Dziripo ndimi dzembeu dzakaparadzana dzakawanda munyika, akuna naimwe yadzo isikaronzi chiro." 
1Corinthians14:11 Ndizvo kudai ndisikazii biningidzo reizwi, ndinozoita munhu mupara kwaari unoereketa nouwo unoereketa unozoita munhu mupara kwendiri." 
1Corinthians14:12 Ndizvo nemwiwo pachenyu, kwechioneka kuti munodisisa kuwa nezvipo zvoMweya, tsvakai kuti muwanzwe mukuaka chiara." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ndizvo uwo unoereketa ngendimi, ngaakumbire simba rokukhumucha." 
1Corinthians14:14 Ngokuti kudai ndechikumbira ngendimi, mweya wangu unokumbira, asi mupinimidzo wangu auzwisisi." 
1Corinthians14:15 Ndizvo ndinozoitenyi? Ndinozokumbira mumweya, ndechikumbira ngomupinimidzowo. Ndinozoemba mumweya, ndechiemba ngomupinimidzowo." 
1Corinthians14:16 Ngenjira imweni, kudai wechibonga mumweya, uwo usikazii ungazoita maronzerenyi kuti, “Ameni,” apo wobonga, kwechioneka kuti iye aazii chounoronza?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso iwewe unonasa kubonga, asi umweni aazi kuakiwa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndinobonga Mwari, ngokuti ndinoereketa ngendimi kupinda imwimwi mweshe." 
1Corinthians14:19 Asi muchiara ndingada kuti ndierekete mazwi mashanu ngokupinimidza kwangu, kuti ndidzidzise vamweni, kupinda kuereketa mazwi ari gumi remakumi emazana ngendimi dzisikaziikanwi." 
1Corinthians14:20 Hama, musaita vana mukupinimidza; asi munezvakashata itai vana, asi mukupinimidza itai vabva muzero." 
1Corinthians14:21 Kwakanyorwa muMipango kuti, “Ngevanhu vendimi dzimweni, ngemiromo yevenyika mukanza ndinozoereketa kuneava vanhu; kunyazwi zvakadaro, avazondizwi”, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
1Corinthians14:22 Ndizvo ndimi dziri chioniso, haiwa kwavari vanotenda, asi kwavari vasikatendi; asi kuprofeta kuri chioniso, haiwa kwavari vasikatendi, asi kwavari vanotenda." 
1Corinthians14:23 Ndizvo, kudai chiara cheshe chaungana pamwepo, navo veshe vechiereketa ngendimi, kukapoteramwo munhu usikazii nokuti usikatendi, wakadaro aazoronzi here kuti muri vanopenga?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Asi kudai veshe vechiprofeta, oroopoteramwo umwe usikatendi, munhu mupara nokuti usikazii, iye unooniswa kushaisha kwake ndivo veshe, unotongwa ndivo veshe." 
1Corinthians14:25 Zvakafishika zvomwoyo wake zvinooniswa; ndizvo ngokudaro unozowa pashi ngehope yake nokudira Mwari, echironza kuti, “Mwari uri pakati penyu ngegwinyiso.”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Ndizvo chiinyi, hama? Apo mwooungana pamwepo, uwo nouwo unenduyo, chidzidziso, chioniso, ndimi nokukhumucha. Zviro zveshe ngazviitwe zvinoaka." 
1Corinthians14:27 Kudai aripo munhu nokuti ngouri unoereketa ngendimi, ngavaite vairi nokuti vasikapindi vatatu, ngavaite ngokuteererana; noumweni ngaakhumuche." 
1Corinthians14:28 Asi kudai pasina unokhumucha, ngaanyarare muchiara, ngaadziereketere ega nokunaMwari." 
1Corinthians14:29 Vaprofeti vairi nokuti vatatu ngavaerekete nevamweni ngavazvipime. 
1Corinthians14:30 Asi kudai chiro chechioniswa kuno umweni unogara apo, wokutanga ngaanyarare." 
1Corinthians14:31 Ngokuti imwimwi mweshe mungaprofeta ngokuteererana, kuti veshe vadzidze nokuti veshe vaembedzerwe." 
1Corinthians14:32 Nomweya yevaprofeti inopfaira vaprofeti," 
1Corinthians14:33 ngokuti Mwari andiyepi Mwari wehohoho, asi wokunyarara. Kudai ngezvezvakaita kuzviara zveshe zvevakacheneswa," 
1Corinthians14:34 vakadzi ngavanyarare muzviara. Ngokuti akutenderwi kwavari kuti vaerekete, asi ngavapfaire kudai ngezvinoronzwa ngeMipango." 
1Corinthians14:35 Kudai vechida kuzia chiro, ngavabvunze kuvamuna vavo vaakanyi. Ngokuti zvinotsverudza kuti mukadzi aerekete muchiara." 
1Corinthians14:36 Nokuti izwi raMwari rakatanga kubuda kubva kwomuri here? Nokuti rakagumira imwimwi mwega here? 
1Corinthians14:37 Kudai aripo munhu unopinimidza ngokwake kuti uri muprofeti nokuti uri womweya, ngaazvitende izvo zvendinonyora kwomuri, kuti zviri mipango yaMambo." 
1Corinthians14:38 Asi kudai aripo munhu usikabatiki ngeizvi, musabatikawo ndiye." 
1Corinthians14:39 Ndizvo, hama dzangu, emurirai kuti muprofete, musarambidza kuereketa ngendimi." 
1Corinthians14:40 Asi zveshe ngazviitwe ngenjira inosisira nokuteererana. 
1Corinthians15:1 Zvino ndinomuziisa, hama, vhangeri iro rendakachumaira kwomuri, romwakaashirawo, romunoema mukati mwaro," 
1Corinthians15:2 kubudikidza ndirowo munoponeswa; ngemazwi awo endakachumaira kwomuri, kudai mwechiabatisisa, ngepabanze pokuti mwakatenda pasina shwiro." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ngokuti ndakapa kwomuri kutanga, icho chendakaashirawo inini, kuti Kristu wakafira zvishaishi zvedu, kudai ngezvakanyorwa," 
1Corinthians15:4 nokuti iye wakaikwa, zve, wakamuswa ngezuva rechitatu, kudai ngezvakanyorwa," 
1Corinthians15:5 nokuti wakaoneka kunaKhefasi; ngesure wakaoneka kunegumi navairi. 
1Corinthians15:6 Ngesure wakaoneka kunehama dzinopinda mazana mashanu vari pamwepo, vazhinji vavo vachiripo metsa nazvino, asi vamweni vavo vakafa." 
1Corinthians15:7 Naapo wakadzionisa kunaJakobe; nangesure wakaoneka kuvapostori veshe. 
1Corinthians15:8 Pakupedzisira wakadzionisazve kwendiri, kudai ngouwo wakabarwa nguva isati yaguma." 
1Corinthians15:9 Ngokuti inini ndiri mudoko wevapostori, andisisiri kudaidzwa kuti ndiri mupostori, ngokuti ndakatambudza chiara chaMwari." 
1Corinthians15:10 Asi ngenyasha dzaMwari ndiri munhu wakadai zvino, nenyasha dzake dzakapuwa kwendiri, adzizi kuoneka dzisina shwiro; asi ndakashanda kakurutu kupinda veshe, kunyazwi andinipi, asi inyasha dzaMwari dzaiya mwendiri." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ndizvo kunyazwi ndini nokuti ndivo, ndiyo njira yetinochumaira ndiyo nenjira yemwakatenda ndiyo." 
1Corinthians15:12 Zvino kudai Kristu echichumairwa kuti wakamuka kubva kwevakafa, kunoronzwa ngenyi ngevamweni pakati penyu, kuti akuna kumuka kubva kwevakafa?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Asi kudai kusina kumuka kwevakafa, zvino Kristu aazi kumuswawo;" 
1Corinthians15:14 kudai Kristu asikazi kumuswa, kuchumaira kwedu akuna shwiro nokugonda kwenyu akuna shwiro." 
1Corinthians15:15 Isusu tinooneka tiri zvapupu zvokunyepa zvaMwari, ngokuti takapupura ndiMwari kuti wakamusa Kristu, uwo waasikazi kumusa, kuti riri gwinyiso kuti vakafa avamuswi." 
1Corinthians15:16 Ngokuti kudai vakafa vasikamuswi, zvino Kristu aazi kumuswa." 
1Corinthians15:17 Kudai Kristu asikazi kumuswa, kugonda kwenyu akuna shwiro nemwi muchirimwo muzvishaishi zvenyu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Zvino naavowo vakafa munaKristu vakarova. 
1Corinthians15:19 Kudai mukupona uku kwega tino kugonda munaKristu, tinosisira kukungurirwa kupinda vanhu veshe." 
1Corinthians15:20 Asi zvino Kristu wakamuswa kubva kwevakafa, wakaita muchero womutanguro weavo vakafa." 
1Corinthians15:21 Ngokuti kufa kwakaguma kubudikidza ngomunhu, kumukazve kwevakafa kwakaguma kubudikidza ngomunhu;" 
1Corinthians15:22 ngokuti kudai ngezvevanofa veshe munaAdhamu, ndizvo veshe muna Kristu vachaitwa vanorarama." 
1Corinthians15:23 Asi umwe ngaumwe kudai ngourongwa hwake. Kristu ndiye muchero womutanguro, zvino pakuuya kwake avo vari vaKristu." 
1Corinthians15:24 Naapo kunouya magumo, paanozopa umambo kunaMwari Baba, apo apedza kuparadza kutonga kweshe noumambo hweshe nesimba reshe." 
1Corinthians15:25 Ngokuti kunosisira kuti atonge metsa aisa eshe magaa ake pashi petsoka dzake. 
1Corinthians15:26 Gaa rokugumisira rinozoparadzwa rufu. 
1Corinthians15:27 “Ngokuti Mwari wakapfaisa zviro zveshe pashi petsoka dzake.” Asi apo chooti, “Zviro zveshe zvapfaiswa,” zviri pamhene kuti azvironzi kuti iye wapfaiswa, uwo wakapfaisa zviro zveshe pashi pake." 
1Corinthians15:28 Naapo zviro zveshe zvapfaiswa kwaari, zvino Mukororo emene unozopfairawo uwo wakapfaisa zveshe zviro pashi pake, kuti Mwari aite zveshe munezveshe." 
1Corinthians15:29 Kudai zvisikazi kudaro, vanozoitenyi avo vakabhabhatidzirwa vakafa? Kudai vakafa vasikamuswi, ndizvo vanobhabhatidzirirwenyi vakafa?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Isusu tinogara munyatwa ngenyi maawa eshe? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ndinopika, hama, ngokuganza kwangu kwendinakwo ndimwi, munaKristu Jesu Mambo wedu, kuti ndinofa zuva ngezuva." 
1Corinthians15:32 Kudai ngomushuma wevanhu ndakaambana nezvikara zvomushango muEfesu, kunondidetserenyi? Kudai vakafa vasikamuswi, “Ngatidye, techimwa, ngokuti mangwani tinozofa.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Musachengedzerwa: “Kuiyana nevakashata kunoparadza miitiro yakanaka.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Mukai mumipinimidzo yenyu yakarurama, murekere kuita zvakashata; ngokuti vanhu vamweni avana ruziyo ndiMwari. Ndinoereketa izvi kumutsverudza." 
1Corinthians15:35 Asi umweni unozoti, “Vakafa vanoita mamusirwenyi? Vanozouya nomuiri wakadini?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Iwewe benzi! Icho chounokusha, achingameri asi kuti chafa." 
1Corinthians15:37 Neicho chounokusha, aukushi uwo muiri unozoapo, asi tsangu yega, pamweni yekoroni nokuti yembeu imweni." 
1Corinthians15:38 Asi Mwari unopa muiri unomuemo wakadai ngokuda kwake, nokumbeu imwe ngaimwe unopa muiri wayo." 
1Corinthians15:39 Nyama yeshe aizi kuita nyama yembeu imweyo, asi iriyo mbeu imwe yenyama yevanhu, nembeu imweni yenyama yemhuka, nembeu imweni yenyama yeshiri, nembeu imweni yenyama yehove." 
1Corinthians15:40 Iriyozve miiri yomudenga nemiiri yomunyika, asi uthende hweiyo yomudenga ngohwembeu imweni, nouthende hweiyo yomunyika ngohwembeu imweni." 
1Corinthians15:41 Huriyo uthende humweni hwezuva, huriyo uthende humweni hwomwedzi, huriyo uthende humweni hwenyeredzi; ngokuti nyeredzi imwe inosiyana nenyeredzi imweni uthende hwayo." 
1Corinthians15:42 Ndizvowo zvakaita kumuka kwevakafa. Muiri unokushwa mukuora, unomuswa mukusikaora." 
1Corinthians15:43 Unokushwa mukusikaremeredzwa, unomuswa muuthende. Unokushwa mukurembedzeka, unomuswa musimba." 
1Corinthians15:44 Unokushwa uri muiri wenyama, unomuswa waa muiri womweya. Kudai uripo muiri wenyama, uripozve muiri womweya." 
1Corinthians15:45 Kwakanyorwazve kuti, “Munhu wokutanga, Adhamu, wakaitwa munhu unopona,” Adhamu wokugumisira wakaitwa mweya unopa kupona." 
1Corinthians15:46 Asi andiwopi mweya wokutanga, asi wenyama; ngesure kwouya womweya." 
1Corinthians15:47 Munhu wokutanga wakabva mumavhu, munhu wemavhu. Munhu wechipiri wakabva mudenga." 
1Corinthians15:48 Avo vari vemavhu vakadai ngouwo wemavhu. Naavo vari vomudenga, vakadai ngouwo womudenga." 
1Corinthians15:49 Kudai ngezvetaiya mumuemo wouwo wemavhu, zve, tinozowa nomuemo wouwo womudenga." 
1Corinthians15:50 Zvino ndinoronza izvi, hama, nyama nengazi azvingakoni kugara nhaka youmambo hwaMwari; nokuti zvinoora azvingagari nhaka yezvisikaori." 
1Corinthians15:51 Ringirai, ndinomuronzera zvakafishika! Atizofi teshe, asi tinozotsandudzwa teshe," 
1Corinthians15:52 nenguva doko, ngokuphipha kwedziso, ngenguva yokuridzwa kwegwama rokugumisira. Ngokuti gwama rinozorira, nevakafa vanozomuswa vasikaori, nesu tinozotsandudzwa." 
1Corinthians15:53 Ngokuti muiri uyu unoora unosisira kupfeka usikachazoori, nouyu unofa unosisira kupfeka usikachazofi." 
1Corinthians15:54 Naapo muiri uyu unoora wazopfeka usikachazoori, nouwo muiri unofa wazopfeka usikachazofi, naapo rinozozarisika izwi rakanyorwa kuti, “Kufa kwamedzwa ngokunyiswa.”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Iwewe rufu, kunyisa kwako kuri pari? Iwewe rufu, ukaira hwako huri pari?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Ukaira hworufu kushaisha; nesimba rokushaisha riri Mipango. 
1Corinthians15:57 Asi ngaabongwe Mwari, unotipa kunyisa kubudikidza ndiye Mambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians15:58 Ndizvo, hama dzangu dzinodikanwa, itai vakagwinya, vasikatsukunuswi, ngenguva dzeshe mwechitsamwirira mumishando yaMambo, ngokuti munozia kuti mishando yenyu aiiti isina shwiro munaMambo." 
1Corinthians16:1 Zvino ngendaa yokuunganidzira munikero wokupa vakacheneswa: kudai ngezvendakapanga vezviara zveGaratia, itaiwo kudaro nemwi." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ngezuva rokutanga reshe revhiki, uwo nouwo wenyu ngaadziisire ngokwake mumangwaririro, kudai ngezvaakamufumisa Mwari, kuti kusazoapo kuunganidzwa ndagumeyo." 
1Corinthians16:3 Naapo ndaguma, ndinozotuma avo vomunozotsanangura netsamba kuti vatware zvipo zvenyu kuenda Jerusarema." 
1Corinthians16:4 Kudai zvechioneka zvakasisira kuti ndiendewo, vanozohamba neni." 
1Corinthians16:5 Ndinozouya kwomuri ngesure ndahamba ngemuMasedhonia; ngokuti ndinosisira kuhamba ngemuMasedhonia. 
1Corinthians16:6 Pamweni ndinozogara nemwi nokuti kupedza nguva yechando ndiripo, kuti imwimwi mundiperekedze parwendo rwangu kunyazwi ngepari pendinozoenda." 
1Corinthians16:7 Ngokuti andidi kumuona zvino, ndechipinda; ngokuti ndinogonda kuzogara mukuwo nemwi, kudai Mambo echitenda." 
1Corinthians16:8 Asi ndinozogara muEfesu metsa raguma zuva rePentekosti," 
1Corinthians16:9 ngokuti musiwo wakapamhama wakabeurirwa inini, kuti ndiite mushando mukuru, nawo aripo magaa mazhinji." 
1Corinthians16:10 Kudai Thimothi echiuya kwomuri, wonai kuti agare pakati penyu pasina chaanotya, ngokuti iye unoshanda mushando waMambo, kudai ngezvendinoita inini;" 
1Corinthians16:11 ndizvo musazotendera naumwe kuti amushoore. Muendesei mberi murwendo rwake mukunyarara, kuti auye kwendiri; ngokuti ndinomuringirira kuti unozouya pamwepo nehama." 
1Corinthians16:12 Asi ngendaa yaAporosi, hama yedu, ndakapota kakurutu kwaari kuti amuhambire pamwepo nedzimweni hama, asi waiya asikadi kuuyayo zvinopano. Asi unozouya apo aona mukuwo." 
1Corinthians16:13 Rindai, gwinyai kuema mukugonda kwenyu, itai vakashinga, muite vakagwinya." 
1Corinthians16:14 Zveshe zvomunoita, ngazviitwe ngorudo." 
1Corinthians16:15 Zvino, hama, munozia vemhuri yaStefanasi, kuti ndivo vatendi vokutanga muAkhaiya, navo vakadziemesera kushandira vakacheneswa;" 
1Corinthians16:16 ndinomupota kuti nemwiwo mupfaire vakadaro pachenyu, nokuno munhu weshe unodetsera mumushando, echidzimbirwa navo." 
1Corinthians16:17 Neni ndinodakara ngokuuya kwaStefanasi naFotunatusi naAkhaikusi, ngokuti izvo zvakasarira kwomuri, ivo vakazvizadzisa kwendiri;" 
1Corinthians16:18 ngokuti vakamusirira mweya wangu nowenyuzve. Ndizvo tendai vanhu vakadaro. 
1Corinthians16:19 Zviara zviri muAsia zvinomutambisa. Akwira naPrisira vanomutambisa kakurutu munaMambo, pamwepo nechiara chiri mumhatso yavo." 
1Corinthians16:20 Vatendi veshe vanomutambisa. Chingamidzanai ngomuromo ngokucheneswa. 
1Corinthians16:21 Inini, Phauri, ndinonyora kutambisa kwangu ngenyara yangu yemene." 
1Corinthians16:22 Kudai aripo munhu kunyazwi ngouri usikamudi Mambo, ngaaite unotukwa. Mambo wedu, uyai." 
1Corinthians16:23 Nyasha dzaMambo Jesu Kristu ngadzigare nemwi. 
1Corinthians16:24 Rudo rwangu ngarugare nemwi mweshe ndiye Jesu Kristu, Ameni." 
2Corinthians1:1 Phauri, mupostori waKristu Jesu ngokuda kwaMwari, naThimothi hama yedu, kuchiara chaMwari chiri muKhorinte, pamwepo nevakacheneswa veshe vari munyika yeshe yeAkhaiya;" 
2Corinthians1:2 nyasha ngadzigare kwomuri nokunyarara kunobva kunaMwari Baba edu naMambo Jesu Kristu. 
2Corinthians1:3 Ngaakudzwe Mwari naBaba aMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, Baba wenyasha, Mwari wokuembedzera kweshe," 
2Corinthians1:4 uwo unotiembedzera mukutambudzika kwedu kweshe, kuti isusuwo tikone kuembedzera avo vari mukutambudzika kunyazwi kwakaitawani, ngoukwo kuembedzerwa kwetinoembedzerwa ndikwo pachedu ndiMwari." 
2Corinthians1:5 Ngokuti kudai ngokutambudzika kwaKristu kunowanzwa kwetiri, ndizvo kuembedzerwa kwedu kunowanzwawo kubudikidza ndiKristu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Kudai techitambudzwa, kunoitirwa kuembedzerwa noruponeso rwenyu; kunyazwi techiembedzerwa, kunoitirwa kuembedzerwa kwenyu, kunoshanda mukushingirira nomukusengerera paawo madambudziko etinotambudzikawo ndiwo." 
2Corinthians1:7 Gonda redu ndimwi rakagwinya; techizia izvi, kuti kudai ngezvomunokoanisirana madambudziko edu, ndizvo munokoanisirana kuembedzerwa kwedu." 
2Corinthians1:8 Ngokuti atidi, hama, kuti muite vasikazii ngokutambudzika kwedu kwakatigumira tiri muAsia; kuti takaremerwa kakurutu kupinda simba redu, ngokudaro negonda reshe rokuti tinopona rakapera." 
2Corinthians1:9 Ngegwinyiso isusu pachedu takazwa mumwoyo yedu kuti taiya taashira kutongerwa rufu, kuti tisadzigonda pachedu, asi kuti tigonde kuna Mwari unomusa vakafa." 
2Corinthians1:10 Uwo wakatinunura kubva mukufa kwakakura kudaro, unozoangira kutinunura; mwaari tinogonda kuti uchazotinunura." 
2Corinthians1:11 Imwimwiwo mwechitidetsera ngemikumbiro yenyu, kuti vazhinji vatibongere ngendaa yezvifumiso zvenyasha zvakapuwa kwetiri ngendaa yemikumbiro mizhinji." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ngegwinyiso uku ndikwo kudziganzisa kwedu, kuri chapupuzve chemhumba yedu, kuti takadzibata munyika mukucheneswa nomugwinyiso raMwari, kakurutu takaita kudaro kwomuri, haiwa ngoungwaru hwenyama akadi, asi ngenyasha dzaMwari." 
2Corinthians1:13 Ngokuti atinyori zviro zvimweni kwomuri, asi zvomunofunda nokuzwisisa, neni ndinogonda kuti munozozvizwisisa metsa kumagumo," 
2Corinthians1:14 kudai ngezvemwakatizwisisa ngezvimweni, kuti ngezuva raMambo wedu Jesu isusu tiri kuganza kwenyu, kunyazwi imwimwiwo muri kuganza kwedu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Mukugonda uku ndaipinimidza kuti nditange kuuya kwomuri, kuti mufumiswe kwechipiri." 
2Corinthians1:16 Nokupinda ngokwomuri ndechienda Masedhonia, ndoobva Masedhonia ndipetuke kwomuri, ndiendiswe mberi ndimwi murwendo rwangu rweJudhia." 
2Corinthians1:17 Ndizvo apo ndaipinimidza kudaro, ndakaonisa kushanduka kwomwoyo here? Nokuti izvo zviro zvendinoemesa kuti ndiite, ndinozozviemesa here ngokwenyama, kuti kungaapo kwendiri kuronza kuti, “Eya, eya,” nokuti, “Haiwa, haiwa?”" 
2Corinthians1:18 Asi kudai ndiMwari unogondeka, izwi redu kwomuri andiropi rokuti, “Eya naHaiwa.”" 
2Corinthians1:19 Ngokuti Mukororo waMwari, Jesu Kristu, uwo wetakachumaira pakati penyu inini, Sirivhanusi naThimothi, waiya asiri, “Eya” nokuti, “Haiwa,” asi mwaari unoramba ari, “Eya.”" 
2Corinthians1:20 Ngokuti mwaari chimwe ngachimwe chezvigondiso zvaMwari kwaari zviri, “Eya.” Ngendaa iyi kubudikidza ndiye tinoti, “Ameni,” kuita kukudzwa kwaMwari tisu." 
2Corinthians1:21 Asi ndiMwari uwo unotigwinyisa pamwepo nemwi munaKristu, nowakatidzodza," 
2Corinthians1:22 ngokuisa ruphau rwake padera pedu, akatipazve chibatiso choMweya mumwoyo yedu." 
2Corinthians1:23 Asi ndinodaidza Mwari kuita chapupu kumwoyo wangu, kuti ngendaa yokusikada kumutambudza andizi kuuya Khorinte." 
2Corinthians1:24 Haiwa, kuti titonge padera pokugonda kwenyu; asi tinoshanda pamwepo kumudetsera kuti mudakare; ngokuti munoema mwakagwinya mukugonda." 
2Corinthians2:1 Asi ndakadziemesera pachangu, kuti andizoitizve kwomuri rwendo rumweni runomutambudza." 
2Corinthians2:2 Ngokuti kudai ndechimutambudza imwimwi, ndizvo ndiani ungazondidakarira, kwega uwo wakatambudzwa ndini?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Neni ndakanyora ichi kwomuri kuti ndoogumeyo, ndisazotambudzika ngaavo vendinosisira kudakara ndivo; ndechigonda kwomuri mweshe kuti kudakara kwangu ndikwo kudakara kwenyu mweshe." 
2Corinthians2:4 Ngokuti ngokutambudzika kukurutu nokurwadziwa kwomwoyo ndakanyora kwomuri, ndinemisodzi mizhinji; haiwa kuti mutambudzike, asi kuti muzie rudo rukuru rwendinarwo kwomuri." 
2Corinthians2:5 Asi kudai aripo wakaita dambudziko, iye aazi kutambudza inini, asi kuti wakatambudza imwimwi, andidi kuti ndinyanye kumutambudza imwimwi mweshe." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kuororwa kwavanhu vazhinji kunokwana kumunhu wakadaro; 
2Corinthians2:7 ndizvo zvino kwaisisira kuti imwimwi mumukungurire nokumuembedzera, kuti asazomedzwa ngokutambudzika kwakapinda kukura." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ndizvo ndinomupota kuti mugwinyise rudo rwenyu kwaari. 
2Corinthians2:9 Ngeiyi ndaa ndakanyora kwomuri kuti ndimuedze ndimuzie, kuti munopurutana here muzviro zveshe." 
2Corinthians2:10 Asi kunouwo womunokungurira chiro, neniwo ndinomukungurira; ngokuti izvo zvendakungurira, kudai ndakukungurira zviro, ndakazvikungurira ngendaa yenyu mukuona kwaKristu." 
2Corinthians2:11 Tinoita izvi kuti Sathani asazoona chokutinyisa ndicho; ngokuti atiri vasikazii mazano ake. 
2Corinthians2:12 Zvino apo ndaguma Troasi koochumaira vhangeri raKristu, musiwo wakabeurirwa kwendiri ndiMambo;" 
2Corinthians2:13 asi ndaiya ndisina kuzorora mumweya wangu, ngokuti andizi kuonapo Thithusi hama yangu; asi ndechivavhaisa, ndakaenda Masedhonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Asi ngaabongwe Mwari, uwo munaKristu unotitungamirira kudai ngemabhanditi mukufora kwokunyisa kwaKristu. Mwari unotishandisa kuti ruziyo ngendaa yaKristu rugume kundau dzeshe kudai ngegwema rakanaka." 
2Corinthians2:15 Ngokuti isusu tiri gwema rakanaka raKristu kunaMwari, pakati paavo vanoponeswa nepakati paavo vanoparadzwa." 
2Corinthians2:16 Kuneavo tiri gwema rinobva murufu kuenda murufu; nokune vamweni tiri gwema rinobva mukupona kuenda mukupona. Ndiani ungakona kuita mushando wakadai? 
2Corinthians2:17 Ngokuti isusu atizi kudai ngevazhinji vamweni, vanoshaishira izwi raMwari; asi munaKristu tinoereketa kudai ngevanhu vegwinyiso, kudai ngevanhu vakatumwa kubva pamberi paMwari." 
2Corinthians3:1 Tinotangazve kudziganzisa pachedu here? Ngegwinyiso tinotama here kudai ngezvevanotama vamweni, tsamba dzokutendwa ndidzo dzinonyorerwa kwomuri, nokuti dzinobva kwomuri?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Imwimwi pachenyu muri tsamba yedu, yakanyorwa pamwoyo yedu, inoziikanwa nokudzidzwa ngevanhu veshe;" 
2Corinthians3:3 nemwi munoonisa kuti muri tsamba yaKristu, yakashandwa tisu, isikazi kunyorwa ngeinki, asi ndiMweya waMwari unopona, isikazi kunyorwa pamarusamba emapuwe, asi pamarusamba omwoyo yenyama." 
2Corinthians3:4 Nesu tinakwo kugonda kwakadaro kunaMwari kubudikidza ndiKristu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Haiwa kuti isusu pachedu tagutswa, kuti tironze chiro kuti chinobva kwetiri, asi kugutswa kwedu kunobva kunaMwari," 
2Corinthians3:6 uwo wakatiita vanokona kuita vashandiri vechitenderano chitsva, haiwa chetsamba yakanyorwa, asi choMweya; ngokuti zvakanyorwa zvinouraya, asi Mweya unopa kupona."
