2Corinthians3:7 Zvino kudai mazwi emishando yorufu, akanyorwa nokunangurwa pamapuwe kwakauya nouthende, kwakaita kuti vana vaIsuraeri vasakona kuringisisa hope yaMosi ngendaa yokun'anikira kwayo, uhwo uthende hwaipinda," 
2Corinthians3:8 kunozopinda kwakaitawani kupenya kwouthende kwemishando yoMweya? 
2Corinthians3:9 Ngokuti kudai mishando yokurashwa yaiya nouthende, uthende hwemishando yokururama hunopinda kwakaitawani kupenya!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Ngegwinyiso icho chaiya nouthende hwapera, uthende hwacho, ngendaa youthende hwakapindisisa kukura." 
2Corinthians3:11 Ngokuti kudai icho chaipinda chakauya kubudikidza ngouthende, kakurutu icho chinogara chinouthende hunopinda." 
2Corinthians3:12 Ndizvo zvino tinakwo kugonda kwakadaro, tinoereketa ngokutsunga kukurutu." 
2Corinthians3:13 Atizi kudai ndiMosi, uwo wakafukidzira hope yake ngejira, kuti vana vaIsuraeri vasazoringisisa magumo ezvaipinda." 
2Corinthians3:14 Asi mipinimidzo yavo yakakonzeswa. Ngegwinyiso metsa nyamashi naapo pevanozwa kudzidzwa kwechitenderano chekaretu, jira rimwero rindoripo risikazi kufukurwa, iro jira rinoduswa munaKristu mwega." 
2Corinthians3:15 Asi metsa nyamashi, apo zvinyorwa zvaMosi zvechidzidzwa, jira iro rindoripo padera pemwoyo yavo;" 
2Corinthians3:16 asi apo munhu echizotenderukira kunaMambo, jira iro rinoduswa." 
2Corinthians3:17 Zvino Mambo ndiMweya; naapo panoMweya waMambo, kuripo kusunhurika." 
2Corinthians3:18 Isusu teshe tinehope dzisikazi kufukidzwa, techiringira uthende hwaMambo, kudai ngomuchiboniboni, tinotsandudzwa techitodzana nomuedzaniso umwewo kubva kuuthende humweni kuenda kuuthende humweni; ngokuti zvinobva kunaMambo, Mweya." 
2Corinthians4:1 Ndizvo tinawo uyu mushando, kudai ngezvetakaitirwa nyasha, atiperi simba." 
2Corinthians4:2 Asi takarasha zviro zvakafishika zvinotsverudza, techiramba kuita ngourimbwi nokuti kubata izwi raMwari ngokuchengedzera; asi ngokuonisa gwinyiso, tinodziganzisa kunemhumba yomunhu weshe mukuona kwaMwari." 
2Corinthians4:3 Kunyazwi vhangeri redu rakafishika, rakafishika kwavari vari kufa." 
2Corinthians4:4 Kwavari mwari weiyi nyika wakapofomadza mipinimidzo yevasikatendi, kuti vasaona kujeka kwevhangeri routhende hwaKristu, uwo uri muedzaniso waMwari." 
2Corinthians4:5 Ngokuti atidzichumairi pachedu, asi tinochumaira Kristu Jesu, kuti ndiMambo, nesu pachedu tiri varanda venyu ngendaa yaJesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Ngokuti ndiMwari wakati, “Kujeka kunozojeka kwechibva muchidima”, ndiye wakajeka mumwoyo mwedu, kuti atipe kujeka kwokuzia uthende hwaMwari pahope yaJesu Kristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Asi tino uhwu upfumi muzvidziyo zvedongo, kuti ukuru hukurutu hweiro simba huite hwaMwari, husaita hunobva kwetiri." 
2Corinthians4:8 Tinomanikwa kumarutii eshe, asi atipedziswi; tinokangaidzwa, asi atiperi simba." 
2Corinthians4:9 Tinotambudzwa, asi atizi kusiiwa; tinoponderwa pashi, asi atiurawi." 
2Corinthians4:10 Nguva dzeshe tinotwara mumiiri yedu rufu rwaJesu, kuti kupona kwaJesu kuoniswewo mumiiri yedu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Ngokuti isusu tinopona, tinogara techipirwa murufu ngendaa yaJesu, kuti kupona kwaJesu kuoneke mumiiri yedu inofa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Ndizvo rufu runoshanda mwetiri, asi kupona kunoshanda mwomuri." 
2Corinthians4:13 Asi kudai ngezvetinawo Mweya umwewo wokugonda, kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Ndakatenda, ndizvo ndakaereketa”; nesuwo tinotenda, ndizvo tinoereketa," 
2Corinthians4:14 techizia kuti uwo wakamusa Mambo Jesu, unozotimusawo pamwepo naJesu, naye unozotiunza pamwepo nemwi pamberi pake." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ngokuti zviro zveshe zvinoitwa ngendaa yenyu, kuti nyasha kudai ngezvedzinowanziswa kunevanhu vazhinji, dziite kuti kubonga kuwandiswe kuti Mwari akudzwe." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ndizvo atiperi simba. Kunyazwi munhu wedu wokubanze echipera, munhu wedu womukati unondoitwa mutsva zuva ngezuva." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ngokuti kutambudzika kwedu kwenguva doko kunotinasirira uthende hwakakura kakurutu nohunogara mhera nariini," 
2Corinthians4:18 ngokuti atiringiri kuzviro zvinooneka, asi kuizvo zvisikaoneki; ngokuti zviro zvinooneka zvinogara nguva fupi, asi zviro zvisikaoneki zvinogara mhera nariini." 
2Corinthians5:1 Ngokuti tinozia kuti dai mhatso yetinogara yomunyika muno yanyaputsika, iri muchacha, tinayo mhatso inobva kunaMwari, isikazi kuakwa ngenyara, yemhera nariini iri mudenga." 
2Corinthians5:2 Ngokuti tiri muneuyu muchacha tinogomera, techidisisa kufukidzwa ngemhatso yedu inobva mudenga," 
2Corinthians5:3 kudai ngegwinyiso techipfekedzwa kudaro tisazooneka tiri mititinini. 
2Corinthians5:4 Ngokuti isusu tichiri mumuchacha uyu, tinogomera, techidzimbirwa; haiwa kuti tikumurwe, asi kuti tipfekedzwe, kuti uwo unofa amedzwe ngokupona." 
2Corinthians5:5 Zvino uwo wakatiitira chiro chakadaro ndiMwari, uwo wakatipa chibatiso choMweya." 
2Corinthians5:6 Ndizvo tinotsunga mwoyo nguva dzeshe, techizia kuti tichapona ngomuiri uyu, tiri kuretu kubva kunaMambo," 
2Corinthians5:7 ngokuti tinohamba ngokugonda, haiwa ngokuona." 
2Corinthians5:8 Tinotsunga mwoyo, nesu tinotenda kusiya muiri wedu, tiite vaa kanyi naMambo." 
2Corinthians5:9 Ngeiyi ndaa tinechidisiso chedu chokuti tinyari pakanyi nokuti tisipo, tiite vanodakadza kwaari." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ngokuti isusu teshe tinozooneka pamberi pechigaro chokutonga chaKristu, kuti umwe ngaumwe aashire kudai ngezvaakaita mumuiri, zvakanaka nokuti zvakashata." 
2Corinthians5:11 Ndizvo techizia kutya Mambo, tinoonga vanhu, asi tiri vanoziikanwa kunaMwari; neni ndinogondazve kuti tiri vanoziikanwa mumhumba dzenyu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Atidziganzisizve kwomuri, asi tinomupa nguva yokuganza tisu, kuti mukone kupingura kuneavo vanoganza ngezvinooneka, haiwa ngezvomumwoyo." 
2Corinthians5:13 Ngokuti tinyari vanopenga, tinodaro ngendaa yaMwari, nokuti tinyari vakaterama, tinodaro ngendaa yenyu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Ngokuti rudo rwaKristu runotionga; ngokuti tinozia kuti umwe wakafira veshe; ndizvo veshe vakatofa. 
2Corinthians5:15 Naye wakafira veshe kuti avo vanopona vasachadziponera pachavo, asi kuti vaponere kunouwo wakafa ngendaa yavo, akamuswazve." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ndizvo isusu kubvira zvino atichazii munhu naumwe ngokwenyama. Kunyazwi takamuzia Kristu ngokwenyama, asi zvino atichamuzii ngokwakadaro." 
2Corinthians5:17 Ndizvo kudai munhu ari munaKristu, waa chisikwa chitsva; zviro zvekaretu zvapinda, wonai zvaitwa zvitsva!" 
2Corinthians5:18 Zveshe izvi zvinobva kunaMwari, uwo wakatiiyanisa kwaari kubudikidza ndiKristu, naye wakapa kwetiri mushando wokuiyanisa;" 
2Corinthians5:19 ndikwo kuti, Mwari waiya munaKristu, echiiyanisa nyika kwaari, asikaerengeri kwavari kupauka kwavo, naye wakapa kwetiri izwi rokuiyanisa." 
2Corinthians5:20 Ndizvo tinoita vaemereri vaKristu, zvechiita ingatei Mwari wainyengerera vanhu kubudikidza tisu. Tinomupota ngendaa yaKristu, itai vanoiyaniswa munaMwari." 
2Corinthians5:21 Iye wakamuita kushaisha ngendaa yedu, uwo waiya asikazi kuzia kushaisha, kuti mwaari isusu tiite kururama kwaMwari." 
2Corinthians6:1 Mukushanda pamwepo naye, tinomupota kuti musaashira nyasha dzaMwari pasina shwiro." 
2Corinthians6:2 Ngokuti iye unoti, “Ndakamuzwa ngenguva inoashirika, nepazuva rokuponeswa ndakakudetsera”; penyai, zvino ndiyo nguva inoashirika; penyai, zvino zuva roruponeso." 
2Corinthians6:3 Isusu atiisi chipumhuniso munjira youmweni kuti kushandira kwedu kusazoshoorwa," 
2Corinthians6:4 asi ngezviro zveshe tiite vanotendwa kudai ngezvinosisira vashandi vaMwari, kubudikidza ngokusengerera kukurutu, mukutambudzika, mukutama, mukuhahairwa," 
2Corinthians6:5 mukurohwa, mukukonyerwa mutirongo, muhohoho, mukushanda ngesimba, mukurinda, munzara," 
2Corinthians6:6 mukucheneswa, mukuzia, murubambazira, mukuitirwa nyasha, muMweya Wakachena, ngorudo rusikadziitisi," 
2Corinthians6:7 ngeizwi regwinyiso, ngesimba raMwari; ngezvokurwa ndizvo zvokururama ngokumudyo nokumuoshwe;" 
2Corinthians6:8 mukukudzwa nomukusikakudzwa, mukureyiwa nomumbiri yakanaka; tinobatwa kudai ngevachengedzi, asi tiri vegwinyiso;" 
2Corinthians6:9 kudai ngevasikaziikanwi, asi tiri vanonasa kuziikanwa; kudai ngevanofa, asi wonai tinopona; kudai ngevanoororwa, asi atiurawi;" 
2Corinthians6:10 kudai ngevanosvipa mwoyo, asi tinogara techidakara; kudai ngevarombo, asi tinofumisa vazhinji, kudai ngevasina chevanacho, asi tinazvo zveshe." 
2Corinthians6:11 Muromo wedu wakaereketa zvakaperera kwomuri, imwimwi vaKhorinte; mwoyo yedu yakabeuka yaamho." 
2Corinthians6:12 Amumanikidzwi tisu, asi munodzimanikidza murudo rwenyu." 
2Corinthians6:13 Zvino ngokuunzidzira kwakatodzana, ndinoereketa kudai ngounoereketa kwendinoita kuvana vangu, mwoyo yenyu ngaibeuke yaamho." 
2Corinthians6:14 Musaita vanosungirwa ngokusikasisirani pamwepo nevasikatendi. Ngokuti kuri pari kuzwanana kwokururama nokushata? Nokuti kuri pari kuiyana kwokujeka nechidima? 
2Corinthians6:15 Nokuti kuri pari kutenderana kwaKristu naBheriari? Nokuti mutendi unechikoaniswa chenyi nousikatendi? 
2Corinthians6:16 Kuri pari kutenderana kwetemperi raMwari nemiedzaniso yokudira? Ngokuti isusu tiri temperi raMwari unopona; kudai ngezvaakaronza Mwari kuti, “Ndinozogara pakati pavo, nokuhamba pakati pavo; neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo, navo vanozoita vanhu vangu." 
2Corinthians6:17 Ndizvo budai kubva pakati pavo, mudziparadzanise kubva kwavari, unoronza Mambo Mwari, musagwama chiro chakasvipiswa; naapo ndinozomuashira" 
2Corinthians6:18 neni ndinozoita Baba enyu, nemwi munozoita vakororo vangu nevasikana vangu, unoronza Mambo Mwari Unesimbareshe.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Ndizvo vanodikanwa, kudai ngezvetinazvo izvi zvigondiso, ngatidzichenese pachedu kubva kunezvinosvipisa zveshe zvenyama nezvomweya, techiperera mukucheneswa mukutya Mwari." 
2Corinthians7:2 Tibeurirei ndau mumwoyo yenyu; atizi kushaishira munhu, atizi kusvipisa munhu, atizi kubira munhu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Andironzi izvi kumuitira ndaa, ngokuti ndakamboronza kuti muri vepamwoyo yedu, kuti tife pamwepo nokupona pamwepo." 
2Corinthians7:4 Ndakaganza ndimwi nguva dzeshe; ndinodzikudza ndimwi kakurutu; ndakazara ngokuembedzerwa, ndinodakara kakurutu mukutambudzika kwedu kweshe." 
2Corinthians7:5 Ngokuti kunyazwi taguma Masedhonia, miiri yedu aizi kuzorora, asi takatambudzwa kumarupande eshe; ngokubanze kwaiyayo kuambana, ngomukati kwaiyamwo kutya." 
2Corinthians7:6 Asi Mwari uwo unoembedzera vakasvipa mwoyo, iye wakatiembedzera ngokuguma kwaThithusi," 
2Corinthians7:7 haiwa ngokuguma kwake kwega, asizve ngokuembedzerwa kwaakaembedzerwa ndikwo ndimwi, echitironzera ngechishuwo chenyu nokuchema kwenyu nokushingirira kwenyu ngendaa yangu; ndizvo ndakapindisisa kudakara." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ngokuti kunyazwi ndakamuchemedza ngetsamba yangu, andisvipi mwoyo ndizvo, kunyazwi ndakanyasvipa mwoyo ndizvo; ngokuti ndinoona kuti iyo tsamba yakamuchemedza, asi kwega kwomukuwo mufupi." 
2Corinthians7:9 Zvino ndinodakara, haiwa ngokuti mwakachemedzwa, asi kuti mwakachemedzwa kuti mutenderuke. Ngokuti mwakachemedzwa ngendaa yokuda kwaMwari, kuti musarashikirwa ngechiro ngendaa yedu." 
2Corinthians7:10 Ngokuti kuchemedzwa kunobva kunaMwari kunounza kutenderuka kworuponeso, kuri kutenderuka kusina kuchema. Asi kuchema kwomunyika kunopara rufu." 
2Corinthians7:11 Ngokuti wonai kutsamwirira kwokuchemedzwa ngenjira yaMwari kwakaunza kutsamwirira kwakaitawani kukura mukati mwenyu! Eya, kudzirwira, kunyangadzwa, kutya, chishuwo, kushingirira nokuunzidzira! Ngezviro zveshe mwakadzipangidzira kuti muri vasina ndaa kuneizvi." 
2Corinthians7:12 Ndizvo kunyazwi ndakanyora kwomuri, andizi kunyora ngendaa youwo wakaita kushata ukwo, nokuti ngendaa youwo wakashaishirwa, asi kuti kutsamwirira kwenyu ngendaa yedu kuoniswe kwomuri pamberi paMwari." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ndizvo takaembedzerwa. Kututsira mukuembedzerwa kwedu takadakara kakurutu ngendaa yokudakara kwaThithusi, ngokuti mweya wake wakagwinyiswa ndimwi mweshe." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ngokuti kudai chainyaiapo chiro chendakaganza kwaari ndimwi, andizi kutsverudziswa; asi kudai ngezvetakaereketa zviro zveshe kwomuri zvaiya gwinyiso, kwakadarozve nokuganza kwedu, kwendakaita pamberi paThithusi, kwakaoneka kuti kunegwinyiso." 
2Corinthians7:15 Norudo rwake rwomwoyo runopinda kuwanzwa kwomuri, apo ookarakadza nokupurutana kwenyu mweshe, kuti mwakamuashira ngokutya nokuhuta." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndinodakara kuti ngezviro zveshe ndinogonda ndimwi. 
2Corinthians8:1 Ndizvo, hama, tinoda kuti muzie ngenyasha dzaMwari dzakapuwa kuzviara zviri muMasedhonia;" 
2Corinthians8:2 ngokuti, mukuedzwa kukuru kwokutambudzika, nouwandu hwokudakara kwavo, noudzamu hwourombo hwavo, zvakawandisa upfumi hwokupa kwavo." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ngokuti ndinoita chapupu ndivo, kuti kudai ngezvevaikona, eya, nokupinda zvevaikona, vakapa ngokuda kwavo," 
2Corinthians8:4 vechitipota ngokunyengerera kakurutu kuti tiashire ichi chipo noukama mukushandira vakacheneswa. 
2Corinthians8:5 Navo vakaita ichi, chisicho chetaikarira; asi kutanga vakadzipira ngokwavo kunaMambo nokwetirizve ngokuda kwaMwari." 
2Corinthians8:6 Ngokudaro kudai ngezvetakakumbira Thithusi, kuti iye kudai ngezvaiya aamba, ngokudaro apedzisewo pakati penyu mushando wenyasha." 
2Corinthians8:7 Ndizvo kudai ngezvomunowanza munezviro zveshe, mukugonda, mukuereketa, mukuzia, mukutsamwirira kweshe, nomurudo rwenyu kwetiri, wonai kuti muwanzewo muneuyu mushando wenyasha." 
2Corinthians8:8 Andiereketi ngokumupanga, asi ngokutsamwirira kwevamweni kuti ndiedze gwinyiso rorudo rwenyuwo." 
2Corinthians8:9 Ngokuti imwimwi munozia nyasha dzaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, kuti kunyazwi iye waiya mupfumi, asi ngendaa yenyu wakaita murombo, kuti imwimwi ngourombo hwake muite vapfumi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Muneiyi ndaa ndinoronza kupinimidza kwangu, ngokuti izvi zvakamunakira imwimwi, mwakatangira vamweni gore rakapera, musikateri kuita kwega, asi mwechidisisa kuita." 
2Corinthians8:11 Asi zvino pedzisai kuzviita, kuti kudai ngezvemwaidisisa kuita, pedzisai pomunokona ndipo." 
2Corinthians8:12 Ngokuti kudai kuripo kuda, nechipo chinoashirika kudai ngezvaanazvo munhu, haiwa kudai ngezvaasina." 
2Corinthians8:13 Ngokuti andironzi izvi kuti vamweni varerukirwe, nemwi mwechitambudzika, asi kuti mutodzane;" 
2Corinthians8:14 kuti kuwandirwa kwenyu ngenguva iyi kudetsere kutama kwavo, kuti kuwandirwa kwavozve kudetsere kutama kwenyu; kuti kuapo kutodzana." 
2Corinthians8:15 Kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Aye wakaunganidza zvakawanda aazi kusara nechiro; nouwo wakaunganidza zvishomani aazi kutama chiro.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Asi ngaabongwe Mwari uwo wakaisa mumwoyo mwaThithusi ukwo kutsamwirira kwendaiya nakwo pachangu ndimwi. 
2Corinthians8:17 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso iye wakazwa kupota kwedu; asi iye emene, echitsungirira kakurutu, wakabuda kuuya kwomuri ngokuda kwake." 
2Corinthians8:18 Nesu tinotumira pamwepo naye hama iyo inembiri yakanaka kuzviara zveshe; 
2Corinthians8:19 andizvopi zvega, asi wakaemeswazve ngezviara kuti ahambe nesu ngendaa yeizvi zvipo zvinoshandwa tisu, kuita kuti Mambo airikidzwe, nokuonisa kutendera kwedu." 
2Corinthians8:20 Techingwarira kuti munhu asatiitira ndaa ngouwandu hweizvo zvinoshandwa tisu," 
2Corinthians8:21 ngokuti tinongwarira kuti zviite zvinoremeredzeka, haiwa kwega mukuona kwaMambo, asi nomukuona kwevanhuwo." 
2Corinthians8:22 Nesu takatuma pamwepo navo hama yedu, yetakaedza nguva zhinji tikaona kuti inotsungirira zviro zvizhinji, asi zvino iri inopindisisa kutsungirira, ngendaa yegonda guru reinaro kwomuri." 
2Corinthians8:23 Kudai ndiThithusi, mudetseri wangu nomungani wangu mumushando unoitwa kwomuri; ngendaa yehama dzedu, ndidzo nhumwa dzechiara, uthende hwaKristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Ndizvo wonesai kwavari chioniso chorudo rwenyu, nechokuganza kwedu ndimwi, mukuona kwezviara." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ngokuti azvisisiri kuti ndinyore kwomuri ngendaa yokushandira vakacheneswa," 
2Corinthians9:2 ngokuti ndinozia kudisisa kwenyu, kwendinoganza ndikwo ndimwi kwavari vanhu veMasedhonia, kuti veAkhaiya vakapedza kunasirira gore rakapera; nokutsamwirira kwenyu kwakamusa vazhinji vavo." 
2Corinthians9:3 Asi ndakatumira hama kuti kuganza kwedu ndimwi kusazoita kusina shwiro ngeiyi ndaa, kuti muite vakanasirira, kudai ngezvendakamuronzera;" 
2Corinthians9:4 kuti kusazoitika, kuti kunyazwi ngeiri njira, kudai vechiuya neni vamweni veMasedhonia, vamuone musikazi kunasirira, isusu, (ndisikaronzi imwimwi), tingazotsverudzwa ngokugonda uku." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ndizvo ndaipinimidza kuti zvaisisira kunyengerera hama kuti dzitange pamberi pangu kuuya kwomuri, vanasirire zvipo izvi nguva isati yaguma zvemwakagondisa, kuti zvipo zviite zvakanasirirwa ngokuda kubonga kuti zvisaita zvakapambwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Asi ndinoronza izvi, kuti iye unokusha ngokutsonzedza, unozovhunazve ngokutsongesesa, nouwo unokusha ngokuwanza, unozovhunazve ngokuwanzisisa." 
2Corinthians9:7 Umwe ngaumwe ngaape kudai ngezvaakaemesa mumwoyo mwake; haiwa zimupira nokuti ngokuangiridzwa; ngokuti Mwari unoda unopa ngokudakara. 
2Corinthians9:8 NaMwari unesimba rokuwanza zvipo zveshe, kuti imwimwi mugutswe ngezviro zveshe ngenguva dzeshe, muwanze kuita mishando yeshe yakanaka." 
2Corinthians9:9 Kudai ngezvakanyorwa, “Iye wakakusha ngokuwanza, wakapa varombo; kururama kwake kunogara mhera nariini.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Uwo unopa mukushi mbeu nechingwa chokudya, uwo unozomupa nokudziwanza mbeu dzenyu dzokukusha, nokuwanza michero yokururama kwenyu." 
2Corinthians9:11 Imwimwi munozofumiswa ngezviro zveshe, mupe ngokusunhurika kweshe, nokushanda kubudikidza tisu, kuti Mwari abongwe;" 
2Corinthians9:12 ngokuti mushando uyu wokukoanisa, auteri kukwanisa kutama kweshe kwevakacheneswa vega, asi kunowandisazve kubonga kuzhinji kunaMwari." 
2Corinthians9:13 Kwechioneka kuti ngokuedzwa kwenyu ngouyu mushando, munozoirikidza Mwari ngendaa yokupurutana nokupupura kwenyu vhangeri raKristu, nendaa yokuwanda kwezvipo zvenyu kwavari, nokwavari veshe," 
2Corinthians9:14 naapo ivo vemene vanomushuwira nokumukumbirira ngendaa yenyasha huru dzaMwari dziri mukati mwenyu. 
2Corinthians9:15 Ngaabongwe Mwari ngechipo chake chisikabviri kuronzwa! 
2Corinthians10:1 Zvino inini pachangu, Phauri, ndinomupota ngokupfaa nenyasha dzaKristu, inini ndiri pakati penyu ndakapfaa, asi ndinoshinga kwomuri ndisipo!" 
2Corinthians10:2 Ndinomupota kuti ndiri pakati penyu ndisazoonisa kutsunga kwokurwisana ndikwo nevamweni, avo vanotikarakadzira kuti tinohamba ngezvenyama." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ngokuti kunyazwi techihamba mumuiri, atirwi akadi kudai ngokwenyama," 
2Corinthians10:4 ngokuti zvokurwa ndizvo zvedu andizvopi zvenyama akadi, asi zvine simba pamberi paMwari rokuputsa ndau dzakagwinya dzoumambo," 
2Corinthians10:5 kuputsa mikarakadzo nezviro zveshe zvakaturama zvinomuswa kurwisana nokuzia Mwari, nokuunza mipinimidzo yeshe muuranda hwokupurutana Kristu." 
2Corinthians10:6 Takanasirira kuorora kusikapurutana kweshe, apo kupurutana kwenyu kwaperera." 
2Corinthians10:7 Imwimwi munoringira zviro zviri pamberi pehope dzenyu, kudai aripo munhu unodzigonda echiti ndiri waKristu, ngaarangarire ichizve mukati mwake kuti, kudai ndiye uri waKristu, nesu takadarowo." 
2Corinthians10:8 Kunyazwi zvino ndikanyaganza ngezvakatikuti ngesimba redu, retakapuwa ndiMambo, rokumuaka ndiro, haiwa rokumuputsira pashi, andizotsverudzwi akadi." 
2Corinthians10:9 Andidi kuita kudai ngounomutyisidzira ngetsamba dzangu. 
2Corinthians10:10 Ngokuti vanoti, “Tsamba dzake dzinemashoko makuru, dzinesimba, asi mukuoneka kwomuiri wake wakarembedzeka, nokuereketa kwake akuna shwiro.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Munhu wakadaro ngaazwisise izvi, kuti kudai ngezvetinoronza mutsamba dzedu, apo tisipo, ndizvo zvetinoita tiripo." 
2Corinthians10:12 Ngokuti atizi kutsunga kudziisa pamwepo nokudziedzanisa nevamweni vanodziganzisa pachavo. Asi apo vechidziedzanisa pachavo umwe noumweni, nokudzitodzanisa umwe noumweni, azvionisi ungwaru." 
2Corinthians10:13 Asi isusu atizoganzi kupinda zvetiri, asi tinozogara tiri mukati mwendau yedu yetakaemeserwa ndiMwari, kuti tigume kweshe kunyazwi nokwomuriyo." 
2Corinthians10:14 Ngokuti atizi kunyanya kudziganzisa, kupinda zvinosisira apo takaguma kwomuri, ngokuti tisu takatanga kuguma kwomuri nevhangeri raKristu." 
2Corinthians10:15 Atiganzi kupinda zvinosisira, izvo zvinoti, atiganzi ngemishando yevanhu vamweni; asi kugonda kwedu ngekwokuti, kudai kutenda kwenyu kwechikura, mishando yedu inozokudzwa yaamho pakati penyu," 
2Corinthians10:16 kuti tichumaire vhangeri kunyika dziri ngemberi kwenyu, tisikaganzi ngemishando youmweni yaakaita." 
2Corinthians10:17 “Asi iye unoganza, ngaaganze munaMambo.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Ngokuti andivopi vanodziganzisa vanotendwa, asi avo vaanoganzisa Mambo." 
2Corinthians11:1 Dai mwechindisengerera padoko muupenzi hwangu; asi ngegwinyiso munondisengerera! 
2Corinthians11:2 Ngokuti ndinendurumwa ndimwi ngendurumwa yaMwari; ngokuti ndakamugangisira kumwamuna umweni, kuti ndimuise kunaKristu kudai ngemhandwe ichakazara." 
2Corinthians11:3 Asi ndinotya kuti pamweni, kudai ngenyoka yakachengedzera Evha ngourimbwi hwayo, ngokudaro mipinimidzo yenyu ingazopauswa kubva mukururama nokuperera zviri kunaKristu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Ngokuti kudai umweni echiuya echichumaira Jesu umweni, wetisikazi kuchumaira isusu, nokuti kudai mwechiashira mweya wakasiyana, womusikazi kumboashira, nokuti kuashira vhangeri rimweni rakasiyana, romusikazi kumboashira, izvo zvakadaro munganasa kuzvipfaira." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ngokuti ndinoronza kuti nepadoko, andiri mudokopi kune vapostori vepadera." 
2Corinthians11:6 Kunyazwi ndisikanyanasi kuereketa, asi andizi kudaropi mukuzia; ngegwinyiso ngenjira dzeshe takazvionisa kwomuri pamhene zviro zveshe." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ndakashaisha here ngokudzipfaisa pachangu, kuti imwimwi mukudzwe, ngokuti ndakachumaira kwomuri vhangeri raMwari, ndisikapuwi musharo?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Ndakabira zviara zvimweni, ngokuashira musharo kubva kwezviri kuti ndishandire imwimwi." 
2Corinthians11:9 Naapo ndaiya ndinemwi, ndechitama, andizi kuita mutwaro kuno munhu, ngokuti apo hama dzauya dzechibva Masedhonia, dzakandipa zveshe zvendaitama. Ndizvo ngezviro zveshe ndakangwarira kuti ndirekere kuita mutwaro kwomuri, ndinozoangira kuita kudaro." 
2Corinthians11:10 Kudai ngegwinyiso raKristu riri mwendiri apana munhu unozondipinga ngokuganza uku munyika dzeAkhaiya. 
2Corinthians11:11 Ndaa ngeyenyi? Ngokuti andimudi here? Mwari unozia kuti ndinomuda! 
2Corinthians11:12 Asi izvo zvendinoita, ndinozoangira kuzviita kuti nditamise ndaa kwavari vanotsvaka ndaa, kuti kuneizvo zvevanoganza ndizvo, vaoneke vakadai tisu." 
2Corinthians11:13 Ngokuti vanhu vakadaro vari vapostori vokunyepa, nevashandi vokuchengedzera, vechidziitisa pachavo kudai ngevapostori vaKristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Andizvopi zvinoshamisa! Kunyazwi Sathani emene unodziitisa pachake kudai ngengirosi yokujeka. 
2Corinthians11:15 Ndizvo andichopi chiro chikuru kudai vashandi vakezve vechidziitisa pachavo kudai ngevashandi vokururama. Magumo avo anozodai ngemishando yavo. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndinotizve, kusazoapo naumwe unopinimidza kuti inini ndiri benzi; asi kudai mwechipinimidza kudaro, ndiashirei kudai ngebenzi, kuti ndiganze padoko." 
2Corinthians11:17 Izvo zvendinoereketa, andizviereketi kudai ngezvinobva kunaMambo, asi kudai ngebenzi mukugonda uku kwokuganza kwangu;" 
2Corinthians11:18 kwechioneka kuti vazhinji vanoganza ngezvenyama, neni ndinozoganzawo." 
2Corinthians11:19 Ngokuti munosengerera mapenzi ngokudakara, imwimwi mwakangwara pachenyu!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Ngokuti munosengerera munhu kudai iye echimuita varanda, kudai echimupamba, kudai echimutora kuita kuuyirwa kwake, kudai echidzikudza, kudai echimupamhadza muhope." 
2Corinthians11:21 Inini ndinotsveruka, ndinosisira kuronza kuti taiya takarembedzeka kwezviri! Asi kunyazwi ndiani unoshinga kuganza ngechiro, inini ndinoereketa kudai ngebenzi, ndinoshingawo kuganza ndizvo." 
2Corinthians11:22 VaHebheru here? Ndizvo neniwo. VaIsuraeri here? Ndizvo neniwo. Ngovorudzi rwaAbrahama here? Ndizvo neniwo. 
2Corinthians11:23 Vashandi vaKristu here? (Inini ndinoereketa kudai ngounopenga), inini ndinovapinda; mumushando ndakapinda kakurutu, mukukonyerwa mutirongo ndakavapinda kakurutu, mukupondwa ngendonga kakurutu metsa parufu ndakavapinda." 
2Corinthians11:24 Ndakachaiwa ngevaJudha kashanu ngemboma dziri makumi marongomuna kwechirekerwa imwe. 
2Corinthians11:25 Ndakapondwa katatu ngendonga, ndakapondwa ngemapuwe kamwe, ndakaputsikirwa ngengarava katatu, usiku humwe nezuva rimwe ndaiya muruandhle." 
2Corinthians11:26 Ndaiya murwendo kazhinji, mungozi dzendwizi, mungozi dzemadzongoni, mungozi dzevedzinza rangu, mungozi dzevemadzinza, mungozi dzomumadhorobha, mungozi dzomushango, mungozi dzomuruandhle, mungozi dzepakati pevakoma vokunyepa," 
2Corinthians11:27 mukushanda nomukurwadziwa, mukusikaata kazhinji, mukupera ngenzara nenyota, mukuera kudya kazhinji, mukutonhorwa nomukuita mutitinini." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ngepabanze peizvo zvinondigumira zvokubanze chiripo chinondimanika zuva ngezuva chiri kutambudzikira zviara zveshe. 
2Corinthians11:29 Ndiani wakarembedzeka neni andizi kurembedzeka naye? Ndiani unopumhuniswa neni andizikurwadziwa mwoyo? 
2Corinthians11:30 Kudai kwechisisira kuti ndiganze, ndinozoganza ngeizvo zvokurembedzeka kwangu." 
2Corinthians11:31 Mwari naBaba waMambo Jesu, uwo unotendwa mhera nariini, unozia kuti andinyepi." 
2Corinthians11:32 MuDhamasekusi nduna yaitonga pashi paAretasi mambo, yakarinda dhorobha revaDhamasekusi, kuti indibate," 
2Corinthians11:33 neni ndakadzaswa ngepafasitera parukumbati ndiri mudendere, ndakapokonyoka kubva kunyara dzake." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ndinosisira kuti ndiganze, kunyazwi azvizi kunaka; asi ndaguma mukuereketa ngezvioniso nezvakaoniswa zvaMambo." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndinozia munhu waiya munaKristu makore gumi namarongomuna apinda, wakakwidzwa mudenga rechitatu (kunyazwi waiya mumuiri kunyazwi waiya ngokubanze kwomuiri, andizii; ndiMwari unozia)." 
2Corinthians12:3 Neni ndinozia uwo munhu (kunyazwi waiya mumuiri nokuti waiya ngokubanze kwomuiri, andizii; ndiMwari unozia);" 
2Corinthians12:4 nenjira yaakakwidzwa ndiyo kuenda muPharadhaisi, naye wakazwa zviro zvisikabviri kuronzwa, zvisikatenderwi munhu kuti azvironze." 
2Corinthians12:5 Ngendaa yewakadaro ndinozoganza; asi ngendaa yangu andizoganzi, kwega kuganza ngokurembedzeka kwangu." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ngokuti kunyazwi ndechida kuganza, andizoiti benzi, ngokuti ndinozoereketa gwinyiso. Asi ndinorekera kuita kudaro, kuti kusazoapo naumwe ungapinimidza ndini, kupinda maonere aanondiita, nokuti kupinda mazwire aanoita ndini." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ndizvo kuti inini ndirekere kuganza ngendaa yokukura kweizvo zvakaoniswa kwendiri, kwakapuwa kwendiri munzwa mumuiri, uri mutumwa waSathani, kuti unditambudze, kuti ndisazoganza kupinda binzo." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ngendaa yeichi, ndakapota Mambo katatu, kuti ubviswe kwendiri," 
2Corinthians12:9 asi wakati kwendiri, “Nyasha dzangu dzinokwana kwouri, ngokuti simba rinoitwa rakaperera mukurembedzeka.” Ndizvo ndinozopinda kuganza ngokudakara mukurembedzeka kwangu, kuti simba raKristu rigare padera pangu." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ndizvo ndinodakara mukurembedzeka, mukuremadzwa, mukutamikirwa, mukutambudzwa, mumadambudziko, ngendaa yaKristu; ngokuti apo ndiri wakarembedzeka, naapo ndinesimba." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ndaa benzi! Imwimwi mwakandiangiridza kuti ndidaro. Ngokuti inini ndaisisira kuti nditendwe ndimwi, ngokuti andiri mudokopi kunevapostori vepadera, kunyazwi andiri chiropi." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ngegwinyiso zvioniso zvoupostori zvakaitwa pakati penyu mukusengerera kweshe, ngezvioniso nemishamiso nemishando inesimba." 
2Corinthians12:13 Ngokuti chiinyi chemwakapindwa ndicho kuita vari pashi kune zviara zvimweni, kwega kuti inini pachangu andizi kuita mutwaro kwomuri? Ndikungurirenyi ngouku kusikarurama!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Ringirai, inguva yechitatu yendanasirira kuti ndiuye kwomuri. Neni andizoiti mutwaro, ngokuti anditsvaki zvenyu, asi ndinotsvaka imwimwi; ngokuti akusisiri kuti vana vaunganidzire vabari, asi kuti vabari vaunganidzire vana vavo." 
2Corinthians12:15 Inini ndinozopedza zveshe zvangu nokupedzwa ngokudakara, ngendaa yomweya yenyu. Kudai ndechimuda kakurutu, kudiwa kwangu ndimwi kunozopinda kutsonga here?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Asi zvakanyadaro, inini pachangu andizi kuita mutwaro kwomuri; asi ndiri wakangwara, ndakamubata ngourimbwi!" 
2Corinthians12:17 Ndakauyirwa here ndimwi kubudikidza ngoumwe weavo vendakatuma kwomuri? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ndakapota Thithusi kuti ndimutume, ndikamutuma pamwepo nehama. Thithusi unacho chaakauyirwa ndicho here kwomuri? Atizi kuhamba here ngomweya unotodzana? Atizi kuhamba here muzvitsiko zvakatodzana?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Munopinimidza kuti nguva iyi yeshe tinodzipembedza pamberi penyu here? Mukuona kwaMwari tinoereketa munaKristu. Asi zviro zveshe, vanodikanwa, zviri zvokuakiwa kwenyu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ngokuti ndinotya, kuti kunyazwi ngeiri njira, apo ndouyeyo, ndingazomuona musiri avo vendingada kuti muite vakadaro, neni ndemene ndioneke kwomuri ndiri womusikadi kuti ndiite wakadaro; kuti pamweni kunyazwi ngeiri njira kungazoapo hasha, ndurumwa, ushungu, kusikazwanana, kureyana, makuhwa, kudzikudza nehohoho." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ndinotya kuti apo ndogumeyozve, Mwari wangu unozondipfaisa pamberi penyu, neni ndingazotsumba ngendaa yevazhinji vakashaisha ngepamberi, vasikazi kutenderuka kubva mukusikasukika, kuomba nezvinotsverudza zvevakaita." 
2Corinthians13:1 Iyi inguva yechitatu yendinouya kwomuri. “Ngemiromo yezvapupu zviiri nokuti zvitatu mazwi eshe anozogwinyiswa.” 
2Corinthians13:2 Ndakavaronzera avo vakashaisha karetu nevamweni veshe ndinovaronzerazve, zvino ndisipo navo, kudai ngezvendaiyapo ngomukuwo wechipiri, kuti ndouyeyozve, andizovakunguriri;" 
2Corinthians13:3 mwechitsvaka chioniso chaKristu unoereketa kwendiri. Aazi kurembedzeka kwomuri, asi unesimba mukati mwenyu." 
2Corinthians13:4 Ngokuti wakakohomerwa pamuchinjiko ngendaa yokurembedzeka, asi unopona ngesimba raMwari. Ngokuti nesuwo tiri vakarembedzeka mwaari, asi techishanda pamwepo nemwi tinozopona pamwepo naye ngesimba raMwari." 
2Corinthians13:5 Dziringisisenyi imwimwi pachenyu, muone kuti muri mukutenda here. Dziedzenyi pachenyu. Amuzii here pachenyu, kuti Kristu uri mukati mwenyu? Asi kuti muri vakarashwa!" 
2Corinthians13:6 Asi ndinogonda kuti imwimwi munozozia kuti isusu atizi kurashwa akadi. 
2Corinthians13:7 Asi tinokumbira kunaMwari kuti imwimwi musaita chiro chakashata nachimwe; andikwopi kuti isusu tioneke tiri vakagondeka, asi kuti muite zvinoremeredzeka, kunyazwi isusu tinoerengwa tiri varashwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Ngokuti apana chetingaita chinorwisana negwinyiso, asi zvinoemererana negwinyiso." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ngokuti tinodakara apo isusu tiri vakarembedzeka, imwimwi mwakagwinya. Ndizvo zve, tinokumbirira ichi kuti muite vakaperera." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ngeiyi ndaa ndinonyora kwomuri izvi zviro ndisipo pomuri, kuti apo ndaapo ndisazofemurika mukushandisa simba rendakapuwa ndiMambo rokuaka, haiwa rokuputsira pashi." 
2Corinthians13:11 Pakupedzisira, hama, chisarai. Itai vakaperera, purutanai kupanga kwangu; itai vano mupinimidzo umwewo, mugare mukunyarara; naMwari worudo nowokunyarara unozogara nemwi." 
2Corinthians13:12 Chingamidzanai ngomuromo ngokucheneswa. Veshe vakacheneswa vanomutambisa. 
2Corinthians13:13 Nyasha dzaMambo Jesu Kristu norudo rwaMwari nokuiyana kwoMweya Wakachena ngazvigare nemwi mweshe. 
Galatians1:1 Phauri mupostori, (andizi kutumwa ndechibva kuvanhu nokuti kubva kumasimba evanhu, asi kubudikidza ndiJesu Kristu naMwari Baba, uwo wakamumusa kubva kwavakafa;)" 
Galatians1:2 nehama dzeshe dzineni. Kuzviara zveGaratia. 
Galatians1:3 Nyasha kwomuri nokunyarara zvinobva kunaMwari Baba edu nokuna Mambo Jesu Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 uwo wakadzipira pachake ngendaa yezvishaishi zvedu, kuti atinunure kubva munguva ino yakashata, kudai ngokuda kwaMwari wedu naBaba," 
Galatians1:5 kwaari ngaugare uthende mhera nariini nariini. Ameni. 
Galatians1:6 Ndinoshamiswa kuti mwakasira kutiza kubva kwaari uwo wakamudaidza ngenyasha dzaKristu nokuenda kunerimweni vhangeri; 
Galatians1:7 haiwa kuti ririyo vhangeri rimweni, asi kuti variyo vamweni vanomunzeremusa, vanoda kupausa vhangeri raKristu." 
Galatians1:8 Asi kunyazwi tisu, nokuti ngirosi inobva mudenga, ikachumaira kwomuri vhangeri rakaparadzana neiro retakachumaira kwomuri, ngaitukwe!" 
Galatians1:9 Kudai ngezvetakaronza karetu, ndinoronzazve kudaro zvino kuti, kudai aripo munhu unochumaira kwomuri vhangeri rakaparadzana neiro remwakaashira, ngaatukwe!" 
Galatians1:10 Ngokuti inini zvino ndinotsvaka kudiwa ngevanhu here, nokuti kudiwa ndiMwari? Nokuti ndinoedza kudakadza vanhu here? Kudai ndaiya ndichadakadza vanhu, ngokudaro andingaiti muranda waKristu." 
Galatians1:11 Ngokuti inini ndinoda kuti muzie, hama, kuti vhangeri rakachumairwa ndini, raiya risiri revanhu;" 
Galatians1:12 ngokuti andizi kuriashira kubva kumunhu, nokuti kuridzidziswa, asi rakauya kwendiri kubudikidza ngokuoniswa ndiJesu Kristu." 
Galatians1:13 Ngokuti mwakazwa ngegwinyiso ngendaramo yangu yenguva yakapinda, mukudira kwevaJudha. Inini ndakatambudza chiara chaMwari ngenjira inopinda binzo yaamho, ndaiedza kuchiparadza." 
Galatians1:14 Neni ndakapinda vanhu vazhinji vendanga yangu mukudira kwevaJudha, pakati pevanhu vedzinza rangu, ndechivapinda kakurutu mukungwarira mishuma yemadzibaba angu." 
Galatians1:15 Asi apo Mwari, uwo wakanditsanangura akandiemesa ndisati ndabarwa, akandidaidza kubudikidza ngenyasha dzake, wakadakadzwa" 
Galatians1:16 kuti aonise kwendiri Mukororo wake, kuti ndichumaire ndiye pakati pevemadzinza; paripo andizi kupangana nounenyama nengazi," 
Galatians1:17 nokuti andizi kukwira Jerusarema kuneavo vaiya vapostori kutangira inini, asi paripo ndakaenda Arabhia, ndorondo hwirirazve Dhamasekusi." 
Galatians1:18 Zvino kwapera makore matatu ndakakwira Jerusarema koomusa Khefasi, ndakagara naye mazuva gumi namashanu;" 
Galatians1:19 asi andizi kuona vamweni vapostori, ngepabanze paJakobe munun'una waMambo." 
Galatians1:20 Muneizvo zvendinonyora kwomuri, pamberi paMwari andinyepi." 
Galatians1:21 Zvino ndakaenda kunharaunda yeSiria neyeSirisia," 
Galatians1:22 ndaiya ndisikaziikanwi ngehope kunezviara zveJudhia zvaiya muna Kristu; 
Galatians1:23 asi vakazwa zvega kuti, “Uwo waititambudza, zvino waakuchumaira ukwo kutenda kwaakamboedza kuparadza.”" 
Galatians1:24 Navo vakakudza Mwari kubudikidza ndini. 
Galatians2:1 Zvino kwapera makore gumi namarongomuna ndakakwirazve Jerusarema, pamwepo naBhanabhasi, ndikatorazve Thithusi." 
Galatians2:2 Neni ndakakwirayo ngokuti ndakaoniswa chioniso. Ndakaisa pamberi pavo vhangeri rendinochumaira pakati pemadzinza, (asi ndakariisa kunevakuru vari vega ngokufishika,) kuitira kuti ndaizotera kurumba nokuti ndaiya ndakambotera kurumba pasina shwiro." 
Galatians2:3 Asi kunyazwi naThithusi uwo waiya neni, aazi kuangiridzwa kuti achekwe kunyazwi waiya muGiriki." 
Galatians2:4 Asi ndakaita kudaro ngendaa yevatendi vokunyepa avo vakapotedzwamwo tisikazii, vechipoteramwo ngokufishika kuti vanengere kusunhurika kwedu kwetinakwo munaKristu Jesu, kuti vatipotedze muuhloko." 
Galatians2:5 Atizi kudzipfaisa kwavari, kunyazwi nepadoko, kuitira kuti gwinyiso revhangeri rigare nemwi." 
Galatians2:6 Asi kubva kunaavo vaiya nembiri yokuti vari vakuru (kunyazwi vari vakadini, azvina ndaa kwendiri; Mwari aatsananguri unhu hwomunhu); avo ndinoti, vaiya vanembirikira avazi kututsira chiro kwendiri." 
Galatians2:7 Asi ngenjira imweni, apo vaona kuti inini ndakapuwa vhangeri kune vasikazi kuchekwa, kudai ngezvakapuwawo Petro vhangeri kunevakachekwa;" 
Galatians2:8 (ngokuti uwo wakashanda kubudikidza ndiPetro kumuita mupostori kune vakachekwa, wakashandawo kubudikidza ndini ngokunditumira kune vemadzinza)," 
Galatians2:9 naapo Jakobe, Khefasi naJohani, avo vaizwi ndivo madzeyo vakazia nyasha idzo dzakapuwa kwendiri, vakatibata inini naBhanabhasi ngenyara dzokumudyo ngoukama, kuti isusu tiende kunevemadzinza, navo vaende kunevakachekwa." 
Galatians2:10 Chiro chimwe chega chevakatironzera kuti tikarakadze ngevarombo; icho chaiya acho chendaidisisa kuita inini. 
Galatians2:11 Asi apo Khefasi aguma Antiokhi, ndakamuphikisa pamberi pehope yake, ngokuti waiya anendaa pachake," 
Galatians2:12 ngokuti vasati vaguma vanhu vamweni vechibva kunaJakobe, iye waidya pamwepo nevemadzinza. Asi apo vaguma, wakanyongoroka akadzipaura, akagara ega pachake, ngokuti waitya chikwata chevakachekwa." 
Galatians2:13 Nevamweni vaJudha vakadziitisawo kudai ndiye; kunyazwi naBhanabhasi wakapaukiswawo ngokudziitisa kwavo. 
Galatians2:14 Asi apo ndaona kuti avazi kuhamba ngokururamisa, kudai ngegwinyiso revhangeri, ndakati kunaKhefasi pamberi pavo veshe, “Kudai iwewe kunyazwi uri muJudha, asi unogara kudai ngevari vemadzinza, haiwa kudai ngezvevanoita vaJudha, unovaangiridza ngenjiranyi vemadzinza kuti vagare kudai ngevaJudha.”" 
Galatians2:15 Isusu pachedu tiri vaJudha ngechibarirwe, haiwa vemadzinza vashaishi." 
Galatians2:16 Asi techizia kuti munhu aapembedzwi ngemishando yeMupango, asi kubudikidza ngokugonda munaKristu Jesu, isusu nesu takatenda muna Kristu Jesu, kuti tipembedzwe ngokugonda munaKristu, haiwa ngokuita mishando yeMupango, ngokuti akuna naumwe ungazopembedzwa ngemishando yeMupango." 
Galatians2:17 Asi kudai, taitsvaka kupembedzwa munaKristu, isusuwo temene takaoneka tiri vashaishi, ndizvo Kristu waamushandi wokushaisha here? Haiwa!" 
Galatians2:18 Asi kudai ndechizoakazve izvo zvendakaparadza, ndinodzionisa kuti ndiri mupauki." 
Galatians2:19 Ngokuti inini kubudikidza ngeMupango ndakafa kuneMupango, kuti ndipone kunaMwari." 
Galatians2:20 Ndakakohomerwa pamwepo naKristu; asi andinipi ndichapona, asi ndiKristu unopona mukati mwangu. Nendaramo yendinopona zvino munyama, ndinopona ngokugonda kuri kunoMukororo waMwari, uwo wakandida, akadzipira ngendaa yangu." 
Galatians2:21 Andirerusi nyasha dzaMwari; ngokuti kudai kupembedzwa kwechizounzwa ngeMupango, ngokudaro Kristu wakatera kufa pasina shwiro." 
Galatians3:1 Imwimwi vaGaratia mapenzi! Ndiani wakamurowa? Imwimwi pamberi pemadziso enyu Jesu Kristu wakaoniswa pamhene akakohomerwa pamuchinjiko! 
Galatians3:2 Chiro chega chendinoda kuzwa kubva kwomuri ngeichi: Mwakaashira Mweya ngemishando yeMupango here nokuti ngokugonda zvemwakazwa? 
Galatians3:3 Muri mapenzi akadai here? Mwakatoamba ndiMweya, zvino mwogumisira ngenyama here?" 
Galatians3:4 Mwakatambudzikira zviro zvakawanda kudaro pasina shwiro here? Kudai zvakadaro ngegwinyiso pari pasina shwiro. 
Galatians3:5 Ndizvo uwo unomupa Mweya, echishanda mishamiso pakati penyu, unozviita ngemishando yeMupango here nokuti ngokuzwa mwakagonda?" 
Galatians3:6 Kudai ndiAbrahama “Wakagonda Mwari, nakwo kwakaerengerwa kwaari kuti ndikwo kururama.”" 
Galatians3:7 Ndizvo munoona kuti avo vanogonda ndivo vakororo vaAbrahama. 
Galatians3:8 Nezvinyorwa zvechiona ngepamberi kuti Mwari waizopembedza vemadzinza ngokugonda, zvakachumaira vhangeri karetu kunaAbrahama zvechiti, “Mweuri madzinza eshe anozofumiswa.”" 
Galatians3:9 Ndizvo zvino avo vokugonda vanofumiswa pamwepo naAbrahama uwo waiya nokugonda. 
Galatians3:10 Ngokuti veshe avo vanogonda mishando yeMupango vari pashi pechituko, ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Wakatukwa weshe usikangwariri zveshe zvakanyorwa mubhuku reMupango kuti azviite.”" 
Galatians3:11 Zvino zviri pamhene kuti apana munhu unopembedzwa ngeMupango pamberi paMwari; ngokuti, “Uwo wakarurama unozopona ngokugonda.”" 
Galatians3:12 Asi Mupango autseyami pakugonda, ngenjira imweni, “Kunyazwi ndiani unoita mishando yeMupango unozopona ndiyo.”" 
Galatians3:13 Kristu wakatiripira kubva pachituko cheMupango, iye aitwa wakatukwa ngendaa yedu; ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Wakatukwa weshe unoturikwa pamuti,”" 
Galatians3:14 kuti munaKristu Jesu chifumiso chaAbrahama chiuye padera pevemadzinza, kuti tiashire chigondiso choMweya kubudikidza ngokugonda." 
Galatians3:15 Hama, ngomuedzaniso wendaramo yemazuva eshe, akuna munhu ungaita chitenderano chevanhu kuti chiite chisina shwiro kunyazwi kututsira kwechiri apo chatotsimiswa." 
Galatians3:16 Zvino zvigondiso zvakaitwa kunaAbrahama nokunemubarirwana wake; azvironzi kuti, “Nokumibarirwana,” kuronza yakawanda, asi chinoti, “Nokumubarirwana wako,” ndikwo kuti, kumunhu umwe, uri Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Chendinoronza ngeichi; Mupango wakauya mazana marongomuna nemakumi matatu emakore karetu achingaiti kuti chiite chisina shwiro chitenderano chaiya chakaemeswa ndiMwari karetu, kuti chigondiso chaMwari chikorere." 
Galatians3:18 Ngokuti kudai nhaka yechipuwa ngokungwarira Mupango, aichabvi muchigondisopi; asi Mwari wakaipa kunaAbrahama kubudikidza ngechigondiso." 
Galatians3:19 Mupango ngewenyi? Uwo wakatutsirwa ngendaa yezvipaukwa, metsa mubarirwana uapo, uwo wakaitirwa chigondiso; nacho chakaemeswa kubudikidza ngengirosi ngomuiyanisi." 
Galatians3:20 Zvino muiyanisi azvironzi rupande rumwe akadi; asi Mwari ndiumwe. 
Galatians3:21 Ndizvo Mupango unorwisana here nezvigondiso zvaMwari? Haiwa! Ngokuti kudai ngezvewakapuwa Mupango unesimba rokukona kuita ruponeso ngegwinyiso kururama kwaizouya kubudikidza ngeMupango. 
Galatians3:22 Asi zvinyorwa zvakakonyera zveshe pashi pesimba rokushaisha, kuti icho chakagondiswa kubudikidza ngokugonda munaJesu Kristu chipuwe kwavari avo vanotenda." 
Galatians3:23 Asi kugonda kusati kwaguma, taiya takakonyerwa pashi peMupango, metsa kutenda kwaoniswa." 
Galatians3:24 Ndizvo Mupango wakaita mudzidzisi wedu metsa Kristu auya, kuti tipembedzwe kubudikidza ngokugonda." 
Galatians3:25 Asi zvino apo kugonda kwaguma, atichiri pashi pomudzidzisiwo," 
Galatians3:26 ngokuti munaKristu Jesu imwimwi mweshe muri vakororo vaMwari kubudikidza ngokugonda. 
Galatians3:27 Ngokuti avo veshe pakati penyu vakabhabhatidzwa munaKristu, mwakamupfeka Kristu." 
Galatians3:28 Apachina muJudha nokuti muGiriki, apachina wakasungwa nokuti wakasunhurika, apachina mwamuna nokuti mukadzi, ngokuti imwimwi mweshe muri umwe munaKristu Jesu." 
Galatians3:29 Zvino kudai muri vaKristu, muri mibarirwana yaAbrahama, muri vadyi venhaka kudai ngechigondiso." 
Galatians4:1 Inini ndinoronza izvi kuti mudyi wenhaka mukuwo weshe waachiri ndumure, aana chaanopinda ndicho muranda, kunyazwi ndiye mambo wazvo zveshe;" 
Galatians4:2 asi uri pashi pevarindi nevangwariri metsa igume nguva yakaemeswa ndibaba. 
Galatians4:3 Ndizvo nesuwo, apo tichiri ndumure, taiya hloko dzomweya yaitonga mundau dzomudenga." 
Galatians4:4 Asi apo nguva yakwana, Mwari wakatumira Mukororo wake wakabarwa ngomudzimai, wakabarirwa pashi peMupango," 
Galatians4:5 kuti aripire avo vaiya pashi peMupango, kuti tiashire urerwa hwokuita vana." 
Galatians4:6 Ngokuti muri vana, Mwari wakatumira Mweya woMukororo wake mukati mwemwoyo yedu, wechidaidzira wechiti, “Abha, Baba!”" 
Galatians4:7 Ndizvo iwewe auchaiti muranda, asi mwana; kudai uri mwana, unogarawo nhaka kubudikidza ndiMwari." 
Galatians4:8 Karetu musati mwazia Mwari, mwaiya hloko dzezviro zvechibarirwe zvaiya zvisiri zvimwari." 
Galatians4:9 Asi zvino mwamuzia Mwari, kakurutu kuziikanwa ndiMwari, munoita mapetukirenyi sure kuneiyo mweya yokuamba isina simba neyoubemha, yomunoda kusungwazve ndiyo?" 
Galatians4:10 Munongwarira mazuva, mwedzi, nguva nemakore." 
Galatians4:11 Ndinomutyira, kuti mushando wangu pakati penyu ungaita usina shwiro." 
Galatians4:12 Ndinomupota, hama, itai vakadai ndini, ngokuti inini ndakadai ndimwi, amuzi kundishaishira." 
Galatians4:13 Zvino munozia kuti indaa yokurwadziwa kwomuiri kwakaita kuti ndichumaire vhangeri kwomuri pakutanga; 
Galatians4:14 kunyazwi kurwara kwangu kwaiya chiedzo kwomuri, amuzi kundinyenya nokuti kundiramba; asi mwakandiashira kudai ngevanoashira ngirosi yaMwari, kudai ngevanoashira Kristu Jesu." 
Galatians4:15 Kuripari kudakadzwa kwenyu kwemwakazwa? Ngokuti ndinomuitira chapupu imwimwi kuti kudai zvaibvira, mwaizodai mwakabvita madziso enyu mukaapa kwendiri." 
Galatians4:16 Ndizvo ndaita gaa renyu here ngokumuronzera gwinyiso? 
Galatians4:17 Vanotsamwirira kumutsvaka asi haiwa ngenjira yakanaka; vanoda kumukonyera kubanze, kuti imwimwi muvatsamwirire." 
Galatians4:18 Asi zvakanaka kutsamwirirwa ngenjira yakanaka ngenguva dzeshe, haiwa kwega apo ndinemwi." 
Galatians4:19 Vana vangu vadoko, vendinotambudzikira metsa Kristu abarwe mukati mwenyu," 
Galatians4:20 ndaida kuti dai ndaiyapo nemwi zvino, kuti nditsandure izwi rangu; ngokuti ndinokangaidzwa ndimwi." 
Galatians4:21 Ndironzerenyi, imwimwi munoda kutongwa ngeMupango, amupurutani Mupango here?" 
Galatians4:22 Ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Abrahama waiya nevakororo vairi, umwe wakabarwa ngomurandakadzi, noumweni wakabarwa ngomukadzi wakasunhurika.”" 
Galatians4:23 Asi mukororo womurandakadzi wakabarwa ngokuda kwenyama; asi mukororo womukadzi wakasunhurika wakabarwa kubudikidza ngechigondiso. 
Galatians4:24 Izvi zvinechidzidzo chomuedzaniso; ngokuti vakadzi vairi ava muedzaniso wezvitenderano zviiri. Umwe wevakadzi ndiHaga unobva kumutunhu weSinai, unobara vana vouranda." 
Galatians4:25 Zvino Haga idunhu reSinai muArabhia, unoedzaniswa neJerusarema rindoripo, ngokuti uri muusungwa pamwepo nevana vake." 
Galatians4:26 Asi mukadzi umweni unoedzaniswa neJerusarema iro romudenga rakasunhurika, ndivo mai edu." 
Galatians4:27 Ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Dakara, iwewe ngomwa usikabari. Pururidza, udaidzire, iwewe usikazi kurwadziwa ngokubara; ngokuti vanopinda kuwanda vana vomukadzi wakasiiwa kunouwo unemwamuna.”" 
Galatians4:28 Zvino imwimwi, hama, muri vana vechigondiso kudai ndiIsaka." 
Galatians4:29 Asi kudai ngezvakaitika ngouwo mukuwo, iye wakabarwa ngokuda kwenyama wakatambudza uwo wakabarwa ngokuda kwoMweya, zvakandodaro nazvino." 
Galatians4:30 Asi chinyorwa chinotinyi? Chinoti, “Dzinga uwo murandakadzi nomukororo wake, ngokuti mukororo womurandakadzi aazogari nhaka pamwepo nomukororo womukadzi wakasunhurika.”" 
Galatians4:31 Ndizvo hama, isusu atiri vanapi vouwo murandakadzi, asi tiri vouwo wakasunhurika." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu wakatisunungura akatiita vakasunhurika. Ndizvo emai mwakagwinya, musachasungwazve mujoka rouranda." 
Galatians5:2 Izwai! Inini Phauri ndinoti kwomuri, kudai mwechiashira kuchekwa, Kristu aadetseri chiro kwomuri." 
Galatians5:3 Inini ndinopupura kumunhu weshe unoashira kuchekwa kuti iye unomutari wokungwarira Mupango weshe. 
Galatians5:4 Imwimwi munoda kupembedzwa ngeMupango mwakadziparadzanisa kubva kunaKristu. Mwawa kubva kunyasha. 
Galatians5:5 Ngokuti kubudikidza ndiMweya ngokugonda tinogarira gonda rokururama. 
Galatians5:6 Ngokuti munaKristu Jesu zveshe kuchekwa nokusikachekwa azvidetseri chiro; chiro chimwe chega chinodetsera kugonda ukwo kunoshanda kubudikidza ngorudo. 
Galatians5:7 Imwimwi mwairumba zvakanaka; ndiani wakamupinga kuti musapurutana gwinyiso? 
Galatians5:8 Uku kunyengererwa akubvi akadi kunouwo wakamudaidza. 
Galatians5:9 Zvimumera zvidoodoko zvinofemesa hlama yeshe. 
Galatians5:10 Ndinogonda munaMambo, kuti amuzotori mukarakadzo umweni. Asi kunyazwi ndiani unomukangaidza unozodzitwarira kutongwa kwake." 
Galatians5:11 Asi inini, hama, ndichatambudzirwenyi kudai ndichachumaira kuchekwa? Kuti zvakadaro chipumhuniso chomuchinjiko chaduswa." 
Galatians5:12 Ndinoda kuti avo vanomunzeremusa dai vaizodzicheka pachavo. 
Galatians5:13 Ngokuti imwimwi, hama, mwakadaidzwa kuti muite vakasunhurika; kwega musashandisa kusunhurika kwenyu kuti kumutendere kuita zvenyama, asi ngorudo shandiranai umwe kunoumweni." 
Galatians5:14 Ngokuti Mipango yeshe inozadziswa ngomupango umwe, unoti, “Unozomuda muakirwana wako kudai ngokudzida kwako iwewe.”" 
Galatians5:15 Asi kudai mwechirumana nokudyana, ngwarai kuti musazopedzana." 
Galatians5:16 Asi ndinoti, “Hambai ngoMweya, nemwi amuzoiti kuemura kwenyama.”" 
Galatians5:17 Ngokuti kuemura kwenyama kunorwisana noMweya, nokuemura kwoMweya kunorwisana nenyama; ngokuti izvi zvinopesana chimwe nechimweni, kumurambidza kuti musaita zvomunoda." 
Galatians5:18 Asi kudai mwechikweyiwa ndiMweya, amusiri pashi peMupangopi." 
Galatians5:19 Zvino mishando yenyama inooneka pamhene, ndiyo iyi: kuomba, kusikasukika, kuemura," 
Galatians5:20 kudira miedzaniso, kuringidza, kunyenya, hasha, ndurumwa, ushungu, kudzida, kuparadzana, kudzidzisa manyepo," 
Galatians5:21 kururumwa, kuradza, kushadaya nezviro zvakadaro. Ndinomupanga kudai ngezvendakamupanga karetu, kuti avo vanoita zvakadaro avazogari nhaka youmambo hwaMwari." 
Galatians5:22 Asi michero yoMweya rudo, kudakara, kunyarara, kusengerera, nyasha, kunaka, kugondeka," 
Galatians5:23 kupfaa, kudzibata. Akuna mupango unorwisana nezvakadai." 
Galatians5:24 Naavo vari vaKristu Jesu vakakohomera nyama pamwepo nokudisisa nokuemura kwayo. 
Galatians5:25 Kudai techipona ndiMweya, ngatihambezve ndiMweya." 
Galatians5:26 Tisadziganzisa nokuti kutsenesana nokuti kururumwirana. 
Galatians6:1 Hama, kuti munhu abatwa ngechishaishi, imwimwi voMweya muunziridzirenyi wakadaro ngomweya wokupfaa, wechidzingwarira iwewe pachako newewo usazoedzwa." 
Galatians6:2 Twariranai mitwaro, ngokuita kudaro muzadzise mupango waKristu." 
Galatians6:3 Ngokuti dai munhu echidzipinimidzira kuti urinane kupinda vamweni, apo asikavapindi, iye unodzichengedzera pachake." 
Galatians6:4 Asi munhu weshe ngaaedze mushando wake wemene; naapo unozodzionera kuti ungaganza ngenyi pachake, haiwa ngomushando womuakirwana wake." 
Galatians6:5 Ngokuti munhu weshe unozodzitwarira mutwaro wake. 
Galatians6:6 Asi uwo unodzidziswa izwi ngaakoanisirane zviro zveshe zvakanaka nomudzidzisi wake. 
Galatians6:7 Musachengedzerwa; Mwari aaitirwi jee, ngokuti munhu unovhuna kunyazwi ngechiri chaanokusha." 
Galatians6:8 Ngokuti uwo unodzikushira nyama yake, unozovhuna kuora kubva kunyama; asi uwo unodzikushira Mweya, unozovhuna kubva kuMweya kupona kusikaperi." 
Galatians6:9 Tisaremba kuita zvakanaka, ngokuti ngenguva kwayo tinozovhuna, kudai tisikademeri." 
Galatians6:10 Ndizvo zvino kudai ngezvetinayo nguva, ngatishande zvakanaka kunevanhu veshe, kakurutu kuneavo vari vemhuri yokutenda." 
Galatians6:11 Munoona kukura kwetsamba yendakanyora kwomuri ngenyara yangu yemene! 
Galatians6:12 Ndivo avo vanoda kuoneka vari vakanaka munyama, vanomuangiridza kuti muchekwe; kwega kuti vasazotambudzwa ngendaa yomuchinjiko waKristu." 
Galatians6:13 Ngokuti kunyazwi naavo vemene vakachekwa, avangwariri Mupango, asi vanechidisiso chokuti muchekwe kuti vaganze ngenyama yenyu." 
Galatians6:14 Asi kusaitika kuti inini ndiganze ngechiro chimweni asi ngomuchinjiko waMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, kubudikidza ndiwo nyika yakakohomerwa kwendiri, neni ndakakohomerwa kunenyika." 
Galatians6:15 Ngokuti kuchekwa nokuti kusikachekwa akuna shwiro, asi kuita chisikwa chitsva kuri zviro zveshe." 
Galatians6:16 Kunyarara nenyasha ngazvigare padera pavo veshe vanohamba ngouyu murao nepadera pavaIsuraeri vaMwari. 
Galatians6:17 Kubvira zvino kusaapo munhu unonditambudza; ngokuti ndinotwara pamuiri wangu magotsa aJesu. 
Galatians6:18 Nyasha dzaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzigare nomweya yenyu, hama. Ameni." 
Ephesians1:1 Phauri, mupostori waKristu Jesu ngokuda kwaMwari, ndinonyorera kwavari vakacheneswa vari muEfesu, avo vanogondeka munaKristu Jesu." 
Ephesians1:2 Mwari Baba edu naMambo Jesu Kristu ngavamupe nyasha nokunyarara. 
Ephesians1:3 Ngaakudzwe Mwari naBaba aMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, uwo wakatifumisa munaKristu ngezvifumiso zveshe zvomweya mundau dzomudenga," 
Ephesians1:4 kudai ngezvaakatitsanangura mwaari ngorudo nyika isati yasikwa, kuti tiite vakacheneswa nevasina ndaa pamberi pake." 
Ephesians1:5 Wakatiemesa karetu kuti tiite vana vake kubudikidza ndiJesu Kristu, kudai ngebiningidzo rokuda kwake," 
Ephesians1:6 kuti tikudze Mwari ngendaa youthende hwenyasha dzake dzaakatipa pasina muripo kubudikidza ngoUnodikanwa. 
Ephesians1:7 Mwaari tinakwo kuripirwa kubudikidza ngengazi yake, ndikwo kukungurirwa kwezvishaishi zvedu, kudai ngouwandu hwenyasha dzake," 
Ephesians1:8 idzo dzaakapa ngokuwanzisa kwetiri. Muungwaru hweshe nokuzwisisa 
Ephesians1:9 wakaita kuti zviziikanwe kwetiri kushamisa kwokuda kwake, kudai ngebiningidzo rake raakaemesa munaKristu," 
Ephesians1:10 kudai ngourongwa hwokuzarisika kwenguva, kuti aunganidze zviro zveshe mwaari Kristu, zviro zvomudenga nezviro zvomunyika." 
Ephesians1:11 Mwaari takaitwa nhaka, takaemeserwa karetu kudai ngebiningidzo rouwo unoshanda zviro zveshe kudai ngokuronga kwokuda kwake," 
Ephesians1:12 kuti tiite kukudzwa kwouthende hwake, isusu takatanga kutenda kuna Kristu." 
Ephesians1:13 Mwaari imwimwiwo, mwakazwa izwi regwinyiso, vhangeri rokuponeswa kwenyu, nemwi mwakatendawo mwaari, mwakaiswa ruphau rwoMweya Wakachena womwakagondiswa;" 
Ephesians1:14 uwo ndiwo chigondiso chenhaka yedu, metsa kuripirwa kwenhaka yemene, kuita kukudzwa kwouthende hwake." 
Ephesians1:15 Ngeiyi ndaa neniwo, ndakati ndazwa ngokugonda kwenyu munaMambo Jesu norudo rwenyu kunevakacheneswa veshe," 
Ephesians1:16 andirekeri kubonga ngendaa yenyu, ndechimukarakadza mumikumbiro yangu," 
Ephesians1:17 kuti Mwari waMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, Baba vouthende, vamupe mweya woungwaru nowokuoniswa muruziyo rwake," 
Ephesians1:18 munemadziso omwoyo yenyu akavhenekerwa, kuti imwimwi muzie biningidzo regonda rokumudaidza kwake, neroupfumi hwouthende hwenhaka yake kwavari vakacheneswa," 
Ephesians1:19 noukuru hwakakurisa usina chipimo hwesimba rake kwetiri isusu tinotenda, kudai ngokushanda kwesimba rake guru," 
Ephesians1:20 raakashanda munaKristu, apo paakamumusa kubva kwevakafa, akamugadzika ngokumudyo kwake mundau dzomudenga," 
Ephesians1:21 padera pokutonga kweshe noukuru hweshe nesimba reshe noumambo hweshe, nepadera pemazina eshe anodudzwa, haiwa omunyika muno mwega, asi neeiyozve inouya." 
Ephesians1:22 Uwo wakaisa zveshe pashi petsoka dzake nokumuita soro padera pezveshe ngendaa yechiara," 
Ephesians1:23 icho chiri muiri wake, kuzara kwouwo unozarisa zveshe mune zveshe." 
Ephesians2:1 Imwimwi mwaiya vakafa muzvipaukwa nomuzvishaishi. 
Ephesians2:2 Muneizvo zvemwakahamba pakati pazvo karetu, mwakateera mitoo yeiyi nyika, mukateera njira yomuzvare wesimba romweya womudenga, mweya uwo unoshanda zvino mukati mwevakororo vokusikapurutana." 
Ephesians2:3 Taigara teshe pakati pavo karetu, tiri mukuemura kwenyama yedu, techiita kuda kwenyama nokwemipinimidzo, ngechibarirwe taiya vana voushungu, kudai ngevanhu vamweni." 
Ephesians2:4 Asi Mwari, unenyasha dzakawanda, kubva murudo rwake rwakakura rwaakatida ndirwo," 
Ephesians2:5 kunyazwi apo taiya takafa kubudikidza ngezvipaukwa zvedu, wakaita kuti tipone pamwepo naKristu (mwakaponeswa ngenyasha.)" 
Ephesians2:6 Wakatimusa pamwepo naye, akaita kuti tigare pamwepo naye mundau dzomudenga munaKristu Jesu," 
Ephesians2:7 kuti ngenguva dzinouya aonise kuwanda kukurutu kwoupfumi hwenyasha dzake norudo rwake kwetiri ndiKristu Jesu. 
Ephesians2:8 Ngokuti mwakaponeswa ngenyasha kubudikidza ngokugonda; izvi zvisikaitwi ndimwi, asi chipo chaMwari;" 
Ephesians2:9 azviitiki kubudikidza ngemishando, kuti kusazoapo naumwe ungaganza." 
Ephesians2:10 Ngokuti isusu tiri mushando wake, takasikirwa munaKristu Jesu kuti tiite mishando yakanaka, yaakaemesa karetu Mwari kuti tihambe mukati mwayo." 
Ephesians2:11 Ndizvo karakadzai kuti karetu imwimwi mwaiya vemadzinza ngokwenyama, mwaizwi kuti, “Vasikazi kuchekwa,” ngaavo vanozwi, “Vakachekwa,” izvo zvinoitwa munyama ngenyara." 
Ephesians2:12 Karakadzai imwimwi kuti ngouwo mukuwo mwaiya mwakaparadzana naKristu, musikaiyani norudzi rwaIsuraeri, muri vapara kuzvitenderano zvechigondiso, musina negonda, musina Mwari munyika." 
Ephesians2:13 Asi zvino munaKristu Jesu imwimwi karetu mwaiya kuretu mwakwedzedzwa pasinde ngengazi yaKristu. 
Ephesians2:14 Ngokuti iye uri kunyarara kwedu, uwo wakaita kuti teshe tiite umwe naye, wakaputsa rukumbati rwougaa rwaiparadzanisa ngepakati," 
Ephesians2:15 aparadza ngomuiri wake mitemo yemipango nezviemeso, kuti adzisikire mukati mwake munhu umwe mutsva kuti vasaita vairi, kuti paite kunyarara," 
Ephesians2:16 kuti aiyanise zvikwata zveshe zviiri munaMwari mumuiri umwe kubudikidza ngomuchinjiko, auraye ugaa kubudikidza ndiwo." 
Ephesians2:17 Naye wakauya, akachumaira kunyarara kwomuri imwimwi mwaiya kuretu nokunyarara kwavari avo vaiya pasinde;" 
Ephesians2:18 ngokuti kubudikidza ndiye isusu teshe tinokona kupinda ndiMweya umwe kunaBaba. 
Ephesians2:19 Ndizvo zvino amuchaiti vapara nevaeni, asi mwaita dzinza rimwe pamwepo nevakacheneswa, muri vemhuri yaMwari," 
Ephesians2:20 mwakaakwa padera petsikiro revapostori nerevaprofeti, Jesu Kristu emene ndiye buwe guru repakhona." 
Ephesians2:21 Mwaari mhatso yeshe inonasa kushonganiswa pamwepo nokukura kuita temperi rakachena munaMambo; 
Ephesians2:22 mwaari imwimwiwo munoakwa pamwepo kuita ugaro hwaMwari muMweya. 
Ephesians3:1 Ngeiyi ndaa inini Phauri, bhanditi raKristu Jesu ngendaa yenyu imwimwi vemadzinza," 
Ephesians3:2 ngegwinyiso mwakazwa ngounhunge hwenyasha dzaMwari dzakapuwa kwendiri ngendaa yenyu," 
Ephesians3:3 ngenjira yakaziiswa chakafishika chakaitwa kuti chiziikanwe kwendiri ngokuoniswa, kudai ngezvendakambonyora ngemazwi mashomani." 
Ephesians3:4 Mukudzidza izvi mungazwisisa kuzia kwangu ngechakafishika chaKristu," 
Ephesians3:5 icho chisikazi kuziikanwa kuvakororo vevanhu mumibarirwana imweni, kudai ngezvechakaoniswa kuvapostori vake vakacheneswa nevaprofeti ndiMweya;" 
Ephesians3:6 kuti vemadzinza vanogara nhaka pamwepo nesu navo vari venhengo dzomuiri umwewo pamwepo nesu vanokoanisirwawo chigondiso chiri kunaKristu Jesu kubudikidza ngevhangeri. 
Ephesians3:7 Ngeiri vhangeri ndakaitwa mushandiri waro, kudai ngechipo chenyasha dzaMwari chendakapuwa ngokushanda kwesimba rake." 
Ephesians3:8 Kwendiri, kunyazwi inini ndiri mudoko wokupedzisira wavo veshe vakacheneswa, nyasha idzi dzakapuwa, kuti ndichumaire kune vemadzinza upfumi husikatsvakiki hwaKristu," 
Ephesians3:9 nokuita kuti vanhu veshe vaone urongwa hwechakafishika chaiya chakafishwa kubvira pakutanga munaMwari uwo wakasika zviro zveshe; 
Ephesians3:10 kuti kubudikidza ngechiara uhwo ungwaru hwaMwari muzviemo zvakaparadzana zvino huziikanwe kuvatongi nevane simba mundau dzomudenga," 
Ephesians3:11 kudai ngokuronga kwake kwemhera nariini, ukwo kwaakaita muna Kristu Jesu Mambo wedu," 
Ephesians3:12 mwaari tinoshinga kupinda kubudikidza ngegonda rokutenda kwedu mwaari. 
Ephesians3:13 Ndizvo ndinomukumbira kuti musademera ngokutambudzika kwangu ngendaa yenyu, kuri uthende hwenyu." 
Ephesians3:14 Ngeiyi ndaa ndinogwadama ngemabvi angu pamberi paBaba," 
Ephesians3:15 kubva mwaari mhuri dzeshe dzomudenga nedzomunyika dzinodaidzwa ngezina ravo," 
Ephesians3:16 kuti iye amupe, kudai ngouwandu hwouthende hwake, kuti mugwinyiswe ngesimba kubudikidza ndiMweya wake mumunhu womukati," 
Ephesians3:17 kuti Kristu agare mumwoyo mwenyu kubudikidza ngokugonda; kuti imwimwi, muane nzinde netsikiro zvakagwinya murudo," 
Ephesians3:18 muane simba reshe rokuzwisisa, pamwepo nevakacheneswa veshe, chiinyi kupamhama nokureba nokukwira nokudzama" 
Ephesians3:19 nokukura mukuzia rudo rwaKristu runopinda ruziyo rweshe, kuti muzadzwe ngokuzara kweshe kwaMwari." 
Ephesians3:20 Kwaari uwo ngesimba rinoshanda mukati mwedu unokona kakurutu kuita zvakawanda kupinda zveshe zvetinokumbira nezvetinopinimidza," 
Ephesians3:21 kwaari ngakua nouthende muchiara nomunaKristu Jesu kunemazero eshe mhera nariini. Ameni. 
Ephesians4:1 Ndizvo inini, bhanditi raMambo, ndinomupota kuti muhambe kudai ngezvinosisira kudaidzwa kwemwakadaidzwa ndikwo," 
Ephesians4:2 ngokudzinaanisa kweshe nokupfaa nokusengerera, mwechisengerera umwe kunoumweni ngorudo," 
Ephesians4:3 mwechitsamwirira kungwarira kuiyana kwoMweya ngechisungo chokunyarara. 
Ephesians4:4 Uripo muiri umwe noMweya umwe, kudai ngezvemwakadaidzwa mukugonda kumwe kwokudaidzwa kwenyu," 
Ephesians4:5 Mambo umwe, gonda rimwe, rubhabhatidzo rumwe," 
Ephesians4:6 Mwari umwe, vari Baba weveshe, vari padera pavo veshe, vanoshanda kubudikidza ndivo veshe, naye uri mukati mwavo veshe." 
Ephesians4:7 Asi nyasha dzakapuwa kuneumwe ngaumwe wedu kudai ngechipimo chechipo chaKristu. 
Ephesians4:8 Ndizvo unoti, “Apo paakakwira mudenga, wakakweya vabatwa, akapa zvipo kuvanhu.”" 
Ephesians4:9 (Mukuti, “Wakakwira,” zvinoronzenyi asi kuti wakadzakazve kundau dziri pashi munyika?" 
Ephesians4:10 Uwo wakadzaka ndiyezve wakakwira ngepadera pematenga eshe, kuti azadzise zviro zveshe.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Naye wakapa vamweni kuti vaite vapostori, vamweni kuita vaprofeti, vamweni kuita vavhangeri, vamweni kuita vaushi nevadzidzisi," 
Ephesians4:12 kuti vakacheneswa vanasirirwe kumushando wokushandira, kuaka muiri waKristu," 
Ephesians4:13 metsa teshe taguma pakutenda kumwekwo noruziyo rwoMukororo waMwari, kuita vanhu vakaperera, kuchipimo choukuru hwakaperera hwaKristu;" 
Ephesians4:14 kuti tisachagara tiri vana vadoko, techizungunyiswa mberi nesure nokuvhuvhutwa ngemhepo yokudzidzisa kweshe, ngemazano akashata evanhu nourimbwi, kuti vatipause ngokuchengedzera." 
Ephesians4:15 Asi techiereketa gwinyiso murudo, tikure mwaari ngezviro zveshe, uwo uri soro, munaKristu;" 
Ephesians4:16 kubva mwaari muiri weshe, unorimbanidzwa nokubatanidzwa pamwepo ngenhengo dzeshe dzinogwinyisa, nhengo yeshe inoshanda ngechipimo chayo, kudai ngomushando wakanaka wenhengo imwe ngaimwe, unoita kuti muiri ukure kuti udziake murudo." 
Ephesians4:17 Ndizvo ndinoronza izvi nokupupura munaMambo, kuti musachahamba kudai ngevemadzinza muupenzi wemipinimidzo yavo isina shwiro;" 
Ephesians4:18 vari muchidima mukuzwisisa kwavo, vari vapara mukupona munaMwari ngendaa yokusikazia kwavo nendaa yokukonza kwomwoyo yavo;" 
Ephesians4:19 vakarashikirwa ngounhu hweshe vakadzipira mukuemura, vechishanda zveshe zvine tsvina ngokuboka." 
Ephesians4:20 Asi imwimwi amuzi kudzidza zvakadaro ndiKristu! 
Ephesians4:21 Ngegwinyiso mwakamuzwa mukadzidziswa ndiye, kudai ngegwinyiso riri munaJesu." 
Ephesians4:22 Mwakadzidziswa kuti murashe munhu wekaretu, kunoronza kupona kwenyu kwekaretu, uwo unooreswa ngokuemura kwokuchengedzera," 
Ephesians4:23 kuti mumusirirwe mumweya womupinimidzo wenyu," 
Ephesians4:24 mupfeke munhu mutsva, uwo wakasikwa akadai ndiMwari mukururama nomukucheneswa kwegwinyiso." 
Ephesians4:25 Ndizvo rashai kunyepa, “Ereketai gwinyiso munhu weshe kuno muakirwana wake,” ngokuti tiri nhengo umwe kunoumweni." 
Ephesians4:26 “Tsenekai, musikashaishi.” Musatendera kuti zuva ripote mwakatseneka," 
Ephesians4:27 musapa ndau kunaDhiabhorosi. 
Ephesians4:28 Mbavha ngairekere kuba, asi paugaro peizvo ngaishande, yechishanda zvakanaka ngenyara dzayo, kuti ione zvokupa kwaari unotama." 
Ephesians4:29 Musatendera kuti kuereketa kwakashata kubude mumiromo yenyu, asi kwega kwakanaka kunoaka, kudai ngezvinotamika, kuti kupe nyasha kwavari vanokuzwa." 
Ephesians4:30 Musatsamwisa Mweya Wakachena waMwari, womwakaisirwa chioniso mwaari metsa kuguma kuzuva rokuripirwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Rashai kubva kwomuri kushata kweshe, ushungu, kutseneka, bope, kutuka nokhururu kweshe;" 
Ephesians4:32 muitirane nyasha umwe kunoumweni, muano mwoyo yakapfaa, mwechirekererana umwe noumweni kudai ndiMwari wakamurekerera muna Kristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Ndizvo itai vaedzereri vaMwari, kudai ngevana vanodikanwa." 
Ephesians5:2 Muhambe murudo, kudai ndiKristu wakatida, akadzipira ngepamusoro pedu, kuita mudiro nomubairo kunaMwari zviite gwema rakanaka." 
Ephesians5:3 Asi kuomba nezvinosvipisa zveshe nokuemura zvisazoereketwa ndizvo pakati penyu, kudai ngezvinosisira pakati pevakacheneswa." 
Ephesians5:4 Musatendera kuti kuapo tsvina nokuti kuereketa zvoupenzi nokuti kutsvinya zvisikasisiri, asi ngakuapo kubonga." 
Ephesians5:5 Muwe negwinyiso reizvi, kuti akuna muombi nokuti munhu wakasvipiswa nokuti unoemura (kuronza kuti mudiri wemiedzaniso), unodya nhaka muumambo hwaKristu nohwaMwari." 
Ephesians5:6 Musachengedzerwa ngomunhu ngemazwi asina shwiro, ngokuti ngendaa yeizvi zviro ushungu hwaMwari hunouya padera pevana vokusikapurutana." 
Ephesians5:7 Ndizvo musazwanana navo," 
Ephesians5:8 ngokuti imwimwi karetu mwaiya chidima, asi zvino muri kujeka muna Mambo; hambai kudai ngevana vokujeka," 
Ephesians5:9 (ngokuti michero yokujeka inooneka kunezveshe zvakanaka nokururama negwinyiso,)" 
Ephesians5:10 mwechiedza kudzidza zvinonasa kudakadza Mambo. 
Ephesians5:11 Musikaiyani nemishando yechidima isina michero, asi ngazvibudiswe pakujeka." 
Ephesians5:12 Ngokuti zvinotsverudza kunyazwi kuereketa ngeizvo zvinoitwa ndivo mukufishika; 
Ephesians5:13 asi apo chiro cheshe pechinobudiswa pakujeka chinooneka," 
Ephesians5:14 ngokuti chiro cheshe chinooneka chiri kujeka. Ndizvo iye unoti, “Muka, iwewe unoata, muka kubva kwevakafa, naKristu unozokuvhenekera.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Ndizvo nasai kungwara mukuhamba kwenyu, musikadai ngevanhu vasikazi kungwara, asi mudai ngevakangwara," 
Ephesians5:16 mwechitenga mukuwo, ngokuti mazuva ari akashata." 
Ephesians5:17 Ndizvo musaita mapenzi, asi mwechizia chiri kuda kwaMambo." 
Ephesians5:18 Musaradza ngevhini, iro rinopara kusikadzibata, asi mwechizadzwa ndiMweya," 
Ephesians5:19 mwechiereketa umwe kunoumweni ngenduyo nengoma nokuemba kwoMweya, mwechiemba ngokutetemba ngomwoyo yenyu kunaMambo," 
Ephesians5:20 mwechibonga kunaMwari Baba ngezviro zveshe ngenguva dzeshe ngezina raMambo wedu Jesu Kristu. 
Ephesians5:21 Mwechipfairana umwe kunoumweni mukutya Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Vakadzi, pfairai vamuna venyu, kudai ngezvomunoita kunaMambo." 
Ephesians5:23 Ngokuti mwamuna uri soro romukadzi, kudai ndiKristu uri soro rechiara, muiri uwo waari muponesi." 
Ephesians5:24 Asi kudai ngechiara chinomupfaira Kristu, ndizvo vakadzi ngavapfaire vamuna vavo ngezviro zveshe." 
Ephesians5:25 Vamuna, idai vakadzi venyu, kudai ndiKristu wakachida chiara, akadzipira ngepamusoro pacho," 
Ephesians5:26 kuti achichenese, achisuka ngokushamba ngemvura neizwi," 
Ephesians5:27 kuti adziisire chiara kwaari chiri chiara chinounaku, chisina ndemo nokuti kuonyana nokuti chiro chimweni chakadaro, asi kuti chiite chakacheneswa, chisina neara." 
Ephesians5:28 Ngokudaro kunosisira kuti vamuna vade vakadzi vavo kudai ngezvevanoda miiri yavo. Uwo unoda mukadzi wake unodzida pachake. 
Ephesians5:29 Ngokuti apana munhu wakambonyenya nyama yake, asi unoikodza nokuingwarira, kudai ngezvaanoitawo Kristu kunechiara," 
Ephesians5:30 ngokuti isusu tiri nhengo dzomuiri wake. 
Ephesians5:31 “Ngeiyi ndaa munhu unozosiya baba ake namai ake, unozonamatira kumukadzi wake, naavo vairi vanozoita nyama imwe.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Ichi chakafishika chikurutu, asi ndinoereketa ngendaa yaKristu nechiara." 
Ephesians5:33 Asi umwe ngaumwe wenyu ngaade mukadzi wake kudai ngezvaanodzida pachake nomukadzi ngaangwarire kuti aremeredze mwamunawake. 
Ephesians6:1 Vana, purutanai vabari venyu munaMambo, ngokuti izvi zvakarurama." 
Ephesians6:2 “Remeredza baba ako namai ako,” (uyu uri mupango wokutanga une chigondiso,)" 
Ephesians6:3 “Kuti zvinake kwouri, nokuti upone mukuwo wakareba munyika.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Nemwi madzibaba, musatsamwisa vana venyu, asi muvarere mukudzidzisa nomukupanga kwaMambo." 
Ephesians6:5 Hloko, purutanai avo vari madzimambo enyu ngokwenyama, ngokutya nokuhuta, ngomwoyo wakarurama, kudai ngevanoitira Kristu;" 
Ephesians6:6 musikashandi ngokuoneka ngemadziso, kudai ngevanodakadza vanhu, asi kudai ngehloko dzaKristu, mwechiita kuda kwaMwari mumwoyo," 
Ephesians6:7 mwechishanda ngokuda kudai ngevanoitira Mambo haiwa kuvanhu," 
Ephesians6:8 mwechizia kuti kunyazwi chiinyi chakanaka chaanoita munhu, unozochipuwa kubva kunaMambo, kunyazwi hloko nokuti wakasunhurika." 
Ephesians6:9 Nemwiwo madzimambo, itai zvakadaro kwavari, murekere kuvatyisidzira, mwechizia kuti Mambo wavo nowenyuwo uri mudenga, kwaari akuna mutsananguro wevanhu." 
Ephesians6:10 Pakugumisira, itai vakagwinya munaMambo nomukugwinya kwesimba rake." 
Ephesians6:11 Pfekai nhumbi dzeshe dzokurwa ndidzo dzaMwari, kuti mukone kuema kurwisana nemazano akashata aDhiabhorosi." 
Ephesians6:12 Ngokuti atidzipani nenyama nengazi, asi tinodzipana noumambo nevane simba nevanotonga nyika yechidima chino nomweya yakashata yomundau dzomudenga." 
Ephesians6:13 Ndizvo torai nhumbi dzeshe dzokurwa ndidzo dzaMwari, kuti mukone kurwisa pazuva rakashata nokuramba mwakaema apo mwapedza zveshe." 
Ephesians6:14 Ndizvo emai, mwakasimira gwinyiso muzviunu zvenyu, mwaisa chihlangu chepaditi chokururama," 
Ephesians6:15 mwapfeka mutsoka dzenyu kunasirirwa kwevhangeri rokunyarara; 
Ephesians6:16 muneizvi zveshe torai chihlangu chokugonda, chomunozokona kudzima ndicho misee yeshe yemirazvu yomuriro youwo wakashata." 
Ephesians6:17 Ashirai chiqoko choruponeso neshoti yoMweya, iri izwi raMwari." 
Ephesians6:18 Mukumbire nguva dzeshe muMweya, nokukumbira kweshe nokupota. Muneizvi mumipinimidzo ngwarai nokusengerera kweshe nokukumbirira vakacheneswa veshe," 
Ephesians6:19 neniwo mundikumbirire, kuti ndipuwe izwi rokuereketa ngokushinga, kuti ndidudzire zvakafishika zvevhangeri," 
Ephesians6:20 ngendaa yaro inini ndiri muemereri wakasungwa ngemaketani; kuti ndierekete ngokushinga, kudai ngezvinosisira kuti ndierekete." 
Ephesians6:21 Zvino kuti muziewo magarire angu nezvendinoita, Thichikusi, munun'una unodikanwa nenhunge inogondeka munaMambo, unozomuronzera zviro zveshe." 
Ephesians6:22 Ndamutumira kwomuri ngendaa iyi, kuti muzie kugara kwedu nokuti agwinyise mwoyo yenyu." 
Ephesians6:23 Kunyarara ngakugare nevakoma, rudo pamwepo nokugonda, zvinobva kunaMwari Baba naMambo Jesu Kristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Nyasha ngadzigare kwavari veshe vanomuda Mambo wedu Jesu Kristu ngorudo rusikaperi. 
Philippians1:1 Phauri naThimothi, varanda vaKristu Jesu, ndinonyorera kwavari veshe vakacheneswa munaKristu Jesu avo vari muFiripi, pamwepo nevatungamiriri vakuru vechiara nevadetseri." 
Philippians1:2 Nyasha ngadzigare kwomuri nokunyarara zvinobva kunaMwari Baba edu naMambo Jesu Kristu. 
Philippians1:3 Ndinobonga Mwari wangu mikuwo yeshe yendinokarakadza ndimwi," 
Philippians1:4 ngenguva dzeshe mukukumbira kwangu kweshe ndimwi mweshe ndinokumbira ngokudakara," 
Philippians1:5 ngendaa yokubatana pamwepo kwenyu mukuhambisa vhangeri kubvira pazuva rokutanga metsa zvino. 
Philippians1:6 Ndechigonda ichi, kuti uwo wakatanga mushando wakanaka mukati mwenyu unozouita kuti uperere metsa pazuva raJesu Kristu." 
Philippians1:7 Kudai ngezvezvakanaka kuti ndiwe nomupinimidzo wakadaro ndimwi mweshe, ngokuti ndinemwi mumwoyo mwangu, ngokuti mukusungwa kwangu nokudzirwira nokugwinyisa vhangeri, imwimwi mweshe munokovana neni munyasha." 
Philippians1:8 Ngokuti Mwari ndiye chapupu changu, munjira yendinomushuwira mweshe ndiyo kakurutu ngorudo rwaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians1:9 Uyu ndiwo mukumbiro wangu, kuti rudo rwenyu ruangirire kuwanda nokuwanziswa mukuzia nokuzwisisa kweshe," 
Philippians1:10 kuti muedze muzie zviri zvakapinda kunaka, kuti muite vakacheneswa vasina ndaa metsa pazuva raKristu," 
Philippians1:11 mwechizadzwa ngemichero yokururama, iyo iripo kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu, mukukudza nokuirikidza Mwari." 
Philippians1:12 Asi ndinoda kuti muzie, hama, kuti izvo zvakaitika kwendiri zvakashanda kuhambisa vhangeri," 
Philippians1:13 ndizvo kusungwa kwangu ngendaa yaKristu kwakaziikanwa kwavari veshe vari mumhatso yamambo nokunevamweni veshe; 
Philippians1:14 hama zhinji dzakaitwa kuti dzigonde munaMambo ngokusungwa kwangu, nadzo dzinopinda kutsunga kuereketa izwi raMwari dzisikatyi." 
Philippians1:15 Ngegwinyiso vamweni vanochumaira Kristu ngegodo nehasha, asi vamweni ngomwoyo unoda." 
Philippians1:16 Vamweni vanoita kudaro ngorudo, vechizia kuti ndakaemeswa kurwira vhangeri;" 
Philippians1:17 asi vamweni vanochumaira Kristu ngehasha, vasikaiti ngegwinyiso, vechipinimidza kututsira kutambudzika kwendiri muusungwa hwangu." 
Philippians1:18 Zvinendaa yenyi izvi? Kwega kuti ngenjira dzeshe, kunyazwi ngokudziitisa nokuti ngegwinyiso, Kristu unochumairwa; neni ndinodakara ndizvo. Eya, ndinozoangira kudakara," 
Philippians1:19 ngokuti ndinozia kuti izvi zvinozokunukuka kuita ruponeso rwangu ngokukumbira kwenyu nokudetsera kwoMweya waJesu Kristu. 
Philippians1:20 Ndikwo kudisisa nokukarira kwokugonda kwangu, kuti andizotsveruki ngechiro nachimwe, asi kuti ngokuereketa kwangu ngokutsunga, kudai ngenguva dzeshe, kuti nazvino Kristu unozokuriswa mumuiri wangu kunyazwi mukurarama nokuti murufu." 
Philippians1:21 Ngokuti kwendiri kurarama ndiKristu norufu kuuyirwa. 
Philippians1:22 Asi kudai ndechipona munyama, zvinoronza michero yomushando wangu neni; andizii chendichatsanangura." 
Philippians1:23 Asi ndinomanikidzwa pakati peizvi zviiri. Chidisiso changu ngechokuti ndibve ndiende koogara naKristu, ngokuti ndizvo zvakapindisisa kunaka." 
Philippians1:24 Asi kugara munyama kunopinda kusisira ngendaa yenyu. 
Philippians1:25 Ndechigonda izvi, ndinozia kuti ndinozogara ndechiangirira kugara nemwi mweshe, mukuenda mberi nokudakara mukugonda," 
Philippians1:26 kuti kuganza kwenyu kuwanzwe munaKristu Jesu, ndapetukazve kwomuri." 
Philippians1:27 Kwega kuti muhambe kudai ngezvinosisira vhangeri raKristu, kuti kunyazwi ndechiuya koomuona nokuti ndisipo, ndingazwa ngendaa yokugara kwenyu, ndinozozia kuti mwakaema mwakagwinya ngomweya umwewo, ngomwoyo umwe mwechirwira kugondwa kwevhangeri," 
Philippians1:28 musikatyisidzirwi ngechiro nachimwe ngeavo vanorwisana nemwi. Kwavari izvi zviri chioniso chiri pamhene chokurashwa, asi kwomuri zviri chioniso choruponeso, urwu runobva kunaMwari." 
Philippians1:29 Ngokuti kwakatenderwa kwomuri nguva ngenyasha, haiwa yokutenda kwega munaKristu, asi yokutambudzika ngendaa yake," 
Philippians1:30 mwechirwawo kurwa kwemwakaona kwendiri nazvino munozwa kuti ngekwangu. 
Philippians2:1 Ndizvo kudai kuripo kunyaradzwa munaKristu, kudai kuripo kuembedzerwa kworudo, kudai kuripo kuiyana kwoMweya, kudai dziripo nyasha dzinorudo nokuitirwa nyasha," 
Philippians2:2 itai kuti kudakara kwangu kuite kwakaperera; muite vane mupinimidzo umwe, munerudo rumwe nechisungo chimwe nomupinimidzo umwe." 
Philippians2:3 Musaita chiro ngokudzida nokuti ngokudzitunhumadza, asi mukupfaa kwomupinimidzo umwe ngaumwe ngaaerenge kuti vamweni vanomupinda ngokunaka." 
Philippians2:4 Umwe ngaumwe ngaarekere kuringira zviro zvake, asi ngaaringire zvevamweni." 
Philippians2:5 Uyu mupinimidzo ngaugare mukati mwenyu uwo waiya mukati mwaKristu Jesu," 
Philippians2:6 uwo, kunyazwi waiya mumuemo waMwari, aazi kupinimidza kuti chiri chiro chokukara kuedzana naMwari," 
Philippians2:7 asi wakadziita usina shwiro, echidzitorera muemo womuranda, akabarwa mumuemo womunhu. Naapo echioneka anomuemo womunhu," 
Philippians2:8 wakadzipfaisa pachake, akaita unopurutana metsa pakufa, kunyazwi rufu rwepamuchinjiko." 
Philippians2:9 Ndizvo Mwari wakamukudza kakurutu, akamupa zina riri padera pezina reshe," 
Philippians2:10 kuti ngezina raJesu mabvi eshe agwadame, evari mudenga nevari munyika nevari pashi penyika," 
Philippians2:11 kuti ndimi dzeshe dzitende kuti Jesu Kristu ndiye Mambo, kuti Mwari Baba akudzwe." 
Philippians2:12 Ndizvo, vanodikanwa vangu, kudai ngezvemwakandipurutana ngenguva dzeshe, haiwa panguva dzendiripo dzega, asi zvino munopinda kakurutu apo ndisipo, shandirai ruponeso rwenyu mukutya nomukuhuta;" 
Philippians2:13 ngokuti ndiye Mwari unoshanda mukati mwenyu, echimuita kuti mukone mweshe kuda nokushandira kudakara kwake kwakanaka." 
Philippians2:14 Itai zveshe pasina kuvhuruvhuta nokuti kuita hasha," 
Philippians2:15 kuti muite vasina chevanoitirwa ndaa, vakarurama, muri vana vaMwari musina ndaa pakati pomubarirwana wakashongoroka nowakapauka, mujeke pakati pavo kudai ngenyeredzi dzinojeka padera penyika." 
Philippians2:16 Ngokubatisisa izwi rokupona kunoita kuti ndiwe nacho chokuganza ndicho ngezuva raKristu, kuti andizi kutera kurumba pasina shwiro nokuti kutera kushanda pasina shwiro." 
Philippians2:17 Asi kunyazwi ndechidururwa padera pomudiro nomushando wokugonda kwenyu, ndinodakara ndechidakara nemwi mweshe." 
Philippians2:18 Ngokudaro dakaraiwo imwimwi, mudakare neni." 
Philippians2:19 Asi ndinogonda munaMambo Jesu kutumira Thimothi kwomuri ngokukasira kuti neni ndidakadzwe ngemashoko enyu. 
Philippians2:20 Ngokuti andina munhu umweni wakadai ndiye, ungazonasa kumutambudzikira imwimwi ngokugara kwenyu." 
Philippians2:21 Ngokuti veshe vanodzitsvakira zvavo, haiwa izvo zvaJesu Kristu." 
Philippians2:22 Asi imwimwi munozia kugondeka kwake Thimothi, kuti kudai ngomwana unababa, ngokudaro iye wakashanda neni mukuhambisa vhangeri." 
Philippians2:23 Ndizvo ndinogonda kuti ndinozomutumira ngokukasira apo ndazoona zvooitika kwendiri; 
Philippians2:24 neni ndinogonda munaMambo kuti ndinozokasira kuuyayo. 
Philippians2:25 Asi ndapinimidza kuti zvinosisira kuti nditumire Ephafrodhitusi kwomuri, hama yangu, inoshanda pamwepo neni, nouri joni pamwepo neni, nhumwa yenyu, nounoshandira kutama kwangu;" 
Philippians2:26 ngokuti waimushuwira imwimwi mweshe, naye wakatambudzika kakurutu ngokuti mwakazwa kuti wairwara." 
Philippians2:27 Ngegwinyiso wairwara ari pasinde pokufa. Asi Mwari wakamuitira nyasha, haiwa kwaari kwega asi nokwendiriwo, kuti ndisatambudzika padera pokutambudzika." 
Philippians2:28 Ndizvo ndinopinda kuda kumutumira kwomuri, ndizvo kuitira kuti mumuonezve mudakare, kuti neni ndisanyanya kutambudzika." 
Philippians2:29 Ndizvo muashirenyi munaMambo ngokudakara kweshe; muremeredze vakadaro," 
Philippians2:30 ngokuti wakaapasinde pokufa ngendaa yomushando waKristu, echipira kupona kwake mungozi, kuti apedzise izvo zvaisisira zvomushando wenyu kwendiri." 
Philippians3:1 Pakugumisira, hama dzangu, dakarai munaMambo. Kunyorazve kwomuri zviro izvo azvindinesi inini, asi kwomuri kungwaririka." 
Philippians3:2 Ngwarai imbwa, ngwarai vashandi vezvakashata, ngwarai ngaavo vanocheka nyama." 
Philippians3:3 Ngokuti tisu tiri vakachekwa, avo vanodira Mwari muMweya nokuganza munaKristu Jesu, tisikagondi munyama," 
Philippians3:4 kunyazwi inini pachangu ndinazvo zvendingagondawo munyama. Kudai aripo munhu unokarakadza kuti ungagonda nyama, inini ndingamupinda:" 
Philippians3:5 ndakachekwa ngezuva rechisere, ndiri worudzi rwevanhu vaIsuraeri, ndiri wedzinza raBhenjamini, ndiri muHebheru wakabarwa ngevaHebheru; paMipango ndiri muFarisi;" 
Philippians3:6 ngendaa yokutsamwirira ndakaita mutambudzi wechiara; ngendaa yokururama kweMipango ndakaita usina ndaa. 
Philippians3:7 Asi izvo zvaiya upfumi kwendiri, ndakazvierenga kuita zvisina shwiro ngendaa yaKristu." 
Philippians3:8 Eya ngegwinyiso, ndinoerenga zveshe kuti zviri zvisina shwiro ngendaa yokunaka kukurutu kwokumuzia Kristu Jesu, Mambo wangu. Ngendaa yake ndakatambudzika ngokurashikirwa ngezviro zveshe, neni ndinozvierenga kuti zviri marara, kuitira kuti ndiuyirwe ndiKristu," 
Philippians3:9 ndioneke mwaari ndisina kururama kuri kwangu, kunobva muMupango, asi ukwo kunouya kubudikidza ngokugonda munaKristu, kururama kunobva kunaMwari ngokugonda." 
Philippians3:10 Inini ndinoda kumuzia Kristu nesimba rokumuka kwake, nokukowana naye mukutambudzika kwake, ndechitodzaniswa naye mukufa kwake," 
Philippians3:11 kuti zvanyadini ndihanire mukumuka kubva kwevakafa. 
Philippians3:12 Andikwopi kuti ndatohanira ichi nokuti kuita waperera zvino; asi ndinoangirira kuenda mberi kuti chiite changu icho chaakandibatira Kristu Jesu. 
Philippians3:13 Hama, inini ndemene andidzierengi kuti ndabata kuita changu; asi chiro chimwe chendinoita, ndinoriarwa zviri sure nokunanambira zviri mberi," 
Philippians3:14 ndinogwinyisira kuenda kumagumisiro, koopuwa chipo chokudaidzwa kunobva mudenga kuri munaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians3:15 Ndizvo isusu teshe vakura ngatiwe nomupinimidzo wakadaro; nokudai muno mupinimidzo umweni nokuti ngowechiri chiro, neichozve Mwari unozochionisa kwomuri." 
Philippians3:16 Kwega ngatibatisise kuneizvo zvetakahanira kwezviri. 
Philippians3:17 Hama, itai vanondiedzerera, muringisise avo vanohamba kudai ngechionero chomunacho kwetiri." 
Philippians3:18 Ngokuti vazhinji vanohamba kudai ngemagaa omuchinjiko waKristu; ndakamuronzera ndivo kazhinji, nazvino ndinomuronzera ngokuchema." 
Philippians3:19 Magumo avo kuparadzwa, chimwari chavo indani dzavo, navo vanoganza ngezvinotsverudza zvavo; vanopinimidza ngezvomunyika." 
Philippians3:20 Asi nyika yedu iri mudenga, kubveyozve tinogarira kuuya kwoMuponesi, Mambo Jesu Kristu," 
Philippians3:21 uwo unozotsandudza muiri woupashi hwedu, kuti uite unotodzana nomuiri wouthende hwake, kubudikidza ngesimba iro rinomuitawo kuti akone kupfaisa zveshe pashi pake." 
Philippians4:1 Ndizvo, hama dzangu, avo vendinoda nevendinoshuwira, kudakara kwangu nedzungudza rangu, ngokudaro emai mwakagwinya munaMambo, vanodikanwa vangu."
