Philippians4:2 Ndinopota Yuodhia, ndinopota Sintikhe, kuti vaano mupinimidzo umwewo munaMambo." 
Philippians4:3 Eya ndinokumbirawo, iwewe mungani wangu wegwinyiso, detsera madzimai aya, ngokuti vakashanda pamwepo neni muvhangeri, pamwepo naKrementi nevamweni vangani vangu vendinoshanda navo, avo mazina avo ari mubhuku rokupona." 
Philippians4:4 Dakarai munaMambo ngenguva dzeshe; zve, ndinozoti, Dakarai." 
Philippians4:5 Kupfaa kwenyu ngakuziikanwe kuvanhu veshe. Mambo waapasinde. 
Philippians4:6 Musanyunyutira chiro, asi muzviro zveshe kubudikidza ngomukumbiro nokupota pamwepo nokubonga, mikumbiro yenyu ngaiziikanwe kunaMwari." 
Philippians4:7 Kunyarara kwaMwari, kunopinda kuzwisisa kweshe, kunozongwarira mwoyo yenyu nemipinimidzo yenyu munaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians4:8 Pakugumisira, hama, zveshe zviri zvegwinyiso, zveshe zvinoremeredzeka, zveshe zviro zvakarurama, zveshe zviri zvakachena, zveshe zvinodikanwa, zveshe zvine mbiri yakanaka, kudai kuripo kunaka, kudai kuripo kukudzwa, pinimidzai ngeizvi zviro." 
Philippians4:9 Rambai mwechiita zviro izvo zvemwakadzidza nokuashira nokuzwa nokuona mwendiri; naMwari wokunyarara unozogara nemwi. 
Philippians4:10 Inini ndinodakara kakurutu munaMambo kuti zvino pakupedzisira mwakamusirira kupinimidza ndini; ngegwinyiso mwaipinimidza ndini, asi mwakatama mukuwo wokuzvionisa." 
Philippians4:11 Haiwa kuti ndinoereketa ngendaa yokutama; ngokuti ndakadzidza kugutiswa kunyazwi ngohuri ugaro hwendinahwo. 
Philippians4:12 Ndinozia kuita murombo nokuita mupfumi. Kuzviro zveshe nepakati pazvo zveshe, ndakadzidza zvakafishika zveshe kugutiswa nokuita nzara, zveshe kupfuma nourombo." 
Philippians4:13 Ndingaita zveshe ndiye unondigwinyisa. 
Philippians4:14 Asi mwakaita zvakanaka kuti mwakatambudzika neni mukutambudzika kwangu. 
Philippians4:15 Imwimwi vaFiripi ngegwinyiso munozia kuti pakutanga kwevhangeri, apo pendakabva Masedhonia, apana chiara chakatambudzika neni ngendaa yokupa neyokuashira, asi imwimwi mwega." 
Philippians4:16 Ngokuti kunyazwi apo pendaiya muThesaronika, mwakatumira kamwe nokwechipiri kundidetsera mukutama kwangu." 
Philippians4:17 Haiwa kuti ndinotsvaka chipo, asi ndinotsvaka michero yomunozofumiswa ndiyo." 
Philippians4:18 Asi ndaanazvo zviro zveshe, ndafumiswa. Ndagutiswa, ndaashira kubva kunaEphafrodhitusi zvipo zvemwakatumira kubva kwomuri, zviri gwema rakanaka, mudiro unoashirika unodakadza kunaMwari." 
Philippians4:19 Asi Mwari wangu unozomugutisa ndizvo zveshe zvomunotama, kudai ngoupfumi hwake muuthende munaKristu Jesu." 
Philippians4:20 Kuna Mwari Baba wedu ngakugare uthende mhera nariini nariini. Ameni. 
Philippians4:21 Tambisai vakacheneswa veshe vari munaKristu Jesu. Hama dzineni dzinomutambisa. 
Philippians4:22 Veshe vakacheneswa vanomutambisa, kakurutu avo vemhuri yaSiza." 
Philippians4:23 Nyasha dzaMambo Jesu Kristu ngadzigare nomweya yenyu. 
Colossians1:1 Phauri, mupostori waKristu Jesu ngokuda kwaMwari, naThimothi hama yedu," 
Colossians1:2 ndinonyorera kwavari vakacheneswa nehama dzakagondeka munaKristu vari muKhorose. Nyasha kwomuri nokunyarara zvinobva kunaMwari Baba wedu ngazvigare nemwi. 
Colossians1:3 Tinobonga Mwari, Baba aMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, techimukumbirira nguva dzeshe," 
Colossians1:4 ngokuti takazwa ngokugonda kwenyu munaKristu Jesu norudo rwomunarwo kwavari veshe vakacheneswa," 
Colossians1:5 ngendaa yegonda iro rakagadzikirwa imwimwi mudenga. Mwakazwa ndiro karetu ngeizwi regwinyiso, vhangeri," 
Colossians1:6 iro rakaguma kwomuri, kudai ngezverinobara michero nokukura munyika yeshe, ndizvo raibara michero pakati penyu, kubvira kuiro zuva remwakazwa nokuzia nyasha dzaMwari mugwinyiso." 
Colossians1:7 Izvi ndizvo zvemwakadzidza kubva kunaEphafrasi mungani wedu unodikanwa wetinoshanda naye. Muranda wakagondeka waKristu ngendaa yenyu," 
Colossians1:8 uwo wakatiziisa ngorudo rwenyu muMweya. 
Colossians1:9 Ngeiyi ndaa nesuwo, kubvira pazuva iro retakazvizwa, atizi kurekera kupota nokumukumbirira, kuti muzadzwe ngokuzia kuda kwake ngoungwaru hweshe nokuzwisisa kweshe kwoMweya," 
Colossians1:10 kuti muhambe kudai ngezvinosisira kunaMambo, mwechinasa kumudakadza ndizvo zveshe, mwechibereka michero mumishando yeshe yakanaka, mwechikura mukuzia Mwari," 
Colossians1:11 mwechigwinyiswa ngokugwinya kweshe kunobva kusimba routhende hwake, kuti mukone kushingirira muzviro zveshe ngokusengerera kweshe nokudakara," 
Colossians1:12 mwechibonga kunaBaba, uwo wakamuita vanosisira kukoanisirwa nhaka yevakacheneswa mukujeka." 
Colossians1:13 Uwo wakatinunura kubva kusimba rechidima, wakatiisa muumambo hwoMukororo wake unodikanwa," 
Colossians1:14 mwaari tinakwo kuripirwa, kukungurirwa kwezvishaishi zvedu." 
Colossians1:15 Ndiye muedzaniso waMwari usikaoneki, dangwe rezvakasikwa zveshe;" 
Colossians1:16 ngokuti mwaari zviro zveshe zvakasikwa, zviri mudenga nezviri munyika, zviro zvinooneka nezvisikaoneki, kunyazwi madendemaro nokuti umambo nokuti vatongi nokuti vane simba; zviro zveshe zvakasikwa kubudikidza ndiye, nazvo zvakasikirwa iye." 
Colossians1:17 Ndiye unotangira zviro zveshe, nemwaari zviro zveshe zvakabatana pamwepo." 
Colossians1:18 Ndiye soro romuiri, chiara; ndiye maambo, dangwe rokumuka kubva kwevakafa, kuti iye aite mukuru muzviro zveshe." 
Colossians1:19 Ngokuti mwaari kuzara kweshe kwaMwari kwakadakara kugaramwo," 
Colossians1:20 nokubudikidza ndiye Mwari wakadakara kudziiyanisira zviro zveshe kwaari, kunyazwi zviro zviri munyika nokuti zviro zviri mudenga, aita runyararo kubudikidza ngengazi yepamuchinjiko wake." 
Colossians1:21 Nemwiwo karetu mwaiya vapara nemagaa mukupinimidza kwenyu, mwechiita mishando yakashata," 
Colossians1:22 zvino wakaiyanisa munyama yomuiri wake kubudikidza ngokufa, kuti amuise muri vakacheneswa nevasina ndaa, musikashooreki pamberi pake," 
Colossians1:23 kudai mwechiangira kugara mwakadzimikwa nokugwinyiswa mukugonda, musikatsukunuswi kubva mugonda remwakagondiswa ngevhangeri remwakazwa, iro rakachumairwa kunezvisikwa zveshe pashi pomudenga. Inini, Phauri, ndakaitwa mushandiri waro vhangeri iri." 
Colossians1:24 Zvino ndinodakara mukutambudzika kwangu ngendaa yenyu, ndechizadzisa munyama yangu icho chakasarira chemadambudziko aKristu ngendaa yomuiri wake, kuronza, chiara." 
Colossians1:25 Inini ndakaitwa mushandiri kudai ngoungwariri hwakapuwa kwendiri ndiMwari ngendaa yenyu, kuzadzisa izwi raMwari kuti rinase kuziikanwa," 
Colossians1:26 mushamiso waiya wakafishwa kubvira pakutanga kumibarirwana yeshe, asi zvino waoniswa kunevakacheneswa vake." 
Colossians1:27 Kwavari Mwari wakatsanangura kuti avaziise icho chiri upfumi hwouthende hwechakafishika pakati pevemadzinza, ndiye Kristu mukati mwenyu, gonda routhende." 
Colossians1:28 Ndiye uwo wetinochumaira, techipanga munhu weshe nokudzidzisa munhu weshe muungwaru hweshe, kuti tiunze munhu weshe akaperera munaKristu." 
Colossians1:29 Ngokuti ndizvo izvi zvendinoshandawo, ndechitambudzika ngesimba rake iro raakafemera mukati mwangu ngesimba." 
Colossians2:1 Ngokuti ndinoda kuti muzie kuti kukura kwakaitawani kwokutambudzika kwendinakwo ngendaa yenyu, nendaa yaavo vari muRaodhisia, naavo veshe vasati vatongoona hope yangu ngokwenyama," 
Colossians2:2 kuti mwoyo yavo igwinyiswe nokubatana pamwepo murudo, kuti vawe noupfumi hweshe hwokuzwisisa hwakakwana nokuwa noruziyo rwechakafishika chaMwari, zvinoronza Kristu emene," 
Colossians2:3 mwaari kwakafishwa upfumi hweshe hwoungwaru nehworuziyo. 
Colossians2:4 Ndinoronza izvi kuti kusazoapo naumwe unozomuchengedzera ngemazwi ourimbwi. 
Colossians2:5 Ngokuti kunyazwi ndisipo ngomuiri, asi ndinemwi mumweya, ndechidakara, ndechiringira kuzwanana kwenyu nokugwinya kwokugonda kwenyu munaKristu." 
Colossians2:6 Ndizvo kudai ngezvemwakaashira Kristu Jesu Mambo, angirai kupona mukati mwake," 
Colossians2:7 munenzinde dzakadzimikwa nokuakwa mukati mwake, mwechigwinyiswa mukugonda, kudai ngezvemwakadzidziswa, mwechizadzwa ngokubonga." 
Colossians2:8 Ngwarai kuti asazoapo naumwe unomushaishira ngoungwaru hwevanhu nokuchengedzera ngezvisina shwiro, kuteera mishuma yevanhu, kudai ngokudzidzisa kwomweya yomunyika, haiwa kwaKristu." 
Colossians2:9 Ngokuti mwaari munekuperera kweshe kwoUmwari kunogara mumuiri," 
Colossians2:10 mwaari imwimwiwo muri vakaperera, uwo uri soro padera pevatongi veshe nepadera pevane simba." 
Colossians2:11 Mwaariwo imwimwi mwakachekwa ngokuchekwa kusikaitwi ngenyara, ngokubviswa kwomuiri wenyama, mukuchekwa ukwo kuri kwaKristu;" 
Colossians2:12 apo pemwakaikwa pamwepo naye murubhabhatidzo, rwemwakamuswazve pamwepo naye kubudikidza ngokugonda musimba raMwari uwo wakamumusa kubva kwevakafa." 
Colossians2:13 Naapo pemwaiya vakafa mukupauka kwenyu nokusikachekwa kwenyama yenyu, Mwari wakamuita kuti mupone pamwepo naye, apo paakatikungurira kupauka kwedu kweshe," 
Colossians2:14 atsukutidza chisungo chakanyorwa cheMipango, icho chakatiitira ndaa nemitemo yacho chinopesana nesu; naye wakachibvisa munjira, akachikohomera pamuchinjiko." 
Colossians2:15 Wakadusapo vatongi nevane simba, akavabudisa pamhene, echivanyisa ndiwo." 
Colossians2:16 Ndizvo musatendera munhu kuti amutonge ngendaa yezvokudya nokuti zvokumwa nokuti ngendaa yemishongano yokudya nokuti yokutawa kwomwedzi nokuti yemaSabatha. 
Colossians2:17 Izvo zviri bvuri rezvinouya, asi muiri ngowaKristu." 
Colossians2:18 Musatendera naumwe kuti amukorerese kuashira chipo chenyu ngokudzipfaisa ngamaune nokudira ngirosi, echibatisisa kuneizvo zvaakaona, echidzikudza kusina shwiro ngomupinimidzo wenyama," 
Colossians2:19 asikanasi kubatirira kuSoro, kweriri muiri weshe unonasa kugutswa nokugwinyiswa ngenhengo nemidzira, unokura ngokukuriswa ndiMwari." 
Colossians2:20 Kudai mwakafa pamwepo naKristu kubva kuzvidzidziso zvokutanga zvenyika, munodzipfaisa ngenyi kungwarira zviemeso, kudai ngevachapona ngezvomunyika?" 
Colossians2:21 Izvo zvinoti, “Musabata, musaraira, musagwama.”" 
Colossians2:22 Mitemo iyi yeshe inoereketa ngezviro zvinopera ngokushandiswa; ndiyo mipango nezvidzidziso zvevanhu zvega. 
Colossians2:23 Zviro zvakadai ngegwinyiso zvinooneka zvakadai ngezvinoungwaru mukudira kwokuda nokudzipfaisa nokurekeredza muiri; asi azvina simba rokunyisa kuda kwenyama. 
Colossians3:1 Ndizvo kudai mwakamuswa pamwepo naKristu, tsvakai zviro zviri padera, apo pana Kristu, akagara ngokumudyo kwaMwari." 
Colossians3:2 Emesai mipinimidzo yenyu kunezviro zviri padera, haiwa kuzviro zviri munyika," 
Colossians3:3 ngokuti imwimwi mwakafa, nokurarama kwenyu kwakafishwa pamwepo naKristu munaMwari." 
Colossians3:4 Naapo Kristu uwo uri kurarama kwenyu ooneswa, munozoonekawo pamwepo naye muuthende." 
Colossians3:5 Ndizvo urayai zviemuriro zvenyu zvenyika: kuomba, kusikasukika, kuemura kwomuiri, kudisisa zvakashata nokuemura pfuma, ukwo kuri kudira miedzaniso." 
Colossians3:6 Ngendaa yeizvi zviro ushungu hwaMwari hunouya padera peavo vokusikapurutana. 
Colossians3:7 Kwezviri imwimwiwo mwakahamba mukati mwazvo karetu, apo muchagara mukati mwazvo." 
Colossians3:8 Asi zvino imwimwiwo rashai zviro zveshe izvi: kutseneka, ushungu, kunyenya, kutuka nokuereketa zvinotsverudza ngemiromo yenyu." 
Colossians3:9 Musanyeperana, kwechioneka kuti mwakarasha munhu wekaretu nezviito zvake," 
Colossians3:10 nemwi mwakadzipfekedza munhu mutsva, uwo unomusirirwa muruziyo kuti aedzane nomuedzaniso wouwo wakamusika." 
Colossians3:11 Apachina muGiriki nokuti muJudha, wakachekwa nokuti usikazi kuchekwa, wenyika mukanza, muSkuthia, hloko nowakasunhurika. Asi Kristu ndiye zveshe nomukati mwazvo zveshe." 
Colossians3:12 Ndizvo, kudai ngevakatsanangurwa vaMwari, vakacheneswa nevanodikanwa, pfekai pachenyu mwoyo wokuzwira urombo, nyasha, kunaaniswa, kupfaa nokusengerera," 
Colossians3:13 mwechisengerera umwe noumweni, mwechirekererana, kuti aripo munhu unendaa kunoumweni; kudai ngezvaakamurekerera Mambo, ndizvo nemwiwo munosisira kurekererana." 
Colossians3:14 Kupinda izvi zveshe, dzipfekedzei ngorudo, runosungira zviro zveshe pamwepo mukunyarara kwakaperera." 
Colossians3:15 Tenderai kuti kunyarara kwaKristu kutonge mumwoyo yenyu; ndikwo kwemwakadaidzirwa mumuiri umwe. Mwechibonga. 
Colossians3:16 Izwi raKristu ngarigare mukati mwenyu ngokuwandisa, mwechidzidzisana nokupangana umwe noumweni muungwaru hweshe; mwechibonga mumwoyo yenyu embai nduyo, ngoma nengoma dzoMweya kunaMwari." 
Colossians3:17 Kunyazwi chiinyi chomunoita, ngeizwi nokuti ngomushando, itai zviro zveshe ngezina raMambo Jesu, mwechibonga kunaMwari Baba kubudikidza ndiye." 
Colossians3:18 Vakadzi, pfairai vamuna venyu, kudai ngezvinosisira vari muna Mambo." 
Colossians3:19 Vamuna, idai vakadzi venyu, musaita ushungu kwavari." 
Colossians3:20 Vana, purutanai vabari venyu ngezviro zveshe, ngokuti ichi chiri mushando wenyu unodakadza Mambo." 
Colossians3:21 Madzibaba, musatsenesa vana venyu, kuti mwoyo yavo isazopera simba." 
Colossians3:22 Hloko, purutanai madzimambo enyu omunyika ngezviro zveshe, haiwa ngokurindwa, kudai ngevanodakadzisa vanhu, asi ngomwoyo weshe, mwechitya Mambo." 
Colossians3:23 Kunyazwi chiinyi chomunoita, shandai ngomwoyo, kudai ngevanoshandira Mambo, haiwa vanhu," 
Colossians3:24 mwechizia kuti munozoashira musharo wenhaka kubva kunaMambo. Munoshandira Mambo Kristu. 
Colossians3:25 Ngokuti iye unoita zvakashata unozoashira zvakashata zvaakaita; akuna mutsananguro. 
Colossians4:1 Madzimambo, itirai hloko dzenyu izvo zvakanaka nezvinoedzana, mwechizia kuti imwimwiwo munaMambo mudenga." 
Colossians4:2 Angirai mukukumbira, mwechirinda murimwo ngokubonga." 
Colossians4:3 Panguva imweyo mwechitikumbirirawo kuti Mwari atibeurire musiwo weizwi, kuti tierekete chakafishika chaKristu, chendiri muzvisungo ngendaa yacho," 
Colossians4:4 kuti ndinase kuchionisa pamhene kudai ngezvinosisira kuti ndierekete. 
Colossians4:5 Hambai muungwaru kwavari vari kubanze, mwechitenga mukuwo." 
Colossians4:6 Kuereketa kwenyu ngakuwe nenyasha nguva dzeshe, kwechirungwa ngomunyu, kuti muzie njira inosisira kupingurana ndiyo umwe kuno umweni." 
Colossians4:7 Thichikusi unozomuronzera mashoko eshe ngendaa yangu; uwo uri hama unodikanwa, mushandi unogondeka, mungani wedu unoshanda pamwepo neni munaMambo." 
Colossians4:8 Ndamutumira kwomuri ngeiyi ndaa, kuti muzie ngokugara kwedu nokugwinyisa mwoyo yenyu." 
Colossians4:9 Unouyayo naOnesimusi, hama inogondeka neinodikanwa, uwo uri umwe wenyu. Vanozomuronzera zveshe zvinoitwa uno." 
Colossians4:10 Aristakhusi mungani wangu muubhanditi unomutambisa, naMarako muzukuru waBhanabhasi (uwo wemwakaashira kupangwa ngendaa yake; kudai echiguma kwomuriyo mumuashire.)" 
Colossians4:11 NaJesu unozwi Justusi unomutambisa. Avo ndivo vanhu vega vakachekwa pakati pevangani vangu vendinoshanda navo muumambo hwaMwari, navo vakandiembedzera." 
Colossians4:12 Ephafrasi, umwe wenyu, muranda waKristu Jesu, unomutambisa. Nguva dzeshe unomutambudzikira mukukumbira kwake ngendaa yenyu, kuti mueme mwakaperera mwechizia ngegwinyiso icho chiri kuda kwaMwari." 
Colossians4:13 Ngokuti ndinoita chapupu ndiye kuti unomushandira kakurutu naavozve vari muRaodhisia nevari muHieraporisi. 
Colossians4:14 Ruka, dhokodheya unodikanwa naDhemasi vanomutambisa." 
Colossians4:15 Tambisai hama dziri muRaodhisia, naNyumufa nechiara chiri mumhatso yake." 
Colossians4:16 Naapo iyi tsamba yadzidzwa pakati penyu, itaizve kuti idzidzwe muchiara chevaRaodhisia; kuti nemwiwo mudzidze tsamba inobva Raodhisia." 
Colossians4:17 Mwechironzera Akhipusi kuti, “Ngwara kuti upedzise mushando wowakaashira kubva kunaMambo.”" 
Colossians4:18 Inini, Phauri, ndanyora kutambisa uku ngenyara yangu yemene. Karakadzai maketani angu. Nyasha ngadzigare nemwi." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Phauri, Sirivhanusi naThimothi, ndinonyorera kuchiara chevaThesaronika chiri munaMwari Baba nomunaMambo Jesu Kristu. Nyasha nokunyarara ngazvigare nemwi." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Tinobonga Mwari nguva dzeshe ndimwi mweshe, techimukarakadza mumikumbiro yedu." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Tinogara techimukarakadza pamberi paMwari naBaba edu ngomushando wenyu wokugonda nokushandira kwenyu murudo nokusengerera kwokugonda munaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu. 
1Thessalonians1:4 Ngokuti tinozia, hama munodiwa ndiMwari, kuti wakamutsanangura," 
1Thessalonians1:5 ngokuti vhangeri redu arizi kuuya kwomuri ngeizwi rega, asi ngesimbawo nomuMweya Wakachena nokugwinyiswa kukurutu; kudai ngezvomunozia kuti taiya tiri vanhu vakadini pakati penyu ngendaa yenyu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nemwi mwakaita vaedzereri vedu nevaMambozve, mwechiashira izwi mukutambudzika kukurutu, ngokudakara kwoMweya Wakachena;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 ngokudaro mwakaita chionero kwavari veshe vanotenda muMasedhonia nomuAkhaiya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ngokuti kubvira kwomuri izwi raMambo rakazwika haiwa muMasedhonia nomuAkhaiya mwega, asi kundau dzeshe kugonda kwenyu munaMwari kwakaziikanwa, akuchasisiri kuti isusu tierekete chiro." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Ngokuti avo vemene vanoshuma tisu ngenjira yemwakatiashira ndiyo pakati penyu, nenjira yemwakatenderuka ndiyo kuna Mwari kubva kumiedzaniso yokudira, kuti mushandire Mwari unopona wegwinyiso," 
1Thessalonians1:10 nokugarira Mukororo wake unobva mudenga, waakamusa kubva kwavakafa, ndiJesu uwo unotinunura kubva muushungu hunouya." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Ngokuti imwimwi mwemene munozia, hama, kuti kuuya kwedu kwomuri akuzi kuita kusina shwiro," 
1Thessalonians2:2 asi kunyazwi takatambudzika pakutanga nokuitirwa zvinotsverudza muFiripi, kudai ngezvomunozia, takatsunga munaMwari wedu kuereketa kwomuri vhangeri raMwari ngokutambudzika kukurutu." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ngokuti kupota kwedu akuzi kubva mukupauka akadi nokuti mukusikasukika nokuti mukuchengedzera," 
1Thessalonians2:4 asi kudai ngezvetakatendwa ndiMwari kuti tigondwe ngevhangeri, ndizvo tinoereketa, haiwa kudakadza vanhu, asi Mwari uwo unoedza mwoyo yedu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Ngokuti munonasa kuzia, naMwari ndiye chapupu chedu, atizi kuoneka kunyazwi ngouri mukuwo techironza mazwi ourimbwi, kudai ngezvomunozia, nokuti zano rokuemura pfuma;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 tisikatsvaki kuirikidzwa ngevanhu, nokuti kunobva kwomuri nokuti kunobva kunevamweni," 
1Thessalonians2:7 kunyazwi taikona kuita mutwaro kwomuri, kudai ngevapostori vaKristu. Asi taiya takapfaa pakati penyu, kudai ngezvaanoita mureri apo echirera vana vake." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Ndizvo techimudisisa taida kukoverana nemwi haiwa vhangeri raMwari rega, asi nokupona kwedu kwemene, ngokuti imwimwi mwakaita vanopinda kudikanwa kakurutu kwetiri." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Ngokuti munokarakadza kushanda kwedu nokurwadziwa hama; takashanda usiku nemasikati, kuti tisazoita mutwaro kunoumwe wenyu, apo petakachumaira kwomuri vhangeri raMwari." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Imwimwi muri zvapupu, naMwariwo, ngokucheneswa nokurungama nokusikaitirwa ndaa kwakaitawani kwetakaita kwomuri imwimwi vatendi;" 
1Thessalonians2:11 kudai ngezvomunozia njira yetakaita kunoumwe ngaumwe wenyu, kudai ndibaba vanoitira kunevana vavo," 
1Thessalonians2:12 techimupanga nokumugwinyisa nokupupura, kuti muhambe kudai ngezvinosisira kuna Mwari, uwo unomudaidza kuumambo hwake hwemene nouthende." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Isusuwo tinoangira kubonga Mwari ngeizvi, kuti apo pemwakaashira izwi raMwari iro remwakazwa kubva kwetiri, mwakariashira haiwa kudai ngeizwi revanhu, asi kudai ngezveriri gwinyiso, izwi raMwari, iro rinoshandawo mukati mwenyu imwimwi vatendi." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ngokuti imwimwi, hama, mwakaita vaedzereri vezviara zvaMwari munaKristu Jesu izvo zviri muJudhiya, ngokuti mwakatambudzwawo ngezviro zvakatodzana ngevanhu venyika yenyu kudai ngezvevakatambudzwa avo ngevaJudha," 
1Thessalonians2:15 avo vakauraya veshe Mambo Jesu nevaprofeti, vakatidzinga, vasikadakadzi Mwari, vari vanorwisana nevanhu veshe," 
1Thessalonians2:16 vechitirambidza kuereketa kunevemadzinza kuti vaponeswe. Ndizvo vakaangira vechizadzisa chipimo chokushaisha kwavo ngenguva dzeshe. Asi ushungu hwaMwari hwakauya padera pavo pakugumisira. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Asi kudai tisu, hama, petakaparadzaniswa nemwi kwenguva doko, mukuonana kwomuiri, haiwa kwomwoyo, takatsamwirira kuona hope yenyu ngokumushuwira kakurutu." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ngokuti taida kuuya kwomuri, inini, Phauri, kamwe nokwechipiri, naSathani wakatipinga." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ngokuti chiinyi gonda redu nokuti kudakara kwedu nokuti dzungudza retinoganza ndiro pamberi paMambo wedu Jesu pakuuya kwake? Andimwipi here? 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ngokuti imwimwi muri uthende hwedu nokudakara kwedu! 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ndizvo apo takakorera kushingirira, takapinimidza kuti kwakanaka kuti tisiiwe sure tega muAtenesi;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 nesu takatuma Thimothi, hama yedu nomushandi waMwari muvhangeri raKristu, kuti amugwinyise nokumuembedzera mukutenda kwenyu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 kuti asazoapo munhu unokutukuswa ngemadambudziko aya. Ngegwinyiso imwimwi mwemene munozia kuti izvi ndizvo zvetakaemeserwa. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso, apo petaiya nemwi, takambomuronzera kuti tinozorwadziwa ngokutambudzwa; kudai ngezvakaitika, kudai ngezvomunozia." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ngeiyi ndaa ininiwo apo ndakakorera kushingirira, ndakatumira kuti ndizie ngendaa yokutenda kwenyu, ndechitya kuti pamweni muedzi waiya amuedza nomushando wedu waizoita usina shwiro." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Asi zvino Thimothi apetuka kwetiri kubva kwomuri, wakatiunzira mashoko anodakadza okutenda kwenyu norudo rwenyu. Wakatironzerawo kuti munonasa kupinimidza tisu ngenguva dzeshe, mwechishuwira kutiona, kudai tisuwo tinoshuwira kumuona." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Ngeiyi ndaa, hama, takagwinyiswa ndimwi mukutama kwedu kweshe nokutambudzika kubudikidza ngokugonda kwenyu." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Ngokuti zvino tinopona, kudai imwimwi mwechiangira kuema mwakagwinya munaMambo." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ngokuti tingaita mabongerenyi kuna Mwari ndimwi, ngendaa yokudakara kweshe kwetinodakara ndikwo ngendaa yenyu pamberi paMwari wedu?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 Tinokumbira kakurutu usiku nemasikati kuti tione hope dzenyu nokuzadzisa kunyazwi ngechiri chinotamika mukugonda kwenyu. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Zvino Mwari wedu naBaba emene naMambo wedu Jesu ngaatungamirire njira yedu kwomuri. 
1Thessalonians3:12 NaMambo ngaaite kuti muwande nokuwanza rudo pakati penyu umwe kunoumweni nokunevanhu veshe, kudai ngezvetinoitawo isusu kwomuri," 
1Thessalonians3:13 kuti iye agwinyise mwoyo yenyu mukucheneswa kuti muite vasina ndaa pamberi paMwari wedu naBaba, pakuuya kwaMambo wedu Jesu pamwepo nevakacheneswa vake veshe." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ndizvo pakugumisira, hama, tinomukumbira nokumupota munaMambo Jesu kuti, kudai ngezvemwakaashira kwetiri njira inosisira yokuhamba ndiyo nokumudakadza Mwari, kudai ngezvomunohamba, kuti muwanze kudaro." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Ngokuti munozia kupanga kwetakamupanga kubudikidza ndiMambo Jesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Ngokuti uku ndikwo kuda kwaMwari, kucheneswa kwenyu; kuti murekere kuomba;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 kuti umwe ngaumwe wenyu azie njira yokudzitorera mukadzi pachake mukucheneswa nomukuremeredza," 
1Thessalonians4:5 haiwa ngokuemura kwakashata, kudai ngevemadzinza vasikamuzii Mwari;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 kuti kusaapo naumwe unopauka nokushaishira hama yake ngeiyi ndaa, ngokuti Mambo ndiye muunzidziri weizvi zveshe, kudai ngezvetakambomuronzera nokupupura kudaro." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Ngokuti Mwari aazi kutidaidzira kunezvisikazi kusukika, asi mune zvakacheneswa." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ndizvo kunyazwi ndiani unoramba izvi, aarambi munhu akadi, asi unoramba Mwari, uwo unopa kwomuri Mweya wake Wakachena." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Asi ngendaa yorudo pakati pehama amutami kuti munhu amunyorere, ngokuti imwimwi mwemene mwakadzidziswa ndiMwari kuti mudane umwe kunoumweni;" 
1Thessalonians4:10 ngegwinyiso munodzida hama dzeshe dziri muMasedonia mweshe. Asi tinomupanga, hama, kuti muwanze nokuwanzisisa," 
1Thessalonians4:11 kuti muedze kugara ngokunyarara nokubatika ngemishando yenyu yega nokushanda ngenyara dzenyu, kudai ngezvetakamupanga," 
1Thessalonians4:12 kuti muhambe ngenjira inosisira pamberi pevari kubanze, musina chomunotama." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Asi atidi kuti muite vasikazii, hama, ngendaa yaavo vakaata, kuti musazotambudzika kudai ngavamweni vasina gonda." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Ngokuti kudai techitenda kuti Jesu wakafa nokumukazve, zvakanyadaro kubudikidza ndiJesu, Mwari unozovaunza pamwepo naye avo vakaata." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ngokuti tinoronza izvi kwomuri ngeizwi raMambo, kuti isusu tichapona, tasara metsa kuuya kwaMambo, atitongozotangiri avo vakaata." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Ngokuti Mambo pachake unozodzaka kubva mudenga ngokudaidzira ngeizwi rengirosi huru nokuridzwa kwegwama raMwari, nevakafa vari munaKristu vanozotanga kumuka." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Zvino isusu tichapona tasara, tinozotorwa pamwepo navo mumakore kooshongana naMambo mudenga. Ngokudaro tinozogara naMambo mhera nariini." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ndizvo embedzeranai ngamazwi aya. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Asi ngendaa yenguva nemikuwo, hama, amutami kunyorerwa ndizvo," 
1Thessalonians5:2 ngokuti imwimwi mwemene munonasa kuzia kuti zuva raMambo rinoguma kudai ngembavha inoguma usiku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Naapo vanozoti, “Kuripo kunyarara nokungwaririka,” zvino ngokukasira kuparadzwa kuchauya padera pavo, kudai ngokurwadziwa kunouya padera pomudzimai wosununguka, apana unozopokonyoka!" 
1Thessalonians5:4 Asi imwimwi, hama, amuri muchidimapi, kuti iro zuva rimugumire kudai ngembavha;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 ngokuti imwimwi mweshe muri vana vokujeka nevemasikati; atisiri vousiku akadi nokuti vechidima. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Ndizvo zvino tisaata, kudai ngezvevanoita vamweni, asi ngatirambe techirinda, tingware;" 
1Thessalonians5:7 ngokuti avo vanoata, vanoata usiku, naavo vanoradza, vanoradza usiku." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Asi isusu tiri vemasikati ngatingware, takapfeka chihlangu chepaditi chokugonda norudo, nechiqoko kuita gonda roruponeso." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Ngokuti Mwari aazi kutiemesera ushungu, asi kuti tione kuponeswa kubudikidza ndiye Mambo wedu Jesu Kristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 uwo wakatifira kuti kunyazwi tichazwa nokuti taata, tipone pamwepo naye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Ndizvo embedzeranai umwe kunoumweni, muakane umwe kunoumweni, kudai ngezvomunoita." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Asi tinomupota, hama, kuti muremeredze avo vanoshanda pakati penyu, vanomutungamirira munaMambo, vanomupanga;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 muvaremeredze kakurutu murudo ngendaa yomushando wavo. Itai vanokunyarara pakati penyu. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Tinomupota, hama, pangai avo vane nungo, gwinyisai avo vane mwoyo inodemera, detserai avo vakarembedzeka, sengererai kwavari veshe." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Ngwarai kuti pasazoapo naumwe unounzidzira zvakashata kumunhu ngendaa yezvakashata, asi ngenguva dzeshe tsvakai kuita zvakanaka, umwe kwoumweni nokwavari veshe." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Dakarai nguva dzeshe," 
1Thessalonians5:17 kumbirai ngokusikareki," 
1Thessalonians5:18 bongai pazviro zveshe; ngokuti ichi chiri kuda kwaMwari muna Kristu Jesu ndimwi. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Musadzima Mweya. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Musashoora mazwi akaprofetwa," 
1Thessalonians5:21 asi edzai zviro zveshe; batisisai izvo zvakanaka; 
1Thessalonians5:22 taraukirai miemo yezveshe zvakashata. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Mwari wokunyarara emene ngaamuchenese kakurutu; mweya wenyu nomwoyo nomuiri ngazvingwarirwe kakurutu, zvisina ndaa pakuuya kwaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Uwo unomudaidza unogondeka, naye unozozviita." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Hama, tikumbirirei." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Chingamidzai veshe vatendi ngomuromo ngokucheneswa. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndinomupanga kakurutu ndiMambo kuti iyi tsamba idzidzwe kuhama dzeshe. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Nyasha dzaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzigare nemwi. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Phauri, Sirivhanusi naThimothi, ndinonyorera kuchiara chevaThesaronika chiri munaMwari Baba edu naMambo Jesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Nyasha ngadzigare nemwi nokunyarara zvinobva kunaMwari Baba edu naMambo Jesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Tinosisira kubonga Mwari nguva dzeshe ndimwi, hama, kudai ngezvinosisira, ngokuti kugonda kwenyu kunokura kakurutu, norudo rwenyu umwe kunoumweni runowanzwa." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Ndizvo isusu temene tinoganza ndimwi pakati pezviara zvaMwari ngendaa yokusengerera kwenyu nokugonda kwenyu mukutambudzika kweshe nomumadambudziko omunoshingirira. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Izvi zvinoonisa kururama kwokutonga kwaMwari, kuti muerengwe muri vanosisira umambo hwaMwari, uhwo hwomunotambudzikirawo." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso chiri chiro chakarurama kunaMwari kuti aunzidzire kutambudzika kwavari vanomutambudza," 
2Thessalonians1:7 nokupa kuzorora kwomuri vanotambudzika pamwepo nesu, apo Mambo Jesu paanooniswa echibva mudenga pamwepo nengirosi dzake dzine simba," 
2Thessalonians1:8 mumurazvu womuriro unobaka, echiunzidzira kwavari vasikamuzii Mwari nokwavari vasikapurutani vhangeri raMambo wedu Jesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Avo vanozoororwa ngokuparadzwa kusikaperi, vanozopaurwa kubva kuhope yaMambo nokubva kuuthende hwesimba rake," 
2Thessalonians1:10 apo paanouya kooirikidzwa ngevakacheneswa vake nokushamiswa pakati pavo veshe vanotenda, ngeiro zuva, ngokuti uchapupu hwedu kwomuri hwakatendwa." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Ngeiyi ndaa isusu tinomukumbirira nguva dzeshe, techikumbira kuti Mwari wedu amuite vanosisira mukudaidza kwake nokuzadza ngesimba rake rokudisisa kweshe kuita zvakanaka nomushando wokugonda," 
2Thessalonians1:12 kuti zina raMambo wedu Jesu riirikidzwe mwomuri, nemwi muirikidzwe mwaari, kudai ngezvakaita nyasha dzaMwari wedu naMambo Jesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Zvino tinomupota, hama, ngendaa yokuuya kwaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu nokuunganidzwa kwedu kwaari," 
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti musazokasira kuzungunyiswa mumipinimidzo nokuti kushamiswa, kunyazwi ngomweya nokuti ngeizwi nokuti ngetsamba, yakadai ngeinobva kwetiri, yechiti zuva raMambo raguma." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Musazochengedzerwa ngomunhu kunyazwi ngeiri njira; ngokuti zuva iro arizogumi kusati kwaapo kupauka kutanga, nomunhu wokushaisha asati aoniswa, mukororo wokurashwa," 
2Thessalonians2:4 uwo unorwisa nokudzitunhumadza padera pazvo zveshe zvinozwi zvimwari nepadera pezvinodirwa, ndizvo unogara pachigaro chake mutemperi raMwari, echidziita Mwari." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Amuchakarakadzi here kuti apo ndichipo nemwi ndakamuronzera izvi zviro? 
2Thessalonians2:6 Nazvino munozia icho chinomurambidza, kuti uwo aoniswe ngomukuwo wake waguma." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ngokuti chakafishika chisikazi kururama choshanda; asi zvichaitika metsa uwo unorambidza zvino abviswa. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Apapo wakashata unozooniswa, uwo unozoparadzwa ndiMambo Jesu ngomweya womuromo wake, nokumuparadza ngokuoneka kwokuuya kwake." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Kuuya kwouwo usikazi kururama kwakadai ngokushanda kwaSathani, unoshandisa simba reshe, zvioniso, mishamiso yemanyepo," 
2Thessalonians2:10 ngembeu yeshe yokuchengedzera kweshe kwokusikarurama kwavari vanorashika, ngokuti vanoramba kuda gwinyiso kuti vaponeswe." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ngeiyi ndaa Mwari unovatumira simba guru rokuvapausa, kuti vatende manyepo," 
2Thessalonians2:12 kuti veshe vasikatendi gwinyiso, asi vechidakadzwa ngokusikarurama vatongwe." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Asi kunodikanwa kuti tibonge Mwari nguva dzeshe ngendaa yenyu, hama dzinodikanwa munaMambo, ngokuti Mwari wakamutsanangura kuita michero yokutanga yoruponeso kubudikidza ngokucheneswa kwoMweya nokubudikidza ngokutenda gwinyiso." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Ngokuti izvi ndizvo zvaakamudaidzira kubudikidza ngevhangeri redu, kuti muashire uthende hwaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ndizvo zvino, hama, emai mwakagwinya, mubate mipango yemwakadzidziswa tisu, kunyazwi ngeizwi nokuti ngetsamba yedu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Zvino Mambo wedu Jesu Kristu emene naMwari Baba edu, uwo wakatida nokubudikidza ngenyasha wakatipa kuembedzerwa kusikaperi negonda rakanaka," 
2Thessalonians2:17 ngaaembedzere mwoyo yenyu nokuigwinyisa kumishando yeshe nokumazwi eshe akanaka. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Pakugumisira, hama, tikumbirirei kuti izwi raMambo rihambiswe nokukudzwa, kudai ngezverinoita pakati penyu," 
2Thessalonians3:2 zve, kuti tinunurwe kubva kuvanhu vasikazi kururama nevakashata; ngokuti andivopi veshe vanokugonda." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Asi Mambo unogondeka; unozomugwinyisa nokumungwarira kubva kuno uwo wakashata. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Nesu tine gonda munaMambo ndimwi, kuti munoita munozoitazve zviro zvetinomupanga." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Mambo ngaatungamirire mwoyo yenyu kurudo rwaMwari nomukusengerera kwaKristu. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Zvino tinomupanga, hama, muzina raMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, kuti mupauke kubva kunehama yeshe inenungo, isikahambi kudai ngemipango yevakaashira kubva kwetiri." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ngokuti imwimwi mwemene munozia njira yokutiedzerera ndiyo isusu; ngokuti atizi kuita nungo pakati penyu," 
2Thessalonians3:8 atizi kudya chingwa chomunhu nokuti ngouri tisikazi kuchitenga, asi takashanda techitambudzika usiku nemasikati kuti tisazoita mutwaro kunoumwe wenyu;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 haiwa ngokuti taiya tisina simba, asi kuti tidziite chionero kwomuri, kuti imwimwi mutiedzerere." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ngokuti apo kunyazwi tichinemwi takamupanga kuti, “Kudai aripo munhu usikadi kushanda, asazodya.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Ngokuti tinozwa kuti vamweni vanoita nungo pakati penyu, vasikashandi, asi vanokangaidza vanhu." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Zvino avo vakadaro tinovapanga nokuvapota munaMambo Jesu Kristu kuti vashande mishando yavo ngokunyarara, vadye chingwa chavo." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Hama, musaremba kuita zvakanaka." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Kudai aripo munhu usikapurutani izwi redu reiyi tsamba, muringisisei munhuwo, kuti musazwanana naye, kuti iye atsveruke." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Musazomuerenga kuti igaa, asi mumupange kudai ngehama." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Zvino Mambo wokunyarara emene ngaamupe kunyarara nguva dzeshe nenjira dzeshe. Mambo ngaagare nemwi mweshe. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Inini Phauri ndanyora kutambisa uku ngenyara yangu yemene. Ichi chioniso chiri mutsamba yangu yeshe; ndiyo njira yendinonyora ndiyo. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Nyasha dzaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzigare nemwi mweshe. 
1Timothy1:1 Phauri, mupostori waKristu Jesu ngokupanga kwaMwari Muponesi wedu naKristu Jesu gonda redu," 
1Timothy1:2 ndinonyorera kunaThimothi, mwana wangu wegwinyiso mukugonda. Nyasha nokukungurirwa nokunyarara zvinobva kunaMwari Baba naKristu Jesu Mambo wedu ngazvigare newe." 
1Timothy1:3 Kudai ngezvendakakupota apo ndaienda Masedhonia, kuti ugare muEfesu, upange vamweni kuti vasadzidzisa kudzidzisa kumweni" 
1Timothy1:4 nokuti kupurutanazve kungano nokuerengudza kusikaperi kwemazina emadzibaba ekaretu, izvo zvinoamba hasha, zvisikadzidzisi zvakarongwa ndiMwari zvinoziikanwa ngokugonda." 
1Timothy1:5 Asi zvinodiwa ngomupango rudo runobva mumwoyo wakacheneswa, runobva mumhumba isina ndaa nokugonda kwegwinyiso." 
1Timothy1:6 Vanhu vamweni vechipauka vakakunukuka kuenda mukuereketa kusina shwiro," 
1Timothy1:7 vechidisisa kuita vadzidzisi veMipango, vasikazwisisi zvevanoronza nokuti zvevanonasa kugwinyisisa." 
1Timothy1:8 Asi tinozia kuti Mipango yakanaka, kudai munhu echizoishandisa ngenjira kwayo." 
1Timothy1:9 Izvi zvinoronza kuzwisisa, kuti Mipango aizi kuitirwa munhu wakarurama asi yakaitirwa vasikapurutani Mipango nevasikapangwi nevasikadi Mwari nevashaishi, inoitirwa vasikazi kucheneswa nevatuki, vanouraya madzibaba nevanouraya madzimai, vanouraya vanhu," 
1Timothy1:10 vaombi, mhombwe nevanoba vanhu, vanyepi nevanopika manyepo, nokuti kudai chiripo chimweni chinopesana nezvidzidziso zvakarurama," 
1Timothy1:11 kudai ngezvinoronzwa ngevhangeri routhende hwaMwari unomuchena, rendakapuwa ngokugondwa." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndinobonga Kristu Jesu Mambo wedu, uwo wakandipa simba, ngokuti wakandierenga kuita wakagondeka, akandiemesa kumushando wake," 
1Timothy1:13 kunyazwi karetu ndaiya mutuki, mutambudzi nomutinini. Asi zvakanyadaro ndakaitirwa nyasha, ngokuti ndakazviita ngokusikazia mukusikatenda," 
1Timothy1:14 nenyasha dzaMambo wedu dzakawanzwa kakurutu pamwepo nokugonda norudo zviri munaKristu Jesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Rinogondeka iri izwi rinosisira kuashirwa, kuti Kristu Jesu wakauya munyika kuponesa vashaishi, inini ndiri mukuru wavo." 
1Timothy1:16 Asi ngeiyi ndaa ndakaitirwa nyasha, kuti Jesu Kristu aonise kusengerera kwake kweshe mwendiri, ndiri mukuru wevashaishi, kuita chionero kwavari vanomutenda, kuti vaone kupona kusikaperi." 
1Timothy1:17 Kuna Mambo usikaperi, usikaori, usikaoneki, ndiye Mwari ega, ngaugare kwaari uthende nokuremeredzwa mhera nariini nariini. Ameni." 
1Timothy1:18 Ndinopa kupanga uku kwouri, Thimothi mwana wangu, kudai ngezvakaprofetwa ngendaa yako karetu, kuti ngokuzvipurutana uambane kuambana kwakanaka," 
1Timothy1:19 wechibatisisa kugonda nemhumba yakanaka. Vamweni vakakurasha, vakaputsikirwa ngengarava yokugonda kwavo;" 
1Timothy1:20 pakati pavo vakadaro paiya naHimenaeusi naArekizanda, vendakapa kunaSathani, kuti vadzidziswe kusikatuka Mwari." 
1Timothy2:1 Ndizvo, pakutanga pazvo zveshe, ndinomukumbira kuti kupota nemikumbiro nokukumbirira nokubonga zviitirwe vanhu veshe," 
1Timothy2:2 madzimambo naavo veshe vari pandau dzokuremeredzwa, kuti tipone mukuiyana nokunyarara mukudira Mwari nokuremeredza." 
1Timothy2:3 Izvi zvakanaka nezvinoashirika mukuona kwaMwari Muponesi wedu," 
1Timothy2:4 uwo unoda kuti munhu weshe aponeswe, azwisise gwinyiso." 
1Timothy2:5 Ngokuti uripo Mwari umwe, nomuiyanisi umwe pakati paMwari nevanhu, munhu uwo ndiKristu Jesu," 
1Timothy2:6 uwo wakadzipira pachake kuita muripo wavo veshe, kwakapupurwa ndikwo ngenguva kwayo." 
1Timothy2:7 Ukwo kwendakaemeserwa kuita muchumairi nomupostori (ndinoronza gwinyiso, andinyepi), mudzidzisi wevemadzinza mukugonda nomugwinyiso." 
1Timothy2:8 Ndizvo ndinoda kuti vamuna vakumbire kundau dzeshe, vechimirudza mudenga nyara dzakacheneswa pasina ushungu nehasha;" 
1Timothy2:9 ngokudarowo kuti vakadzi vadzinemese mukuremeredzeka ngezvokufuka zvakasisira, haiwa ngebvudzi rakarukwa nomukore nokuti maperere nokuti ngezvokusimira zvinodhura." 
1Timothy2:10 Asi ngavadzinemese ngeizvo zvinosisira vakadzi vanoronza kuti vanodira Mwari, ngemishando yakanaka." 
1Timothy2:11 Mukadzi ngaadzidze mukunyarara ngokudzipfaisa kweshe. 
1Timothy2:12 Anditenderi mukadzi kuti adzidzise nokuti kutonga mwamuna; asi kuti anyarare. 
1Timothy2:13 Ngokuti Adhamu wakatanga kusikwa, sure kwazvo Evha;" 
1Timothy2:14 naAdhamu aazi kuchengedzerwa, asi mukadzi wakachengedzerwa wakaita mupauki." 
1Timothy2:15 Asi unozoponeswa kubudikidza ngokubara vana, kudai echiangirira mukugonda, murudo, mukucheneswa pamwepo nokuremeredzeka." 
1Timothy3:1 Izwi iri igwinyiso, kuti kudai munhu echitsvaka mushando woutungamiriri ukuru muchiara, unoemurira mushando wakanaka." 
1Timothy3:2 Ndizvo mutungamiriri unosisira kuita usina ndaa, mwamuna womukadzi umwe, echidzibata, wakangwara mumupinimidzo, unoremeredzeka, unoashira vapfumba, unozia kudzidzisa," 
1Timothy3:3 haiwa chidhakwa, usikaambani, asi wakapfaa, usikaiti hasha, usikadisisi mare." 
1Timothy3:4 Unonasa kutonga muzi wake, unevana vake vanopurutana ngokuremeredza kweshe;" 
1Timothy3:5 (ngokuti kudai munhu asikakoni kutonga muzi wake zvakanaka, ungazoita mangwaririrenyi chiara chaMwari?)" 
1Timothy3:6 Asaita mutendi mutsva, kuti asadzikudza nokuwa mukurashwa kwaDhiabhorosi." 
1Timothy3:7 Zve, kunosisira kuti aite unopupurirwa zvakanaka ngeavo vari kubanze, kuti asazowa mukushoorwa nokubatwa pamurau waDhiabhorosi." 
1Timothy3:8 Ngokudaro vashandi vanosisira kuti vaite vanoremeredzeka, vasina mazwi mairi, vasikanyanyi kumwa vhini, vasikakariri mare." 
1Timothy3:9 Vanosisira kunasa kubata chakafishika chokugonda ngemhumba isina ndaa. 
1Timothy3:10 Avo navo ngavatangwe kuedzwa; naapo vaonisa pachavo kuti apana chevanoitirwa ndaa, ngavaitwe vashandi." 
1Timothy3:11 Vakadzi ngokudaro ngavaite vanoremeredzeka, vasikareyi, asi vanodzibata, vanogondeka ngezviro zveshe." 
1Timothy3:12 Mushandi ngaaite mwamuna womukadzi umwe, echinasa kutonga zvakanaka vana vake nomuzi wake." 
1Timothy3:13 Ngokuti avo vanoshanda zvakanaka kudai ngevashandi vanopuwa zina rakaremeredzeka nokutsunga kukurutu mukugonda kuri munaKristu Jesu. 
1Timothy3:14 Ndinogonda kuuya kwouri ngokukasira, asi ndinonyora zviro izvi kwouri," 
1Timothy3:15 kuti kudai ndikanonoswa, muzie kuhamba kunosisira kuitwa ngevanhu mumhatso yaMwari, iyo iri chiara chaMwari unopona, sika nechidziro chegwinyiso." 
1Timothy3:16 Ngegwinyiso kufishika kwokudira kwedu kwakakura: Uwo wakaoniswa mumuiri, wakaruramiswa muMweya, wakaoneka ngengirosi, wakachumairwa pakati pevemadzinza, wakatendwa munyika, akaashirwa mudenga muuthende." 
1Timothy4:1 Zvino Mweya unoronza pamhene kuti ngemikuwo yokugumisira vamweni vanozopauka kubva mukugonda ngokupurutana kumweya inochengedzera nezvidzidziso zvemadhimoni," 
1Timothy4:2 kubudikidza ngokuchengedzerwa ngevanoereketa mazwi emanyepo, vakapishwa mhumba dzavo ngesimbi inopisha." 
1Timothy4:3 Vanorambidza kuroora nokurekera zvokudya, zvaakasika Mwari kuti zviashirwe ngokubonga ngaavo vanotenda nokuzia gwinyiso." 
1Timothy4:4 Ngokuti zvisikwa zveshe zvakasikwa ndiMwari zvakanaka, apana chinosisira kurambwa, kudai chechiashirwa ngokubonga;" 
1Timothy4:5 ngokuti chinocheneswa ngeizwi raMwari nomukumbiro. 
1Timothy4:6 Kudai wechironzera hama izvi zviro, unozoita mushandi wakanaka waKristu Jesu, wechikodzwa ngemazwi okutenda nechidzidziso chakanaka chowakateera." 
1Timothy4:7 Asi ramba ngano dzinotsverudza nedzembuya. Asi udzirovedzese kudira Mwari," 
1Timothy4:8 ngokuti kurovedzera mumuiri kunodetsera padoko, asi kudira Mwari kunodetsera kuzviro zveshe, ngokuti kunogondisa kupona kwazvino nokuchauya." 
1Timothy4:9 Rinogondeka izwi iri rinosisira kuashirwa kakurutu. 
1Timothy4:10 Ngokuti ndizvo zvetinotambudzikira nokurwadziwa, ngokuti gonda redu rakaemeswa munaMwari unopona, uri Muponesi wevanhu veshe, kakurutu weavo vanotenda." 
1Timothy4:11 Panga nokudzidzisa izvi zviro. 
1Timothy4:12 Usatendera munhu kuti ashoore utsva hwako, asi ita chionero kwavari vanotenda ngeizwi nokupona, murudo, mukugonda nomukusukika." 
1Timothy4:13 Gara wechidzidza zvinyorwa, kuchumaira nokudzidzisa, metsa ndiuye." 
1Timothy4:14 Usarekeredza chipo icho chiri mukati mwako, chowakapuwa kubudikidza ngokuprofeta nokuiswa kwenyara dzevakuru padera pako." 
1Timothy4:15 Tsamwirira kuita zviro izvi, udzipire pachako kwezviri, kuti kubudirira kwako kuoneke kwavari veshe." 
1Timothy4:16 Udzingwarire iwewe nokudzidzisa kwako; angirira kuita izvi zviro, ngokuti ngokuita izvi unozoponesa veshe iwewe naavo vanokuzwa." 
1Timothy5:1 Usaganyira musharuka asi mupote kudai ndibaba, nemajaha matsva kudai ngehama," 
1Timothy5:2 nemadzimbuya kudai ngaanamai, nevakadzi vatsva kudai ngevakunda, mukusukika kweshe." 
1Timothy5:3 Remeredza shirikadzi idzo dziri shirikadzi ngegwinyiso. 
1Timothy5:4 Asi kudai shirikadzi inevana nokuti vazukuru, ngavatange kudzidza zvidzidzo zvavo zvokudira Mwari pamhuri yavo nokuhwirinzira ngezvakanaka kuvabari vavo; ngokuti izvi zvinodakadza mukuona kwaMwari." 
1Timothy5:5 Zvino shirikadzi yegwinyiso, yakasiiwa yega, inogonda muna Mwari, inoangira kupota nokukumbira usiku namasikati;" 
1Timothy5:6 asi uwo unokarira zvinodakadza wakafa kunyazwi echinyapona. 
1Timothy5:7 Panga izvi zviro, kuti vaite vasikashooreki." 
1Timothy5:8 Asi kudai aripo usikangwariri hama dzake, kakurutu avo vomuzi wake, watoramba kugonda naye washata kupinda uwo usikatendi." 
1Timothy5:9 Usatendera kuti shirikadzi inyorwe zina isati yapedza makore makumi matanhatu okubarwa, yaiya mukadzi womwamuna umwe;" 
1Timothy5:10 inembiri yakanaka yemishando yakanaka, yakarera zvakanaka vana, yaiashira vapfumba, yaisuka tsoka dzevakacheneswa, yaidetsera vanotambudzika, yaigwinya kubatirira kumishando yeshe yakanaka." 
1Timothy5:11 Asi ramba kunyora mazina eshirikadzi itsva. Ngokuti apo chidisiso chokuda mwamuna chavakurira, vatsvatsvana naKristu, vanozoda kuroorwa," 
1Timothy5:12 vane ndaa ngokuti vakaramba kugondisa kwavo kwokutanga. 
1Timothy5:13 Zve, vanodzidza kuita nungo, vechipepesheka kubva pamhatso kuenda pamhatso, vasikateri kuita nungo kwega, asi kuitawo gunyengu, vasikarekeri zvevamweni, vechiereketa zvisikasisiri." 
1Timothy5:14 Ndizvo ndinodisisa kuti shirikadzi itsva dziroorwe, dzibare vana, dzingwarire mizi yadzo, dzisapa gaa ndau yokutituka ndiyo." 
1Timothy5:15 Ngokuti vamweni vatopauka kuteera Sathani. 
1Timothy5:16 Kudai aripo mukadzi mutendi unehama shirikadzi ngaadzidetsere, kuti chiara chisazodzimbirwa, kuti chidetsere avo vari shirikadzi ngegwinyiso." 
1Timothy5:17 Vakuru vanonasa kutungamirira ngavaziikanwe kuti vanosisira kuremeredzwa kwakahwirinzirwa, kakurutu avo vanoshanda mushando weizwi nowokudzidzisa;" 
1Timothy5:18 ngokuti zvinyorwa zvinoti, “Usazosunga muromo wen'ombe inopura zviyo,” zve, “Mushandi unosisira musharo wake.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Usatenda kuashira ndaa inopomerwa munhu mukuru, asi kuti yechipupurirwa ngezvapupu zviiri nokuti zvitatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Avo vanoangira kushaisha, uvarambidze pamberi pavo veshe, kuti vamweni navo vatye." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndinokupanga mukuona kwaMwari nokwaKristu Jesu nekwengirosi dzakatsanangurwa, kuti ungwarire izvi usikatsananguri, usikaiti chiro ngomukheto." 
1Timothy5:22 Usakasira kuisa nyara padera pomunhu, usaashidzana nevanhu vamweni zvishaishi zvavo; dzingwarire kuti ugare wakasukika." 
1Timothy5:23 Usachamwa mvura yega, asi imwa vhini shomani ngendaa yomundani mwako neyokurwara kwako kuzhinji." 
1Timothy5:24 Zvishaishi zvevanhu vamweni zviri pamhene, zvinoenda pamberi mukutongwa, nezvishaishi zvevamweni vanhu zvinovateera ngesure." 
1Timothy5:25 Ngokudaro iriyo mishando yakanaka iri pamhene; neiyo isikazi kudaro aikoni kufishika. 
1Timothy6:1 Veshe vari pashi pejoka rouhloko ngavazie kuti madzimambo avo anosisira kuremeredzwa kweshe, kuti zina raMwari nezvidzidziso zvisazotukwa." 
1Timothy6:2 Avo vane madzimambo anotenda vasazovashoora ngokuti ihama, asi vanosisira kuvashandira, ngokuti avo vanoashira kudetserwa vari vatendi nevanodikanwa. Dzidzisa nokupanga izvi." 
1Timothy6:3 Kunyazwi ndiani unodzidzisa zvidzidziso zvakaparadzana asikatendi mazwi egwinyiso aMambo wedu Jesu Kristu nezvidzidziso zvinozwanana nokudzidzisa kwaMwari," 
1Timothy6:4 unodzikudza, asikazii chiro, asi unodisisa mibvunzo nehasha dzemazwi, kwezviri kunobva ndurumwa nehasha nokutuka nokupinimidzira zvakashata," 
1Timothy6:5 nokuphikisana pakati pevanhu vane mipinimidzo yakashaishwa, vakarashikirwa ngegwinyiso, vechikarakadza kuti kudira Mwari injira yokuuyirwa." 
1Timothy6:6 Eya, kuripo kuuyirwa kukurutu mukudira Mwari pamwepo nokugutiswa;" 
1Timothy6:7 ngokuti atizi kuuya nechiro munyika muno, ndizvo atikoni kutora chiro kuenda nacho." 
1Timothy6:8 Asi kudai tine zvokudya nezvokufuka, tinozogutiswa ndizvo izvi." 
1Timothy6:9 Asi avo vanodisisa kuita makurudza vanowira mukuedzwa, nokubatwa ngomurau woupenzi uzhinji wokuemura kunoremadza, kunonzvaidza vanhu mukufa nomukurashwa." 
1Timothy6:10 Ngokuti kudisisa mare ndiyo nzinde yembeu dzeshe dzokushata, nomukudisisa kwavo kuita makurudza vamweni vakapauswa kubva mukugonda, vakadzibaya ngemadambudziko mazhinji." 
1Timothy6:11 Asi iwewe, munhu waMwari, tiza izvi; uteere kururama, kudira Mwari, kugonda, rudo, kusengerera, kupfaa." 
1Timothy6:12 Ambana kuambana kwakanaka kwokugonda, batisisa kupona kusikaperi kwewakadaidzirwa, ukaita uchapupu hwakanaka mukuona kwezvapupu zvizhinji." 
1Timothy6:13 Ndinokupanga mukuona kwaMwari, uwo unopa kupona kuzviro zveshe, nokwaKristu Jesu, uwo wakapupura uchapupu hwakanaka pamberi paPhontiusi Piratu," 
1Timothy6:14 kuti ungwarire mipango usina ara, usikashooreki metsa pakuoneka kwaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu," 
1Timothy6:15 kwaachazoonisa ngenguva kwayo, uwo ega wakafumiswa noweumambo, Mambo wemadzimambo noMutongi wevatongi." 
1Timothy6:16 Ndiye ega usikatongofi unogara mukujeka kusikagumirwi, uwo usina naumwe wakambomuona nokuti kukona kuoneka; kwaari ngakugare kuripo kuremeredzwa nesimba zvisikaperi. Ameni." 
1Timothy6:17 Panga avo vari makurudza munyika muno kuti vasadzikudza nokuti kuemesa kugonda kwavo paupfumi husikagari, asi kunaMwari, uwo unotipa kakurutu zveshe kuti tidakare ndizvo;" 
1Timothy6:18 kuti vaite zvakanaka, vaite vapfumi kumishando yakanaka, vadakarire kupa vamweni nevakanasirira kukowana," 
1Timothy6:19 vechidziunganidzira ugaro hwakanaka hwenguva inouya, kuti vabatisise kupona ukwo kwegwinyiso." 
1Timothy6:20 Iwewe Thimothi, ngwarira icho chakapuwa kwouri. Furatira kuereketa kusina shwiro ndiMwari nokuramba kuzia zviri zvokunyepa;" 
1Timothy6:21 ngokupupura ndizvo vamweni vakapauka kubva mukugonda. Nyasha ngadzigare nemwi. 
2Timothy1:1 Phauri, mupostori waKristu Jesu ngokuda kwaMwari, kubudikidza ngechigondiso chokupona chiri munaKristu Jesu," 
2Timothy1:2 ndinonyorera kunaThimothi, mwana wangu unodikanwa. Nyasha nokukungurirwa nokunyarara zvinobva kunaMwari Baba naKristu Jesu Mambo wedu ngazvigare newe." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndinobonga Mwari, uwo wendinoshandira ngemhumba yakacheneswa, kudai ngezvaakaita madzibaba angu, apo pendinomukarakadza nguva dzeshe mumikumbiro yangu usiku nemasikati." 
2Timothy1:4 Apo ndechikarakadza masodzi ako, ndinozwa chishuwo chokuda kukuona kuti ndizadzwe ngokudakara." 
2Timothy1:5 Ndinokarakadziswa ngokugonda kwako kwegwinyiso, kugonda ukwo kwakagara kutanga munambuya ako Roisi nokunamai ako Yunisi, kwendinogonda kuti kunogarawo mwouri." 
2Timothy1:6 Ngeiyi ndaa ndinokukarakadzisa kuti ukunhidzire chipo chaMwari chiri mukati mwako kubudikidza ngokuiswa kwenyara dzangu padera pako; 
2Timothy1:7 ngokuti Mwari aazi kutipa mweya wokutya, asi mweya wesimba, worudo nowokudzibata." 
2Timothy1:8 Ndizvo usatsveruka kuita chapupu ndiMambo wedu nokuti ndini bhanditi rake, asi gwinyira zvakakonza ngendaa yevhangeri, mwechigonda simba raMwari," 
2Timothy1:9 uwo wakatiponesa nokutidaidza ngokudaidzwa kwakacheneswa, haiwa kubudikidza ngemishando yedu asi kubudikidza ngokuemesa kwake emene nenyasha. Nyasha idzi dzakapuwa kwetiri kubudikidza ndiKristu Jesu nguva dzisati dzaapo," 
2Timothy1:10 asi zvino zvakaoniswa kubudikidza ngokuoneka kwoMuponesi wedu Kristu Jesu, uwo wakanyisa rufu, akaunza kupona nokusikaora mukujeka kubudikidza ngevhangeri." 
2Timothy1:11 Ngokuti ngeiri vhangeri ndakaemeswa kuita muchumairi, mupostori nomudzidzisi kweriri." 
2Timothy1:12 Ngeiyi ndaa ndinotambudzwawo ngeizvi. Asi anditsveruki, ngokuti ndinomuzia uwo wendakatenda, ndinogonda kuti unokona kungwarira icho chendakapa kwaari metsa pazuva iro." 
2Timothy1:13 Batisisa chionero chemazwi akagwinyisisa ewakazwa kubva kwendiri, mukugonda nomurudo zviri munaKristu Jesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Ngwarira icho chakanaka chakapuwa kwouri, ngokudetserwa ndiye Mweya Wakachena unogara mukati mwedu." 
2Timothy1:15 Unozia kuti veshe vari muAsia vakandiramba, pakati pavo ndiFigerusi naHermogenesi." 
2Timothy1:16 Mambo ngaaitire nyasha kunevemhatso yaOnesiforusi, ngokuti waindigwinyisa nguva zhinji; aazi kutsveruka ngeketani dzangu," 
2Timothy1:17 asi apo paakaguma muRoma, wakanditsvaka kakurutu naye wakandiona." 
2Timothy1:18 Mambo ngaaite kuti aone nyasha kubva kunaMambo ngeiro zuva! Newe unonasa kuzia kuwanda kweizvo zvaakandishandira muEfesu. 
2Timothy2:1 Iwewe zvino mwana wangu, ita wakagwinya munyasha dziri muna Kristu Jesu," 
2Timothy2:2 neizvo zvewakazwa kubva kwendiri pamberi pezvapupu zvizhinji, upe iwewe kuvamuna vakagondeka, vanozokonawo kudzidzisa vamweni." 
2Timothy2:3 Tora chikoaniswa chako chokutambudzika kudai ngesoja rakanaka raKristu Jesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Apana soja rinoshanda muhondo rinodzikodyanisa kumishando yokupona uku, asi rinodisisa kumudakadza uwo wakarinyora kuti riite soja." 
2Timothy2:5 Mutambi wemijaho aapuwi dzungudza kuti asikazi kupurutana zvironzo. 
2Timothy2:6 Murimi unoshanda ndiye unosisira kuita wokutanga kuashira michero. 
2Timothy2:7 Pinimidza ngezvendinoronza, ngokuti Mambo unozokupa kuzwisisa muzviro zveshe." 
2Timothy2:8 Karakadzai ndiJesu Kristu, uwo wakamuswa kubva kwevakafa, mubarirwana waDhavhidha, ndiro vhangeri rangu," 
2Timothy2:9 iro rendinotambudzikira zvakakonza metsa mukusungwa, kudai ngomushandi wezvakashata. Asi izwi raMwari arizi kusungwa." 
2Timothy2:10 Ndizvo ndinotsungirira zveshe ngendaa yevakatsanangurwa, kuti vaonewo ruponeso ruri munaKristu Jesu, pamwepo nouthende husikaperi." 
2Timothy2:11 Izwi iri ngeregwinyiso: Kudai takafa pamwepo naye, tinozoraramazve naye;" 
2Timothy2:12 kudai techitsungirira, tinozotongazve naye; kudai techimuramba, iye unozotirambawo;" 
2Timothy2:13 kudai isusu tisikagondeki, iye unogara akagondeka, ngokuti aakoni kudziramba." 
2Timothy2:14 Vakarakadzise ngeizvi, wechivapanga mukuona kwaMwari kuti vasaita hasha ngemazwi asikadetseri chiro, asi anoparadza avo vanozwa." 
2Timothy2:15 Gwinya kudzipira kunaMwari uri unotendeka kwaari, mushandi usikatami kutsveruka, unoruramisa kubata izwi regwinyiso." 
2Timothy2:16 Asi tiza kuereketa kusikakudzi Mwari, ngokuti kunozoangira kupausa vanhu kubva kunaMwari," 
2Timothy2:17 neizwi ravo rinozonyeketa kudai ngebandwa. Pakati pavo panaHimenaeusi naFiretusi," 
2Timothy2:18 avo vakapauka kubva mugwinyiso vechironza kuti kumuka kubva kwavakafa kwakatopinda. Vanorigira pashi kugonda kwevamweni. 
2Timothy2:19 Asi dzeyo rakagwinya raMwari rinondoema, rine chinyorwa ichi chinoti, “Mambo unozia avo vari vake,” zve, “Weshe unodaidza zina raMambo ngaabve kuneizvo zvisikazi kururama.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Zvino mumhatso huru amuna ndiro dzomukore nedzesirivha dzega asi dzirimwowo dzemiti nedzedongo, dzimweni dzinoremeredzeka nedzimweni dzisikaremeredzeki." 
2Timothy2:21 Ndizvo, kudai munhu echizodzisuka kubva kunezvakadaro, unozoita chidziyo chinoremeredzeka, chakacheneswa, chinosisira kushandiswa ngomunikazi wacho, chakanasirirwa kuita mishando yeshe yakanaka." 
2Timothy2:22 Asi tiza kubva mukuemura kwevatsva, uteere kururama, kugonda, rudo, kunyarara, pamwepo naavo vanokumbira kunaMambo ngomwoyo wakasukika." 
2Timothy2:23 Asi ramba mibvunzo youpenzi neisina kuzia, wechizia kuti inopara hasha." 
2Timothy2:24 Nomuranda waMambo aasisiri kuita hasha, asi kuita wakapfaa kwavari veshe, unozia kudzidzisa, echisengerera," 
2Timothy2:25 uwo unodzidzisa ngokupfaa avo vanoramba, kuti pamweni Mwari ungavapa kutenderuka kuti vazie gwinyiso," 
2Timothy2:26 zve, kuti vadzipokonyose kubva pamurau waDhiabhorosi, wevaiya vakabatwa ndiye kuti vaite kuda kwake." 
2Timothy3:1 Asi zwisisa izvi, kuti kumazuva okugumisira nguva dzokutambudzika dzinozouya." 
2Timothy3:2 Ngokuti vanhu vanozodzida pachavo, vechidisisa upfumi, vechiganza, vechidzikudza, vechituka, vasikapurutani vabari, vasikabongi, vasikazi kucheneswa," 
2Timothy3:3 vasina rudo kuhama, vasikaiyanisiki, vanoreya, vasikadzibati, vanotyisa, vanoshoora zvakanaka," 
2Timothy3:4 vachengedzeri, madzongoni, vanodzidingaringa, vanopinda kuda mitambe yakashata pane kuda Mwari," 
2Timothy3:5 vane chiemo chokudira kubanze, asi vechiramba simba rakwo. Ibva kwavari!" 
2Timothy3:6 Ngokuti pakati pavo varipo vanozvonga kupotera mumhatso vechibata vakadzi vakarembedzeka, vanodzimbirwa ngezvishaishi, vechikweyiwa ngokuemura kwakaparadzana," 
2Timothy3:7 vanogara vechidzidziswa, vasikatongohaniri ruziyo rwegwinyiso." 
2Timothy3:8 Kudai ndiJanesi naJambresi vakarwisana naMosi, ndizvo navo vanorwisana negwinyiso, vanhu vakashaishirwa mumipinimidzo, vakarashikirwa ngokugonda kwavo." 
2Timothy3:9 Asi avazobudiriri kuende mberi, ngokuti upenzi hwavo hunozobuda pamhene kuvanhu veshe, kudai ngohwaavozve vanhu vairi hwakaita kudaro." 
2Timothy3:10 Zvino iwewe wakateera kudzidzisa kwangu, kuhamba kwangu, kudisisa, kugonda, kugwinyisira, rudo nokusengerera," 
2Timothy3:11 madambudziko nenhamo, izvo zvakandigumira muAntiokhi, muIkoniumu nomuRistria, kutambudzikanyi kwendakashingirira. Mambo wakandinunura kubva kwezviri zveshe." 
2Timothy3:12 Ngegwinyiso naavo veshe vanoda kuhamba ngokururama muna Kristu Jesu vanozotambudzwa. 
2Timothy3:13 Asi vanhu vakashata nevanochengedzera vanozoangira kupinda kushata, vechichengedzera nokuchengedzerwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Asi iwewe, gara muizvo zvowakadzidza nokugwinyiswa ndizvo, wechizia avo vewakadzidziswa ndivo," 
2Timothy3:15 zve, kubvira paudoko hwako, wakazia zvinyorwa zvakachena zvine simba rokuita kuti ungware kuruponeso kubudikidza ngokugonda muna Kristu Jesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Zvinyorwa zveshe zvakafemerwa ndiMwari, zvinodetsera kudzidzisa, kurambidza, kupanga nokudzidzisa njira yokupona kwakarurama," 
2Timothy3:17 kuti munhu waMwari aite wakaperera, anazvo zveshe zvokuita mishando yeshe yakanaka." 
2Timothy4:1 Ndinokupanga mukuona kwaMwari nokwaKristu Jesu, uwo unozotonga vachazwa nevakafa, mukuoneka kwake noumambo hwake:" 
2Timothy4:2 Chumaira izwi, ugwinyisire ngenguva kwayo neisiri nguva kwayo, rambidza, ukaraidze, upange ngokusengerera kweshe nokudzidzisa." 
2Timothy4:3 Ngokuti nguva ichauya apo vanhu yevacharamba kupurutana kudzidziso dzegwinyiso, asi vane nzee dzinovava, vanozodziunganidzira vadzidzisi kudai ngokuemura kwavo." 
2Timothy4:4 Vanozotsiira nzee dzavo kubva kugwinyiso, vechienda kungano." 
2Timothy4:5 Asi iwewe, ngwara muzviro zveshe, gwinyira zvakakonza, ita mushando womuvhangeri, pedzisa mushando wako." 
2Timothy4:6 Ngokuti zvino inini ndatodururwa kuitwa mudiro, nomukuwo wokuenda kwangu waguma." 
2Timothy4:7 Ndarwa kurwa kwakanaka, ndapedza mujaho, ndangwarira kugonda." 
2Timothy4:8 Kubvira zvino ragadzikirwa inini dzungudza rokururama, iro raanozondipa ngeiro zuva Mambo, mutongi wakarurama, haiwa kwendiri ndega, asi nokwavariwo veshe vakada kuoneka kwake." 
2Timothy4:9 Uya kwendiri ngokukasira," 
2Timothy4:10 ngokuti Dhemasi wakandisiya, ngokuda iyi nyika, wakaenda Thesaronika; Kresikhenesi wakaenda Garatia, Thithusi wakaenda Dharamatia." 
2Timothy4:11 NdiRuka ega uchineni. Tora Marako uuye naye, ngokuti unorudetso rukurutu kwendiri mumushando." 
2Timothy4:12 Ndakatuma Thichikusi kuEfesu. 
2Timothy4:13 Jazi rendakasiya Troasi naKhapusi, uya naro woouya, nemabhuku, kakurutu mapepa emakanda." 
2Timothy4:14 Arekizanda mupfuri wethusi wakandishaishira kakurutu; Mambo unozomuunzidzira kudai ngemishando yake. 
2Timothy4:15 Newe unosisira kungwara ndiye, ngokuti wakaphikisa kakurutu mazwi edu." 
2Timothy4:16 Pakudzirwira kwangu kwokutanga apana wakandiemerera, asi veshe vakanditiza. Isaita ndaa kwavari!" 
2Timothy4:17 Asi Mambo wakandiemerera, akandigwinyisa, kuti kubudikidza ndini mashoko ateketeswe yaamho nemadzinza eshe amazwe. Neni ndakapokonyorwa kubva pamuromo wemhondoro." 
2Timothy4:18 Mambo unozondipokonyora kubva kumishando yeshe yakashata, unozondiponesa metsa ndapinda muumambo hwake hwomudenga. Kwaari ngahugare uthende mhera nariini nariini. Ameni." 
2Timothy4:19 Tambisa Prisikha naAkwira nemhuri yaOnesiforusi. 
2Timothy4:20 Erastusi wakasara Khorinte, asi ndakasiya Trofimusi Miretusi echirwara." 
2Timothy4:21 Kasira kuti uuye chando chisati chaguma. Yubhurusi unokutambisa naPhudhenesi naRinusi naKraudhia nevatendi veshe. 
2Timothy4:22 Mambo ngaagare nomweya wako. Nyasha ngadzigare nemwi. 
Titus1:1 Phauri, muranda waMwari nomupostori waJesu Kristu, kudai ngokugonda kwevakatsanangurwa vaMwari noruziyo rwegwinyiso rwokudira Mwari," 
Titus1:2 mugonda rokupona kusikaperi kwaakagondisa Mwari, uwo usikakoni kunyepa, nguva dzisati dzaapo," 
Titus1:3 panguva kwayo wakaonisa izwi rake kubudikidza ngokuchumairwa kwaro kwendakapuwa inini ngomupango waMwari Muponesi wedu. 
Titus1:4 Ndinonyorera kunaThithusi, mwana wangu wegwinyiso mugonda redu. Nyasha nokunyarara ngazvigare kwomuri zvinobva kunaMwari Baba nokuna Kristu Jesu Muponesi wedu." 
Titus1:5 Ngeiyi ndaa ndakakusiya muKrete, kuti urongedze izvo zvakasara kuitwa nokuemesa vakuru mumadhorobha eshe, kudai ngezvendakakupanga:" 
Titus1:6 munhu usikashooreki, wakaroora mukadzi umwe, anevana vanotenda, vasikaitirwi ndaa yokusikadzibata nokuti vasikapurutani." 
Titus1:7 Ngokuti kunosisira kuti mutungamiriri mukuru wechiara aite usikashooreki, kudai ngezvaari muranda waMwari, usina mutinini, usikakasiri kutseneka, usikadi vhini, usikaiti hohoho, usikadisisi pfuma," 
Titus1:8 asi unoashira vapfumba, unoda kunaka, wakangwara, wakarurama, wakacheneswa, unodzibata." 
Titus1:9 Unosisira kubatisisa izwi rinogondeka kudai ngezvaakadzidziswa, kuti akone zveshe kugwinyisa ngedzidziso yegwinyiso nokuvanyisa avo vanoita hasha." 
Titus1:10 Ngokuti varipo vazhinji vasikapurutani, vanoereketa zvisina shwiro, vanochengedzera, kakurutu avo vokuchekwa;" 
Titus1:11 avo vanosisira kuti miromo yavo inyaradzwe, ngokuti vanoparadza mhuri dzeshe, vechidzidzisa zvisikasisiri, ngendaa yokuda pfuma inetsvina." 
Titus1:12 Waiya umwe wavo, muprofeti wavo emene, wakati, “VaKrete vanyepi nguva dzeshe, zvikara zvakashata, vanokara, vane nungo.”" 
Titus1:13 Uchapupu uhwo hunegwinyiso. Ngeiyi ndaa varambidze kakurutu, kuti varurame mukugonda," 
Titus1:14 vasikapurutani kungano dzevaJudha nokuti kumipango yevanhu vanoramba gwinyiso. 
Titus1:15 Kunevakasukika zveshe zvakasukika, asi kwavari vakasvipiswa nevasikatendi apana chakasukika. Mipinimidzo yavo nemhumba yavo zvakasvipiswa." 
Titus1:16 Vanopupura kuti vanomuzia Mwari, asi ngemishando yavo vanomuramba. Vanonyangadza, avapurutani, vasikadetseri chiro kumishando yeshe yakanaka." 
Titus2:1 Asi iwewe, dzidzisa zvinosisira zvidzidziso zvine gwinyiso." 
Titus2:2 Ronzera vamuna vakuru kuti vadzibate, vechiremeredzeka, vakangwara, vanogwinyisira mukugonda, murudo nomukusengerera." 
Titus2:3 Ronzera mbuya ngokudaro dzihambe kudai ngezvinosisira vakacheneswa, dzisikareyi, dzisikadi vhini rakawanda, dziite vadzidzisi vezvakanaka," 
Titus2:4 kuti dzidzidzise vakadzi vatsva kuda vamuna vavo nokuda vana vavo," 
Titus2:5 kuti vaite vakangwara, vakasukika, vanongwarira mizi yavo, vane nyasha, vanopfaira vamuna vavo, kuti izwi raMwari risazotukwa." 
Titus2:6 Ngokudaro panga vamuna vatsva kuti vaite vanodzibata. 
Titus2:7 Ngezviro zveshe wechidzionisa kuita chionero chemishando yakanaka, muzvidzidziso zvako wechionisa kugondeka nokuremeredzeka" 
Titus2:8 nokuereketa kwakarurama, kusikashooreki, kuti gaa ritsveruke, risaane chiro chakashata cheringaereketa tisu." 
Titus2:9 Ronzera hloko kuti dzipfaire madzimambo adzo nokunasa kuvadakadza ngezviro zveshe, dzisikavaphikisi," 
Titus2:10 dzisikavabiri, asi dzechionisa kugondeka kweshe kwakanaka, kuti dzinemese zvidzidziso zvaMwari Muponesi wedu muzviro zveshe." 
Titus2:11 Ngokuti nyasha dzaMwari dzakaoneka, dzinounza ruponeso kuvanhu veshe," 
Titus2:12 dzechitidzidzisa kuti tirambe zvakashata nokuemura zvomunyika, nomumazuva aya tipone ngokungwara nomukururama nokudira Mwari," 
Titus2:13 apo techigarira iro gonda rakafumiswa nokuoneka kwouthende hwaMwari wedu mukuru noMuponesi, Jesu Kristu." 
Titus2:14 Ndiye wakadzipira ngendaa yedu kuti atiripire kubva mukushata kweshe nokuti adzichenesere vanhu vaite vake vemene, vanotsamwirira kuita mishando yakanaka." 
Titus2:15 Ronza izvi zviro; upange nokurambidza ngesimba reshe. Usatendera munhu kuti akushoore. 
Titus3:1 Vakarakadzise kuti vapfaire vatongi naavo vane simba, kuti vapurutane vakanasirirwa kuita mishando yeshe yakanaka," 
Titus3:2 kuti vasaereketa zvakashata ngomunhu, kuti vasaita hasha, vaite vakapfaa, vechionisa kupfaa kuvanhu veshe." 
Titus3:3 Ngokuti isusuwo ngekaretu taiya noupenzi, tisikapurutani, techichengedzerwa, tiri hloko dzokuemura nezvidakadziso zvenyama zvakaparadzana, takapedza mazuva edu tine khururu nendurumwa, techinyenya nokunyenyana." 
Titus3:4 Asi apo unaku norudo rwenyasha dzaMwari Muponesi wedu zvaoneka," 
Titus3:5 wakatiponesa, haiwa ngemishando yakarurama yetakaita isusu, asi kubudikidza ngenyasha dzake, ngokushambidzwa ngemvura yokubarwazve nokumusirirwa ndiMweya Wakachena." 
Titus3:6 Uwo wakadururirwa padera pedu ngokuwanzisa kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu Muponesi wedu," 
Titus3:7 kuti isusu, techipembedzwa ngenyasha dzake, tiite vanogara nhaka kudai ngegonda rokupona kusikaperi." 
Titus3:8 Iri izwi rinogondeka. Inini ndinoda kuti ugwinyisise kuronza izvi zviro, kuti avo vakatenda Mwari vangwarire kuita mishando yakanaka; izvi zviro zvakanaka zvinodetsera kuvanhu." 
Titus3:9 Asi tiza mibvunzo youpenzi nokuerengudzwa kwemazina emadzibaba, hasha nokuphikisana ngendaa yeMipango, ngokuti izvi azvidetseri azvina shwiro." 
Titus3:10 Munhu unophikisana negwinyiso, ngesure kwokuronzerwa kamwe nokwechipiri, murambe," 
Titus3:11 wechizia kuti wakadaro wakapauka, unoshaisha, unodzirasha." 
Titus3:12 Apo ndootuma Atemasi kwouri, nokuti Thichikusi, kasira kuuya kwendiri Nikoporisi, ngokuti ndakadziemesera kugarapo nguva yechando." 
Titus3:13 Ita zveshe zvounokona kudetsera Zenasi gweta naAporosi murwendo rwavo, uone kuti kusatamika chiro kwavari." 
Titus3:14 Vanhu vedu ngavadzidze kudzipira kuita mishando yakanaka kuti vaone zvinotamika, nokuti vasazoita vasina michero." 
Titus3:15 Veshe vendinavo vanokutambisa. Tambisa avo vanotida mukugonda. Nyasha ngadzigare nemwi mweshe. 
Philemon1:1 Phauri, bhanditi raKristu Jesu, naThimothi hama yedu, ndinonyorera kunaFiremoni mungani wedu unodikanwa nounoshanda pamwepo nesu," 
Philemon1:2 nokunaAfia mukunda wedu, naAkhipusi uri soja pamwepo nesu, nokuchiara chiri mumhatso yako." 
Philemon1:3 Nyasha nokunyarara ngazvigare nemwi zvinobva kunaMwari Baba edu nokunaMambo Jesu Kristu. 
Philemon1:4 Naapo pendinopinimidza ndiwe mumikumbiro yangu, ndinobonga Mwari wangu ngenguva dzeshe," 
Philemon1:5 ngokuti ndinozwa ngorudo rwako kwavari veshe vakacheneswa nokugonda kwako kunaMambo Jesu. 
Philemon1:6 Ndinokumbira kuti kukoaniswa kwegonda rako kushande mukuzia zveshe zvakanaka zviri mukati mwedu munaKristu. 
Philemon1:7 Ngokuti ndinodakara kakurutu nokugwinyiswa murudo rwako, ngokuti mwoyo yevakacheneswa yakagwinyiswa kubudikidza ndiwe, hama yangu." 
Philemon1:8 Ngeiyi ndaa, kunyazwi ndinakwo kushinga kweshe munaKristu kuti ndikupange kuita izvo zvinodiwa," 
Philemon1:9 asi ngendaa yorudo ndinokupota, inini Phauri ndinoita kudai ngomunhu musharuka, nazvino kudaiwo ngebanditi raKristu Jesu." 
Philemon1:10 Ndinokupota ngendaa yomwana wangu, Onesimusi, uwo wendakaita baba ake muusungwa hwangu." 
Philemon1:11 Uwo karetu waiya asikadetseri kwouri, asi zvino unodetsera iwewe neni." 
Philemon1:12 Ndamutumira kwouri, iye emene, mwoyo wangu wemene." 
Philemon1:13 Ndaida kuti agare neni, kuti andishandire pandau yako mukusungwa kwangu ngendaa yevhangeri;" 
Philemon1:14 asi ndaiya ndisikadi kuita chiro ndisati ndatenderwa ndiwe, kuti kunaka kwako kusazoita kwokumanikidzwa, asi ngokuda kwako." 
Philemon1:15 Ngokuti pamweni ndiyo ndaa yakaita kuti aparadzaniswe newe nguva doko, kuti ungaa naye mhera nariini," 
Philemon1:16 aasichiri hlokopi, asi unopinda hloko, waita hama inodikanwa, kakurutu kwendiri, asi zvinozopinda kwakaitawani kwouri, mumuiri nomuna Mambo." 
Philemon1:17 Ndizvo kudai wechindierenga kuti ndiri mungani wako, muashire kudai ngezvewaizondiashira inini." 
Philemon1:18 Asi kudai akakushaishira, kunyazwi zvakanyaita mashatirenyi nokuti anechikwereti kwouri, wechiisa icho pazvikwereti zvangu." 
Philemon1:19 Inini, Phauri, ndinonyora izvi ngenyara yangu; ndinozochibhadhara. Inini andironzi chiro kwouri ngendaa yezvikwereti zvako kwendiri kunyazwi iwewe wemene uri chikwereti kwendiri." 
Philemon1:20 Eya, hama, nditendere kuti ndidakadzwe ndiwe munaMambo! Musirira mwoyo wangu munaKristu." 
Philemon1:21 Ndechigonda kupurutana kwako ndinonyora kwouri, ndechizia kuti unozoita zvinopinda zvendaronza." 
Philemon1:22 Panguva imweyo ndinasirire kamera revaeni, ngokuti ndinogonda kuti kubudikidza ngemikumbiro yenyu ndinozopirwa kwomuri." 
Philemon1:23 Ephafrasi, bhanditi pamwepo neni munaKristu Jesu, unokutambisa," 
Philemon1:24 ngokudaro Marako, Aristakhusi, Dhemasi naRuka, vendinoshanda navo." 
Philemon1:25 Nyasha dzaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu ngadzigare nomweya yenyu. 
Hebrews1:1 Karetu Mwari wakaereketa kumadzibaba edu ngenguva dzakawanda nenjira dzakaparadzana ngevaprofeti; 
Hebrews1:2 pamazuva aya okupedzisira wakaereketa kwetiri ngoMukororo wake, uwo waakaemesa kugara nhaka yezviro zveshe, kubudikidza ndiyezve wakasika nyika." 
Hebrews1:3 Aye uri kupenya kwouthende hwaMwari nomuedzaniso wemene waMwari, nokugwinyisa zviro zveshe ngesimba reizwi rake. Naapo achenesa zvishaishi, wakagara pashi ngokumudyo kwoUkuru mudenga." 
Hebrews1:4 Mukororo wakapinda kunaka kunengirosi, ngokuti wakagara nhaka yezina rakapinda kunaka kuneradzo." 
Hebrews1:5 Ngokuti ngeiri ngirosi yaakaronza nokuti ngouri mukuwo echiti, “Ndiwe Mukororo wangu, inini nyamashi ndakubara?” Zve, “Ndinozoita Baba ake, naye unozoita Mukororo wangu?”" 
Hebrews1:6 Zve, naapo echiunza dangwe munyika, unoti, “Ngirosi dzeshe dzaMwari ngadzimudire.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Ngendaa yengirosi unoti, “Uwo unoita ngirosi dzake dziite mhepo, nevashandiri vake kuti vaite murazvu womuriro.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Asi ngendaa yoMukororo unoti, “Dendemaro rako, A Mwari, rinogara mhera nariini nariini, nendonga yokururama ndiyo ndonga youmambo hwako." 
Hebrews1:9 Iwewe wakada kururama, wakanyenya kushata; ndizvo Mwari, Mwari wako, wakakudzodza ngemafuta okudakara kupinda vangani vako.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Zve, “Pakutanga, Mambo Mwari, wakaradzika dzeyo renyika, nematenga ari mishando yenyara dzako;" 
Hebrews1:11 izvo zvichapera, asi iwewe unogara uripo; nazvo zveshe zvichatsakara kudai ngechokufuka;" 
Hebrews1:12 kudai ngejira unozozvipeta, kudai ngechokufuka zvinozotsandudzwa. Asi iwewe unondogara wakadaro, nemakore ako aatongozoperi.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Asi ngeiri yengirosi yaakaereketa ndiyo nokuti ngouri mukuwo echiti, “Gara iwewe ngokumudyo kwangu metsa ndiite magaa ako chitambarariro chetsoka dzako?”" 
Hebrews1:14 Ngirosi dzeshe andiyopi mweya inoshandira here, inotumwa kushandira avo vanozogara nhaka yoruponeso?" 
Hebrews2:1 Ndizvo tinosisira kuti tipinde kungwarira zvetakazwa, kuti tirekere kukukuzwa kubva kwezviri." 
Hebrews2:2 Ngokuti kudai izwi iro rakaereketwa kubudikidza ngengirosi rakaoniswa kuti rakagwinya, nokupauka kweshe nokusikapurutana zvakathuswa ngokuunzidzirwa kwakasisira," 
Hebrews2:3 isusu tingaita mapokonyokerenyi kudai techirekeredza ruponeso rukuru rwakadai? Urwo rwakatanga kuereketwa kubudikidza ndiye Mambo, rukagwinyisiswa kwetiri ngaavo vakamuzwa," 
Hebrews2:4 naapo Mwari wakapupurawo pamwepo navo ngezvioniso nemishamiso nemishando yakawanda yesimba nezvipo zvoMweya Wakachena, zvakapuwa kudai ngokuda kwake." 
Hebrews2:5 Ngokuti aazi kuipfaisa pashi pengirosi nyika inouya, yetinoereketa ndiyo." 
Hebrews2:6 Asi umwe wakapupura pandau imweni echiti, “Munhu chiinyi kuti ukarakadze ndiye? Nokuti mukororo womunhu kuti mumungwarire?" 
Hebrews2:7 Wakamuita kwekamukuwo kadoodori ari pashi pengirosi; wakamupfekedza dzungudza routhende nokuremeredzwa. 
Hebrews2:8 Wakapfaisa zveshe pashi petsoka dzake.” Ngokuti pakuisa pashi pake zviro zveshe, aazi kusiya chiro chisikazi kuiswa pashi pake. Asi zvino atisati taona kuti zveshe zvakaiswa pashi pake." 
Hebrews2:9 Asi tinoona Jesu, uwo wakaitwa mudoko pashi pengirosi kwenguva doko, asi zvino akapfekedzwa dzungudza routhende nokuremeredzwa ngendaa yokutambudzika kworufu, kuti ngenyasha dzaMwari araire rufu ngendaa yomunhu weshe." 
Hebrews2:10 Ngokuti kwakamusisira Mwari, iye wakaitirwa zviro zveshe, nokubudikidza ndiye zviro zveshe zviripo, mukuunza vana vazhinji muuthende, kuti apererise mukutambudzika uwo uri mutungamiri woruponeso rwavo." 
Hebrews2:11 Ngokuti uwo unochenesa naavo vakacheneswa vana Baba umwe. Ngeiyi ndaa Jesu aatsveruki kuvadaidza kuti hama 
Hebrews2:12 echiti, “Ndinozochumaira zina rako kuhama dzangu, ndinozoemba kukukudza pakati pembungano.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Zve, “Ndinozogonda kwaari.” Zve, “Inini ndiri pano, nevana avo vaakandipa Mwari.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Ndizvo kwechioneka kuti vana vakakoanisirwa ngazi nenyama, iye emene ngokudaro wakakoana navo pane zviro zvakadaro, kuti kubudikidza ngokufa ungaparadza uwo unesimba rorufu, ndiye Dhiabhorosi" 
Hebrews2:15 nokusunhura veshe avo vaiya muusungwa mukupona kwavo kweshe mukutya rufu. 
Hebrews2:16 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso aazi kuuya koodetsera ngirosi, asi kudetsera mibarirwana yaAbrahama." 
Hebrews2:17 Ndizvo unosisira kuti atodzane nehama dzake ngezviro zveshe, kuti aite mupristi mukuru unenyasha nounogondeka mumushando waMwari, kuti aripire zvishaishi zvevanhu." 
Hebrews2:18 Ngokuti iye emene wakatambudzika echiedzwa, unesimba rokudetsera avo vanoedzwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Ndizvo, hama dzakacheneswa, vanoashirawo kudaidzwa kwomudenga, pinimidzai ndiye Jesu, Mupostori noMupristi Mukuru wokutenda kwedu," 
Hebrews3:2 uwo waigondeka kwaari uwo wakamuemesa, kudaiwo ndiMosi waigondeka mumhatso yaMwari yeshe." 
Hebrews3:3 Ngokuti Jesu wakaerengwa kuita unosisira kuremeredzwa kupinda Mosi, kudai ngouwo wakaaka mhatso unoremeredzwa kupinda mhatso yemene." 
Hebrews3:4 Ngokuti mhatso yeshe inoakiwa ngomunhu, asi uwo wakaaka zveshe ndiMwari." 
Hebrews3:5 Zvino Mosi waigondeka mumhatso yaMwari yeshe kudai ngomuranda, kuti aite chapupu cheizvo zvaaizoereketa panguva yaiteera." 
Hebrews3:6 Asi Kristu waigondeka padera pemhatso yaMwari kudai ngomukororo, nesu tiri mhatso yake kudai techibatisisa pakushinga kwedu negonda retinodzikudza ndiro mukugonda kwedu." 
Hebrews3:7 Ndizvo, kudai ngezvaanoereketa Mweya Wakachena, “Nyamashi, kudai mwechizwa izwi rake," 
Hebrews3:8 “Musakonzesa mwoyo yenyu kudai ngenguva yokumukirana, kudai ngezuva rokuedzwa mushango," 
Hebrews3:9 paakandiedza madzibaba enyu echindinesa, akaona mishando yangu" 
Hebrews3:10 makore makumi marongomuna. Ndizvo ndakanyangadzwa ngorudzi urwu, ndikati, ‘Vanogara vechipauka mumwoyo yavo navo avazi kuzia njira dzangu.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Kudai ngezvendakapika muushungu hwangu kuti, ‘Avazopoteri mukuzorora kwangu.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Ngwarai, hama, kuti kusazoapo naumwe wenyu unemwoyo wakashata usikatendi, unofuratira kubva kuna Mwari unopona." 
Hebrews3:13 Asi gwinyisanai umwe ngaumwe wenyu mazuva eshe kuchadaidzwa kuti, “Nyamashi,” kuti kusazoapo naumwe wenyu unokonzeswa ngokuchengedzerwa kwokushaisha." 
Hebrews3:14 Ngokuti isusu takaitwa vanokoanisirana naKristu, kudai techibatisisa kuamba kwokugonda kwedu metsa pakugumisira." 
Hebrews3:15 Apo kucharonzwa kuti, “Nyamashi, kudai mwechizwa izwi rake, musakonzesa mwoyo yenyu kudai ngenguva yokumukirana.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Ndiani avo vakazwa, vakamumukira? Andivopi veshe here vakabudiswa Egipite ndiMosi?" 
Hebrews3:17 Ndianizve vaakanyangadzirwa makore makumi marongomuna? Andivopi avo vakashaisha here, miiri yavo yakawira mushango?" 
Hebrews3:18 Wakapikazve kunaani kuti avazopoteri mukuzorora kwake, kudai kusiri kwavari avo vaiya vasikamupurutani?" 
Hebrews3:19 Ndizvo tinoona kuti avasaikona kupoteramwo, ngokuti vaiya vasikatendi." 
Hebrews4:1 Ndizvo, kudai ngezvechichipo chigondiso chokupotera mukuzorora kwake, ngatingware kuti kusazoapo naumwe wenyu ungaoneka echikorera kuhanira kwechiri." 
Hebrews4:2 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso mashoko akanaka akauya kwetiri, kudai ngekwavari; asi izwi revakazwa arizi kuvadetsera, ngokuti arizi kubvengedzwa pamwepo nokugonda kwaavo vakarizwa." 
Hebrews4:3 Ngokuti isusu takatenda tinopotera mukuzorora ukwo, kudai ngezvaakaereketa echiti, “Kudai ngezvendakapika muushungu hwangu kuti, ‘Avazopoteri mukuzorora kwangu,’ ” kunyazwi mishando yake yakapedzwa kubvira mukuemeswa kwenyika." 
Hebrews4:4 Ngokuti pandau imweni wakaereketa ngendaa yezuva rechinomwe echiti, “Mwari wakazorora ngezuva rechinomwe kubva kumishando yake yeshe.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Nepandau inozve echiti, “Avazopoteri mukuzorora kwangu.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Ndizvo kuchakabeuka kuti vamweni vapoteremwo, naavo vakaashira mashoko akanaka karetu vakakorera kupoteramwo ngokusikapurutana," 
Hebrews4:7 unoemesazve zuva rimweni rinoti, “Nyamashi,” rechiti kubudikidza ndiDhavhidha ngesure kwomukuwo wakareba kudai, kudai ngezvezvakaereketwa karetu kuti, “Nyamashi, kudai mwechizwa izwi rake, musakonzesa mwoyo yenyu.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Ngokuti kudai Joshua aiya avapa kuzorora, Mwari asaizoereketa ngezuva rimweni sure kweizvo." 
Hebrews4:9 Ndizvo zvino kuzorora kweSabatha revanhu vaMwari kuchiripo. 
Hebrews4:10 Ngokuti avo vakapotera muzororo raMwari vakazororawo kubva kumishando yavo, kudai ngezvaakaita Mwari kubva kuneyake." 
Hebrews4:11 Ndizvo ngatitsamwirire kupotera muzororo iro, kuti kusazoapo naumwe unozowa kubudikidza ngokuteera icho chionero chokusikapurutana." 
Hebrews4:12 Ngokuti izwi raMwari rinopona, rinoshanda, rinopinza kupinda shoti ine upanga huiri, rinobaya kugumira panoparadzana mwoyo nomweya, nhengo nomwongo; rinokona kuzwisisa zvinotendwa nezvinonyerwa mumwoyo." 
Hebrews4:13 Pamberi pake apana chisikwa chakafishika, asi zviro zveshe zviri pamhene nokufukurwa kumadziso ake uwo wetinozodzipingurira kwaari." 
Hebrews4:14 Ndizvo zvino zvetinaye mupristi wakapinda kukura, wakapinda ngepakati pematenga, Jesu, Mukororo waMwari, ngatibatisise kutenda kwedu." 
Hebrews4:15 Ngokuti atina mupristi mukuru usikakoni kutizwira urombo pakurembaremba kwedu, asi tinaye uwo wakaedzwa ngenjira dzeshe kudai tisu, asina kushaisha." 
Hebrews4:16 Ndizvo ngatikwedzere ngokushinga kudendemaro renyasha, kuti tiashire nyasha nokuona nyasha dzokutidetsera ngomukuwo wokutama." 
Hebrews5:1 Ngokuti mupristi mukuru weshe wakatsanangurwa kubva pakati pevanhu unoemeserwa vanhu kuita zviro zvaMwari, kuti apire zvipo nemidiro ngendaa yezvishaishi." 
Hebrews5:2 Unokona kuzwira urombo kunevasikazii nevanopauka, ngokuti iye emene wakatendenedzwawo ngokurembaremba;" 
Hebrews5:3 ngeiyi ndaa, unosisira kuti apire midiro ngendaa yezvishaishi zvake, kudai ngezvaanopira ngendaa yevanhu." 
Hebrews5:4 Akuna munhu unodzitorera kuremeredzwa uku, asi unotora kwega apo anodaidzwa ndiMwari, kudai ndiAroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Ndizvo Kristuwo aazi kudzikudza ngokuita mupristi mukuru, asi wakaemeswa ngouwo wakati kwaari, “Ndiwe Mukororo wangu, inini nyamashi ndakubara;”" 
Hebrews5:6 kudai ngezvaakaronzazve kundau imweni kuti, “Iwewe uri mupristi mhera nariini kudai ngourongwa hworudzi rwaMerekhizedheki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Ngemazuva okupona kwake munyama, Jesu wakakumbira mikumbiro nokupota, ngokuchema kakurutu nemasodzi, kwaari umwe uwo waikona kumuponesa kubva murufu, naye wakazwika ngendaa yokumutya Mwari." 
Hebrews5:8 Kunyazwi waiya Mukororo, asi wakadzidza kupurutana kubudikidza ngeizvo zvaakatambudzika ndizvo;" 
Hebrews5:9 naapo aitwa wakaperera, wakaita muambi wokuponeswa kusikaperi kwavari veshe vanomupurutana," 
Hebrews5:10 naapo aemeswa ndiMwari kuita mupristi mukuru kudai ngokuteererana kworudzi rwaMerekhizedheki. 
Hebrews5:11 Ngendaa yeizvi tinazvo zvakawanda zvokuronza zvakakonza kududzira, kudai ngezvemwaita vanhu vasikachakoni kuzwisisa." 
Hebrews5:12 Ngokuti kunyazwi ngouyu mukuwo mwaisisira kuita vadzidzisi, zvino imwimwi munodazve kuti umweni amudzidzise zvidzidziso zvokutanga zvemazwi aMwari. Imwimwi mwatoita vanosisira kupuwa mukaka, haiwa kudya kwakagwinya;" 
Hebrews5:13 ngokuti munhu weshe unomwa mukaka aazwisisi izwi rokururama, ngokuti mwana mudoko." 
Hebrews5:14 Asi kudya kwakagwinya ngokwevakuru, ngokuti avo mipinimidzo yavo yakadzidziswa ngokuita kutsanangura zvakanaka kubva panezvakashata." 
Hebrews6:1 Ndizvo ngatiangire kuenda mberi mukuperera, techisiya sure zvidzidziso zvokutanga zvaKristu, tisikaradzikizve dzeyo rokutenderuka kubva kumishando yakafa nokugonda kuna Mwari," 
Hebrews6:2 nokuchidzidziso chokubhabhatidzwa nokuiswa nyara nechokumuka kwevakafa nechokutongwa kwemhera nariini. 
Hebrews6:3 Neizvi tinozozviita, kudai Mwari echitendera." 
Hebrews6:4 Ngokuti azviitiki kuvapetudzazve kuti vatenderuke avo vakambojekiswa nokuraira chipo chomudenga, vaashira chikoaniswa muMweya Wakachena," 
Hebrews6:5 vakaraira unaku hweizwi raMwari nemasimba enguva inouya," 
Hebrews6:6 kudai vechipauka kuhwirira sure, azvingaitiki kuvatenderudzazve, ngokuti vanokohomerazve Mukororo waMwari vechimutsverudza pamhene." 
Hebrews6:7 Ngokuti nyika inomwirira mvura inonaya kazhinji padera payo, kudai yechimera miriwo inosisira avo vayakarimirwa, inoashira chifumiso chinobva kuna Mwari." 
Hebrews6:8 Asi kudai yechibereka minzwa nemakato, inoita isina shwiro yaapasinde pokutukwa, magumisiro ayo kupishwa." 
Hebrews6:9 Kunyazwi tinoereketa kudai, vanodikanwa, tinegonda rezviro zvakapinda kunaka ndimwi, zviro zvoruponeso." 
Hebrews6:10 Ngokuti Mwari aasiri wokusikaruramapi; aazoriyarwi mushando wenyu norudo rwemwakaonisa ngendaa yezina rake mukushandira vakacheneswa, kudai ngezvemuchavashandira nazvino." 
Hebrews6:11 Nesu tinodisisa kuti umwe ngaumwe wenyu aonise kutsamwirira kwakadaro kunokugonda kwakaperera metsa pakugumisira,"
