Hebrews6:12 kuti musaita nungo, asi vaedzereri veavo vanogara nhaka yezvigondiso kubudikidza ngokugonda nokusengerera." 
Hebrews6:13 Ngokuti apo Mwari paakaita chigondiso kuna Abrahama, wakapika ndiye pachake, ngokuti paiya pasina mukuru wokuti apike ndiye," 
Hebrews6:14 echiti, “Ngegwinyiso ndinozomufumisa nokumuwanza.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Ngokudaro Abrahama echishingirira mukusengerera wakahanira chigondiso. 
Hebrews6:16 Ngegwinyiso vanhu vanopika ngomukuru wakavapinda pachavo, nemhiko inogwinyisa inopedza hasha dzeshe." 
Hebrews6:17 Ngenjira imweyo, apo Mwari, paakada kunasa kuonisa kwavari avo vanogara nhaka yechigondiso, icho chine chiemo chisikatsandudzwi biningidzo racho, wakachigwinyisa ngemhiko," 
Hebrews6:18 kuti kubudikidza ngezviro zviiri zvisikashanduki, mwezviri amungaitiki kuti Mwari anyepe, isusu tione kugwinyiswa kwakagwinya, isusu takatiza kubatisisa gonda rakaiswa pamberi pedu." 
Hebrews6:19 Tinaro gonda iri kuita chitsimiso chomweya, rine gwinyiso rakatsima rinopotera muneicho chiri mukati mwejira rechisitiro," 
Hebrews6:20 umwo Jesu mutungamiriri wakapoteramwo pokutanga ngendaa yedu, apo aitwa mupristi mukuru mhera nariini kudai ngourongwa hworudzi rwaMerekhizedheki." 
Hebrews7:1 Ngokuti uyu Merekhizedheki, mambo weSaremu, mupristi waMwari Uri-Padera-Pazveshe, wakashongana naAbrahama, echipetuka kubva koorwa nemadzimambo naye wakamufumisa." 
Hebrews7:2 Kwaarizve Abrahama wakapa “Chimwe chegumi cheizvo zveshe.” Zina rake pakutanga rinoronza kuti, “Mambo wokurarama;” sure kwazvo unozwi, mambo weSaremu, rinoronza kuti, “Mambo wokunyarara.”" 
Hebrews7:3 Asina baba, asina mai, asina madzisekuru, asina maambo emazuva nokuti magumo endaramo, asi wakaitwa kudai ngomuedzaniso woMukororo waMwari, unogara ari mupristi mhera nariini." 
Hebrews7:4 Wonai kukuranyi kwaakaita! Kunyazwi naAbrahama, baba mukuru, akamupa chimwe chegumi cheizvo zvaakachakata." 
Hebrews7:5 Ngegwinyiso naavo vemhuri yaRevhi vanoashira mushando woupristi, vanopangwa ngeMipango kuti vatore chegumi kuvanhu, ndikwo kuti kubva kuhama dzavo, kunyazwi vakabva muchiunu chaAbrahama." 
Hebrews7:6 Asi munhu uyu, mubarirwana wake usikazi kuerengwa rudzi rwake kwavari, wakatora chegumi kubva kunaAbrahama, akamufumisa uwo wakaashira zvigondiso." 
Hebrews7:7 Zviri pamhene pasina kuphikisa kuti mudoko unofumiswa ngomukuru. 
Hebrews7:8 Panapa vanhu vanofa vanoashira chimwe chegumi; pamweni ngoumweni uwo unopupurwa ndiye kuti unorarama. 
Hebrews7:9 Umwe ungaronza kuti Revhi pachake unoashira chegumi, wakapawo chegumi kubudikidza ndiAbrahama," 
Hebrews7:10 ngokuti iye waiya achiri muchiunu chababa ake, apo Merekhizedheki paakashongana naye." 
Hebrews7:11 Zvino kudai kuperera kwakaoneka kubudikidza ngoupristi hwaRevhi (ngokuti vanhu vakaashira Mipango paupristi uhu) kwaiya kuchatamikenyi kuti tierekete ngomupristi umweni kudai ngokuteera urongwa hwoupristi hwaMerekhizedheki, pane kuti umwe worudzi rwaAroni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Ngokuti apo upristi hwechishandurwa kunosisira kuti Mipango ishandurwe. 
Hebrews7:13 Ngokuti uwo unoereketwa ndiye ngeizvi zviro ngowedzinza rimweni, kubva kwaari akuna naumwe wakamboshanda paarita." 
Hebrews7:14 Ngokuti zviri pamhene kuti Mambo wedu wakabva kudzinza raJudha, ngeiri dzinza Mosi aazi kuereketa chiro ngendaa yevapristi." 
Hebrews7:15 Izvi zvakapinda kunasa kuita pamhene, kudai kwechimiruka mupristi umweni wakatodzana nomuemo waMerekhizedheki," 
Hebrews7:16 uwo usikazi kuitwa mupristi kudai ngechironzo chomupango wenyama, asi wakaitwa ngesimba rokupona kusikaperi." 
Hebrews7:17 Ngokuti ndiye unopupurirwa kuti, “Iwewe uri mupristi mhera nariini kudai ngourongwa hworudzi rwaMerekhizedheki.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Ngokuti kuripo, munyara imweni, kutama simba kwomupango wokutanga ngendaa yokurembedzeka nokusikadetsera kwawo." 
Hebrews7:19 (Ngokuti mupango apana chiro chowakaita chakaperera); kuripozve, munyara imweni, kutanga kwegonda rakapinda kunaka, kubudikidza ndiro tinokwedzera kunaMwari." 
Hebrews7:20 Ichi chakagwinyiswa ngemhiko; ngokuti ivo ngegwinyiso vakaitwa vapristi pasina mhiko," 
Hebrews7:21 asi uyu wakaitwa mupristi ngokupika mhiko ngendaa youwo wakati kwaari, “Mambo wakapika naye aazokunukudzi mupinimidzo wake, ‘Iwewe uri mupristi mhera nariini.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Ndizvo Jesu wakaitwa chibatiso chechitenderano chakapinda kunaka. 
Hebrews7:23 Vapristi vokutanga vaiya vazhinji, ngokuti vairambidzwa ngorufu kuangira kugara varimwo mumushando;" 
Hebrews7:24 asi unogara mhera nariini, anawo upristi hwake, ngokuti unoangira mhera nariini." 
Hebrews7:25 Ndizvozve unesimba rokuponesa yaamho avo vanokwedzera kunaMwari kubudikidza ndiye, ngokuti unorarama nguva dzeshe kuti avakumbirire." 
Hebrews7:26 Ngokuti zvaiya zvakanaka kuti taisisira kuwa nomupristi mukuru, wakachena, usikashooreki, usina chinosvipisa, wakaparadzaniswa nevashaishi, wakamirudzwa padera pematenga." 
Hebrews7:27 Uwo usikatami kupira midiro zuva ngezuva, kutanga ngendaa yezvishaishi zvake, ngesure kweizvo ngendaa yezvishaishi zvevanhu, kudai ngezvevakaita avo vapristi vakuru. Ngokuti wakaita izvi kamwe kega, apo paakadzipira pachake." 
Hebrews7:28 Ngokuti Mipango inoemesa kuita vapristi vakuru vanhu vakarembedzeka, asi izwi remhiko, rakateera kuuya sure kwokupirwa kweMipango, rakaemesa Mukororo uwo wakaitwa wakaperera mhera nariini." 
Hebrews8:1 Zvino ndaa huru yeizvi zvetinoereketa ndizvo ngeiyi, kuti tinaye mupristi mukuru wakadaro, uwo wakagara pashi ngokumudyo kwedendemaro roUmambo hwomudenga," 
Hebrews8:2 ari mushandi wezvakachena nowetende regwinyiso, raakaaka Mambo, haiwa munhu." 
Hebrews8:3 Ngokuti mupristi mukuru weshe unoemeserwa kupira zveshe zvipo nemidiro; ndizvo kunosisira kuti uyu mupristi naye aanachowo chokupira. 
Hebrews8:4 Zvino kudai aiya munyika, aasaizoita mupristipi, kudai ngezvevaripo vapristi vanopira zvipo kudai ngezvinodiwa ngeMipango." 
Hebrews8:5 Vanoita midiro mundau yakachena iri muedzaniso nebvute reiyo yomudenga; ngokuti Mosi, apo ooda kudzimika tende, wakapangwa kwechizwi, “Ngwara kuti uite zveshe kudai ngechionero icho chakaoniswa kwouri pamutunhu.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Asi Jesu zvino wakahanira mushando wakapindisisa kunaka, ndizvo ndiye muiyanisi wechitenderano chakapinda kunaka, chakaitwa kubudikidza ngezvigondiso zvakapinda kunaka." 
Hebrews8:7 Ngokuti kudai chitenderano chokutanga chaiya chakaperera, akusaizotsvakwazve chechipiri." 
Hebrews8:8 Ngokuti Mwari unovaitira ndaa, apo paanoti: “Mazuva achazouya, unoronza Mambo Mwari, apo pendinozoita chitenderano chitsva nemhatso yaIsuraeri nemhatso yaJudha;" 
Hebrews8:9 haiwa chakadai ngechitenderano chendakaita nemadzibaba avo, ngezuva rendakavatora ngenyara kuvatungamirira kubuda munyika yeEgipite; ngokuti avazi kuangira kugara muchitenderano changu, neni andizi kupinimidza ndivo, unoronza Mambo Mwari." 
Hebrews8:10 Ngokuti ichi ndicho chitenderano chendinozoita nevemhatso yaIsuraeri ngesure kwemazuva awo, unoronza Mambo Mwari; ndinozoisa Mipango yangu mumipinimidzo yavo, ndinozoinyora mumwoyo yavo, neni ndinozoita Mwari wavo, navo vanozoita vanhu vangu." 
Hebrews8:11 Navo avazodzidzisani umwe kuno umweni, nokuti kuronzerana umwe kuno umweni wake, echiti, ‘Ziai Mambo Mwari,’ ngokuti veshe vanozondizia, kubvira kumudoko wakatsongesesa metsa kumukuru wavo wakakurisisa." 
Hebrews8:12 Ngokuti ndinozoita nyasha pane zvinonyangadza zvavo, nezvishaishi zvavo andichazozvikarakadzizve.”" 
Hebrews8:13 Mukuronza kuti, “Chitenderano chitsva,” ngokudaro wakachiita chokutanga chisharuka. Asi icho chaita chisharuka nokutsakara chaapasinde pokurova." 
Hebrews9:1 Zvino kunyazwi nechitenderano chokutanga chaiya nemitemo yokudira nendau yakachena yepanyika. 
Hebrews9:2 Ngokuti tende rokutanga rakanasirwa, umwo mwaiya nechigadzikiro chechibani, tafura nezvingwa zvaipirwa kunaMwari; iyi inodaidzwa kuti, “Ndau yakachena.”" 
Hebrews9:3 Ngesure kwemachira ezvisitiro echipiri, paiya netende rinodaidzwa kuti, “Rakapindisisa kuchena.”" 
Hebrews9:4 Mukati mwaro mwaiya nearita yomukore yokupishira mutombo unonuhwira nebhokisi rechitenderano rakasetwa marutii aro eshe ngomukore, mukati mwaro mwaiya nehari yomukore ine mana nendonga yaAroni yakatungira mashakani matsva nemapuwe akanyorwa chitenderano;" 
Hebrews9:5 padera paro paiya nemakherubhi outhende echithibikira chigaro chenyasha. Ngendaa yeizvi zviro atikoni kuereketa ndizvo zvino chimwe ngachimwe. 
Hebrews9:6 Zvino kunasirirwa uku kwaitwa kudaro, vapristi vaigara vechipotera kundau yokutanga yetende vechiita mishando yokudira Mwari;" 
Hebrews9:7 asi kundau yechipiri yetende kwaipotera mupristi mukuru ega, kamwe ngegore, haiwa asina ngazi, yaapira ngendaa yake nendaa yezvishaishi zvevanhu zvakaitwa ngokusikazia." 
Hebrews9:8 Mweya Wakachena wechionisa kuti njira yokupotera mundau yakachenesisa yaiya isati yaoniswa, apo tende rokutanga richakaema." 
Hebrews9:9 Ichi chiri muedzaniso wenguva ino, yavanopira ndiyo zveshe zvipo nemidiro, zvisikakoni kuita kuti mhumba younodira iperere," 
Hebrews9:10 asi zvaiya zviemeso zvega zvenyama, zvokudya, zvokumwa norubhabhatidzo rwakaparadzana, zvakaemeswa metsa kuguma kumukuwo wokutsandudzwa." 
Hebrews9:11 Asi apo Kristu auya ari mupristi mukuru wezviro zvakanaka zvauya, zvino kubudikidza ngomutende rakapinda kukura nokuperera, risikazi kuitwa ngenyara, kuronza kuti andiropi rokusikwa uku," 
Hebrews9:12 haiwa nengazi yembudzi neyemakonyana, asi nengazi yake yemene, unopoteramwo kamwe kwega mundau yakachenesisa, wakationera kuripirwa kusikaperi." 
Hebrews9:13 Ngokuti kudai ngazi yembudzi neyemikono, nemarota etsiru echifafazirwa kwavari vakasvipiswa, zvechivachenesa kuti nyama isukike," 
Hebrews9:14 ngazi yaKristu inozopinda kwakaitawani, uwo kubudikidza ngomweya wemhera nariini wakadzipa asina chaangapomerwa kunaMwari, kuchenesa mhumba dzedu kubva kumishando yakafa kuti tishandire Mwari unopona!" 
Hebrews9:15 Ngeiyi ndaa iye uri muiyanisi wechitenderano chitsva, ngokuti rufu rwakauya kuti vaponeswe kubva kuzvipaukwa zvavo vaiya pashi pechitenderano chokutanga; kuti avo vanodaidzwa vaashire chigondiso chenhaka isikaperi." 
Hebrews9:16 Ngokuti apo pane tsamba yokukoanisa nhaka, panosisira kuti kuapo pakutanga rufu rwouwo wakainyora." 
Hebrews9:17 Ngokuti tsamba yokukoanisa nhaka ine simba apo munhu uwo afa, zvino aina simba kuti uwo wakainyora achapona." 
Hebrews9:18 Ndizvo nechitenderano chokutanga achizi kugwinyiswa pasina ngazi. 
Hebrews9:19 Ngokuti apo mipango yeshe yaiya yaronzwa ndiMosi kuvanhu veshe kudai ngezvinodiwa ngeMipango, wakatora ngazi yemakonyana neyembudzi, pamwepo nemvura, nehombori yehisopi yakasungwa ngemamviri akatsvuka, wakafafazira tsamba nevanhu veshe" 
Hebrews9:20 echiti, “Iyi ingazi yechitenderano chomwakapangwa ndiMwari.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Ngenjira imweyo, wakafafazira ngazi zveshe tende nendiro dzomushando wokudira." 
Hebrews9:22 Ngegwinyiso, zviro zvinoda kuita zveshe pashi peMipango zvinocheneswa ngengazi, pasina kuparadzwa ngazi apana kurekererwa kwezvishaishi." 
Hebrews9:23 Ndizvo kwaisisira kuti miedzaniso yeizvo zviri mudenga zvisukwe ngemidiro iyi, asi zviro zvomudenga zvemene zvinocheneswa ngemidiro yakapinda iyi kunaka." 
Hebrews9:24 Ngokuti Kristu aazi kupotera kundau yakachenesisa, yakaitwa ngenyara dzomunhu, yakadai ngomuedzaniso weizvo zvegwinyiso, asi wakapotera mudenga remene, kuti zvino aeme pamberi pehope yaMwari ngendaa yedu." 
Hebrews9:25 Zve, aazi kupindamwo kuti adzipire kuita mudiro kazhinji, kudai ngezvaaipotera mupristi mukuru kundau yakachenesisa gore ngegore ane ngazi isiri yake;" 
Hebrews9:26 ngokuti zvino kwaisisira kuti atambudzike kazhinji kubvira mukuemeswa kwenyika. Asi zvino pakugumisira kwenguva iye wakaoneka kamwe kuti abvise zvishaishi ngokudzipira kuita mudiro. 
Hebrews9:27 Kudai ngezvekwakaemeserwa kuvanhu kufa kamwe, ngesure kwazvo kutongwa," 
Hebrews9:28 ndizvo Kristu wakapirwa kamwe kuti atware zvishaishi zvevazhinji, unozoonekazve ngokwechipiri asikatwari zvishaishi, asi kuponesa avo vanomugarira." 
Hebrews10:1 Ngokuti Mupango zveune mumvuri wega wezviro zvakanaka zvichauya, haiwa muemo wemene wezviro izvo zvegwinyiso, aungatongoiti kuti vaperere avo vanokwedzera pasinde ngemidiro imweyo inogara yechipirwa gore ngegore." 
Hebrews10:2 Kudai zvaiya zvakadaro aisaizorekerwa kupirwa here, ngokuti kudai vadiri, apo vaiya vacheneswa kamwe mhera nariini, avasaichazoa nemhumba yokushaisha?" 
Hebrews10:3 Asi mumidiro iyi uripo mukarakadzisi wezvishaishi gore ngegore. 
Hebrews10:4 Ngokuti azvingaitiki kuti ngazi yemikono neyembudzi iduse zvishaishi. 
Hebrews10:5 Ndizvo apo Kristu auya munyika wakati, “Mibairo nezvipo iwewe auzi kuzvida, asi wakandinasirira muiri;" 
Hebrews10:6 Midiro yokupisha nemidiro yokushaisha amuzi kuidakarira. 
Hebrews10:7 Zvino ndakati, ‘Wona, ndauya kuti ndiite kuda kwako, A Mwari’ (mutsamba yakapetwa kwakanyorwa kudaro ndini.”)" 
Hebrews10:8 Zvaakaronza pakutanga kuti, “Mibairo nezvipo nembeu dzeshe dzemidiro nemibairo yezvishaishi auzi kuzvida, zve, auzi kudakara ndizvo (izvo zvinopirwa kudai ngezvinodiwa ngoMupango.”)" 
Hebrews10:9 Zvino wakati, “Wona, ndauya kuti ndiite kuda kwako.” Unodusa chokutanga kuti agwinyise chechipiri." 
Hebrews10:10 Ngokuda ukwo takacheneswa kubudikidza ngokupirwa kwomuiri waJesu Kristu kamwe kega. 
Hebrews10:11 Nomupristi weshe ngegwinyiso unoema zuva ngezuva pamushando wake, echipira kazhinji midiro inotodzana, isikatongokoni kudusa zvishaishi." 
Hebrews10:12 Asi apo Kristu aiya apira mudiro umwe wemhera nariini ngendaa yezvishaishi, wakagara pashi ngokumudyo kwaMwari," 
Hebrews10:13 kubvira ngouwo mukuwo echigara metsa magaa ake aitwa chitambarariro chetsoka dzake. 
Hebrews10:14 Ngokuti ngokupira mudiro umwe iye wakavaita vakaperera mhera nariini avo vakacheneswa. 
Hebrews10:15 NoMweya Wakachena unoitawo chapupu kwetiri, ngokuti ngesure iye wakati," 
Hebrews10:16 “Ichi ndicho chitenderano chendinozoita navo ngesure kwemazuva awo, unoronza Mambo Mwari; ndinozoisa Mipango yangu mumwoyo yavo, ndinozoinyora mumipinimidzo yavo," 
Hebrews10:17 nezvishaishi zvavo nezvinyangadzo zvavo andichazozvikarakadzizve.” 
Hebrews10:18 Zvino apo pane kurekererwa kweizvi, apachina kupirwa kwomudiro umweni ngendaa yokushaisha." 
Hebrews10:19 Ndizvo hama, apo tinokutsunga kwokupotera kundau yakachena ngengazi yaJesu," 
Hebrews10:20 ngenjira itsva inopona yaakatibeurira, kubudikidza ngejira rechisitiro, ndikwo kuti kubudikidza ngenyama yake," 
Hebrews10:21 zvino zvetinaye mupristi mukuru padera pemhatso yaMwari," 
Hebrews10:22 ngatikwedzere tine mwoyo wegwinyiso mukugonda kwakazara, tine mwoyo yedu yakafafazwa kucheneswa kubva kumhumba yakashata nemiiri yedu yakashambwa ngemvura yakaera." 
Hebrews10:23 Ngatibatisise kutenda kwegonda redu tisikazungunyiswi, ngokuti unogondeka uwo wakagondisa." 
Hebrews10:24 Zve, ngatikarakadzane kumusirana rudo nokuita mishando yakanaka," 
Hebrews10:25 tisikarekeredzi kuungana pamwepo kudai ngomuitiro wevamweni, asi techigwinyisana umwe kuno umweni, kakurutu apo munotoona kuti Zuva rinokwedzera." 
Hebrews10:26 Ngokuti kudai techizoshaisha maune ngesure kwokuashira kuzwisisa gwinyiso, akuchina mubairo unopirwa ngendaa yezvishaishi," 
Hebrews10:27 asi kwasara kugarira mukutya kutongwa, nomuriro uno ushungu unozopedza magaa." 
Hebrews10:28 Munhu uwo wakagura Mipango yaMosi unofa asikaitirwi nyasha ngeizwi rezvapupu zviiri nokuti zvitatu. 
Hebrews10:29 Kuororwa kwakapindisisa kushata kwakaitawani kukura kunozoitwa kuneuwo wakatsikatsika pashi petsoka Mukororo waMwari, akaerenga ngazi yechitenderano, yaakacheneswa ndiyo, kuti chiro chisina shwiro, akaita ngokushoora Mweya wenyasha?" 
Hebrews10:30 Ngokuti tinomuzia uwo wakaronza kuti, “Kuunzidzira ngokwangu, inini ndinozounzidzira.” Zve, “Mambo unozotonga vanhu vake.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Ichi chiro chinotyisa kuwira munyara dzaMwari unopona. 
Hebrews10:32 Asi karakadzai ngemazuva okutanga, apo ngesure kwokujekiswa kwenyu, mwakashingirira kurwisana kakurutu ngokutambudzika." 
Hebrews10:33 Pamweni mwakaemeswa pamhene kuti mutsverudzwe nokutambudzwa, pamwenizve mwakakoanisirana naavo vakaitirwa zvakadaro." 
Hebrews10:34 Ngokuti mwakazwira urombo avo vaiya mutirongo, mwakadakara mukushaishirwa kwenhumbi dzenyu, mwechizia kuti imwimwi mwemene mune nhaka yakapinda kunaka neinopinda kugara." 
Hebrews10:35 Ndizvo musarasha kushinga kwenyu, ukwo kuno musharo mukurutu." 
Hebrews10:36 Ngokuti munosisira kusengerera, kuti apo mwaita kuda kwaMwari, mungaashira icho chakagondiswa." 
Hebrews10:37 Ngokuti, “Mumukuwo mudoko, uwo unouya unozouya, aazononoki;" 
Hebrews10:38 asi wakarurama wangu unozorarama ngokugonda. Mwoyo wangu auzodakari ngouwo unopetuka sure.” 
Hebrews10:39 Asi isusu atisiri pakati pavo avo vanopetuka sure kuenda mukurashwa, asi tiri pakati peavo vanogonda vanoponeswa mweya." 
Hebrews11:1 Zvino kugonda kutenda gwinyiso reizvo zvinogarirwa, gwinyiso rezviro zvisikaoneki." 
Hebrews11:2 Ngegwinyiso ngokugonda madzibaba makuru edu vakapupurirwa zvakanaka. 
Hebrews11:3 Ngokugonda tinozwisisa kuti nyika dzakaitwa ngeizwi raMwari, ndizvo izvo zvinooneka zvakaitwa ngezviro zvisikaoneki." 
Hebrews11:4 Ngokugonda Abhera wakapa Mwari mudiro wakanasa kunaka kupinda waKheni. Kubudikidza ndiwo kwakapupurirwa kwaari kuti waiya akarurama, Mwari pachake echipupura ngendaa yezvipo zvake; wakafa, asi kubudikidza ngegonda rake uchandoereketa." 
Hebrews11:5 Ngokugonda Enokhi wakatorwa kuti asaona rufu; “Naye aazi kuoneka, ngokuti Mwari waiya amutora.” Ngokuti zvakapupurwa ndiye asati atorwa kuti, “Wakanasa kudakadza Mwari.”" 
Hebrews11:6 Asi pasina kugonda azvingaitiki kumudakadza, ngokuti kunyazwi ndiani uwo unouya kunaMwari, unosisira kuti atende kuti uriyo, naye unopa muthuso avo vanomutsvaka." 
Hebrews11:7 Ngokugonda Noa, echipangwa ndiMwari ngendaa yezvaizoitika zvaiya zvisati zvaoneka, echimutya Mwari, wakanasira ngarava kuti vaponeswe vemhatso yake; ngokudaro wakaitira ndaa nyika, wakaita unogara nhaka yokururama kubudikidza ngokugonda." 
Hebrews11:8 Ngokugonda Abrahama wakapurutana apo adaidzwa, kuti abude kuenda kundau yaaizoashira kuita nhaka; naye wakabuda kuenda, asikazii paaienda." 
Hebrews11:9 Ngokugonda wakaita munhu mupara munyika yaakagondiswa, kudai ngouri munyika isiri yake, echigara mumatende, kudai ngezvakaita Isaka naJakobe, avo vaiya vagari venhaka naye yechigondiso chimwe." 
Hebrews11:10 Ngokuti wairingirira dhorobha rine madzeyo, Mwari ndiye ngwazi nomuaki waro." 
Hebrews11:11 Ngokugonda Sara emene kunyazwi waiya ngomwa wakaashira simba rokuita mimba apo aamusharuka, ngokuti wakamuerenga kuita wakagondeka uwo wakagondisa." 
Hebrews11:12 Ndizvo kubva kuno munhu umwe, naye wakaita kudai ngowakafa, yakabarwa mibarirwana yakawanda kudai ngouwandu hwenyeredzi dzomudenga nokuwanda kudai ngouwandu hwejecha riri pahumbikumbi yoruandhle risikaerengeki." 
Hebrews11:13 Veshe ava vakafa mukugonda vasikazi kuashira zvigondiso, asi vakazviona, vakazvichingamidza zviri kuretu. Vakatenda kuti vaiya vanhu vapara nevahambi munyika," 
Hebrews11:14 ngokuti vanhu avo vanoronza zvakadaro vanoonisa pamhene kuti vanotsvaka nyika yavo. 
Hebrews11:15 Ngegwinyiso dai vaikarakadza ngenyika yevakabuda kubva kweiri, vaizoano mukuwo wokuhwirirayo." 
Hebrews11:16 Asi zvino vanodisisa nyika yakapinda kunaka, kuronza kuti, yomudenga. Ndizvo Mwari aatsveruki kudaidzwa kuti Mwari wavo. Ngokuti wakavanasirira dhorobha." 
Hebrews11:17 Ngokugonda Abrahama, apo echiedzwa, wakapira Isaka kuita mudiro. Eya, uwo wakaashira zvigondiso, wakanasirira akapira mukororo wake wakabarwa ari ega," 
Hebrews11:18 ndiyezve wakaronzwa kuti, “Kubudikidza ndiIsaka mibarirwana yako inozodudzwa ngezina rako,”" 
Hebrews11:19 echierenga kuti Mwari unesimba rokumumusa, eya kubva kwevakafa, apapozve wakamuashira mumuedzaniso." 
Hebrews11:20 Ngokugonda Isaka wakafumisa Jakobe naIsau ngezviro zvaizoitika panguva ichauya. 
Hebrews11:21 Ngokugonda Jakobe, pakufa kwake, wakafumisa umwe ngaumwe wevakororo vaJosefa, “Pakudira akatseama padera pendonga yake.”" 
Hebrews11:22 Ngokugonda Josefa, pamagumisiro okupona kwake, wakaronza ngendaa yokubuda kwevana vaIsuraeri, wakapanga ngendaa yemagodo ake." 
Hebrews11:23 Ngokugonda Mosi wakafishwa ngevabari vake mwedzi mitatu pakubarwa kwake, ngokuti vakaona kuti mwana waiya akanaka; navo avazi kutya mupango wamambo." 
Hebrews11:24 Ngokugonda Mosi, apo akura, wakaramba kuzwi mukororo womwanasikana waFaro." 
Hebrews11:25 Wakatsanangura kuitirwa zvakashata pamwepo nevanhu vaMwari kuno kudakara kamukuwo muzvidakadziso zvokushaisha," 
Hebrews11:26 echierenga kuti kutsverudzwa ngendaa yaKristu kuri upfumi hwakakura kupinda upfumi hweEgipite, ngokuti wairingirira mberi kumusharo." 
Hebrews11:27 Ngokugonda wakabuda kubva muEgipite, asikatyi ushungu hwamambo; ngokuti wakashingirira kudai ngowaimuona uwo usikaoneki." 
Hebrews11:28 Ngokugonda wakangwarira Phasika nokufafazwa kwengazi, kuti muurayi asazogwama matangwe aIsuraeri." 
Hebrews11:29 Ngokugonda vanhu vakaambuka Ruandhle Rwakatsvuka kudai ngevanoambuka panyika yakaoma, asi apo vaEgipite vechiedzererawo kuambuka vakanzvaidzwa." 
Hebrews11:30 Ngokugonda marukumbati eJerikho akawa pashi, sure kwokutendererwa mazuva manomwe." 
Hebrews11:31 Ngokugonda Rahabhi chifebi aazi kufa pamwepo naavo vaiya vasikapurutani, ngokuti waiya aashira vadongoreri ngokunyarara." 
Hebrews11:32 Chiinyi chimweni chendingaronza? Ngokuti mukuwo unozondiperera kudai ndechironza ndiGidheoni, Bharaki, Samusoni, Jefetha, Dhavhidha, Samueri nevaprofeti," 
Hebrews11:33 avo kubudikidza ngokugonda vakanyisa umambo, vakashanda zvakarurama, vakahanira zvigondiso, vakakonya miromo yemhondoro," 
Hebrews11:34 vakadzima mirazvu yomuriro waibaka, vakapokonyoka kubva kushoti dzaipinza, pakurembaremba vakagwinyiswa, vakaita vanesimba guru mukurwa, vakadzinga hondo dzemadzinza." 
Hebrews11:35 Vakadzi vakapuwa vakafa vavo vamuswa. Vamweni vakarwadziswa, vechiramba kuashira kununurirwa, kuti vahanire kumuka kwakapinda kunaka." 
Hebrews11:36 Vamweni vakaedzwa ngokuitirwe jee nokushwapurwa, kunyazwi vakasungwa ngemaketani nokukonyerwa mutirongo." 
Hebrews11:37 Vakapondwa ngemapuwe, vakaadzwa ngepakati ngesaho, vakaurawa ngeshoti. Vakahamba vakasimira matoo emakwai neembudzi, vechitama, vechitambudzwa, vechiitirwa zvakashata;" 
Hebrews11:38 (avo nyika aizi kuvasisira,) vechipepesheka mumashango nomumitunhu, mumapako nomumabani enyika." 
Hebrews11:39 Naava veshe kunyazwi vakapupurirwa ngokugonda kwavo, avazi kuashira icho chakagondiswa." 
Hebrews11:40 Mwari waiya akatinasirira chiro chimweni chakapinda kunaka, kuti ngokubanze kwedu ivo vasazoita vakaperera." 
Hebrews12:1 Ndizvo kwechioneka kuti isusu takatendenedzwa ngegore guru rembungano yakadaro yevanopupura, ngatirashe zveshe zvinodzimbira nokushaisha kunotibatirira, ngatirumbe ngokusengerera mujaho wakaemeswa pamberi pedu," 
Hebrews12:2 techiringira kunaJesu, muambi nomupedzi wokugonda kwedu, uwo ngendaa yokudakara kwakaiswa pamberi pake, wakashingirira muchinjiko, asikaerengi chimene chawo, wakagara pashi ngokumudyo kwedendemaro raMwari." 
Hebrews12:3 Pinimidzai ndiye wakashingirira pachake kurwisa kwakadaro kunobva kuvashaishi vanomukira, kuti musazoremba nokuti kudemera mumweya yenyu." 
Hebrews12:4 Mukurwisana kwenyu nokushaisha imwimwi amusati mwarwa metsa kuguma pakubomha ngazi. 
Hebrews12:5 Nemwi mwakariyarwa kupotwa kunonyengerera kwakaitwa kwomuri kudai ngokuvana, “Mwana wangu, usashoora kupanga kwaMambo nokuti kudemera apo wechiororwa ndiye;" 
Hebrews12:6 ngokuti uwo waanoda Mambo unomuorora nokushwapura mukororo weshe waanoashira.” 
Hebrews12:7 Shingirirai kuororwa. Mwari unomubata kudai ngevana; ngokuti uri pari mwana usikaororwi ndibaba ake? 
Hebrews12:8 Asi kuti musikaororwi, kudai ngevana veshe, zvino muri mibvandirimwo, amuri vana vakepi." 
Hebrews12:9 Ngepabanze peizvi, taiya nemadzibaba edu ngokwenyama aitiorora, nesu takavaremeredza. Atingapindi kuda kudzipfaisa kwakapindisisa kukuru kunaBaba emweya kuti tipone here?" 
Hebrews12:10 Ngokuti ngegwinyiso avo vakatiorora mazuva mashomani, kudai ngezvezvaioneka zvakanaka kwavari, asi unotiorora kuti tidetserwe, kuti tikoanisirane kuchena kwake." 
Hebrews12:11 Kweshe kuororwa akudakadzi zvinopano, asi kunochemedza, asi ngesure kunobara michero mukunyarara yokururama kwavari vakadzidziswa." 
Hebrews12:12 Ndizvo mirudzai nyara dzenyu dzakarembaremba nokugwinyisa mabvi enyu asina simba," 
Hebrews12:13 munasire njira dzakarurama dzetsoka dzenyu, kuti icho chakaremara chisazoguduguka, asi kuti chiponeswe." 
Hebrews12:14 Tsvakai kugarisana ngokunyarara nevanhu veshe nokuita vakacheneswa, ngokuti pasina izvi apana munhu ungazoona Mambo." 
Hebrews12:15 Mwechingwarira kuti kusazoapo naumwe unokorera kuashira nyasha dzaMwari, kuti rusazoapo runzinde rwokuvava runomera, runounza kutambudza, nokubudikidza ndirwo vazhinji vaitwe vakasvipiswa." 
Hebrews12:16 Wonai kuti kusaapo naumwe wakadai ndiIsau, muombi nousikatyi Mwari, uwo wakatengesa nhaka youtangwe hwake kuti apuwe tsima imwe yechokudya." 
Hebrews12:17 Ngokuti munozia kuti ngesure kwazvo, naapo paakadisisa kuti agare nhaka yechifumiso, wakarambwa, ngokuti aazi kuona nguva yokutenderuka, kunyazwi akanyaitsvakisisa ngokuchema." 
Hebrews12:18 Ngokuti imwimwi amuzikuuya kuchiro chingagwamwa, muriro unobaka nechidima nokusvipa nomubvumo," 
Hebrews12:19 nokuridzwa kwegwama nemaungira emazwi, izwi iro maungira aro akaita kuti avo vakarizwa vakapota kuti izwi rimweni risachazoereketwa kwavari." 
Hebrews12:20 Ngokuti avazi kukona kushingirira izvo zvakapangwa, “Kudai kunyazwi mhuka yaigwama mutunhu, yaizopondwa kufa ngemapuwe.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Ngegwinyiso zvakaoneka zvechityisa yaamho, kuti Mosi wakati, “Ndinohuta kakurutu ngokutya.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Asi imwimwi mwauya kuMutunhu weZioni nokudhorobha raMwari unopona, Jerusarema romudenga, nokuhondo dzengirosi dzisikaerengeki mumushongano wedhiri" 
Hebrews12:23 nokumushongano wematangwe awo akanyorwa mudenga, nokunaMwari Mutongi wavo veshe, nokumweya yevanhu vakarurama vakaitwa vakaperera," 
Hebrews12:24 nokunaJesu, muemereri wechitenderano chitsva, nokungazi yokufafazwa, inoereketa zvakanaka kupinda ngazi yaAbhera." 
Hebrews12:25 Ngwarai kuti musaramba uwo unoereketa; ngokuti kudai vasikazi kupokonyoka avo vakaramba uwo wakavapanga munyika muno, isusu tinozoita mapokonyokerenyi, kuti techiramba uwo unotipanga echibva mudenga!" 
Hebrews12:26 Panguvayo izwi rake rakazungunyisa nyika; asi zvino wakagondisa echiti, “Ndichazozungunyisazve kamwe, haiwa nyika yega, asi nedenga naro.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Izwi iri rokuti, “Ndichazozungunyisazve kamwe,” rinoronza kubviswa kweizvo zvinozungunyika, kuronza kuti zviri zvakaitwa, kuti izvo zvisikazungunyiswi zvisare." 
Hebrews12:28 Ndizvo ngatibonge, ngokuti tinoashira umambo husikazungunyiswi, ndizvo ngatidire Mwari ngenjira inomudakadza nokuremeredza nokutya;" 
Hebrews12:29 ngokuti ngegwinyiso Mwari wedu muriro unoparadza. 
Hebrews13:1 Rudo pakati pehama ngarugare. 
Hebrews13:2 Musariyarwa kuonisa rudo kuvahambi, ngokuti ngokuita kudaro vamweni vakaashira ngirosi vasikazii." 
Hebrews13:3 Karakadzai vakasungwa, mwechiita kudai ngevakasungwa pamwepo navo, naavo vanoitirwa zvakashata, kudai ngevanoitirwa pamwepo navo." 
Hebrews13:4 Kuroora ngakuremeredzwe ngevanhu veshe, nomubhedhi wakwo auzi kusvipiswa; ngokuti Mwari unozotonga zvifebi nevaombi." 
Hebrews13:5 Kupona kwenyu ngakuite kusikakariri mare, itai vanogutiswa ngeizvo zvomunazvo; ngokuti wakati, “Anditongokurekeri nokuti kukusiya.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Ndizvo ngokutsunga tingakona kuronza kuti, “Mambo Mwari mudetseri wangu; andizotyi. Munhu ungazoitenyi kwendiri?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Karakadzai vatungamiriri venyu, avo vakaereketa kwomuri izwi raMwari; mwechipinimidza ngemagumo okupona kwavo, muedzerere kugonda kwavo." 
Hebrews13:8 Jesu Kristu unogara akadaro zuro nanyamashi, eya, mhera nariini." 
Hebrews13:9 Musapauswa ngezvidzidziso zvakaparadzana nezvisikaziikanwi; ngokuti kwakanaka kuti mwoyo igwinyiswe ngenyasha, haiwa ngezvokudya, izvo zvevasikazi kudetserwa ndizvo avo vakahamba mwezviri." 
Hebrews13:10 Tine arita isusu revasikatenderwi kudya kubva kweriri avo vanoita mushando mutende. 
Hebrews13:11 Ngokuti miiri yemhuka dzine ngazi inounzwa kundau yakachena ngomupristi mukuru kuita mudiro wokushaisha, inopishwa kubanze kwekamba." 
Hebrews13:12 Ndizvo Jesu wakatambudzikawo kubanze kwomusiwo wedhorobha, kuitira kuti achenese vanhu kubudikidza ngengazi yake." 
Hebrews13:13 Ndizvo ngatibude tiende kwaari kubanze kwekamba, titware kutsverudzwa kwake." 
Hebrews13:14 Ngokuti munyika muno atina dhorobha rinogara, asi tinotsvaka dhorobha iro rinouya." 
Hebrews13:15 Kubudikidza ndiye, zvino, ngatiangire kupira mudiro wokukudza kunaMwari, kuronza kuti, kupira michero yemiromo yedu inopupura ngezina rake." 
Hebrews13:16 Asi musariyarwa kuita zvakanaka nokukoana zvomunazvo. Ngokuti Mwari unonasa kudakadzwa ngemidiro yakadaro. 
Hebrews13:17 Purutanai vatungamiriri venyu nokuvapfaira. Ngokuti ivo vanogara vakarinda mweya yenyu, navo vanozobvunziswa ngendaa yenyu. Ngavaite izvi ngokudakara, haiwa ngokutambudzika, ngokuti izvi zvingazomuremadza." 
Hebrews13:18 Tikumbirirenyi; ngokuti tinozia kuti tine mhumba isina ndaa, tinoemurira kuhamba takagondeka muzviro zveshe." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndinomupota kuti muite izvi, kakurutu kuti ndipetudzwe kwomuri ngokukasira." 
Hebrews13:20 Zvino Mwari wokunyarara, uwo wakaunzazve kubva kwevakafa Mambo wedu Jesu, muushi mukuru wemakwai ngengazi yechitenderano chisikaperi," 
Hebrews13:21 ngaamuchenese kuzviro zveshe zvakanaka, kuti muite kuda kwake, echishanda pakati pedu izvo zvinonasa kumudakadza pamberi pake, kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu, kwaari ngahugare huripo uthende mhera nariini nariini. Ameni." 
Hebrews13:22 Ndinomupota, hama, sengererai izwi rangu rokupanga, ngokuti ndakanyora kwomuri ngemazwi mashomani." 
Hebrews13:23 Ndinoda kuti muzie kuti hama yedu Thimothi wakasunhurwa kubva mutirongo; kuti iye akakasira kuuya, ndinozouya pamwepo naye apo ndouya koomuona." 
Hebrews13:24 Tambisai veshe vatungamiriri venyu nevakacheneswa veshe. Avo vakabva Itaria vanomutambisa. 
Hebrews13:25 Nyasha ngadzigare nemwi mweshe. 
James1:1 Jakobe, muranda waMwari nowaMambo Jesu Kristu, ndinonyorera kumadzinza gumi namairi akapararira, ndinomuchingamidza." 
James1:2 Hama dzangu, naapo mwogumirwa ngokuedzwa kwembeu zhinji, musakuerenga kuita chiro asi kudakara," 
James1:3 ngokuti munozia kuti kuedzwa kwokugonda kwenyu kunobara kusengerera; 
James1:4 asi kusengerera ngakuanomushando wakaperera, kuti muite vakaperera vabva muzero, musikatami chiro." 
James1:5 Kudai aripo umwe wenyu unotama ungwaru, ngaakumbire kuna Mwari, uwo unopa kunevanhu veshe ngokuwanzisa, asikakaraidzi, kunozopuwa kwaari." 
James1:6 Asi ngaakumbire ngokugonda, asikagonondi, ngokuti uwo unogononda wakadai ngefungu roruandhle, rinosundwa ngedutu nokukandirwa apo naapo." 
James1:7 Uwo munhu asakarira kuti unozoashira chiro kubva kunaMambo; 
James1:8 munhu unemipinimidzo miiri unotsanduka-tsanduka munjira dzake dzeshe. 
James1:9 Asi hama iri pashi ngaidakare ngokukudzwa kwayo," 
James1:10 negurudza ngaridakare ngokupfaiswa kwaro, ngokuti gurudza rinozopinda kudai ngeruva romwenje." 
James1:11 Ngokuti zuva rinobuda pamwepo nokupisha kwaro, rinoomesa mwenje; neruva rawo rinowa pashi, nounaku hwaro hunopera. Ndizvo zvinoita gurudza; rinozonyangarika munjira dzaro." 
James1:12 Unomuchena munhuwo unoshingirira mukuedzwa. Ngokuti apo aedzwa unozoashira dzungudza rokupona rakagondiswa kwavari vanomuda. 
James1:13 Munhu apo aedzwa asaronza kuti, “Ndinoedzwa ndiMwari;” ngokuti Mwari aangakoni kuedzwa ngezvakashata, zve, aaedzi munhu kunyazwi ngouri." 
James1:14 Asi munhu weshe unoedzwa apo ookweyiwa ngokuemura kwake nokunyengererwa; 
James1:15 ndizvo apo kuemura kwamera mimba, kunobara kushaisha, nokushaisha apo kwakura, kunobara rufu." 
James1:16 Musachengedzerwa, hama dzangu dzinodikanwa." 
James1:17 Zvipo zveshe zvakanaka, nezvipo zveshe zvakaperera, zvinobva mudenga, zvechidzaka kubva kunaBaba vokujeka, kwaari akuna kutsanduka nokuti kabvuri kokukunukuka." 
James1:18 Ngokuda kwake iye wakatibara ngeizwi regwinyiso, kuti tiite kudai ngemichero yokutanga yezvakasikwa zvake." 
James1:19 Munosisira kuzwisisa izvi, hama dzangu dzinodikanwa: munhu weshe ngaakasire kuzwa, anonoke kuereketa, anonoke kunyangadzwa;" 
James1:20 ngokuti kunyangadzwa kwomunhu akushandi kururama kwaMwari. 
James1:21 Ndizvo mwechirasha tsvina yeshe nokushata kunofashukira, muashire ngokupfaa izwi rakasimwa, rine simba rokuponesa mweya yenyu." 
James1:22 Asi itai vaiti veizwi, haiwa vanozwa kwega mwechidzichengedzera." 
James1:23 Ngokuti kudai munhu ari muzwi weizwi, asiri muiti waro, uyu wakadai ngomunhu unoringira hope yake yechibarirwe muchiboniboni;" 
James1:24 ngokuti unodziona pachake, orooenda, paripo unoriyarwa chiemo chaanacho kuti chakaitawani." 
James1:25 Asi uwo unoringira mupango wakaperera wokusunhurika, echiangira kudaro, asikaiti unozwa echiriyarwa, asi muiti womushando, uyu munhu unozofumiswa muzviito zvake." 
James1:26 Kudai aripo munhu unokarakadza kuti mudiri, naye asikakoni kubata rurumi rwake, asi unochengedzera mwoyo wake, kudira kwake munhu uyu akuna shwiro." 
James1:27 Kudira kwakaperera nokusikazi kusvipiswa pamberi paMwari wedu naBaba ndikwo uku, kuhambira nherera neshirikadzi mukutambudzika kwavo, nokudzingwarira kuti asasvipiswa ngezvenyika." 
James2:1 Hama dzangu, imwimwi nokuita kwenyu kunomukheto munotenda kuna Jesu Kristu, Mambo wedu wouthende here?" 
James2:2 Ngokuti kudai munhu unendandazi yomukore, naye akasimira zvakanaka echipotera mumhatso yenyu yokudira, munhu murombo unezvokusimira zvine tsvina echipoterawomwo," 
James2:3 nemwi kudai mwechiremeredza uwo unosimira zvokufuka zvakanaka mwechiti, “Gara pano pandau yakanaka,” mwechiti kumurombo, “Ema apo,” nokuti, “Gara pashi pechitambarariro chetsoka dzangu,”" 
James2:4 ngokuita kudaro amuzikuita mukheto pakati penyu nokuita vatongi vemipinimidzo yakashata here? 
James2:5 Purutanai, hama dzangu dzinodikanwa. Mwari aazi kukheta varombo munyika kuti vaite makurudza okugonda nevanogara nhaka youmambo uhwo hwaakagondisa kwavari vanomuda here?" 
James2:6 Asi imwimwi amuzi kuremeredza murombo. Andivopi makurudza anomutambudza here? Andivopi vanomukweya kuenda pazvigaro zvokutongwa here? 
James2:7 Andivopi vanotuka zina rinoremeredzeka romunodaidzwa ndiro here? 
James2:8 Asi kudai mwechizadzisa mupango woumambo kudai ngezvakanyorwa kuti, “Unozomuda muakirwana wako kudai ngezvounodzida iwewe pachako”, munoita zvakanaka." 
James2:9 Asi kudai mwechiita vanomukheto kuvanhu, munoshaisha mwechiitirwa ndaa ngeMipango kuti muri vapauki." 
James2:10 Ngokuti kunyazwi ndiani unozongwarira Mipango yeshe, asi echipumhunwa ngorupande rumwe, iye waita unendaa kweiri yeshe." 
James2:11 Ngokuti uwo wakati, “Usazoomba,” wakatizve, “Usazouraya.” Zvino kudai usikaombi, asi wechiuraya, waita mupauki weMipango." 
James2:12 Mwechiereketa nokuita kudai ngevanozotongwa ngeMipango yokusunhurika. 
James2:13 Ngokuti kutonga akuzoiti nyasha kwaari usikazi kuonisa nyasha. Nyasha dzinodziganzisa dzechinyisa pakutonga! 
James2:14 Kunodetserenyi, hama dzangu, kudai munhu echironza kuti unokugonda, asi asina mishando? Kugonda ukwo kungamuponesa here?" 
James2:15 Kudai hama mwamuna nokuti mukadzi ari mutitinini, echitama zvokudya zvezuva ngezuva," 
James2:16 noumwe wenyu echiti kwaari, “Endai mukunyarara, mwechiita vanodziirwa nokugutiswa,” asi musikavapi zvinotamika kumuiri, kunodetserenyi?" 
James2:17 Ndizvo kugonda kwega, kuti kusina mishando, kwakafa." 
James2:18 Asi umweni unozoti, “Iwewe unokugonda, neni ndine mishando. Ndionise kugonda kwako kusina mishando, neni ndinozokuonisa kugonda kwangu ngemishando yangu.”" 
James2:19 Unotenda iwewe kuti Mwari ndiumwe; unoita zvakanaka. Kunyazwi namadhimoni anotendawo nokuhuta. 
James2:20 Unoda kuoniswa here, iwewe munhu usina shwiro, kuti kugonda kusina mishando kwakafa?" 
James2:21 Abrahama, baba edu, avazi kupembedzwa here ngemishando, apo pevakapira Isaka mukororo wavo kuita mudiro paarita?" 
James2:22 Unoona kuti kugonda kwakashanda pamwepo nemishando yake, nokugonda kwakaitwa kwakaperera ngemishando." 
James2:23 Nechinyorwa chakazadzisika chinoti, “Abrahama wakagonda Mwari, nakwo kwakaerengerwa kwaari kuti kururama,” naye wakadaidzwa kuti ishamwari yaMwari." 
James2:24 Munoona kuti munhu unopembedzwa ngemishando, haiwa ngokugonda kwega." 
James2:25 Ngokudaro, Rahabhi chifebi aazi kupembedzwa here ngemishando, apo paakaashira vatumwa nokuvatizisa ngenjira imweni?" 
James2:26 Ngokuti kudai ngomuiri usina mweya wakafa, ndizvo kugonda kusina mishando kwakafawo." 
James3:1 Hama dzangu, musaita vadzidzisi vazhinji, mwechizia kuti tinozoashira kutongwa kwakapinda kurema." 
James3:2 Ngokuti isusu teshe tinoshaisha ngezviro zvakawanda. Kudai aripo usikashaishi pamazwi, ndiye munhu wakaperera, unokona kubata muiri weshe nawo." 
James3:3 Zvino kudai techiisa mikhayo mumiromo yemahachi, kuti atipurutane, tinotungamirira muiri wawo weshe." 
James3:4 Ringirai ngarava, kunyazwi dzakanyakura kudini, dzinohambiswa ngedutu rine simba, dzinotenderudzwa ngechikombe apo paanoda muhambisi wengarava kuti aende." 
James3:5 Ndizvo rurumi inhengo doodoko, narwo runoganza zvakakura. Wonai kukura kwakaita gwasha rinopishwa ngomuriro wakatsonga!" 
James3:6 Rurumi muriro. Rurumi inyika yakazara ngokushata pakati penhengo dzedu; runosvipisa muiri weshe, runopisha njira yeshe yokupona, narwo runopishwa pacharwo ngomuriro weGehena." 
James3:7 Ngokuti mbeu dzeshe dzezvikara nedzeshiri nedzezvinotamanda nezviri muruandhle zvinopeteka, nazvo zvakapetwa ngevanhu," 
James3:8 asi apana munhu ungapeta rurumi, ndirwo chiro chakashata chisikapeteki, chakazara ngoukaira unouraya." 
James3:9 Ndirwo tinokudza Mambo naBaba, ndirwozve tinotuka vanhu vakasikwa ngomutodzaniso waMwari." 
James3:10 Kubva pamuromo umwewo panobuda kubonga nokutuka. Hama dzangu, azvisisiri kuti izvi zviitike kudaro." 
James3:11 Chinyuka chinobudisa here ngomuromo umwe mvura inotapira neinovava? 
James3:12 Hama dzangu, muonde ungabereka here maorivhi, nokuti muvhini ungabereka here maonde? Zve, mvura inemunyu aingakoni kubudisa inotapira." 
James3:13 Ndiani wakangwara nounozwisisa pakati penyu? Ngaaonise ngokupona kwake kwakanaka mishando yake mukupfaa kwoungwaru. 
James3:14 Asi kuti munendurumwa inovava nokudisisa kwakashata mumwoyo mwenyu, musaganza, musanyepera gwinyiso." 
James3:15 Ungwaru hwakadaro andihwopi hunobva mudenga, asi ngohwomunyika, husina mweya, ngehwemadhimoni." 
James3:16 Ngokuti apo pane ndurumwa nokudisisa kwakashata, paripozve kukangaidzwa nezviito zveshe zvakashata." 
James3:17 Asi ungwaru hunobva mudenga kutanga hwakaperera, zve, hunokunyarara, hwakapfaa, hunoreruka kupotwa, hwakazara ngenyasha nemichero yakanaka, husina mukheto, husina kudziitisa." 
James3:18 Nemichero yokururama inokushwa mukunyarara ngaavo vanoita kunyarara. 
James4:1 Kunobva pari kuambana nehasha pakati penyu? Azvibvi kuzvidisiso zvokuemura kwenyu zvinorwisana munhengo dzenyu here? 
James4:2 Munoemura chiro nemwi musina; ndizvo munouraya. Munoemura chiro nemwi musikakoni kuchihanira; ndizvo munoambana nokurwisana. Amuna, ngokuti amukumbiri." 
James4:3 Munokumbira musikaashiri, ngokuti munoshaisha kukumbira, kuti muzvishandise muzvidisiso zvenyu zvokuemura." 
James4:4 Imwimwi vaombi! Amuzii here kuti ukama nenyika ugaa naMwari? Ndizvo kunyazwi ndiani unoda kuita ukama nenyika, unodziita gaa raMwari." 
James4:5 Munopinimidza here kuti zvinyorwa zvinoereketa zviro zvisina shwiro zvinoti, “Mweya wakaita kuti ugare mukati mwedu unoshuwira ndurumwa here?”" 
James4:6 Asi unopinda kutipa nyasha dzakawanda; ndizvo zvinoti, “Mwari unorwisana nevanodzikudza, asi unoitira nyasha kunevakapfaa.”" 
James4:7 Ndizvo dzipfaisei pashi paMwari. Irwai naDhiabhorosi, naye unozomutiza." 
James4:8 Kwedzerai pasinde naMwari, naye unozokwedzera pasinde kwomuri. Shambai nyara dzenyu, imwimwi vashaishi, muchenese mwoyo yenyu imwimwi munemipinimidzo miiri." 
James4:9 Boorerai, tsumbai nokuchema. Kusheka kwenyu ngakutsanduke kuita kutsumba, nokudakara kwenyu kuita kudzimbirwa." 
James4:10 Dzipfaisei pamberi paMambo naye unozomukurisa. 
James4:11 Hama, musareyana. Kunyazwi ndiani unoreya umweni, nokuti kutonga umweni wake, unoereketa kurwisana neMipango, naye unotonga Mipango. Asi kudai wechitonga Mipango, auri muiti weMipangopi, asi mutongi." 
James4:12 Umwe ega uri mupi weMipango nomutongi, uwo unesimba rokuponesa nokuparadza. Asi iwewe urianani unotonga muakirwana wako?" 
James4:13 Uyai zvino, imwimwi munoti, “Nyamashi nokuti mangwani tinozoenda kudhorobha rakatikuti, tipedze gore tiriyo, techitengesa tione zvokuuyirwa ndizvo.”" 
James4:14 Imwimwi amuzii zvinozoitika nechimangwani. Chiinyi kupona kwenyu? Ngokuti muri mhute inooneka mukuwo mudoodoko, naapo inoparara." 
James4:15 Ngokuti mwaisisira kuronza kuti, “Kudai Mambo echizotenda, tinozorarama nokuita ichi nokuti icho.”" 
James4:16 Asi zvino munodziganzisa mukudzikudza kwenyu. Kweshe kudziganzisa kwakadaro kwakashata. 
James4:17 Weshe, zvino, unozia kuita zvakanaka naye asikazviiti, kwaaari kushaisha." 
James5:1 Uyai zvino, imwimwi makurudza, mucheme nokuboorera ngamadambudziko anozouya padera penyu." 
James5:2 Upfumi hwenyu hwaora nezvokufuka zvenyu zvadyiwa ngounundu. 
James5:3 Mukore wenyu nesirivha yenyu zvaane chinguraurwe, nechinguraurwe chazvo chinozoita chapupu chokumuitira ndaa, nacho chinozodya nyama yenyu kudai ngomuriro. Mwakadziunganidzira upfumi hwenyu mumazuva okugumisira." 
James5:4 Ringira musharo wevashandi avo vakacheka minda yenyu, wemwakasara nawo musikazi kubhadhara ngourimbwi, unodaidzira nokudaidzira kwaavo vakacheka kwakazwika munzee dzaMambo wehondo." 
James5:5 Mwakararama munyika mukushadaya nomukudakara; mwakakodza mwoyo yenyu ngezuva rokuuraya. 
James5:6 Mwakamurasha nokumuuraya uwo wakarurama, uwo usikarwisani nemwi." 
James5:7 Ndizvo sengererai, hama, metsa kuuya kwaMambo. Wonai murimi unogarira michero inomutengo mukuru yenyika, echisengerera, metsa iashire mvura yokuamba neyokugumisira." 
James5:8 Nemwiwo itai vanosengerera kudaro. Tsimisai mwoyo yenyu, ngokuti kuuya kwaMambo kwaapasinde." 
James5:9 Hama, musavhuruvhutirana umwe kunoumweni, kuti musazotongwa. Ringirai mutongi unoema pamisiwo!" 
James5:10 Hama, kudai ngechionero chokutambudzika nokusengerera, ashirai vaprofeti vakaereketa ngezina raMambo." 
James5:11 Ngegwinyiso tinoti vanomuchena avo vakasengerera. Mwakazwa ngokusengerera kwaJobe, mwakaona kupedzisira kwaMambo, kuti Mambo wakazara ngokukungurira nenyasha." 
James5:12 Asi kupinda zveshe, hama dzangu, musazopika, kunyazwi ngedenga nokuti ngenyika nokuti ngokupika kumweni, asi itai kuti, “Eya” wenyu aite eya, na “Haiwa” wenyu aite haiwa, kuti musapinda mukutongwa." 
James5:13 Uripo here pakati penyu unotambudzika? Ngaakumbire. Uripo here pakati penyu unodakara? Ngaaembe nduyo yokukudza. 
James5:14 Uripo here pakati penyu unorwara? Ngaadaidze vakuru vechiara, ngavamukumbirire, vechimudzodza ngemafuta ngezina raMambo." 
James5:15 Mukumbiro wokugonda unozoponesa unorwara, naMambo unozomumusa; kudai akaita zvishaishi, zvinozorekererwa kwaari." 
James5:16 Ndizvo reurirai zvishaishi zvenyu umwe kunoumweni, mukumbirirane umwe kunoumweni, kuti mutambiswe. Mukumbiro womunhu wakarurama une simba guru mukushanda kwawo." 
James5:17 Erija waiya munhu ngechibarirwe waiya akadai tisu, naye wakakumbira kakurutu kuti isazonaya, akuzi kunaya makore matatu nemwedzi mitanhatu." 
James5:18 Wakakumbirazve, nedenga rakanayisa mvura nenyika yakabereka michero yayo." 
James5:19 Hama dzangu, kudai aripo pakati penyu unopauka kubva kugwinyiso noumwe echimutenderudza," 
James5:20 munosisira kuzia kuti kunyazwi ndiani unotenderudza mushaishi kubva mukupauka kwake, unozoponesa mweya womushaishi kubva murufu, naye unozofukidza zvishaishi zvakawanda." 
1Peter1:1 Petro, mupostori waJesu Kristu, ndinonyorere kwavari vakatsanangurwa vari zvigarandimo, vakapararira muPontusi, Garatia, Khapadhosia, Asia neBhithinia," 
1Peter1:2 kudai ngokuzia karetu kwaMwari Baba, mukucheneswa kwoMweya, kuti vapurutane kunaJesu Kristu, nokufafazirwa ngengazi yake. Nyasha nokunyarara ngazviwanzwe kwomuri." 
1Peter1:3 Ngaakudzwe Mwari, Baba aMambo wedu Jesu Kristu! Uwo ngenyasha dzake huru wakatibarazve kuti tianegonda rinopona kubudikidza ngokumuka kwaJesu Kristu kubva kwevakafa," 
1Peter1:4 kuti tianenhaka isikaori, isikasvipiswi, isikanyangariki, yakangwaririrwa imwimwi mudenga," 
1Peter1:5 imwimwi munongwarirwa ngesimba raMwari kubudikidza ngokugonda kuti muano ruponeso rwakanasirirwa kuti ruzooniswa ngomukuwo wokugumisira. 
1Peter1:6 Muizvi munodakara kakurutu, kunyazwi zvino kwomukuwo mudoko, kudai zvechisisira, mwakatambudzwa ngezviedzo zvembeu zhinji," 
1Peter1:7 kuti kuedzwa kwokugonda kwenyu, kunomutengo mukuru kupinda mukore unopera kunyazwi wechipera unoedzwa ngomuriro, kungaoneka kwechiita kukudza nouthende nokuremeredza ngenguva yokuoneka kwaJesu Kristu." 
1Peter1:8 Kunyazwi amuzi kumuona munomuda; kwaari kunyazwi zvino amumuoni, asi munomutenda nokudakara ngokudakara kusikabviri kuti kuereketwe kwakazara ngouthende," 
1Peter1:9 ngokuti munoashira chomunovavarira mukugonda kwenyu, chiri ruponeso rwomweya yenyu." 
1Peter1:10 Ngendaa yourwu ruponeso vaprofeti avo, vakaprofeta ngenyasha idzo dzemwaizoitirwa, vakanasa kutsvakisisa," 
1Peter1:11 vechitsvaka ngendaa yomunhu nokuti nguva iyo yakaronzwa, ngoMweya waKristu waigara mukati mwavo, apo pewakapupura ngekaretu ngemadambudziko aKristu nouthende hwaizoteera." 
1Peter1:12 Kwavari zvakaoniswa kuti avasaidzishandira, asi imwimwi muzviro izvo, zvakaronzwa kwomuri kubudikidza ngaavo vakachumaira vhangeri kwomuri ndiMweya Wakachena wakatumwa kubva mudenga, izvo zviro ngirosi dzinoda kuzvizwisisa!" 
1Peter1:13 Ndizvo sungai zviunu zvemipinimidzo yenyu, itai vakangwara; muemese reshe gonda renyu kunyasha dzinounzwa kwomuri pakuoneka kwaKristu Jesu." 
1Peter1:14 Kudai ngevana vanopurutana, musadzitodzanise nokuemura kwenyu kwokutanga kwenguva yokusikazia kwenyu." 
1Peter1:15 Asi kudai ngouwo wakamudaidza wakachena, ngokudaro imwimwiwo itai vakacheneswa mukupona kwenyu kweshe;" 
1Peter1:16 ngokuti kwakanyorwa kuti, “Munozoita vakacheneswa, ngokuti inini ndakachena.”" 
1Peter1:17 Kudai mwechimudaidza kuti Baba, uwo unotonga vanhu veshe asina mukheto kudai ngomushando womunhu umwe ngaumwe, ponai mukuwo wouchigarandimo hwenyu mukutya." 
1Peter1:18 Imwimwi munozia kuti amuzi kuripirwa ngezviro zvinoora, kudai ngesirivha nomukore, kubva kunjira isina shwiro yokupona kwenyu yomwakasiirwa ngemadzibaba enyu," 
1Peter1:19 asi mwakaripirwa ngengazi yaKristu ino mutengo mukuru, kudai ngeyegwai risina gotsa nokuti cheringapomerwa." 
1Peter1:20 Uwo ngegwinyiso wakaziikanwa nyika isati yaemeswa, asi wakaoniswa ngendaa yenyu mukugumisira kwenguva." 
1Peter1:21 Kubudikidza ndiye imwimwi munogonda kunaMwari, uwo wakamumusa kubva kwavakafa, akamupa uthende, kuti kugonda kwenyu nokutenda kwenyu zviemeswe pana Mwari." 
1Peter1:22 Zvino mwakachenesa mweya yenyu mukupurutana gwinyiso kuti muite rudo rusikadziitisi, mudanane umwe noumweni ngomwoyo wakasukika kakurutu." 
1Peter1:23 Imwimwi mwakabarwazve patsva, haiwa ngembeu inoora, asi ngeisikaori, kubudikidza ngeizwi raMwari rinopona mhera nariini." 
1Peter1:24 Ngokuti “Nyama yeshe yakadai ngomwenje, nouthende hwayo hweshe hwakadai ngeruva romwenje. Mwenje unozeketera neruva rinowa pashi." 
1Peter1:25 Asi izwi raMwari rinondogara mhera nariini.” Izwi iro ndiro vhangeri rakachumairwa kwomuri. 
1Peter2:1 Ndizvo mwechirasha kweshe kushata, kuchengedzera kweshe, kudziitisa, ndurumwa nokuereketa kweshe kwakashata," 
1Peter2:2 kudai ngevana vatsva vachaamba kuberekwa, disisai mukaka woMweya usina kuchengedzera, kuti mukure ndiwo, muponeswe," 
1Peter2:3 ngokuti mwakaraira kuti Mambo unenyasha. 
1Peter2:4 Uyai kwaari, ndiye buwe rinopona, ngegwinyiso rakarambwa ngevanhu, asi rakatsanangurwa ndiMwari rinomutengo mukuru pamberi pake." 
1Peter2:5 Imwimwiwo mwakadai ngemapuwe anopona, mwakaakiwa kuita mhatso yoMweya, kuita upristi hwakachena, kupira midiro yoMweya, inoashirika kunaMwari kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu." 
1Peter2:6 Ngokuti zvirimwo muzvinyorwa zvinoti, “Ringirai, ndinoradzika muZioni buwe, buwe repakhona rakatsanangurwa, rino mutengo mukuru; nouwo unotenda kwaari aazotsverudzwi.”" 
1Peter2:7 Kwomuri zvino imwimwi munotenda, unoremeredzeka; asi kwavari vasikatendi, “Buwe rakarambwa ngevaaki ndiro rakaita soro repakhona,”" 
1Peter2:8 zve, “Ibuwe rinoita kuti vapumhunwe, nebuwe rinoita kuti vawe.” Vanopumhunwa ngokuti avapurutani izwi, kudai ngezvevakaemeserwa kuita." 
1Peter2:9 Asi imwimwi muri dzinza rakatsanangurwa, muri voupristi hwoumambo, dzinza rakachena, vanhu vaMwari vaakadzionera, kuti muchumaire ngemishando inesimba yaakaita uwo wakamudaidza kubva muchidima, kuti mupotere mukujeka kwake kunoshamisa." 
1Peter2:10 Imwimwi ngomukuwo wakapinda mwaiya musiri vanhu, asi zvino muri vanhu vaMwari; avo vaiya vasikazi kuashira nyasha, asi zvino mwaashira nyasha." 
1Peter2:11 Vanodikanwa, ndinomupota kudai ngezvomuri zvigarandimo nevahambi kuti murekere kuita kuemura kwenyama kunorwa hondo nomweya." 
1Peter2:12 Mudzibate ngokuremeredzeka kunosisira pakati pevemadzinza, kuti kuneizvo zvevanomureya ndizvo, kudai ngevaiti vakashata, vangaona ngemishando yenyu yakanaka, vakudze Mwari apo paanouya kootonga." 
1Peter2:13 Pfairai mipango yeshe yevanhu ngendaa yaMambo, kunyazwi ngeyamambo, uri mukuru," 
1Peter2:14 nokuti kuvatongi, vakatumwa ndiye kuunzidzira vanoita zvakashata nokuvakudza avo vanoita zvakanaka." 
1Peter2:15 Ngokuti ndikwo kuda kwaMwari kuti ngokuita zvakanaka munganyaradza kusikazia kwavanhu vano upenzi. 
1Peter2:16 Kudai ngevanhu vaMwari, ponai kudai ngevanhu vakasunhurika, asi musikashandisi kusunhurika kwenyu kuita bhachi rokuita zvakashata." 
1Peter2:17 Remeredzai munhu weshe. Idai hama dzeshe. Ityai Mwari. Remeredzai mambo. 
1Peter2:18 Varanda, pfairai vakuru venyu ngokuremeredza kweshe, haiwa kwavari avo vega vakanaka nevakapfaa, asi nekwavarizve vasikazi kururama." 
1Peter2:19 Ngokuti ichi chinoashirika, kuti munhu ashingirire madambudziko, kuti aanemwoyo wakanaka usina ndaa kunaMwari, echitambudzika pasina nendaa." 
1Peter2:20 Ngokuti mungakudzwa ngenjiranyi, mwechisengerera apo kudai mwechishaisha nokuchaiwa ngendaa yakwo? Asi apo mwechinasa, kudai mwechitambudzwa ngendaa yakwo, mwechisengerera, izvi zvinoashirika kunaMwari." 
1Peter2:21 Ngokuti mwakadaidzwa kuneizvo, ngokuti Kristu wakatambudzikirawo imwimwi, akamusiira chionero kuti muteere muzvitsiko zvake." 
1Peter2:22 Uwo usikazi kushaisha, akuna kuchengedzera kwakaoneka pamuromo wake." 
1Peter2:23 Naapo paakatukwa, aazi kutukawo; naapo atambudzika, aazi kutyisidzira; asi wakadzipira kwaari uwo unotonga ngokururamisa." 
1Peter2:24 Uwo wakatwara emene zvishaishi zvedu mumuiri wake pamuchinjiko, kuti isusu tife mukushaisha, tipone mukururama; kubudikidza ngemaronda ake mwakaponeswa." 
1Peter2:25 Ngokuti mwaiya mwechipepesheka kudai ngemakwai, asi zvino mwapetuka kuMuushi noMungwariri womweya yenyu." 
1Peter3:1 Ngokudaro, imwimwi vakadzi, pfairai vamuna venyu, kuti kunyazwi varipo vamweni vavo vasikapurutani izwi, vangakokwawo pasina izwi ngenjira yevanopona ndiyo vakadzi vavo," 
1Peter3:2 apo pevanoona kucheneswa nokuremeredza mukupona kwenyu. 
1Peter3:3 Musadzinemesa pachenyu ngokunemeswa kwokubanze, kwokuruka bvudzi nokusimira zvinemeso zvomukore nokuti zvokusimira zvakanakisisa;" 
1Peter3:4 asi ngakuite kwomunhu wakafishika womumwoyo, ngezvinemeso zvisikaori zvomweya wakapfaa wakanyarara, uwo unemutengo mukuru mukuona kwaMwari." 
1Peter3:5 Ngokuti ngokudarowo karetu vakadzi vakacheneswa, avo vakagonda kunaMwari, vakadzinemesa ngokupfaira vamuna vavo." 
1Peter3:6 Kudai ndiSara wakapurutana Abrahama, echimudaidza kuti mambo. Mwaita vana vake, apo mwechiita zvakanaka, musikatendi kuti kutyisa kumukarudze." 
1Peter3:7 Ngokudaro imwimwi vamuna, garai nevakadzi venyu kudai ngezvinosisira mwechiremeredza vakadzi kudai ngechidziyo chakarembedzeka, kudaizve ngavanogara nhaka imweyo yenyasha dzokupona, kuti mikumbiro yenyu isazopingaidzwa." 
1Peter3:8 Pakupedzisira, imwimwi mweshe itai vano mwoyo umwewo, vanozwirana urombo, dananai kudai ngehama umwe kunoumweni, mune mwoyo inenyasha nemipinimidzo yakapfaa." 
1Peter3:9 Musaunzidzira zvakashata ngezvakashata nokuti kutuka ngokutuka; asi ngenjira imweni unzidzirai ngechifumiso, ngokuti mwakadaidzwa kuneizvo kuti mugare nhaka yokufumiswa." 
1Peter3:10 Ngokuti, “Uwo unozoda kupona nokuda kuona mazuva akanaka, ngaarambidze rurumi rwake kubva kunezvakashata, nomuromo wake kubva mukuereketa zvinochengedzera;" 
1Peter3:11 ngaafuratire kubva kunezvakashata, aite zvakanaka; ngaatsvake kunyarara akuteere." 
1Peter3:12 Ngokuti madziso aMambo Mwari anoringira padera pevakarurama, nenzee dzake dzinopurutana kumikumbiro yavo. Asi hope yaMambo Mwari inorwa navo vanoita zvakashata.”" 
1Peter3:13 Zvino ndiani ungazomuremadza kudai mwechitsamwirira kuita izvo zvakanaka? 
1Peter3:14 Asi kunyazwi mwechitambudzika ngokuita zvakarurama, munofumiswa. Musatya zvevanotya, zve, musatyisidzirwa," 
1Peter3:15 asi mumwoyo yenyu remeredzai Kristu aite Mambo. Mugare mwakanasirira kupingura munhu weshe unomubvunza ngendaa yegonda riri mukati mwenyu; 
1Peter3:16 asi muite ngokupfaa nokuremeredza, munemwoyo isina ndaa, kuti pane izvo zvevanomureya ndizvo, vangatsverudzwa avo vanotuka njira yenyu yakanaka yokupona munaKristu." 
1Peter3:17 Ngokuti kwakapinda kunaka kutambudzika ngokuita zvakanaka, kudai kutambudzika kuri kuda kwaMwari, pane kutambudzika ngokuita zvakashata." 
1Peter3:18 Ngokuti Kristu wakatambudzikawo kamwe mhera nariini ngendaa yezvishaishi, ari wakarurama ngendaa yevasikazi kururama kuti amuunze kunaMwari. Wakaurawa munyama, asi wakaitwa unopona mumweya," 
1Peter3:19 mwouri wakaenda, akachumairawo kumweya yaiya mutirongo," 
1Peter3:20 iyo karetu yaiya isikapurutani, apo Mwari ngokusengerera paakavagarira ngemazuva aNoa, panguva yokuakwa kwengarava, mukati mwayo vashomani, kuronza, vanhu vasere, vakaponeswa kubudikidza ngemvura." 
1Peter3:21 Ndiwo muedzaniso worubhabhatidzo runomuponesa, andirwopi runobvisa tsvina kubva panyama, asi chigondiso chakaitwa chomwoyo isina ndaa kunaMwari, kubudikidza ngokumuka kwaJesu Kristu kubva kwevakafa." 
1Peter3:22 Uwo wakaenda mudenga, uri ngokumudyo kwaMwari, nengirosi, vatongi nevane simba vanomupfaira." 
1Peter4:1 Ndizvo ngokuti Kristu wakatambudzika munyama, imwimwiwo pfekai mupinimidzo wakatodzana, ngokuti munhu wakatambudzika munyama wakarekera kushaisha," 
1Peter4:2 kuti mupone ndaramo yenyu yeshe, haiwa munyama kuita kuemura kwevanhu, asi ngokuda kwaMwari." 
1Peter4:3 Ngokuti mwakapedza mukuwo wakakwana mukuita izvo zvaidiwa kuitwa ngevemadzinza, kuhamba mukushata, kuemura, kudhakwa ngevhini, kutamba zvakashata, madhiri okumwa nokudira miedzaniso kunonyangadza." 
1Peter4:4 Vanoshamiswa ngokuti amuchahambidzani navo mukuita zvakanyanya kushata, ndizvo vanomutuka." 
1Peter4:5 Asi vanozodzipingurira kwaari uwo unoema akanasirira kutonga vanopona nevakafa. 
1Peter4:6 Ngokuti iyi ndiyo ndaa yakaita kuti vhangeri richumairwe kunevakafa navo, kuti vatongwe munyama kudai ngokutongwa kwomunhu weshe, kuti vararame mumweya kudai ndiMwari." 
1Peter4:7 Asi magumo ezviro zveshe aapasinde; ndizvo itai vakangwara, murinde mukukumbira." 
1Peter4:8 Kupinda zveshe dananai ngorudo rukuru pakati penyu, ngokuti rudo runofukidzira zvishaishi zvakawanda." 
1Peter4:9 Mwechikoverana umwe noumweni musikagunun'uni. 
1Peter4:10 Kudai ngevangwariri vakanaka venyasha dzaMwari dzakapetwa, koanisiranai umwe kunoumweni kunyazwi ngechiri chipo chaakaashira umwe ngaumwe wenyu." 
1Peter4:11 Kunyazwi ndiani unoereketa ngaaerekete mazwi emene aMwari; kudai aripo unoshandira ngaashandire kudai ngesimba raanopuwa ndiMwari, kuti Mwari airikidzwe ngezviro zveshe kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu. Aye unouthende nokutonga mhera nariini nariini. Ameni." 
1Peter4:12 Vanodikanwa, musashamiswa ngokuedzwa kwakakura kuri pakati penyu, kunoita kudai ngechiro chinoshamisa chaiitika kwomuri." 
1Peter4:13 Asi dakarai, kudai ngezvomunoashira chikoaniswa chokutambudzwa kwaKristu, kuti imwimwi mudakare nokudaidzira ngokudakara kukurutu apo uthende hwake pounooniswa." 
1Peter4:14 Kudai mwechitsverudzwa ngendaa yezina raKristu, mwakafumiswa, ngokuti mweya wouthende uwo uri Mweya waMwari unogara padera penyu." 
1Peter4:15 Asi kusazoapo naumwe pakati penyu unotambudzika ngendaa yokuita muurayi, mbavha, muiti wezvakashata nousikarekeri zvevamweni." 
1Peter4:16 Asi kuti munhu echitambudzika ngokuita muKristu, asatsveruka, asi ngaakudze Mwari ngokuti unezina iri." 
1Peter4:17 Ngokuti nguva yaguma yokuti kutongwa kutange kumhatso yaMwari; kudai kwechitanga kwetiri, kunozoita kwakadini kugumisira kwevasikapurutani vhangeri raMwari?" 
1Peter4:18 Zve, “Kudai zvechikonzera vakarurama kuti vaponeswe, chiinyi chinozoitika kunevasikadiri Mwari nevashaishi?”" 
1Peter4:19 Ndizvo avo vanotambudzika kudai ngokuda kwaMwari ngavapire mweya yavo mukuita zvakanaka kuMusiki unogondeka. 
1Peter5:1 Ndizvo ndinopota vakuru vari pakati penyu, kudaiwo ndini ndiri mukuru pamwepo nemwi, nechapupu chemadambudziko aKristu, nounoashirawo uthende hunozooniswa." 
1Peter5:2 Ushai muhlambi waMwari waakaisa pashi penyu, haiwa ngokuangiridzwa, asi ngokuda, kudai ngokuda kwaMwari; haiwa kuti muuyirwe ngemare inetsvina, asi ngokudisisa," 
1Peter5:3 musikaiti kudai ngevatongi padera pezvakakoanisirwa kwomuri, asi mwechiita zvionero kumuhlambi." 
1Peter5:4 Naapo Muushi mukuru paanozooniwa, munozoashira dzungudza routhende risikazoperi." 
1Peter5:5 Ngokudaro imwimwi vadoko pfairai vakuru. Eya, imwimwi mweshe dzisimidzei ngokupfaa mukushandirana umwe noumweni, ngokuti “Mwari unorwisana nevanodzikudza, asi unopa nyasha kunevakapfaa.”" 
1Peter5:6 Ndizvo dzipfaisei pashi penyara yaMwari inesimba, kuti amutunhumadze ngomukuwo unosisira." 
1Peter5:7 Kandirai kweshe kuneseka kwenyu padera pake, ngokuti unonyera ndimwi." 
1Peter5:8 Svinurai, murinde. Gaa renyu dhiabhorosi rinohamba-hamba kudai ngemhondoro inorira, rechitsvaka avo veringadya." 
1Peter5:9 Murwe naye mwakagwinya mukugonda kwenyu, mwechizia kuti madambudziko akatodzana anogumira hama dzenyu munyika dzeshe." 
1Peter5:10 Zvino Mwari wenyasha dzeshe, uwo wakamudaidza kuuthende hwake husikaperi huri munaKristu Jesu, mwambotambudzika mukuwo mudoko, iye emene unozomupererisa, unozomuemesa, unozomugwinyisa nokumutseya." 
1Peter5:11 Kwaari ngakugare kunesimba mhera nariini nariini. Ameni. 
1Peter5:12 Ndakanyora kwomuri ngokufupisa kubudikidza ndiSirivhanusi, hama yedu inogondeka kudai ngezvendinopinimidza, ndechimugwinyisa nokupupura kuti idzi ndidzo nyasha dzaMwari dzegwinyiso. Emai mwakagwinya mwedziri." 
1Peter5:13 Chiara chiri muBhabhuroni, chakatsanangurwa pamwepo nemwi, chinomutambisa; ngokudaro Marako mukororo wangu." 
1Peter5:14 Chingamidzanai ngomuromo umwe noumweni ngorudo. Kunyarara ngakugare kwomuri mweshe muri munaKristu. 
2Peter1:1 Simoni Petro, muranda nomupostori waJesu Kristu, ndinonyorera kwavari vakaashira kugonda kunomutengo mukuru kwakadai ngokwedu kubudikidza ngokururama kwaMwari wedu noMuponesi Jesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:2 Nyasha kwomuri nokunyarara ngazviwanzwe mukumuzia Mwari naJesu Mambo wedu. 
2Peter1:3 Simba rake rouMwari rakatipa zviro zveshe zvinotamika mukupona uku, nomukudira kubudikidza ngokuzia uwo wakatidaidza ngouthende hwake nokunaka." 
2Peter1:4 Ndizvo wakatipa isusu, kubudikidza ngeizvi zviro, zvigondiso zvake zvakakura nezvino mutengo mukuru, kuti kubudikidza ngeizvi mungaita vanosisira chiemo chouMwari, mwapokonyoka kubva mukuora kwokuemura kuri munyika." 
2Peter1:5 Ngendaa iyi imwimwi tutsirai kutsamwirira kweshe, mukutenda kwenyu tutsirai kunaka, mukunaka tutsirai kuzia," 
2Peter1:6 mukuzia tutsirai kudzibata, mukudzibata tutsirai kusengerera, mukusengerera tutsirai kudira Mwari," 
2Peter1:7 mukudira Mwari tutsirai kuda hama, mukuda hama tutsirai rudo." 
2Peter1:8 Ngokuti kudai izvi zviro zviri zvenyu, zvechitutsirwa pakati penyu, zvinoita kuti musaite nungo nokuti muite vasina michero mukuzia Mambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:9 Ngokuti iye unotama izvi ibofu nowakapofomadzwa unoriyarwa kusukwa kwezvishaishi zvake zvekaretu. 
2Peter1:10 Ndizvo, hama, tsamwirirai kakurutu kuita kuti kudaidzwa kwenyu nokutsanangurwa kwenyu zvigwinyiswe. Ngokuti kudai mwechiita izvi amutongozopumhunwi." 
2Peter1:11 Ngokuti ngokuita kudaro, kupotera muumambo husikaperi hwaMambo wedu noMuponesi Jesu Kristu kunozopuwa kwomuri ngokuwandisa." 
2Peter1:12 Ndizvo ndinoda nguva dzeshe kugara ndechimukarakadzisa ngeizvi zviro, kunyazwi mwechizvizia nemwi mwakadzimikwa mugwinyiso iro romunaro." 
2Peter1:13 Neni ndinopinimidza kuti zvakanaka, kuti nguva dzeshe dzendiri mutende iri, kumumusira ngokumukarakadzisa," 
2Peter1:14 ndechizia kuti kubviswa kwetende rangu kunokasira kuuya, kudai ngezvaakaonisa kwendiri Mambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:15 Eya, ndinozotsamwirira, kuti nguva dzeshe ngesure kwokufa kwangu mungazokona kukarakadza izvi zviro." 
2Peter1:16 Ngokuti atizi kuteera ngano dzakaitwa ngourimbwi, apo petakaziisa kwomuri simba nokuuya kwaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, asi taiya zvapupu zvakaona ngemadziso zvoukuru hwake." 
2Peter1:17 Ngokuti wakaashira kuremeredzwa nouthende zvakabva kunaMwari Baba, apo izwi iro rakauya kwaari rechibva kuuthende hwakakurisisa rechiti, “Uyu ndiye Mukororo wangu unodikanwa, wendinonasa kudakara ndiye.”" 
2Peter1:18 Nesu temene takarizwa izwi iri rechibva mudenga, apo petaiya naye pamutunhu wakachena." 
2Peter1:19 Nesu tineizwi rakaprofetwa rakapinda kugwinya; mungazoita zvakanaka kuripurutana, rakadai ngechibani chinojeka mundau ine chidima, metsa zuva riedze, nenyeredzi yemangwanani matsatse ibude mumwoyo yenyu." 
2Peter1:20 Kutanga kwazvo zveshe munosisira kuzwisisa izvi, kuti akuna kuprofeta muzvinyorwa kunodudzirwa ngomunhu pachake," 
2Peter1:21 ngokuti akuna kuprofeta kwakamboapo ngokuda kwomunhu; asi vanhu vakaereketa zvinobva kunaMwari, vechisundwa ndiMweya Wakachena." 
2Peter2:1 Asi vaprofeti vokunyepa vakabudapo pakati pevanhu, kudai ngezvevanozoapo vadzidzisi vokunyepa pakati penyu, vanozopotedza ngokufishika zvidzidziso zvinoparadza. Vanozoramba Mambo emene wakavatenga, vechidziunzira padera pavo kuparadzwa kunokasira." 
2Peter2:2 Vazhinji vanozoteera njira dzavo dzakashata; ngendaa yeava vadzidzisi njira yegwinyiso inozoreyiwa. 
2Peter2:3 Mukuemura kwavo vanozomuchengedzera ngemazwi okudziitisa. Kutongwa kwavo kwakaronzwa kubvira karetu akunonoki nokurashwa kwavo akuati. 
2Peter2:4 Ngokuti kudai Mwari asikazi kukungurira ngirosi pedzakashaisha, asi wakadzikandira mumurindi wakapindisisa kudzama, kuti dzingwaririrwe kutongwa muzvisungo zvechidima;" 
2Peter2:5 kudai asikazi kukungurira nyika yekaretu, asi wakangwarira Noa, muchumairi wokururama, pamwepo nevamweni vanomwe, apo paakaunza ndambi padera penyika yevasikadiri Mwari;" 
2Peter2:6 naye echishandura madhorobha eSodhoma neGomora kuita marota wakaaparadza ngokuapisha ngomuriro, akaaita chionero chezvinozoitika kwavari vasikadiri Mwari;" 
2Peter2:7 kudai akanunura Roti munhu wakarurarama, wakatambudzika kakurutu ngokupona mukuemura kwevakashata," 
2Peter2:8 (ngokuti munhu uwo wakarurama, echigara pakati pavo zuva ngezuva, wakatambudzika mumweya wake wakarurama zuva ngezuva ngezviito zvavo zvisikazi kururama izvo zvaakaona nokuzwa)," 
2Peter2:9 Mambo unozia njira yokununura vanodira Mwari kubva mukuedzwa nokungwarira vasikazi kururama pashi pokuororwa metsa rigume zuva rokutongwa," 
2Peter2:10 asi kakurutu avo vanohamba ngezvenyama mukuemura kunosvipisa, vechishoora vane simba. Vakatsunga, vanoita kuda kwavo, avatyi kutuka vakuru," 
2Peter2:11 apo ngirosi kunyazwi dzinopinda ngoukuru nesimba, adziunzi kutonga kwokuvatuka pamberi pavo kunobva kunaMambo." 
2Peter2:12 Vanhu ava, vakadai ngemhuka dzisina mipinimidzo dzakabarwa kuti dzibatwe, dziurawe. Vanotuka ngendaa dzevasikazwisisi, navo vachaparadzwa mukuora kwavo." 
2Peter2:13 Vanozoitirwa zvisikazi kururama kuita musharo wavo wokuita zvisikazi kururama. Vanoti kutamba masikati, ndikwo kudakara. Vari maara nemaonje anonyangadza, vechidakara ngokuchengedzera kwavo apo pevanodya nemwi." 
2Peter2:14 Vane madziso akazara ngokuomba, vasikakoni kurekera kushaisha. Vanonyengerera mweya isikazi kugwinya. Vane mwoyo yakarovedzera mukuemura. Vana vokutukwa!" 
2Peter2:15 Vakasiya njira yakarurama navo vakapauka, vechiteera njira yaBharamu, mukororo waBheo, uwo wakada musharo wokuita zvakashata." 
2Peter2:16 Asi wakatukwa ngendaa yokupauka kwake; mbongoro isikakoni kuereketa yakaereketa ngeizwi romunhu, nayo yakarambidza kupenga kwomuprofeti." 
2Peter2:17 Ava zvinyuka zvisina mvura nemhute inosundwa ngomubvumo; avo vakangwaririrwa chidima chakasvipa. 
2Peter2:18 Ngokuti vanoereketa mazwi makuru okudzikudza asina shwiro, vanonyengerera mukuemura kwenyama vanhu avo vatopokonyoka kubva kwavari vanogara mukupauka." 
2Peter2:19 Vanovagondisa kusunhurika, asi ivo pachavo ihloko dzokuora; ngokuti munhu unoitwa hloko ngomunhu, kunyazwi ngouri waanonyiswa ndiye." 
2Peter2:20 Ngokuti kudai vakapokonyoka kubva kuizvo zvinosvipisa zvenyika kubudikidza ngokuzia Mambo noMuponesi Jesu Kristu, vechikodyaniswazve mwezviri nokunyiswa, chiemo chavo chokugumisira chinoita chakashata kupinda chokutanga." 
2Peter2:21 Ngokuti kwaiya kwakapinda kunaka kwavari kudai vasikazi kuzia njira yokururama, pano kuti vaizia, vopetuka sure kubva kumupango wakachena uwo wakapirwa kwavari." 
2Peter2:22 Kwakaitika kwavari kudai ngemazwi akangwara anegwinyiso anoti, “Imbwa yahwirirazve kumarutsi ayo,” nokuti “Nguruve yakasukwa yahwirirazve kooumbururuka mumatope.”" 
2Peter3:1 Vanodikanwa, zvino iyi iri tsamba yechipiri yendinonyora kwomuri; mwedziri ndinoda kumusirira mipinimidzo yenyu inegwinyiso ngokumukarakadzisa" 
2Peter3:2 kuti munosisira kukarakadza mazwi akaereketwa karetu ngevaprofeti vakachena, nomupango waMambo noMuponesi waakaereketa kubudikidza ngevapostori venyu." 
2Peter3:3 Pakutanga munosisira kuzwisisa izvi, kuti ngemazuva okugumisira vanoita jee vanozouya nejee, vechihamba ngokuemura kwavo," 
2Peter3:4 vechiti, “Chigondiso chokuuya kwake chiri pari? Ngokuti kubvira panguva yevakaata madzibaba edu, zveshe zviro zvinondogara kudai ngomugarire wazvo kubvira pakutanga pokusikwa!”" 
2Peter3:5 Ngokuti ngemaune vanoriyarwa ndaa iyi, kuti ngeizwi raMwari matenga aiyapo karetu nenyika ngokudaro, yechibudiswa mumvura kubudikidza ngemvura," 
2Peter3:6 kubudikidza ndiyo nyika yenguvayo yaiyapo yechidumaidzwa ngemvura, nayo yakaparadzwa." 
2Peter3:7 Asi ngeizwi rimwero aripo matenga nenyika zvakangwaririrwa muriro, zvechingwarirwa metsa zuva rokutongwa nerokuparadzwa kwavanhu vasikadiri Mwari." 
2Peter3:8 Asi, vanodikanwa, musariyarwa chiro chimwe ichi, kuti kunaMambo zuva rimwe rakadai ngegumi remazana emakore, negumi remazana emakore akadai ngezuva rimwe." 
2Peter3:9 Mambo aanonoki kuita chigondiso chake, kudai ngenjira yevanoti vamweni unononoka, asi unosengerera kwomuri, asikadi kuti naumwe arashwe, asi kuti veshe vatenderuke." 
2Peter3:10 Asi zuva raMambo rinozoguma kudai ngembavha; naapo matenga anozopinda nokutinhira kukuru, nezvomudenga zvinozonyunguruka ngokupishwa ngomuriro, nenyika nemishando iri mukati mwayo zvinozopishwa." 
2Peter3:11 Kwechioneka kuti izvi zveshe zvinonyunguruka kudaro, kunosisira kuti muite vanhu vakaitawani mukupona kweshe kwakachena nomukudira Mwari," 
2Peter3:12 mwechikarira nokushuwira kuuya kwezuva raMwari, ngendaa yaro matenga echibaka anozonyunguruka, nezvomudenga zvinozonyunguruka ngokupishwa ngomuriro?" 
2Peter3:13 Asi kudai ngechigondiso chake, tinokarira matenga matsva nenyika itsva, umwo munogara kururama." 
2Peter3:14 Ndizvo, vanodikanwa, kwechioneka kuti munokarira zviro zvakadaro, tsamwirirai kuti muoneke ndiye muri mukunyarara, musina ara nendaa;" 
2Peter3:15 muerenge kuti kusengerera kwaMambo wedu ruponeso. Ndizvo mukoma wedu unodikanwa Phauri wakamunyorera kudai ngoungwaru hwakapuwa kwaari," 
2Peter3:16 kuereketa ngeizvi kudai ngezvaakaronza mutsamba dzake dzeshe. Munezviro zvimweni zvinokonza kuzwisisa, izvo vasikazii nevasina simba vanozvikunukudza, kudai ngezvevanoitazve kune zvinyorwa zvimweni, vechidziunzira kurashwa kwavo." 
2Peter3:17 Ndizvo imwimwi vanodikanwa, mwakapangiwa karetu, ngwarai kuti murekere kutorwa nokupauswa ngevanhu vasina tsika, mupauke kubva mukutsima kwenyu." 
2Peter3:18 Asi kurai munyasha nomukuzia Mambo wedu noMuponesi Jesu Kristu. Kwaari ngaugare uripo uthende zvino nemhera nariini nariini. Ameni. 
1John1:1 Icho chaiyapo kubvira pakutanga, icho chetakazwa, chetakaona ngemadziso edu, icho chetakaringira nokubata ngenyara dzedu, chiri Izwi rokupona," 
1John1:1 Icho chaiyapo kubvira pakutanga, icho chetakazwa, chetakaona ngemadziso edu, icho chetakaringira nokubata ngenyara dzedu, chiri Izwi rokupona," 
1John1:2 kupona uku kwakaoniswa, nesu takakuona, tinoita chapupu, nokuteketesa kwomuri uku kupona kwemhera nariini, ukwo kwaiya naBaba nakwo kwakaoniswa kwetiri." 
1John1:2 kupona uku kwakaoniswa, nesu takakuona, tinoita chapupu, nokuteketesa kwomuri uku kupona kwemhera nariini, ukwo kwaiya naBaba nakwo kwakaoniswa kwetiri." 
1John1:3 Icho chetakaona nechetakazwa tinochiteketesa kwomuri, kuti imwimwiwo muiyane nesu; eya, nokuiyana kwedu kuri munaBaba noMukororo wake Jesu Kristu."
