Jude1:1 Judha, muranda waJesu Kristu, hama yaJakobe, ndinonyorera kwavari vakadaidzwa, vanodikanwa munaMwari Baba, vanongwaririrwa Jesu Kristu." 
Jude1:2 Nyasha, kunyarara norudo ngazviwanzwe kwomuri." 
Jude1:3 Vanodikanwa, apo ndechidisisa kakurutu kunyora kwomuri ngendaa yoruponeso ruri kwetiri teshe, ndakaona kuti zvinosisira kunyora kwomuri, ndechimupota kuti murwire kakurutu kutenda kwakapuwa kamwe kune vakacheneswa." 
Jude1:4 Ngokuti varipo vamweni vakapotera ngokufishika pakati penyu, vanhu vakaemeserwa karetu kuti vaone uku kurashwa, vanhu vasikadiri Mwari, avo vanokunukudza nyasha dzaMwari wedu kuita kuemura kwakashata, vechiramba Tenzi wedu ega naMambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
Jude1:5 Zvino ndinoda kumukarakadzisa, kunyazwi mwakaziiswa zveshe, kuti Mambo wakaponesa vanhu kubva munyika yeEgipite, asi ngesure kweizvi wakaparadza vasikazi kutenda." 
Jude1:6 Nengirosi idzo dzisikazi kugara mundau yadzo, asi dzakasiya ugaro hwadzo hwaidzisisira, wakadzingwarira muzvisungo zvisikaperi pashi pechidima metsa rigume Zuva guru rokutongwa." 
Jude1:7 Kudai ngeSodhoma neGomora nemadhorobha akatendenedza, awo ngenjira imweyo vakadzipira mukuomba, vakadziisa mukuemura kwakashata yaamho, kwakaemeswa kuita chionero chokutambudzika ngokuororwa ngomuriro wemhera nariini." 
Jude1:8 Asi ngenjira imweyo varoti vehope vanosvipisa nyama vechiramba umambo nokutuka vanouthende. 
Jude1:9 Asi Mikhaeri, ngirosi huru apo peyairwa naDhiabhorosi, yechiphikisa ngendaa yomuiri waMosi, yakatya kumuitira ndaa, asi yakati, “Mambo ngaakutuke!”" 
Jude1:10 Asi ava vanhu vanotuka ngezviro zvevasikazwisisi ngechibarirwe, vanoparadzwa ngeizvo zviro zvevanozia, kudai ngemhuka dzisina mipinimidzo." 
Jude1:11 Kushatanyi kwevanakwo! Ngokuti vakahamba ngenjira yaKheni, vakadzirasha pachavo mukupauka kwaBharamu kuti vaone kuuyirwa, vakaparadzwa mukumukira kwaKhora." 
Jude1:12 Ava vanhu zvitsverudzo mumadhiri enyu orudo, apo pevanodya nemwi vasikatyi, vanodzigutsa pachavo; makore asina mvura, anovhuvhutwa kweshe ngedutu; miti yepachando, isina michero, yakafa kairi, yakabvitwa nenzinde;" 
Jude1:13 mafungu oruandhle anopenga, echibudisa mafuro okutsveruka kwavo; nyeredzi dzinopepesheka, vakangwarirwa muudzamu hwokusvipa kwechidima mhera nariini." 
Jude1:14 Enokhi mubarirwana wechinomwe kubva kunaAdhamu wakaprofeta echiti, “Ringirai, Mambo wakauya nevakacheneswa vake vakawandisisa," 
Jude1:15 kuti atonge veshe nokunyisa veshe vasikadiri Mwari ngemishando yavo yeshe yevakaita ngokusikadira Mwari, nezviro zveshe zvakakonza zvakaereketwa ngevashaishi vasikadiri Mwari.”" 
Jude1:16 Ava vavhuruvhuti nevasikagutswi, vechihamba kudai ngokuemura kwavo; nemiromo yavo inoereketa mazwi makuru okudzikudza, vechikudza vanhu kuti vaone kufumiswa." 
Jude1:17 Asi imwimwi, vanodikanwa, munosisira kukarakadza mazwi akamboereketwa ngevapostori vaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu." 
Jude1:18 Vakati kwomuri, “Ngomukuwo wokugumisira kunozoapo vaiti vejee, vanohamba kudai ngokuemura kwavo vasikadiri Mwari.”" 
Jude1:19 Ava ndivo vanoita miparadzaniso nevamweni, ngevenyama vasina Mweya." 
Jude1:20 Asi imwimwi, vanodikanwa, mwechidziaka pachenyu padera pokutenda kwenyu kwakachenesesa, mwechikumbira muMweya Wakachena;" 
Jude1:21 dzingwarirei murudo rwaMwari; mwechirindira nyasha dzaMambo wedu Jesu Kristu, dzinomuunza mukupona kusikaperi." 
Jude1:22 Muitire nyasha vamweni vanogononda; 
Jude1:23 muponese vamweni, mwechivabvuka kubva mumuriro; nevamweni mwechivaitira nyasha ngokutya, mwechinyenya nezvokufuka zvakasvipiswa nokuitwa maara ngenyama." 
Jude1:24 Zvino kwaari unesimba rokumungwarira kubva mukuwa nokumuemesa pamberi pouthende hwake musina ndaa ngokudakara," 
Jude1:25 kunaMwari ega Muponesi wedu, kubudikidza ndiye Jesu Kristu Mambo wedu, kwaari ngakuwe nouthende, umambo, simba nokutonga, nguva isati yaapo nazvino nemhera nariini. Ameni." 
Revelation1:1 Chakapangidzirwa chaJesu Kristu, chaakapuwa ndiMwari kuti apangidzire varanda vake izvo zvinosisira kuitika ngokukasira; naye wakaita kuti zviziikanwe ngokutumira ngirosi yake kumuranda wake Johani," 
Revelation1:2 uwo wakapupurira izwi raMwari nouchapupu hwaJesu Kristu, echironza zveshe zvaakaona." 
Revelation1:3 Unomuchena uwo unodzidza ngokudaidzira mazwi omuprofeti, vanomuchena avo vanoazwa naavo vanongwarira zvakanyorwamwo; ngokuti nguva yaapasinde." 
Revelation1:4 Johani kuzviara zvinomwe zviri muAsi. Nyasha ngadzia kwomuri nokunyarara, zvinobva kunouwo uripo, waiyapo nounouya, nokunobva kumweya minomwe iri pamberi pedendemaro rake;" 
Revelation1:5 nokunobva kunaJesu Kristu uri chapupu chakagondeka, dangwe rokumuka kwevakafa, nomutongi wemadzimambo enyika. Kwaari uwo wakatida, akatisunhura kubva kuzvishaishi zvedu ngengazi yake," 
Revelation1:6 akatiita voumambo nevapristi kunaMwari naBaba ake, kwaari ngakuapo uthende nokutonga mhera nariini nariini. Ameni." 
Revelation1:7 Ringirai! Unouya nemakore; nemadziso eshe anozomuona, naavozve vakamubaya; nemadzinza eshe enyika anozobonda ngendaa yake. Eya, Ameni." 
Revelation1:8 “Ndini Arfa naOmega,” unoronza Mambo Mwari, uwo uripo, waiyapo nounouya, Unesimbareshe." 
Revelation1:9 Inini, Johani, hama yenyu yomunokoanisirana nayo munaJesu mumadambudziko nomuumambo nokusengerera, ndaiya pachiwi chinozwi Phatimosi ngendaa yeizwi raMwari neyouchapupu hwaJesu." 
Revelation1:10 Ndaiya ndiri muMweya ngezuva raMambo, ndakazwa sure kwangu izwi guru rairira kudai ngokurira kwehwama," 
Revelation1:11 rechiti, “Nyora mubhuku izvo zvounoona, uritumire kuzviara zvinomwe, kuEfesu, kuSimirna, kuPhergamumu, kuThiatira, kuSardhisi, kuFiradherifia nokuRaodhisia.”" 
Revelation1:12 Naapo ndakakunukuka kuti ndione izwi raiereketa kwendiri, ndechikunukuka ndakaona zvigadzikiro zvezvibani zvinomwe zvomukore," 
Revelation1:13 nepakati pezvigadzikiro zvezvibani ndakaona umwe wakadai ngoMukororo woMunhu, akapfeka chokufuka chakaguma kutsoka nediti rake rakasungwa ngebhande romukore." 
Revelation1:14 Soro rake nebvudzi rake zvakachena kudai ngemamviri egwai, zvakachena kudai ngechando; madziso ake akadai ngomurazvu womuriro," 
Revelation1:15 tsoka dzake dzakadai ngethusi rinon'anikira, apo ranyunguruswa muchoto, neizwi rake raidai ngechaungu chemvura yakawanda." 
Revelation1:16 Munyara yake yokumudyo waiya akabata nyeredzi nomwe, kubva pamuromo wake pakabuda shoti inopinza inoupanga huiri, nehope yake yain'anikira kudai ngezuva rinojeka ngesimba reshe." 
Revelation1:17 Naapo ndamuona, ndakawa patsoka dzake kudai ngewafa. Naapo wakaisa nyara yake yokumudyo padera pangu echiti, “Usatya; ndini muambi nemagumo," 
Revelation1:18 ndini umwe unopona. Ndaiya ndafa, wona, ndinopona mhera nariini nariini, neni ndine makiyi orufu neeHaidhesi." 
Revelation1:19 Zvino nyora zviro zvawaona, zviripo nezvinozoitika sureni." 
Revelation1:20 Kudai ngezvakafishika zvenyeredzi nomwe dzawaona munyara yangu yokumudyo, nezvigadzikiro zvezvibani zvinomwe zvomukore, nyeredzi nomwe ingirosi dzezviara zvinomwe nezvigadzikiro zvezvibani zvinomwe zviri zviara zvinomwe." 
Revelation2:1 “Nyorera ngirosi yechiara chiri muEfesu wechiti: ‘Aya ndiwo mazwi ouwo unobata nyeredzi nomwe munyara yake yokumudyo, unohamba pakati pezvigadzikiro zvezvibani zvinomwe zvomukore.’" 
Revelation2:2 “Ndinozia mishando yako nokutambudzika kwako nokusengerera kwako. Ndinozia kuti autenderi vaiti vezvakashata; newe wakavaedza vanodzidaidza kuti vapostori, asi andivopi, wakavaona kuti vanyepi." 
Revelation2:3 Ndinoziazve kuti iwewe unotsamwirira mukusengerera ngendaa yezina rangu, newe auzi kupera simba." 
Revelation2:4 Asi ndinokushoora ngeichi, kuti wakasiya rudo rwako rwokutanga." 
Revelation2:5 Ndizvo karakadza apo powakawa; utenderuke, uite mishando yowakaita kutanga. Kuti usikaiti kudaro, ndinozouya kwouri ndiduse chigadzikiro chechibani chako kubva pandau pacho, asi kuti ukatenderuka." 
Revelation2:6 Asi ichi unacho, chokuti unonyenya mishando yevaNikoraitisi, yendinonyenyawo." 
Revelation2:7 Iye unenzee ngaazwe zvinoereketwa ndiMweya kuzviara. Kwaari unonyisa, ndinozomutendera kuti adye kumuti wokupona uri muPharadhaisi raMwari." 
Revelation2:8 “Nyorera ngirosi yechiara chiri muSimirna wechiti: ‘Aya ndiwo mazwi ouwo wokuamba nowokugumisira, uwo wakafa, akamukazve.’" 
Revelation2:9 “Ndinozia dambudziko rako nourombo hwako, (asi uri gurudza,) nokutuka kwaavo vanoti vari vaJudha, asi andivopi, asi ngevemhatso yokudira yaSathani." 
Revelation2:10 Usatya izvo zvounozotambudzika ndizvo. Wona, Sathani woda kubata nokupotedza vamweni venyu mutirongo, kuti muedzwe, nemwi munozoa nedambudziko pamazuva gumi. Ita unogondeka metsa mukufa, neni ndinozokupa dzungudza rokupona." 
Revelation2:11 Iye unenzee ngaazwe zvinoereketwa ndiMweya kuzviara. Iye unonyisa aazoremadzwi ngokufa kwechipiri. 
Revelation2:12 “Nyorera ngirosi yechiara chiri muPhergamumu wechiti: ‘Aya ndiwo mazwi ouwo uneshoti inopinza inoupanga huiri.’ 
Revelation2:13 “Ndinozia pounogara, ndipo pane dendemaro raSathani; newe unobatisisa zina rangu, auzi kuramba kutenda kwako mwendiri, kunyazwi kumazuva aAntiphasi chapupu changu, wakagondeka wangu, wakaurawa pakati penyu, paanogara Sathani." 
Revelation2:14 Asi ndinokushoora ngezviro zvishomani: ngokuti unavo vamweni vanobatisisa zvidzidziso zvaBharamu, uwo wakadzidzisa Bharaki kuisa chipumhuniso pamberi pevana vaIsuraeri kuti vadye zvakadirwa zvimwari nokuita vanoomba." 
Revelation2:15 Ngokudarozve unavo vamweni vanobatisisa zvidzidziso zvevaNikoraitisi. 
Revelation2:16 Zvinopano tenderuka. Kuti usikaiti kudaro, ndinozouya kwouri ngokukasira, ndirwe navo ngeshoti yomuromo wangu." 
Revelation2:17 Iye unenzee ngaazwe zvinoereketwa ndiMweya kuzviara. Kwaari unonyisa ndinozomupa imweni yemana yakafishika, ndinozomupazve buwe rakachena, nepadera pebuwe pakanyorwa zina idzva, risikaziikanwi ngoumweni kwega ngouwo unoriashira." 
Revelation2:18 “Nyorera ngirosi yechiara chiri muThiatira wechiti: ‘Aya ndiwo mazwi ouwo Mukororo waMwari, uwo unemadziso akadai ngomurazvu womuriro, netsoka dzake dzakadai ngethusi rapukutwa rinon'anikira.’" 
Revelation2:19 “Ndinozia mishando yako, rudo rwako, kutenda kwako, kushandira kwako nokusengerera kwako, nokuti mishando yako yokugumisira yakakura kupinda yokutanga." 
Revelation2:20 Asi ndinokushoora ngeichi, kuti unotendera mukadzi Jezebheri, uwo unoti uri muprofeti wechikadzi pachake, naye unodzidzisa nokupausa varanda vangu kuti vaombe nokudya zvakadirwa miedzaniso yokudira." 
Revelation2:21 Neni ndakamupa nguva yokuti atenderuke, asi unoramba kutenderuka kubva mukuomba kwake." 
Revelation2:22 Wona, ndinozomukandira mumubhedhi, naavo vanoomba naye mudambudziko gurutu, kuti vasikatenderuki kumishando yake." 
Revelation2:23 Neni ndinozouraya vana vake vafe. Nezviara zveshe zvinozozia kuti inini ndini ndinotsvakisisa mupinimidzo nomwoyo, neni ndinozomupa umwe ngaumwe kudai ngemishando yake." 
Revelation2:24 Asi ndinoti kwomuri, imwimwi mwakasara muThiatira, avo vasina uku kudzidziswa, vasikazi kuzia izvo zvinodaidzwa ngevamweni kuti udzamu hwaSathani, ‘Andizomutwarisi mutwaro umweni.’" 
Revelation2:25 Asi batisisai izvo zvomunazvo metsa ndauya. 
Revelation2:26 Nouwo unonyisa nokuangira kuita mishando yangu metsa pakugumisira, “Ndinozomupa simba padera pemadzinza," 
Revelation2:27 naye unozoatonga ngendonga yesimbi, kudai ngehari dzomuumbi dzinoputswa kuita zviwenda;" 
Revelation2:28 kunyazwi inini pachangu ndakaashira simba kubva kunaBaba angu. Neni ndinozomupa nyeredzi yemambakwedza. 
Revelation2:29 Iye unenzee ngaazwe zvinoereketwa ndiMweya kuzviara. 
Revelation3:1 “Nyorera ngirosi yechiara chiri muSardhisi wechiti: ‘Aya ndiwo mazwi ouwo unemweya minomwe yaMwari nenyeredzi nomwe.’ “Ndinozia mishando yako; unezina rokuti unopona, asi wakafa." 
Revelation3:2 Muka, ugwinyise izvo zvasara zvodo kufa, ngokuti andizi kuona mishando yako yakaperera pamberi paMwari wangu." 
Revelation3:3 Zvino karakadza maashirire nokuzwa kwowakaita, uzvingwarire nokutenderuka. Kudai usikamuki, ndinozouya kudai ngembavha, newe auzozii awa rendinozouya ndiro kwouri." 
Revelation3:4 Asi unemazina mashomani muSardhisi eavo vasikazi kusvipisa zvokufuka zvavo; navo vanozohamba neni, vakasimira zvakachena, ngokuti vanosisira." 
Revelation3:5 Iye unonyisa unozopfekedzwa kudai ndivo ngezvokufuka zvakachena, neni andizodzimi zina rake mubhuku rokupona; ndinozopupura ngezina rake pamberi paBaba angu nepamberi pengirosi dzake." 
Revelation3:6 Iye unenzee ngaazwe zvinoereketwa ndiMweya kuzviara. 
Revelation3:7 “Nyorera ngirosi yechiara chiri muFiradherifia wechiti: “Aya ndiwo mazwi ouwo wakachena, unegwinyiso, unekiyi raDhavhidha, uwo unobeura akuna unozokonya, naye akonya akunazve unobeura." 
Revelation3:8 “Ndinozia mishando yako. Wona, ndakaisa pamberi pako musiwo wakabeurwa, akuna munhu ungakona kuukonya. Ndinozia kuti iwewe une simba doko, asi wakangwarira izwi rangu, auzi kuramba zina rangu." 
Revelation3:9 Wona, ndinokupa vamweni vemhatso yokudira yaSathani avo vanodziti vaJudha vasivopi, asi vanonyepa; wona, ndinozoita kuti vauye vagwadame pamberi petsoka dzako, navo vanozozia kuti inini ndakakuda." 
Revelation3:10 Ngokuti wakangwarira izwi rangu rokusengerera, neni ndinozokungwarira kubva kuawa rokutambudzika rinouya padera penyika yeshe, kuedza avo vanogara munyika." 
Revelation3:11 Ndinokasira kuuya; batisisa chounacho, kuti asazoapo naumwe unozokutorera dzungudza rako." 
Revelation3:12 Iye unonyisa ndinozomuita sika mutemperi raMwari wangu; aachazobudimwo. Ndinozonyora padera pake zina raMwari wangu nezina redhorobha raMwari wangu, Jerusarema idzva rinodzaka kubva mudenga kunaMwari wangu, nezina rangu idzva." 
Revelation3:13 Iye unenzee ngaazwe zvinoereketwa ndiMweya kuzviara. 
Revelation3:14 “Nyorera ngirosi yechiara chiri muRaodhisia wechiti: ‘Aya ndiwo mazwi ouwo uri Ameni, chapupu chakagondeka chine gwinyiso, maambo ezvisikwa zvaMwari.’" 
Revelation3:15 “Ndinozia mishando yako, kuti autonhori nokuti kupisha. Ndinoda kuti utonhore nokuti upishe!" 
Revelation3:16 Ndizvo, ngokuti unodzia, usikapishi nokuti kutonhora, ndinozokurutsa mumuromo wangu." 
Revelation3:17 Ngokuti unoti, ‘Ndiri gurudza, ndakapfuma, anditami chiro;’ usikazii kuti unenhamo nounotambudzika, uri murombo, bofu nomutitinini." 
Revelation3:18 Ndinokupanga kuti utenge kubva kwendiri mukore wakanyunguruswa ngomuriro kuti uite gurudza; nezvokufuka zvakachena kuti udzifukidze, kuti kutsveruka kwoutitinini hwako husazooneka; nomutombo wokudzodza madziso kuti uone." 
Revelation3:19 Avo veshe vendinoda, ndinovaganyira nokuvaorora; ndizvo tsamwirira utenderuke." 
Revelation3:20 Wona, ndinoema pamusiwo nokudododza; kudai aripo munhu unorizwa izwi rangu nokubeura musiwo, ndinozopotera mwaari, ndidye naye, naye adye neni." 
Revelation3:21 Iye unonyisa, ndinozomuita kuti agare neni padendemaro rangu, kudai ndini ndakanyisawo, ndikagara naBaba angu padendemaro ravo." 
Revelation3:22 Iye unenzee ngaazwe zvinoereketwa ndiMweya kuzviara.” 
Revelation4:1 Ngesure kweizvi ndakaringira, wona, musiwo wakabeurwa mudenga! Neizwi rokutanga rendakazwa rechiereketa kwendiri rakadai ngokurira kwehwama rakati, “Kwira pano, ndinozokupangidzira izvo zvinosisira kuitika sure kweizvi.”" 
Revelation4:2 Paripo ndakabatwa ndiMweya; wona, mudengamwo ndakaona chigaro choumambo, nepadera pacho paigara umwe." 
Revelation4:3 Nouwo waigarapo kuringirika kwake kwaiya kwakadai ngebuwe rejasipa nerekarneriani, kwaiyapozve utahwadande hwechitendenedza chigaro choumambo, hwairingirika hwakadai ngebuwe reemeraridhi." 
Revelation4:4 Kutendenedza chigaro choumambo zvaiyapo zvigaro zvoumambo makumi mairi nemarongomuna, nepadera pezvigaro zvoumambo paigara vakuru makumi mairi nevarongomuna, vakapfeka zvokufuka zvakachena nemadzungudza omukore pamasoro avo." 
Revelation4:5 Pachigaro choumambo pakabuda kupenya kwemheni nemazwi nokutinhira. Pamberi pechigaro choumambo paibaka zvibani zvinomwe zvomuriro zviri mweya minomwe yaMwari; 
Revelation4:6 nepamberi pechigaro choumambo pane ruandhle rwakadai ngebuwe regirazi. Nepakati pechigaro choumambo nokuchitendenedza zvaiyapo zvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna, zvakazara ngemadziso mberi nesure." 
Revelation4:7 Chisikwa chinopona chokutanga chaiya chakadai ngemhondoro, nechisikwa chinopona chechipiri chaiya chakadai ngomukono wen'ombe, nechisikwa chinopona chechitatu chaiya chine hope yakadai ngeyomunhu, nechisikwa chinopona chechirongomuna chaiya chakadai ngegodzi rinombururuka." 
Revelation4:8 Nezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna chimwe ngachimwe chazvo chaiya nemaphaphiro matanhatu, zvakazara madziso kutenderera kubanze nomukati; nazvo azvizi kuzorora kuemba masikati nousiku zvechiti, “Wakachena, Wakachena, Wakachena, Mambo Mwari Unesimbareshe, waiyapo, uripo nounouya!”" 
Revelation4:9 Naapo zvisikwa zvinopona zvakudza, zvaremeredza nokubonga kwaari unogara pachigaro choumambo, unopona mhera nariini nariini," 
Revelation4:10 vakuru makumi mairi navarongomuna vanozowa pashi pamberi pouwo unogara pachigaro choumambo, nokumudira uwo unopona mhera nariini nariini, navo vanozokandira madzungudza avo vechiemba pamberi pechigaro choumambo vechiti," 
Revelation4:11 “Munosisira, imwimwi Mambo wedu naMwari wedu, kuashira kukudzwa nokuremeredzwa nesimba, ngokuti mwakasika zviro zveshe, ngokuda kwenyu zvakaapo nazvo zvakasikwa.”" 
Revelation5:1 Zvino ndakaona munyara yokumudyo youwo wakagara pachigaro choumambo bhuku rakanyorwa mukati nokubanze, rakanamirwa ngezvinamiro zvinomwe;" 
Revelation5:2 neni ndakaona ngirosi inesimba yechidaidzira ngeizwi gurutu yechiti, “Ndiani unosisira kubeura bhuku nokupwanya zvinamiro zvaro?”" 
Revelation5:3 Asi mwaiya musina naumwe mudenga nokuti panyika nokuti pashi penyika waikona kubeura bhuku nokuti kuriringira. 
Revelation5:4 Ndakachema kakurutu ngokuti mwaiya musina naumwe wakaoneka akasisira kubeura bhuku nokuti kuriringira. 
Revelation5:5 Zvino umwe wevakuru wakati kwendiri, “Usachema. Wona, Mhondoro yorudzi rwaJudha, Runzinde rukuru rwaDhavhidha, rwanyisa, ndizvo unokona kubeura bhuku nezvinamiro zvinomwe zvaro.”" 
Revelation5:6 Zvino ndakaona pakati pechigaro choumambo nepezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna nepevakuru raiya rakaemapo Gwai rakadai ngerakaurawa, raiya rine nyanga nomwe nemadziso manomwe, izvo zviri mweya minomwe yaMwari yakatumwa panyika peshe." 
Revelation5:7 Naye wakaenda, akatora bhuku kubva munyara yokumudyo youwo waigara pachigaro choumambo." 
Revelation5:8 Naapo atora bhuku, zvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna nevakuru makumi mairi navarongomuna vakawa pashi pamberi peGwai, umwe ngaumwe wavo waiya nechimadangari nendiro yakanasirwa ngomukore yakazara ngomutombo unegwema rakanaka, uri mikumbiro yevakacheneswa." 
Revelation5:9 Navo vakaemba ruyo rutsva vechiti, “Munosisira imwimwi kutora bhuku nokubeura zvinamiro zvaro, ngokuti imwimwi mwakaurawa, kubudikidza ngengazi yenyu mwakatengera Mwari vanhu kubva kumadzinza eshe nendimi dzeshe nevanhu veshe nokumarusinga eshe;" 
Revelation5:10 nemwi mwakavaita voumambo nevapristi kunaMwari wedu, navo vanozotonga padera penyika.”" 
Revelation5:11 Zvino ndakaringira, ndikazwa izwi rengirosi dzakawanda dzaiya dzakatendenedza chigaro choumambo nezvisikwa zvinopona nevakuru; nouwandu hwadzo hwaiya makumi nemakumi emakumi emazana," 
Revelation5:12 dzechiti ngeizwi guru, “Rakasisira Gwai iro rakaurawa kuashira simba, upfumi, ungwaru, kugwinya, kuremeredzwa, uthende nokukudzwa!”" 
Revelation5:13 Ndakazwa zviro zveshe zvakasikwa zviri mudenga nezviri munyika nezviri pashi penyika nezviri muruandhle, nazvo zveshe zviri mukati mwazvo zvechiti, “Kwaari uwo unogara pachigaro choumambo nokuGwai ngakuapo kukudzwa, kuremeredzwa, uthende nokugwinya, mhera nariini nariini!”" 
Revelation5:14 Nezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna zvakati, “Ameni!” Nevakuru vakawa pashi, vakadira." 
Revelation6:1 Zvino ndakaona Gwai rabeura chimwe chezvinamiro zvinomwe, ndakazwa chimwe chezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna chechiti ngeizwi raizwika rakadai ngomutinhiro rechiti, “Uya!”" 
Revelation6:2 Ndakaringira, ndikaona hachi rakachena! Nomugadhi waro waiya nouta; wakapuwa dzungudza, naye wakabuda echinyisa nokuti anyise." 
Revelation6:3 Naapo abeura chinamiro chechipiri, ndakazwa chisikwa chinopona chechipiri chechiti, “Uya!”" 
Revelation6:4 Nehachi rimweni rakabuda shava; nomugadhi waro wakapuwa simba rokudusa kunyarara kubva munyika, kuti vanhu vaurayane; naye wakapuwa shoti huru." 
Revelation6:5 Naapo abeura chinamiro chechitatu, ndakazwa chisikwa chinopona chechitatu chechiti, “Uya!” Ndakaringira, ndikaona hachi rakasvipa! Nomugadhi waro waiya nechipimo munyara yake." 
Revelation6:6 Ndakazwa chakarira chakadai ngeizwi chaibva pakati pezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna chechiti, “Chipimo chekoroni chinotengwa ngedhenario, nezvipimo zvitatu zvebhare zvinotengwa ngedhenario, usashaishira mafuta nevhini!”" 
Revelation6:7 Naapo abeura chinamiro chechirongomuna, ndakazwa izwi rechisikwa chinopona chechirongomuna chechiti, “Uya!”" 
Revelation6:8 Ndakaringira, ndikaona hachi rakacheneruka! Nomugadhi waro zina rake ndiRufu, neHaidhesi zvakamuteera; nazvo zvakapuwa simba padera perupande rwechirongomuna rwenyika, rokuuraya ngeshoti, ngenzara, ngenhenda nezvikara zvomunyika." 
Revelation6:9 Naapo abeura chinamiro chechishanu, ndakaona ngepashi pearita mwoyo yaavo vakaurawa ngendaa yeizwi raMwari nendaa youchapupu hwavakapupura." 
Revelation6:10 Vakadaidzira ngeizwi gurutu vechiti, “Mambo Mwari Unesimbareshe, iwewe wakachena nounegwinyiso, munozogarira kwomukuwo wakadini kureba musati mwatonga nokuunzidzira ngazi yedu padera paavo vanogara munyika?”" 
Revelation6:11 Vakapuwa umwe ngaumwe zvokufuka zvakachena, navo vakaronzerwa kuti vazorore mukuwo mudoko, metsa uwandu hwevamweni vavo varanda nehama dzavo hwaperera, avo vaisisira kuurawa kudai ndivo pachavo." 
Revelation6:12 Naapo abeura chinamiro chechitanhatu, ndakaringira, ndikaona kuzungunyika kukurutu kwenyika; nezuva rakasvipiswa kudai ngejira rokusvipa remamviri, nomwedzi weshe wakatsvuka kudai ngengazi," 
Revelation6:13 nenyeredzi dzomudenga dzakawira pashi panyika, kudai ngomuonde unoriga maonde awo pachando asikazi kuibva, apo wazungunyiswa ngedutu guru." 
Revelation6:14 Denga rakabviswa kudai ngebhuku apo rechipetwa, nomutunhu weshe nechiwi cheshe chakabviswa kubva pandau yacho." 
Revelation6:15 Zvino madzimambo enyika nevanhu vakuru, nduna huru dzehondo, makurudza nevakagwinya, veshe hloko nevakasunhurika, vakahwara mumapako nomumapuwe emitunhu," 
Revelation6:16 vechidaidzira kumitunhu nokumapuwe vechiti, “Tiwirenyi, mutifishe kubva kuhope youwo unogara pachigaro choumambo nokubva kuushungu hweGwai;" 
Revelation6:17 ngokuti raguma zuva guru roushungu hwavo, ndiani ungakona kuema?”" 
Revelation7:1 Ngesure kweizvi ndakaona ngirosi murongomuna dzakaema kumarutii marongomuna enyika dzakabata madutu marongomuna enyika kuti risaapo dutu rinofuridza panyika nokuti muruandhle nokuti padera pomuti weshe. 
Revelation7:2 Zvino ndakaona ngirosi imweni yechikwira kubva kumabvazuva, ine chinamiro chaMwari unopona, nayo yakadaidzira ngeizwi guru kungirosi murongomuna dzakapuwa simba rokushaishira nyika noruandhle," 
Revelation7:3 yechiti, “Musashaishira nyika nokuti ruandhle nokuti muti naumwe, metsa taisa chinamiro pahuma dzevaranda vaMwari wedu.”" 
Revelation7:4 Ndakazwa uwandu hwaavo vakanamirwa, vaiya zana namakumi marongomuna namarongomuna emakumi emazana, vakaisirwa chinamiro kubva kudzinza rimwe ngarimwe revana vaIsuraeri:" 
Revelation7:5 Kudzinza raJudha vakaisirwa chinamiro makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000) kudzinza raRubheni makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000) kudzinza raGadhi makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000)" 
Revelation7:6 kudzinza raAsha makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000) kudzinza raNafitari makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000) kudzinza raManase makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000)" 
Revelation7:7 kudzinza raSimeoni makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000) kudzinza raRevhi makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000) kudzinza raIsakha makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000)" 
Revelation7:8 kudzinza raZebhuruni makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000) kudzinza raJosefa makumi emazana ari gumi namairi, (12,000) kudzinza raBhenjamini vakaisirwa chinamiro makumi emazana ari gumi namairi (12,000)." 
Revelation7:9 Ngesure kweizvi ndakaringira, ndikaona mbungano huru isina munhu ungakona kuierenga, inobva kumadzinza eshe nemarusinga eshe nevevanhu veshe nevendimi dzeshe, vakaema pamberi pechigaro choumambo nepamberi peGwai, vakapfeka zvakachena, vane matai emijindwi munyara dzavo." 
Revelation7:10 Vakadaidzira ngeizwi guru vechiti, “Ruponeso runobva kunaMwari wedu uwo unogara pachigaro choumambo, nokuneGwai!”" 
Revelation7:11 Nengirosi dzeshe dzakaema dzechitendenedza chigaro choumambo, nokutendenedza vakuru nezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna; dzakawa pashi ngehope dzadzo pamberi pechigaro choumambo, dzakadira Mwari" 
Revelation7:12 dzechiti, “Ameni! Kukudzwa, uthende, ungwaru, kubonga, kuremeredzwa, simba nokugwinya ngazvigare kunaMwari wedu mhera nariini nariini! Ameni.”" 
Revelation7:13 Noumwe wevakuru wakabvunza echiti kwendiri, “Ndiani ava, vakapfeka zvokufuka zvakachena, vanobva kuri?”" 
Revelation7:14 Ndikati kwaari, “Mambo wangu, ndimwi munozia.” Naye wakati kwendiri, “Ava ndivo vanobuda kubva mudambudziko gurutu; navo vakasuka zvokufuka zvavo, vakazvichenesa mungazi yeGwai." 
Revelation7:15 “Ndizvo vari pamberi pechigaro choumambo chaMwari, vanomushandira masikati nousiku mutemperi rake, nouwo unogara pachigaro choumambo unozovangwarira ngokuapo kwake." 
Revelation7:16 Avachazozwi nzara nokuti nyota; zve, zuva arichazovapishi nokuti kupisha kumweni;" 
Revelation7:17 ngokuti Gwai riri pakati pechigaro choumambo rinozovausha nokuvatungamirira kuenda navo kuzvinyuka zvemvura yokupona, naMwari unozopukuta masodzi eshe kubva pamadziso avo.”" 
Revelation8:1 Naapo abeura chinamiro chechinomwe, kwakaapo kunyarara mudenga mukuwo unoda kuguma pakati peawa." 
Revelation8:2 Zvino ndakaona ngirosi nomwe dzakaema pamberi paMwari, dzakapuwa hwama nomwe." 
Revelation8:3 Nengirosi imweni yakauya ikaema pasinde pearita, inechidziyo chomukore chokupishira mutombo unegwema rakanaka; yakapuwa mutombo wakawanda wokupisha unegwema rakanaka, kuti ipire padera pearita romukore raiya pamberi pechigaro choumambo pamwepo nemikumbiro yevakacheneswa veshe." 
Revelation8:4 Nechiushi chomutombo wokupisha unegwema rakanaka chakakwira, pamwepo nemikumbiro yevakacheneswa, pamberi paMwari chechibuda kubva munyara yengirosi." 
Revelation8:5 Zvino ngirosi yakatora chidziyo chokupishira mutombo nayo yakachizadza ngomuriro waibva paarita, ikaukandira padera penyika; kwakaapo kutinhira nemazwi makuru nemheni nokuzungunyika kwenyika." 
Revelation8:6 Zvino ngirosi nomwe dzaiya hwama nomwe dzakanasirira kudziridza. 
Revelation8:7 Ngirosi yokutanga yakaridza hwama yayo, kwakaapo matsanza nomuriro, zvakabvengedzwa nengazi, izvo zvakakandirwa padera penyika; norupande rwechitatu rwenyika rwakapishwa, norupande rwechitatu rwemiti rwakapishwa, nomwenje weshe muishi wakapishwa." 
Revelation8:8 Ngirosi yechipiri yakaridza hwama yayo, nechakadai ngomutunhu mukuru, chinobaka ngomuriro, chakakandirwa muruandhle. Norupande rwechitatu rworuandhle rwakaita ngazi," 
Revelation8:9 norupande rwechitatu rwezvisikwa zvinopona zvomuruandhle zvakafa, norupande rwechitatu rwengarava rwakaputswa." 
Revelation8:10 Ngirosi yechitatu yakaridza hwama yayo, nenyeredzi huru yakawa kubva mudenga, yechibaka kudai ngesasi, yakawira padera porupande rwechitatu rwendwizi nepadera pezvinyuka zvemvura." 
Revelation8:11 Zina renyeredzi rakazwi, Chinovava; norupande rwechitatu rwemvura rwakavaviswa, nevanhu vazhinji vakafa ngemvura iyo ngokuti yaivava." 
Revelation8:12 Ngirosi yechirongomuna yakaridza hwama yayo, norupande rwechitatu rwezuva rwakafurwa, norupande rwechitatu rwemwedzi, norupande rwechitatu rwenyeredzi, kuti rupande rwechitatu rwokujeka kwazvo kudzime; nemasikati asazojeka rupande rwawo rwechitatu nousiku ngokudaro." 
Revelation8:13 Zvino ndakaringira, ndikazwa godzi rechichema ngeizwi guru rechimbururuka pakati pomudenga rechiti, “Ihehe, ihehe, ihehe kwavari vanogara padera penyika, ngendaa yemazwi amweni ehwama dzengirosi nhatu dzichazoridza.”" 
Revelation9:1 Ngirosi yechishanu yakaridza hwama yayo, neni ndakaona nyeredzi yakabva mudenga ikawa panyika, yakapuwa kiyi yomurindi usina magumo;" 
Revelation9:2 yakabeura murindi usina magumo, nechiushi chakakwira kubva mumurindi, chakadai ngechiushi chechoto chakakura. Zuva nomweya zvakasvipiswa ngechiushi chaibva mumurindi uwo." 
Revelation9:3 Zvino ndongwe dzakabuda dzechibva muchiushi kuuya padera penyika, dzakapuwa simba rakadai ngesimba rezvinyaada zvomunyika." 
Revelation9:4 Dzakaronzerwa kuti dzisazoshaishira mwenje wenyika nokuti chiro chimweni chinokura chakasvipira nokuti muti, asi vega vanhu avo vasina chinamiro chaMwari pahuma dzavo." 
Revelation9:5 Adzizi kupuwa simba rokuvauraya, asi kuti dzivarwadzise mwedzi mishanu; nokurwadzisa kwadzo kwaiya kwakadai ngokurwadzisa kwechinyaada apo charuma munhu." 
Revelation9:6 Ngaawo mazuva vanhu vanozotsvaka rufu vasikaruoni; nokudisisa kuti vafe, asi rufu runozotiza kubva kwavari." 
Revelation9:7 Nemiemo yendongwe idzo yaiya yakadai ngeyemahachi akanasirirwa kurwa hondo. Nepadera pemasoro adzo paiya nezvairingirika zvakadai ngemadzungudza omukore; nehope dzadzo dzaiya dzakadai ngedzevanhu," 
Revelation9:8 dzaiya nebvudzi rakadai ngebvudzi revakadzi, nemazino adzo akadai ngeemhondoro;" 
Revelation9:9 dzaiya nemagwamba akadai ngechihlangu chepaditi chesimbi, nokutinhira kwemaphaphiro adzo kwakadai ngokutinhira kwengoro dzokurwa hondo, dzinokweiwa ngemahachi akawanda echirumba kuenda koorwa." 
Revelation9:10 Dzaiya nemiswe yakadai ngeyezvinyaada, ineukaira; pamiswe padzo paiya nesimba rokuremadza vanhu mwedzi mishanu." 
Revelation9:11 Dzaiya namambo wadzo waiya ngirosi yomurindi usina magumo; zina rayo ngechiHebheru ndiAbhadhoni, ngechiGiriki inezina rokuti Aphorioni." 
Revelation9:12 Dambudziko rokutanga rapinda. Wona, kuchauya madambudziko mairi ngesure kweizvi." 
Revelation9:13 Ngirosi yechitanhatu yakaridza hwama yayo, neni ndakazwa izwi rechibva panyanga murongomuna dzearita romukore riri pamberi paMwari" 
Revelation9:14 rechiti kunengirosi yechitanhatu, yaiya nehwama, “Sunhura ngirosi murongomuna idzo dzakasungwa parwizi rukuru Yufratesi.”" 
Revelation9:15 Ndizvo ngirosi murongomuna dzakasunhurwa, idzo dzakanasirirwa awa, zuva, mwedzi negore kuti dziuraye rupande rwechitatu rwevanhu." 
Revelation9:16 Nouwandu hwehondo dzevanogadha mahachi hwaiya mazana mairi emakumi emazana akapetwa kagumi; ndakazwa uwandu hwavo. 
Revelation9:17 Iyi ndiyo njira yendakaona ndiyo mahachi muchioniso changu; vagadhi vaiya nezvihlangu vane zvidzitiro zvepaditi zvakatsvuka kudai ngomuriro wesafire nesurufa; nemasoro emahachi akadai ngeemhondoro, muriro, chiushi nesurufa zvakabuda kubva pamiromo pawo." 
Revelation9:18 Ngenyatwa idzi nhatu rupande rwechitatu rwavanhu rwakaurawa, ngomuriro, chiushi nesurufa izvo zvakabuda kubva kumiromo yawo." 
Revelation9:19 Ngokuti simba remahachi riri mumiromo yawo nokumiswe yawo; ngokuti miswe yawo yakadai ngenyoka, inemasoro; kubudikidza ndiwo anoremadza." 
Revelation9:20 Vamweni vanhu, vasikazi kuurawa ngenyatwa idzi, avazi kutenderuka kubva kumishando yenyara dzavo, kuitira kuti vasazodira madhimoni nemiedzaniso yokudira yomukore, yesirivha, yethusi, yemapuwe neyemiti, iyo isikakoni kuona nokuti kuzwa nokuti kuhamba." 
Revelation9:21 Avazi kutenderuka kubva mukuuraya kwavo nokuti mukukamba kwavo nokuti mukuomba kwavo nokuti mukuba kwavo. 
Revelation10:1 Zvino ndakaona ngirosi imweni yakagwinya yechidzaka kubva mudenga, yakafuka gore, noutahwadande hwaiya padera pesoro rayo; nehope yayo yakadai ngezuva, netsoka dzayo dzaiya dzakadai ngesika dzomuriro." 
Revelation10:2 Yaiya yakabata munyara yayo kabhuku kakabeuka. Yakatsika rutsoka rwayo rwokumudyo padera poruandhle norwomuoshwe padera penyika. 
Revelation10:3 Yakadaidzira ngeizwi guru, kudai ngokurira kwemhondoro; naapo yadaidzira, kutinhira kunomwe kwakatinhira." 
Revelation10:4 Naapo kutinhira kunomwe kwaiya kwatinhira, ndaiya ndooda kunyora, ndakazwa izwi rechibva mudenga rechiti, “Namira izvo zvakaronzwa ngokutinhira kunomwe, usazvinyora.”" 
Revelation10:5 Zvino ngirosi iya yendakaona yakaema padera poruandhle nepenyika, yakamirudza nyara yayo yokumudyo mudenga," 
Revelation10:6 ikapika ndiye unopona mhera nariini nariini, uwo wakasika denga neizvo zvirimwo, nenyika neizvo zvirimwo, noruandhle neizvo zvirimwo kuti, “Kusachazoapo mukuwo wokunonoka," 
Revelation10:7 asi mumazuva apo ngirosi yechinomwe yooridza hwama yayo, ngouwo mukuwo chakafishika chaMwari chinozozadziswa, kudai ngezvaakaronza kuvaranda vake vaprofeti.”" 
Revelation10:8 Zvino izwi rendakazwa rechibva mudenga rakaereketazve kwendiri, rikati, “Enda, utore kabhuku kakabeuka kari munyara yengirosi yakaema padera poruandhle nepadera penyika.”" 
Revelation10:9 Ndizvo ndakaenda kunengirosi ndikaironzera kuti indipe kabhuku, nayo yakati kwendiri, “Katore, ukadye; kanozovava mundani yako, asi mumuromo wako kanozotapira kudai ngouchi.”" 
Revelation10:10 Ndakatora kabhuku kubva munyara yengirosi, ndakakadya, kaitapira kudai ngouchi mumuromo wangu; asi apo ndakadya, ndani yangu yakaitwa kuti ivave." 
Revelation10:11 Dzakati kwendiri, “Kunosisira kuti uprofetezve ngendaa yevanhu vazhinji, madzinza, ndimi nemadzimambo.”" 
Revelation11:1 Zvino ndakapuwa chipimiso cherutsanga rwakadai ngomudondoro, kukazwi kwendiri, “Miruka, upime temperi raMwari nearita naavo vanodiramwo," 
Revelation11:2 asi usapima ruwanze ruri kubanze kwetemperi; usarupima, ngokuti rwakapuwa kunevemadzinza, navo vanozotsikatsika pashi ngetsoka dzavo padera pedhorobha rakachena mwedzi makumi marongomuna namiiri (42)." 
Revelation11:3 Ndinozopa simba kuzvapupu zvangu zviiri kuti zviprofete mazuva gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi matanhatu (1,260), zvakapfeka machira emasaka.”" 
Revelation11:4 Ava vari miti miiri yemaorivhi nezvigadzikiro zviiri zvezvibani zvinoema pamberi paMambo wenyika. 
Revelation11:5 Kuti aripo munhu unoda kuvaremadza, muriro unobuda kumiromo yavo wechiuraya magaa avo; kuti aripo munhu unoda kuvaremadza, ngeiyi njira kunosisira kuti aurawe." 
Revelation11:6 Vane simba rokukonya denga, kuti isazonaya mvura ngamazuva okuprofeta kwavo, navo vane simba padera pemvura kuitsandudza kuti iite ngazi, nokuita kuti nyika igumirwe ngemadambudziko eshe, panguva dzeshe dzevanoda." 
Revelation11:7 Naapo vapedza uchapupu hwavo, chikara chinokwira kubva mumugodhi usina magumo chinozoambana navo nokuvanyisa nokuvauraya," 
Revelation11:8 nemiiri yavo yakafa inozorashwa mupato redhorobha guru rinozwi ngokuedzanisa Sodhoma neEgipite, paakakohomerwa Mambo wavo." 
Revelation11:9 Navo vanobva kuvanhu, kumarusinga, kundimi nokumadzinza, vanozoringira miiri yavo yakafa mazuva matatu nehafu, vasikatenderi kuti miiri yavo yakafa iikwe mumaiba;" 
Revelation11:10 naavo vanogara munyika vanodakara ndivo nokupembera; vanozoashidzana zvipo umwe kunoumweni, ngokuti ava vaprofeti vairi vakatambudza avo vanogara munyika." 
Revelation11:11 Ngesure kwemazuva matatu nehafu mweya wokupona unobva kuna Mwari wakapotera mukati mwavo, vakaema ngetsoka dzavo, nokutya kukurutu kwakagumira avo vakavaona." 
Revelation11:12 Zvino vakazwa izwi guru rechibva mudenga rechiti kwavari, “Kwirai uno!” Vakakwira mudenga vari mugore, magaa avo akavaringira." 
Revelation11:13 Ngeiro awa kwaiyapo kuzungunyika kukurutu kwenyika norupande rwegumi rwedhorobha rwakawa; vakaurawa vanhu vari makumi emazana manomwe mukuzungunyika kwenyika, nevamweni vakatya, vakakudza Mwari womudenga." 
Revelation11:14 Dambudziko rechipiri rapinda. Wona, dambudziko rechitatu rinokasira kuuya." 
Revelation11:15 Zvino ngirosi yechinomwe yakaridza hwama yayo, kwakazwika mazwi makuru mudenga echiti, “Umambo hwenyika hwaita umambo hwaMambo wedu nohwaKristu wake, naye unozotonga mhera nariini nariini.”" 
Revelation11:16 Nevakuru vari makumi mairi navarongomuna, vanogara pazvigaro zvavo zvoumambo pamberi paMwari, vakawa ngehope dzavo, vakadira Mwari" 
Revelation11:17 vechiti, “Tinomubonga, imwimwi Mambo Mwari, Munesimbareshe, uwo uripo nowaiyapo, ngokuti mwakadzitorera simba renyu guru, mukatonga." 
Revelation11:18 Madzinza akatseneka, noushungu hwenyu hwakauya, nomukuwo wevakafa kuti vatongwe, nomukuwo wokupa musharo kunevaranda venyu vaprofeti nevakacheneswa nokwavari vanotya zina renyu, vadoko nevakuru, nokuparadza avo vanoparadza nyika.”" 
Revelation11:19 Zvino temperi raMwari rakabeurwa mudenga, mwakaoneka mutemperi rake bhokisi rechitenderano chake; kwakaapo kupenya kwemheni nemazwi okutinhira nokuzungunyika kwenyika nematsanza makurutu." 
Revelation12:1 Chioniso chikuru chinoshamisa chakaoneka mudenga: mukadzi akapfeka zuva, nomwedzi pashi petsoka dzake, nepadera pesoro rake paiya nedzungudza renyeredzi gumi nembiri." 
Revelation12:2 Waiya nemimba naye wakachema echirwadziwa ngokubara, nokurwadziwa ngokusununguka." 
Revelation12:3 Nechioniso chimweni chinoshamisa chakaoneka mudenga; wona, dragoni guru rakatsvuka rine masoro manomwe nenyanga gumi, nepadera pemasoro aro paiya nemadzungudza manomwe." 
Revelation12:4 Muswe waro unokweya rupande rwechitatu rwenyeredzi dzomudenga nokudzikandira panyika. Nedragoni rakaema pamberi pomukadzi waiya ooda kubara mwana, kuti ridye mwana wake apo abarwa." 
Revelation12:5 Naye wakabara mukororo, unozotonga madzinza eshe ngendonga yesimbi. Asi mwana wake wakabvukwa, akakwidzwa kunaMwari nokuchigaro chake choumambo," 
Revelation12:6 nomukadzi wakatizira mushango, apo paiya nendau yaakanasirirwa ndiMwari, kuti vamurere apo mazuva gumi remazana nemazana mairi nemakumi matanhatu (1,260)." 
Revelation12:7 Zvino kwakaapo kurwa mudenga; Mikhaeri pamwepo nengirosi dzake dzakarwisa dragoni. Nedragoni rakarwisa pamwepo nengirosi dzaro," 
Revelation12:8 asi dzakanyiswa nendau yadzo aizi kuchazoapo mudenga. 
Revelation12:9 Dragoni guru rakakandirwa pashi, iyo nyoka sharuka, inozwi ndiDhiabhorosi naSathani, muchengedzeri wenyika yeshe, wakakandirwa pashi munyika, nengirosi dzake dzakakandirwa pashi pamwepo naye." 
Revelation12:10 Neni ndakazwa izwi guru rechibva mudenga rechiti, “Zvino rwaguma ruponeso, simba noumambo zvaMwari wedu nesimba raKristu wake, ngokuti mupumhi wehama dzedu wakandirwa pashi, uwo unovaitira ndaa pamberi paMwari wedu masikati nousiku." 
Revelation12:11 Navo vakamunyisa ngengazi yeGwai neizwi rouchapupu hwavo, navo avazi kuda kupona kwavo metsa murufu." 
Revelation12:12 Ndizvo dakarai, imwimwi matenga neavo vanogara mukati mwawo! Asi kushatanyi kwezvinoita kunyika nokuruandhle, ngokuti Dhiabhorosi wakadzaka pashi kwomuri anoushungu hukurutu, ngokuti unozia kuti nguva yake yafupika!”" 
Revelation12:13 Naapo dragoni raona kuti rakakandirwa pashi panyika, rakatambudza mukadzi uwo wakabara mukororo." 
Revelation12:14 Asi mukadzi wakapuwa maphaphiro mairi egodzi guru, kuti ambururuke kuenda mushango kundau yake, paanorerwa mukuwo nemikuwo nehafu yomukuwo kubva kuhope yenyoka." 
Revelation12:15 Zvino nyoka yakabudisa mvura mumuromo wayo kudai ngorwizi sure kwomukadzi, kuti atorwe ngorwizi." 
Revelation12:16 Nenyika yakadetsera mukadzi, ikabeura muromo wayo nokumedza rwizi urwo rwakabudiswa ngedragoni kubva mumuromo waro." 
Revelation12:17 Zvino dragoni rakatsenekera mukadzi, rikaenda, rikaambana nevamweni vana vake, avo vanongwarira mipango yaMwari vechibata uchapupu hwaJesu." 
Revelation12:18 Dragoni rakaema padera pejecha roruandhle. 
Revelation13:1 Zvino ndakaona chikara chechibuda kubva muruandhle, chine nyanga gumi nemasoro manomwe; nepadera penyanga dzacho paiya nemadzungudza gumi, nepadera pemasoro acho paiya nemazina okutuka Mwari." 
Revelation13:2 Nechikara chendakaona chaiya chakadai ngekhamba, netsoka dzacho dzaiya dzakadai ngebheya, nomuromo wacho waiya wakadai ngowemhondoro. Kwechiri dragoni rakapa simba raro, chigaro choumambo hwaro nesimba rokutonga gurutu." 
Revelation13:3 Ndakaona rimwe remasoro acho rairingirika rakadai ngerakakuwara yaamho, asi bonje rokufa kwacho raiya rapora, nenyika yeshe yakateera chikara yechishamiswa." 
Revelation13:4 Vanhu vakadira dragoni, ngokuti ndiro rakapa chikara simba raro, navo vakadira chikara vechiti, “Ndiani ungaedzaniswa nechikara nounesimba rokurwa nacho?”" 
Revelation13:5 Chakapuwa muromo wokuereketa mazwi akakura nokutuka, chakapuwazve simba rokuti chiite mishando yacho mwedzi makumi marongomuna namiiri (42)." 
Revelation13:6 Nacho chakabeura muromo wacho kutuka Mwari nokutuka zina rake nougaro hwake, navo vanogara mudenga." 
Revelation13:7 Chakapuwazve simba rokurwa nevakacheneswa nokuvanyisa. Chakapuwazve simba padera pedzinza reshe, pomunhu weshe, padera pendimi yeshe nembeu yeshe yomunhu." 
Revelation13:8 Veshe vanogara padera penyika vanozochidira, weshe unezina risikazi kunyorwa mubhuku rokupona reGwai rakaurawa kubvira mukuemeswa kwenyika." 
Revelation13:9 Kuti aripo unenzee ngaazwe: 
Revelation13:10 Kuti aripo wakaemeserwa kusungwa, unozosungwa muusungwa; kuti aripo wakaemeserwa kuurawa ngeshoti, ngegwinyiso unozourawa ngeshoti. Pano ndipo panokusengerera nokugonda kwevakacheneswa." 
Revelation13:11 Ndakaona chikara chimweni chechikwira kubuda chechibva munyika; chaiya nenyanga mbiri dzakadai ngedzegwai, chakaereketa kudai ngedragoni." 
Revelation13:12 Chinoshandisa simba rechikara chokutanga mukuona kwacho, chinoita kuti nyika navo vanogaramwo vadire chikara chokutanga, chaiya nebonje rokufa rakapora." 
Revelation13:13 Chinoita mioniso mikuru, kunyazwi kuita kuti muriro udzake padera penyika wechibva mudenga mukuona kwevanhu;" 
Revelation13:14 ngemioniso yechinotenderwa kuita pamberi pechikara, chinochengedzera avo vanogara munyika, chechironza kwavari kuti vaite muedzaniso wechikara chakabaiwa ngeshoti asi chikapona." 
Revelation13:15 Chakapuwa simba rokupa mweya kumuedzaniso wechikara, kuti muedzaniso wechikara ukone kuereketa nokuita kuti veshe vasikadiri muedzaniso wechikara vaurawe." 
Revelation13:16 Chinoitazve kuti veshe, vadoko nevakuru, vapfumi nevarombo, vakasunhurika nehloko, vaiswe chioniso panyara yavo yokumudyo nokuti pahuma yavo," 
Revelation13:17 kuitira kuti pasazoita munhu naumwe ungazokona kutenga nokuti kutengesa, asi uwo unechioniso, ndikwo kuti, zina rechikara nokuti namba yezina racho." 
Revelation13:18 Pano ndipo panodiwa ungwaru; iye unozwisisa ngaaerenge namba yechikara, ngokuti ndiyo namba yomunhu. Namba yake ndiyo mazana matanhatu nemakumi matanhatu nematanhatu (666)." 
Revelation14:1 Zvino ndakaringira, ndakaona Gwai rakaema pamutunhu weZioni! Vaiyapo naye zana nemakumi marongomuna namarongomuna emakumi emazana (144,000) vane zina rake nezina raBaba ake rakanyorwa pahuma dzavo." 
Revelation14:2 Ndakazwa izwi rakabva mudenga rakadai ngechaungira chemvura zhinji nokudai ngokutinhira kukurutu; neizwi rendakazwa raiya rakadai ngerevaridzi vechiridza zvimadangari zvavo," 
Revelation14:3 navo vanoemba nduyo itsva pamberi pechigaro choumambo nepamberi pezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna nepamberi pevakuru. Apana munhu waikona kudzidza nduyo iyo kwega avo vari zana nemakumi marongomuna nemarongomuna emakumi emazana (144,000) vakatengwa kubva munyika." 
Revelation14:4 Ava ndivo vasikazi kudzisvipisa ngavakadzi, ngokuti vakadai ngemhandwe; ndivo vanoteera Gwai kweshe kwerinoenda. Vakatengwa kubva pakati pevanhu kuti vaite mitanguro kunaMwari nokuGwai," 
Revelation14:5 nomumiromo yavo amuzi kuoneka kunyepa; avana ndaa. 
Revelation14:6 Neni ndakaona ngirosi imweni yechimbururuka pakati pedenga, ine vhangeri remhera nariini koochumaira kwavari avo vanogara munyika, kumadzinza eshe, marusinga eshe, kundimi dzeshe nokuvanhu veshe;" 
Revelation14:7 yechiti ngeizwi guru, “Ityai Mwari mumukudze, ngokuti awa rokutonga kwake raguma; mumudire uwo wakaita denga nenyika noruandhle nezvinyuka zvemvura.”" 
Revelation14:8 Ngirosi imweni yechipiri yakateera yechiti, “Rawa, rawa, Bhabhuroni gurutu! Rakaita kuti madzinza eshe amwe vhini roushungu hwokuomba kwaro.”" 
Revelation14:9 Zvino ngirosi imweni yechitatu yakadziteera yechiti ngeizwi gurutu, “Kuti aripo munhu unodira chikara nomuedzaniso wacho, nokuashira chioniso pahuma yake nokuti panyara yake," 
Revelation14:10 iye unozomwa vhini roushungu hwaMwari, rinodururwa risikazi kubvengedzwa mutsani youshungu hwake, naye unozotambudzwa ngomuriro nesurufa pamberi pengirosi dzakachena nepamberi peGwai." 
Revelation14:11 Nechiushi chokutambudzwa kwavo chinopwititika mhera nariini nariini. Navo avana zororo masikati nousiku, avo vanodira chikara nomuedzaniso wacho, kunyazwi ndiani unoashira chioniso chezina racho.”" 
Revelation14:12 Pano ndipo panodiwa kusengerera kwevakacheneswa, vanongwarira mipango yaMwari nokugonda kunaJesu." 
Revelation14:13 Ndakazwa izwi rechibva mudenga rechiti, “Nyora izvi: vanomuchena vakafa vanofira munaMambo kubvira zvinopano.” “Eya,” unoronza Mweya, “Kuti vazorore kubva kumishando yavo, ngokuti mishando yavo inovateera!”" 
Revelation14:14 Ndakaringira, ndikaona gore rakachena, nepadera pegore pane umwe wakadai ngoMukororo woMunhu echigarapo, anedzungudza romukore pasoro rake, nomunyara mwake anesikeyo inopinza." 
Revelation14:15 Nengirosi imweni yakabuda kubva mutemperi, yechidaidzira ngeizwi guru kwaari uwo wakagara padera pegore yechiti, “Shandisa sikeyo yako, ucheke, ngokuti awa rokucheka raguma; ngokuti zvokukukura zvenyika zvaibva.”" 
Revelation14:16 Ndizvo uwo wakagara padera pegore wakakandira sikeyo yake munyika, nenyika yakachekwa." 
Revelation14:17 Zvino ngirosi imweni yakabuda kubva mutemperi riri mudenga, nayo yaiya nesikeyo inopinza." 
Revelation14:18 Ngirosi imweni yakabuda kubva paarita, inesimba padera pomuriro, yakadaidzira ngeizwi gurutu kuneiyo inesikeyo inopinza yechiti, “Shandisa sikeyo yako inopinza, uunganidze zvikore zvemavhini enyika, ngokuti mavhini ayo aibva.”" 
Revelation14:19 Ndizvo ngirosi yakakandira sikeyo yayo munyika ikaunganidza mavhini enyika, ikaakandira muchisviniro chikurutu chevhini choushungu hwaMwari." 
Revelation14:20 Nechisviniro chevhini chakatsikwatsikwa kubanze kwedhorobha, kwakabuda ngazi kubva muchisviniro chevhini, ikagumira pamatomu emahachi, nokureba kwayo kwaiita makhiromitha mazana matatu (300), yechiita mamitha mairi kudzama." 
Revelation15:1 Ndakaona chioniso chimweni mudenga, chikuru chinoshamisa: ngirosi nomwe dzine madambudziko manomwe, awo okugumisira, ngokuti ndiwo okugumisira kuonisa ushungu hwaMwari." 
Revelation15:2 Ndakaona chairingirika chakadai ngoruandhle rwegirazi, rwakabvengedzwa nomuriro; naavo vakanyisa chikara nomuedzaniso wacho nenamba yezina racho, vaiema pasinde poruandhle rwegirazi, vane zvimadangari zvaMwari munyara dzavo." 
Revelation15:3 Vanoemba ruyo rwaMosi, muranda waMwari, noruyo rweGwai vechiti, “A Mambo Mwari, Unesimbareshe, mishando yenyu mikuru neinoshamisa! Nenjira dzenyu dziri dzakarurama, dzine gwinyiso, imwimwi Mambo wemadzinza!" 
Revelation15:4 Ndiani usikazomutyi nokukudza zina renyu, A Mambo? Ngokuti imwimwi mwega mwakachena. Madzinza eshe anozouya nokudira pamberi penyu ngokuti zviito zvenyu zvakarurama zvakaoniswa.”" 
Revelation15:5 Ngesure kweizvi ndakaona, temperi retende rouchapupu rakabeurwa mudenga," 
Revelation15:6 nengirosi nomwe dzakabuda kubva mutemperi, idzo dzaiya nemadambudziko manomwe, dzakapfeka machira akachena, anojeka, dzakasunga pamaditi adzo ngamabande omukore." 
Revelation15:7 Nechimwe chezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna chakapa ngirosi nomwe mikheyo minomwe yomukore yakazara ngoushungu hwaMwari, unopona mhera nariini nariini;" 
Revelation15:8 netemperi rakazara ngechiushi chaibva muuthende hwaMwari nomusimba rake, akuna waikona kupotera mutemperi metsa madambudziko manomwe engirosi nomwe apera." 
Revelation16:1 Zvino ndakazwa izwi guru rechibva mutemperi rechironzera ngirosi nomwe rechiti, “Endai, mwodururira munyika mikheyo minomwe youshungu hwaMwari.”" 
Revelation16:2 Ndizvo ngirosi yokutanga yakaenda, ikadurura mukheyo wayo munyika; kwakaapo zvironda zvakashata nezvinorwadza padera pevanhu vaiya nechioniso chechikara, vakadira muedzaniso wacho." 
Revelation16:3 Ngirosi yechipiri yakadururira mukheyo wayo muruandhle, rwakaita ngazi yakadai ngeyomunhu wakafa, nezviro zveshe zvaipona zvaiya muruandhle zvakafa." 
Revelation16:4 Ngirosi yechitatu yakadururira mukheyo wayo mundwizi nezvinyuka zvemvura, nazvo zvakaita ngazi." 
Revelation16:5 Ndakazwa ngirosi yepamvura yechiti, “Wakarurama, iwewe Wakachena, uripo nowaiyapo, ngokuti wakatonga izvi;" 
Revelation16:6 ngokuti vakaparadza ngazi yevakacheneswa neyevaprofeti, wakavapa ngazi kuti vamwe. Ngokuti vanosisirwa ndizvo!”" 
Revelation16:7 Ndakazwa izwi rechibva paarita rechiti, “Eya, A Mambo Mwari Unesimbareshe, gwinyiso nokururama zvitongero zvako!”" 
Revelation16:8 Ngirosi yechirongomuna yakadururira mukheyo wayo padera pezuva, rakapuwa simba rokupisha vanhu ngomuriro." 
Revelation16:9 Vanhu vakapishwa ngokupisha kwaityisa; vakatuka zina raMwari, uwo unesimba padera peaya madambudziko, navo avazi kutenderuka kuti vamukudze." 
Revelation16:10 Ngirosi yechishanu yakadururira mukheyo wayo padera pechigaro choumambo hwechikara, noumambo hwacho hwakasvipiswa kuita chidima; vakatsenga marurumi avo ngendaa yokurwadziwa kwavo." 
Revelation16:11 Vakatuka Mwari wedenga ngendaa yokurwadziwa kwavo neyezvironda zvavo, avazi kutenderuka kubva kumishando yavo." 
Revelation16:12 Ngirosi yechitanhatu yakadururira mukheyo wayo padera porwizi rukuru, Yufratesi, nemvura yarwo yakapwa kuti paitwe njira yemadzimambo aibva ngokumabvazuva." 
Revelation16:13 Ndakaona mweya mitatu yakashata yakadai ngemachedye, yechibuda kubva mumuromo wedragoni, wechikara nowomuprofeti wokunyepa." 
Revelation16:14 Ngokuti ndiyo mweya yemadhimoni inoita mioniso, inobuda kuenda kumadzimambo enyika dzeshe, kuvaunganidza pamwepo kurwa hondo yezuva guru raMwari Unesimbareshe." 
Revelation16:15 (“Ringira, ndinouya kudai ngembavha! Unomuchena uwo unogara akarinda nokungwarira zvokufuka zvake, kuti asazohamba ari mutitinini nevanhu vaone kutsveruka kwake!”)" 
Revelation16:16 Mweya yakavaunganidza pamwepo kundau inozwi ngechiHebheru Hamagedhoni. 
Revelation16:17 Ngirosi yechinomwe yakadururira mukheyo wayo mumhepo, izwi guru rakabuda mutemperi, rechibva pachigaro choumambo rechiti, “Zvapera!”" 
Revelation16:18 Kwakaapo kupenya kwemheni, mazwi, kutinhira, kwakaapozve kuzungunyika kukurutu kwenyika, kusikazi kumboapozve kwakadaro kubvira pakusikwa kwevanhu panyika, uku ndikwo kuzungunyika kwakapinda kushata kwenyika kwakadai." 
Revelation16:19 Nedhorobha guru rakagurwa kuita marupande matatu, nemadhorobha evemadzinza akawa. Mwari wakakarakadza Bhabhuroni guru, kuti ripuwe tsani yevhini rokutyisa kwoushungu hwake." 
Revelation16:20 Chiwi cheshe chakatiza, nemitunhu aizi kuonekazve;" 
Revelation16:21 nematsanza makurutu, rimwe ngarimwe rairema makhirogramu angakwana makumi mashanu akabva mudenga, akawira padera pevanhu, metsa vakatuka Mwari ngendaa yedambudziko rematsanza, ngokuti dambudziko rawo raiya rakakura kakurutu." 
Revelation17:1 Zvino imwe yengirosi nomwe dzaiya nemikheyo minomwe yakauya, ikati kwendiri, “Uya pano, ndinozokupangidzira kutongwa kwehure guru rinogara padera pemvura zhinji," 
Revelation17:2 iro madzimambo enyika akaomba naro, navanogara munyika vakaradza ngevhini rokuomba kwaro.”" 
Revelation17:3 Ngirosi yakanditora kuenda neni mushango ndakabatwa ndiMweya, ndakaona mukadzi akagadha padera pechikara chakatsvuka, chakazara ngemazina okutuka, chine masoro manomwe nenyanga gumi." 
Revelation17:4 Mukadzi wakapfeka zvakatsvukuruka nezvakatsvuka, nokunemeswa ngomukore nemapuwe anemutengo mukuru nemapherere, munyara mwake mwaiya netsani yomukore yakazara ngezvinonyangadza, zvine tsvina zvokuomba kwake;" 
Revelation17:5 nepahuma pake pakanyorwa zina rakafishika, “BHABHURONI GURU, MAI WEMAHURE NEEZVINONYANGADZA ZVENYIKA.”" 
Revelation17:6 Neni ndakaona mukadzi araradza ngengazi yevakacheneswa nengazi yezvapupu zvaJesu. Naapo ndakamuona, ndakashamiswa kakurutu." 
Revelation17:7 Asi ngirosi yakati kwendiri, “Washamiswa ngenyi? Ndinozokuronzera biningidzo rakafishika romukadzi nerechikara chinomutwara, chine masoro manomwe nenyanga gumi." 
Revelation17:8 Chikara chewaona chaiyapo, apachina, chodo kukwira kubva mumugodhi usina magumo nokuenda mukuparadzwa. Naavo vanogara munyika, vane mazina avo asikazi kunyorwa mubhuku rokupona kubvira pakusikwa kwenyika, vanozoshamiswa apo vaona chikara chaiyapo, chisiripo nechichauya." 
Revelation17:9 “Ndipo panodiwa kupinimidza kuneungwaru; masoro manomwe mitunhu minomwe, apo pagarwa ngomukadzi; ndiwozve madzimambo manomwe," 
Revelation17:10 vashanu vavo vakawa, noumwe uchiripo, noumweni aasati auya; naapo auya unosisira kuti agare mukuwo mudoko." 
Revelation17:11 Nechikara chaiyapo, zvino apana, ndicho chechisere, asi ngechimwe chezvinomwe, chinoenda mukurashwa." 
Revelation17:12 Nenyanga gumi dzewaona ndiwo madzimambo gumi asati aashira umambo, asi anoashira simba kudai ngemadzimambo pamwepo nechikara awa rimwe." 
Revelation17:13 Avo vanomupinimidzo umwe, vanopira simba ravo nokutonga kwavo kuchikara;" 
Revelation17:14 vanozorwisana neGwai, neGwai rinozovanyisa, ngokuti ndiMambo wemadzimambo noMutongi wevatongi, naavo vanaye vanodaidzwa nokutsanangurwa nokugondeka.”" 
Revelation17:15 Nayo yakati kwendiri, “Mvura iyo yewakaona, apo pakagara hure, ndivo vanhu, zviunga, madzinza nendimi." 
Revelation17:16 Nyanga gumi dzewaona, idzo nechikara zvinozonyenya hure; zvinozomuparadza mukumuita mutitinini, nokudya nyama yake nokumupisha ngomuriro." 
Revelation17:17 Ngokuti Mwari wakaisa izvi mumwoyo yazvo kuti zviite kuda kwake, ngokuita zvinomupinimidzo umwe nokupa simba roumambo hwazvo kune chikara, metsa mazwi aMwari aitika." 
Revelation17:18 Nomukadzi wowaona ndiro dhorobha guru iro rinotonga padera pemadzimambo enyika.” 
Revelation18:1 Ngesure kweizvi ndakaona ngirosi imweni yechidzaka kubva mudenga, inesimba guru; nenyika yakajekiswa ngouthende hwayo." 
Revelation18:2 Yakadaidzira ngeizwi rine simba yechiti, “Rawa, rawa, Bhabhuroni guru! Raita ugaro hwamadhimoni, nendau yemweya yeshe inetsvina, neyeshiri dzeshe dzinetsvina, dzinonyenyiwa." 
Revelation18:3 Ngokuti madzinza eshe akamwa vhini roushungu hwokuomba kwake, nemadzimambo enyika akaomba naye, nevatengisi vomunyika vakapfuma ngesimba rouwandu hwepfuma yokuangira kwake kuemura.”" 
Revelation18:4 Ndakazwa izwi rimweni rechibva mudenga rechiti, “Budai kubva kwaari, vanhu vangu, kuti musakoanisana naye muzvishaishi zvake, zve, kuti musazoashidzana naye madambudziko ake;" 
Revelation18:5 ngokuti zvishaishi zvake zvakaita murwi zvinoguma mudenga, naMwari wakakarakadza ngezvakashata zvake." 
Revelation18:6 Mupei musharo kudai ngezvaakamupa pachake, mumuhwirinzire kairi kakapetwa kudai ngemishando yake; mutsani iyo yaakazadza, mumudzadzire kairi." 
Revelation18:7 Ndizvo mupenyi kutambudzika nokusvipa mwoyo kukurutu, kudai ngouwandu hwaakadzikudza ndihwo nokupona mukudzidakadzisa pachake, ngokuti unoti mumwoyo mwake, ‘Inini ndakagara pano, ndini mambokadzi, andiri shirikadzi akadi, andizombooni dambudziko.’" 
Revelation18:8 Ndizvo madambudziko ake anozomugumira ngezuva rimwe, rufu, kubonda, nzara, naye unozopishwa ngomuriro; ngokuti Mambo Mwari, uwo unomutonga, unesimba.”" 
Revelation18:9 Madzimambo enyika, awo akaomba nokupona echidzidakadzisa pamwepo naye, anozochema nokubonda ngendaa yake, apo paanozoringira chiushi chokutsva kwake." 
Revelation18:10 Vanozoema vari kuretu, ngokutya kutambudzwa kwake vechiti, “Kutyisanyi uku! Kutyisanyi uku! Newe dhorobha guru, dhorobha rakagwinya Bhabhironi! Ngokuti ngeawa rimwe kutongwa kwako kwakugumira.”" 
Revelation18:11 Nevatengisi venyika vanochema nokubonda ngendaa yake ngokuti apana munhu uchatenga zviro zvavo," 
Revelation18:12 mukore, sirivha, mapuwe anemutengo mukuru, mapherere, nemachira akanaka orukangaza neakatsvukuruka, neesirika yakatsvuka; nembeu dzeshe dzemiti inonuhwira, nembeu dzeshe dzezvidziyo zvenyanga dzenzou, mbeu dzeshe dzezvidziyo zvakaitwa ngemiti inemutengo mukuru, zvethusi, zvesimbi, mapuwe akachena," 
Revelation18:13 sinamoni, mutombo unonuhwira, mutombo wokupisha unegwema rakanaka, mafuta okudzora, makha, vhini, mafuta, ufu hwakamotseka, koroni, n'ombe, makwai, mahachi, ngoro, hloko, kunyazwi nemweya yevanhu." 
Revelation18:14 “Michero yaidisiswa ngomweya wako yakabva kwouri, nezviro zveshe zvainakisisa nezvaipenya zvakaparadzwa kwouri, auchazozvionizve!”" 
Revelation18:15 Vatengesi veizvi zviro, avo vakaita makurudza ndiye, vanozoema kuretu ngokutya dambudziko rake, vechichema nokubonda" 
Revelation18:16 vechiti, “Kutyisanyi uku! Kutyisanyi uku, dhorobha guru! Raipfeka machira akanaka orukangaza akatsvukuruka, akatsvuka, rakanemeswa ngomukore namapuwe anemutengo mukuru nemapherere!" 
Revelation18:17 Ngokuti upfumi hwakakura kudaro hwaparadzwa ngeawa rimwe!” Nenduna dzeshe dzengarava, navo veshe vahambisi vengarava, navo veshe vairarama ngokushanda muruandhle, vakaema vari kuretu," 
Revelation18:18 vakadaidzira vechiona chiushi chokutsva kwake vechiti, “Ngeriri dhorobha ringaedzaniswa neiri dhorobha guru?”" 
Revelation18:19 Navo vakakandira bukuta padera pemasoro avo, vechichema nokubonda vechiti, “Kutyisanyi uku! Kutyisanyi uku, dhorobha guru umwo veshe vaiya nengarava dzavo muruandhle vakaitwa makurudza ngezvinokosha zvake! Ngokuti ngeawa rimwe rakaparadzwa." 
Revelation18:20 Dakarai ngendaa yake, iwewe denga, nemwi vakacheneswa, nemwi vapostori, nemwi vaprofeti! Ngokuti Mwari wakamutonga ngendaa yeizvo zvaakaita kwomuri.”" 
Revelation18:21 Nengirosi inesimba yakamirudza buwe rakadai ngeguyo rakakura, ikarikandira muruandhle yechiti, “Ngokuwa kwakakura kudaro Bhabhuroni, dhorobha guru, rinozokandirwa pashi, arichazooneki nepadoodoko." 
Revelation18:22 Neizwi revaridzi vezvimadangari nerevaembi, revanoridza minanzi, revaridzi vehwama arichazozwiki mukati mwako; mbeu dzemishando yeshe kunyazwi ngouri adzichazoapo nepadoodoko mukati mwako; neizwi rokukuya arichazozwiki nepadoodoko mukati mwako." 
Revelation18:23 Kujeka kwechibani akuchazojeki nepadoodoko mukati mwako; neizwi romukwambo neromuroorwa arichazozwiki mukati mwako; ngokuti vatengesi vako vaiya vanhu vakuru venyika, ngokuti madzinza eshe akachengedzerwa ngokurowa kwako." 
Revelation18:24 Mukati mwake mwakaoneka ngazi yevaprofeti neyevakacheneswa neyeavo veshe vakaurawa munyika.” 
Revelation19:1 Ngesure kweizvi ndakazwa bope guru rakadai ngerevanhu vazhinji mudenga rechiti, “Haleluya! Ruponeso nouthende nesimba ngezvaMwari wedu," 
Revelation19:2 ngokuti kutonga kwake kunegwinyiso nekwakarurama; wakatonga muombi mukuru wakashaishira nyika ngokuomba kwake, naye wakaunzidzira kwaari ngazi yevaranda vake padera pake.”" 
Revelation19:3 Naapo vakadaidzirazve vechiti, “Haleluya! Chiushi chake chinopwititika kukwira mudenga mhera nariini nariini.”" 
Revelation19:4 Nevakuru makumi mairi nevarongomuna nezvisikwa zvinopona zvirongomuna vakawa pashi, vakadira Mwari unogara pachigaro choumambo vechiti, “Ameni. Haleluya!”" 
Revelation19:5 Izwi rakazwika rechibva pachigaro choumambo rechiti, “Kudzai Mwari wedu, imwimwi mweshe varanda vake, imwimwi munomutya, vadoko nevakuru.”" 
Revelation19:6 Apapo ndakazwa chakadai ngeizwi rechiunga chakakura kudai ngebope remvura yakawanda nokudai ngeizwi romutinhiro unesimba rechiti, “Haleluya! Ngokuti Mambo Mwari wedu Unesimbareshe unotonga." 
Revelation19:7 Ngatidakare nokudakara kukurutu, ngatimupe mbiri; ngokuti muchadho weGwai waguma nomuroorwa waro wakadzinasirira." 
Revelation19:8 Wakatenderwa kuti adzisimidze ngemachira akanaka orukangaza, anojeka neakaperera.” Ngokuti machira akanaka orukangaza ndizvo zviito zvakarurama zvevakacheneswa." 
Revelation19:9 Ngirosi yakati kwendiri, “Nyora izvi: Vanomuchena vakakokwa kudhiri romuchadho weGwai.” Nayo yakati kwendiri, “Aya ndiwo mazwi egwinyiso aMwari.”" 
Revelation19:10 Ndakawa pashi patsoka dzayo kuidira, asi yakati kwendiri, “Ausisiri kuita kudaro! Inini ndiri muranda pamwepo newe nevangani vako, vanobatirira kuuchapupu hwaJesu. Dira Mwari! Ngokuti uchapupu hwaJesu huri mweya wokuprofeta.”" 
Revelation19:11 Ndakaona denga rakabeuka, ndikaona hachi rakachena! Mugadhi waro waizwi Unogondeka neUnegwinyiso, naye mukururama unotonga nokuita hondo." 
Revelation19:12 Madziso ake akadai ngomurazvu womuriro, nepadera pesoro rake pane madzungudza akawanda. Waiya nezina rakanyorwa, risina kuziikanwa ngevanhu, asi iye ega." 
Revelation19:13 Naye wakasimira zvokusimira zvakanyikwa mungazi: nezina rake rinozwi, Izwi raMwari." 
Revelation19:14 Nehondo dzomudenga dzakasimira machira akanaka, akachena neakaperera, dzaimuteera dzakagadha mahachi akachena." 
Revelation19:15 Neshoti yakapinza inobuda kubva pamuromo wake, kuti atemere pashi ndiyo madzinza, naye unozoatonga ngendonga yesimbi; unotsikatsika chikamuriro chevhini rokutyisa kwoushungu hwaMwari Unesimbareshe." 
Revelation19:16 Naye unezina rakanyorwa padera pechokufuka chake nepachizva chake kuti, “MAMBO WEMADZIMAMBO NOMUTONGI WEVATONGI.”" 
Revelation19:17 Ndakaona ngirosi yakaema muzuva, yakadaidzira ngeizwi guru, yechiti kuneshiri dzeshe dzinombururuka mudenga, “Uyai, muungane padhiri guru raMwari," 
Revelation19:18 kuti mudye nyama yemadzimambo, nyama yenduna huru, nyama yevanhu vane simba, nyama yemahachi nevagadhi vawo, nyama yevanhu veshe, vakasunhurika nevakasungwa, yevadoko nevakuru.”" 
Revelation19:19 Ndakaona chikara nemadzimambo enyika nehondo dzawo dzakaungana pamwepo kuti varwe hondo nouwo wakagadha hachi nehondo yake. 
Revelation19:20 Nechikara chakabatwa nomuprofeti wokunyepa uwo wakashanda zvioniso mukuona kwacho, zvaakachengedzera ndizvo avo vaiya vaashira chioniso chechikara, naavo vakadira muedzaniso wacho. Ava vairi vakakandirwa vechizwa mugandwa romuriro raibaka ngesurufa." 
Revelation19:21 Nevamweni vakaurawa ngeshoti youwo waigadha hachi, shoti iyo yakabuda kubva mumuromo wake; neshiri dzeshe dzakaguta ngenyama yavo." 
Revelation20:1 Zvino ndakaona ngirosi yechidzaka kubva mudenga, yakabata munyara yayo kiyi romugodhi usina magumo neketani huru." 
Revelation20:2 Yakabata dragoni, nyoka yekare, ndiyo Dhiabhorosi naSathani, ikamusunga makore gumi remazana." 
Revelation20:3 Yakamukandira mumugodhi usina magumo, ikaukonya ikaisa chinamiro padera pake, kuti asachazochengedzerazve madzinza, metsa makore gumi remazana apera. Ngesure kweizvi kunosisira kuti ambosunhurwa mukuwo mudoko." 
Revelation20:4 Ndakaona zvigaro zvoumambo, naavo vakagara padera pazvo, vakapuwa simba rokutonga. Ndakaona mweya yeavo vakagurwa masoro ngendaa youchapupu hwaJesu neizwi raMwari. Avazi kudira chikara nokuti muedzaniso wacho vasikazi kuashira chioniso pahuma dzavo nepanyara dzavo. Vakararama, vakatonga vari pamwepo naKristu makore gumi remazana (1,000)." 
Revelation20:5 Vamweni vevakafa avazi kurarama metsa makore gumi remazana apera. Uku ndikwo kumuka kwokutanga. 
Revelation20:6 Vanomuchena nokucheneswa avo vane chikoaniswa mukumuka kwokutanga. Padera peava kufa kwechipiri akuchina simba, asi vanozoita vapristi vaMwari nevaKristu, navo vanozotonga naye makore gumi remazana." 
Revelation20:7 Naapo makore gumi ramazana apera, Sathani unozosunhurwa kubva mutirongo rake." 
Revelation20:8 Unozobuda nokuenda koochengedzera madzinza kumarupande marongomuna enyika, Gogi naMagogi. Unozovaunganidza pamwepo kurwa hondo; uwandu hwavo hwakadai ngejecha roruandhle." 
Revelation20:9 Vakakwira pakupamhama kwenyika, vakatendenedza matumba evakacheneswa nedhorobha rinodikanwa. Naapo wakadzaka muriro wechibva mudenga, ukavapedza." 
Revelation20:10 NaDhiabhorosi uwo wakavachengedzera wakakandirwa mugandwa romuriro nesurufa, munechikara nomuprofeti wokunyepa navo vanozotambudzwa masikati nousiku mhera nariini nariini." 
Revelation20:11 Ndakaona chigaro chikuru choumambo chakachena, nouwo wakagara padera pacho; ngokuapo kwake nyika nedenga zvakamutiza, akuzi kuchazooneka ndau yazvo." 
Revelation20:12 Ndakaona vakafa, vakuru nevadoko, vakaema pamberi pechigaro choumambo, nemabhuku akabeurwa. Bhuku rimwenizve rakabeurwa, bhuku rokupona. Nevakafa vakatongwa kudai ngemishando yavo, kudai ngezvakanyorwa mumabhuku." 
Revelation20:13 Noruandhle rwakabudisa vakafa vaiya mukati mwarwo, rufu neHaidhesi zvakabudisa vakafa vaiya mukati mwazvo, navo veshe vakatongwa umwe ngaumwe ngendaa yezvaakaita." 
Revelation20:14 Zvino rufu neHaidhesi zvakakandirwa mugandwa romuriro. Uku ndikwo kufa kwechipiri, gandwa romuriro." 
Revelation20:15 Kudai aripo wakaoneka zina rake risikazi kunyorwa mubhuku rokupona, wakakandirwa mugandwa romuriro." 
Revelation21:1 Zvino ndakaona denga idzva nenyika itsva; ngokuti denga rokutanga nenyika yokutanga zvakapinda, noruandhle paiya pasisina." 
Revelation21:2 Neni ndakaona dhorobha rakachena, Jerusarema idzva, rechidzaka kubva mudenga kunaMwari, rakanasirirwa kudai ngomuroorwa wakanemeserwa mwamuna wake." 
Revelation21:3 Neni ndakazwa izwi guru rechibva pachigaro choumambo rechiti, “Ringira, ugaro hwaMwari huri pakati pevanhu. Unozogara navo; navo vanozoita vanhu vake, naMwari emene unozoa navo, echiita Mwari wavo." 
Revelation21:4 Naye unozopukuta masodzi eshe kubva pamadziso avo. Rufu aruchazoapo; akuchina kubonda nokuti kuchema zve, nokuti kurwadziwa, ngokuti zviro zvokutanga zvapinda.”" 
Revelation21:5 Nouwo wakagara pachigaro choumambo wakati, “Ringira, ndinoita zviro zveshe kuti zviite zvitsva.” Wakatizve, “Nyora izvi, ngokuti aya mazwi anogondeka, anegwinyiso.”" 
Revelation21:6 Zvino wakati kwendiri, “Zvaitwa! Ndini Arfa naOmega, wokutanga nowokugumisira. Kwavari vane nyota ndinozovapa mvura isina mutengo, mvura inobva pachinyuka chokupona." 
Revelation21:7 Iye unonyisa unozogara nhaka yezviro izvi, neni ndinozoita Mwari wake, naye unozoita mukororo wangu." 
Revelation21:8 Asi ngendaa yevanotya, vasikagondi, vanonyangadza, vaurayi, vaombi, varoyi, vadiri vemiedzaniso, navo veshe vanyepi vanozoa nechikoaniswa chavo mugandwa rinobaka ngomuriro nesurufa, ndirwo rufu rwechipiri.”" 
Revelation21:9 Zvino yakauya imwe yengirosi nomwe yeidzo dzaiya nemikheyo minomwe yakazara ngemadambudziko manomwe okugumisira, yakaereketa kwendiri yechiti, “Uya pano, ndinozokuonisa muroorwa, mukadzi weGwai.”" 
Revelation21:10 Yakanditora ndakabatwa ndiMweya kuenda kumutunhu mukuru wakareba, ikandionisa dhorobha rakachena Jerusarema, rechidzaka kubva mudenga kunaMwari," 
Revelation21:11 rine uthende hwaMwari; kujeka kwaro kwaiya kwakadai ngebuwe rino mutengo mukuru rakadai ngebuwe rejasipa, rakaera kudai ngegirazi." 
Revelation21:12 Raiya rine rukumbati rukuru, rwakareba kuenda mudenga, rine misiwo gumi namiiri, nepamisiwo pane ngirosi gumi nambiri; nemazina akanyorwa padera payo, mazina evakororo gumi navairi vaIsuraeri." 
Revelation21:13 Kumabvazuva kwaiya nemisiwo mitatu, dera kwaiya nemisiwo mitatu, kubani kwaiya nemisiwo mitatu, kumabirirazuva kwaiya nemisiwo mitatu." 
Revelation21:14 Norukumbati rwedhorobha rwaiya nemadzeyo gumi namairi, nepadera pawo paiya nemazina gumi namairi evapostori gumi navairi veGwai." 
Revelation21:15 Iyo yakaereketa neni yaiya nendonga yomukore yokupima dhorobha nemisiwo yaro norukumbati rwaro. 
Revelation21:16 Nedhorobha raiya nemarupande marongomuna akaedzana, nokureba kwaro kwakandodai ngokupamhama kwaro; nayo yakapima dhorobha ngendonga, rakaita makhiromitha mazana makumi mairi nemazana marongomuna (2,400) kureba kwaro; nokupamhama nokukwira kwaro mudenga kwaiya kwakaedzana." 
Revelation21:17 Nayo yakapima rukumbati rwaro, rwaiya mamitha matanhatu kureba kuenda mudenga, kudai ngokupima kwomunhu, kunoti, kwengirosi." 
Revelation21:18 Norukumbati rwaro rwakaakiwa ngejasipa, nedhorobha raiya romukore wakaera, wakadai ngegirazi rakaera." 
Revelation21:19 Madzeyo orukumbati rwedhorobha akanemeswa ngembeu dzeshe dzemapuwe anemutengo mukuru. Dzeyo rokutanga raiya rejasipa, rechipiri raiya resafire, rechitatu raiya reagate, rechirongomuna raiya reemeraridhi," 
Revelation21:20 rechishanu raiya reonikisi, rechitanhatu raiya rekhaneriani, rechinomwe raiya rekrusoriti, rechisere raiya rebheruri, rechipfumbamwe raiya retopazi, rechigumi raiya rekrusoprasi, rechigumi narimwe raiya rejakiniti nerechigumi namairi raiya reametisiti." 
Revelation21:21 Nemisiwo gumi namiiri yaiya nemapherere gumi namairi, umwe ngaumwe wemisiwo waiya nepherere rimwe, nepato redhorobha raiya romukore wakaera, wakadai ngegirazi rakaera." 
Revelation21:22 Neni andizi kuona temperi mudhorobha, ngokuti Mambo Mwari Unesimbareshe neGwai ndivo temperi raro." 
Revelation21:23 Nedhorobha aritsvaki zuva nokuti mwedzi kurijekisa, ngokuti uthende hwaMwari ndikwo kujeka kwaro, neGwai ndicho chibani charo." 
Revelation21:24 Nemadzinza anozohamba ngokujeka kwaro, nemadzimambo enyika anozounza uthende hwawo mukati mwaro." 
Revelation21:25 Nemisiwo yaro aizokonyiwi masikati, ngokuti ahuzoapo usiku." 
Revelation21:26 Vanozounzamwo mukati mwaro uthende nokuremeredzwa kwemadzinza. 
Revelation21:27 Asi akuna nachimwe chakasvipiswa chinozopoteramwo nokuti uwo unoita chinonyangadza nemanyepo, asi avo vega vakanyorwa mubhuku rokupona reGwai." 
Revelation22:1 Zvino ngirosi yakandionisa rwizi rwemvura yokupona, rwakaera kudai ngegirazi, rwechibuda muchigaro choumambo hwaMwari necheGwai." 
Revelation22:2 Pakati pepato redhorobha, nokumarutii eshe orwizi, waiyapo muti wokupona, wechibereka mbeu dziri gumi nambiri dzemichero, wechibereka michero yawo mwedzi umwe ngaumwe; nemashakani omuti aiya mutombo wokuponesa madzinza." 
Revelation22:3 Akuchazoapozve nachimwe chiro chakatukwa; asi chigaro choumambo hwaMwari necheGwai zvinozoapo mukati mwaro, nevaranda vake vanozomudira." 
Revelation22:4 Vanozoona hope yake, nezina rake rinozoapo pahuma dzavo." 
Revelation22:5 Akuchazoapo usiku; navo avazotsvaki kujeka kwechibani nokuti kujeka kwezuva, ngokuti Mambo Mwari unozoita kujeka kwavo navo vanozotonga mhera nariini nariini." 
Revelation22:6 Nayo yakati kwendiri, “Aya mazwi anogondeka, anegwinyiso, naMambo Mwari, Mwari womweya yevaprofeti, wakatuma ngirosi yake kuti ionise varanda vake zvinosisira kuitika ngokukasira.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Ringira, ndinokasira kuuya. Unomuchena uwo unongwarira mazwi okuprofeta kweiri bhuku.”" 
Revelation22:8 Inini, Johani, ndakazwa ndikaona zviro izvi. Naapo ndazwa nokuzviona, ndakawa pashi kuti ndidire pamberi petsoka dzengirosi yakandionisa izvi;" 
Revelation22:9 asi yakati kwendiri, “Ngwara kuti usaita kudaro! Ndiri muranda pamwepo newe nehama dzako vaprofeti, naavo vanongwarira mazwi okuprofeta kwebhuku iri. Dira Mwari!”" 
Revelation22:10 Nayo yakati kwendiri, “Usakonya mazwi okuprofeta kwebhuku iri, ngokuti mukuwo waapasinde." 
Revelation22:11 Iye usikazi kururama ngaagare asikazi kururama, nouwo unetsvina ngaagare anetsvina, nouwo wakarurama ngaagare kuita zvakarurama, nouwo wakacheneswa ngaagare kuita wakacheneswa." 
Revelation22:12 “Ringira, ndinokasira kuuya, ndinouya nomusharo wangu, kuti ndihwirinzire kuneweshe kudai ngezvaakaita." 
Revelation22:13 Ndiri Arfa naOmega, wokutanga newokugumisira, muambi nowokupedzisira.”" 
Revelation22:14 Vanomuchena avo vanosuka zvokusimira zvavo, kuti vawe nesimba rokuuya kumuti wokupona nokupotera ngepamisiwo mudhorobha." 
Revelation22:15 Ngokuti ngokubanze kunembwa, varoyi, vaombi, vaurayi, vadiri vemiedzaniso, navo veshe vanoda nokuita vanyepi." 
Revelation22:16 “Inini, Jesu, ndakatuma ngirosi yangu kwomuri nouchapupu uhwu muzviara. Ndini runzinde nomubarirwana waDhavhidha, nyeredzi inojeka masase.”" 
Revelation22:17 Mweya nomuroorwa vanoti, “Uyai.” Nouwo unozwa ngaati, “Uyai.” Naye unozwa nyota ngaauye. Uwo unoda ngaatore mvura yokupona pasina mutengo." 
Revelation22:18 Inini ndinopupura kumunhu weshe unozwa mazwi okuprofeta kwebhuku iri, kuti kudai aripo munhu unozotutsira kwaari awo, Mwari unozotutsira kwaari madambudziko akanyorwa mubhuku iri." 
Revelation22:19 Kudai aripo munhu unozodusa mazwi ebhuku rokuprofeta uku, Mwari unozodusa chikoaniswa chake kumuti wokupona nokudhorobha rakachena, izvo zvakanyorwa mubhuku iri." 
Revelation22:20 Iye unopupura izvi unoti, “Eya, ndinokasira kuuya.” Ameni. Uya, Mambo Jesu!"
